example: It is important to make a decision before the deadline.
example_cn: 在截止日期前做出決定是很重要的。
pattern: It is + adj + to + V + O
simple: It is important to make a decision.
simple_cn: 做決定很重要。

example: Students who study hard every day will make progress in their English.
example_cn: 每天認真讀書的學生，英文會進步。
pattern: S + who + V + will + V + O
simple: Students who study hard will make progress.
simple_cn: 用功讀書的學生會進步。

example: We should make an effort to reduce plastic waste in our daily lives.
example_cn: 我們應該在日常生活中努力減少塑膠垃圾。
pattern: S + should + V + to + V + O
simple: We should make an effort to reduce waste.
simple_cn: 我們應該努力減少浪費。

example: With hard work and determination, anyone can achieve a goal they set.
example_cn: 只要努力加上決心，任何人都能達成自己設定的目標。
pattern: With + N, S + can + V + O
simple: With hard work, anyone can achieve a goal.
simple_cn: 只要努力，每個人都能達成目標。

example: Those who never give up are more likely to achieve success in life.
example_cn: 那些從不放棄的人，在人生中更容易取得成功。
pattern: S + be more likely to + V + O
simple: They are more likely to achieve success.
simple_cn: 他們比較有可能取得成功。

example: It is difficult to achieve balance between work and personal life.
example_cn: 要在工作和個人生活之間取得平衡並不容易。
pattern: It is + adj + to + V + between A and B
simple: It is hard to achieve balance between work and life.
simple_cn: 要在工作和生活之間取得平衡很困難。

example: Before making a choice, you should consider carefully all the options available.
example_cn: 在做選擇之前，你應該仔細考慮所有可用的選項。
pattern: Before + V-ing, S + should + V + adv + O
simple: Before deciding, you should consider carefully all options.
simple_cn: 在做決定之前，你應該仔細考慮所有選項。

example: Young people often act without taking time to consider the consequences of their actions.
example_cn: 年輕人常常沒有花時間思考後果就採取行動。
simple: They act without considering the consequences.
simple_cn: 他們行動時不考慮後果。

example: The committee will consider options before announcing the final decision.
example_cn: 委員會會在宣布最終決定之前，先考慮各種選項。
pattern: S + will + V + O + before + V-ing
simple: We will consider options before deciding.
simple_cn: 我們會在決定前先考慮各種選項。

example: Reading widely is one of the best ways to develop skills in critical thinking.
example_cn: 廣泛閱讀是培養批判思考能力的最佳方法之一。
pattern: V-ing is one of the best ways to + V + O
simple: Reading is one of the best ways to develop skills.
simple_cn: 閱讀是培養技能最好的方法之一。

example: If you develop a habit of exercising daily, you will feel healthier and more energetic.
example_cn: 如果你養成每天運動的習慣，你會感覺更健康、更有活力。
pattern: If + S + V + O, S + will + feel + adj
simple: If you develop a habit, you will feel better.
simple_cn: 如果你養成一個習慣，你會感覺更好。

example: The government needs to develop a plan to deal with the growing pollution problem.
example_cn: 政府需要制定一個計畫來應對日益嚴重的污染問題。
pattern: S + needs to + V + O + to + V + O
simple: The government needs to develop a plan to solve the problem.
simple_cn: 政府需要擬定一個計畫來解決這個問題。

example: Good teachers have a positive influence on their students' attitudes toward learning.
example_cn: 好老師對學生的學習態度會產生正面的影響。
pattern: S + have a + adj + influence on + N
simple: Teachers have a positive influence on students.
simple_cn: 老師對學生有正面的影響。

example: Social media has the power to influence others and shape public opinion quickly.
example_cn: 社群媒體有能力影響他人，並迅速塑造公眾輿論。
pattern: S + have the power to + V + O
simple: Media has the power to influence others.
simple_cn: 媒體有能力影響他人。

example: Technology has a strong influence on society and the way people communicate.
example_cn: 科技對社會以及人們的溝通方式有很深的影響。
pattern: S + have a + adj + influence on + N
simple: Technology has a strong influence on society.
simple_cn: 科技對社會有很強的影響力。

example: Climate change has had a significant impact on wildlife and natural habitats.
example_cn: 氣候變遷對野生動物和自然棲息地造成了顯著的影響。
pattern: S + have had a significant impact on + N
simple: Climate change has had a significant impact on nature.
simple_cn: 氣候變遷對大自然造成了顯著的衝擊。

example: After months of practice, she showed a significant improvement in her speaking ability.
example_cn: 經過幾個月的練習，她的口說能力有了明顯的進步。
pattern: After + N, S + showed a significant improvement in + N
simple: After practice, she showed a significant improvement.
simple_cn: 練習之後，她展現出明顯的進步。

example: Good habits play a significant role in helping students succeed in their studies.
example_cn: 好習慣在幫助學生學業成功上扮演了重要的角色。
pattern: S + play a significant role + in + V-ing
simple: Education plays a significant role in shaping society.
simple_cn: 教育在塑造社會方面扮演了重要的角色。

example: Many experts suggest a solution that involves reducing car usage in city centers.
example_cn: 許多專家提出一個解決方案，就是減少在市區開車。
pattern: S + suggest a solution + that + V + O
simple: Experts suggest a solution that reduces traffic.
simple_cn: 專家提出了一個能減少交通量的解決方案。

example: Doctors strongly suggest that patients avoid eating too much sugar.
example_cn: 醫生強烈建議病人避免攝取過多糖分。
pattern: S + strongly suggest + that + S + V
simple: Doctors strongly suggest that patients exercise regularly.
simple_cn: 醫生強烈建議病人要規律運動。

example: Studies suggest that regular reading can greatly improve vocabulary and writing skills.
example_cn: 研究指出，規律閱讀能大幅提升詞彙量與寫作能力。
pattern: Studies suggest that + S + can + V + O
simple: Studies suggest that reading can improve vocabulary.
simple_cn: 研究指出，閱讀可以增進詞彙量。

example: Regular exercise and good sleep can help athletes improve performance significantly.
example_cn: 規律運動加上充足睡眠，能幫助運動員明顯提升表現。
pattern: S + can help + O + V + O
simple: Exercise can help athletes improve performance.
simple_cn: 運動能幫助運動員提升表現。

example: Using digital tools in the classroom can significantly improve students' engagement and motivation.
example_cn: 在課堂上使用數位工具，能顯著提高學生的參與度與學習動機。
simple: Using technology can significantly improve learning.
simple_cn: 使用科技可以大幅改善學習效果。

example: Watching English movies with subtitles is an effective way to improve one's English.
example_cn: 看有字幕的英文電影，是增進英文能力很有效的方法。
pattern: V-ing is an effective way to + V + O
simple: Watching movies is an effective way to improve English.
simple_cn: 看電影是提升英文的有效方法。

example: Parents and teachers should work together to provide support for struggling students.
example_cn: 家長和老師應該合作，一起幫助學習遇到困難的學生。
pattern: S + should + V + together + to + V + O + for + N
simple: Teachers should work together to provide support for students.
simple_cn: 老師們應該合作，為學生提供支援。

example: Volunteering abroad can provide opportunities to experience different cultures firsthand.
example_cn: 到國外當志工，能提供親身體驗不同文化的機會。
pattern: V-ing can provide opportunities to + V + O
simple: Traveling can provide opportunities to learn new things.
simple_cn: 旅行能提供學習新事物的機會。

example: The internet can provide information on almost any topic within seconds.
example_cn: 網路可以在幾秒鐘內提供幾乎任何主題的資訊。
pattern: S + can provide information on + N + within + time
simple: The internet can provide information on any topic.
simple_cn: 網路可以查到任何主題的資訊。

example: Human activities are destroying the natural environment at an alarming rate.
example_cn: 人類活動正以驚人的速度破壞自然環境。
pattern: S + be + V-ing + O + at an alarming rate
simple: Humans are destroying the natural environment at an alarming rate.
simple_cn: 人類正以驚人的速度破壞自然環境。

example: A comfortable and safe learning environment helps students focus and perform better.
example_cn: 舒適又安全的學習環境，能幫助學生專心並表現得更好。
pattern: A + adj + N + helps + O + V
simple: A good learning environment helps students focus.
simple_cn: 良好的學習環境有助於學生專注。

example: Everyone has a responsibility to protect the environment for future generations.
example_cn: 每個人都有責任為後代保護環境。
pattern: S + have a responsibility to + V + O + for + N
simple: Everyone has a responsibility to protect the environment.
simple_cn: 每個人都有保護環境的責任。

example: The government must take action to solve the traffic problem right away.
example_cn: 政府必須立刻採取行動解決交通問題。
pattern: S + must + take action + to + V
simple: We must take action to protect the earth.
simple_cn: 我們必須採取行動來保護地球。

example: We should take advantage of the good weather to go hiking in the mountains.
example_cn: 我們應該趁天氣好，去爬山健行。
pattern: S + should + take advantage of + N
simple: Take advantage of this rare opportunity.
simple_cn: 好好把握這個難得的機會。

example: People often take their health for granted until they get sick.
example_cn: 人們常常在生病之後，才懂得珍惜健康。
pattern: S + take + N + for granted + until + clause
simple: Don't take your family for granted.
simple_cn: 不要把家人的付出視為理所當然。

example: When making a plan, you must take all possible risks into consideration.
example_cn: 制定計畫時，必須把所有可能的風險都考慮進去。
simple: Take his advice into consideration.
simple_cn: 把他的建議列入考量。

example: All students are encouraged to take part in extracurricular activities.
example_cn: 鼓勵所有學生參加課外活動。
simple: He took part in the marathon.
simple_cn: 他參加了馬拉松比賽。

example: True craftsmen always take pride in every detail of their work.
example_cn: 真正的工匠對自己作品的每個細節都引以為傲。
simple: Parents take pride in their children's success.
simple_cn: 父母會以孩子的成就為榮。

example: The siblings take turns doing the dishes every evening.
example_cn: 這對兄弟姊妹每天晚上輪流洗碗。
simple: We took turns driving during the road trip.
simple_cn: 我們在公路旅行中輪流開車。

example: It is crucial to take global warming seriously before it is too late.
example_cn: 在為時已晚之前，認真看待全球暖化非常重要。
simple: You should take your doctor's advice seriously.
simple_cn: 你應該認真聽從醫生的建議。

example: Bright colors and bold designs always catch one's attention more than plain ones.
example_cn: 鮮豔的顏色和大膽的設計，總是比樸素的款式更吸引人注意。
simple: Her unique dress caught my attention.
simple_cn: 她那件獨特的洋裝吸引了我的注意。

example: I was lucky to catch sight of the beautiful rainbow after the heavy rain.
example_cn: 我很幸運在大雨過後，看到了那道美麗的彩虹。
pattern: S + catch sight of + N + time/place
simple: He caught sight of a rare bird in the forest.
simple_cn: 他在森林裡瞥見了一隻罕見的鳥。

example: He had to study hard to catch up with his classmates after being sick for a week.
example_cn: 他病了一個禮拜後，必須努力讀書才能趕上同學的進度。
pattern: S + have to + V + to + catch up with + N
simple: I need to read more to catch up with my work.
simple_cn: 我需要多讀點東西才能趕上工作進度。

example: Please keep in mind that the train will leave at exactly 9 a.m.
example_cn: 請記住，火車會在上午九點整準時發車。
pattern: Keep in mind that + S + V
simple: Keep in mind that safety always comes first.
simple_cn: 要記住，安全永遠是第一位的。

example: It is a good habit to keep track of your daily expenses using a smartphone app.
example_cn: 用手機App記錄每天的開銷是個好習慣。
pattern: S + keep track of + N + by V-ing
simple: She keeps track of time by wearing a watch.
simple_cn: 她靠戴手錶來掌握時間。

example: Could you please keep an eye on my luggage while I go to the restroom?
example_cn: 可以麻煩你幫我看一下行李嗎？我要去上個廁所。
pattern: Could you keep an eye on + N + while + clause?
simple: Keep an eye on the baby for me.
simple_cn: 幫我看著一下小孩。

example: Students should pay attention to every detail when completing the science experiment.
example_cn: 學生在做科學實驗時，應該注意每一個細節。
pattern: S + should pay attention to + N
simple: Pay attention to the warning signs.
simple_cn: 要注意那些警告標誌。

example: If you neglect your health now, you will definitely pay the price in the future.
example_cn: 如果你現在忽略健康，將來一定會付出代價。
pattern: If + clause, S + will + pay the price
simple: He paid the price for his careless mistake.
simple_cn: 他為自己的粗心失誤付出了代價。

example: My family plans to pay a visit to the national museum this coming weekend.
example_cn: 我們家計畫這個週末去參觀國家博物館。
pattern: S + plan to + pay a visit to + N
simple: We will pay a visit to our grandparents.
simple_cn: 我們要去探望祖父母。

example: The factory had to hire more workers to meet the demand for its popular new products.
example_cn: 工廠為了應付熱門新產品的需求，不得不增聘更多員工。
pattern: S + V + to meet the demand for + N
simple: They increased production to meet the demand.
simple_cn: 他們增加產量以滿足需求。

example: We had to work overtime in order to meet the deadline for our report.
example_cn: 為了趕上報告的截止日期，我們只好加班。
pattern: S + V + in order to meet the deadline
simple: She worked fast to meet the deadline.
simple_cn: 她趕工以在期限前完成。

example: The new product was disappointing and completely failed to meet expectations in the market.
example_cn: 這款新產品令人失望，完全沒有達到市場的預期。
simple: The new phone met all my expectations.
simple_cn: 這支新手機完全符合我的期待。

example: Moving abroad means you will face a challenge every day as you adapt to a new culture.
example_cn: 搬到國外代表你每天都要面對挑戰，去適應新的文化。
simple: Every startup faces a challenge at the beginning.
simple_cn: 每家新創公司一開始都會面臨挑戰。

example: After cheating on the exam, he finally had to face the music and accept his punishment.
example_cn: 考試作弊後，他終究得面對現實，接受應有的懲罰。
pattern: S + have to face the music + after + V-ing
simple: You broke the window, now you have to face the music.
simple_cn: 你打破了窗戶，現在得承擔後果。

example: It is time for him to face reality and start looking for a real job.
example_cn: 他該認清現實，開始找一份正經的工作了。
pattern: It is time for + S + to + face reality
simple: She refused to face reality after the failure.
simple_cn: 失敗後，她拒絕面對現實。

example: The NGO launched a campaign to raise awareness about ocean pollution.
example_cn: 這個非政府組織發起了一項活動，來提高大家對海洋污染的意識。
pattern: S + aim to raise awareness of + N
simple: The short video raised awareness about mental health.
simple_cn: 這部短影音提高了大家對心理健康的認識。

example: The school held a charity concert to raise funds for the local hospital.
example_cn: 學校舉辦了一場慈善音樂會，為當地的醫院募款。
pattern: S + held an event to raise funds for + N
simple: They sell cookies to raise funds for the club.
simple_cn: 他們賣餅乾為社團募款。

example: After hours of discussion, the two parties managed to reach an agreement.
example_cn: 經過好幾個小時的討論，雙方終於達成了協議。
simple: We reached an agreement after a long meeting.
simple_cn: 我們開了好久的會，終於達成協議。

example: It is difficult for the committee members to reach a consensus on this controversial issue.
example_cn: 委員會成員對於這個爭議性議題很難達成共識。
pattern: S + reach a consensus on + N
simple: They reached a consensus on the new policy.
simple_cn: 他們就這項新政策達成了共識。

example: With proper guidance, every child can reach their potential in any field they choose.
example_cn: 只要有適當的引導，每個孩子都能在自己選擇的領域發揮潛力。
pattern: With + N, S + can reach one's full potential
simple: Hard work helps you reach your potential.
simple_cn: 努力能幫助你發揮潛力。

example: Parents should set a good example for their children to follow.
example_cn: 父母應該為孩子樹立良好的榜樣，讓他們學習。
pattern: S + set a good example for + N
simple: The teacher sets a good example for the students.
simple_cn: 老師為學生樹立了好榜樣。

example: You should always set a goal before you start working on any important project.
example_cn: 在開始任何重要專案之前，你都應該先設定一個目標。
pattern: V-ing + is the first step toward + N/V-ing
simple: Setting a goal keeps you motivated.
simple_cn: 設定目標能讓你保持動力。

example: The young athlete trained extremely hard and successfully set a record at the national event.
example_cn: 這位年輕運動員訓練非常刻苦，成功在全國賽事中創下了紀錄。
simple: She set a record for the fastest run.
simple_cn: 她創下了最快跑步紀錄。

example: Great works of art and literature often leave a deep impression on those who experience them.
example_cn: 偉大的藝術與文學作品，往往會讓欣賞過的人留下深刻印象。
pattern: S + leave a deep impression on + N
simple: His speech left a deep impression on me.
simple_cn: 他的演講讓我印象深刻。

example: Despite the restaurant's great location, the food quality leaves much to be desired.
example_cn: 這家餐廳雖然地點很好，但食物品質實在有待加強。
pattern: S + leave much to be desired
simple: His attitude leaves much to be desired.
simple_cn: 他的態度還有很大的改善空間。

chinese: 獲得使用(或進入)的權利/管道
type: 動詞 + 名詞 + 介系詞
example: Students can gain access to a wealth of information through the digital library.
example_cn: 學生可以透過數位圖書館獲取豐富的資訊。
pattern: S + can gain access to + N + through + N
simple: Users can gain access to the file online.
simple_cn: 使用者可以透過網路存取這個檔案。

example: Taking a part-time job allows teenagers to gain experience in a real work environment.
example_cn: 打工可以讓青少年在真實的工作環境中累積經驗。
pattern: V-ing + is a good way for O to gain experience
simple: Volunteering helps you gain experience.
simple_cn: 當志工可以幫助你累積經驗。

example: Talented artists often struggle for years before they gain recognition from the public.
example_cn: 有才華的藝術家常常要努力好幾年，才能獲得大眾的肯定。
pattern: S + finally gained recognition from + N
simple: The scientist gained recognition for his discovery.
simple_cn: 這位科學家因為他的發現獲得肯定。

example: It is always polite to express gratitude when others help you in difficult times.
example_cn: 當別人在你困難時伸出援手，表達感謝總是很有禮貌的。
pattern: I would like to express my gratitude for + N
simple: She expressed gratitude for the gift.
simple_cn: 她對這份禮物表達了感謝。

example: Many scientists express concern about the rising sea levels caused by climate change.
example_cn: 許多科學家對氣候變遷導致的海平面上升表達憂慮。
pattern: S + have expressed concern about + N
simple: Parents expressed concern about school safety.
simple_cn: 家長們對校園安全表達了憂慮。

example: After graduation, he decided to devote himself to medical research to help more people.
example_cn: 畢業後，他決定投身醫學研究，幫助更多人。
pattern: S + decide to devote oneself to + N/V-ing
simple: She devoted herself to helping the poor.
simple_cn: 她全心投入幫助貧困的人。

example: You need to devote time and energy to your studies if you want to pass the exam.
example_cn: 如果你想通過考試，就必須投入時間和精力在課業上。
pattern: S + need to devote time and energy to + N
simple: He devotes all his energy to his business.
simple_cn: 他把所有精力都投入在事業上。

example: Teams that spare no effort in preparation usually achieve the best results.
example_cn: 在準備上不遺餘力的團隊，通常會得到最好的成果。
pattern: S + spare no effort to + V + O
simple: The doctors spared no effort to save his life.
simple_cn: 醫生們不遺餘力地搶救他的性命。

example: Even when busy, a good friend will always spare time to listen to your problems.
example_cn: 即使再忙，好朋友也會願意撥空聽你訴說煩惱。
pattern: Even though S+V, S + still spared time to + V
simple: Can you spare some time to talk?
simple_cn: 你能抽出一點時間聊聊嗎？

example: With determination and persistence, anyone can fulfill a dream they have always had.
example_cn: 只要有決心和毅力，每個人都能實現自己長久以來的夢想。
pattern: It takes N to fulfill a dream
simple: She finally fulfilled her dream of becoming a pilot.
simple_cn: 她終於實現了當飛行員的夢想。

example: A trustworthy person will always try their best to fulfill a promise they made.
example_cn: 一個值得信賴的人，一定會盡力兌現自己許下的承諾。
pattern: S + try one's best to fulfill a promise
simple: He worked hard to fulfill his promise to his mother.
simple_cn: 他努力兌現對母親的承諾。

example: As a citizen of this country, everyone should fulfill their duty to society.
example_cn: 作為這個國家的公民，每個人都應該盡到自己對社會的責任。
pattern: As a N, S + should fulfill one's duty
simple: The police officer fulfilled his duty bravely.
simple_cn: 那位警察勇敢地履行了他的職責。

example: Thanks to advances in technology, space travel has finally become a reality.
example_cn: 多虧科技的進步，太空旅行終於成為現實。
simple: Her childhood dream became a reality.
simple_cn: 她童年的夢想變成了現實。

example: People have recently become aware of the serious environmental issues caused by plastic waste.
example_cn: 人們最近開始意識到塑膠垃圾造成的嚴重環境問題。
simple: He became aware of the danger.
simple_cn: 他意識到了危險的存在。

example: It took the exchange student several months to become accustomed to eating with chopsticks.
example_cn: 這位交換學生花了幾個月的時間，才習慣用筷子吃飯。
pattern: S + become accustomed to + V-ing / N
simple: I have become accustomed to waking up early.
simple_cn: 我已經習慣早起了。

type: 動詞 + 副詞 + 形容詞
example: Learning a second language has become increasingly important in today's globalized world.
example_cn: 在現今全球化的世界裡，學習第二語言變得越來越重要。
simple: Recycling has become increasingly important.
simple_cn: 資源回收變得越來越重要。

example: Thousands of people became infected with the deadly virus during the pandemic.
example_cn: 疫情期間，有數千人感染了這種致命病毒。
simple: He became infected with COVID-19.
simple_cn: 他感染了新冠肺炎。

example: The famous actor denied that he had become involved in the political scandal.
example_cn: 那位知名演員否認自己涉及這起政治醜聞。
simple: She became involved in the charity project.
simple_cn: 她開始參與那個慈善計畫。

type: 動詞 + 副詞 + 過去分詞
example: The local restaurant became widely known for its traditional and delicious beef noodles.
example_cn: 這家在地餐廳以傳統又好吃的牛肉麵聞名。
pattern: S + became widely known for + N
simple: The town became widely known for its hot springs.
simple_cn: 這個小鎮因為溫泉變得很有名。

example: The white dove has become a symbol of peace and hope all over the world.
example_cn: 白鴿在全世界已經成為和平與希望的象徵。
pattern: S + have/has become a symbol of + N
simple: The bridge became a symbol of connection.
simple_cn: 這座橋成了連結的象徵。

example: Going to college helps teenagers become independent and learn how to manage their time.
example_cn: 上大學能幫助青少年變得獨立，並學會如何管理時間。
simple: Living alone helps you become independent.
simple_cn: 一個人住能幫助你變得獨立。

example: Electric cars have become popular in recent years due to environmental concerns.
example_cn: 由於環保意識抬頭，電動車在近年來變得越來越受歡迎。
pattern: S + have become popular + 時間/原因
simple: Smartphones became popular quickly.
simple_cn: 智慧型手機很快就流行起來了。

example: Teenagers often spend too much time surfing the Internet instead of studying.
example_cn: 青少年常常花太多時間上網，而不是用功讀書。
simple: I spent three hours reading the novel.
simple_cn: 我花了三個小時讀那本小說。

example: Arguing over trivial matters with others is simply wasting time and energy.
example_cn: 跟別人為了小事爭論，根本就是在浪費時間和精力。
pattern: V-ing + is wasting time and energy
simple: Worrying about the past is wasting time.
simple_cn: 擔心過去就是在浪費時間。

example: Knowing how to manage your time effectively is the key to academic success.
example_cn: 懂得有效管理時間，是學業成功的關鍵。
pattern: V-ing is the key to + N
simple: Managing your time well is the key to success.
simple_cn: 把時間管理好是成功的關鍵。

example: Taking the high-speed rail will save you a lot of time compared to driving.
example_cn: 搭高鐵比開車能省下很多時間。
pattern: V-ing + will save you time + compared to + V-ing
simple: Using a computer saves time compared to writing by hand.
simple_cn: 用電腦比用手寫更省時間。

example: There is no need to rush; just take your time and finish the test carefully.
example_cn: 不用急，慢慢來，仔細把考卷寫完就好。
pattern: There is no need to + V; just take your time
simple: Take your time doing the work.
simple_cn: 這份工作你慢慢做就好。

example: Even the most confident speakers get nervous from time to time.
example_cn: 即使是最有自信的講者，有時候也會緊張。
pattern: S + V + adj + from time to time
simple: I visit my grandparents from time to time.
simple_cn: 我偶爾會去看我爺爺奶奶。

example: Despite the heavy rain, we managed to arrive at the station on time.
example_cn: 儘管下著大雨，我們還是設法準時抵達了車站。
pattern: Despite + N, S + managed to + V
simple: He managed to finish the test.
simple_cn: 他順利完成了考試。

example: Learning how to manage stress is vital for modern people to maintain mental health.
example_cn: 學會管理壓力，對現代人維持心理健康來說非常重要。
pattern: V-ing is vital for N to V
simple: Managing stress is vital to stay healthy.
simple_cn: 管理壓力對保持健康很重要。

example: Parents should teach their children how to manage money properly from a young age.
example_cn: 父母應該從小就教導孩子如何妥善管理金錢。
pattern: S + teach + O + how to manage money
simple: She learned how to manage money.
simple_cn: 她學會了怎麼管理錢。

example: It takes leadership and experience to successfully manage a business in a competitive market.
example_cn: 要在競爭激烈的市場中成功經營一家企業，需要領導力和經驗。
pattern: It takes N to manage a business
simple: It takes time to manage a business well.
simple_cn: 要把一家公司管理好需要時間。

example: Some students perform better when they are working under pressure before exams.
example_cn: 有些學生在考試前有壓力時，反而表現得更好。
simple: He works well under pressure.
simple_cn: 他在壓力下表現得很好。

example: Parents should not put too much pressure on their children to get perfect grades.
example_cn: 父母不應該為了要求孩子拿到完美的成績，而給他們太多壓力。
pattern: S + put pressure on + N + to + V
simple: Society puts pressure on women to look a certain way.
simple_cn: 社會給女性帶來外貌上的壓力。

example: Teenagers often start smoking or drinking because of peer pressure.
example_cn: 青少年常常因為同儕壓力而開始抽菸或喝酒。
pattern: S + V + O + because of peer pressure
simple: Many teenagers suffer from peer pressure.
simple_cn: 很多青少年都承受著同儕壓力。

example: Listening to soft music is an effective way to cope with stress from daily life.
example_cn: 聽輕音樂是應對日常生活壓力的一個有效方法。
pattern: V-ing is a way to cope with stress
simple: She is learning how to cope with stress.
simple_cn: 她正在學習如何應對壓力。

example: Many people choose to exercise regularly in order to relieve stress.
example_cn: 很多人為了減輕壓力，選擇規律運動。
pattern: S + V + in order to relieve stress
simple: Taking a hot bath can relieve stress.
simple_cn: 泡個熱水澡可以舒緩壓力。

example: When people are under stress, their immune systems may become weaker.
example_cn: 人壓力大的時候，免疫系統可能會變弱。
pattern: When S + be + under stress, S + V
simple: He tends to eat a lot when he is under stress.
simple_cn: 他壓力大的時候容易暴飲暴食。

example: Engaging in outdoor activities on weekends can help people reduce stress from work.
example_cn: 週末去戶外活動，可以幫助大家減輕工作壓力。
pattern: V-ing + can help + O + reduce stress
simple: Taking a walk can help you reduce stress.
simple_cn: 散步可以幫助你減輕壓力。

example: The school hired more counselors to ease the pressure on students preparing for the college entrance exam.
example_cn: 學校增聘了更多輔導老師，來減輕準備大學指考的學生的壓力。
pattern: S + V + to ease the pressure on + N
simple: The government took measures to ease the financial pressure.
simple_cn: 政府採取措施來緩解財務壓力。

example: The new scholarship program aims to lessen the financial burden on low-income families.
example_cn: 新的獎學金計畫目標是減輕低收入家庭的經濟負擔。
pattern: S + aim to lessen the burden on + N
simple: We should share chores to lessen the burden on our parents.
simple_cn: 我們應該分擔家事，減輕爸媽的負擔。

example: It takes time, patience, and mutual respect to build a healthy relationship with others.
example_cn: 建立健康的關係需要時間、耐心和互相尊重。
pattern: It takes N to build a relationship
simple: It takes trust to build a relationship.
simple_cn: 建立關係需要信任。

example: Long-distance couples often find it difficult to maintain a close relationship.
example_cn: 遠距離戀愛的情侶通常很難維持親密的關係。
pattern: S + find it + adj + to maintain a relationship
simple: I find it hard to maintain a relationship with him.
simple_cn: 我覺得很難跟他維持關係。

example: Developing good interpersonal relationships is crucial for your future career and mental health.
example_cn: 培養良好的人際關係，對你未來的事業和心理健康都很重要。
simple: Building good interpersonal relationships is crucial.
simple_cn: 建立良好的人際關係很重要。

example: Many high school students feel pressure to get into a top university.
example_cn: 很多高中生會因為想考上頂尖大學而感到壓力。
simple: Employees feel pressure to meet the sales target.
simple_cn: 員工為了達成業績目標感到壓力很大。

example: Taking a deep breath is a quick and effective way to relieve pressure.
example_cn: 深呼吸是快速又有效的紓壓方式。
pattern: V-ing is a way to relieve pressure
simple: Crying is sometimes a good way to relieve pressure.
simple_cn: 哭有時候是釋放壓力的好方法。

example: The government implemented new policies to reduce pressure on the healthcare system.
example_cn: 政府實施了新政策，來減輕醫療體系的壓力。
pattern: S + V + to reduce pressure on + N
simple: We hired more staff to reduce pressure on the team.
simple_cn: 我們多請了一些人手來減輕團隊的壓力。

example: The ability to handle pressure is an important quality for an emergency room nurse.
example_cn: 對急診室護理師來說，抗壓能力是一項重要的特質。
pattern: The ability to handle pressure is + N/adj
simple: Learning to handle pressure is essential.
simple_cn: 學會處理壓力是很重要的。

chinese: 應付壓力、妥善處理壓力
example: Professional athletes need to learn how to cope with pressure during major international competitions.
example_cn: 職業運動員需要學會如何在大型國際比賽中應對壓力。
pattern: S + need to learn how to cope with pressure
simple: He knows how to cope with pressure well.
simple_cn: 他很懂得如何應對壓力。

example: The company is facing pressure from environmental groups to reduce its carbon footprint.
example_cn: 這家公司正面臨環保團體的壓力，要求減少碳足跡。
pattern: S + be + facing pressure from + N
simple: The mayor is facing pressure from the public.
simple_cn: 市長正面臨來自民眾的壓力。

example: The newly built bridge is designed to withstand pressure from strong winds and earthquakes.
example_cn: 這座新建的橋樑設計上能承受強風和地震的壓力。
pattern: S + be designed to withstand pressure
simple: A good leader must withstand pressure.
simple_cn: 好的領導者必須能承受壓力。

example: The mayor refused to bow to pressure and stood firm on his decision to ban plastic bags.
example_cn: 市長拒絕屈服於壓力，堅持他禁用塑膠袋的決定。
pattern: S + refuse to bow to pressure
simple: The committee bowed to public pressure.
simple_cn: 委員會屈服於公眾壓力。

example: The manager came under pressure to resign after the company's profits dropped significantly.
example_cn: 公司利潤大幅下滑後，經理面臨辭職的壓力。
pattern: S + come under pressure + 時間/原因
simple: The government has come under pressure to act.
simple_cn: 政府面臨必須採取行動的壓力。

example: The labor union brought pressure to bear on the management to improve working conditions.
example_cn: 工會對管理階層施加壓力，要求改善工作條件。
pattern: S + bring pressure to bear on + O + to + V
simple: They brought pressure to bear on the committee.
simple_cn: 他們對委員會施加壓力。

example: Working in a high pressure environment can lead to serious health problems over time.
example_cn: 長期在高壓環境下工作，可能會導致嚴重的健康問題。
pattern: V-ing + in a high pressure environment + can lead to + N
simple: High pressure jobs are not for everyone.
simple_cn: 高壓的工作不是每個人都適合。

example: He decided to quit his demanding job and look for a low pressure one.
example_cn: 他決定辭掉高壓的工作，找一份壓力小的工作。
pattern: S + decide to + V + and look for a low pressure + N
simple: The typhoon is caused by a low pressure system.
simple_cn: 颱風是由低氣壓系統造成的。

chinese: 強烈的壓力、極大的壓力
example: The team was under intense pressure to finish the project before the holiday.
example_cn: 團隊承受著要在假期前完成專案的巨大壓力。
pattern: S + be + under intense pressure to + V
simple: She works well even under intense pressure.
simple_cn: 即使在高度壓力下，她也能表現得很好。

example: The bridge collapsed due to the heavy pressure of the floodwaters.
example_cn: 這座橋因為承受不住洪水的巨大壓力而垮了。
pattern: S + collapsed due to the heavy pressure of + N
simple: He couldn't bear the heavy pressure of expectations.
simple_cn: 他受不了期望帶來的沉重壓力。

example: The CEO resigned last week amid mounting pressure from the shareholders.
example_cn: 那位執行長上週在股東的壓力下辭職了。
pattern: S + V + amid mounting pressure from + N
simple: The government faces mounting pressure to change the law.
simple_cn: 政府面臨修改法律的壓力越來越大。

example: There is growing pressure on schools to provide better mental health support.
example_cn: 學校面臨越來越大的壓力，必須提供更好的心理健康支援。
pattern: There is growing pressure on + N + to + V
simple: He felt growing pressure to succeed.
simple_cn: 他感受到成功的壓力與日俱增。

example: Many young women suffer from eating disorders due to social pressure to be thin.
example_cn: 很多年輕女性因為社會對瘦身的壓力而飽受飲食失調之苦。
pattern: S + suffer from + N + due to social pressure
simple: Social pressure can affect teenagers' behavior.
simple_cn: 社會壓力會影響青少年的行為。

example: The loss of his job put severe financial pressure on his family.
example_cn: 他失業後，家裡的經濟壓力變得很沉重。
pattern: N + put + adj + financial pressure on + N
simple: Students often face financial pressure when paying tuition.
simple_cn: 學生繳學費時常常面臨經濟壓力。

example: The committee finally yielded to political pressure and reversed its decision.
example_cn: 委員會最終屈服於政治壓力，撤銷了原本的決定。
pattern: S + yielded to political pressure and + V
simple: The reform was delayed due to political pressure.
simple_cn: 這項改革因為政治壓力而被延遲。

example: Bowing to public pressure, the company apologized for its misleading advertisement.
example_cn: 在公眾壓力下，公司為其誤導性的廣告公開道歉。
pattern: Bowing to public pressure, S + V
simple: Public pressure forced the mayor to resign.
simple_cn: 公眾壓力迫使市長辭職。

example: The country reformed its economy largely in response to external pressure.
example_cn: 這個國家主要是因為外部壓力而進行了經濟改革。
pattern: S + V + in response to external pressure
simple: The company changed its strategy due to external pressure.
simple_cn: 這家公司因為外部壓力改變了策略。

example: Internal pressure within the party led to the change of leadership.
example_cn: 黨內壓力導致了領導層的更換。
pattern: Internal pressure within + N + led to + N
simple: He suffered from internal pressure to be perfect.
simple_cn: 他因為追求完美的內在壓力而受苦。

example: Eating too much salt can cause high blood pressure, which increases the risk of heart disease.
example_cn: 吃太多鹽會導致高血壓，進而增加心臟病的風險。
pattern: V-ing + can cause high blood pressure
simple: The doctor checked my blood pressure.
simple_cn: 醫生幫我量了血壓。

example: Your ears might pop during the flight because of the sudden change in air pressure.
example_cn: 搭飛機時，因為氣壓突然改變，耳朵可能會覺得悶悶的。
pattern: S + V + because of the change in air pressure
simple: Low air pressure usually brings rain.
simple_cn: 低氣壓通常會帶來雨水。

example: The water pressure in the shower is so low that it takes forever to wash my hair.
example_cn: 淋浴的水壓實在太弱了，洗個頭要洗超久。
pattern: The water pressure is so + adj + that + S + V
simple: We need to fix the water pressure in the bathroom.
simple_cn: 我們需要修理浴室的水壓。

example: Many modern people suffer from insomnia due to extreme work pressure.
example_cn: 很多現代人因為工作壓力太大而飽受失眠之苦。
pattern: S + suffer from + N + due to work pressure
simple: He quit his job because of heavy work pressure.
simple_cn: 他因為工作壓力太大而辭職。

example: When taking the TOEIC test, candidates are often under great time pressure.
example_cn: 考多益的時候，考生通常會承受很大的時間壓力。
pattern: S + be + under great time pressure
simple: Working under time pressure can cause mistakes.
simple_cn: 在時間壓力下工作容易出錯。

example: Listening to music is a good way to cope with exam pressure.
example_cn: 聽音樂是應付考試壓力的好方法。
pattern: V-ing is a good way to cope with exam pressure
simple: Exam pressure can lead to anxiety.
simple_cn: 考試壓力可能導致焦慮。

example: Professional athletes face immense performance pressure from both fans and sponsors.
example_cn: 職業運動員要面對來自粉絲和贊助商的巨大表現壓力。
pattern: S + face immense performance pressure from + N
simple: Salesmen are usually under high performance pressure.
simple_cn: 業務員通常承受很高的業績壓力。

example: Many young couples choose not to have children because of severe economic pressure.
example_cn: 很多年輕夫妻因為經濟壓力太大而選擇不生小孩。
pattern: S + V + because of economic pressure
simple: Economic pressure forces people to work two jobs.
simple_cn: 經濟壓力逼得人們得打兩份工。

example: In order to survive competitive pressure, businesses must constantly innovate.
example_cn: 為了在競爭壓力下生存，企業必須不斷創新。
pattern: In order to survive competitive pressure, S + must + V
simple: Asian students face high competitive pressure.
simple_cn: 亞洲學生面臨高度的競爭壓力。

example: The celebrity checked into a hospital due to exhaustion from constant media pressure.
example_cn: 那位名人因為受不了媒體的持續壓力，累到住進了醫院。
pattern: S + V + due to constant media pressure
simple: Media pressure can destroy a person's privacy.
simple_cn: 媒體壓力可能摧毀一個人的隱私。

example: You are under no pressure to make a decision right now; take your time.
example_cn: 你現在不用急著做決定，慢慢來就好。
pattern: S + be + under no pressure to + V
simple: I feel under no pressure at this job.
simple_cn: 我在這份工作上完全沒有壓力。

example: The manager resigned due to intense pressure from the board of directors.
example_cn: 經理因為董事會施加的強大壓力而辭職了。
pattern: S + V + due to intense pressure from + N
simple: She faced pressure from her parents to get married.
simple_cn: 她面臨來自爸媽的催婚壓力。

example: The growing population puts immense pressure on the city's public transportation system.
example_cn: 人口不斷成長，對城市的公共運輸系統造成極大的負擔。
pattern: N + puts immense pressure on + N
simple: There is a lot of pressure on him to win.
simple_cn: 他背負著很大的壓力，非得贏不可。

example: Many teenagers feel the pressure to conform to society's beauty standards.
example_cn: 許多青少年感受到必須符合社會審美標準的壓力。
pattern: S + feel the pressure to + V
simple: There is pressure to finish the work early.
simple_cn: 有壓力要早點把工作做完。

example: Researchers decided to conduct a study on the effects of sleep deprivation.
example_cn: 研究人員決定進行一項關於睡眠不足影響的研究。
pattern: S + conduct a study on + N
simple: They will conduct a study on water pollution.
simple_cn: 他們要進行一項水污染的研究。

example: The university is planning to carry out a study about teenage internet addiction.
example_cn: 這所大學正計畫針對青少年網路成癮進行一項研究。
pattern: S + carry out a study about + N
simple: Scientists carried out a study to test the new drug.
simple_cn: 科學家做了一項研究來測試這種新藥。

example: According to a recent study, eating dark chocolate can improve brain function.
example_cn: 根據一項近期研究，吃黑巧克力可以改善大腦功能。
pattern: According to a study, S + V + O
simple: According to a study, air pollution is worsening.
simple_cn: 根據一項研究，空氣污染正在惡化。

type: 名詞 + 動詞 + 連接詞
example: A new study shows that regular exercise reduces the risk of heart disease.
example_cn: 一項新研究顯示，規律運動能降低心臟病的風險。
pattern: A study shows that + S + V + O
simple: A study shows that smiling makes you happier.
simple_cn: 研究顯示，微笑會讓你更快樂。

type: 名詞 + 動詞 + 連接詞
example: The study suggests that children who read more have better imagination.
example_cn: 這項研究指出，閱讀量較多的孩子想像力更豐富。
pattern: A study suggests that + S + V
simple: A study suggests that stress affects memory.
simple_cn: 研究指出，壓力會影響記憶力。

type: 名詞 + 動詞 + 連接詞
example: A recent study finds that listening to classical music helps students focus.
example_cn: 一項近期研究發現，聽古典音樂有助於學生集中注意力。
pattern: A study finds that + S + V
simple: The study finds that sleep is crucial for learning.
simple_cn: 這項研究發現，睡眠對學習很重要。

example: The results of the study were published in a famous medical journal.
example_cn: 這項研究的結果刊登在一本知名的醫學期刊上。
pattern: The results of the study + be + V-p.p.
simple: The results of the study are surprising.
simple_cn: 這項研究的結果令人驚訝。

example: According to a recent study, more people are choosing a vegetarian diet.
example_cn: 根據一項近期研究，越來越多人選擇吃素。
pattern: In a recent study, S + V
simple: A recent study proved his theory wrong.
simple_cn: 最近一項研究證明他的理論是錯的。

example: This long-term study tracks the health of participants over 20 years.
example_cn: 這項長期研究追蹤參與者的健康狀況長達20年。
simple: We need a long-term study to see the real effects.
simple_cn: 我們需要長期的研究才能看到真正的效果。

example: The government funded a large-scale study to investigate the cause of the disease.
example_cn: 政府資助了一項大規模研究，以調查這種疾病的成因。
pattern: S + V + a large-scale study to + V
simple: A large-scale study was conducted last year.
simple_cn: 去年進行了一項大規模的研究。

example: Making a detailed study plan can help you prepare for the exam more efficiently.
example_cn: 制定一份詳細的讀書計畫，能幫助你更有效率地準備考試。
pattern: S + make a study plan to + V
simple: I need to stick to my study plan.
simple_cn: 我需要堅持我的讀書計畫。

example: She always sticks to her study schedule to make sure she finishes all her homework.
example_cn: 她總是嚴格按照自己的讀書進度表，確保完成所有作業。
pattern: S + stick to one's study schedule
simple: Creating a study schedule prevents procrastination.
simple_cn: 制定讀書時間表可以避免拖延。

example: Developing good study habits early on will benefit you throughout your college life.
example_cn: 及早養成良好的讀書習慣，對你整個大學生活都會有幫助。
simple: He needs to improve his study habits.
simple_cn: 他需要改善他的讀書習慣。

example: The teacher gave us some useful tips on how to improve our study skills.
example_cn: 老師給了我們一些實用的建議，教我們如何提升讀書技巧。
simple: Time management is an important study skill.
simple_cn: 時間管理是一項重要的學習技巧。

example: Different students may require different study methods to learn effectively.
example_cn: 不同的學生可能需要不同的讀書方法，才能有效學習。
simple: Flashcards are a popular study method.
simple_cn: 閃卡是一種很受歡迎的讀書方法。

example: Joining a study group allows you to discuss difficult questions with your classmates.
example_cn: 加入讀書小組可以讓你和同學一起討論難題。
simple: Our study group meets every Friday.
simple_cn: 我們的讀書小組每週五都會聚會。

example: After a three-hour study session in the library, they decided to take a break.
example_cn: 在圖書館讀了三個小時的書之後，他們決定休息一下。
pattern: After a long study session, S + V
simple: Let's grab a coffee before our next study session.
simple_cn: 下次讀書會前，我們先去喝杯咖啡吧。

type: 動詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: He stayed up late last night to study for his final exam.
example_cn: 他昨晚熬夜念書準備期末考。
simple: I need to study for a math exam tomorrow.
simple_cn: 我明天要準備數學考試。

example: If you study hard and stay focused, you will definitely achieve your goals.
example_cn: 只要你認真念書、保持專注，一定可以達成目標。
pattern: S + need to study hard to + V
simple: She studies hard to get a scholarship.
simple_cn: 她為了拿到獎學金很認真唸書。

example: Studying abroad can broaden your horizons and help you experience different cultures.
example_cn: 出國留學可以開拓視野，體驗不同的文化。
simple: He went to the UK to study abroad.
simple_cn: 他去英國留學。

example: I need to leave early today because I have a dentist appointment this afternoon.
example_cn: 我今天得早點走，因為下午要看牙醫。
pattern: S + have an appointment with + N
simple: She has an appointment with the manager.
simple_cn: 她跟經理有約。

example: She had a heated argument with her colleague about the new project.
example_cn: 她跟同事為了新專案大吵了一架。
pattern: S + have an argument with + N
simple: They had an argument over money.
simple_cn: 他們為了錢吵架。

example: My sister and her husband are going to have a baby next month.
example_cn: 我姊姊和她老公下個月要生小孩了。
pattern: S + be going to have a baby
simple: She is thrilled to have a baby.
simple_cn: 她懷孕了，非常開心。

example: Let's go out and have a drink to celebrate your promotion after work.
example_cn: 下班後我們出去喝一杯慶祝你升遷吧。
pattern: Let's have a drink to + V
simple: He had a drink with his old friends.
simple_cn: 他跟老朋友喝了一杯。

example: The little boy woke up crying because he had a terrifying nightmare.
example_cn: 那個小男孩被惡夢嚇醒，哭個不停。
pattern: S + had a dream/nightmare about + N
simple: I had a strange dream last night.
simple_cn: 我昨晚做了一個奇怪的夢。

example: It is normal for siblings to have a fight over toys occasionally.
example_cn: 兄弟姊妹偶爾為了玩具吵架是很正常的事。
pattern: S + have a fight/quarrel over + N
simple: The couple had a quarrel over a minor issue.
simple_cn: 那對夫妻為了一點小事吵架。

example: You look so different today! Did you have a haircut over the weekend?
example_cn: 你今天看起來很不一樣！週末去剪頭髮了嗎？
simple: I need to have a haircut before the interview.
simple_cn: 面試前我得先去剪個頭髮。

example: I had a long conversation with my parents about my future career plans.
example_cn: 我跟爸媽長談了一番，討論我未來的職涯規劃。
pattern: S + have a chat/conversation with + N
simple: Let's have a chat over a cup of tea.
simple_cn: 我們邊喝茶邊聊一下吧。

example: Many foreign students have difficulty communicating in the local language at first.
example_cn: 很多外國學生一開始在當地語言溝通上會遇到困難。
simple: He has a problem managing his time.
simple_cn: 他在時間管理上有問題。

example: It is perfectly normal to have negative feelings when things go wrong.
example_cn: 事情不順的時候感到負面情緒，這完全正常。
pattern: It is normal to have + adj + feelings
simple: Animals also have feelings and needs.
simple_cn: 動物也有感情和需求。

chinese: 玩得開心 / 大笑一場
example: We went to the amusement park yesterday and had a lot of fun.
example_cn: 我們昨天去遊樂園玩得很開心。
pattern: S + have fun / a good laugh
simple: We had a good laugh at his joke.
simple_cn: 我們被他的笑話逗得哈哈大笑。

type: 動詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: Enjoy your trip to Japan and make sure you have a good time!
example_cn: 祝你日本之旅愉快，一定要玩得盡興！
pattern: S + have a good time + V-ing/at N
simple: Did you have a good time at the party?
simple_cn: 你在派對上玩得開心嗎？

example: Does anyone have a better idea to solve this urgent environmental issue?
example_cn: 有人有更好的點子來解決這個急迫的環境問題嗎？
pattern: S + have a plan to + V
simple: I have a plan for the weekend.
simple_cn: 我週末有計劃。

type: 動詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: It is important to teach children to have good manners in public places.
example_cn: 教導孩子在公共場合要有禮貌是很重要的。
simple: A true gentleman always has good manners.
simple_cn: 真正的紳士總是很有禮貌。

example: He took a day off from work because he had a terrible headache and a bad cold.
example_cn: 他因為頭痛又重感冒，請了一天假。
simple: I can't go out because I have a bad cold.
simple_cn: 我沒辦法出門，因為我重感冒。

chinese: 用餐 / 吃午餐 / 吃晚餐
example: It is a tradition for our family to have a big dinner together on New Year's Eve.
example_cn: 我們家的傳統是在除夕夜一起吃一頓豐盛的晚餐。
pattern: S + have a meal/dinner with + N
simple: They had a romantic dinner last night.
simple_cn: 他們昨晚吃了一頓浪漫的晚餐。

example: The injured driver needs to have an operation immediately to save his life.
example_cn: 受傷的司機需要立刻動手術才能保住性命。
pattern: S + need to have an operation/surgery
simple: She will have surgery on her knee next week.
simple_cn: 她下週要動膝蓋手術。

example: We are going to have a surprise party to celebrate her 18th birthday.
example_cn: 我們打算辦一場驚喜派對來慶祝她18歲生日。
pattern: S + have a party for + N
simple: They had a farewell party for the retiring boss.
simple_cn: 他們幫退休的老闆辦了一場歡送派對。

example: As a kindergarten teacher, you need to have a lot of patience when dealing with young children.
example_cn: 當幼稚園老師，面對小朋友時需要很有耐心。
pattern: S + need to have patience with + N
simple: Learning a new language requires you to have patience.
simple_cn: 學新語言需要有耐心。

example: The successful candidate must have the right qualifications and skills for this position.
example_cn: 成功的應徵者必須具備這個職位所需的資格與技能。
pattern: S + have the qualifications for + N
simple: He doesn't have the skills required for the job.
simple_cn: 他沒有這份工作需要的技能。

example: I have no regrets about the decisions I made, even though things didn't go perfectly.
example_cn: 我對自己做的決定沒有後悔，即使事情發展得並不完美。
pattern: S + have no regrets about + N/V-ing
simple: She has some regrets about leaving school early.
simple_cn: 她對太早離開學校有些後悔。

type: 動詞 + 名詞 + 介系詞
example: We should have deep sympathy for those who lost their homes in the devastating earthquake.
example_cn: 我們應該對那些在毀滅性地震中失去家園的人深表同情。
simple: I have great sympathy for the victims.
simple_cn: 我非常同情那些受害者。

example: He usually has a quick shower before going to work in the morning to stay refreshed.
example_cn: 他早上出門上班前通常會快速沖個澡，讓自己保持精神。
simple: She is having a bath right now.
simple_cn: 她現在正在洗澡。

example: After taking the medicine for months, he has developed a tolerance to it and needs a higher dose.
example_cn: 連續吃藥幾個月後，他已經產生耐藥性，需要更高的劑量。
pattern: S + have a tolerance for/to + N
simple: Teachers must have a tolerance for mistakes.
simple_cn: 老師必須能容忍學生犯錯。

example: Do you have time to grab a cup of coffee with me after the meeting?
example_cn: 會議結束後你有時間跟我喝杯咖啡嗎？
simple: I don't have time to watch TV.
simple_cn: 我沒時間看電視。

example: The counselor gave the student some useful advice on choosing a college major.
example_cn: 輔導老師給學生一些關於選大學科系的有用建議。
pattern: S + give + O + some advice on + N/V-ing
simple: My father gave me good advice.
simple_cn: 我爸爸給了我很好的建議。

example: Can you give an example to illustrate your point more clearly?
example_cn: 你能不能舉個例子，讓你的觀點更清楚？
pattern: S + give an example to + V
simple: The teacher gave an example to explain the rule.
simple_cn: 老師舉例來說明那個規則。

example: She gave birth to a healthy baby boy early this morning.
example_cn: 她今天清晨順利生下一個健康的男寶寶。
simple: The new policy gave birth to many problems.
simple_cn: 這項新政策引發了很多問題。

example: Please give me a second chance to prove my ability to the team.
example_cn: 請再給我一次機會，向團隊證明我的能力。
pattern: S + give + O + a chance to + V
simple: Everyone deserves to be given a chance.
simple_cn: 每個人都應該有機會被給予一次機會。

example: We should give credit to the team members who worked hard behind the scenes.
example_cn: 我們應該肯定那些在幕後努力付出的團隊成員。
simple: He took all the credit for the success.
simple_cn: 他把成功的功勞全攬在自己身上。

example: The witness was asked to give evidence in court regarding the car accident.
example_cn: 證人被要求在法庭上就這起車禍提供證詞。
pattern: S + be asked to give evidence
simple: The scientist gave evidence to support his theory.
simple_cn: 那位科學家提出證據來支持他的理論。

example: The manager gave a detailed explanation for the unexpected delay of the project.
example_cn: 經理針對專案意外延遲給出了詳細的解釋。
pattern: S + give an explanation for + N
simple: Can you give an explanation for your absence?
simple_cn: 你可以解釋一下你為什麼缺席嗎？

example: Could you please give me a hand with these heavy boxes?
example_cn: 可以請你幫我搬這些重箱子嗎？
pattern: S + give + O + a hand with + N
simple: Let me give you a hand.
simple_cn: 讓我幫你一把。

example: The successful trial of the new medical treatment gives hope to patients suffering from the rare disease.
example_cn: 這項新療法的成功試驗，為罹患罕見疾病的患者帶來了希望。
simple: His words gave us hope.
simple_cn: 他的話給了我們希望。

example: Before leaving for the airport, she gave her mother a warm hug.
example_cn: 出發去機場前，她給了媽媽一個溫暖的擁抱。
simple: He gave his son a kiss goodnight.
simple_cn: 他給兒子一個晚安吻。

example: His confident speech gave the audience the impression that he was well-prepared.
example_cn: 他自信的演講讓觀眾覺得他準備得很充分。
pattern: S + give + O + the impression that + clause
simple: You give the impression of being strict.
simple_cn: 你給人的印象是很嚴格。

example: Modern education gives great importance to the development of critical thinking skills.
example_cn: 現代教育非常重視批判性思考能力的培養。
simple: They give equal importance to sports and academics.
simple_cn: 他們對體育和學業同樣重視。

example: The nurse will give you an injection to help relieve the severe pain in your back.
example_cn: 護士會幫你打一針，來緩解你背部的劇烈疼痛。
simple: The doctor gave him an injection.
simple_cn: 醫生幫他打了一針。

example: The severe car crash gave him a harsh lesson about the importance of driving safely.
example_cn: 那場嚴重的車禍給他上了慘痛的一課，讓他明白安全駕駛有多重要。
simple: Failure gives us a valuable lesson.
simple_cn: 失敗給我們上了寶貴的一課。

example: Employees are required to give two weeks' notice before they quit their jobs.
example_cn: 員工離職前必須提前兩週提出書面通知。
pattern: S + must give notice before + V-ing
simple: You have to give notice to the landlord.
simple_cn: 你得提前通知房東。

example: Since it was raining heavily, my coworker kindly offered to give me a ride home.
example_cn: 因為雨下得很大，同事好心地主動載我回家。
pattern: S + give + O + a ride/lift to + 地方
simple: Can you give me a lift to the station?
simple_cn: 可以順便載我去車站嗎？

example: Everyone in the meeting is encouraged to give an opinion on the new marketing strategy.
example_cn: 會議中鼓勵每個人都對新的行銷策略發表意見。
pattern: S + give an opinion on + N
simple: He gave his honest opinion.
simple_cn: 他坦率地說出了自己的想法。

example: The scholarship gives poor students an opportunity to pursue higher education.
example_cn: 這筆獎學金讓貧困學生有機會接受高等教育。
pattern: N + gives + O + an opportunity to + V
simple: This job gives me an opportunity to learn.
simple_cn: 這份工作讓我有學習的機會。

example: The famous band will give a live performance at the stadium tonight.
example_cn: 那個知名樂團今晚會在體育館現場演出。
pattern: S + give a performance at + N
simple: The actors gave a wonderful performance.
simple_cn: 演員們的表演非常精采。

example: The teacher gave the students permission to leave the classroom early.
example_cn: 老師允許學生提早離開教室。
pattern: S + give + O + permission to + V
simple: My parents gave me permission to go.
simple_cn: 我爸媽准許我去。

example: The company gives preference to applicants with relevant work experience.
example_cn: 公司會優先錄用有相關工作經驗的應徵者。
simple: They give preference to local candidates.
simple_cn: 他們比較偏好錄用本地應徵者。

example: The government must give priority to protecting the environment over economic development.
example_cn: 政府必須把環境保護置於經濟發展之上，列為優先事項。
simple: Safety should be given priority.
simple_cn: 安全應該優先考量。

example: Please give me a reply as soon as possible so I can finalize the schedule.
example_cn: 請盡快回覆我，這樣我才能敲定行程。
pattern: Please give me a reply by + 時間
simple: He refused to give an answer.
simple_cn: 他拒絕回答。

example: The unfair policy gave rise to widespread protests across the country.
example_cn: 這項不公平的政策引發了全國大規模的抗議。
simple: The new rules gave rise to confusion.
simple_cn: 新規定引發了混亂。

phrase: give a talk / a speech / a lecture
example: The professor was invited to give a speech on global warming at the international conference.
example_cn: 那位教授受邀在國際研討會上發表演說，主題是全球暖化。
pattern: S + give a speech on + 題目
simple: The president gave a speech on TV.
simple_cn: 總統在電視上發表了演說。

example: The actors returned to the stage to take a bow after the successful performance.
example_cn: 演員們在演出成功後回到台上鞠躬謝幕。
pattern: S + return to the stage to take a bow
simple: The singer took a bow as the audience clapped.
simple_cn: 歌手在觀眾掌聲中鞠躬致謝。

chinese: 受到打擊 / 遭受重創
example: The local tourism industry took a severe blow during the global pandemic.
example_cn: 全球疫情期間，當地旅遊業遭受了嚴重打擊。
pattern: S + took a severe blow + 時間/原因
simple: His confidence took a beating after the failure.
simple_cn: 失敗之後，他的信心大受打擊。

example: You have been studying for three hours; it's time to take a short break.
example_cn: 你已經讀了三個小時的書，該稍微休息一下了。
pattern: S + need to take a break/holiday
simple: We are planning to take a holiday in Japan.
simple_cn: 我們打算去日本度假。

example: Please excuse me for a moment; I need to take an urgent phone call.
example_cn: 不好意思，我先離開一下，需要接一通緊急電話。
pattern: S + need to take a phone call
simple: He stepped outside to take a call.
simple_cn: 他走到外面接電話。

example: Teenagers should be educated about the terrible consequences of taking illegal drugs.
example_cn: 應該教導青少年了解吸毒的可怕後果。
pattern: S + warn O + against taking drugs
simple: Taking drugs will ruin your health and life.
simple_cn: 吸毒會毀了你的健康和人生。

example: It is generally advised to take regular exercise to maintain your physical health.
example_cn: 一般建議養成規律運動的習慣，以維持身體健康。
simple: Taking exercise helps reduce stress.
simple_cn: 運動有助於減輕壓力。

example: I take strong exception to your unfair comments about my hardworking team.
example_cn: 我對你對我認真工作的團隊所做出的不公正評論，表示強烈反對。
simple: Many people took exception to the controversial policy.
simple_cn: 很多人對這項爭議政策表示反對。

chinese: 懂暗示 / 開得起玩笑
example: He couldn't take a joke and got really angry when we teased him about his haircut.
example_cn: 他開不起玩笑，我們只是笑他新剪的頭髮，他就氣到不行。
simple: She didn't take the hint and stayed for another hour.
simple_cn: 她沒聽懂暗示，又待了一個小時。

example: The new traffic regulations will take effect at the beginning of next month.
example_cn: 新的交通規則將在下個月初開始實施。
pattern: The rule/law + will take effect + 時間
simple: The painkiller took effect quickly.
simple_cn: 止痛藥很快就見效了。

example: Could you take a look at my essay and check for any grammar mistakes?
example_cn: 能不能幫我看一下我的作文，檢查有沒有文法錯誤？
pattern: Please take a look at + N
simple: The mechanic took a look at my car.
simple_cn: 技工幫我檢查了一下車子。

example: The doctor told me to take this medicine three times a day after meals.
example_cn: 醫生交代我這個藥一天吃三次，飯後服用。
simple: Don't forget to take your medicine.
simple_cn: 別忘了吃藥。

example: Students are encouraged to take detailed notes during the lecture to remember key points.
example_cn: 鼓勵學生在課堂上仔細做筆記，這樣才能記住重點。
simple: He wasn't there, so I took a message for him.
simple_cn: 他不在那裡，所以我幫他留了話。

example: Tourists love to take pictures of the beautiful sunset at the beach.
example_cn: 觀光客很喜歡在海邊拍美麗的夕陽。
pattern: S + take a photo of + N
simple: Can you take a picture for us?
simple_cn: 可以幫我們拍張照嗎？

example: The international film festival will take place in Taipei next year.
example_cn: 國際影展明年會在台北舉辦。
pattern: The event + takes place + 地方/時間
simple: The meeting took place yesterday.
simple_cn: 會議是昨天舉行的。

example: Starting your own business means you have to be willing to take a risk.
example_cn: 自己創業就要願意承擔風險。
pattern: S + be willing to take a risk
simple: Sometimes you need to take risks to succeed.
simple_cn: 有時候要成功就得冒險。

example: Please take a seat in the waiting room, and the doctor will be with you shortly.
example_cn: 請先在候診室坐下，醫生馬上就會來看你。
simple: Everyone took their seats before the show started.
simple_cn: 表演開始前，每個人都就座了。

chinese: 搭計程車 / 火車 / 公車
example: Because it was pouring rain, we decided to take a taxi home instead of walking.
example_cn: 因為雨下得很大，我們決定搭計程車回家，不走路了。
pattern: S + take a taxi to + 地方
simple: I usually take the train to work.
simple_cn: 我通常搭火車上班。

example: Every freshman is required to take a basic English course before graduation.
example_cn: 每個大一新生都必須在畢業前修一門基礎英文課。
simple: She took a driving test last week.
simple_cn: 她上週考了駕照。

example: The school nurse took the sick boy's temperature and found he had a high fever.
example_cn: 學校護士幫那個生病的男孩量體溫，發現他發高燒。
simple: The doctor will take your temperature first.
simple_cn: 醫生會先幫你量體溫。

chinese: 散步 / 採取步驟 (或走一步)
example: After dinner, my grandparents usually take a walk in the park to digest their food.
example_cn: 吃完晚餐後，我爺爺奶奶通常會去公園散步幫助消化。
pattern: S + take a walk + 地方
simple: We must take a step forward to solve this.
simple_cn: 我們必須向前邁一步來解決這個問題。

example: This swimming course is specifically designed for absolute beginners.
example_cn: 這個游泳課程是專門為完全初學者設計的。
pattern: S + be designed for absolute beginners
simple: Even an absolute beginner can learn to use this app.
simple_cn: 即使是完全初學者也能學會使用這個應用程式。

example: Please arrange the files in alphabetical order so they are easier to find.
example_cn: 請把檔案按照字母順序排好，這樣比較好找。
simple: The names are listed in alphabetical order.
simple_cn: 名字是按字母順序列出的。

example: Eating a balanced diet is essential for maintaining good physical health.
example_cn: 飲食均衡對維持身體健康非常重要。
simple: A balanced diet provides necessary nutrients.
simple_cn: 均衡飲食能提供必要的營養素。

example: When backpacking, you should only pack the bare essentials to keep your bag light.
example_cn: 去背包旅行的時候，只要帶最基本的必需品就好，這樣包包才不會太重。
simple: The refugee camp lacked even the bare essentials.
simple_cn: 難民營連最基本的必需品都缺乏。

chinese: 巨大的失望、令人大失所望的事
example: The new superhero movie turned out to be a big disappointment to its fans.
example_cn: 那部新的超級英雄電影讓粉絲們大失所望。
pattern: N + turned out to be a big disappointment
simple: Losing the game was a big disappointment.
simple_cn: 輸掉比賽真是讓人失望透頂。

example: It would be a big mistake to ignore the doctor's advice regarding your health.
example_cn: 忽略醫生對你健康的建議，會是一個很大的錯誤。
pattern: It would be a big mistake to + V
simple: Making that investment was a big mistake.
simple_cn: 做那個投資是個大錯誤。

example: Everyone knew he was telling a blatant lie, but nobody dared to expose him.
example_cn: 大家都知道他在睜眼說瞎話，但沒有人敢戳破他。
simple: Her excuse was nothing but a blatant lie.
simple_cn: 她的藉口根本就是個赤裸裸的謊言。

example: Children from broken homes often need extra emotional support from teachers.
example_cn: 來自破碎家庭的孩子，常常需要老師給予更多情感上的支持。
pattern: S + come from a broken home
simple: He grew up in a broken home.
simple_cn: 他是在一個破碎的家庭長大的。

example: The actress won the hearts of the audience with her captivating smile.
example_cn: 那位女演員用迷人的笑容贏得了觀眾的心。
pattern: S + charm O + with a captivating smile
simple: She welcomed us with a captivating smile.
simple_cn: 她帶著迷人的笑容歡迎我們。

chinese: 冷淡的接待、冷淡的反應
example: The politician's controversial proposal met with a chilly reception from the public.
example_cn: 那位政治人物提出的爭議性提案，遭到公眾冷淡對待。
pattern: S + met with a chilly reception
simple: His joke got a chilly reception.
simple_cn: 他的笑話反應很冷淡。

example: The new law sends a clear message that drunk driving will not be tolerated.
example_cn: 這項新法律清楚傳達一個訊息：酒駕絕不寬貸。
pattern: S + send a clear message to O
simple: We must give a clear message to the team.
simple_cn: 我們必須給團隊一個明確的訊息。

example: Before signing the contract, make sure you have a clear understanding of the terms.
example_cn: 簽約之前，務必清楚了解所有條款內容。
pattern: S + have a clear understanding of + N
simple: We need a clear understanding of the rules.
simple_cn: 我們需要清楚了解規則。

example: I usually share my deepest secrets only with my close friends.
example_cn: 我通常只會跟好朋友分享內心最深處的秘密。
pattern: S + be a close friend of mine
simple: We have been close friends for ten years.
simple_cn: 我們已經當了十年的好朋友。

example: It is common knowledge that water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
example_cn: 大家都知道水在攝氏一百度會沸騰。
pattern: It is common knowledge that + S + V
simple: The company's financial trouble is common knowledge.
simple_cn: 公司的財務困境是眾所皆知的事。

example: After hours of debate, the two sides finally reached a complete agreement.
example_cn: 經過好幾個小時的辯論，雙方終於達成完全共識。
pattern: S + be in complete agreement on + N
simple: I am in complete agreement with you.
simple_cn: 我完全同意你的看法。

example: Take a deep breath and try to calm down before stepping onto the stage.
example_cn: 上台前先深呼吸，試著讓自己冷靜下來。
pattern: Take a deep breath and + V
simple: She took a deep breath to steady her nerves.
simple_cn: 她深吸一口氣讓自己冷靜下來。

example: The low price was the deciding factor when we chose to buy this car.
example_cn: 低價是我們決定買這輛車的關鍵因素。
pattern: N + is the deciding factor in + N
simple: Weather will be the deciding factor for our trip.
simple_cn: 天氣將會是我們這趟旅行的決定性因素。

example: The Internet has an enormous influence on how teenagers view the world.
example_cn: 網路對青少年看待世界的方式影響非常大。
pattern: S + have an enormous influence on + N
simple: Parents have an enormous influence on their kids.
simple_cn: 父母對孩子的影響非常大。

chinese: 明確的目的、特意的目的
example: He traveled to Paris for the express purpose of learning authentic French baking.
example_cn: 他專程飛去巴黎，就是為了學道地的法式烘焙。
pattern: S + V + for the express purpose of + V-ing
simple: She came here for the express purpose of seeing you.
simple_cn: 她來這裡的唯一目的就是為了見你。

chinese: 公平的交易、公平的待遇
example: The union negotiated with the company to ensure all workers got a fair deal.
example_cn: 工會與公司協商，確保所有工人都能得到公平待遇。
simple: I don't think I'm getting a fair deal here.
simple_cn: 我覺得我在這裡沒有得到公平的待遇。

example: The craftsman takes great pride in his handmade furniture.
example_cn: 這位工匠對自己親手做的家具感到非常自豪。
pattern: S + take great pride in + N
simple: She feels great pride in her son's success.
simple_cn: 她對兒子的成功感到非常驕傲。

example: I missed the beginning of the movie because I was stuck in heavy traffic.
example_cn: 因為塞車塞得很嚴重，我錯過了電影的開頭。
pattern: S + be delayed due to heavy traffic
simple: Heavy traffic is common during rush hour.
simple_cn: 尖峰時間交通擁擠是很常見的事。

example: This brand is famous for producing high quality leather goods.
example_cn: 這個品牌以生產高品質皮件聞名。
simple: We demand high quality materials.
simple_cn: 我們要求高品質的材料。

example: Even after twenty years, the antique car was still in immaculate condition.
example_cn: 即使過了二十年，這輛古董車依然保持完美無瑕的狀態。
pattern: S + be kept in immaculate condition
simple: The rented house was left in immaculate condition.
simple_cn: 那間租來的房子保持得一塵不染。

example: Many innocent victims lost their lives during the sudden terrorist attack.
example_cn: 在那場突如其來的恐怖攻擊中，許多無辜的受害者喪失了性命。
pattern: S + claimed the lives of innocent victims
simple: He was just an innocent victim of circumstances.
simple_cn: 他只是環境下的無辜受害者。

example: When I am in a hurry in the morning, I just make a cup of instant coffee.
example_cn: 早上趕時間的時候，我就泡一杯即溶咖啡。
simple: Instant coffee is very convenient.
simple_cn: 即溶咖啡非常方便。

example: Climate change is considered a key issue that affects global security.
example_cn: 氣候變遷被視為影響全球安全的關鍵議題。
pattern: N + is a key issue in + N
simple: Education is a key issue in the election.
simple_cn: 教育是這次選舉的關鍵議題。

example: Based on all the evidence gathered, this seems to be the only logical conclusion.
example_cn: 根據目前收集到的所有證據，這似乎是唯一合理的結論。
simple: We must draw a logical conclusion from the facts.
simple_cn: 我們必須根據事實推導出合理的結論。

example: Air pollution has become a major problem in many developing countries.
example_cn: 空氣污染已經成為許多開發中國家的主要問題。
pattern: N + poses a major problem for + N
simple: Funding is a major problem for the project.
simple_cn: 資金是這個計畫的主要問題。

example: I had mixed feelings when I graduated: happy to finish, but sad to leave my friends.
example_cn: 畢業時我的心情很複雜：開心終於結束了，但也很難過要離開朋友。
pattern: S + have mixed feelings about + N
simple: She has mixed feelings about the job offer.
simple_cn: 她對這份工作機會的感覺很複雜。

example: Choosing which university to attend is a momentous decision for a teenager.
example_cn: 對青少年來說，選擇要讀哪所大學是一個重大的決定。
simple: Moving abroad was a momentous decision.
simple_cn: 移居國外是一個重大的決定。

example: Biting your fingernails when you are nervous is a nasty habit to break.
example_cn: 緊張時咬指甲是一個很難改掉的壞習慣。
pattern: S + have a nasty habit of + V-ing
simple: He has a nasty habit of interrupting people.
simple_cn: 他有個打斷別人說話的壞習慣。

example: Winning the gold medal in the Olympics is a notable achievement for any athlete.
example_cn: 在奧運會上拿到金牌，對任何運動員來說都是一項了不起的成就。
simple: Publishing a book is a notable achievement.
simple_cn: 出版一本書是一項值得注意的成就。

example: There is a noticeable difference in temperature between the city and the mountains.
example_cn: 城市和山區的溫度有明顯的差異。
pattern: There is a noticeable difference between A and B
simple: The new software shows a noticeable difference in speed.
simple_cn: 新軟體在速度上展現出明顯的差異。

example: The actor received an award for his outstanding performance in the drama.
example_cn: 那位演員因為在戲劇中的出色表現而獲獎。
simple: Congratulations on your outstanding performance!
simple_cn: 恭喜你表現出色！

example: Please make sure to take all your personal belongings with you when leaving the train.
example_cn: 下火車時，請務必帶走你所有的個人物品。
pattern: Keep an eye on your personal belongings.
simple: Do not leave your personal belongings unattended.
simple_cn: 請不要讓個人物品無人看管。

chinese: 突出的角色、重要的作用
example: Social media plays a prominent role in shaping teenagers' political views.
example_cn: 社群媒體在塑造青少年的政治觀點上扮演了重要的角色。
pattern: N + plays a prominent role in + N
simple: Education plays a prominent role in society.
simple_cn: 教育在社會中扮演著重要的角色。

example: The government changed its policy due to the strong pressure of public opinion.
example_cn: 政府因為強大的民意壓力而改變了政策。
pattern: S + be influenced by public opinion
simple: Public opinion is against the new law.
simple_cn: 民意反對這項新法律。

example: Can you give me a rough estimate of how much the repair will cost?
example_cn: 你可以大概估算一下修理費用會是多少嗎？
pattern: give a rough estimate of + N
simple: Here is a rough estimate of the timeline.
simple_cn: 這是時間表的粗略估計。

example: All of your classmates signed this card to wish you a speedy recovery.
example_cn: 你所有的同學都在這張卡片上簽了名，祝你早日康復。
simple: He made a speedy recovery from the surgery.
simple_cn: 他手術後恢復得很快。

example: After years of freelancing, he finally found a steady job with a regular income.
example_cn: 經過多年的自由接案，他終於找到了一份收入穩定的正職工作。
pattern: S + look for/find a steady job
simple: It's hard to get a steady job nowadays.
simple_cn: 現在很難找到一份穩定的工作。

example: The tourist spoke English with a strong accent, making it difficult for locals to understand him.
example_cn: 那位觀光客說英文的口音很重，當地人很難聽懂他在說什麼。
pattern: S + speak with a strong accent
simple: He has a strong accent but speaks fluently.
simple_cn: 他口音很重，但說得很流利。

example: The national park is renowned worldwide for its stunning beauty and rich wildlife.
example_cn: 這個國家公園以其絕美的風景和豐富的野生動物聞名全球。
pattern: S + be struck by the stunning beauty of N
simple: The painting captures the stunning beauty of nature.
simple_cn: 這幅畫捕捉了大自然的絕美風光。

example: Keep a tight grip on the railing when you walk down the steep stairs.
example_cn: 走下陡峭的樓梯時，請緊緊抓住扶手。
pattern: S + keep a tight grip on + N
simple: He held my hand with a tight grip.
simple_cn: 他緊緊握住我的手。

chinese: 徹底的瘋狂、極度愚蠢的行為
example: Driving a motorcycle in this terrible typhoon is total madness.
example_cn: 在這麼可怕的颱風天騎機車，簡直是瘋了。
pattern: It is total madness to + V
simple: Spending all your money on clothes is total madness.
simple_cn: 把所有的錢都花在衣服上簡直是瘋了。

example: I only have a vague memory of my early childhood before we moved to Taipei.
example_cn: 我對搬到台北之前的童年早期只有模糊的記憶。
pattern: S + have a vague memory of + N
simple: She has a vague memory of meeting him once.
simple_cn: 她對曾見過他一次只有模糊的記憶。

example: Students must provide a valid reason if they want to be absent from the exam.
example_cn: 學生如果考試要請假，必須提出正當的理由。
pattern: S + have a valid reason to + V
simple: You don't have a valid reason to complain.
simple_cn: 你沒有正當理由抱怨。

example: Although he is good at speaking, grammar has always been his weak point.
example_cn: 雖然他很會講話，但文法一直是他比較弱的地方。
pattern: S + need to improve one's weak point
simple: Every argument has a weak point.
simple_cn: 每個論點都有弱點。

example: The residents are very angry about the new tax policy.
example_cn: 居民對新的稅收政策非常生氣。
simple: He was angry about the delay.
simple_cn: 他對延誤感到生氣。

example: Many students are anxious about their future after graduation.
example_cn: 很多學生對畢業後的未來感到焦慮。
simple: She is anxious about the exam results.
simple_cn: 她對考試成績很焦慮。

example: My younger brother is completely crazy about baseball and watches every game.
example_cn: 我弟弟超迷棒球，每場比賽都會看。
simple: He has been crazy about cars since childhood.
simple_cn: 他從小就對車子很著迷。

example: The manager remained doubtful about the success of the new marketing plan.
example_cn: 經理對新行銷計畫能否成功仍抱持懷疑。
simple: I am doubtful about his promises.
simple_cn: 我對他的承諾感到懷疑。

example: The volunteers were highly enthusiastic about helping the local community.
example_cn: 志工們對幫助當地社區非常有熱忱。
simple: She is enthusiastic about learning languages.
simple_cn: 她對學語言很有熱忱。

example: We are all very excited about the upcoming field trip to the museum.
example_cn: 我們都很期待即將到來的博物館校外教學。
simple: Are you excited about your vacation?
simple_cn: 你對假期感到興奮嗎？

example: Customers were furious about the sudden increase in ticket prices.
example_cn: 顧客對票價突然調漲感到非常憤怒。
simple: He was furious about being left behind.
simple_cn: 他對被丟下這件事氣炸了。

example: It is normal to feel nervous about speaking in front of a large audience.
example_cn: 在很多人面前講話會緊張是很正常的。
simple: I am nervous about the job interview.
simple_cn: 我對工作面試很緊張。

example: Despite the current difficulties, the CEO remains optimistic about the company's future.
example_cn: 儘管目前面臨困難，執行長對公司未來仍保持樂觀。
simple: We are optimistic about finding a cure.
simple_cn: 我們對找到治療方法感到樂觀。

example: Many young people are pessimistic about their chances of buying a house.
example_cn: 很多年輕人對買房這件事感到悲觀。
simple: He is pessimistic about the economy.
simple_cn: 他對經濟前景感到悲觀。

example: We are all very sad about the news of his sudden passing.
example_cn: 聽到他突然過世的消息，我們都很難過。
simple: She was sad about losing her pet.
simple_cn: 她因為失去寵物而難過。

example: If you are serious about losing weight, you must change your diet.
example_cn: 如果你是真的想減肥，就必須改變飲食習慣。
pattern: If S + be serious about + V-ing, S + must + V
simple: I am serious about learning piano.
simple_cn: 我是認真要學鋼琴的。

chinese: 對...感到心煩意亂 / 生氣
example: She is still upset about the harsh comments her boss made yesterday.
example_cn: 她還在為老闆昨天說的那句苛刻的話感到不開心。
simple: Don't be upset about small mistakes.
simple_cn: 別為了小失誤而心煩。

example: Parents are constantly worried about the safety of their children.
example_cn: 父母總是擔心小孩的安全。
simple: I am worried about the coming typhoon.
simple_cn: 我擔心即將來襲的颱風。

chinese: 因...受責備 / 承擔責任
example: The driver was blamed for the accident because he was using his phone.
example_cn: 那位司機因為邊開車邊用手機，被認為是車禍的肇事原因。
simple: He was blamed for losing the document.
simple_cn: 他因為弄丟文件而被責怪。

example: Only full-time employees are eligible for the company's health insurance plan.
example_cn: 只有全職員工才符合公司健康保險的申請資格。
simple: You are eligible for a free upgrade.
simple_cn: 你有資格獲得免費升級。

example: Taiwan is famous for its delicious street food and friendly people.
example_cn: 台灣以美味的街頭小吃和友善的人民聞名。
simple: The city is famous for its historical sites.
simple_cn: 這座城市以古蹟聞名。

example: I am truly grateful for all the support my family has given me.
example_cn: 我真的很感謝家人給我的所有支持。
simple: We are grateful for your help.
simple_cn: 我們很感激你的幫忙。

example: That intersection is notorious for frequent traffic accidents.
example_cn: 那個路口因為經常發生車禍而惡名昭彰。
simple: The politician is notorious for corruption.
simple_cn: 這位政治人物以貪腐惡名昭彰。

example: The students have studied hard and are well prepared for the final exams.
example_cn: 學生們用功讀書，已經為期末考做好充分準備。
pattern: S + be well prepared for + N
simple: Are you prepared for the challenge?
simple_cn: 你準備好面對挑戰了嗎？

example: He was punished for breaking the school rules and had to clean the classroom.
example_cn: 他因為違反校規被處罰，必須打掃教室。
simple: She was punished for being late.
simple_cn: 她因為遲到被處罰了。

example: With a master's degree and three years of experience, she is highly qualified for the job.
example_cn: 她擁有碩士學位和三年經驗，完全勝任這份工作。
simple: He is well qualified for the position.
simple_cn: 他非常勝任這個職位。

example: After weeks of training, the team is finally ready for the big game.
example_cn: 經過幾週的訓練，團隊終於準備好迎接這場大賽。
simple: I am ready for a new start.
simple_cn: 我準備好要重新開始了。

example: The region is renowned for its breathtaking natural scenery and hot springs.
example_cn: 這個地區以令人驚嘆的自然風光和溫泉聞名。
simple: Paris is renowned for its art.
simple_cn: 巴黎以藝術聞名。

example: Human activities are largely responsible for the rapid increase in global temperatures.
example_cn: 人類活動是全球氣溫快速上升的主要原因。
simple: Who is responsible for this mess?
simple_cn: 誰要為這團亂負責？

example: The principal is widely respected for his dedication to education.
example_cn: 這位校長因為對教育的奉獻而廣受尊敬。
simple: She is respected for her honesty.
simple_cn: 她因為誠實而受到尊敬。

example: This movie contains violence and is not suitable for young children.
example_cn: 這部電影含有暴力內容，不適合年幼兒童觀看。
simple: This soil is suitable for growing crops.
simple_cn: 這片土壤適合種植農作物。

example: We should be thankful for the peace and freedom we enjoy today.
example_cn: 我們應該珍惜並感謝今天所擁有的和平與自由。
simple: I am thankful for your advice.
simple_cn: 謝謝你的建議。

example: The politician was accused of taking bribes from several local businessmen.
example_cn: 這位政治人物被指控收受幾位當地商人的賄賂。
simple: He was accused of stealing the car.
simple_cn: 他被指控偷車。

example: Don't be afraid of making mistakes; they are part of the learning process.
example_cn: 不要害怕犯錯，它們是學習過程的一部分。
simple: She is afraid of spiders.
simple_cn: 她怕蜘蛛。

example: He was deeply ashamed of his rude behavior at the dinner party.
example_cn: 他對自己在晚宴上的粗魯行為感到非常羞愧。
simple: You have nothing to be ashamed of.
simple_cn: 你沒有什麼好丟臉的。

example: Most smokers are fully aware of the dangers of smoking, yet they cannot quit.
example_cn: 大多數吸菸者都很清楚吸菸的危害，但卻無法戒掉。
simple: I am well aware of the problem.
simple_cn: 我很清楚這個問題。

example: With proper training, this new AI system is capable of performing complex tasks.
example_cn: 經過適當訓練，這套新的AI系統能夠執行複雜的任務。
simple: She is capable of passing the exam.
simple_cn: 她有能力通過考試。

example: People are becoming more conscious of the environmental impact of plastic bags.
example_cn: 人們越來越意識到塑膠袋對環境的影響。
simple: He is very conscious of his appearance.
simple_cn: 他非常在意自己的外表。

example: I am slightly envious of her ability to learn foreign languages so quickly.
example_cn: 我有點羨慕她學外語學得那麼快的能力。
simple: They were envious of his success.
simple_cn: 他們嫉妒他的成功。

example: The judiciary must remain strictly independent of the government to ensure fairness.
example_cn: 司法必須嚴格獨立於政府，以確保公正。
simple: The decision was made independent of his advice.
simple_cn: 這個決定是獨立於他的建議做出的。

example: The law applies to everyone equally, irrespective of their race or social status.
example_cn: 這項法律平等適用於每個人，不論其種族或社會地位。
simple: Everyone is welcome, irrespective of age.
simple_cn: 歡迎所有人，不分年齡。

example: He was jealous of his coworker who received a promotion instead of him.
example_cn: 他嫉妒那位同事，因為對方獲得升遷而不是他。
simple: She is jealous of her sister's beauty.
simple_cn: 她嫉妒她姊姊的美貌。

example: His parents are very proud of his outstanding academic achievements.
example_cn: 他的父母對他優異的學業成績感到非常驕傲。
simple: I am proud of what we have done.
simple_cn: 我為我們所做的一切感到驕傲。

example: The little girl is scared of sleeping in the dark without a nightlight.
example_cn: 那個小女生不敢在沒開小夜燈的暗房間裡睡覺。
simple: He is scared of making mistakes.
simple_cn: 他很怕犯錯。

example: The police became suspicious of the man when he couldn't answer simple questions.
example_cn: 那個男人連簡單的問題都答不出來，警察就開始懷疑他了。
simple: They are suspicious of his motives.
simple_cn: 他們懷疑他的動機。

example: It is typical of him to arrive late and make excuses.
example_cn: 他老是遲到然後找藉口，這真的很像他的作風。
pattern: It is typical of O to + V
simple: This weather is typical of Taiwan in summer.
simple_cn: 這種天氣是台灣夏天的典型。

example: Like moths drawn to a flame, many young people are attracted to city life.
example_cn: 就像飛蛾撲火一樣，很多年輕人都被都市生活吸引。
simple: I have always been attracted to science.
simple_cn: 我一直對科學很感興趣。

example: She quickly became accustomed to the fast pace of life in New York.
example_cn: 她很快就習慣了紐約那種快節奏的生活。
simple: I am accustomed to getting up early.
simple_cn: 我習慣早起。

example: Many teenagers are addicted to playing online games on their smartphones.
example_cn: 很多青少年都沉迷於在手機上玩線上遊戲。
simple: He is addicted to caffeine.
simple_cn: 他對咖啡因上癮。

example: My brother cannot eat seafood because he is highly allergic to shrimp.
example_cn: 我哥不能吃海鮮，因為他對蝦子嚴重過敏。
simple: Are you allergic to peanuts?
simple_cn: 你對花生過敏嗎？

example: It is sad that some people remain completely indifferent to the suffering of others.
example_cn: 有些人對別人的苦難完全無動於衷，這真的很令人難過。
simple: He seems indifferent to my problems.
simple_cn: 他對我的問題好像無動於衷。

example: This cheap product is clearly inferior to the original brand in terms of quality.
example_cn: 這個便宜貨的品質明顯比不上原廠品牌。
simple: I feel inferior to my successful brother.
simple_cn: 我覺得自己比不上成功的哥哥。

example: She has been married to a famous artist for over ten years.
example_cn: 她嫁給一位知名藝術家已經超過十年了。
simple: He is married to a doctor.
simple_cn: 他跟一位醫生結婚了。

type: 形容詞/分詞 + 介系詞
example: Many environmentalists are strongly opposed to the construction of the new power plant.
example_cn: 許多環保人士強烈反對興建新的發電廠。
simple: I am opposed to changing the rules.
simple_cn: 我反對修改規則。

example: You should always be polite to your elders and treat them with respect.
example_cn: 你對長輩一定要有禮貌，而且要尊重他們。
pattern: S + should be polite to + N
simple: The staff is very polite to customers.
simple_cn: 員工對顧客非常有禮貌。

example: The new manager is very open-minded and receptive to new ideas from the team.
example_cn: 新來的主管心胸很開闊，很願意接受團隊提出的新點子。
simple: Children are often more receptive to change.
simple_cn: 小孩通常比較能接受改變。

example: It is unacceptable to be rude to the waiters who are serving you.
example_cn: 對幫你服務的服務生態度惡劣，這是不可以接受的。
pattern: It is adj to be rude to + N
simple: He was very rude to his teacher.
simple_cn: 他對老師非常沒禮貌。

example: Your coat is very similar to the one I bought last year.
example_cn: 你的外套跟我去年買的那件很像。
simple: His ideas are similar to mine.
simple_cn: 他的想法跟我的很像。

example: This new model is far superior to the older version in battery life.
example_cn: 這款新型號的電池續航力遠比舊款強。
simple: I consider his work superior to hers.
simple_cn: 我認為他的作品比她的好。

example: High stress levels are often associated with an increased risk of heart disease.
example_cn: 壓力過大通常跟心臟病風險增加有關。
simple: Dark clouds are associated with rain.
simple_cn: 烏雲通常跟下雨有關。

example: The children quickly became bored with their new toys and wanted something else.
example_cn: 小朋友們很快就對新玩具感到無聊，想要別的東西。
simple: I am getting bored with this repetitive job.
simple_cn: 我對這種重複的工作開始感到無聊。

example: She is blessed with a beautiful singing voice and a supportive family.
example_cn: 她天生擁有一副好歌喉，還有一個支持她的家庭。
simple: Taiwan is blessed with rich natural resources.
simple_cn: 台灣擁有豐富的自然資源。

example: Make sure this software is compatible with your computer's operating system.
example_cn: 請確認這個軟體跟你的電腦作業系統相容。
simple: We are simply not compatible with each other.
simple_cn: 我們就是彼此合不來。

example: When confronted with difficulties, you must stay calm and find a solution.
example_cn: 遇到困難的時候，一定要保持冷靜，想辦法解決。
pattern: When confronted with N, S + V
simple: The company was confronted with a financial crisis.
simple_cn: 這間公司面臨了財務危機。

example: He lives a simple life in the country and is content with what he has.
example_cn: 他在鄉下過著簡樸的生活，對自己擁有的一切感到很滿足。
simple: Not everyone is content with a quiet life.
simple_cn: 不是每個人都滿足於平靜的生活。

example: The night market is always crowded with tourists during the weekend.
example_cn: 週末的時候，夜市總是擠滿了觀光客。
pattern: The place is crowded with + N
simple: The street was crowded with people.
simple_cn: 那條街上擠滿了人。

example: My parents were absolutely delighted with the gift I bought for them.
example_cn: 我爸媽對我買給他們的禮物超級滿意。
simple: She was delighted with her test scores.
simple_cn: 她對自己的考試成績很滿意。

example: Before starting the job, you need to become familiar with the company's rules.
example_cn: 開始工作之前，你需要先熟悉公司的規定。
simple: I am not familiar with this neighborhood.
simple_cn: 我對這個社區不太熟。

type: 形容詞片語 + 介系詞
example: I am completely fed up with his constant complaining and negative attitude.
example_cn: 我對他整天抱怨又消極的態度已經受夠了。
pattern: S + be fed up with + N
simple: Citizens are fed up with the terrible traffic.
simple_cn: 市民們對糟糕的交通已經受夠了。

example: It is always good to be friendly with your neighbors in case of an emergency.
example_cn: 跟鄰居保持友好關係總是好的，萬一有什麼緊急狀況可以互相照應。
simple: She is friendly with everyone in the office.
simple_cn: 她和辦公室裡的每個人都很要好。

example: The coach was very pleased with the team's outstanding performance today.
example_cn: 教練對球隊今天的出色表現非常滿意。
simple: Are you pleased with the final result?
simple_cn: 你對最終結果滿意嗎？

example: The new cafe near the school is very popular with college students.
example_cn: 學校附近那家新開的咖啡廳很受大學生的歡迎。
simple: This song is popular with young people.
simple_cn: 這首歌在年輕人之間很受歡迎。

example: If you are not satisfied with our service, you can get a full refund.
example_cn: 如果你對我們的服務不滿意，可以全額退款。
simple: I am satisfied with my current job.
simple_cn: 我對目前的工作很滿意。

example: My parents were absolutely delighted to hear that I passed the entrance exam.
example_cn: 我爸媽聽到我通過入學考試的消息，開心極了。
pattern: S + be absolutely delighted to + V
simple: She was absolutely delighted with her gift.
simple_cn: 她對收到的禮物感到非常開心。

example: It is absolutely necessary to wear a seatbelt when driving on the highway.
example_cn: 在高速公路上開車時，絕對有必要繫安全帶。
pattern: It is absolutely necessary to + V
simple: Sleep is absolutely necessary for good health.
simple_cn: 睡眠對身體健康絕對是必要的。

example: To expect a child to study for ten hours a day is absolutely ridiculous.
example_cn: 要求一個小孩每天讀書十個小時，簡直太荒謬了。
simple: The price of this ticket is absolutely ridiculous.
simple_cn: 這張票的價格簡直離譜。
