example_cn: 那隻老狗因為年紀大了，視力和聽力都漸漸在退化。
simple: Listening to loud music can make you go deaf.
simple_cn: 聽太大聲的音樂會讓你耳聾。

example: The constant noise from the construction site next door is making me go crazy.
example_cn: 隔壁工地一直傳來的噪音，快把我搞瘋了。
simple: He went mad with anger.
simple_cn: 他氣到發瘋。

example: After the power outage, the computer system went haywire and started deleting files randomly.
example_cn: 停電之後，電腦系統整個大亂，開始隨機刪除檔案。
simple: Everything went haywire at the last minute.
simple_cn: 最後一刻所有事情都亂了套。

example: The crowd went wild with excitement when the singer finally appeared on stage.
example_cn: 當歌手終於出現在舞台上時，全場觀眾都嗨翻了。
simple: Kids tend to go wild at parties.
simple_cn: 小孩在派對上通常會玩瘋。

example: Due to poor management and the economic recession, the company eventually went bankrupt.
example_cn: 因為經營不善加上經濟不景氣，那家公司最後還是倒閉了。
simple: Many small businesses went bankrupt last year.
simple_cn: 去年很多小公司倒閉了。

example: Nowadays, you can easily go online to check your bank account balance or pay bills.
example_cn: 現在你隨時都可以上網查銀行帳戶餘額或繳帳單。
simple: I went online to buy a ticket.
simple_cn: 我上網買了一張票。

example: After graduating from high school, she decided to go to college to study art.
example_cn: 高中畢業後，她決定去讀大學學藝術。
simple: He goes to school by bus every day.
simple_cn: 他每天搭公車上學。

example: The thief was caught by the police and will go to jail for his crimes.
example_cn: 那個小偷被警察抓到了，他會因為犯下的罪行去坐牢。
pattern: S + go to prison/jail for + N
simple: He went to prison for robbery.
simple_cn: 他因為搶劫去坐牢。

example: My grandparents are very religious and go to church every Sunday morning.
example_cn: 我阿公阿嬤很虔誠，每個星期天早上都會去教會。
simple: They go to church to pray.
simple_cn: 他們去教堂祈禱。

example: He wakes up at 6 a.m. every day and takes the MRT to go to work.
example_cn: 他每天早上六點起床，然後搭捷運去上班。
simple: I have to go to work early tomorrow.
simple_cn: 我明天得早點去上班。

example: You look absolutely exhausted; you should take a hot shower and go to bed early tonight.
example_cn: 你看起來累爆了，今晚最好洗個熱水澡，早點上床睡覺。
simple: I went to sleep right after the movie.
simple_cn: 電影一結束我就去睡覺了。

example: To lose weight quickly, some people go to extremes by starving themselves, which is very unhealthy.
example_cn: 有些人為了快速減肥，會用極端的方式餓肚子，這樣非常不健康。
pattern: S + go to extremes to + V
simple: He goes to extremes to prove his point.
simple_cn: 他為了證明自己的觀點走極端。

example: We must eat all the leftovers in the fridge so that good food doesn't go to waste.
example_cn: 我們得把冰箱裡的剩菜全部吃完，才不會浪費食物。
simple: All my hard work went to waste.
simple_cn: 我所有的努力都白費了。

example: Since the irresponsible new manager took over, the whole department has gone to hell.
example_cn: 自從那個不負責任的新主管上任後，整個部門就亂成一團。
simple: The project went to hell after he left.
simple_cn: 他離開後，這個計畫就完蛋了。

phrase: go on a trip / a journey / a tour
chinese: 去旅行 / 踏上旅程 / 去觀光
example: Our family plans to go on a trip to Europe next summer to experience different cultures.
example_cn: 我們家打算明年夏天去歐洲旅行，體驗不同的文化。
pattern: S + go on a trip to + 地方
simple: He went on a business trip.
simple_cn: 他出差去了。

phrase: go on a holiday / a vacation
example: They decided to go on a vacation to Hawaii to relax and get away from work.
example_cn: 他們決定去夏威夷度假，放鬆一下，遠離工作。
simple: We are going on a holiday next week.
simple_cn: 我們下週要去度假。

example: For their 20th wedding anniversary, the couple went on a luxury cruise across the Mediterranean.
example_cn: 為了慶祝結婚二十週年，這對夫妻搭了一趟豪華郵輪，暢遊地中海。
simple: My grandparents love going on cruises.
simple_cn: 我爺爺奶奶很喜歡搭郵輪旅行。

example: It has always been my dream to go on a safari in Africa to see lions and elephants in the wild.
example_cn: 去非洲來場野生動物之旅，親眼看看野外的獅子和大象，一直是我的夢想。
simple: They went on a safari in Kenya.
simple_cn: 他們去肯亞參加了野生動物探險。

example: The two best friends packed their bags and went on an adventure around the world.
example_cn: 這兩個最好的朋友打包行李，展開了一場環遊世界的冒險。
simple: Are you ready to go on an adventure?
simple_cn: 你準備好要去冒險了嗎？

example: Since the weather is so lovely today, let's go on a picnic in the park.
example_cn: 今天天氣這麼好，我們去公園野餐吧。
simple: We went on a picnic by the river.
simple_cn: 我們去河邊野餐。

example: He was very nervous because he was going on a blind date with someone he met online.
example_cn: 他要去跟網友相親，緊張得要命。
pattern: S + go on a date with + O
simple: They went on their first date yesterday.
simple_cn: 他們昨天第一次約會。

example: The doctor strongly advised him to go on a strict diet to improve his health.
example_cn: 醫生強烈建議他嚴格控制飲食，改善健康狀況。
pattern: S + need to go on a diet
simple: I am going on a diet before the wedding.
simple_cn: 我打算在婚禮前開始減肥。

example: After getting her first paycheck, she went on a shopping spree and bought a lot of clothes.
example_cn: 她拿到第一份薪水後，就跑去大血拼，買了一大堆衣服。
pattern: S + go on a shopping spree
simple: He went on a spending spree.
simple_cn: 他大肆揮霍了一番。

example: The young actor took a deep breath before he went on stage to perform.
example_cn: 這位年輕演員在上台表演前，深深吸了一口氣。
simple: She felt nervous before going on stage.
simple_cn: 她上台前覺得很緊張。

example: The factory workers decided to go on strike to demand higher wages and better working conditions.
example_cn: 工廠的工人決定罷工，要求提高薪資並改善工作條件。
pattern: S + go on strike for + N
simple: The bus drivers went on strike yesterday.
simple_cn: 公車司機昨天罷工了。

example: The patient will need to go on a specific medical treatment to completely cure the rare disease.
example_cn: 這位病人需要接受特定的醫療療程，才能徹底治好這種罕見疾病。
pattern: S + go on a treatment for + N
simple: He went on a new treatment plan.
simple_cn: 他開始接受新的治療方案。

example: Winning the international championship is a great accomplishment for the young team.
example_cn: 贏得國際錦標賽，對這支年輕的隊伍來說是一項了不起的成就。
simple: Graduating with honors is a great accomplishment.
simple_cn: 以優異成績畢業是一項了不起的成就。

example: I have great admiration for people who dedicate their lives to helping others.
example_cn: 我非常敬佩那些奉獻一生去幫助別人的人。
pattern: S + have great admiration for + N
simple: He looked at her with great admiration.
simple_cn: 他滿懷欽佩地看著她。

type: 形容詞 + 名詞 + 介系詞
example: The project requires a great amount of time and resources to complete.
example_cn: 這個專案需要投入大量的時間和資源才能完成。
pattern: S + V + a great deal of + 不可數名詞
simple: He spent a great deal of money on the house.
simple_cn: 他花了一大筆錢買這棟房子。

example: I bought this designer coat at a 50% discount; it was a great bargain.
example_cn: 我買這件設計師外套打了五折，真的超划算。
simple: These shoes are a great bargain.
simple_cn: 這雙鞋真的很划算。

example: The lost climbers were in great danger of freezing to death in the snowstorm.
example_cn: 那些迷路的登山客身處極大危險，很可能在暴風雪中凍死。
simple: The rare animals are in great danger.
simple_cn: 這些稀有動物正處於極大的危險中。

type: 介系詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: The professor explained the complex theory in great detail so everyone could understand.
example_cn: 教授非常詳細地解釋了這個複雜的理論，讓每個人都能聽懂。
pattern: S + describe/explain O + in great detail
simple: She planned the event in great detail.
simple_cn: 她非常仔細地規劃了這場活動。

example: The foreign student had great difficulty understanding the local slang at first.
example_cn: 那位外國學生一開始很難聽懂當地的俚語。
simple: He walked with great difficulty.
simple_cn: 他走得很吃力。

example: To his great embarrassment, he forgot his lines during the school play.
example_cn: 讓他超尷尬的是，他在學校話劇演出時忘了台詞。
pattern: To one's great embarrassment, S + V
simple: She realized her mistake with great embarrassment.
simple_cn: 她非常尷尬地發現了自己的錯誤。

example: The announcement of the free concert caused great excitement among the fans.
example_cn: 免費演唱會的消息一公布，粉絲們都興奮不已。
simple: He opened the gift with great excitement.
simple_cn: 他滿懷興奮地打開了禮物。

example: We went camping in the mountains last weekend, and it was great fun.
example_cn: 我們上週末去山上露營，真的超好玩。
simple: Playing board games with friends is great fun.
simple_cn: 跟朋友一起玩桌遊真的超好玩。

example: Seeing her children grow up healthy and strong brings her great happiness.
example_cn: 看到自己的孩子健康強壯地長大，讓她非常開心。
simple: The news filled them with great happiness.
simple_cn: 這則新聞讓他們開心極了。

example: The old man wept with great joy when he finally reunited with his family.
example_cn: 那位老先生終於和家人團聚時，感動得老淚縱橫。
simple: It is a great joy to see you again.
simple_cn: 能再見到你真是太高興了。

example: Going to the beach on such a sunny day is a great idea.
example_cn: 在這麼晴朗的日子去海邊，真是個好主意。
pattern: That sounds like a great idea.
simple: He came up with a great idea.
simple_cn: 他想到了一個超棒的點子。

type: 介系詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: Learning to communicate effectively is of great importance in today's society.
example_cn: 在現今社會，學會有效溝通非常重要。
simple: This document is of great importance.
simple_cn: 這份文件非常重要。

example: You got accepted into your dream university? That is absolutely great news!
example_cn: 你被夢幻大學錄取了？這真是天大的好消息！
simple: I have some great news for you.
simple_cn: 我有個好消息要告訴你。

example: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to explore different cultures and meet new people.
example_cn: 出國留學是探索不同文化、認識新朋友的大好機會。
pattern: This is a great opportunity for + N
simple: Don't miss this great opportunity.
simple_cn: 千萬別錯過這個大好機會。

example: The young athlete shows great potential to become a world champion in the future.
example_cn: 這位年輕運動員展現出未來成為世界冠軍的巨大潛力。
pattern: S + show great potential in + N
simple: This market has great potential for growth.
simple_cn: 這個市場有很大的成長潛力。

example: The experienced surgeon performed the complicated operation with great skill.
example_cn: 那位經驗豐富的外科醫生以高超的技術完成了這場複雜的手術。
pattern: S + do something with great skill
simple: He plays the piano with great skill.
simple_cn: 他鋼琴彈得非常厲害。

chinese: 巨大的力量、極大的優勢
example: It takes great strength and courage to overcome such a terrible tragedy.
example_cn: 要克服這麼悲慘的遭遇，需要極大的勇氣與力量。
pattern: It takes great strength to + V
simple: Her ability to stay calm is a great strength.
simple_cn: 她保持冷靜的能力是一大優勢。

example: As the famous saying goes, with great power comes great responsibility.
example_cn: 俗話說得好，能力越強，責任越大。
pattern: S + have great power over + N
simple: The media wields great power.
simple_cn: 媒體擁有很大的影響力。

example: The school charity fair was a great success, raising thousands of dollars for the orphanage.
example_cn: 學校的慈善園遊會非常成功，為孤兒院募到了好幾千美元。
simple: His first novel was a great success.
simple_cn: 他的第一本小說非常成功。

example: She gets great satisfaction from helping stray animals find loving homes.
example_cn: 她從幫助流浪動物找到溫暖的家當中，獲得很大的滿足感。
pattern: S + get great satisfaction from + V-ing
simple: He looked at his work with great satisfaction.
simple_cn: 他看著自己的作品，感到非常滿意。

chinese: 深刻的理解、極大的體諒
example: The principal showed great understanding when the student explained his family problems.
example_cn: 當學生解釋家裡的情況時，校長展現了極大的體諒。
pattern: S + have a great understanding of + N
simple: She has a great understanding of music.
simple_cn: 她對音樂有很深的了解。

example: The businessman accumulated great wealth through his successful investments in real estate.
example_cn: 那位商人靠著成功的房地產投資，累積了巨額財富。
simple: He inherited great wealth from his family.
simple_cn: 他從家族繼承了龐大的財富。

example: The village elder shared words of great wisdom with the younger generation.
example_cn: 村裡的長輩向年輕一代分享了充滿智慧的話語。
simple: She leads the team with great wisdom.
simple_cn: 她以過人的智慧帶領團隊。

example: The lawyer presented a strong argument to prove his client's innocence.
example_cn: 那位律師提出了強而有力的論點，來證明他的當事人是清白的。
simple: There is a strong argument for raising taxes.
simple_cn: 調漲稅收有很強烈的理由支持。

example: She has a strong belief that hard work will eventually pay off.
example_cn: 她堅信努力終究會有回報。
pattern: S + have a strong belief that...
simple: He holds a strong conviction about human rights.
simple_cn: 他對人權抱持著堅定的信念。

chinese: 充分的理由、有力的立論
example: There is a strong case for banning smartphones in the classroom to improve focus.
example_cn: 為了提升專注力，禁止在教室使用智慧型手機是個很有說服力的理由。
pattern: There is a strong case for/against + N
simple: He makes a strong case for the new policy.
simple_cn: 他為這項新政策提出了很有力的論點。

example: If we leave now, there is a strong chance that we can catch the last train.
example_cn: 如果我們現在出發，很有機會趕上最後一班火車。
pattern: There is a strong chance that + S + V
simple: There's a strong chance of rain tomorrow.
simple_cn: 明天很有可能會下雨。

example: I need a cup of strong coffee to keep myself awake during the morning meeting.
example_cn: 我需要一杯濃咖啡，才能在早上的會議中保持清醒。
simple: He prefers strong tea in the afternoon.
simple_cn: 他下午喜歡喝濃茶。

chinese: 堅定的承諾、強烈的使命感
example: The new principal has shown a strong commitment to improving student welfare.
example_cn: 新任校長展現了改善學生福利的強烈決心。
pattern: S + show a strong commitment to + N
simple: The company made a strong commitment to safety.
simple_cn: 這家公司對安全做出了堅定的承諾。

chinese: 強烈的關聯、緊密的聯繫
example: Studies have shown a strong connection between lack of sleep and depression.
example_cn: 研究顯示，睡眠不足與憂鬱症之間有很強的關聯性。
pattern: There is a strong connection between A and B
simple: We share a strong connection.
simple_cn: 我們之間有著深厚的連結。

example: The bright red door forms a strong contrast with the white walls of the house.
example_cn: 那扇亮紅色的大門與房子的白牆形成強烈對比。
pattern: A forms a strong contrast with B
simple: His quiet nature is in strong contrast to her outgoing personality.
simple_cn: 他安靜的個性跟她外向的性格形成強烈對比。

example: The controversial policy drew strong criticism from the general public.
example_cn: 這項爭議性政策引來大眾的強烈批評。
simple: The decision met with strong criticism.
simple_cn: 這個決定遭到了強烈的批評。

example: After graduating, she had a strong desire to travel around the world and experience different cultures.
example_cn: 畢業後，她非常渴望環遊世界，體驗不同的文化。
pattern: S + have a strong desire to + V
simple: He felt a strong desire to help them.
simple_cn: 他有一股強烈的念頭想要幫助他們。

example: Our school places a strong emphasis on both academic achievement and moral education.
example_cn: 我們學校非常重視學業成績與品德教育。
pattern: S + put a strong emphasis on + N
simple: The course puts a strong emphasis on practical skills.
simple_cn: 這門課程非常強調實務技能。

example: Without strong evidence, the police cannot arrest the suspect.
example_cn: 如果沒有強而有力的證據，警方就不能逮捕嫌犯。
simple: There is strong evidence linking him to the crime.
simple_cn: 有強烈的證據顯示他與這起犯罪有關。

example: I have a strong feeling that everything will turn out fine in the end.
example_cn: 我強烈感覺最後一切都會順利解決。
pattern: S + have a strong feeling that...
simple: She has strong feelings about animal rights.
simple_cn: 她對動物權益有很強烈的感受。

example: Parents exert a strong influence on their children's personality development.
example_cn: 父母對孩子的人格發展有很深的影響。
pattern: S + have a strong influence on + N
simple: The teacher had a strong influence on his life.
simple_cn: 那位老師對他的人生產生了深遠的影響。

example: The movie is rated R because it contains violence and strong language.
example_cn: 這部電影因為有暴力與粗話而被列為限制級。
simple: He was criticized for using strong language.
simple_cn: 他因為用詞激烈而受到批評。

example: The government's plan to cut workers' salaries met with strong opposition from the labor union.
example_cn: 政府打算調降勞工薪資的計畫，遭到工會的強烈反對。
simple: There is strong resistance to the new law.
simple_cn: 這項新法面臨強烈的反對聲浪。

example: Durian is a tropical fruit known for its creamy texture and very strong smell.
example_cn: 榴槤是一種熱帶水果，以口感綿密和氣味濃烈聞名。
simple: Garlic has a very strong taste.
simple_cn: 大蒜的味道非常嗆。

example: The charity project would not be possible without the strong support of the local community.
example_cn: 如果沒有當地社區的大力支持，這個慈善計畫根本無法實現。
pattern: S + show strong support for + N
simple: The mayor voiced his strong support for the plan.
simple_cn: 市長公開表達了他對這項計畫的強力支持。

example: Young children have a strong tendency to imitate their parents' behavior.
example_cn: 年幼的孩子有很強的傾向去模仿父母的行為。
pattern: S + have a strong tendency to + V
simple: There is a strong tendency for prices to rise.
simple_cn: 物價有很明顯的上漲趨勢。

chinese: 優良的傳統、深厚的傳統
example: This historic school has a strong tradition of academic excellence and sportsmanship.
example_cn: 這所歷史悠久的學校，向來有學業優異與運動家精神的優良傳統。
pattern: S + have a strong tradition of + N
simple: The village maintains a strong tradition of woodworking.
simple_cn: 這個村子保留了深厚的木工傳統。

chinese: 堅定的看法、強烈的觀點
example: The author expressed strong views on the current political situation in his new book.
example_cn: 作者在他的新書中，對當前的政治局勢表達了強烈的看法。
pattern: S + hold strong views on + N
simple: She has strong views on animal welfare.
simple_cn: 她對動物福利有很強烈的看法。

example: The flight was delayed for several hours due to the strong wind and heavy rain.
example_cn: 因為強風與豪雨，航班延誤了好幾個小時。
simple: The strong wind blew down many trees.
simple_cn: 強風吹倒了很多樹木。

example: The lawyer presented a strong argument to prove his client's innocence.
example_cn: 律師提出強而有力的論點，來證明他的當事人是無辜的。
simple: There is a strong argument for raising taxes.
simple_cn: 有一個很有力的論點支持加稅。

example: She has a strong belief that hard work will eventually pay off.
example_cn: 她堅信努力終究會有回報。
pattern: S + have a strong belief that...
simple: He holds a strong conviction about human rights.
simple_cn: 他對人權抱持著堅定的信念。

simple: He prefers strong tea in the afternoon.

example_cn: 如果沒有確鑿的證據，警方不能逮捕嫌疑人。

example: I have a strong feeling that everything will turn out fine in the end.
example_cn: 我強烈感覺最後一切都會好轉的。
pattern: S + have a strong feeling that...
simple: She has strong feelings about animal rights.
simple_cn: 她對動物權益有很強烈的感受。

example_cn: 榴槤是一種熱帶水果，以綿密的口感和非常強烈的氣味聞名。
simple: Garlic has a very strong taste.
simple_cn: 大蒜的味道非常嗆。

example: The charity project would not be possible without the strong support of the local community.
example_cn: 如果沒有當地社區的大力支持，這個慈善計畫根本無法實現。
pattern: S + show strong support for + N
simple: The mayor voiced his strong support for the plan.
simple_cn: 市長公開表達了他對這項計畫的大力支持。

example: Young children have a strong tendency to imitate their parents' behavior.
example_cn: 年幼的孩子有很強的傾向去模仿父母的行為。
pattern: S + have a strong tendency to + V
simple: There is a strong tendency for prices to rise.
simple_cn: 物價有很明顯的上漲趨勢。

chinese: 優良的傳統、深厚的傳統
example: This historic school has a strong tradition of academic excellence and sportsmanship.
example_cn: 這所歷史悠久的學校，向來有學術優異與運動家精神的優良傳統。
pattern: S + have a strong tradition of + N
simple: The village maintains a strong tradition of woodworking.
simple_cn: 這個村莊保留了深厚的木工傳統。

chinese: 堅定的看法、強烈的觀點
example: The author expressed strong views on the current political situation in his new book.
example_cn: 作者在他的新書中，對當前的政治局勢表達了強烈的看法。
pattern: S + hold strong views on + N
simple: She has strong views on animal welfare.
simple_cn: 她對動物福利有很強烈的看法。

example: The flight was delayed for several hours due to the strong wind and heavy rain.
example_cn: 因為強風與豪雨，航班延誤了好幾個小時。
simple: The strong wind blew down many trees.
simple_cn: 強風吹倒了許多樹木。

chinese: 大雨 / 大雪 / 濃霧
example: The airport was temporarily closed due to heavy fog and heavy snow.
example_cn: 因為濃霧跟大雪，機場暫時關閉了。
pattern: S + be delayed/closed due to heavy rain/fog
simple: We drove slowly in the heavy rain.
simple_cn: 我們在大雨中慢慢開車。

example: As a heavy smoker, he finds it extremely difficult to quit the habit.
example_cn: 他菸癮很重，要戒掉這個習慣非常困難。
simple: His father used to be a heavy drinker.
simple_cn: 他爸爸以前很愛喝酒。

example: The enemy army suffered heavy casualties during the fierce battle.
example_cn: 敵軍在那場激戰中傷亡慘重。
simple: The business suffered heavy losses last year.
simple_cn: 這間公司去年虧損慘重。

example: Taking care of five children is a heavy burden for the single mother.
example_cn: 對那位單親媽媽來說，照顧五個小孩是很大的負擔。
pattern: N + is a heavy burden for + 人
simple: He carries a heavy responsibility at work.
simple_cn: 他在工作上背負著很重的責任。

example: His sudden death dealt a heavy blow to his family and friends.
example_cn: 他突然過世，對家人和朋友造成沉重打擊。
pattern: S + deal a heavy blow to + N
simple: The team suffered a heavy defeat.
simple_cn: 這支球隊慘敗。

example: She is in bed with a heavy cold and a high fever today.
example_cn: 她今天得了重感冒還發高燒，躺在床上休息。
pattern: S + come down with a heavy cold
simple: He caught a heavy cold yesterday.
simple_cn: 他昨天得了重感冒。

example: The doctor managed to stop the heavy bleeding from the patient's wound.
example_cn: 醫生成功止住病人傷口的大量出血。
simple: Apply pressure to control heavy bleeding.
simple_cn: 加壓止血，控制大量出血。

chinese: 繁重的工作量 / 重稅
example: Many employees complain about the heavy workload and low salary in this company.
example_cn: 這間公司很多員工都抱怨工作量大、薪水又低。
pattern: S + complain about the heavy workload
simple: The government imposed heavy taxes on luxury goods.
simple_cn: 政府對奢侈品課徵重稅。

example: With a heavy heart, she waved goodbye to her best friend at the airport.
example_cn: 她懷著沉重的心情，在機場跟最好的朋友揮手道別。
pattern: S + V + with a heavy heart
simple: He let out a heavy sigh of disappointment.
simple_cn: 他失望地重重嘆了一口氣。

example: A heavy silence filled the room after the shocking announcement was made.
example_cn: 那個驚人的消息宣布之後，房間裡陷入一片死寂。
pattern: A heavy silence fell over + 地方
simple: There was a heavy silence between them.
simple_cn: 他們之間陷入一陣沉重的沉默。

example: You need a special license and intensive training to operate this heavy machinery.
example_cn: 操作這種重型機械需要特殊執照跟密集訓練。
simple: Exposure to heavy metals can cause illness.
simple_cn: 接觸重金屬可能會導致生病。

example: I missed the beginning of the movie because I was stuck in heavy traffic.
example_cn: 因為塞車塞得很嚴重，我錯過了電影的開頭。
pattern: S + be delayed due to heavy traffic
simple: Heavy traffic is common during rush hour.
simple_cn: 尖峰時間塞車很常見。

example: It is not a good idea to eat heavy food right before you go to sleep.
example_cn: 睡覺前吃太油膩的東西不是個好主意。
simple: I prefer a light salad rather than heavy food.
simple_cn: 我比較喜歡清淡的沙拉，不愛油膩的食物。

example: We heard heavy footsteps coming slowly up the stairs in the middle of the night.
example_cn: 半夜我們聽到沉重的腳步聲慢慢走上樓梯。
simple: His heavy footsteps echoed in the hallway.
simple_cn: 他沉重的腳步聲在走廊裡迴盪。

example: The dictator ruled the country with a heavy hand, punishing anyone who disagreed.
example_cn: 那個獨裁者用高壓手段統治國家，懲罰任何反對的人。
pattern: S + rule/manage with a heavy hand
simple: The manager was known for his heavy hand.
simple_cn: 那位經理以作風強勢聞名。

example: The suspect is described as a tall man with dark hair and heavy features.
example_cn: 嫌犯的特徵是身材高大、黑髮、五官粗獷。
simple: He has a square face and heavy features.
simple_cn: 他有一張方臉和粗獷的五官。

example: It is common sense to look both ways before crossing a busy street.
example_cn: 過馬路前要先看左右兩邊，這是基本常識。
pattern: N + is just a matter of common sense.
simple: Using a password is common sense.
simple_cn: 使用密碼是基本常識。

example: Parents play an essential role in shaping their children's early development.
example_cn: 父母在孩子的早期發展中扮演著關鍵角色。
pattern: S + play an essential role in + N
simple: Water plays an essential role in our bodies.
simple_cn: 水在我們身體裡扮演很重要的角色。

example: The poverty in the village is in sharp contrast to the wealth of the nearby city.
example_cn: 村莊的貧窮跟附近城市的富裕形成強烈對比。
pattern: A is in sharp contrast to B
simple: His quiet voice was in sharp contrast to her loud one.
simple_cn: 他輕柔的聲音跟她大嗓門形成強烈對比。

example: The new restaurant offers a wide range of vegetarian dishes to choose from.
example_cn: 那間新餐廳提供多種素食料理可以選擇。
pattern: S + provide/offer a wide range of + Ns
simple: The store sells a wide range of products.
simple_cn: 這家店賣的商品種類很多。

example: Dogs have a very close relationship with humans compared to other animals.
example_cn: 狗跟其他動物比起來，跟人類的關係非常親近。
pattern: S + have a close relationship with + O
simple: She maintains a close relationship with her sister.
simple_cn: 她跟她姊姊關係很密切。

example: His outstanding success is the result of years of hard work and dedication.
example_cn: 他傑出的成就是多年努力跟投入的結果。
pattern: N + requires a lot of hard work.
simple: Hard work usually pays off in the end.
simple_cn: 努力通常到最後都會有回報。

example: Getting enough sleep is crucial for both your physical and mental health.
example_cn: 睡飽對你的身心健康都非常重要。
pattern: S + pay attention to one's mental health
simple: Exercise is good for mental health.
simple_cn: 運動對心理健康很好。

example: Many teenagers spend an average of three hours a day scrolling through social media.
example_cn: 很多青少年平均每天花三小時滑社群媒體。
pattern: S + spend time on social media
simple: News spreads fast on social media.
simple_cn: 消息在社群媒體上傳得很快。

example: Global warming is causing sea levels to rise at an alarming rate around the world.
example_cn: 全球暖化正導致全球海平面以驚人的速度上升。
pattern: Global warming is a serious issue.
simple: We must take action to slow down global warming.
simple_cn: 我們必須採取行動來減緩全球暖化。

example: We must find sustainable ways to conserve natural resources for future generations.
example_cn: 我們必須找到永續的方式來保護自然資源，留給後代子孫。
simple: Taiwan is not rich in natural resources.
simple_cn: 台灣天然資源不豐富。

example: Taking public transport instead of driving is a great way to reduce carbon emissions.
example_cn: 搭大眾運輸而不是開車，是減少碳排放的好方法。
pattern: S + take public transport to + 地方
simple: Public transport in this city is very convenient.
simple_cn: 這個城市的公共運輸非常方便。

example: Exercising for 30 minutes in the morning has become an important part of my daily routine.
example_cn: 早上運動三十分鐘已經成為我日常生活的重要部分。
pattern: N + is part of my daily routine
simple: Reading the news is his daily routine.
simple_cn: 看新聞是他每天的例行公事。

example: Eating too much fast food can easily lead to obesity and other serious health problems.
example_cn: 吃太多速食很容易導致肥胖和其他嚴重的健康問題。
pattern: S + eat too much fast food
simple: Fast food is convenient but unhealthy.
simple_cn: 速食雖然方便但不健康。

example: Many species of rare animals are currently facing extinction due to severe habitat loss.
example_cn: 許多稀有動物物種因為棲息地嚴重流失，目前正面臨滅絕的危機。
simple: The polar bear is facing extinction.
simple_cn: 北極熊正面臨滅絕。

example: The success of the outdoor event will heavily depend on the weather tomorrow.
example_cn: 戶外活動的成功與否，很大程度上要看明天的天氣。
simple: It depends on what you want to do.
simple_cn: 這要看你想做什麼。

example: We shouldn't rely solely on smartphones for all our communication.
example_cn: 我們不該完全依賴智慧型手機來進行所有溝通。
pattern: S + rely on + N + to V
simple: You can always rely on him for help.
simple_cn: 需要幫忙的時候你隨時可以找他。

example: I am really looking forward to hearing from you soon.
example_cn: 我很期待能趕快收到你的消息。
pattern: S + be looking forward to + V-ing
simple: We look forward to your visit.
simple_cn: 我們期待你的來訪。

example: The government needs to find effective ways to deal with the housing crisis.
example_cn: 政府需要找出有效的方法來處理住房危機。
simple: I don't know how to deal with this problem.
simple_cn: 我不知道該怎麼處理這個問題。

example: Listening to music is her way to cope with the immense stress from work.
example_cn: 聽音樂是她應付工作巨大壓力的方式。
simple: It's hard to cope with the loss of a loved one.
simple_cn: 失去摯愛是很難走出來的。

example: You should focus on your studies instead of spending hours playing video games.
example_cn: 你應該專注在課業上，而不是花好幾個小時打電動。
simple: We need to focus on the main issue.
simple_cn: 我們需要專注在主要問題上。

example: The committee consists of ten experts from different scientific fields.
example_cn: 這個委員會由來自不同科學領域的十位專家組成。
simple: Water consists of hydrogen and oxygen.
simple_cn: 水是由氫和氧組成的。

example: I thought it would rain, but it turned out to be a beautiful sunny day.
example_cn: 我本來以為會下雨，結果卻是個晴朗的好天氣。
pattern: It turned out that + S + V
simple: The rumor turned out to be true.
simple_cn: 那個謠言結果是真的。

example: The scientists will carry out a series of experiments to test the new drug.
example_cn: 科學家們將進行一系列實驗來測試這種新藥。
simple: The government carried out a strict policy.
simple_cn: 政府實施了一項嚴格的政策。

example: We need to set off early tomorrow morning to avoid the rush hour traffic.
example_cn: 我們明天早上得早點出發，避開尖峰時段的車潮。
pattern: S + set off for + 地方
simple: What time are we setting off?
simple_cn: 我們幾點出發？

example: I came across some old photos of my grandparents while cleaning the attic.
example_cn: 我在打掃閣樓的時候翻到一些阿公阿嬤的老照片。
simple: He came across a rare book in the store.
simple_cn: 他在店裡偶然發現了一本稀有書。

example: He bought her a beautiful necklace to make up for forgetting their anniversary.
example_cn: 他買了一條漂亮的項鍊給她，當作忘記結婚紀念日的補償。
simple: Nothing can make up for lost time.
simple_cn: 什麼都無法彌補失去的時間。

example: No matter how difficult the situation is, you should never give up on your dreams.
example_cn: 不管情況再怎麼困難，你都不應該放棄自己的夢想。
simple: He gave up smoking last year.
simple_cn: 他去年戒菸了。

example: The outdoor concert has been put off until next week due to the approaching typhoon.
example_cn: 因為颱風快來了，戶外演唱會已經延到下個禮拜。
simple: Don't put off doing your homework.
simple_cn: 別拖延寫作業。

example: Eating too much fast food and lacking exercise can lead to serious health problems.
example_cn: 吃太多速食又缺乏運動，會導致嚴重的健康問題。
simple: His hard work led to his success.
simple_cn: 他的努力付出帶來了成功。

example: You have to go through a lot of tough training to become a professional athlete.
example_cn: 要成為職業運動員，必須經歷很多嚴格的訓練。
simple: She went through a difficult time last year.
simple_cn: 她去年經歷了一段艱難的時期。

example: You should eat more fresh vegetables instead of relying on vitamin pills.
example_cn: 你應該多吃新鮮蔬菜，而不是只靠吃維他命藥丸。
simple: He played games instead of studying.
simple_cn: 他玩遊戲，沒有唸書。

example: The flight was delayed for several hours because of the heavy snowstorm.
example_cn: 因為暴風雪的關係，航班延誤了好幾個小時。
simple: She stayed home because of the rain.
simple_cn: 因為下雨，她待在家裡。

example: In terms of safety and fuel efficiency, this car is the best choice on the market.
example_cn: 就安全性和油耗表現來說，這款車是市面上最好的選擇。
pattern: In terms of N, S + V
simple: The job is great in terms of salary.
simple_cn: 這份工作薪水方面很不錯。

example: On behalf of the entire school, I would like to thank you for your generous donation.
example_cn: 我代表全校師生，感謝您的慷慨捐款。
pattern: On behalf of + N, S + V
simple: He accepted the award on behalf of his team.
simple_cn: 他代表他的團隊領獎。

example: Having a good sense of humor can help you make friends easily in a new environment.
example_cn: 有好幽默感可以幫助你在新環境裡輕鬆交到朋友。
pattern: S + have a good sense of humor
simple: My dad has a great sense of humor.
simple_cn: 我爸爸很有幽默感。

example: Finishing the marathon gave him a great sense of achievement and pride.
example_cn: 跑完全程馬拉松讓他很有成就感和榮譽感。
pattern: V-ing gives O a sense of achievement
simple: Solving the puzzle gave me a sense of achievement.
simple_cn: 解開這個謎題讓我很有成就感。

example: A stable job and a loving family provide her with a strong sense of security.
example_cn: 穩定的工作和溫暖的家庭，給了她很強的安全感。
pattern: N + provides a sense of security
simple: Money doesn't always bring a sense of security.
simple_cn: 金錢不一定總能帶來安全感。

example: Reading literature plays an important role in fostering empathy among children.
example_cn: 閱讀文學作品對培養孩子的同理心扮演重要角色。
pattern: S + is important for fostering empathy
simple: Fostering empathy makes us better listeners.
simple_cn: 培養同理心能讓我們成為更好的傾聽者。

example: Many rural schools are struggling with a severe lack of resources and qualified teachers.
example_cn: 很多偏鄉學校正面臨資源和合格師資嚴重不足的問題。
pattern: S + suffer from a lack of resources
simple: The project failed due to a lack of resources.
simple_cn: 這個計畫因為資源不足而失敗了。

example: Strict laws have been passed to protect endangered species from illegal hunting.
example_cn: 已經通過嚴格的法律來保護瀕危物種，防止非法獵捕。
pattern: S + take action to protect endangered species
simple: The giant panda is an endangered species.
simple_cn: 大貓熊是瀕危物種。

example: The government has taken strict preventive measures to stop the virus from spreading.
example_cn: 政府已經採取嚴格的防疫措施，阻止病毒擴散。
pattern: S + take preventive measures to + V
simple: We must take preventive measures against fire.
simple_cn: 我們必須採取防火措施。

example: Writing a novel is a highly time-consuming process that requires a lot of patience.
example_cn: 寫小說是一個非常耗時的過程，需要很大的耐心。
simple: Learning a language is a time-consuming process.
simple_cn: 學語言是一個耗時的過程。

chinese: 精打細算的旅客、有預算考量的旅客
example: Capsule hotels have become a popular choice for budget-conscious travelers in Japan.
example_cn: 膠囊旅館在日本已經成為預算有限旅客的熱門選擇。
pattern: N + is a good choice for budget-conscious travelers
simple: Hostels are suitable for budget-conscious travelers.
simple_cn: 青年旅館適合注重預算的旅客。

example: Many tech companies believe that self-driving cars will reduce traffic accidents in the future.
example_cn: 許多科技公司認為，自動駕駛汽車未來能減少交通事故。
simple: Self-driving cars are becoming more common.
simple_cn: 自動駕駛車越來越常見了。

example: The public was confused by the conflicting information released by different news channels.
example_cn: 民眾被不同新聞台發布的衝突資訊搞得一頭霧水。
pattern: S + receive conflicting information about + N
simple: There is conflicting information about the new policy.
simple_cn: 關於這項新政策的資訊有矛盾。

example: Buying seasonal produce from local farmers is usually cheaper and healthier.
example_cn: 跟當地農民買當季蔬果通常比較便宜又健康。
pattern: S + prefer to buy seasonal produce
simple: The supermarket sells fresh seasonal produce.
simple_cn: 這間超市有賣當季的新鮮蔬果。

example: A leaking faucet can waste a surprising amount of water over a month.
example_cn: 水龍頭漏水一個月下來，浪費的水量會很驚人。
simple: The sound of the leaking faucet kept me awake.
simple_cn: 水龍頭漏水的聲音讓我睡不著。

example: Hearing that old song always brings back happy childhood memories for me.
example_cn: 聽到那首老歌總會勾起我快樂的童年回憶。
simple: The smell of baking bread triggered her childhood memories.
simple_cn: 烤麵包的香味喚起了她童年的回憶。

example: The politician was forced to apologize after making racist remarks on social media.
example_cn: 那位政治人物因為在社群媒體上發表種族歧視言論，被迫道歉。
simple: He was fired for his racist remarks.
simple_cn: 他因為種族歧視的言論被開除。

example: Don't worry about making it perfect; just get your ideas down in the first draft.
example_cn: 不用擔心要做到完美，初稿先把你的想法寫下來就好。
pattern: S + finish the first draft of + N
simple: I have just completed the first draft of my essay.
simple_cn: 我剛寫完我的報告初稿。

chinese: 廢棄的房子、空無一人的房子
example: The children were told to stay away from the deserted house at the end of the street.
example_cn: 孩子們被告知要遠離街尾那間廢棄的房子。
simple: The deserted house looked spooky at night.
simple_cn: 那間廢棄的房子晚上看起來很陰森。

chinese: 厚厚的塗層 / 覆蓋物
example: The cake is covered with a thick coating of delicious chocolate icing.
example_cn: 蛋糕上覆蓋著一層厚厚的、美味的巧克力糖霜。
pattern: N + is covered with a thick coating of + N
simple: There was a thick coating of dust on the old books.
simple_cn: 那些舊書上積了一層厚厚的灰塵。

example: It takes enormous courage to stand up and speak the truth against the crowd.
example_cn: 要站出來對抗群眾說實話，需要極大的勇氣。
pattern: S + show enormous courage in + V-ing
simple: He showed enormous courage during the battle.
simple_cn: 他在戰鬥中展現了極大的勇氣。

example: During tough economic times, many people lose their jobs and struggle to survive.
example_cn: 經濟不景氣的時候，很多人會失業，為了生存而掙扎。
pattern: In tough economic times, S + V
simple: Businesses often close during tough economic times.
simple_cn: 經濟不景氣的時候，很多店家都會關門。

example: Despite his busy schedule, the CEO always makes time for his family on weekends.
example_cn: 儘管行程滿檔，這位執行長週末還是會騰出時間陪家人。
pattern: S + have a very busy schedule
simple: I cannot join you due to my busy schedule.
simple_cn: 我行程太滿，沒辦法跟你一起去。

example: The principal delivered an inspiring speech at the high school graduation ceremony.
example_cn: 校長在高中畢業典禮上發表了一場激勵人心的演講。
simple: My parents wept at my graduation ceremony.
simple_cn: 我父母在我的畢業典禮上哭了。

chinese: 感人的演講、暖心的演講
example: The best man gave a heartwarming speech that brought tears to the bride's eyes.
example_cn: 伴郎的致詞溫馨動人，讓新娘感動得熱淚盈眶。
simple: Her heartwarming speech touched everyone.
simple_cn: 她感人的演講觸動了每一個人。

example: Social innovation is necessary to solve long-standing problems like poverty and inequality.
example_cn: 社會創新對於解決貧窮與不平等這類長期存在的問題是必要的。
pattern: N + is an example of social innovation
simple: The charity relies on social innovation.
simple_cn: 這個慈善機構依賴社會創新來運作。

example: Behind the old mansion, there is a beautiful garden filled with colorful roses.
example_cn: 在那棟老豪宅後面，有一座種滿了五顏六色玫瑰的美麗花園。
simple: She spends her weekends maintaining her beautiful garden.
simple_cn: 她週末都在整理她漂亮的花園。

chinese: 暈車 / 暈船 / 動暈症
example: If you suffer from motion sickness, you should take some medicine before getting on the boat.
example_cn: 如果你會暈船，上船前應該先吃點藥。
simple: Reading in a moving car gives me motion sickness.
simple_cn: 在行進中的車上看書會讓我暈車。

example: I woke up in a cold sweat after having a terrifying nightmare about falling.
example_cn: 我做了一個關於墜落的恐怖惡夢，醒來時嚇出一身冷汗。
pattern: S + broke out in a cold sweat
simple: The horror movie left him in a cold sweat.
simple_cn: 那部恐怖片讓他嚇出一身冷汗。

example: Working from home has significant advantages, such as saving commuting time.
example_cn: 在家工作有顯著的好處，例如省下通勤時間。
pattern: There are significant advantages to + V-ing
simple: This method offers significant advantages.
simple_cn: 這個方法有很明顯的優勢。

example: The European cathedral is famous for its intricate architecture and stunning glass windows.
example_cn: 這座歐洲大教堂以其精緻的建築和令人驚嘆的彩繪玻璃窗聞名。
simple: We admired the intricate architecture of the palace.
simple_cn: 我們讚嘆這座宮殿精緻的建築設計。

example: The concert hall was specially designed to provide the best acoustic quality for the audience.
example_cn: 這個音樂廳是特別設計的，為聽眾提供最好的音響效果。
simple: The studio needs to improve its acoustic quality.
simple_cn: 這間錄音室需要改善它的音響品質。

example: All employees must be trained on how to react properly in emergency situations.
example_cn: 所有員工都必須接受訓練，學習如何在緊急狀況下正確應對。
pattern: S + must know what to do in emergency situations
simple: Keep this kit for emergency situations.
simple_cn: 把這個急救包留著，以備不時之需。

chinese: 公共危險、對大眾有危害的人事物
example: Drunk driving is not only illegal but also a serious public hazard.
example_cn: 酒駕不僅違法，還是一種嚴重的公共危害。
simple: The abandoned factory became a public hazard.
simple_cn: 那座廢棄工廠成了公共危險設施。

example: Drivers are advised to keep a safe distance from the vehicle in front of them.
example_cn: 建議駕駛人與前車保持安全距離。
pattern: S + keep a safe distance from + N
simple: Please stand at a safe distance.
simple_cn: 請站在安全距離外。

example: I usually avoid watching horror movies alone at night because they give me nightmares.
example_cn: 我通常避免晚上獨自看恐怖片，因為會做惡夢。
simple: Horror movies are very popular during Halloween.
simple_cn: 萬聖節期間恐怖片非常受歡迎。

example: Scientific experiments must be conducted in a highly controlled environment to ensure accurate results.
example_cn: 科學實驗必須在高度受控的環境中進行，以確保結果準確。
pattern: S + be kept in a controlled environment
simple: The plants are grown in a controlled environment.
simple_cn: 這些植物是在受控環境下種植的。

example: Even years after the accident, she still felt a residual fear whenever she drove a car.
example_cn: 即使車禍過去多年，她開車時仍會感到一絲殘留的恐懼。
pattern: S + experience residual fear after + N
simple: The trauma left him with residual fear.
simple_cn: 那場創傷讓他留下了殘餘的恐懼。

example: Russia is sometimes considered an alcohol-dependent country due to its high consumption of vodka.
example_cn: 俄羅斯有時被認為是一個依賴酒精的國家，因為伏特加消耗量很高。
simple: He sought help for being alcohol-dependent.
simple_cn: 他因為酒精成癮而尋求協助。

example: Bubble tea has undoubtedly become the national drink of Taiwan.
example_cn: 珍珠奶茶無疑已成為台灣的國飲。
pattern: N + is considered the national drink of + 國家
simple: Beer is often seen as Germany's national drink.
simple_cn: 啤酒常被視為德國的國民飲料。

example: The police cracked down on the illegal production of counterfeit designer bags.
example_cn: 警方取締了仿冒名牌包的非法生產。
pattern: S + stop the illegal production of + N
simple: The illegal production of drugs is a serious crime.
simple_cn: 非法製造毒品是嚴重的罪行。

example: The sunlight shining through the stained glass windows created a beautiful pattern on the church floor.
example_cn: 陽光透過彩繪玻璃窗，在教堂地板上形成美麗的圖案。
pattern: The church features beautiful stained glass windows.
simple: He admired the stained glass windows.
simple_cn: 他讚賞那些彩繪玻璃窗。

example: The sudden lack of funding poses a serious problem for the research team.
example_cn: 資金突然短缺，對研究團隊來說是個嚴重的問題。
pattern: N + poses a problem for + O
simple: This delay poses a problem for our schedule.
simple_cn: 這個延誤對我們的行程造成了問題。

example: If you encounter any problems during the installation process, please contact our support team.
example_cn: 如果在安裝過程中遇到任何問題，請聯絡我們的支援團隊。
pattern: If S + encounter a problem, S + V
simple: We encountered a minor problem yesterday.
simple_cn: 我們昨天遇到了一個小問題。

example: With great determination, she finally overcame the problem of stage fright.
example_cn: 憑著堅定的決心，她終於克服了舞台恐懼的問題。
pattern: S + overcome the problem of + N
simple: They worked together to overcome the problem.
simple_cn: 他們一起合作克服了那個問題。

example: The lack of communication caused a major problem between the two departments.
example_cn: 缺乏溝通導致兩個部門之間出現重大問題。
pattern: N + caused a problem between A and B
simple: His carelessness caused a big problem.
simple_cn: 他的粗心大意引發了一個大問題。

example: Air pollution has become a highly serious problem in many modern cities.
example_cn: 空氣污染已成為許多現代城市中非常嚴重的問題。
pattern: N + has become a serious problem.
simple: Traffic jam is a serious problem here.
simple_cn: 塞車在這裡是個嚴重的問題。

example: Childhood obesity is a growing problem in most developed countries.
example_cn: 兒童肥胖在大多數已開發國家中是一個日益嚴重的問題。
pattern: N + is a growing problem in + 地方
simple: Cyberbullying is a growing problem.
simple_cn: 網路霸凌是個日益嚴重的問題。

example: The issue of global climate change is a complex problem that requires international cooperation.
example_cn: 全球氣候變遷是一個複雜的問題，需要國際合作。
simple: Poverty is a very complex problem.
simple_cn: 貧窮是個非常複雜的問題。

example: Back pain is a common problem for office workers who sit all day.
example_cn: 背痛是整天坐著的上班族常見的問題。
pattern: N + is a common problem for + O
simple: Insomnia is a common problem nowadays.
simple_cn: 失眠現在是常見的問題。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: Education is often seen as the best solution to the problem of poverty.
example_cn: 教育常被視為解決貧窮問題的最佳方法。
pattern: N + is the solution to the problem.
simple: We must find a solution to this problem.
simple_cn: 我們必須找到這個問題的解決辦法。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: The new manager has a completely different approach to the problem.
example_cn: 新經理對這個問題有完全不同的處理方式。
pattern: S + have a different approach to the problem.
simple: His approach to the problem is creative.
simple_cn: 他處理問題的方式很有創意。

chinese: 活躍地四處走動、(病後)能下床走動
type: 慣用語 / 介系詞片語
example: After a week in bed with the flu, she is finally out and about again.
example_cn: 流感在床上躺了一個禮拜後，她終於可以出門活動了。
simple: It's good to see you out and about after your surgery.
simple_cn: 看到你手術後能出門走動，真是太好了。

example: I hadn't seen him for years, and then he called me completely out of the blue.
example_cn: 我已經好幾年沒見到他，結果他突然完全無預警地打電話給我。
pattern: S + V + out of the blue
simple: The decision came totally out of the blue.
simple_cn: 這個決定來得完全出乎意料。

chinese: 不符合性格、與平時表現不符
example: It was completely out of character for him to shout at the employees.
example_cn: 他對員工大吼大叫，這完全不像他平常的作風。
pattern: It is out of character for O + to V
simple: Her sudden anger was very out of character.
simple_cn: 她突然發脾氣，完全不像她的作風。

chinese: 不再流通、(人)不活躍於社交圈
example: Since he started his new demanding job, he has been somewhat out of circulation.
example_cn: 自從他開始那份高壓的新工作後，就有點與外界失聯了。
simple: Those old coins are now out of circulation.
simple_cn: 那些舊硬幣現在已經不再流通了。

example: When they started discussing advanced quantum physics, I felt completely out of my depth.
example_cn: 當他們開始討論進階量子物理時，我完全聽不懂。
pattern: S + feel out of one's depth
simple: I am out of my depth in this new project.
simple_cn: 我在這個新專案裡完全摸不著頭緒。

example: We waited until the children were out of earshot before discussing the surprise party.
example_cn: 我們等到孩子們聽不到談話聲，才開始討論驚喜派對的事。
simple: Make sure she is out of earshot before you speak.
simple_cn: 確保她聽不到，你再開口說話。

chinese: 在安全的地方、免於危險
example: During the typhoon, we moved all the potted plants indoors to keep them out of harm's way.
example_cn: 颱風期間，我們把所有盆栽都搬進室內，以免它們受損。
pattern: keep O + out of harm's way
simple: The police guided the crowd out of harm's way.
simple_cn: 警方引導群眾離開危險區域。

example: He was so exhausted after the marathon that he was out like a light as soon as his head hit the pillow.
example_cn: 他跑完馬拉松後累壞了，頭一沾枕頭就立刻睡著了。
pattern: S + be out like a light
simple: After drinking the medicine, she was out like a light.
simple_cn: 她喝完藥後，一下子就睡著了。

chinese: 處於孤立無援的境地、冒著風險
example: I went out on a limb to defend your proposal, so please don't let me down.
example_cn: 我冒著風險幫你的提案說話，拜託不要讓我失望。
pattern: S + go out on a limb to + V
simple: She went out on a limb for her best friend.
simple_cn: 她為了最好的朋友挺身而出。

chinese: (口語) 瘋瘋癲癲、心不在焉、不進入狀況
example: You must be out to lunch if you think you can finish a one-year project in two days.
example_cn: 如果你覺得兩天就能完成一個一年的專案，那你一定是腦袋不清楚。
pattern: S + must be out to lunch.
simple: He is totally out to lunch today.
simple_cn: 他今天完全心不在焉。

example: Now that his rival is out of the picture, he is very likely to get the promotion.
example_cn: 既然他的競爭對手已經出局，他很有可能會獲得升遷。
pattern: S + is out of the picture
simple: With him out of the picture, we can finally proceed.
simple_cn: 既然他已經出局，我們終於可以繼續進行了。

example: Because the company refused to cover the travel expenses, he had to pay for the flight out of his own pocket.
example_cn: 因為公司不願意負擔旅費，他只好自己掏腰包付機票錢。
pattern: S + pay out of one's own pocket
simple: Teachers often buy supplies out of their own pockets.
simple_cn: 老師們常常自掏腰包買教學用品。

example: Buying a new car right now is completely out of the question because we are trying to save money.
example_cn: 現在買新車完全不可能，因為我們正在努力存錢。
pattern: N/V-ing is out of the question.
simple: Going out in this storm is out of the question.
simple_cn: 在這種暴風雨裡出門，根本不可能。

phrase: out of sight, out of mind
chinese: 眼不見為淨、久不見就忘記
example: I hid the chocolates in the cupboard, hoping that out of sight, out of mind would help me eat less.
example_cn: 我把巧克力藏在櫥櫃裡，希望眼不見為淨，能讓自己少吃一點。
pattern: Out of sight, out of mind.
simple: Since she moved abroad, it's been out of sight, out of mind.
simple_cn: 自從她搬到國外，就眼不見為淨了。

example: She has been feeling a bit out of sorts lately, so she decided to take a day off to rest.
example_cn: 她最近心情有點不太對勁，所以決定請一天假休息。
simple: He was feeling out of sorts after the long trip.
simple_cn: 長途旅行後，他覺得渾身不對勁。

example: The audio in this video is out of sync with the speaker's lip movements.
example_cn: 這支影片的聲音跟講話者的嘴型對不上。
pattern: A is out of sync with B
simple: My schedule is totally out of sync with yours.
simple_cn: 我的行程跟你的完全對不上。

example: The old politician is completely out of touch with what young people care about today.
example_cn: 那位老政治人物完全不了解現在年輕人在乎什麼。
pattern: S + be out of touch with + N
simple: We've been out of touch for years.
simple_cn: 我們已經失聯好幾年了。

example: The chocolate cake her grandmother baked was simply out of this world.
example_cn: 她奶奶烤的巧克力蛋糕簡直好吃到不行。
pattern: N + is out of this world
simple: The view from the top is out of this world.
simple_cn: 山頂的景色美得不像話。

example: When driving in the mountains, you need to look out for falling rocks.
example_cn: 在山區開車時，要小心留意落石。
simple: We should always look out for each other.
simple_cn: 我們應該隨時互相照應。

example: The weather looked bad in the morning, but it turned out to be a beautiful day.
example_cn: 早上天氣看起來很差，結果後來卻是個大晴天。
pattern: It turned out that + S + V
simple: The rumor turned out to be true.
simple_cn: 那個謠言結果是真的。

example: The scientists will carry out a series of experiments to test their theory.
example_cn: 科學家會進行一系列實驗來驗證他們的理論。
simple: The hospital carried out the new procedure.
simple_cn: 醫院執行了新的程序。

example: I was shocked to find out that my best friend had been lying to me.
example_cn: 我發現最好的朋友一直在騙我，真的超震驚。
simple: We need to find out the truth.
simple_cn: 我們需要找出真相。

example: They set out on their journey before the sun came up.
example_cn: 他們在太陽出來之前就出發上路了。
simple: He set out to change the world.
simple_cn: 他決心要改變世界。

example: A massive fire broke out in the old factory late last night.
example_cn: 昨晚深夜，那間老工廠突然發生大火。
pattern: N + broke out + 地方/時間
simple: World War II broke out in 1939.
simple_cn: 第二次世界大戰在1939年爆發。

example: Don't worry too much; I'm sure things will work out in the end.
example_cn: 別太擔心啦，我相信事情最後一定會好轉的。
simple: He works out at the gym every day.
simple_cn: 他每天去健身房運動。

example: We have run out of gas, so we need to find a gas station immediately.
example_cn: 我們的汽油用完了，得趕快找加油站。
simple: I am running out of patience.
simple_cn: 我快沒耐心了。

example: Her bright red hair makes her really stand out from the crowd.
example_cn: 她那頭亮紅色的頭髮，真的讓她在人群中超顯眼。
simple: His amazing performance stood out.
simple_cn: 他驚人的表現非常突出。

example: The sign on the gate clearly says 'Danger: Keep Out'.
example_cn: 大門上的標示清楚寫著「危險，請勿進入」。
simple: This coat will keep the cold out.
simple_cn: 這件外套可以擋住寒風。

example: Volunteers were handing out free bottles of water to the marathon runners.
example_cn: 志工們正在發送免費瓶裝水給馬拉松跑者。
simple: The teacher handed out the exam papers.
simple_cn: 老師發了考卷。

example: Please remember to take out the trash before you go to bed.
example_cn: 睡覺前記得要把垃圾拿出去倒。
simple: He took out his wallet to pay.
simple_cn: 他拿出錢包來付錢。

example: When you copy the report, make sure you don't leave out any important details.
example_cn: 你影印報告的時候，千萬別漏掉任何重要的細節。
simple: I feel left out when they speak French.
simple_cn: 他們講法語的時候，我覺得被冷落了。

example: My doctor told me that I need to cut out sweet drinks completely.
example_cn: 醫生跟我說，我必須完全戒掉含糖飲料。
simple: She cut out a picture from the magazine.
simple_cn: 她從雜誌上剪下一張圖片。

example: Walking around the city all day has completely worn me out.
example_cn: 在城裡走了一整天，我真的累壞了。
simple: My favorite shoes are worn out.
simple_cn: 我最喜歡的鞋子穿到壞掉了。

example: The train slowly pulled out of the station, heading towards the capital.
example_cn: 火車緩緩駛出車站，朝首都的方向前進。
simple: The dentist pulled out my bad tooth.
simple_cn: 牙醫拔掉了我那顆蛀牙。

example: He fell out with his brother over a disagreement about their family business.
example_cn: 他因為家裡事業的意見不合，跟兄弟鬧翻了。
simple: My hair started to fall out.
simple_cn: 我的頭髮開始掉。

example: We need to pack our bags and check out of the hotel by 11 AM.
example_cn: 我們得在早上11點前打包好行李，並辦理飯店退房。
pattern: S + check out of + 地方
simple: Check out this new song!
simple_cn: 聽聽看這首新歌！

example: The heat in the crowded room was so intense that one of the students passed out.
example_cn: 擁擠的房間裡熱到不行，其中一個學生當場昏倒了。
simple: Please pass out these books to the class.
simple_cn: 請把這些書發給全班同學。

example: Make a wish before you blow out all the candles on your birthday cake.
example_cn: 吹熄生日蛋糕上所有的蠟燭之前，記得先許個願。
simple: The wind blew out the match.
simple_cn: 風吹滅了火柴。

example: Many traditional customs are beginning to die out in modern society.
example_cn: 在現代社會中，許多傳統習俗正逐漸消失。
simple: Dinosaurs died out millions of years ago.
simple_cn: 恐龍在幾百萬年前就滅絕了。

example: The police have ruled out suicide and are now treating the case as murder.
example_cn: 警方已經排除自殺的可能，現在把這起案件當成謀殺案來處理。
simple: You cannot rule out this theory completely.
simple_cn: 你不能完全排除這個理論。

chinese: 公開發表意見、大聲說出
example: More and more people are speaking out against animal cruelty in the fashion industry.
example_cn: 越來越多人公開反對時尚產業對動物的殘忍行為。
simple: We must speak out for our rights.
simple_cn: 我們必須為自己的權益發聲。

example: Watch out for pickpockets when you are traveling in crowded tourist areas.
example_cn: 在擁擠的觀光區旅遊時，要小心扒手。
simple: Watch out! A car is coming.
simple_cn: 小心！車來了。

example: His excuse for being late was utterly ridiculous and nobody believed him.
example_cn: 他遲到的藉口超扯，根本沒人相信。
simple: The price of this ticket is utterly ridiculous.
simple_cn: 這張票的價格實在太扯了。

example: After working a 12-hour shift, I was dead tired and went straight to bed.
example_cn: 上了十二小時的班後，我累到爆，直接倒頭就睡。
simple: She was dead tired after the marathon.
simple_cn: 她跑完馬拉松後累到不行。

example: The little baby was fast asleep in her mother's arms.
example_cn: 小寶寶在媽媽懷裡睡得超熟。
simple: He fell fast asleep as soon as he lay down.
simple_cn: 他一躺下就睡死了。

example: Progress on the construction project has been painfully slow due to a lack of funds.
example_cn: 因為資金不足，這項工程進度慢到讓人崩潰。
simple: The internet connection is painfully slow today.
simple_cn: 今天網路慢到讓人抓狂。

example: She is heavily involved in local charity work and helps out every weekend.
example_cn: 她積極投入當地的慈善工作，每個週末都會去幫忙。
pattern: S + be heavily involved in + N
simple: The company is heavily involved in environmental protection.
simple_cn: 這家公司非常投入環保。

type: 介系詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: The robbery occurred right in the middle of the street in broad daylight.
example_cn: 搶案就發生在大馬路上，而且還是光天化日之下。
simple: His car was stolen in broad daylight.
simple_cn: 他的車在大白天被偷了。

example: I had a brief chat with my professor after the lecture about my thesis.
example_cn: 下課後我跟教授簡單聊了一下我的論文。
pattern: S + have a brief chat with + O
simple: We had a brief chat before the meeting started.
simple_cn: 會議開始前我們簡單聊了一下。

example: Education is a key factor in reducing poverty and improving society.
example_cn: 教育是減少貧窮、改善社會的關鍵因素。
pattern: N + is a key factor in + V-ing
simple: Price is a key factor in their decision.
simple_cn: 價格是他們決策的關鍵因素。

example: This eco-friendly building is a prime example of modern sustainable architecture.
example_cn: 這棟環保建築是現代永續設計的絕佳範例。
pattern: N + is a prime example of + N
simple: His success is a prime example of hard work.
simple_cn: 他的成功是努力工作的最佳典範。

example: Scientists have finally made a major breakthrough in cancer research.
example_cn: 科學家終於在癌症研究上取得重大突破。
pattern: S + make a major breakthrough in + N
simple: The new technology represents a major breakthrough.
simple_cn: 這項新技術代表了一項重大突破。

example: During the karaoke party, she revealed a hidden talent for singing that surprised everyone.
example_cn: 在卡拉OK派對上，她展現了讓大家驚豔的隱藏歌唱實力。
pattern: S + have/reveal a hidden talent for + N/V-ing
simple: He discovered a hidden talent for cooking.
simple_cn: 他發現了自己隱藏的烹飪天賦。

example: The power went out and the entire building was pitch black.
example_cn: 停電了，整棟建築一片漆黑。
simple: The night sky was pitch black.
simple_cn: 夜空一片漆黑。

example: Make sure to wear a heavy coat; it is freezing cold outside today.
example_cn: 記得穿厚外套，今天外面冷到爆。
simple: My hands are freezing cold.
simple_cn: 我的手冷到像冰塊。

example: I can't drink this soup right now because it is boiling hot.
example_cn: 這湯現在燙到不行，我沒辦法喝。
simple: The weather is boiling hot.
simple_cn: 天氣熱到像在烤爐。

example: He forgot his umbrella and came home soaking wet from the rain.
example_cn: 他忘了帶傘，回家時全身被雨淋得濕答答。
simple: My clothes are soaking wet.
simple_cn: 我的衣服濕透了。

example: She just bought a brand new car and can't wait to drive it.
example_cn: 她剛買了一輛全新的車，迫不及待想開上路。
pattern: S + have/buy + a brand new + N
simple: This phone is brand new.
simple_cn: 這支手機是全新的。

chinese: 清澈透明的、十分清楚的
example: The instructions were crystal clear, so nobody made any mistakes.
example_cn: 說明寫得清清楚楚，所以沒有人出錯。
simple: The water here is crystal clear.
simple_cn: 這裡的水清澈見底。

example: The cheetah caught its prey with a lightning fast sprint.
example_cn: 獵豹以閃電般的速度衝刺，抓住了獵物。
pattern: S + V + at a lightning fast speed
simple: His reaction was lightning fast.
simple_cn: 他的反應快如閃電。

example: I bought these shoes at the flea market; they were dirt cheap.
example_cn: 我這雙鞋是在跳蚤市場買的，超便宜。
simple: The rent in this town is dirt cheap.
simple_cn: 這個鎮上的房租便宜到爆。

example: The bread had been left out for a week and was rock hard.
example_cn: 那塊麵包放了一個禮拜，硬得像石頭一樣。
simple: The ground was rock hard.
simple_cn: 地面硬得像石頭一樣。

chinese: 極其鋒利的、(心智)敏銳的
example: You need a razor sharp knife to cut this thick meat.
example_cn: 你需要一把鋒利的刀才能切開這塊厚肉。
simple: He has a razor sharp mind.
simple_cn: 他的頭腦超級敏銳。

example: After months without rain, the riverbed was completely bone dry.
example_cn: 好幾個月沒下雨，河床完全乾透了。
simple: My throat is bone dry.
simple_cn: 我喉嚨乾得像骨頭一樣。

example: I drank an espresso at 9 PM, and now I am still wide awake.
example_cn: 我晚上九點喝了一杯濃縮咖啡，到現在還精神得很。
simple: I was wide awake at 3 AM.
simple_cn: 凌晨三點我完全清醒。

example: I am a tiny bit tired, but I can still finish the work.
example_cn: 我雖然有一點累，但還是可以把工作做完。
pattern: S + be + a tiny bit + adj
simple: It is a tiny bit too salty.
simple_cn: 這稍微鹹了一點點。

example: It is virtually impossible to memorize all these words in one day.
example_cn: 要在一天內背完這些單字，幾乎是不可能的。
pattern: It is virtually impossible to + V
simple: Winning the game now is virtually impossible.
simple_cn: 現在要贏這場比賽幾乎不可能。

example: The two candidates hold diametrically opposed views on the new tax policy.
example_cn: 這兩位候選人對新稅收政策的看法完全相反。
pattern: A and B are diametrically opposed.
simple: Their opinions are diametrically opposed.
simple_cn: 他們的意見完全相反。

example: Taking photos inside the museum is strictly prohibited to protect the artwork.
example_cn: 博物館內嚴禁拍照，以保護藝術品。
simple: Smoking is strictly prohibited here.
simple_cn: 這裡嚴格禁止吸菸。

example: I honestly believe that she did not mean to hurt your feelings.
example_cn: 我真心相信她不是故意要傷你的心。
simple: I honestly believe we can win.
simple_cn: 我真心相信我們會贏。

example: The politician categorically denied all the rumors about his corruption.
example_cn: 那位政治人物斷然否認所有關於他貪腐的傳聞。
simple: He categorically denied the accusations.
simple_cn: 他斬釘截鐵地否認了那些指控。

example: When asked to lie to the customers, he refused point-blank.
example_cn: 當被要求對顧客說謊時，他直接拒絕了。
pattern: S + point-blank refuse to + V / refuse point-blank
simple: She point-blank refused to help.
simple_cn: 她直接拒絕幫忙。

example: His painting style is heavily influenced by traditional Chinese art.
example_cn: 他的繪畫風格深受傳統中國藝術的影響。
pattern: S + be heavily influenced by + N
simple: The decision was heavily influenced by public opinion.
simple_cn: 這個決定受到民意很大的影響。

example: Make sure to dress warmly, or you might catch a cold.
example_cn: 記得穿暖一點，不然可能會感冒。
simple: I caught a terrible cold yesterday.
simple_cn: 我昨天得了重感冒。

example: It is wrong to tell a lie, even if you are trying to protect someone's feelings.
example_cn: 說謊是不對的，就算你是想保護別人的感受也一樣。
pattern: S + tell a lie to + O
simple: He told a lie to his parents.
simple_cn: 他對父母說了謊。

example: After discussing the issue for hours, the team finally came to a conclusion.
example_cn: 討論了好幾個小時後，團隊終於得出了一個結論。
simple: We came to a conclusion quickly.
simple_cn: 我們很快就得出結論。

example: If you're not sure how it works, let me have a look at the manual for you.
example_cn: 如果你不確定怎麼操作，我幫你看一下說明書。
simple: Can I have a look at your drawing?
simple_cn: 我可以看一下你的畫嗎？

example: Running a business requires a lot of hard work and dedication.
example_cn: 經營事業需要付出很多努力和投入。
simple: He runs a successful restaurant business.
simple_cn: 他經營一家很成功的餐廳。

example: She won an award for her outstanding performance in the school play.
example_cn: 她因為在學校話劇中的出色表現而獲獎。
pattern: S + win an award for + N
simple: The movie won several awards.
simple_cn: 這部電影得了好幾個獎。

example: You should never make a promise that you know you cannot keep.
example_cn: 你永遠不該許下一個明知道做不到的承諾。
pattern: S + make a promise to + V
simple: He made a promise to return early.
simple_cn: 他承諾會早點回來。

example: Please try not to make a noise while the baby is sleeping in the next room.
example_cn: 寶寶在隔壁房間睡覺的時候，請盡量不要發出聲音。
simple: The old washing machine makes a loud noise.
simple_cn: 這台舊洗衣機運轉時聲音很大。

example: The kids made a terrible mess in the living room while playing with their toys.
example_cn: 小朋友在客廳玩玩具，弄得亂七八糟。
pattern: S + make a mess in + 地方
simple: Don't make a mess in the kitchen!
simple_cn: 不要在廚房弄得亂七八糟！

example: We need to make a solid plan for our upcoming summer holiday trip.
example_cn: 我們需要為即將到來的暑假旅行擬定一個周詳的計畫。
pattern: S + make a plan to + V
simple: Let's make a plan before we start.
simple_cn: 我們開始之前先擬定一個計畫。

example: The museum usually closes at 5 PM, but they made an exception for our school group.
example_cn: 博物館通常下午五點關門，但他們為我們學校團體破例開放。
pattern: S + make an exception for + O
simple: Can you make an exception this time?
simple_cn: 這次可以破例一下嗎？

example: I usually stay home and do the laundry on Sunday mornings.
example_cn: 我星期天早上通常待在家裡洗衣服。
simple: It's your turn to do the laundry.
simple_cn: 輪到你洗衣服了。

example: Doing daily stretching exercises is very good for your physical health.
example_cn: 每天做伸展運動對你的身體健康非常好。
simple: We have to do grammar exercises today.
simple_cn: 我們今天得做文法練習。

example: You did a really good job on this project; the client is very satisfied.
example_cn: 你這個專案做得非常好，客戶非常滿意。
pattern: S + do a good job + V-ing
simple: She did a good job organizing the event.
simple_cn: 她把活動辦得很好。

example: Strict laws have been passed to protect endangered species from illegal hunting.
example_cn: 已經通過嚴格的法律來保護瀕危物種，防止非法獵捕。
pattern: S + take action to protect endangered species
simple: The giant panda is an endangered species.
simple_cn: 大貓熊是瀕危物種。

example: The government has taken strict preventive measures to stop the virus from spreading.
example_cn: 政府已採取嚴格的防疫措施，阻止病毒擴散。
pattern: S + take preventive measures to + V
simple: We must take preventive measures against fire.
simple_cn: 我們必須採取防火措施。

example: Writing a novel is a highly time-consuming process that requires a lot of patience.
example_cn: 寫小說是一個非常耗時的過程，需要很大的耐心。
simple: Learning a language is a time-consuming process.
simple_cn: 學語言是一個耗時的過程。

example: The historical museum was completely destroyed by a devastating fire last night.
example_cn: 歷史博物館昨晚被一場毀滅性的大火完全燒毀。
pattern: S + be destroyed by a devastating fire
simple: A devastating fire swept through the forest.
simple_cn: 一場毀滅性的大火席捲了森林。

chinese: 精打細算的旅客、有預算考量的旅客
example: Capsule hotels have become a popular choice for budget-conscious travelers in Japan.
example_cn: 膠囊旅館在日本已成為預算有限的旅客的熱門選擇。
pattern: N + is a good choice for budget-conscious travelers
simple: Hostels are suitable for budget-conscious travelers.
simple_cn: 青年旅館很適合精打細算的旅客。

example: Many tech companies believe that self-driving cars will reduce traffic accidents in the future.
example_cn: 許多科技公司認為，自動駕駛汽車未來將減少交通事故。
simple: Self-driving cars are becoming more common.
simple_cn: 自駕車越來越普及了。

example: The public was confused by the conflicting information released by different news channels.
example_cn: 民眾被不同新聞頻道發布的矛盾資訊搞得一頭霧水。
pattern: S + receive conflicting information about + N
simple: There is conflicting information about the new policy.
simple_cn: 關於這項新政策，有互相矛盾的資訊。

example: Buying seasonal produce from local farmers is usually cheaper and healthier.
example_cn: 向當地農民購買當季農產品通常比較便宜也比較健康。
pattern: S + prefer to buy seasonal produce
simple: The supermarket sells fresh seasonal produce.
simple_cn: 這間超市有賣當季的新鮮蔬果。

example: Solving the global climate crisis will require a collective effort from all nations.
example_cn: 解決全球氣候危機需要所有國家共同努力。
pattern: It requires a collective effort to + V
simple: The project's success was a result of collective effort.
simple_cn: 這個專案的成功是大家共同努力的結果。

example: The video game was banned in several countries due to its graphic violence.
example_cn: 這款電玩遊戲因為過於血腥暴力，在好幾個國家被禁。
simple: Parents should protect children from graphic violence.
simple_cn: 家長應該保護孩子，避免他們接觸到血腥暴力的畫面。

example: The flight was delayed for several hours due to heavy rain and strong winds.
example_cn: 航班因為大雨和強風延誤了好幾個小時。
pattern: S + V + due to heavy rain
simple: We stayed indoors due to heavy rain.
simple_cn: 因為下大雨，我們都待在室內。

example: He prefers drinking a cup of strong tea to keep himself awake in the afternoon.
example_cn: 他下午比較喜歡喝一杯濃茶來提神。
simple: She poured herself a cup of strong tea.
simple_cn: 她給自己倒了一杯濃茶。

example: The bank installed a soundless alarm system to alert the police without warning the robbers.
example_cn: 銀行安裝了一套無聲警報系統，可以在不驚動搶匪的情況下通知警方。
pattern: S + install a soundless alarm system
simple: A soundless alarm system is very effective.
simple_cn: 無聲警報系統非常有效。

example: Residents of this apartment complex share common facilities such as a gym and a swimming pool.
example_cn: 這個社區的住戶可以共用健身房和游泳池等公共設施。
simple: The hotel offers excellent common facilities.
simple_cn: 這間飯店的公共設施很棒。

example: We must consider the negative effects of climate change on our agricultural production.
example_cn: 我們必須考慮氣候變遷對農業生產帶來的負面影響。
pattern: S + have negative effects on + N
simple: Smoking has negative effects on health.
simple_cn: 抽煙對健康有負面影響。

example: Drinking low-quality vodka can lead to severe health issues and even alcohol poisoning.
example_cn: 喝品質差的伏特加可能導致嚴重的健康問題，甚至酒精中毒。
simple: He got sick from low-quality vodka.
simple_cn: 他因為喝到劣質伏特加而生病。

example: The government provides monthly subsidies to help low-income citizens cover basic living expenses.
example_cn: 政府每個月提供補助，幫助低收入戶支付基本生活開銷。
pattern: S + provide support for low-income citizens
simple: Low-income citizens need more help.
simple_cn: 低收入戶需要更多幫助。

example: It is often difficult for captive-bred animals to survive when released into the wild.
example_cn: 人工飼養的動物野放後，通常很難存活下來。
pattern: It is hard for captive-bred animals to + V
simple: The zoo protects captive-bred animals.
simple_cn: 動物園保護人工繁殖的動物。

example: She maintained her slender figure through a balanced diet and regular exercise.
example_cn: 她靠著均衡飲食和規律運動，維持苗條的身材。
simple: She is known for her slender figure.
simple_cn: 她以纖細的身材聞名。

example: Developing healthy eating habits early in life can prevent many chronic diseases.
example_cn: 從小養成健康的飲食習慣，可以預防許多慢性疾病。
simple: Healthy eating habits are important for kids.
simple_cn: 健康的飲食習慣對小孩很重要。

example: The construction workers could barely stand the roasting heat of the summer sun.
example_cn: 建築工人幾乎受不了夏天太陽的炙熱高溫。
pattern: S + suffer from the roasting heat
simple: We stayed indoors to avoid the roasting heat.
simple_cn: 我們待在室內避開酷熱。

example: Taiwan's summer is known for its high temperatures and high humidity.
example_cn: 台灣的夏天以高溫和高濕度聞名。
pattern: The weather is characterized by high humidity.
simple: High humidity makes the heat feel worse.
simple_cn: 濕度太高會讓天氣感覺更熱。

example: In many countries, young men are required to do compulsory military service.
example_cn: 在許多國家，年輕男性必須服義務兵役。
pattern: S + serve in the military / do military service
simple: He completed his military service last year.
simple_cn: 他去年服完兵役。

example: The restaurant is highly rated not only for its food but also for its good service.
example_cn: 這家餐廳評價很高，不只因為食物好吃，服務也很到位。
pattern: N + is known for its good service
simple: Customers expect good service.
simple_cn: 顧客期待良好的服務。

example: Having convenient public transport encourages people to leave their cars at home.
example_cn: 大眾運輸方便，會鼓勵大家把車子留在家裡。
pattern: S + rely on convenient public transport
simple: Taipei has very convenient public transport.
simple_cn: 台北的大眾運輸非常方便。

example: The hospital appealed to the public to donate because blood supplies were running critically low.
example_cn: 醫院呼籲民眾捐血，因為血液庫存已經嚴重不足。
simple: We need to replenish our blood supplies.
simple_cn: 我們需要補充血庫存量。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: Water in the reservoir has dropped to a critically low level due to the drought.
example_cn: 由於乾旱，水庫的水位已經降到危險的低點。
pattern: N + drop to a critically low level
simple: The battery is at a critically low level.
simple_cn: 電池電量已經嚴重不足。

example: The app offers an ad-free experience exclusively for its paid consumers.
example_cn: 這款應用程式為付費會員提供無廣告的使用體驗。
pattern: S + provide premium features for paid consumers
simple: Paid consumers get extra benefits.
simple_cn: 付費消費者可以獲得額外福利。

example: Service-based businesses, such as salons and consulting firms, rely heavily on customer satisfaction.
example_cn: 像美髮沙龍和顧問公司這類服務業，非常依賴客戶滿意度。
simple: The economy is shifting to service-based businesses.
simple_cn: 經濟正在轉型為服務業導向。

example: The coffee shop gives a ten percent discount to all its regular customers.
example_cn: 這家咖啡店給所有常客打九折。
pattern: S + build loyalty among regular customers
simple: He is one of our regular customers.
simple_cn: 他是我們的常客之一。

example: All employees must follow the standard procedures strictly to ensure safety.
example_cn: 所有員工都必須嚴格遵守標準作業程序，以確保安全。
simple: It's just standard procedure.
simple_cn: 這只是標準流程。

example: A good judge must try to eliminate personal bias when making a decision.
example_cn: 一位好的法官在判決時，必須盡量排除個人偏見。
pattern: S + shouldn't let personal bias affect + N
simple: We must put aside our personal biases.
simple_cn: 我們必須放下個人偏見。

example: The manager trained the staff on how to politely handle difficult customers.
example_cn: 經理訓練員工如何有禮貌地應對奧客。
simple: Working in retail means dealing with difficult customers.
simple_cn: 做零售業就得應付奧客。

example: Investing in new technology gives the company a strong competitive edge over its rivals.
example_cn: 投資新技術能讓公司在競爭對手中取得強大的競爭優勢。
simple: Innovation is key to keeping a competitive edge.
simple_cn: 創新是保持競爭優勢的關鍵。

chinese: 熟悉的身影 / 經常出現的人事物
example: The stray cats have become familiar presences in our neighborhood.
example_cn: 那些流浪貓已經成為我們社區裡常見的身影。
pattern: N + has become a familiar presence
simple: He is a familiar presence at the local library.
simple_cn: 他經常出現在當地的圖書館。

example: Students in small classes receive more personal attention from their teachers.
example_cn: 小班制的學生能獲得老師更多的個別關注。
simple: This client requires your personal attention.
simple_cn: 這位客戶需要你親自處理。

chinese: 決定命運的一天、命中注定的一天
example: His entire life changed on that fateful day when he met his future wife.
example_cn: 在他遇到未來妻子的那個命運之日，他的人生徹底改變了。
pattern: Ever since that fateful day, S + V
simple: I will never forget that fateful day.
simple_cn: 我永遠不會忘記那個關鍵的日子。

example: Everyone needs some private space to relax and recharge after a long day.
example_cn: 每個人都需要一些私人空間，在忙碌一天後放鬆休息、恢復精力。
simple: Please give me some private space.
simple_cn: 請給我一點私人空間。

example: Sweating is the body's natural mechanism to cool down when it gets too hot.
example_cn: 流汗是身體在過熱時用來降溫的自然機制。
pattern: N + is a natural mechanism for + V-ing
simple: Sleep is a natural healing mechanism.
simple_cn: 睡眠是一種自然的修復機制。

example: Always warm up before exercising to prevent any potential sports injuries.
example_cn: 運動前一定要先熱身，才能預防可能的運動傷害。
simple: He retired early due to a severe sports injury.
simple_cn: 他因為嚴重的運動傷害而提早退休。

example: An accurate diagnosis is the first step toward effective medical treatment.
example_cn: 準確的診斷是有效醫療治療的第一步。
simple: The doctor provided an accurate diagnosis.
simple_cn: 醫生給出了準確的診斷。

chinese: 堅固的扣件 / 固定物
example: You need a strong fastener to hold these two heavy metal plates together.
example_cn: 你需要一個夠牢固的扣件，才能把這兩塊厚重的金屬板固定在一起。
pattern: Use a strong fastener to + V
simple: The backpack features a strong fastener.
simple_cn: 這個背包有一個很牢固的扣環。

example: Her red carpet dress was highly praised by top fashion critics.
example_cn: 她走紅毯的禮服受到頂級時尚評論家的高度讚賞。
simple: Fashion critics loved her new collection.
simple_cn: 時尚評論家很喜歡她的新系列。

example: Pollution in the ocean is severely affecting the local marine industry.
example_cn: 海洋污染正嚴重影響當地的漁業產業。
pattern: N + has an impact on the marine industry
simple: The marine industry is vital to Taiwan.
simple_cn: 海洋產業對台灣來說很重要。

example: The supermarket imports a wide variety of fresh seafood products from Japan.
example_cn: 這間超市從日本進口各式各樣的新鮮海鮮產品。
simple: They sell high-quality seafood products.
simple_cn: 他們賣的是高品質的海鮮產品。

chinese: 環境效率 (降低環境影響的效率)
example: The factory adopted green energy to improve its environmental efficiency.
example_cn: 這間工廠採用綠色能源來提升環保效能。
simple: Electric cars boast higher environmental efficiency.
simple_cn: 電動車的環保效率更高。

example: Drinking a bowl of protein-rich soup after a workout helps repair your muscles.
example_cn: 運動後喝一碗富含蛋白質的湯，有助於修復肌肉。
simple: Chicken broth is a protein-rich soup.
simple_cn: 雞湯是一種富含蛋白質的湯品。

example: Improving resource efficiency is the key to sustainable development.
example_cn: 提升資源效率是永續發展的關鍵。
simple: The new machine promotes resource efficiency.
simple_cn: 這台新機器能提升資源使用效率。

example: Businesses must learn to adapt quickly to survive in this ever-changing environment.
example_cn: 企業必須學會快速適應，才能在這個不斷變化的環境中生存。
pattern: S + adapt to an ever-changing environment
simple: Technology evolves in an ever-changing environment.
simple_cn: 科技在不斷變化的環境中演進。

example: I accidentally stepped on some sticky gum on the sidewalk and ruined my shoe.
example_cn: 我不小心踩到人行道上黏黏的口香糖，鞋子就毀了。
simple: It is hard to remove sticky gum from hair.
simple_cn: 黏黏的口香糖很難從頭髮上弄掉。

example: Eating too much greasy food can cause stomachaches and weight gain.
example_cn: 吃太多油膩的食物會導致胃痛和體重增加。
simple: Fried chicken is a typical greasy food.
simple_cn: 炸雞是一種典型的油膩食物。

example: The puppy's clumsy movements made everyone in the room burst into laughter.
example_cn: 那隻小狗笨拙的動作讓在場所有人都笑翻了。
pattern: N + is known for its clumsy movements.
simple: He knocked over the vase with a clumsy movement.
simple_cn: 他笨手笨腳地打翻了花瓶。

example: Nature frequently demonstrates its mighty power through devastating storms and earthquakes.
example_cn: 大自然經常透過毀滅性的風暴和地震，展現它強大的力量。
simple: The king ruled with mighty power.
simple_cn: 國王以強大的權力統治國家。

example: The ballet dancer struck an elegant pose at the end of her performance.
example_cn: 芭蕾舞者在表演結束時擺出一個優雅的姿勢。
simple: The model held an elegant pose for the camera.
simple_cn: 模特兒對著鏡頭擺出優雅的姿勢。

example: She did some research online to trace her family tree back to the 18th century.
example_cn: 她上網做了些研究，把自己的家族譜系追溯到18世紀。
simple: We drew a family tree for our history project.
simple_cn: 我們為了歷史作業畫了一張家族樹。

chinese: 空蕩蕩的架子 (無標示的層架)
example: During the panic buying, shoppers were left staring at blank shelves in the supermarket.
example_cn: 在恐慌搶購期間， shoppers 只能眼睜睜看著超市貨架空空如也。
pattern: S + stare at the blank shelves
simple: The store was closed, leaving only blank shelves.
simple_cn: 商店關門了，只剩下空蕩蕩的貨架。

chinese: 空蕩蕩的貨架 (被搶購一空)
example: Before the typhoon arrived, people rushed to the store, leaving only bare shelves.
example_cn: 颱風來臨前，大家衝進商店搶購，貨架上只剩一片空蕩蕩。
simple: We found bare shelves in the bread aisle.
simple_cn: 我們在麵包區看到空空的貨架。

example: The bird built its nest in the hollow space inside the old oak tree.
example_cn: 那隻鳥在老橡樹的樹洞裡築了巢。
pattern: S + hide in the hollow space
simple: There is a hollow space behind the wall.
simple_cn: 牆壁後面有一個中空的空間。

example: I had a queer feeling that someone was watching me from the dark alley.
example_cn: 我有種奇怪的感覺，好像有人在暗巷裡盯著我。
pattern: S + have a queer feeling that...
simple: She couldn't shake off that queer feeling.
simple_cn: 她甩不掉那種怪異的感覺。

example: Do not believe ads that claim to sell miracle tablets for weight loss without diet or exercise.
example_cn: 別相信那些號稱不用節食或運動就能減肥的奇蹟藥丸廣告。
simple: There is no such thing as miracle tablets.
simple_cn: 根本沒有什麼神奇藥丸這種東西。

example: The country's economy suffered greatly because corrupt officials stole millions of dollars.
example_cn: 這個國家的經濟因為貪官汙走數百萬美元而遭受重創。
pattern: S + arrest/crack down on corrupt officials
simple: The new president promised to punish corrupt officials.
simple_cn: 新總統承諾要懲處貪官污吏。

chinese: 受到誤導的政策、錯誤的方針
example: The economic crisis was worsened by the government's misguided policies.
example_cn: 政府錯誤的政策讓經濟危機更加惡化。
simple: The strike was a reaction to misguided policies.
simple_cn: 這場罷工是對錯誤政策的反彈。

example: The developing nation struggles to pay off its massive foreign debts every year.
example_cn: 這個開發中國家每年都在努力償還巨額外債。
pattern: S + pay off / reduce foreign debts
simple: High foreign debts can ruin an economy.
simple_cn: 高額外債會拖垮一個國家的經濟。

example: In a democratic society, it is crucial to have unbiased media to report the truth.
example_cn: 在民主社會中，擁有公正不偏的媒體來報導真相至關重要。
pattern: S + rely on unbiased media for news
simple: It is hard to find completely unbiased media today.
simple_cn: 現在很難找到完全客觀中立的新聞媒體。

example: People with different political ideologies often find it difficult to agree on public policies.
example_cn: 不同政治意識形態的人往往很難在公共政策上達成共識。
simple: His actions are driven by his political ideology.
simple_cn: 他的行為是受到政治意識形態驅使。

example: There are multiple explanations for why the dinosaur population suddenly disappeared.
example_cn: 關於恐龍為何突然消失，有多種不同的解釋。
pattern: There are multiple explanations for + N
simple: The scientist offered multiple explanations.
simple_cn: 那位科學家提出了好幾種解釋。

example: After an intense struggle, the climber finally reached the top of the mountain.
example_cn: 經過一番激烈奮鬥，登山者終於抵達山頂。
pattern: S + win after an intense struggle
simple: The animal put up an intense struggle to escape.
simple_cn: 那隻動物為了逃跑拼命掙扎。

example: The doctor advised him to exercise more to improve his overall physical condition.
example_cn: 醫生建議他多運動，以改善整體身體狀況。
pattern: S + be in good/poor physical condition
simple: Athletes must maintain peak physical condition.
simple_cn: 運動員必須維持巔峰的身體狀態。

example: Scientists are using powerful telescopes to search for signs of life in outer space.
example_cn: 科學家正在用強大的望遠鏡搜尋外太空的生命跡象。
simple: Astronauts travel to outer space.
simple_cn: 太空人會前往外太空。

example: Instead of sugary drinks, you should drink more plain water to stay hydrated.
example_cn: 你應該多喝白開水來補充水分，而不是喝含糖飲料。
pattern: S + prefer plain water to + N
simple: I usually just drink plain water with my meal.
simple_cn: 我吃飯時通常只喝白開水。

chinese: 體力活躍的人、熱愛運動的人
type: 副詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: As a physically active person, he enjoys running and swimming every day.
example_cn: 他是個好動的人，每天都喜歡跑步和游泳。
pattern: S + is a physically active person.
simple: She has always been a physically active person.
simple_cn: 她一直都是個很愛運動的人。

example: He loves nature, so he prefers an outdoor job like farming or landscaping.
example_cn: 他熱愛大自然，所以偏好像務農或園藝這類戶外工作。
pattern: S + apply for an outdoor job
simple: Construction work is a tough outdoor job.
simple_cn: 建築工作是一份辛苦的戶外工作。

example: This traditional candy brings back the childhood flavors that I miss so much.
example_cn: 這種傳統糖果喚起了我深深懷念的童年滋味。
pattern: N + reminds me of childhood flavors.
simple: Grandma's cooking is full of childhood flavors.
simple_cn: 奶奶做的菜充滿了童年的味道。

example: The indigenous tribe performs ritual dances to pray for a good harvest.
example_cn: 這個原住民部落會透過儀式舞蹈來祈求豐收。
simple: Ritual dances are an important part of their culture.
simple_cn: 儀式舞蹈是他們文化中很重要的一環。

example: The early explorers eventually became the permanent settlers of the new continent.
example_cn: 那些早期的探險家最後成了這片新大陸的永久居民。
simple: The island has no permanent settlers.
simple_cn: 這座島上沒有永久居民。

example: The old town's amazing charm attracts thousands of tourists every year.
example_cn: 這座古城的迷人魅力每年都吸引成千上萬的觀光客。
simple: Her voice has an amazing charm.
simple_cn: 她的聲音有種迷人的魅力。

example: Many environmentalists choose plant-based meat to reduce their carbon footprint.
example_cn: 許多環保人士選擇植物肉來減少碳足跡。
simple: Plant-based meat is becoming very popular in restaurants.
simple_cn: 植物肉在餐廳裡越來越受歡迎。

example: It's your turn to do the dishes tonight after dinner.
example_cn: 今晚吃完飯輪到你洗碗。
simple: He hates doing the dishes.
simple_cn: 他超討厭洗碗。

example: Many villagers have to walk for miles every day to collect water.
example_cn: 許多村民每天得走好幾英里的路去取水。
pattern: S + collect water from + 地方
simple: They collect water from the river.
simple_cn: 他們從河裡取水。

example: The teacher asked the students to revise their essays before the final submission.
example_cn: 老師要求學生在最後繳交前修改他們的作文。
simple: I need to revise my essay tonight.
simple_cn: 我今晚需要修改我的論文。

example: The brave dog helped its owner escape from the burning building.
example_cn: 那隻勇敢的狗幫助主人逃出失火的大樓。
simple: He helped the prisoners escape.
simple_cn: 他幫助那些囚犯逃走了。

chinese: 資助專案、為計畫提供資金
example: The government decided to finance projects related to renewable energy.
example_cn: 政府決定資助與再生能源相關的計畫。
simple: The bank finances various local projects.
simple_cn: 這家銀行資助了各種地方計畫。

example: The mayor graced the opening ceremony with his presence.
example_cn: 市長親臨開幕典禮，讓活動增色不少。
simple: The queen graced the ceremony.
simple_cn: 女王親臨了這場典禮。

example: The principal was invited to address the graduation ceremony.
example_cn: 校長受邀在畢業典禮上致詞。
simple: He addressed the award ceremony.
simple_cn: 他在頒獎典禮上致詞。

example: Steve Jobs created many innovations that completely changed the tech industry.
example_cn: 賈伯斯創造了許多徹底改變科技產業的創新。
simple: The team created a brilliant innovation.
simple_cn: 這個團隊創造了一項很棒的創新。

example: Reading widely can help you enrich your conversation with others.
example_cn: 廣泛閱讀能幫助你豐富與他人的對話內容。
simple: Travel experiences enrich our conversations.
simple_cn: 旅行經驗能豐富我們的話題。

example: Patients may experience some discomfort after the dental surgery.
example_cn: 病患在牙科手術後可能會感到一些不適。
simple: Stop running if you experience discomfort.
simple_cn: 如果感到不舒服就別再跑了。

example: To avoid discomfort during the long flight, you should wear loose clothing.
example_cn: 為了避免長途飛行時的不適，你應該穿寬鬆的衣服。
pattern: S + do something to avoid discomfort
simple: Adjust your chair to avoid discomfort.
simple_cn: 調整你的椅子以免坐起來不舒服。

example: We need to reserve seats in advance for the popular Broadway musical.
example_cn: 我們得提前預訂座位，才能看到那齣熱門的百老匯音樂劇。
simple: Can you reserve two seats for us?
simple_cn: 可以幫我們保留兩個位子嗎？

example: The old church bell rings to mark the hours of the day.
example_cn: 這座古老教堂的鐘聲會報時。
simple: The clock marks the hours.
simple_cn: 時鐘會報時。

type: 名詞/動詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: In many Islamic countries, the call to prayer is broadcast five times a day.
example_cn: 在許多伊斯蘭國家，每天會廣播五次喚拜聲。
pattern: S + hear the call to prayer
simple: The call to prayer echoes through the city.
simple_cn: 祈禱的呼喚聲在整個城市迴盪。

chinese: 發出狀況信號、標示情況
example: Animals use various sounds to signal dangerous situations to their group members.
example_cn: 動物會用各種聲音來向同伴示警危險情況。
simple: The lights signal different traffic situations.
simple_cn: 這些燈號代表不同的交通狀況。

example: The school principal used the loudspeaker to announce upcoming sports events.
example_cn: 校長用擴音器宣布即將到來的體育賽事。
simple: The board is used to announce events.
simple_cn: 這塊布告欄是用來公布活動訊息的。

example: You should make a reservation at the restaurant to ensure you get a table.
example_cn: 你應該先跟餐廳訂位，這樣才確保有位置。
simple: I would like to make a reservation for two.
simple_cn: 我想要預約兩位。
