example: Drivers must adjust their speed according to the weather and road conditions.
example_cn: 駕駛人要根據天氣跟路況來調整車速。
simple: Please adjust your speed on the curve.
simple_cn: 過彎時請調整你的速度。

example: It is important to maintain a safe distance from wild animals in the national park.
example_cn: 在國家公園裡，跟野生動物保持安全距離很重要。
simple: Maintain distance between the cars.
simple_cn: 保持車與車之間的距離。

example: Researchers are still trying to untangle the actual health benefits of this new diet.
example_cn: 研究人員還在努力釐清這種新飲食法對健康的實際好處。
pattern: S + try to untangle the benefits of + N
simple: It's hard to untangle the benefits from the risks.
simple_cn: 很難釐清好處跟風險。

example: The company changed its packaging to reduce its negative impact on the environment.
example_cn: 那間公司改變了包裝，以減少對環境的負面影響。
pattern: S + reduce the impact on + N
simple: Electric cars reduce the impact of pollution.
simple_cn: 電動車能減少污染帶來的影響。

example: Crying is a natural and healthy way to release pent-up emotions.
example_cn: 哭是一種自然又健康的方式，可以釋放壓抑的情緒。
pattern: S + find a way to release emotions
simple: Writing a journal helps release emotions.
simple_cn: 寫日記有助於抒發情緒。

chinese: 引發創傷、觸發心理創傷
example: Loud noises can sometimes trigger past trauma for war veterans.
example_cn: 大聲的噪音有時會觸發退伍軍人過去的創傷。
simple: Certain smells can trigger his trauma.
simple_cn: 某些氣味會觸發他的創傷。

example: Working night shifts can severely disturb your natural sleep patterns.
example_cn: 上夜班會嚴重打亂你自然的睡眠規律。
simple: Climate change disturbs weather patterns.
simple_cn: 氣候變遷擾亂了天氣型態。

example: The tech giant successfully established a monopoly in the search engine market.
example_cn: 這家科技巨頭成功壟斷了搜尋引擎市場。
pattern: S + establish a monopoly in + N
simple: They aim to establish a monopoly.
simple_cn: 他們目標是要建立壟斷地位。

example: The king raised taxes on merchants to fill the royal treasury for the upcoming war.
example_cn: 國王為了填滿國庫以應付即將到來的戰爭，提高了對商人的稅收。
simple: The new tax law filled the state treasury.
simple_cn: 新稅法讓國庫進帳滿滿。

example: The government handed out shopping vouchers to encourage domestic consumption.
example_cn: 政府發放購物券，鼓勵國內消費。
pattern: S + take measures to encourage consumption
simple: Lower interest rates encourage consumption.
simple_cn: 降低利率能刺激消費。

example: It takes self-discipline to maintain healthy eating habits throughout your life.
example_cn: 要維持一輩子的健康飲食習慣，需要靠自律。
pattern: S + try to maintain good habits
simple: She maintains strict study habits.
simple_cn: 她維持嚴格的讀書習慣。

example: Classical literature has stood the test of time and is still read by many today.
example_cn: 經典文學經得起時間考驗，至今仍有許多人閱讀。
pattern: N + stands the test of time
simple: True friendship stands the test of time.
simple_cn: 真正的友情經得起時間考驗。

example: Although the team did all the hard work, the manager took all the credit for the success.
example_cn: 雖然團隊付出了所有努力，但經理卻把成功的功勞全攬在自己身上。
pattern: S + take the credit for + N
simple: Don't let him take the credit for your work.
simple_cn: 別讓他搶走你工作的功勞。

example: In business, it is essential to choose reliable partners to avoid future conflicts.
example_cn: 做生意時，選擇可靠的夥伴很重要，這樣才能避免日後的糾紛。
simple: They chose their partners wisely.
simple_cn: 他們明智地選擇了伴侶。

example: Getting plenty of rest and eating nutritious food can speed healing after surgery.
example_cn: 手術後多休息、吃營養的食物，可以加速復原。
simple: The ointment is designed to speed healing.
simple_cn: 這款藥膏是設計來加速傷口癒合的。

example: The doctor took an X-ray to rule out any serious injury to the athlete's spine.
example_cn: 醫生照了X光，以排除運動員脊椎有嚴重受傷的可能。
pattern: S + rule out (the possibility of) N
simple: We cannot rule out a knee injury.
simple_cn: 我們不能排除膝蓋受傷的可能性。

example: After undergoing several tests, he finally got a clear diagnosis from the specialist.
example_cn: 在做了好幾項檢查之後，他終於從專科醫師那裡得到明確的診斷。
pattern: S + get a diagnosis from + N
simple: She went to the hospital to get a diagnosis.
simple_cn: 她去醫院做檢查以獲得診斷。

example: By examining the burrs stuck to his dog's fur, the inventor got the idea for Velcro.
example_cn: 發明家觀察到狗毛上黏著的鬼針草，因而有了魔鬼氈的靈感。
simple: The scientist examined the burrs under a microscope.
simple_cn: 科學家用顯微鏡觀察那些芒刺。

example: After years of research, the team finally received a patent for their groundbreaking technology.
example_cn: 經過多年研究，團隊終於為他們這項突破性技術取得了專利。
pattern: S + receive a patent for + N
simple: Edison received a patent for the light bulb.
simple_cn: 愛迪生獲得了燈泡的專利。

example: The local economy received a massive boost from the boom in international tourism.
example_cn: 國際觀光熱潮為當地經濟帶來了巨大的提振。
pattern: N + received a boost from + N
simple: Her confidence received a boost after the praise.
simple_cn: 她受到稱讚之後，自信心大增。

example: The science fiction novel fired the imagination of a whole generation of young readers.
example_cn: 那本科幻小說點燃了整整一代年輕讀者的想像力。
simple: The discovery of space fired the imagination of humanity.
simple_cn: 太空的發現激發了人類的想像力。

chinese: 獲取食物、確保食物來源
example: Many wild animals have to travel long distances during winter just to secure food.
example_cn: 許多野生動物在冬天必須長途跋涉才能找到食物。
simple: Early humans hunted to secure food.
simple_cn: 早期人類靠狩獵來確保食物來源。

example: Some insects use camouflage to blend into their surroundings and avoid predators.
example_cn: 有些昆蟲會利用保護色融入環境來躲避天敵。
simple: Fish swim in schools to avoid predators.
simple_cn: 魚類成群結隊游泳，以躲避掠食者。

example: After the hurricane, engineers worked day and night to reestablish the communication network.
example_cn: 颶風過後，工程師們日以繼夜地搶修通訊網路。
pattern: S + take steps to reestablish the network
simple: They need to reestablish the trade network.
simple_cn: 他們需要重新建立貿易網絡。

chinese: 擺出姿勢、採取某種姿態
example: The yoga instructor asked everyone to adopt a relaxing pose and breathe deeply.
example_cn: 瑜伽老師請大家擺出一個放鬆的姿勢，並深呼吸。
simple: He adopted a defensive pose.
simple_cn: 他擺出了防衛的姿勢。

example: For her history project, she had to draw a family tree tracing back four generations.
example_cn: 為了她的歷史作業，她必須畫出一張追溯四代的家族樹。
simple: We drew a family tree in class today.
simple_cn: 我們今天在課堂上畫了家族樹。

example: Thanks to DNA testing, people can now easily trace their ancestors' origins.
example_cn: 多虧了DNA檢測，現在人們可以輕鬆追溯祖先的來源。
simple: He wanted to trace his ancestors back to Ireland.
simple_cn: 他想追溯自己的祖先到愛爾蘭。

example: The police searched the entire house but failed to find any hard evidence of the crime.
example_cn: 警方搜查了整棟房子，但沒有找到任何犯罪的確鑿證據。
simple: Scientists found evidence of water on Mars.
simple_cn: 科學家在火星上發現了水的證據。

example: The company hired a PR expert to counter the false claims made by its competitors.
example_cn: 公司聘請了一位公關專家來反擊競爭對手的不實指控。
simple: He provided data to counter their claims.
simple_cn: 他提供數據來反駁他們的說法。

example: Medical researchers have been working tirelessly for decades to find a way to cure cancer.
example_cn: 醫學研究人員數十年來不懈努力，尋找治癒癌症的方法。
pattern: S + discover a drug to cure cancer
simple: Is it possible to cure cancer completely?
simple_cn: 癌症有可能完全治癒嗎？

example: A prolonged nationwide strike could severely cripple the country's economy.
example_cn: 長期的全國性罷工可能會嚴重癱瘓國家的經濟。
pattern: N + can easily cripple the economy
simple: The pandemic crippled the global economy.
simple_cn: 這場疫情重創了全球經濟。

chinese: 在森林中導航 / 穿梭
example: Bats use echolocation to safely navigate dense forests in complete darkness.
example_cn: 蝙蝠利用回聲定位在完全黑暗的茂密森林中安全飛行。
pattern: S + use N to navigate forests
simple: Early explorers navigated the forests by stars.
simple_cn: 早期探險家靠星星在森林中導航。

example: If you want a promotion, you should take the initiative to lead new projects.
example_cn: 如果你想升遷，就應該主動帶頭主導新的專案。
pattern: S + take the initiative to + V
simple: She took the initiative and introduced herself.
simple_cn: 她主動出擊，自我介紹。

chinese: 建立計畫 / 設立專案
example: The school set up a mentorship program to help freshmen adjust to campus life.
example_cn: 學校設立了導師制度，幫助新生適應校園生活。
pattern: S + set up a program for + N
simple: They set up a program to protect the ocean.
simple_cn: 他們設立了一個保護海洋的計畫。

example: Fair trade organizations aim to reward growers with reasonable prices for their crops.
example_cn: 公平貿易組織旨在以合理價格回報農民的作物。
simple: The government rewarded local growers.
simple_cn: 政府獎勵了當地的農民。

example: A great leader knows how to motivate people to work toward a shared vision.
example_cn: 優秀的領導者懂得如何激勵大家朝著共同的願景努力。
simple: His speech motivated people to take action.
simple_cn: 他的演講激勵人們採取行動。

example: Eating raw or undercooked meat can pose a serious risk of food poisoning.
example_cn: 吃生肉或未煮熟的肉類可能會有食物中毒的嚴重風險。
pattern: N + poses a risk to + N
simple: The chemicals pose a risk to the environment.
simple_cn: 這些化學物質對環境構成風險。

example: Centuries ago, explorers made long sea voyages to discover new trade routes.
example_cn: 幾個世紀前，探險家們進行長途航海，尋找新的貿易路線。
pattern: S + make sea voyages to + V
simple: They made sea voyages across the Pacific.
simple_cn: 他們進行了橫跨太平洋的航海旅程。

example: The charity made an urgent appeal for donations to help the earthquake victims.
example_cn: 慈善機構緊急呼籲捐款，幫助地震災民。
pattern: S + make an appeal to the public
simple: The president made an appeal for peace.
simple_cn: 總統呼籲大家追求和平。

example: You must be at least 17 years old and in good health to donate blood.
example_cn: 要捐血的話，你必須年滿17歲而且身體健康。
pattern: S + encourage people to donate blood
simple: Donating blood is a noble act.
simple_cn: 捐血是一件很了不起的事。

chinese: 評估企業 / 商業價值
example: Investors carefully evaluate a business's financial health before buying its stocks.
example_cn: 投資人在買股票前，會仔細評估一家公司的財務狀況。
pattern: S + evaluate a business based on + N
simple: It is hard to evaluate a new business.
simple_cn: 要評估一家新公司並不容易。

example: The survey helps schools identify areas where students need more academic support.
example_cn: 這份調查能幫助學校找出學生需要更多學業支援的地方。
simple: We need to identify areas of weakness.
simple_cn: 我們需要找出弱點在哪裡。

example: The factory updated its machines to significantly enhance the quality of its products.
example_cn: 工廠更新了機器，大幅提升了產品的品質。
pattern: S + V + to enhance the quality of + N
simple: Good lighting can enhance the quality of a photo.
simple_cn: 好的光線可以提升照片的品質。

example: He was so tired that he barely managed to roll out of bed this morning.
example_cn: 他今天早上累到幾乎爬不起床。
pattern: S + roll out of bed and + V
simple: I rolled out of bed when the alarm rang.
simple_cn: 鬧鐘一響我就從床上爬起來。

example: I accidentally fell asleep again after turning off my alarm clock.
example_cn: 我按掉鬧鐘後，不小心又睡著了。
pattern: S + turn off the alarm and + V
simple: He turned off the alarm without opening his eyes.
simple_cn: 他連眼睛都沒睜開就把鬧鐘關掉了。

example: The angry mob wielding rods and stones broke into the government building.
example_cn: 一群拿著棍棒和石頭的憤怒民眾闖進了政府大樓。
simple: The guards were wielding iron rods.
simple_cn: 警衛當時手上拿著鐵棍。

example: Despite modernization, the tribe continues the practice of worshipping their ancestors.
example_cn: 儘管現代化了，這個部落仍然保持著祭拜祖先的習俗。
pattern: S + continue the practice of + V-ing
simple: Many families continue this tradition.
simple_cn: 很多家庭都繼續維持這個傳統。

chinese: 諮詢專家 / 專科醫師
example: If your back pain persists for over a week, you should consult a specialist.
example_cn: 如果你的背痛持續超過一個禮拜，就應該去看專科醫生。
pattern: S + consult a specialist about + N
simple: He consulted a financial specialist.
simple_cn: 他諮詢了一位財務專家。

example: To stay in shape, you need to eat a balanced diet and keep exercising regularly.
example_cn: 要保持身材，你需要均衡飲食並持續規律運動。
pattern: It is hard to keep exercising in winter.
simple: She promised to keep exercising.
simple_cn: 她答應會繼續運動。

example: If the lock is stuck, a little bit of oil should do the trick and open it.
example_cn: 如果鎖卡住了，加一點油應該就能搞定，順利打開它。
simple: A cup of hot tea will do the trick.
simple_cn: 來杯熱茶就搞定了。

example: Firefighters risk their lives every day to save people from dangerous situations.
example_cn: 消防員每天冒著生命危險，從危險情況中救人。
pattern: S + risk one's life to + V
simple: He risked his life to save the child.
simple_cn: 他冒著生命危險去救那個小孩。

example: The neighbor's dogs bark loudly whenever a stranger approaches the house.
example_cn: 鄰居的狗只要一有陌生人靠近房子，就會大聲吠叫。
simple: The dogs bark at the mailman every morning.
simple_cn: 那些狗每天早上都會對郵差叫。

example: When the first snow falls, the entire city looks like a beautiful winter wonderland.
example_cn: 當第一場雪落下時，整座城市就像一個美麗的冬季仙境。
pattern: Snow falls heavily in + 地方
simple: Snow falls gently from the sky.
simple_cn: 雪花輕輕地從天空飄落。

example: Due to the sudden shortage of oil, gas prices soared overnight.
example_cn: 因為石油突然短缺，油價一夜之間飆漲。
simple: Housing prices continue to soar.
simple_cn: 房價持續飆漲。

example: As years pass, memories of childhood often fade away gradually.
example_cn: 隨著歲月流逝，童年的記憶往往會逐漸淡去。
simple: Years pass quickly when you are busy.
simple_cn: 忙起來的時候，時間過得很快。

example: Over time, his memories of the terrible accident began to blur.
example_cn: 隨著時間過去，他對那場可怕意外的記憶開始變得模糊。
simple: The details of that day began to blur.
simple_cn: 那天發生的事，細節開始變得模糊。

example: Due to the severe economic crisis, several major construction projects were halted.
example_cn: 由於嚴重的經濟危機，好幾項重大建設工程都被暫停了。
pattern: Projects are halted because of + N
simple: All research projects were halted.
simple_cn: 所有的研究計畫都被暫停了。

example: When the heavy rain pours, the streets downtown quickly flood.
example_cn: 下大雨的時候，市區的街道很快就會淹水。
simple: The rain poured all night long.
simple_cn: 雨下了一整夜。

example: Great ideas often emerge when people relax and brainstorm together.
example_cn: 當大家放鬆心情一起腦力激盪時，常常會冒出很棒的想法。
simple: Several interesting ideas emerged during the meeting.
simple_cn: 會議中出現了好幾個有趣的點子。

example: The researchers confirmed that the two radio signals matched perfectly.
example_cn: 研究人員確認那兩個無線電訊號完全吻合。
simple: The physical signals match the symptoms.
simple_cn: 身體的訊號跟症狀吻合。

example: As the festival began, the sound of joyous music filled the air.
example_cn: 節慶一開始，歡樂的音樂聲就瀰漫在空氣中。
pattern: The sound of N + fills the air.
simple: The sound of laughter filled the air.
simple_cn: 空氣中充滿了笑聲。

example: The massive fire damaged several historic buildings in the downtown area.
example_cn: 那場大火燒毀了市區好幾棟歷史建築。
simple: The wildfire damaged the ecosystem.
simple_cn: 這場野火破壞了生態系統。

example: After the storm passed, we watched the sun emerge from behind the dark clouds.
example_cn: 暴風雨過後，我們看著太陽從烏雲後方露出來。
simple: The sun slowly emerged in the morning.
simple_cn: 太陽在早晨慢慢升起。

example: A beautiful piece of artwork was created by the local artist using recycled materials.
example_cn: 當地藝術家用回收材料創作出了一件美麗的藝術品。
simple: Many stunning artworks were created here.
simple_cn: 這裡創作了許多令人驚豔的藝術品。

example: During the long siege, the city's food supplies fell to a dangerously low level.
example_cn: 在長期圍城期間，城裡的食物補給降到危險的低點。
simple: Medical supplies have fallen recently.
simple_cn: 醫療物資最近降價了。

example: The ancient practice continued for centuries despite modern technological changes.
example_cn: 儘管現代科技不斷改變，這項古老習俗仍持續了數百年。
pattern: The practice continues to this day.
simple: This religious practice continued in the village.
simple_cn: 這個宗教習俗在村莊裡延續了下來。

example: The shocking news spread rapidly across the entire village within an hour.
example_cn: 這個驚人的消息在一小時內迅速傳遍整個村莊。
simple: The good news spread through the school.
simple_cn: 好消息在學校裡傳開了。

example: After taking the prescribed medicine, the sharp pain gradually went away.
example_cn: 服用處方藥後，劇烈的疼痛漸漸消失了。
pattern: The pain will go away soon.
simple: I hope my headache goes away.
simple_cn: 我希望我的頭痛會好起來。

example: A final consensus was reached after hours of intense negotiation between the two parties.
example_cn: 雙方經過好幾個小時的激烈談判，終於達成最終共識。
pattern: A consensus is reached on + N
simple: No consensus was reached today.
simple_cn: 今天沒有達成共識。

example: During the hike, annoying burrs stuck to the dog's fur and my pants.
example_cn: 健行時，討人厭的鬼針草黏在狗狗的毛和我的褲子上。
simple: The mud stuck to his boots.
simple_cn: 泥巴黏在他的靴子上。

example: A revolutionary invention emerged from their small garage laboratory.
example_cn: 一項革命性的發明從他們的小車庫實驗室裡誕生。
pattern: A new invention emerged in + 年代/地點
simple: The invention emerged out of necessity.
simple_cn: 這項發明是因為需求而產生的。

example: These beautiful hiking trails connect the two remote mountain villages.
example_cn: 這些美麗的登山步道連接了兩個偏遠的山村。
pattern: The trails connect A and B.
simple: The two trails connect at the peak.
simple_cn: 這兩條步道在山頂交會。

example: The sudden loud gunshot made the entire flock flee in panic.
example_cn: 突然一聲巨大的槍響，讓整群鳥驚慌飛逃。
simple: The flock fled when the wolf appeared.
simple_cn: 狼一出現，羊群就逃走了。

example: You need to bring your ID card to open a new bank account.
example_cn: 要開新的銀行帳戶，你得帶身分證。
simple: He transferred money to my bank account.
simple_cn: 他把錢轉到我的銀行帳戶。

example: Information technology has completely transformed the way we work and communicate.
example_cn: 資訊科技徹底改變了我們工作和溝通的方式。
pattern: N + is related to information technology
simple: He works in the information technology sector.
simple_cn: 他在資訊科技產業工作。

example: The whole family gathered around the kitchen table to discuss their vacation plans.
example_cn: 全家人圍坐在廚房餐桌旁，討論他們的度假計畫。
pattern: S + sit at the kitchen table
simple: She left the keys on the kitchen table.
simple_cn: 她把鑰匙留在廚房桌上。

example: Every Sunday morning, she goes to the local farmers' market to buy fresh vegetables.
example_cn: 每個星期天早上，她都會去當地的農夫市集買新鮮蔬菜。
pattern: S + buy N at the farmers' market
simple: The farmers' market sells organic food.
simple_cn: 農夫市集賣有機食品。

example: In some cultures, lively table conversations are considered an important part of the dining experience.
example_cn: 在某些文化中，餐桌上熱絡的聊天被視為用餐體驗的重要一環。
simple: They enjoyed pleasant table conversations.
simple_cn: 他們享受愉快的餐桌聊天時光。

example: To make cleaning up easier after the party, they used disposable paper tablecloths.
example_cn: 為了讓派對後更好清理，他們用了免洗的紙桌巾。
pattern: S + cover the table with paper tablecloths
simple: The restaurant uses paper tablecloths.
simple_cn: 這家餐廳用紙桌巾。

example: Playing violent video games for too long may affect a child's behavior.
example_cn: 玩暴力電玩太久，可能會影響小孩的行為。
pattern: S + spend time playing video games
simple: He is addicted to video games.
simple_cn: 他打電動打到上癮了。

example: The roller coaster is the most popular attraction in this amusement park.
example_cn: 雲霄飛車是這座遊樂園最受歡迎的設施。
pattern: S + go to an amusement park
simple: The kids had fun at the amusement park.
simple_cn: 小朋友在遊樂園玩得很開心。

example: The last train car was completely empty when I got on.
example_cn: 我上車的時候，最後一節車廂完全空無一人。
pattern: S + walk into the train car
simple: There is no Wi-Fi in this train car.
simple_cn: 這節車廂沒有Wi-Fi。

example: The war emptied the state treasury and left the country in massive debt.
example_cn: 戰爭掏空了國庫，讓國家背負了巨額債務。
simple: The taxes go into the state treasury.
simple_cn: 稅金會進到國庫裡。

example: In the past, the sale of tobacco and salt was a state monopoly in Taiwan.
example_cn: 以前在台灣，菸酒買賣是國營獨佔的事業。
simple: The postal service used to be a state monopoly.
simple_cn: 郵政服務以前是國營的。

example: The invention of the steam engine marked the beginning of the Industrial Age.
example_cn: 蒸汽機的發明，標誌著工業時代的開始。
pattern: N + began in the Industrial Age
simple: Factories expanded during the Industrial Age.
simple_cn: 工業時代工廠擴張了很多。

example: He forgot to set his alarm clock and was late for the important meeting.
example_cn: 他忘記設鬧鐘，結果重要會議遲到了。
pattern: S + set the alarm clock for + 時間
simple: My alarm clock didn't go off this morning.
simple_cn: 我今天早上鬧鐘沒響。

example: Many teenagers nowadays are highly addicted to playing games on their smartphones.
example_cn: 現在很多青少年都超沉迷於玩手機遊戲。
pattern: S + spend time on one's smartphone
simple: Smartphones have changed human interaction.
simple_cn: 智慧型手機改變了人與人之間的互動。

example: The wind phone in Japan allows grieving people to "call" their lost loved ones to find comfort.
example_cn: 日本的風之電話，讓哀傷的人可以「打電話」給逝去的親人尋求慰藉。
pattern: S + visit the wind phone to + V
simple: He spoke into the wind phone.
simple_cn: 他對著風之電話說話。

example: It is a tradition for all family members to gather together on Lunar New Year's Eve.
example_cn: 除夕夜全家團聚，是一項傳統。
pattern: S + spend time with family members
simple: Close family members were invited to the wedding.
simple_cn: 只有近親被邀請參加婚禮。

chinese: 運動醫學專家 / 體育專員
example: The injured tennis player consulted a sports specialist for advice on recovery.
example_cn: 那位受傷的網球選手諮詢了運動專科醫師，尋求復原建議。
simple: The team hired a sports specialist.
simple_cn: 團隊請了一位運動專家。

chinese: 經驗法則、實用估算方法
example: As a general rule of thumb, you should drink at least eight glasses of water a day.
example_cn: 一般來說，你每天至少要喝八杯水。
pattern: As a rule of thumb, S + V
simple: A good rule of thumb is to save 20% of your salary.
simple_cn: 一個實用的經驗法則是存下薪水的20%。

chinese: 神秘客 (稽查服務品質的人)
example: The company hires mystery shoppers to secretly evaluate the customer service of its stores.
example_cn: 這家公司雇用神秘客，偷偷評估各門市的服務品質。
pattern: S + hire mystery shoppers to + V
simple: Mystery shoppers test store quality.
simple_cn: 神秘客會測試店家的服務品質。

example: Secret shoppers pretend to be normal customers to check if employees follow the rules.
example_cn: 神秘客會假裝成一般顧客，檢查員工有沒有遵守規定。
simple: The store was visited by secret shoppers.
simple_cn: 那家店有神秘客來訪。

example: If you have any problems with the product, please contact our customer service department.
example_cn: 如果你對產品有任何問題，請聯絡我們的客服部門。
simple: Customer service is their top priority.
simple_cn: 客戶服務是他們最重視的事。

example: The quality of the tea depends heavily on how the tea leaves are picked and processed.
example_cn: 茶的品質，很大程度取決於茶葉的採摘與處理方式。
simple: These tea leaves are grown in the high mountains.
simple_cn: 這些茶葉是在高山上種的。

type: 形容詞/專有名詞 + 名詞
example: Asian elephants are smaller than their African cousins and have completely different ear shapes.
example_cn: 亞洲象比非洲象體型小，而且耳朵形狀完全不同。
pattern: Asian elephants live in + 地方
simple: Habitat loss threatens Asian elephants.
simple_cn: 棲息地流失威脅著亞洲象。

chinese: 茶園 (通常指觀光或較小型的)
example: Tourists enjoy walking through the lush green tea gardens in Alishan.
example_cn: 遊客很喜歡在阿里山漫步，穿梭在綠油油的茶園裡。
simple: The tea gardens look beautiful in the mist.
simple_cn: 茶園在霧中看起來很美。

example: Vast areas of forest land are being destroyed to make way for cattle farming.
example_cn: 大片的森林正被砍伐，用來開闢牧牛場。
simple: The government bought the forest land for conservation.
simple_cn: 政府買下那塊林地作為保育用途。

example: Farmers dug drainage trenches to prevent their crops from flooding during the rainy season.
example_cn: 農民挖了排水溝，防止雨季時農作物淹水。
simple: The drainage trenches overflowed after the storm.
simple_cn: 暴風雨過後，排水溝都滿出來了。

example: Hundreds of workers are employed on the large tea plantations in India and Sri Lanka.
example_cn: 印度和斯里蘭卡的大型茶園雇用了數百名工人。
simple: The tea plantations stretch for miles.
simple_cn: 這片茶園綿延好幾英里。

example: In the 18th century, European merchants established trading posts along the coast of Africa.
example_cn: 十八世紀時，歐洲商人沿著非洲海岸設立了貿易據點。
simple: The city grew from a small trading post.
simple_cn: 這座城市是從一個小型貿易站發展起來的。

example: The ancient Spice Route connected Asia with Europe, allowing the exchange of valuable goods.
example_cn: 古老的香料之路連接了亞洲與歐洲，促進了珍貴商品的交流。
pattern: Merchants traveled along the Spice Route.
simple: The Spice Route brought wealth to many nations.
simple_cn: 香料之路為許多國家帶來了財富。

example: The Strait of Malacca is one of the busiest sea lanes in the world for international trade.
example_cn: 麻六甲海峽是全球國際貿易中最繁忙的海上航道之一。
simple: Pirates used to attack ships in this sea lane.
simple_cn: 海盜以前常在這個航道上攻擊船隻。

example: After graduating from college, she found herself at a crossroads in her life.
example_cn: 大學畢業後，她發現自己正處於人生的十字路口。
simple: The company is at a critical crossroads.
simple_cn: 這家公司正處於關鍵的十字路口。

example: Because of environmental concerns, many fast-food chains now offer meat substitutes like tofu or soy patties.
example_cn: 基於環保考量，許多速食連鎖店現在提供豆腐或大豆餅這類的肉類替代品。
simple: Mushrooms are good meat substitutes.
simple_cn: 蘑菇是很不錯的肉類替代品。

chinese: 綠色漢堡 (植物肉品牌/商品)
example: The new GreenBurger is made entirely from plants but tastes exactly like real beef.
example_cn: 全新的綠色漢堡完全由植物製成，但吃起來跟真牛肉一模一樣。
simple: The GreenBurger is very popular among vegetarians.
simple_cn: 綠色漢堡在素食者之間很受歡迎。

chinese: 飯碗 / 稻米產區 (穀倉)
example: The Mekong Delta is often referred to as the rice bowl of Vietnam because of its high agricultural output.
example_cn: 湄公河三角洲因為農業產量高，常被稱為越南的米倉。
pattern: N + is known as the rice bowl of + 國家
simple: He dropped his rice bowl.
simple_cn: 他摔破了自己的飯碗。

example: She used a plant-based ground meat substitute to make the spaghetti sauce for her vegan friends.
example_cn: 她用了植物性的碎肉替代品來做義大利麵醬，給她的素食朋友吃。
pattern: S + cook with ground meat substitute
simple: This ground meat substitute is healthy.
simple_cn: 這種植物肉替代品很健康。

example: She leaned in to whisper softly so that no one else could hear their secret.
example_cn: 她靠過去輕聲細語，以免其他人聽到他們的秘密。
pattern: S + whisper softly into one's ear
simple: He whispered softly to the baby.
simple_cn: 他輕聲對寶寶說話。

example: Even after twenty years, I can still recall clearly the day we first met.
example_cn: 即使過了二十年，我依然清楚記得我們初次見面的那天。
simple: She recalled clearly what he said.
simple_cn: 她清楚記得他說過的話。

example: The famous author had to revise his manuscript several times before it was finally published.
example_cn: 那位知名作家在作品終於出版前，修改了好幾次手稿。
simple: I revised the draft several times.
simple_cn: 我把草稿修改了好幾次。

example: Due to the strong winds, the forest fire spread rapidly across the mountain.
example_cn: 由於強風，森林大火迅速蔓延到整座山。
simple: The rumor spread rapidly online.
simple_cn: 這個謠言在網路上迅速傳開。

example: The thief tried to break into the house, but the alarm system scared him away.
example_cn: 小偷試圖闖進屋子，但警報系統把他嚇跑了。
simple: Someone broke into my car.
simple_cn: 有人闖進了我的車子。

example: The new tax policy gave rise to widespread dissatisfaction among the middle class.
example_cn: 新的稅務政策引發了中產階級的普遍不滿。
simple: His speech gave rise to a heated debate.
simple_cn: 他的演講引發了一場激烈的辯論。

example: He bought her a beautiful necklace to make up for forgetting their anniversary.
example_cn: 他買了一條漂亮的項鍊給她，以彌補忘記他們週年紀念日的過錯。
pattern: S + V + to make up for + N
simple: Nothing can make up for the lost time.
simple_cn: 什麼都無法彌補失去的時間。

example: Earthquakes occur suddenly without any prior warning, leaving people no time to escape.
example_cn: 地震發生得很突然，完全沒有任何預警，讓人來不及逃。
simple: The accident occurred suddenly.
simple_cn: 那場意外突然發生。

example: From the balcony, you can look out into the vast and peaceful ocean.
example_cn: 從陽台望出去，可以看到廣闊而平靜的海洋。
simple: She looked out into the dark night.
simple_cn: 她望向漆黑的夜色。

example: Numerous studies have linked smoking with a higher risk of lung cancer.
example_cn: 許多研究都指出吸菸與肺癌的高風險有關。
simple: Diet is closely linked with health.
simple_cn: 飲食與健康密切相關。

chinese: 間接學習 (從他人的經驗中學習)
example: By reading biographies, we can learn vicariously from the mistakes and successes of great leaders.
example_cn: 透過閱讀傳記，我們可以間接從偉大領袖的錯誤與成功中學習。
simple: Children learn vicariously by watching adults.
simple_cn: 孩子們透過觀察大人來間接學習。

example: He was so anxious about the job interview that he kept pacing back and forth in the hallway.
example_cn: 他對工作面試超緊張，一直在走廊上來回踱步。
simple: The expectant father paced back and forth.
simple_cn: 那位準爸爸走來走去，坐立不安。

example: A beautiful butterfly eventually emerged from the cocoon after several weeks.
example_cn: 過了幾個星期後，一隻漂亮的蝴蝶終於從繭裡出來了。
simple: The truth emerged from the investigation.
simple_cn: 真相在調查後浮出檯面。

example: Doctors advise patients to exercise regularly to maintain a healthy heart.
example_cn: 醫生建議病人要規律運動，才能維持心臟健康。
pattern: It is important to exercise regularly.
simple: She exercises regularly to stay fit.
simple_cn: 她固定運動來保持身材。

example: I have been waiting for the bus for over thirty minutes in the freezing cold.
example_cn: 我在寒風中等公車等了超過半小時。
simple: We are waiting for the rain to stop.
simple_cn: 我們在等雨停。

example: After the intense argument, they went to separate rooms to cool off.
example_cn: 激烈爭吵之後，他們各自回房間冷靜一下。
pattern: S + need some time to cool off
simple: Jump in the pool to cool off.
simple_cn: 跳進泳池涼快一下。

example: The spy managed to infiltrate the building by posing as a maintenance worker.
example_cn: 那個間諜假裝成維修工人，成功潛入了那棟大樓。
simple: He posed as a police officer.
simple_cn: 他假裝成警察。

example: Learning how to effectively cope with stress is essential for modern workers.
example_cn: 學會有效應對壓力，對現代上班族來說非常重要。
simple: It's hard to cope with the loss.
simple_cn: 要走出失去的傷痛真的很難。

example: After looking at several houses, they finally settled on the one near the lake.
example_cn: 看了好幾間房子之後，他們最後決定要買湖邊那一間。
simple: We haven't settled on a name for the baby yet.
simple_cn: 我們還沒決定好寶寶的名字。

example: I usually get up at 6 a.m. every morning to go for a jog before work.
example_cn: 我通常每天早上六點起床，上班前先去慢跑。
pattern: S + get up at + 時間
simple: Get up and face the day!
simple_cn: 起床面對新的一天吧！

example: We don't have much time left, so let's get to work immediately.
example_cn: 我們時間不多了，趕快開始工作吧。
simple: He got to work on repairing the engine.
simple_cn: 他開始動手修理引擎。

example: The artist toiled at his masterpiece for months before revealing it to the public.
example_cn: 那位藝術家花了幾個月苦心創作他的傑作，才公諸於世。
simple: Workers toiled at the construction site.
simple_cn: 工人在工地辛苦地勞動。

example: The new gym is equipped with state-of-the-art exercise machines.
example_cn: 這間新健身房配備了最先進的運動器材。
simple: The car is equipped with GPS.
simple_cn: 這台車有配備GPS。

example: The whole nation is still grieving over the tragic loss of their beloved president.
example_cn: 全國人民都還在為他們敬愛的總統不幸逝世而哀悼。
simple: She is grieving over the death of her dog.
simple_cn: 她因為狗狗過世而悲痛不已。

example: The captain skillfully navigated the ship through the narrow and dangerous strait.
example_cn: 船長熟練地駕駛船隻，穿過那條狹窄又危險的海峽。
simple: We navigated through the heavy traffic.
simple_cn: 我們在塞車中穿梭前進。

example: Despite the numerous setbacks, she decided to carry on with her research.
example_cn: 儘管遭遇了無數挫折，她還是決定繼續她的研究。
simple: Keep calm and carry on.
simple_cn: 保持冷靜，繼續前進。

example: The entire curriculum of this school is built around the concept of critical thinking.
example_cn: 這所學校的整個課程設計，都是圍繞著批判性思考這個概念。
simple: The plot is built around a mystery.
simple_cn: 劇情圍繞著一個謎團展開。

example: Before you sign the contract, it would be wise to consult him because he is a lawyer.
example_cn: 在你簽合約之前，最好先問問他，因為他是律師。
simple: I need to consult my manager first.
simple_cn: 我需要先請示我的主管。

example: His aggressive actions run counter to the peaceful principles he claims to believe in.
example_cn: 他那些激進的行為，跟他嘴上說相信的和平原則完全背道而馳。
simple: The decision runs counter to our policy.
simple_cn: 這個決定與我們的政策相牴觸。

example: The financial expert advised him to invest his money in real estate.
example_cn: 那位理財專家建議他把錢投資在房地產上。
simple: I advise you to stay home.
simple_cn: 我建議你待在家裡。

example: Scientists examine the blood samples under a microscope to find the virus.
example_cn: 科學家用顯微鏡檢查血液樣本，來找出病毒。
simple: The evidence was examined under strict conditions.
simple_cn: 證據在嚴格的條件下被檢驗。

example: The frightened child clung to his mother's hand when the dog barked.
example_cn: 那隻狗一叫，嚇到的小孩緊緊抓著媽媽的手不放。
simple: He still clings to the hope that she will return.
simple_cn: 他還是抱著她會回來的希望不放。

example: The two fighting dogs had to be pulled apart by their owners.
example_cn: 兩隻狗在打架，主人們只好硬把牠們拉開。
simple: Don't pull the toy apart!
simple_cn: 不要把那個玩具拆開！

example: The new startup did not fare well during its first year of operation.
example_cn: 那家新創公司第一年營運狀況不太理想。
simple: How did he fare in the interview?
simple_cn: 他面試的結果怎麼樣？

example: She spends two hours every day commuting between her home and the office.
example_cn: 她每天花兩個小時通勤往返家裡和辦公室。
pattern: S + commute between A and B
simple: He commutes between Taipei and Hsinchu.
simple_cn: 他每天通勤往返台北和新竹。

example: Thousands of refugees had to flee from their war-torn country to seek safety.
example_cn: 數千名難民為了安全，不得不逃離戰火連天的家園。
simple: They fled from the burning building.
simple_cn: 他們從失火的大樓裡逃了出來。

example: For her graduation trip, she decided to travel entirely by train across Europe.
example_cn: 為了慶祝畢業旅行，她決定全程搭火車遊歐洲。
pattern: S + travel entirely by + 交通工具
simple: The package was traveled entirely by air.
simple_cn: 那個包裹全程都是空運的。

example: The ants work collectively to build their nest and gather food for the colony.
example_cn: 螞蟻會集體合作，為蟻群築巢跟蒐集食物。
simple: We must work collectively to solve this crisis.
simple_cn: 我們必須團結合作來解決這場危機。

example: It took him a few months to fully adapt to the cold climate in Canada.
example_cn: 他花了幾個月才完全適應加拿大的寒冷氣候。
simple: Animals adapt to their environments.
simple_cn: 動物會適應牠們的環境。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: This Italian restaurant is highly recommended by many local food bloggers.
example_cn: 這家義大利餐廳受到許多當地美食部落客大力推薦。
simple: The book is highly recommended for beginners.
simple_cn: 這本書非常推薦給初學者。

chinese: 完全沒問題的、非常好的
example: Don't worry about the small scratch on the car; it is perfectly fine and safe to drive.
example_cn: 車上那點小刮傷不用擔心，開起來完全沒問題也很安全。
pattern: It is perfectly fine to + V
simple: You are perfectly fine just the way you are.
simple_cn: 你現在這樣就已經很好了。

example: We should use environmentally friendly products to reduce plastic pollution.
example_cn: 我們應該使用環保產品來減少塑膠污染。
simple: Electric cars are environmentally friendly.
simple_cn: 電動車對環境很友善。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The new sports stadium was entirely publicly financed through local taxes.
example_cn: 這座新的體育館完全是由地方稅收出資興建的。
simple: The project is publicly financed.
simple_cn: 這個計畫是由公家經費資助的。

example: Compared to other European cities, the cost of living here is relatively low.
example_cn: 跟其他歐洲城市比起來，這裡的生活費相對較低。
simple: The risk is relatively low.
simple_cn: 這個風險相對來說比較低。

example: It is nearly impossible to find a parking space in downtown Taipei during rush hour.
example_cn: 尖峰時間要在台北市中心找到停車位幾乎是不可能的。
pattern: It is nearly impossible to + V
simple: Winning the lottery is nearly impossible.
simple_cn: 中樂透幾乎是不可能的。

example: The hospital's blood supply is critically low after the major earthquake.
example_cn: 大地震過後，醫院的血液庫存嚴重不足。
simple: The water level is critically low.
simple_cn: 水位已經低到非常危險的程度。

example: With a stable internet connection, you can work potentially anywhere in the world.
example_cn: 只要網路穩定，你幾乎可以在世界上任何地方工作。
simple: The lost keys could be potentially anywhere.
simple_cn: 弄丟的鑰匙可能在任何地方。

chinese: 專業地喚醒 (提供專業叫醒服務)
example: In the past, 'knocker-uppers' made a living by professionally waking up workers.
example_cn: 以前，「敲門工」靠專業叫醒工人來謀生。
pattern: S + do N by professionally waking up + O
simple: He offers a service professionally waking up clients.
simple_cn: 他提供專業的電話叫醒服務。

example: This specific species of butterfly is extremely rare and only found in this forest.
example_cn: 這種蝴蝶非常稀有，只有在這片森林才找得到。
simple: Snow is extremely rare in this desert.
simple_cn: 在這片沙漠裡，下雪極其罕見。

chinese: 特別突出的、尤其顯著的
example: The company's logo is especially prominent on the front page of the website.
example_cn: 公司標誌在網站首頁特別顯眼。
simple: Her talent is especially prominent in math.
simple_cn: 她的天賦在數學方面特別突出。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: Nutritionists warn against eating foods that are heavily processed and contain artificial flavors.
example_cn: 營養師警告不要吃那些高度加工、含有人工香料的食物。
simple: Sausages are often heavily processed.
simple_cn: 香腸通常都經過高度加工。

chinese: 高度群居的、非常善於交際的
example: Dolphins are highly social animals that live in complex family groups.
example_cn: 海豚是高度社會化的動物，生活在複雜的家庭群體中。
simple: Ants are highly social insects.
simple_cn: 螞蟻是高度社會性的昆蟲。

chinese: 高度加工的 (同 heavily processed)
type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: A diet full of highly processed foods can increase the risk of heart disease.
example_cn: 飲食中充滿高度加工食品，可能會增加心臟病的風險。
pattern: Highly processed foods are bad for health.
simple: Avoid highly processed snacks.
simple_cn: 盡量避免吃過度加工的零食。

chinese: 被廣泛認可的、廣為人知的
type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: She is widely recognized as one of the best contemporary artists in the country.
example_cn: 她被公認為國內最優秀的當代藝術家之一。
pattern: S + is widely recognized as + N
simple: His theory is now widely recognized.
simple_cn: 他的理論現在已經廣受認可。

chinese: 正式建立的、官方設立的
type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The national park was officially established in 1980 to protect the local wildlife.
example_cn: 這個國家公園於1980年正式成立，目的是保護當地的野生動物。
pattern: N + was officially established in + 年分
simple: The committee was officially established yesterday.
simple_cn: 委員會昨天正式成立了。

example: The view from the top of the mountain was utterly fantastic and breathtaking.
example_cn: 從山頂望出去的景色，真的美得令人屏息。
simple: Her performance was utterly fantastic.
simple_cn: 她的表演真的超讚。

chinese: 被顯著報導的、放在醒目位置的
type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The controversial scandal was prominently featured on the front pages of all newspapers.
example_cn: 這起爭議性醜聞被大篇幅刊登在所有報紙的頭版。
pattern: N + is prominently featured in/on + N
simple: The new product is prominently featured.
simple_cn: 這款新產品被放在很顯眼的位置。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The new smartphone was successfully marketed to teenagers through creative social media campaigns.
example_cn: 這款新智慧型手機透過創意的社群媒體活動，成功打進青少年市場。
pattern: N + was successfully marketed to + O
simple: The toy was successfully marketed worldwide.
simple_cn: 這個玩具成功在全球行銷。

example: Many young students are highly interested in learning about artificial intelligence.
example_cn: 許多年輕學生對學習人工智慧非常感興趣。
simple: I am interested in reading history books.
simple_cn: 我對讀歷史書很有興趣。

example: There has been a significant increase in the number of online shoppers recently.
example_cn: 最近線上購物的人數有顯著增加。
pattern: There is an increase in + N
simple: We saw an increase in sales this year.
simple_cn: 我們今年看到銷售額成長了。

example: The customer was not satisfied with the quality of the meal and asked for a refund.
example_cn: 這位顧客對餐點品質不滿意，要求退款。
simple: Are you satisfied with your test results?
simple_cn: 你對你的考試結果滿意嗎？

example: The project failed mainly due to a severe lack of funds and experienced personnel.
example_cn: 這個專案失敗，主要是因為嚴重缺乏資金和經驗豐富的人員。
simple: His failure was caused by a lack of effort.
simple_cn: 他失敗是因為不夠努力。

example: The tropical island is very popular as a honeymoon destination for newly married couples.
example_cn: 這個熱帶島嶼非常受新婚夫妻歡迎，是度蜜月的熱門地點。
simple: Oats are popular as a meat substitute.
simple_cn: 燕麥很受歡迎，常被當作肉類替代品。

example: Dogs have a sharp sense of smell and are very sensitive to changes in their environment.
example_cn: 狗狗嗅覺敏銳，對環境變化也非常敏感。
simple: My teeth are sensitive to cold drinks.
simple_cn: 我的牙齒對冰飲很敏感。

example: Modern society has become more accepting of different cultural backgrounds and lifestyles.
example_cn: 現代社會對不同的文化背景和生活方式變得更加包容。
simple: We must be accepting of new ideas.
simple_cn: 我們必須接納新的想法。

example: Many small island nations are heavily dependent on imported food and energy.
example_cn: 許多小型島國高度依賴進口食物和能源。
simple: Plants are dependent on sunlight.
simple_cn: 植物依賴陽光生長。

type: 名詞 + 動詞 + 形容詞
example: Hurry up! The timetable says the next bus is due in five minutes.
example_cn: 快點！時刻表說下一班公車五分鐘內就會到。
pattern: The bus/train + is due + 時間
simple: The baby is due in October.
simple_cn: 寶寶的預產期在十月。

example: The newly built hiking trail runs entirely along the beautiful eastern coastline.
example_cn: 這條新蓋的健行步道，全程沿著美麗的東海岸線延伸。
pattern: S + V + entirely along + 路線/邊緣
simple: The fence goes entirely along the border.
simple_cn: 這道圍籬完全沿著邊界設置。

example: Consumers should be cautious about sharing their personal information on unknown websites.
example_cn: 消費者在不知名網站上分享個人資訊時應該要小心。
simple: He is very cautious about spending money.
simple_cn: 他花錢非常謹慎。

example: The environmentalist presented a strong case for investing in renewable energy.
example_cn: 這位環保人士提出強而有力的論點，支持投資再生能源。
pattern: S + make a case for + N
simple: She made a good case for moving to the city.
simple_cn: 她很有說服力地提出了搬到城市的理由。

example: There is a compelling case against building the nuclear power plant near the residential area.
example_cn: 反對在住宅區附近興建核電廠的理由相當充分。
pattern: There is a strong case against + N
simple: The case against the suspect is weak.
simple_cn: 對嫌疑犯的指控證據不足。

example: Nurses need to be highly skilled and deeply compassionate to their patients.
example_cn: 護理師需要具備高超的技術，同時也要對病人有深刻的同理心。
simple: We should be compassionate to the poor.
simple_cn: 我們應該對窮人懷有同情心。

example: Many animal rights activists argue against zoos, claiming that keeping animals in cages is cruel.
example_cn: 許多動物權利倡議者反對動物園，認為把動物關在籠子裡很殘忍。
simple: Are you for or against zoos?
simple_cn: 你贊成還是反對動物園？

example: The climate in this mountain region is very similar to that of Southern Europe.
example_cn: 這個山區的氣候跟南歐非常相似。
simple: Your jacket is similar to mine.
simple_cn: 你的外套跟我的很像。

example: Scientists have finally reached a general consensus on the causes of global warming.
example_cn: 科學家們終於對全球暖化的原因達成了普遍共識。
pattern: There is a consensus on + N
simple: We need to reach a consensus on this plan.
simple_cn: 我們需要對這個計畫達成共識。

example: The beautiful coral island is situated just off the east coast of Taiwan.
example_cn: 這座美麗的珊瑚島就位於台灣東海岸外不遠處。
pattern: N + is situated off the coast of + 地方
simple: The ship sank off the coast.
simple_cn: 那艘船在海岸附近沉沒了。

example: High blood pressure is often considered a reliable marker for heart disease.
example_cn: 高血壓常被視為心臟病的一個可靠指標。
pattern: N + is a marker for + N
simple: This symptom is a clear marker for infection.
simple_cn: 這個症狀是感染的明顯指標。

example: In response to the growing customer demand, the company decided to hire more staff.
example_cn: 因應日益增長的客戶需求，公司決定增聘更多員工。
pattern: In response to + N, S + V
simple: He wrote a letter in response to the complaint.
simple_cn: 他寫了一封信來回應投訴。

example: The invention of the internet brought a revolutionary change to global communication.
example_cn: 網際網路的發明為全球通訊帶來了革命性的改變。
pattern: N + brought a revolutionary change to + N
simple: The new technology caused a revolutionary change.
simple_cn: 這項新技術帶來了革命性的改變。

example: Many cleaning products contain harmful chemicals that can damage the environment.
example_cn: 許多清潔產品含有有害化學物質，可能會破壞環境。
pattern: S + be exposed to harmful chemicals
simple: Avoid using products with harmful chemicals.
simple_cn: 避免使用含有有害化學物質的產品。

example: Under her wise leadership, the company successfully overcame the financial crisis.
example_cn: 在她明智的領導下，公司成功度過了金融危機。
pattern: Under the wise leadership of + N
simple: The country prospered under his wise leadership.
simple_cn: 在他英明的領導下，這個國家繁榮了起來。

example: People wearing masks on public transport has become a common sight.
example_cn: 民眾在公共交通工具上戴口罩已經成為常見的景象。
pattern: N + is a common sight in + 地方
simple: Snow is a common sight here in winter.
simple_cn: 冬天這裡下雪是常見的景象。

example: The government has invested millions to restore and preserve the city's historic buildings.
example_cn: 政府投入了數百萬經費來修復並保存市區的歷史建築。
simple: The tour includes a visit to several historic buildings.
simple_cn: 這趟行程包含參觀幾棟歷史建築。

example: Public squares in European cities are often surrounded by cafes and street performers.
example_cn: 歐洲城市的廣場周圍經常有咖啡館和街頭藝人。
simple: The protest took place in the public square.
simple_cn: 抗議活動在公共廣場舉行。

example: Tourists love wandering through the narrow streets of the town's historic center.
example_cn: 遊客很喜歡在城鎮歷史中心的狹窄街道上漫步。
pattern: S + visit the historic center of + 地方
simple: The historic center is a UNESCO World Heritage site.
simple_cn: 這個歷史中心是聯合國教科文組織的世界遺產。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The proposed law sparked heated debates among politicians and citizens alike.
example_cn: 這項提出的法案在政治人物和民眾之間引發了激烈的辯論。
pattern: N + sparked heated debates over + 議題
simple: There were heated debates about the budget.
simple_cn: 關於預算有過激烈的辯論。

example: A total solar eclipse is a rare event that attracts thousands of sky watchers.
example_cn: 日全食是罕見的天文事件，會吸引數千名觀星者。
pattern: N + is a truly rare event.
simple: It is a rare event to see a shooting star.
simple_cn: 看到流星是件罕見的事。

example: In some cultures, walking under a ladder is believed to bring bad luck.
example_cn: 在某些文化中，從梯子下面走過去被認為會帶來厄運。
simple: He blamed his failure on bad luck.
simple_cn: 他把失敗歸咎於運氣不好。

example: The approaching hurricane poses an immediate threat to coastal communities.
example_cn: 即將來襲的颶風對沿海社區構成直接威脅。
pattern: N + poses an immediate threat to + N
simple: There is no immediate threat of danger.
simple_cn: 目前沒有立即的危險威脅。

example: The popularity of K-pop has had a significant cultural impact on youth worldwide.
example_cn: K-pop的流行對全球年輕人的文化產生了深遠影響。
pattern: N + has a significant cultural impact on + N
simple: The film made a significant cultural impact.
simple_cn: 這部電影帶來了重大的文化影響。

example: The lotus flower is considered a sacred symbol in several Eastern religions.
example_cn: 蓮花在幾個東方宗教中被視為神聖的象徵。
pattern: N + is a sacred symbol of + N
simple: The cross is a sacred symbol for Christians.
simple_cn: 十字架對基督徒來說是神聖的象徵。

example: Consuming modest amounts of dark chocolate may be beneficial to your heart.
example_cn: 適量吃點黑巧克力對心臟可能有好處。
pattern: S + drink/eat modest amounts of + N
simple: She only asked for modest amounts of funding.
simple_cn: 她只要求一筆不大的經費。

example: Regular physical activity is essential for maintaining good health and preventing diseases.
example_cn: 規律運動對維持健康和預防疾病非常重要。
simple: Walking is a good form of physical activity.
simple_cn: 走路是一種很好的運動方式。

example: The diplomats negotiated to guarantee safe passage for the refugees crossing the border.
example_cn: 外交官們透過協商，確保難民能安全越過邊界。
pattern: S + guarantee/ensure safe passage for + O
simple: The ships were granted safe passage.
simple_cn: 這些船隻獲准安全通行。

example: The local authorities have issued a warning about the upcoming severe weather.
example_cn: 當地政府已針對即將來臨的惡劣天氣發布警報。
pattern: The local authorities decided to + V
simple: You must report the incident to the local authorities.
simple_cn: 你必須向當地主管機關通報這起事件。

example: The pandemic severely disrupted international travel for over two years.
example_cn: 這場疫情嚴重影響國際旅行長達兩年多。
pattern: N + has an impact on international travel.
simple: International travel is bouncing back.
simple_cn: 國際旅遊正在逐漸復甦。

chinese: 玻璃琴 (用裝水的高腳杯演奏的樂器)
example: Playing the musical glasses requires wet fingers and a lot of practice.
example_cn: 演奏音樂玻璃杯需要手指潮濕，而且得大量練習。
simple: The sound of musical glasses is very unique.
simple_cn: 音樂杯發出的聲音非常獨特。

example: Early intervention is crucial for children experiencing cognitive delays.
example_cn: 對有認知發展遲緩的孩子來說，早期介入非常關鍵。
pattern: Children with cognitive delays need + N
simple: The doctor diagnosed him with a cognitive delay.
simple_cn: 醫生診斷他有認知發展遲緩。

chinese: 身體上的挑戰 (生理障礙)
example: Despite his physical challenges, he successfully completed the marathon.
example_cn: 儘管身體有障礙，他還是成功跑完了馬拉松。
simple: The athletes overcame extreme physical challenges.
simple_cn: 這些運動員克服了極大的體能挑戰。

example: The school provides tailored programs for students with special needs.
example_cn: 學校為有特殊需求的學生提供量身打造的課程。
pattern: S + accommodate people with special needs
simple: He is a teacher for special needs education.
simple_cn: 他是一位特教老師。

example: The art gallery is open to the general public free of charge on Sundays.
example_cn: 美術館每週日免費對一般大眾開放。
pattern: N + is available to the general public.
simple: The general public is concerned about inflation.
simple_cn: 一般民眾都很擔心通貨膨脹。

chinese: 電子活動 (指使用3C產品的活動)
example: Parents are advised to limit their children's time spent on electronic activities before bedtime.
example_cn: 建議家長限制孩子在睡前使用電子產品的時間。
pattern: S + spend time on electronic activities
simple: Electronic activities can disrupt sleep.
simple_cn: 使用電子產品會干擾睡眠。

type: 動詞 + 名詞 + 介系詞
example: On April Fool's Day, people love to play practical jokes on their friends and family.
example_cn: 愚人節這天，大家很喜歡對朋友和家人開玩笑。
simple: The kids played a joke on the teacher.
simple_cn: 孩子們跟老師開了個玩笑。

example: Tightrope walkers use a long pole to help them keep their balance high in the air.
example_cn: 走鋼索的人會用長竿來幫助自己在高空保持平衡。
pattern: S + try hard to keep one's balance
simple: He waved his arms to keep his balance.
simple_cn: 他揮動雙臂來保持平衡。

example: The wealthy businessman offered to finance the construction of the new library.
example_cn: 那位富有的企業家願意出資興建新的圖書館。
pattern: S + finance the construction of + N
simple: The government financed the construction.
simple_cn: 政府出資進行這項建設。

example: Studies have shown that spending time in nature can help ease depression and anxiety.
example_cn: 研究顯示，親近大自然有助於緩解憂鬱和焦慮。
pattern: S + take medication to ease depression
simple: Regular exercise can ease depression.
simple_cn: 規律運動可以緩解憂鬱。

example: Receiving praise for their hard work can greatly enhance a child's self-image.
example_cn: 對孩子的努力給予讚美，能大大提升他們的自我形象。
simple: Wearing nice clothes enhances her self-image.
simple_cn: 穿好看的衣服能提升她的自我形象。

example: Listening to soft music is an excellent way to relieve stress after a busy day.
example_cn: 忙碌一天後，聽點輕音樂是紓壓的好方法。
pattern: S + do yoga to relieve stress
simple: Massage therapy helps relieve stress.
simple_cn: 按摩療法有助於減輕壓力。

example: After the heavy snow was cleared from the roads, normal bus service resumed.
example_cn: 道路上的大雪清除後，公車恢復正常行駛。
pattern: N + service resumed after + 狀況
simple: Train service resumed this morning.
simple_cn: 火車服務在今天早上恢復了。

example: The government distributed millions of rapid testing kits to households during the pandemic.
example_cn: 政府在疫情期間發放數百萬份快篩試劑給各家戶。
pattern: S + use testing kits to + V
simple: The pharmacy ran out of testing kits.
simple_cn: 藥局的快篩試劑賣完了。

example: She was awarded the Nobel Peace Prize for her lifelong dedication to human rights.
example_cn: 她因畢生致力於人權而獲頒諾貝爾和平獎。
pattern: S + win/receive the Nobel Peace Prize
simple: He was nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize.
simple_cn: 他被提名諾貝爾和平獎。

example: The new medical center is equipped with the most advanced surgical technology.
example_cn: 這間新的醫療中心配備了最先進的外科技術。
pattern: S + go to the medical center for + N
simple: He works at a prestigious medical center.
simple_cn: 他在一家知名的醫學中心工作。

example: Animal rights groups strongly protested against the testing of cosmetics on rabbits.
example_cn: 動物權利團體強烈抗議用兔子來測試化妝品。
pattern: Animal rights groups campaign for + N
simple: Animal rights groups demand stricter laws.
simple_cn: 動物權利團體要求制定更嚴格的法律。

example: The invention of the birth control pill gave women more choices regarding family planning.
example_cn: 避孕藥的發明讓女性在家庭計畫方面有了更多選擇。
pattern: S + take the birth control pill
simple: She asked her doctor about the birth control pill.
simple_cn: 她問醫生關於避孕藥的事。

example: He hung several bird feeders in his backyard to attract various local birds.
example_cn: 他在後院掛了好幾個鳥類餵食器，吸引各種當地的鳥類。
pattern: S + fill the bird feeders with + N
simple: The bird feeders are empty.
simple_cn: 餵鳥器都空了。

example: Due to advances in medical technology, the average human life span has increased significantly.
example_cn: 由於醫療技術的進步，人類的平均壽命顯著延長了。
pattern: N + has a short/long life span
simple: Turtles have a remarkably long life span.
simple_cn: 烏龜的壽命非常長。

example: Dark storm clouds gathered on the horizon, warning us of the approaching typhoon.
example_cn: 天邊聚集了烏黑的暴風雲，警告我們颱風即將來襲。
pattern: Storm clouds gathered above + 地方
simple: The sky was filled with heavy storm clouds.
simple_cn: 天空佈滿了厚重的暴風雨雲層。

example: The Andes are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world, stretching across South America.
example_cn: 安地斯山脈是世界上最長的山脈之一，橫跨南美洲。
pattern: S + fly over/cross the mountain ranges
simple: These mountain ranges act as a natural border.
simple_cn: 這些山脈形成了天然邊界。

example: The severe drought has severely affected the city's fresh water supply.
example_cn: 嚴重的乾旱已經嚴重影響了這座城市的淡水供應。
simple: The village relies on a well for its water supply.
simple_cn: 這個村莊靠一口井供水。

example: Reducing the emission of greenhouse gases is essential to stop global warming.
example_cn: 減少溫室氣體的排放對於阻止全球暖化至關重要。
simple: Cars produce a lot of greenhouse gases.
simple_cn: 汽車會產生大量溫室氣體。

example: As a fitness fanatic, he spends at least three hours in the gym every single day.
example_cn: 他是個健身狂，每天至少花三個小時在健身房。
pattern: N + is a real fitness fanatic
simple: She has turned into a fitness fanatic recently.
simple_cn: 她最近變成了健身狂熱分子。

example: Lifting heavy boxes without proper posture can easily cause a painful muscle strain.
example_cn: 用不正確的姿勢搬重箱子，很容易造成痛苦的肌肉拉傷。
pattern: S + suffer from a muscle strain
simple: He is recovering from a muscle strain.
simple_cn: 他正在從肌肉拉傷中恢復。

example: The prickly pear cactus can survive in harsh desert conditions by storing water in its thick stems.
example_cn: 仙人掌靠著厚實的莖幹儲存水分，能在嚴酷的沙漠環境中生存。
pattern: The prickly pear cactus grows in + 地方
simple: We ate a fruit from the prickly pear cactus.
simple_cn: 我們吃了一顆來自仙人掌的果實。

example: Oxygen is actually a waste product of photosynthesis produced by plants.
example_cn: 氧氣其實是植物進行光合作用時產生的廢棄物。
pattern: A is a waste product of B
simple: Factories must dispose of waste products carefully.
simple_cn: 工廠必須小心處理廢棄物。

example: The farm uses a biogas generator to turn animal waste into usable electricity.
example_cn: 這座農場利用沼氣發電機，把動物糞便轉換成可用的電力。
simple: The biogas generator provides cheap energy.
simple_cn: 沼氣發電機提供便宜的能源。

example: Investing in green energy like wind and solar power is crucial for our planet's future.
example_cn: 投資風力與太陽能等綠色能源，對地球的未來至關重要。
pattern: S + promote the use of green energy
simple: Green energy creates less pollution.
simple_cn: 綠色能源產生的污染較少。

example: Burning fossil fuels, such as coal and oil, releases huge amounts of carbon dioxide.
example_cn: 燃燒煤炭與石油等化石燃料，會釋放出大量的二氧化碳。
pattern: S + rely heavily on fossil fuels
simple: We need to stop using fossil fuels.
simple_cn: 我們必須停止使用化石燃料。

example: Before modern factories were built, women used a spinning wheel to make thread at home.
example_cn: 在現代工廠建成之前，婦女會在家裡用紡車來紡線。
pattern: She sat by the spinning wheel.
simple: The antique spinning wheel belongs to my grandmother.
simple_cn: 那台古董紡車是我祖母的。

example: The city boasts several world-class concert halls designed with perfect acoustics.
example_cn: 這座城市擁有幾座世界級的音樂廳，音響效果設計得非常完美。
simple: The concert halls were fully booked.
simple_cn: 音樂廳的票都賣光了。

example: They spent the entire weekend riding roller coasters at the local family fun park.
example_cn: 他們整個週末都在當地的家庭遊樂園裡玩雲霄飛車。
pattern: S + took the kids to a family fun park.
simple: The family fun park was crowded on Sunday.
simple_cn: 週日家庭遊樂園人擠人。

example: My grandfather loves to sit quietly by the fishing lake and wait for a catch.
example_cn: 我爺爺喜歡靜靜坐在釣魚池邊，等著魚兒上鉤。
pattern: S + spent the day at a fishing lake.
simple: They camped near a large fishing lake.
simple_cn: 他們在一個大釣魚湖附近露營。

example: To pass the road test, you must demonstrate excellent driving skills and safety awareness.
example_cn: 要通過路考，你必須展現出色的駕駛技術和安全意識。
simple: Poor driving skills can lead to accidents.
simple_cn: 開車技術不好容易出車禍。

example: The kids were excited to try out the new GPS Adventure Band during their camping trip.
example_cn: 孩子們在露營時超興奮，急著想試試新的GPS冒險手環。
pattern: S + wear a GPS Adventure Band
simple: The GPS Adventure Band tracks your location.
simple_cn: GPS探險手環會追蹤你的位置。

example: Strict speed limits have significantly reduced the number of fatal road accidents this year.
example_cn: 嚴格的速限規定今年大幅減少了致命車禍的數量。
pattern: S + be involved in road accidents
simple: Drunk driving causes many road accidents.
simple_cn: 酒駕會造成很多交通事故。

example: Drivers who violate traffic regulations will be heavily fined or lose their licenses.
example_cn: 違反交通規則的駕駛將被重罰或吊銷駕照。
simple: You must follow all traffic regulations.
simple_cn: 你必須遵守所有交通規則。

example: Despite the terrible storm, the pilot managed to land the airplane safely.
example_cn: 儘管暴風雨非常猛烈，機長還是成功讓飛機安全降落。
simple: The spacecraft landed safely on Mars.
simple_cn: 太空船安全登陸火星。

example: The prize was awarded jointly to three scientists who contributed to the discovery.
example_cn: 這個獎項由三位對這項發現有貢獻的科學家共同獲得。
pattern: N + is awarded jointly to + 人
simple: The contract was awarded jointly to two companies.
simple_cn: 這份合約由兩家公司共同得標。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 (或動詞搭配)
example: His close encounter with a wild bear in the woods left him terrified.
example_cn: 他在樹林裡近距離遇到一頭野生黑熊，嚇得半死。
pattern: S + have an encounter with + N
simple: My first encounter with him was unpleasant.
simple_cn: 我第一次跟他碰面感覺不太好。

example: We saw a beautiful eagle perching on the highest branch of the old oak tree.
example_cn: 我們看到一隻漂亮的老鷹棲息在那棵老橡樹最高的樹枝上。
simple: The cat perched on the fence.
simple_cn: 那隻貓蹲在圍籬上。

example: I was completely struck by the sheer beauty of the canyon when I first saw it.
example_cn: 我第一次看到峽谷時，完全被它的壯麗美景震懾住了。
simple: The building was struck by lightning.
simple_cn: 那棟建築物被雷擊中了。

example: Hearing the police sirens coming after them, the robbers abandoned their car and ran.
example_cn: 聽到警笛聲從後面追來，搶匪們丟下車子拔腿就跑。
simple: Spring comes after winter.
simple_cn: 冬天過後就是春天。

example: As you climb higher up the mountain, the oxygen in the air begins to thin quickly.
example_cn: 往山上爬得越高，空氣中的氧氣就會迅速變稀薄。
simple: The crowd thinned quickly after the concert ended.
simple_cn: 演唱會結束後，人群很快就散掉了。

example: The magician threw a smoke bomb and seemed to disappear within seconds.
example_cn: 魔術師丟出一顆煙霧彈，幾秒鐘內就彷彿消失不見了。
simple: The symptoms should disappear within a week.
simple_cn: 這些症狀應該一週內就會消失。

example: The new student tried hard to fit into the class and make new friends.
example_cn: 那位新同學努力想融入班級、交到新朋友。
simple: This sofa won't fit into the elevator.
simple_cn: 這張沙發進不了電梯。

chinese: 進展順利 / 計算出 / 鍛鍊
example: Don't worry about the travel plans; I'm sure everything will work out in the end.
example_cn: 別擔心旅行計畫，我相信最後一切都會順利的。
simple: He goes to the gym to work out.
simple_cn: 他去健身房運動。

example: Every citizen must abide by the law, regardless of their social status.
example_cn: 每位公民都必須遵守法律，無論他們的社會地位如何。
pattern: S + must abide by + 規則/法律
simple: Players have to abide by the referee's decision.
simple_cn: 球員必須服從裁判的判決。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The coastal town was severely damaged by the massive tsunami last week.
example_cn: 上週那場巨大的海嘯嚴重摧毀了這座沿海小鎮。
pattern: N + was severely damaged by + N
simple: His reputation was severely damaged.
simple_cn: 他的名譽受到嚴重打擊。

example: Although the generic drug is much cheaper, it is similarly effective as the brand-name one.
example_cn: 雖然學名藥便宜很多，但效果跟原廠藥差不多。
pattern: A is similarly effective as B
simple: Both methods are similarly effective.
simple_cn: 兩種方法效果差不多。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The no-smoking rule is strictly enforced in all areas of the hospital.
example_cn: 醫院所有區域都嚴格執行禁菸規定。
simple: Dress codes are strictly enforced here.
simple_cn: 這裡嚴格執行服裝規定。

example: Many elderly people are fearful of leaving their homes during the flu season.
example_cn: 許多長輩在流感季節都不敢出門。
simple: She is fearful of making mistakes.
simple_cn: 她很怕犯錯。

example: The manager is highly critical of employees who arrive late to meetings.
example_cn: 經理對於開會遲到的員工非常嚴厲批評。
simple: The review was highly critical of the movie.
simple_cn: 那篇影評對這部電影批評得很嚴厲。

example: Investors remain doubtful about the company's ability to recover from the scandal.
example_cn: 投資人對於這家公司能否從醜聞中恢復，仍然抱持懷疑態度。
simple: I am doubtful about his promises.
simple_cn: 我對他的承諾感到懷疑。

example: The Amazon rainforest is home to thousands of unique plant and animal species.
example_cn: 亞馬遜雨林是數千種獨特動植物的家園。
pattern: 地方 + is home to + N
simple: Taiwan is home to many beautiful mountains.
simple_cn: 台灣有許多美麗的山脈。

example: He spent the whole afternoon browsing in antiquarian bookshops looking for rare editions.
example_cn: 他整個下午都泡在古書店裡，尋找稀有版本。
simple: She loves visiting antiquarian bookshops.
simple_cn: 她很喜歡逛舊書店。

example: The conference focused on promoting sustainable development in developing countries.
example_cn: 這場會議的重點是推動開發中國家的永續發展。
simple: Sustainable development is crucial for our future.
simple_cn: 永續發展對我們的未來至關重要。

example: The invention of the jet engine revolutionized commercial air travel.
example_cn: 噴射引擎的發明徹底改變了商業航空旅行。
simple: Commercial air travel has become more affordable.
simple_cn: 商業航空旅行變得越來越負擔得起。

example: The earthquake severely damaged the building's structural integrity, making it unsafe.
example_cn: 地震嚴重破壞了這棟建築的結構完整性，導致它變得不安全。
pattern: N + compromises the structural integrity of + N
simple: Engineers checked the bridge's structural integrity.
simple_cn: 工程師檢查了橋樑的結構完整性。

type: 名詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: He loves watching fast-paced action movies on weekends to relax.
example_cn: 他喜歡在週末看節奏快的動作片來放鬆。
simple: Action movies usually feature exciting stunts.
simple_cn: 動作片通常有刺激的特技場面。

example: The artist demonstrated masterful skills in his latest oil painting.
example_cn: 這位藝術家在他最新的油畫作品中展現了精湛的技巧。
pattern: S + demonstrate masterful skills in + N
simple: She played the piano with masterful skills.
simple_cn: 她以精湛的技巧彈奏鋼琴。

example: Stress and lack of sleep are common problems associated with the modern lifestyle.
example_cn: 壓力和睡眠不足是現代生活常見的問題。
pattern: N + is a common feature of the modern lifestyle
simple: The modern lifestyle can be very fast-paced.
simple_cn: 現代生活節奏可以非常快速。

example: The Mona Lisa is perhaps the most recognizable piece of art in the world.
example_cn: 蒙娜麗莎大概是全世界最廣為人知的藝術作品。
pattern: N + is a highly recognizable piece of + N
simple: This is his most recognizable piece of music.
simple_cn: 這是他最具代表性的音樂作品。

type: 過去分詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: The ancient warriors carried beautifully painted shields into the battle.
example_cn: 古代戰士帶著繪有精美圖案的盾牌上戰場。
simple: The museum displays several painted shields.
simple_cn: 博物館展示了幾面彩繪盾牌。

example: The fearless tribesmen bravely defended their land against foreign invaders.
example_cn: 無畏的部落戰士勇敢地保衛家園，抵抗外來侵略者。
pattern: The fearless tribesmen fought for + N
simple: Fearless tribesmen hunted in the dense jungle.
simple_cn: 無畏的部落戰士在茂密叢林中狩獵。

example: This semi-nomadic group moves their herds between the mountains and the valleys depending on the season.
example_cn: 這個半遊牧群體會依季節變化，在山區與山谷之間遷移他們的牲畜。
pattern: N + belongs to a semi-nomadic group
simple: They studied the lifestyle of a semi-nomadic group.
simple_cn: 他們研究了一個半游牧群體的生活方式。

type: 現在分詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: Construction workers must wear hard hats to protect themselves from falling objects.
example_cn: 建築工人必須戴安全帽，以防被掉落的物品砸傷。
simple: Signs warned of falling objects from the cliff.
simple_cn: 標誌警告懸崖有落石。

example: The human body has an amazing self-healing power when given enough rest and nutrition.
example_cn: 只要獲得足夠的休息與營養，人體擁有驚人的自癒能力。
pattern: N + possesses a strong self-healing power
simple: Some materials have a self-healing power.
simple_cn: 有些材料具有自我修復的能力。

example: The international charity provides food and medical supplies to children in the war-torn country.
example_cn: 這個國際慈善機構為戰亂國家的兒童提供食物與醫療物資。
pattern: S + flee from a war-torn country
simple: Rebuilding a war-torn country takes decades.
simple_cn: 重建一個飽受戰爭摧殘的國家需要數十年。

type: 形容詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: Foreign investors are avoiding the region due to its highly unstable political situation.
example_cn: 由於政治局勢極度不穩定，外國投資人紛紛避開這個地區。
pattern: N + is caused by the unstable political situation.
simple: The unstable political situation led to a crisis.
simple_cn: 不穩定的政治局勢導致了危機。

type: 過去分詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: The refugee camp struggles to provide basic education and shelter for thousands of displaced children.
example_cn: 難民營努力為數千名流離失所的兒童提供基本教育與住所。
simple: War leaves many displaced children.
simple_cn: 戰爭留下了許多流離失所的兒童。

example: We were too tired to cook, so we decided to order pizza for dinner.
example_cn: 我們累到不想煮飯，所以決定叫披薩當晚餐。
pattern: S + order pizza for + 哪一餐
simple: Let's order pizza tonight.
simple_cn: 我們今晚叫披薩吧。

example: He worked part-time delivering pizza to save money for his college tuition.
example_cn: 他兼差送披薩，為了存大學學費。
pattern: S + deliver pizza to + 地方/人
simple: The shop delivers pizza within 30 minutes.
simple_cn: 這家店能在30分鐘內送達披薩。

chinese: 管理辦公室、維持辦公室運作
example: It takes excellent organizational skills to run a busy office smoothly.
example_cn: 要把一間忙碌的辦公室管理得順暢，需要非常出色的組織能力。
simple: She runs the office efficiently.
simple_cn: 她把辦公室管理得很有條理。

example: The famous comedian was invited to host a late-night talk show.
example_cn: 那位知名喜劇演員受邀主持深夜談話節目。
simple: He has hosted the show for ten years.
simple_cn: 他主持這個節目已經十年了。

example: Don't forget to tag me in the photos you post on Instagram.
example_cn: 你在Instagram上傳照片時，別忘了標記我。
pattern: S + tag O + in the photos
simple: She tagged all her friends in the photo.
simple_cn: 她在照片裡標註了所有朋友。

example: The eventual cost of repairing the damaged bridge was much higher than expected.
example_cn: 修復那座受損橋樑的最終費用，比預期高出許多。
pattern: The eventual cost of + N/V-ing + is...
simple: We miscalculated the eventual cost.
simple_cn: 我們算錯了最終的成本。

example: Fans waited in line for hours to buy the band's latest releases.
example_cn: 粉絲們排隊好幾個小時，只為了買樂團的最新專輯。
pattern: S + check out / buy the latest releases
simple: The bookstore is promoting its latest releases.
simple_cn: 書店正在促銷最新出版的書。

example: For farmers, a sudden drop in temperature can spell disaster for their crops.
example_cn: 對農民來說，氣溫突然下降可能對他們的作物造成嚴重災害。
simple: The new policy could spell disaster for the company.
simple_cn: 這項新政策可能會給公司帶來大麻煩。

example: The arch design of the bridge helps to distribute stress evenly across its structure.
example_cn: 這座橋的拱形設計有助於將壓力均勻分散到整個結構。
simple: Proper shoes help distribute stress on your feet.
simple_cn: 穿對鞋子有助於分散腳部的壓力。

example: Wearing a seatbelt can significantly reduce the likelihood of serious injury in a car crash.
example_cn: 繫安全帶可以大幅降低車禍中受重傷的機率。
pattern: S + reduce the likelihood of + N
simple: Washing hands reduces the likelihood of infection.
simple_cn: 洗手可以降低感染的機率。

example: Robots are now programmed to perform complex actions that were once impossible for machines.
example_cn: 機器人現在被設計來執行過去機器無法做到的複雜動作。
simple: The software performs actions automatically.
simple_cn: 這個軟體會自動執行操作。

example: The delayed response to the natural disaster ultimately cost many lives.
example_cn: 對這場天災的延遲應對，最終導致許多人喪命。
simple: The war cost millions of lives.
simple_cn: 這場戰爭奪走了數百萬條人命。

example: Through hard work and dedication, she achieved the status of a senior partner in the law firm.
example_cn: 憑藉努力與奉獻，她成功晉升為律師事務所的資深合夥人。
pattern: S + achieve the status of + N
simple: He achieved celebrity status very quickly.
simple_cn: 他很快就成了名人。

example: In many indigenous cultures, completing a difficult challenge signifies the coming of age for young men.
example_cn: 在許多原住民文化中，完成一項艱難挑戰象徵著年輕男性成年。
pattern: N + signifies the coming of age
simple: Getting a driver's license signifies coming of age for many teens.
simple_cn: 對許多青少年來說，拿到駕照代表著長大成人。

example: The company changed its packaging materials to reduce its negative impact on the environment.
example_cn: 這家公司更換了包裝材料，以減少對環境的負面影響。
pattern: S + take steps to reduce the impact of + N
simple: We must reduce our impact on global warming.
simple_cn: 我們必須減少對全球暖化的影響。

example: Some amphibians, like salamanders, have the remarkable ability to regenerate lost organs.
example_cn: 有些兩棲動物，例如蠑螈，擁有再生失去器官的驚人能力。
pattern: S + has the ability to regenerate organs
simple: Scientists are studying how to regenerate human organs.
simple_cn: 科學家正在研究如何再生人體器官。

example: He quit his high-paying job to move to Paris and pursue his dreams of becoming an artist.
example_cn: 他辭去高薪工作，搬到巴黎追求成為藝術家的夢想。
pattern: S + encourage someone to pursue their dreams
simple: Never be afraid to pursue your dreams.
simple_cn: 永遠不要害怕去追求你的夢想。

chinese: 給予庇護 (尤指政治庇護)
example: The neighboring country decided to grant asylum to the political refugees fleeing the war.
example_cn: 鄰國決定給予逃離戰亂的政治難民庇護。
simple: He applied to the embassy to be granted asylum.
simple_cn: 他向大使館申請庇護。

example: The young actress made a successful debut in the award-winning independent film.
example_cn: 那位年輕女演員在獲獎的獨立電影中成功出道。
pattern: S + make a debut in + 年份/作品
simple: The band will make their debut next week.
simple_cn: 這個樂團下週將首次登台演出。

example: They both work in the tech industry, but the similarities end there.
example_cn: 他們兩人都從事科技業，但相似之處僅止於此。
simple: They look alike, but the similarities end there.
simple_cn: 他們長得很像，但相似之處僅此而已。

type: 名詞 + 動詞(現在分詞)
example: Spring is here, and you can see cherry blossoms blooming all over the park.
example_cn: 春天來了，整個公園都能看到櫻花盛開。
simple: The blossoms are blooming beautifully this year.
simple_cn: 今年花開得很漂亮。

example: We were driving on the highway when suddenly the car engine stopped.
example_cn: 我們正在高速公路上開車，引擎突然熄火了。
simple: The boat's engine stopped in the middle of the lake.
simple_cn: 船開到湖中央時引擎突然停了。

example: If a boat has a hole in the bottom, it will eventually fill with water and sink.
example_cn: 如果船底破了個洞，最後就會進水沉沒。
pattern: The boat sank due to + N
simple: The overloaded boat began to sink.
simple_cn: 那艘超載的船開始下沉了。

chinese: 書鎮 (以二手書店或文學活動聞名的小鎮)
example: Hay-on-Wye in Wales is famous worldwide as a historic book town.
example_cn: 威爾斯的黑昂河畔鎮，以歷史悠久的書城聞名全球。
pattern: N + is known as a famous book town.
simple: We visited a charming book town during our trip.
simple_cn: 我們旅行時去了一個很迷人的書鎮。

example: She spent the whole afternoon browsing through an independent bookshop.
example_cn: 她整個下午都泡在一間獨立書店裡翻書。
pattern: S + go to a local bookshop
simple: The bookshop sells both new and used books.
simple_cn: 這家書店新書和二手書都有賣。

example: Thousands of eager readers attended the annual book festival in the city center.
example_cn: 數千名熱情的讀者參加了市中心舉辦的年度書展。
simple: Many famous authors spoke at the book festival.
simple_cn: 很多知名作家都在書展上發表演講。

chinese: 新書發表會、讀書會演講
example: The renowned author gave a fascinating book talk at the local public library.
example_cn: 那位知名作家在當地公立圖書館舉辦了一場精彩的講座。
simple: I learned a lot from her recent book talk.
simple_cn: 我從她最近的讀書座談會學到很多。

example: Airline passengers are required to fasten their seatbelts securely during takeoff and landing.
example_cn: 飛機乘客在起飛和降落時必須確實繫好安全帶。
simple: The delay frustrated many airline passengers.
simple_cn: 航班延誤讓很多旅客很不爽。

example: In the early aviation days, flying across the ocean was considered extremely dangerous.
example_cn: 在早期航空時代，飛越大西洋被認為極度危險。
pattern: In the early aviation days, S + V
simple: Pilots in the aviation days were brave pioneers.
simple_cn: 航空時代的飛行員都是勇敢的先驅。

example: The coach watched the opponent's game videos to identify their defensive weak spots.
example_cn: 教練觀看對手的比賽影片，找出他們防守上的弱點。
simple: The fortress had a few weak spots in its walls.
simple_cn: 那座堡壘的城牆有幾個弱點。

example: Aircraft cabin pressurization allows passengers to breathe normally at extremely high altitudes.
example_cn: 飛機的艙壓系統讓乘客在極高海拔也能正常呼吸。
simple: A failure in pressurization caused the masks to drop.
simple_cn: 加壓系統故障導致氧氣面罩掉了下來。

example: A professional stunt person performed the dangerous jump from the building instead of the main actor.
example_cn: 專業的特技演員代替主角，從大樓上進行了危險的跳躍。
pattern: The stunt person did the dangerous scenes.
simple: She works as a stunt person in action movies.
simple_cn: 她在動作片裡擔任特技演員。

example: Hollywood has been the center of the global movie industry for nearly a century.
example_cn: 好萊塢將近一個世紀以來，一直是全球電影產業的中心。
pattern: S + work in the movie industry
simple: The movie industry brings in billions of dollars.
simple_cn: 電影產業每年賺進數十億美元。

example: Modern advances in stunt technology have made action movies much safer to film.
example_cn: 現代特技技術的進步，讓動作片的拍攝變得安全許多。
simple: Computer graphics and stunt technology work together.
simple_cn: 電腦特效和特技技術是相輔相成的。

example: In the ancient tribe, a young man earned his warrior status by displaying immense bravery in battle.
example_cn: 在古代部落裡，年輕男子必須在戰鬥中展現極大的勇氣，才能獲得戰士的地位。
simple: The ritual grants them warrior status.
simple_cn: 這個儀式賦予他們戰士的身份。

example: The elders of the village pass down strict tribal traditions to the younger generation.
example_cn: 村裡的長老將嚴格的部落傳統傳承給年輕一代。
simple: They celebrate their tribal traditions with a festival.
simple_cn: 他們用節慶來慶祝部落的傳統。

example: The construction workers are building a new skyscraper downtown despite the intense heat.
example_cn: 儘管天氣酷熱，建築工人仍在市中心興建一棟新的摩天大樓。
simple: Construction workers must wear safety helmets.
simple_cn: 工地工人必須戴安全帽。

example: Coal tar was historically used to pave roads and treat certain skin conditions.
example_cn: 煤焦油過去曾被用來鋪路，以及治療某些皮膚疾病。
pattern: Coal tar is used for + N
simple: Coal tar is a thick, dark liquid.
simple_cn: 煤焦油是一種又濃又黑的液體。

example: A high-quality suspension system absorbs the shock from bumpy roads to provide a smooth ride.
example_cn: 高品質的懸吊系統能吸收崎嶇路面的震動，提供平穩的乘坐體驗。
pattern: The car has a good suspension system.
simple: The suspension system protects the vehicle.
simple_cn: 懸吊系統可以保護車輛。

example: Frontline medical workers wore face shields and masks for extra protection against the virus.
example_cn: 前線醫護人員戴上防護面罩和口罩，加強對病毒的防護。
simple: Face shields prevent liquid from splashing into the eyes.
simple_cn: 面罩可以防止液體噴到眼睛裡。

example: The unique zebrafish stripes make it easily recognizable and popular in biology labs.
example_cn: 斑馬魚獨特的條紋讓牠們很容易辨認，在生物實驗室裡很受歡迎。
pattern: The zebrafish stripes form a pattern.
simple: Scientists study the genetics of zebrafish stripes.
simple_cn: 科學家研究斑馬魚條紋的遺傳機制。

example: Scientists are studying certain fish to better understand the biological secrets of heart regeneration.
example_cn: 科學家正在研究某些魚類，以更深入了解心臟再生的生物奧秘。
simple: Heart regeneration is a major goal in modern medicine.
simple_cn: 心臟再生是現代醫學的一個重要目標。

chinese: 化學傳導物質 (如荷爾蒙)
example: Hormones act as chemical messengers that travel through the blood to coordinate complex body functions.
example_cn: 荷爾蒙就像化學信使，透過血液傳遞，協調身體的複雜功能。
pattern: N + serves as a chemical messenger.
simple: Dopamine is an important chemical messenger in the brain.
simple_cn: 多巴胺是大腦中一種重要的化學傳遞物質。

example: Extensive clinical human trials are strictly required before any new drug is approved for sale.
example_cn: 任何新藥要核准上市前，都必須嚴格進行大規模的人體臨床試驗。
pattern: S + conduct human trials for + N
simple: The vaccine has successfully passed human trials.
simple_cn: 這款疫苗已經成功通過人體試驗。

example: The Olympic team proudly included several refugee athletes who had fled their war-torn home countries.
example_cn: 奧運代表隊驕傲地納入了幾位逃離戰亂家園的難民運動員。
pattern: Refugee athletes competed in the games.
simple: The story of the refugee athletes inspired many.
simple_cn: 難民運動員的故事激勵了許多人。

example: The country's economy was completely destroyed after enduring a brutal decade-long civil war.
example_cn: 這個國家的經濟在經歷長達十年的殘酷內戰後，徹底被摧毀。
pattern: S + suffered from a civil war
simple: The civil war forced many to leave their homes.
simple_cn: 內戰迫使許多人離開家園。

example: Top athletes from all over the world gather every four years to compete in the Olympic Games.
example_cn: 來自世界各地的頂尖運動員每四年齊聚一堂，參加奧運比賽。
pattern: S + participate in the Olympic Games
simple: Hosting the Olympic Games is a huge honor.
simple_cn: 主辦奧運會是一項極大的榮譽。

example: The package was successfully delivered to the wrong address by mistake.
example_cn: 那個包裹不小心被誤送到錯誤的地址，而且還成功送達了。
pattern: S + be delivered to + 地點/人
simple: Your order will be delivered to your home.
simple_cn: 您的訂單將會送到您家。

example: He has a very easygoing personality, so he gets along with everyone in the office.
example_cn: 他個性非常隨和，所以跟辦公室裡的每個人都處得很好。
simple: I don't get along with my new roommate.
simple_cn: 我跟新室友合不來。

example: On a clear night, thousands of stars are easily visible to the naked eye.
example_cn: 在晴朗的夜晚，用肉眼就能清楚看到成千上萬顆星星。
simple: The comet will be visible to observers tomorrow.
simple_cn: 這顆彗星明天觀測者可以看得到。

chinese: 如雨後春筍般出現、湧現
example: New coffee shops are springing up all over the city to attract young customers.
example_cn: 新的咖啡店如雨後春筍般在城裡到處開張，吸引年輕顧客。
simple: Many tech companies sprang up in this area.
simple_cn: 這個地區冒出了很多科技公司。

example: The ancient wooden ship finally broke apart after hitting the sharp rocks.
example_cn: 這艘古老的木船在撞上尖銳的岩石後，終於解體了。
simple: The cookie was so fragile that it broke apart.
simple_cn: 這塊餅乾太脆了，一碰就碎。

example: Outdoor events are always subject to changes depending on the weather conditions.
example_cn: 戶外活動總是會根據天氣狀況而有所變動。
simple: Flight schedules are subject to change.
simple_cn: 航班時刻表可能會變動。

example: The company invited a group of teenagers to try out their newly developed video game.
example_cn: 這家公司邀請了一群青少年來試玩他們最新開發的電玩遊戲。
simple: I want to try out this new recipe.
simple_cn: 我想試試這個新食譜。

example: Due to severe climate change, many species of coral reefs are rapidly dying off.
example_cn: 由於嚴重的氣候變遷，許多珊瑚礁物種正在快速死亡。
simple: The older traditions are slowly dying off.
simple_cn: 那些古老的傳統正在慢慢消失。

example: We spent the whole afternoon wandering in the museum, admiring the ancient artifacts.
example_cn: 我們整個下午都在博物館裡閒逛，欣賞那些古老的文物。
pattern: S + spend time wandering in + 地方
simple: She was found wandering in the park.
simple_cn: 她被發現在公園裡遊蕩。

example: The lost child was seen wandering alone on the busy streets at midnight.
example_cn: 那個走失的小孩在午夜時分被看到獨自在熱鬧的街上遊蕩。
simple: He likes wandering alone in the forest.
simple_cn: 他喜歡獨自在森林裡漫步。

example: The clever magician is famous for escaping from a locked box underwater.
example_cn: 這位聰明的魔術師以在水下逃脫上鎖的箱子而聞名。
pattern: S + succeed in escaping from + N
simple: They are escaping from the burning building.
simple_cn: 他們正從失火的建築物中逃出來。

example: It usually takes a few weeks for college freshmen to completely settle in.
example_cn: 大學新鮮人通常需要幾個星期的時間才能完全安頓下來。
pattern: It takes time for S to settle in.
simple: Have you settled in your new apartment?
simple_cn: 你已經在新公寓安頓好了嗎？

example: Before boarding a boat, passengers must show their tickets and passports to the staff.
example_cn: 乘客在上船之前，必須向工作人員出示他們的票和護照。
simple: They are boarding a boat to the island.
simple_cn: 他們正在登船前往那座島嶼。

example: Eating this specific type of wild mushroom can be potentially fatal to humans.
example_cn: 吃這種特定品種的野生蘑菇，對人類來說可能會有致命風險。
simple: The disease is potentially fatal if untreated.
simple_cn: 這種疾病如果不及時治療，可能會有生命危險。

chinese: 神秘地打破 / 離奇故障
example: The antique mirror mysteriously broke into pieces in the middle of the night.
example_cn: 那面古董鏡子在半夜神秘地碎成了好幾片。
simple: The machine mysteriously broke down.
simple_cn: 那台機器莫名其妙地故障了。

chinese: 均勻分佈 / 平均分配
example: You should evenly distribute your weight when walking on thin ice to avoid falling through.
example_cn: 在薄冰上行走時，你應該均勻分散體重，才不會掉下去。
simple: The teacher evenly distributed the tasks.
simple_cn: 老師把任務平均分配下去。

example: In the movie, the brave hero managed to single-handedly kill the giant dragon.
example_cn: 電影裡，那位勇敢的英雄獨自一人成功殺死了巨龍。
simple: The warrior single-handedly killed the beast.
simple_cn: 那個戰士單槍匹馬殺死了那隻野獸。

example: Other than a few minor spelling mistakes, your essay is exceptionally well-written.
example_cn: 除了幾個小拼寫錯誤之外，你的文章寫得特別好。
simple: She has no hobbies other than reading.
simple_cn: 她除了閱讀之外沒有其他嗜好。

example: Mutual trust and respect form the solid basis for a healthy and long-lasting relationship.
example_cn: 互相信任與尊重，是健康長久關係的穩固基礎。
pattern: N + is the basis for + N
simple: This evidence provides a basis for the theory.
simple_cn: 這項證據為這個理論提供了基礎。

chinese: 被歸功於... / 被認為是...的發明者
type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: Thomas Edison is universally credited with inventing the practical incandescent light bulb.
example_cn: 湯瑪斯·愛迪生普遍被認為是實用白熾燈泡的發明者。
simple: He is credited with saving the company.
simple_cn: 他被認為是拯救公司的功臣。

example: Due to the health trend, there is a growing demand for organic food in supermarkets.
example_cn: 受到健康趨勢影響，超市裡有機食品的需求越來越高。
pattern: There is a demand for + N
simple: The demand for smartphones is high.
simple_cn: 智慧型手機的需求量很高。

example: Taiwan is world-famous for its diverse and delicious night market street food.
example_cn: 台灣以其多元美味的夜市小吃聞名全球。
simple: Paris is famous for the Eiffel Tower.
simple_cn: 巴黎以艾菲爾鐵塔聞名。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: This specific brand of sports shoes is highly favored among professional athletes.
example_cn: 這個特定品牌的運動鞋深受職業運動員喜愛。
pattern: N + is favored among + 群體
simple: The novel is favored among teenagers.
simple_cn: 這本小說很受青少年喜愛。

example: They are planning a graduation trip to Japan to celebrate the end of high school.
example_cn: 他們正在規劃一趟日本畢業旅行，慶祝高中結束。
pattern: S + go on a graduation trip to + 地點
simple: We went on a graduation trip to Kenting.
simple_cn: 我們去墾丁畢業旅行。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: She studied incredibly hard and got a nearly perfect score on the final exam.
example_cn: 她讀書超級認真，期末考拿到了近乎滿分的成績。
pattern: S + get a nearly perfect score on + 考試
simple: He achieved a nearly perfect score.
simple_cn: 他拿到了幾乎滿分的成績。

type: 形容詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: The global financial crisis of 2008 severely affected economies worldwide.
example_cn: 2008年的全球金融危機嚴重影響了世界各國的經濟。
pattern: S + suffer from the global financial crisis
simple: The company survived the global financial crisis.
simple_cn: 這家公司挺過了全球金融危機。

type: 形容詞(最高級) + 名詞
example: The stock market experienced its largest drop in history due to the sudden panic.
example_cn: 由於突然的恐慌，股市經歷了史上最大跌幅。
simple: There was a largest drop in temperature yesterday.
simple_cn: 昨天氣溫降幅最大。

example: There is currently no solid scientific evidence to support this controversial claim.
example_cn: 目前沒有確切的科學證據支持這個有爭議的說法。
pattern: S + provide scientific evidence for + N
simple: We need scientific evidence to prove the theory.
simple_cn: 我們需要科學證據來證明這個理論。

example: In spring, dresses decorated with bright floral patterns are very popular.
example_cn: 春天時，裝飾著鮮豔花卉圖案的洋裝非常受歡迎。
pattern: N + is decorated with floral patterns
simple: She wore a skirt with floral patterns.
simple_cn: 她穿了一條有花卉圖案的裙子。
