example: The cross and the crescent are well-known religious symbols around the world.
example_cn: 十字架和新月符號是世界知名的宗教象徵。
simple: Many paintings contain hidden religious symbols.
simple_cn: 許多畫作都隱藏著宗教符號。

example: Kids love putting temporary tattoos on their arms during the summer festival.
example_cn: 小朋友們很喜歡在夏日祭典時，在手臂上貼暫時性刺青。
pattern: S + put a temporary tattoo on + 身體部位
simple: A temporary tattoo usually fades in a week.
simple_cn: 暫時性刺青通常一週內就會褪色。

example: Farmers often use natural chemicals to protect their crops from various plant diseases.
example_cn: 農民經常用天然化學物質來保護作物，避免各種植物病害。
simple: The research focuses on curing plant diseases.
simple_cn: 這項研究專注於治療植物疾病。

example: There are several scientific reasons why getting enough sleep is crucial for the brain.
example_cn: 有幾個科學原因說明，為什麼充足的睡眠對大腦至關重要。
pattern: There are scientific reasons for + N
simple: He explained the scientific reasons behind the phenomenon.
simple_cn: 他解釋了這個現象背後的科學原因。

chinese: 節後不滿情緒、節後症候群
example: Many workers experience a strong sense of post-holiday discontent when returning to the office.
example_cn: 許多上班族回到辦公室時，會感受到強烈的收假症候群。
simple: Post-holiday discontent is very common among students.
simple_cn: 收假症候群在學生中非常常見。

example: The rare illness is caused by a genetic flaw inherited from the parents.
example_cn: 這種罕見疾病是由遺傳自父母的基因缺陷所引起的。
pattern: N + is caused by a genetic flaw
simple: Scientists are trying to fix the genetic flaw.
simple_cn: 科學家正在嘗試修復這個基因缺陷。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: Her bright blue eyes are an inherited feature from her grandfather.
example_cn: 她那雙明亮的藍眼睛是從她爺爺那裡遺傳來的。
simple: Baldness can be an inherited feature.
simple_cn: 禿頭有可能是遺傳的。

example: Your blood type is a permanent trait that will not change throughout your life.
example_cn: 你的血型是終身不變的永久特徵。
simple: Personality is not always a permanent trait.
simple_cn: 個性不一定是永遠不變的特質。

example: Most children naturally lose their baby fat as they grow up and become taller.
example_cn: 大部分小孩長大長高之後，嬰兒肥自然就會消掉。
simple: She still has a little bit of baby fat on her cheeks.
simple_cn: 她臉頰上還帶點嬰兒肥。

type: 形容詞 + 名詞 + 名詞
example: Surfing and skateboarding are essential parts of the laid-back Californian beach culture.
example_cn: 衝浪和滑板是加州悠閒海灘文化不可或缺的一部分。
pattern: N + is a symbol of Californian beach culture.
simple: The movie captures the Californian beach culture perfectly.
simple_cn: 這部電影完美捕捉了加州的沙灘文化。

example: A dark suit and a tie are typically required for men attending formal occasions.
example_cn: 參加正式場合時，男性通常需要穿深色西裝並打領帶。
pattern: S + wear N for formal occasions
simple: She bought a beautiful dress for formal occasions.
simple_cn: 她買了一件很漂亮的洋裝，適合正式場合穿。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: Fixing a modern car engine requires highly specialized knowledge and the right tools.
example_cn: 修理現代汽車引擎需要非常專業的知識和合適的工具。
simple: The job demands specialized knowledge in biology.
simple_cn: 這份工作需要具備生物學的專業知識。

type: 形容詞 + 名詞 + 名詞
example: Large cargo ships can only navigate safely through deep water channels to reach the port.
example_cn: 大型貨輪只能經由深水航道安全航行才能抵達港口。
pattern: Ships travel through deep water channels.
simple: The city dredged deep water channels for trade.
simple_cn: 這座城市為了貿易而疏濬了深水航道。

type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The small boat was slowly carried out to the open sea by the strong outgoing tide.
example_cn: 那艘小船被強勁的退潮慢慢帶往外海。
pattern: S + be swept away by the outgoing tide
simple: It is dangerous to swim during an outgoing tide.
simple_cn: 退潮時游泳很危險。

example: The spicy soup left a burning, peppery sensation in my mouth for several minutes.
example_cn: 那碗辣湯讓我的嘴巴持續好幾分鐘都有一股火辣辣的胡椒感。
simple: I love the peppery sensation of this sauce.
simple_cn: 我超愛這個醬料的辣味口感。

example: Olive oil is an excellent choice for all-purpose cooking, from frying to making salads.
example_cn: 橄欖油是從煎炒到做沙拉都很好用的萬用烹調油。
pattern: N + is good for all-purpose cooking.
simple: This pan is designed for all-purpose cooking.
simple_cn: 這個鍋子是設計來做多用途料理的。

example: The author used vivid descriptive terms to paint a beautiful picture in the reader's mind.
example_cn: 作者用了生動的描述詞彙，在讀者腦中描繪出一幅美麗的畫面。
pattern: S + use descriptive terms to + V
simple: Please use more descriptive terms in your essay.
simple_cn: 請在你的文章裡多用一些描述性的詞彙。

example: Heavy snow severely disrupted train services across the entire country yesterday.
example_cn: 昨天的大雪嚴重打亂了全國的火車運輸服務。
pattern: Train services were suspended due to + N
simple: The city plans to improve its train services.
simple_cn: 這座城市計畫要改善它的火車服務。

example: The science teacher sprinkled iron filings on a piece of paper to show the magnetic field.
example_cn: 自然老師在紙上撒了些鐵粉，用來顯示磁場。
pattern: S + use iron filings to + V
simple: The magnet attracted the iron filings.
simple_cn: 磁鐵吸住了鐵屑。

example: The machine makes a loud warning noise whenever the engine starts to overheat.
example_cn: 每當引擎開始過熱時，這台機器就會發出很大的警告聲。
simple: I heard a warning noise from the dashboard.
simple_cn: 我聽到儀表板傳來警示聲。

example: Many teenagers start smoking or drinking simply because they give in to peer pressure.
example_cn: 很多青少年開始抽菸或喝酒，只是因為屈服於同儕壓力。
pattern: S + give in to / resist peer pressure
simple: Peer pressure can have a negative impact on youth.
simple_cn: 同儕壓力對青少年可能會有負面影響。

example: After carefully analyzing the experimental data, the scientists reached a conclusion.
example_cn: 仔細分析實驗數據之後，科學家們得出了結論。
pattern: S + reach a conclusion that + 子句
simple: The jury reached a conclusion quickly.
simple_cn: 陪審團很快就做出了結論。

example: Her brilliant presentation and deep knowledge never failed to amaze her teacher.
example_cn: 她出色的簡報和深厚的知識，總是讓她的老師驚嘆不已。
pattern: N + never fails to amaze + 人
simple: His progress amazed the teacher.
simple_cn: 他的進步讓老師很驚訝。

example: You need to study consistently if you want to pass the final exam with flying colors.
example_cn: 如果你想高分通過期末考，就需要持續穩定地讀書。
simple: She passed the driving exam on her first try.
simple_cn: 她第一次考駕照就通過了。

example: The technician carefully inspected the vacuum cleaner to figure out why it lost suction.
example_cn: 技術人員仔細檢查了吸塵器，想找出它吸力變弱的原因。
simple: Please inspect the vacuum cleaner before using it.
simple_cn: 使用吸塵器之前請先檢查一下。

example: Instead of throwing it away, he decided to buy some parts and repair the vacuum cleaner himself.
example_cn: 他沒有把吸塵器丟掉，反而決定買些零件自己動手修理。
simple: It costs too much to repair the vacuum cleaner.
simple_cn: 修理這台吸塵器的費用太高了。

chinese: 背誦詩歌 / 朗誦詩歌
example: In the literature class, students were asked to memorize and recite poems by Shakespeare.
example_cn: 在文學課上，老師要求學生背誦並記住莎士比亞的詩作。
pattern: S + recite poems in front of + 人
simple: She recited a beautiful poem.
simple_cn: 她朗誦了一首很美的詩。

example: The suspect couldn't offer any solid proof to support his alibi for the night of the robbery.
example_cn: 嫌犯無法提供任何確鑿證據來支持他在搶案當晚的不在場證明。
simple: You must offer proof of your identity.
simple_cn: 你必須出示身分證明。

example: The manager's clear and confident explanation erased all our doubts about the new project.
example_cn: 經理清楚且自信的說明，消除了我們對新專案的所有疑慮。
simple: The success erased any doubts about his ability.
simple_cn: 這次成功消除了對他能力的任何懷疑。

example: The pandemic highlighted the importance of having a strong public health system.
example_cn: 這場疫情凸顯了健全公共衛生體系的重要性。
pattern: S + highlight the importance of + N/V-ing
simple: He highlighted the importance of teamwork.
simple_cn: 他強調了團隊合作的重要性。

example: Mosquitoes are known to spread dangerous diseases such as malaria and dengue fever.
example_cn: 蚊子已知會傳播瘧疾和登革熱等危險疾病。
simple: Poor hygiene can spread diseases.
simple_cn: 衛生習慣不好會傳播疾病。

example: Positive feedback from parents helps children build a healthy and confident self-image.
example_cn: 家長的正面回饋有助於孩子建立健康且有自信的自我形象。
pattern: S + help O + build a positive self-image
simple: Therapy helped him build a better self-image.
simple_cn: 治療幫助他建立了更好的自我形象。

chinese: 發展出方程式 / 推導出等式
example: The mathematician worked for years to develop an equation that describes the motion of fluids.
example_cn: 這位數學家花了多年時間，推導出一個描述流體運動的方程式。
pattern: S + develop an equation for + N
simple: Scientists developed an equation to calculate the distance.
simple_cn: 科學家推導出一個公式來計算距離。

example: The sudden death of the beloved actor caused great sadness among his fans worldwide.
example_cn: 這位深受愛戴的演員突然過世，讓全球粉絲感到無比悲痛。
simple: The tragedy caused sadness across the country.
simple_cn: 這場悲劇讓全國上下都感到哀傷。

example: Children often inherit a physical trait, such as eye color or hair type, from their parents.
example_cn: 孩子們常會從父母那裡遺傳到某些身體特徵，例如眼睛顏色或髮質。
pattern: S + inherit a trait from + 人
simple: He inherited a personality trait from his father.
simple_cn: 他從他爸爸那裡遺傳到一種性格特質。

example: The researchers applied a new method to extract pure water from the salty ocean.
example_cn: 研究人員應用一種新方法，從鹹鹹的海水中萃取出純水。
pattern: S + apply a method to + V
simple: Teachers applied a different teaching method.
simple_cn: 老師們採用了不同的教學方法。

example: After the devastating war, it took the nation over two decades to fully rebuild its economy.
example_cn: 歷經這場毀滅性的戰爭後，這個國家花了超過二十年才完全重建經濟。
pattern: S + try to rebuild the economy
simple: The president promised to rebuild the economy.
simple_cn: 總統承諾要重建經濟。

example: The factory uses automated machines to mass-produce footwear for international brands.
example_cn: 這間工廠使用自動化機器，為國際品牌大量生產鞋類產品。
simple: They mass-produce footwear cheaply in that country.
simple_cn: 他們在那個國家大量生產便宜的鞋類。

chinese: 引發質疑 / 惹起問題
example: The politician's controversial remarks on social media provoked many questions from the public.
example_cn: 這位政治人物在社群媒體上的爭議言論，引發了公眾的諸多質疑。
simple: The strange event provoked many questions.
simple_cn: 那件怪事引發了許多疑問。

example: The captain decided to anchor the ship in the calm bay to avoid the approaching storm.
example_cn: 船長決定將船停泊在平靜的海灣，以避開即將來襲的暴風雨。
simple: They anchored the ship near the island.
simple_cn: 他們把船停泊在島嶼附近。

example: Successful investors know how to properly manage risk when buying stocks.
example_cn: 成功的投資者懂得在買股票時妥善管理風險。
simple: Managing risk is important in business.
simple_cn: 在商業中，風險管理很重要。

example: The traditional process of making olive oil involves crushing olives with heavy stone wheels.
example_cn: 傳統的橄欖油製作過程，包括用沉重的石輪碾碎橄欖。
pattern: S + crush olives to make oil
simple: They crush olives shortly after harvesting.
simple_cn: 他們在採收橄欖後不久就進行壓榨。

example: High-quality extra virgin olive oil often exhibits a pleasant fruitiness in its flavor.
example_cn: 高品質的特級初榨橄欖油，嚐起來通常帶有宜人的水果風味。
simple: The wine exhibits a strong fruitiness.
simple_cn: 這款葡萄酒帶有濃郁的果香。

example: The skilled chef uses a secret blend of herbs to create a unique flavor for the soup.
example_cn: 這位技藝精湛的廚師使用祕製香料配方，為湯品創造出獨特的風味。
pattern: S + use spices to create flavor
simple: Baking the ingredients helps create flavor.
simple_cn: 烘烤食材有助於創造風味。

example: The two countries signed an agreement to eliminate tariffs and promote international trade.
example_cn: 兩國簽署了一項協議，旨在取消關稅並促進國際貿易。
pattern: S + take actions to promote trade
simple: The new policy will promote trade in the region.
simple_cn: 這項新政策將促進該地區的貿易。

example: In Japan, wild bears sometimes lick train rails to consume the iron filings left behind.
example_cn: 在日本，野生熊有時會舔火車鐵軌，以攝取殘留的鐵屑。
simple: The deer were seen licking rails.
simple_cn: 有人看到那些鹿在舔鐵軌。

example: The guard dog barked loudly to alert others of the approaching danger.
example_cn: 看門狗大聲吠叫，提醒大家有危險正在靠近。
simple: He shouted to alert others.
simple_cn: 他大聲喊叫來提醒其他人。

example: Animals have highly developed senses that allow them to perceive danger before humans do.
example_cn: 動物的感官非常敏銳，能比人類更早察覺到危險。
simple: The bird perceived danger and flew away.
simple_cn: 那隻鳥察覺到危險就飛走了。

example: The faulty car alarm continued to blare loud noises throughout the night.
example_cn: 那台故障的汽車警報器整晚不斷發出刺耳的噪音。
simple: A siren blared noises warning of the fire.
simple_cn: 警報器發出刺耳的聲音，警告有火災。

example: He often goes out of his way and spends too much money just to please his friends.
example_cn: 他常常為了討好朋友，不惜大費周章又花大錢。
pattern: S + try hard to please friends
simple: She always tries to please her friends.
simple_cn: 她總是試著討好她的朋友。

example: Even in the most difficult times, an honest person will continue to stick to their principles.
example_cn: 就算在最困難的時候，誠實的人還是會堅守自己的原則。
simple: He chose to resign rather than not stick to his principles.
simple_cn: 他選擇辭職，而不是違背自己的原則。

example: Due to the global economic slowdown, the country's agricultural exports dropped significantly.
example_cn: 受到全球經濟放緩的影響，這個國家的農產品出口大幅下滑。
simple: National exports dropped by 10% this year.
simple_cn: 今年全國出口量下降了10%。

type: 名詞 + 動詞(被動/過去分詞)
example: A massive amount of energy is released during the chemical reaction.
example_cn: 化學反應的過程中會釋放出大量的能量。
simple: Energy released from the sun reaches the earth.
simple_cn: 太陽釋放的能量抵達地球。

example: With a healthy diet and regular exercise, excess body fat goes away gradually.
example_cn: 只要飲食健康、規律運動，多餘的體脂肪就會慢慢消失。
simple: He hopes his belly fat goes away soon.
simple_cn: 他希望自己的肚子肉趕快消掉。

example: For some children, their adorable cheek dimples fade as they grow into adults.
example_cn: 有些小孩可愛的酒窩，長大成人後就會漸漸消失。
simple: Her childhood dimples faded completely.
simple_cn: 她小時候的酒窩完全消失了。

chinese: 洋流改變 / 水流改變
example: When ocean currents change directions, it can drastically affect the local climate.
example_cn: 當洋流改變方向時，可能會對當地氣候造成劇烈影響。
simple: The weather became unpredictable after the currents changed.
simple_cn: 洋流改變後，天氣變得難以預測。

example: The captain adjusted the sails as the wind altered its course suddenly.
example_cn: 船長在風向突然改變時，立刻調整了船帆。
simple: The temperature drops when the wind alters.
simple_cn: 風向一變，溫度就跟著下降。

example: Olive oil spoils quickly if it is constantly exposed to heat and direct sunlight.
example_cn: 橄欖油如果一直暴露在高溫和陽光直射下，很快就會變質。
simple: Cooking oil spoils when kept too long.
simple_cn: 食用油放太久會變質。

example: Dangerous radioactive particles leaked from the damaged nuclear reactor into the air.
example_cn: 受損的核反應爐洩漏出危險的放射性粒子，飄散到空氣中。
simple: Dust particles leak through the tiny cracks.
simple_cn: 灰塵粒子會從細小的裂縫中滲出來。

example: The university professor published a groundbreaking paper on quantum physics.
example_cn: 那位大學教授發表了一篇關於量子物理的開創性論文。
simple: He is a respected professor at the university.
simple_cn: 他是大學裡一位受人尊敬的教授。

example: It took me three days to figure out how to pass the most difficult candy level in the mobile game.
example_cn: 我花了三天才搞懂要怎麼通過手機遊戲裡最難的那個糖果關卡。
pattern: S + pass a difficult candy level
simple: She is currently stuck on a high candy level.
simple_cn: 她目前卡在糖果遊戲的高難度關卡。

example: He practiced every day after class in order to make the school basketball team.
example_cn: 他為了加入學校籃球隊，每天下課後都努力練習。
pattern: S + join/make the school basketball team
simple: The school basketball team won the championship.
simple_cn: 學校籃球隊贏得了冠軍。

example: The brave police officer rescued the trapped family from the burning building.
example_cn: 那位勇敢的警察從失火的建築物裡救出了受困的一家人。
simple: She wants to become a police officer.
simple_cn: 她想成為一名警察。

example: The hospital offers free psychological counseling to help cancer patients cope with their emotional stress.
example_cn: 這家醫院提供免費的心理諮商，幫助癌症患者應對情緒壓力。
pattern: S + provide care for a cancer patient
simple: The charity supports cancer patients.
simple_cn: 這個慈善機構支援癌症病患。

example: The severe drought destroyed thousands of young wheat plants in the region.
example_cn: 嚴重的乾旱摧毀了當地好幾千株的麥苗。
simple: The storm damaged the wheat plants.
simple_cn: 暴風雨損害了小麥植株。

example: Leaf rust is a highly infectious fungal disease that can severely reduce crop yields.
example_cn: 葉鏽病是一種傳染力很強的真菌病害，會嚴重降低農作物產量。
simple: Researchers are finding ways to prevent leaf rust.
simple_cn: 研究人員正在尋找預防葉鏽病的方法。

chinese: 樂隊花車、跟風 / 潮流
example: When the new smartphone became popular, many consumers jumped on the bandwagon and bought one too.
example_cn: 新款智慧型手機一流行起來，很多消費者就跟風買了一支。
simple: Politicians often jump on the environmental bandwagon.
simple_cn: 政治人物常常跟風環保議題。

example: A dedicated research team spent three years investigating the side effects of the new drug.
example_cn: 一個專注的研究團隊花了三年時間調查新藥的副作用。
simple: She leads a medical research team.
simple_cn: 她帶領一個醫學研究團隊。

example: Maintaining a healthy body weight is crucial for preventing heart diseases.
example_cn: 維持健康的體重對預防心臟病來說非常重要。
simple: Exercise helps you manage your body weight.
simple_cn: 運動有助於你控制體重。

example: Instead of burning rice straw, local farmers now recycle it to make eco-friendly packaging.
example_cn: 當地農民現在不再燃燒稻草，而是回收做成環保包裝。
pattern: S + use rice straw to + V
simple: Rice straw can be used to feed animals.
simple_cn: 稻草可以用來餵養動物。

example: During the war, the country's national rubber reserves were almost completely depleted.
example_cn: 戰爭期間，該國的國家橡膠儲備幾乎完全耗盡。
simple: The factory has sufficient rubber reserves.
simple_cn: 這家工廠有足夠的橡膠庫存。

example: Surfing, playing volleyball, and sunbathing are core parts of the local beach culture.
example_cn: 衝浪、打排球和曬太陽是當地海灘文化的核心部分。
simple: Australia is famous for its vibrant beach culture.
simple_cn: 澳洲以充滿活力的海灘文化聞名。

example: The clever detective found a clear shoe outline left in the mud at the crime scene.
example_cn: 聰明的偵探在犯罪現場的泥巴裡發現了一個清楚的鞋印。
simple: The police matched the shoe outline to the suspect's boots.
simple_cn: 警方比對鞋印輪廓，發現與嫌疑人的靴子相符。

example: The ancient Silk Road was a vital trade route connecting the East and the West.
example_cn: 古絲綢之路是連接東西方的重要貿易路線。
pattern: S + establish a new trade route
simple: Pirates often attacked ships along the trade route.
simple_cn: 海盜經常沿著貿易路線攻擊船隻。

example: Hundreds of fishing boats returned to the safety of the harbor before the severe storm hit.
example_cn: 在強烈暴風雨來襲前，數百艘漁船安全返回港灣避難。
pattern: The ship sailed into the harbor.
simple: It is a natural deep-water harbor.
simple_cn: 這是一個天然的深水港。

example: Special submarines are used to explore the deepest parts of the ocean seabed.
example_cn: 特殊潛水艇被用來探索海底最深處。
simple: The shipwreck rests on the sandy seabed.
simple_cn: 沉船靜靜地躺在沙質海床上。

example: Effective risk management is absolutely essential for running a successful modern business.
example_cn: 有效的風險管理對經營成功的現代企業來說絕對是必要的。
simple: Risk management helps minimize financial losses.
simple_cn: 風險管理有助於將財務損失降到最低。

example: The experienced marine pilot safely guided the huge cargo ship into the narrow port.
example_cn: 經驗豐富的領港員安全地引導那艘巨大的貨輪進入狹窄的港口。
simple: Becoming a marine pilot requires years of training.
simple_cn: 要成為領港員需要多年的訓練。

chinese: 酸度率 / 酸鹼值比例
example: Scientists measured the acidity rate of the ocean water to study the causes of coral bleaching.
example_cn: 科學家測量海水的酸度，以研究珊瑚白化的原因。
simple: A high acidity rate can be harmful to fish.
simple_cn: 酸度過高可能對魚類有害。

example: Extra virgin olive oil is considered a key and healthy ingredient in the Mediterranean diet.
example_cn: 特級初榨橄欖油被視為地中海飲食中關鍵且健康的食材。
simple: Drizzle some olive oil over the salad.
simple_cn: 在沙拉上淋一些橄欖油。

example: An expert tasting panel was invited to evaluate the quality and flavor of the new wine.
example_cn: 一個專業的品酒小組受邀評估新酒的品質與風味。
simple: The food was approved by the tasting panel.
simple_cn: 這項食物已經通過試吃小組的審核。

example: Adding artificial preservatives can significantly extend the shelf life of packaged foods.
example_cn: 添加人工防腐劑可以顯著延長包裝食品的保存期限。
pattern: N + has a long/short shelf life
simple: Milk has a very short shelf life.
simple_cn: 牛奶的保存期限非常短。

example: It is generally recommended to store leftover food in an airtight plastic container in the fridge.
example_cn: 一般建議將剩菜剩飯用密封塑膠容器裝好，放在冰箱裡保存。
pattern: S + put N in a plastic container
simple: Avoid heating food in a plastic container.
simple_cn: 避免用塑膠容器加熱食物。

example: The government plans to build several new high-speed railway lines to connect rural towns.
example_cn: 政府計劃興建幾條新的高速鐵路路線，以連接鄉鎮地區。
simple: The storm damaged the main railway lines.
simple_cn: 暴風雨損壞了主要的鐵路線。

example: The transport ministry recently announced new safety regulations for all commercial flights.
example_cn: 交通部最近宣布了所有商業航班的新安全規定。
pattern: The transport ministry decided to + V
simple: He works for the transport ministry.
simple_cn: 他在交通部工作。

example: There has been a rare deer sighting near the edge of the suburban forest last week.
example_cn: 上週在郊區森林邊緣附近，有人罕見地目擊到一頭鹿。
simple: Deer sightings are common in this park during autumn.
simple_cn: 秋天在這個公園裡經常可以看到鹿。

type: 動詞 + 副詞 + 介系詞
example: The defective product was sent back to the manufacturer for a full refund.
example_cn: 那個瑕疵品已經退回製造商，並獲得全額退款。
pattern: S + send + O + back to + N
simple: He sent the dish back to the kitchen.
simple_cn: 他把那道菜退回廚房。

example: It is not polite to laugh at other people's mistakes or misfortunes.
example_cn: 嘲笑別人的錯誤或不幸是很不禮貌的行為。
simple: They laughed at his silly joke.
simple_cn: 他們笑他那個很蠢的笑話。

type: 動詞 + 副詞 + 介系詞
example: After the long holiday, it is always hard to go back to our normal routine.
example_cn: 長假結束後，要恢復正常作息總是很困難。
simple: I want to go back to sleep.
simple_cn: 我想回去繼續睡。

example: Many elderly people suffer from severe joint pain during the cold winter months.
example_cn: 很多老年人在寒冷的冬季都會飽受嚴重的關節疼痛之苦。
simple: She suffers from seasonal allergies.
simple_cn: 她有季節性過敏的困擾。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: More than fifty volunteers were actively involved in the beach cleanup event.
example_cn: 超過五十名志工積極參與了這次的海灘淨灘活動。
simple: He was involved in a traffic accident.
simple_cn: 他出了車禍。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: The patient was infected with a highly contagious virus and had to be isolated.
example_cn: 那名患者感染了高度傳染性的病毒，必須被隔離。
simple: The computer was infected with malware.
simple_cn: 那台電腦中了惡意軟體。

example: You shouldn't jump into conclusions before hearing all the facts from both sides.
example_cn: 在聽取雙方完整的事實之前，你不應該急著下結論。
simple: She jumped into the pool to cool off.
simple_cn: 她跳進游泳池消暑。

example: Please feel free to reach out to me if you have any further questions about the project.
example_cn: 如果你對這個專案還有任何問題，請隨時與我聯繫。
simple: The charity reaches out to homeless people.
simple_cn: 這個慈善機構會去關懷街友。

example: When the boss offered him a position in New York, he immediately jumped on the opportunity.
example_cn: 當老闆提供他一個紐約的職位時，他立刻把握住了這個機會。
simple: The cat jumped on the mouse.
simple_cn: 那隻貓撲向老鼠。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: Mother Teresa lived a life entirely devoted to helping the poor and the sick.
example_cn: 德蕾莎修女一生都奉獻於幫助窮人和病患。
simple: This museum is devoted to modern art.
simple_cn: 這間博物館專門展示現代藝術。

example: The company designed the new smartphone to appeal to younger consumers.
example_cn: 這家公司設計這款新智慧型手機，是為了吸引年輕消費者。
simple: The idea doesn't appeal to me at all.
simple_cn: 我對這個想法完全沒興趣。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: There are many severe health risks associated with smoking and heavy drinking.
example_cn: 吸菸和酗酒會帶來許多嚴重的健康風險。
simple: Dark clouds are usually associated with rain.
simple_cn: 烏雲通常跟下雨有關。

example: The missing painting is assumed to be stolen by an organized crime group.
example_cn: 那幅失竊的畫作被認為是被一個有組織的犯罪集團偷走的。
pattern: S + is assumed to be + Adj/V-pp
simple: He is assumed to be the new manager.
simple_cn: 大家推測他會是新任經理。

example: Even though he was born without arms, he became a successful and inspiring painter.
example_cn: 儘管他天生沒有雙臂，他仍然成為了一位成功且鼓舞人心的畫家。
pattern: S + was born without + 身體部位/能力
simple: She was born without the sense of smell.
simple_cn: 她天生就沒有嗅覺。

example: Many English vocabulary words actually derive from ancient Greek and Latin.
example_cn: 許多英文單字其實是源自於古希臘文和拉丁文。
simple: She derives great pleasure from reading.
simple_cn: 她從閱讀中得到很大的樂趣。

example: As soon as we arrived at the campsite, we set about pitching the tents.
example_cn: 我們一到露營地，就開始動手搭帳篷。
simple: They set about repairing the damaged roof.
simple_cn: 他們開始動手修理受損的屋頂。

example: The company's new recycling policy is entirely in line with its core environmental values.
example_cn: 公司新的回收政策完全符合其核心的環保價值觀。
pattern: A is in line with B
simple: His actions are not in line with his words.
simple_cn: 他的行為跟說的話不一致。

example: As the project manager, he is responsible for overseeing the entire workflow.
example_cn: 身為專案經理，他負責監督整個工作流程。
simple: Drunk driving is responsible for many accidents.
simple_cn: 酒駕是造成許多車禍的原因。

example: A typical basketball team consists of five players on the court at any given time.
example_cn: 一支標準的籃球隊在任何時候場上都會有五名球員。
simple: The exam consists of multiple-choice questions.
simple_cn: 這次考試都是選擇題。

type: 動名詞/現在分詞 + 名詞
example: The harbor master is responsible for safely docking ships during bad weather conditions.
example_cn: 港務長負責在惡劣天氣下安全引導船隻靠港。
pattern: S + be responsible for docking ships
simple: The port was busy with docking ships.
simple_cn: 那個港口因為船隻靠岸而很忙碌。

example: Different people react to stress in very different ways.
example_cn: 每個人面對壓力的反應方式都不太一樣。
simple: How did he react to the bad news?
simple_cn: 他聽到那個壞消息後有什麼反應？

type: 過去分詞/形容詞 + 介系詞
example: After passing the rigorous exams, she finally qualified as a licensed architect.
example_cn: 通過嚴格的考試後，她終於取得合格建築師的資格。
pattern: S + be qualified as + 職業
simple: He is qualified as a professional diver.
simple_cn: 他有資格成為專業潛水員。

type: 被動動詞/過去分詞 + 介系詞
example: Sensitive personal data should be securely stored in an encrypted database.
example_cn: 敏感性個人資料應該安全地儲存在加密的資料庫裡。
pattern: N + is stored in + 地點
simple: The wine is stored in wooden barrels.
simple_cn: 這款酒是存放在木桶裡的。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: Children should not be exposed to violent content on television or the internet.
example_cn: 小孩不應該接觸電視或網路上那些暴力的內容。
simple: Workers were exposed to dangerous chemicals.
simple_cn: 工人們暴露在危險的化學物質中。

type: 動詞(過去式) + 介系詞
example: The emergency alarm suddenly blared in the middle of the night, waking everyone up.
example_cn: 緊急警報半夜突然大響，把大家都吵醒了。
pattern: N + blared in + 地點/時間
simple: Music blared in the small room.
simple_cn: 音樂在小房間裡大聲播放。

example: The weather for our outdoor wedding was nearly perfect, with clear skies and a gentle breeze.
example_cn: 我們戶外婚禮那天的天氣幾乎完美，天空晴朗、微風徐徐。
simple: Her performance was nearly perfect.
simple_cn: 她的表現幾乎完美。

example: Although they are different brands, the design of the two phones is somewhat similar.
example_cn: 雖然是不同品牌，但這兩支手機的設計有點類似。
pattern: A and B are somewhat similar.
simple: The situations are somewhat similar.
simple_cn: 這些情況有點類似。

chinese: 極有成就的、造詣極高的
type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: She is a highly accomplished musician who has performed all over the world.
example_cn: 她是一位成就非凡的音樂家，在世界各地都表演過。
pattern: S + is a highly accomplished + 職業
simple: He is a highly accomplished scientist.
simple_cn: 他是一位成就非凡的科學家。

example: You need to show a valid ID as proof of your age before entering the club.
example_cn: 進入這間俱樂部之前，你需要出示有效的證件來證明年齡。
pattern: S + provide N as proof of + N
simple: Keep the receipt as proof of purchase.
simple_cn: 請保留收據作為購買證明。

example: A persistent high fever is often a clear sign of a viral infection.
example_cn: 持續高燒常常是病毒感染的一個明顯徵兆。
pattern: N + is a sign of + N
simple: Crying is not always a sign of sadness.
simple_cn: 哭不一定是悲傷的表現。

example: The survey showed a strong consumer preference for eco-friendly packaging.
example_cn: 這份調查顯示，消費者對環保包裝有很強的偏好。
pattern: S + have a strong preference for + N
simple: She has a preference for dark chocolate.
simple_cn: 她偏好黑巧克力。

example: The professor gave us a brief outline of the topics we will cover this semester.
example_cn: 教授簡單跟我們說明了這學期會涵蓋的主題大綱。
pattern: S + provide an outline of + N
simple: You can see the outline of the mountains in the distance.
simple_cn: 你可以看到遠處山巒的輪廓。

example: The prolonged usage of social media has a huge impact on teenagers' mental health.
example_cn: 長期使用社群媒體對青少年的心理健康影響很大。
pattern: N + has a significant impact on + N
simple: Pollution has a negative impact on the ocean.
simple_cn: 污染對海洋有負面影響。

example: I ran into my former manager at the supermarket yesterday and we had a nice chat.
example_cn: 我昨天在超市遇到以前的主管，還聊得很愉快。
simple: She is the former manager of this branch.
simple_cn: 她是這間分店的前任經理。

example: Passengers are only allowed to bring one piece of carry-on luggage onto the plane.
example_cn: 乘客只能帶一件手提行李上飛機。
simple: Please store your carry-on luggage in the overhead bin.
simple_cn: 請將你的隨身行李放在頭頂行李艙。

example: Most banks and post offices are closed on a national holiday.
example_cn: 大部分銀行和郵局在國定假日都不營業。
pattern: N + is closed on a national holiday
simple: October 10th is a national holiday in Taiwan.
simple_cn: 十月十日是台灣的國定假日。

example: The tech company has remained the market leader in smartphone sales for five years.
example_cn: 這家科技公司已經連續五年穩坐智慧型手機市場的龍頭。
pattern: N + is the market leader in + N
simple: They aim to become the market leader.
simple_cn: 他們的目標是成為市場領導者。

example: Everyone dressed up as their favorite movie character for the annual costume party.
example_cn: 每個人都打扮成自己最喜歡的電影角色，參加一年一度的變裝派對。
pattern: S + hold an annual costume party
simple: I am invited to the annual costume party.
simple_cn: 我被邀請參加年度變裝派對。

example: The view of the snow-capped mountain reflecting in the crystal-clear lake was breathtaking.
example_cn: 白雪覆蓋的山峰倒映在清澈的湖水中，景色美得令人屏息。
simple: We hiked up the snow-capped mountain.
simple_cn: 我們徒步爬上了那座積雪的山。

example: Building the ancient pyramids required an incredible amount of manual labor.
example_cn: 建造古埃及金字塔需要耗費極大量的人力。
simple: Farming involves a lot of hard manual labor.
simple_cn: 務農需要大量的辛苦體力勞動。

example: Looking at these old photos always reminds me of the light-hearted days of my childhood.
example_cn: 看到這些老照片，總會讓我想起童年那段無憂無慮的時光。
pattern: S + miss the light-hearted days of + N
simple: Those were light-hearted days filled with laughter.
simple_cn: 那些是充滿歡笑的輕鬆日子。

chinese: 不明的起源 / 來源不明
example: The mysterious artifact has an unclear origin, confusing archaeologists for decades.
example_cn: 這件神秘文物的來源不明，讓考古學家困惑了幾十年。
simple: A virus of unclear origin is spreading.
simple_cn: 一種來源不明的病毒正在擴散。

example: Some people still believe the moon landing was one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.
example_cn: 有些人至今仍認為登陸月球是史上最精心策劃的騙局之一。
simple: The email turned out to be an elaborate hoax.
simple_cn: 那封郵件原來是一場精心設計的騙局。

example: The avocado has become a highly fashionable fruit, often featured on trendy cafe menus.
example_cn: 酪梨已經成為一種非常時尚的水果，經常出現在潮流咖啡廳的菜單上。
pattern: N + is a fashionable fruit today.
simple: Acai berries are considered a fashionable fruit.
simple_cn: 巴西莓被視為一種時尚水果。

example: Many clothing brands are switching to eco-friendly fibers like organic cotton and bamboo.
example_cn: 許多服飾品牌正轉向使用有機棉、竹纖維等環保材質。
pattern: S + use eco-friendly fiber to make N
simple: This shirt is made of eco-friendly fiber.
simple_cn: 這件襯衫是用環保纖維做的。

example: Taking public transportation instead of driving is a great way to reduce your carbon footprint.
example_cn: 搭大眾運輸而不是開車，是減少碳足跡的好方法。
pattern: S + take actions to reduce one's carbon footprint
simple: Eating less meat lowers your carbon footprint.
simple_cn: 少吃肉可以降低你的碳足跡。

example: Compost made from kitchen waste serves as an excellent natural fertilizer for the garden.
example_cn: 用廚餘做成的堆肥，是花園裡絕佳的有機肥料。
pattern: S + apply natural fertilizer to the soil.
simple: Natural fertilizer is better for the environment.
simple_cn: 天然肥料對環境比較好。

example: The school held a grand anniversary celebration to mark its 50th year of founding.
example_cn: 學校舉辦了一場盛大的校慶活動，慶祝創校五十週年。
simple: The company's anniversary celebration was a success.
simple_cn: 公司的週年慶祝活動辦得很成功。

example: He surprised his wife on Valentine's Day with a beautiful red rose bouquet.
example_cn: 他在情人節那天送給太太一束漂亮的紅玫瑰，給她一個驚喜。
pattern: S + bought a rose bouquet for + 人
simple: She caught the rose bouquet at the wedding.
simple_cn: 她在婚禮上接到了新娘的捧花。

example: She prefers to keep her private matters separate from her professional life.
example_cn: 她比較喜歡把私事跟工作分開處理。
pattern: I don't discuss private matters at work.
simple: That is a private matter.
simple_cn: 那是私事。

example: Rising ocean temperatures are causing severe bleaching and damage to global coral reefs.
example_cn: 海洋溫度持續上升，正導致全球珊瑚礁嚴重白化與受損。
pattern: Coral reefs provide habitat for sea life.
simple: We went snorkeling to see the coral reefs.
simple_cn: 我們去浮潛看珊瑚礁。

example: In traditional societies, people rarely married outside of their own social positions.
example_cn: 在傳統社會裡，人們很少會跟不同社會階層的人結婚。
simple: Education can improve people's social positions.
simple_cn: 教育可以提升人們的社會地位。

example: The doctor carefully removed the dead tissue to prevent the infection from spreading.
example_cn: 醫生小心地清除壞死組織，以防止感染擴散。
pattern: The surgeon cut away the dead tissue.
simple: Dead tissue must be removed for the wound to heal.
simple_cn: 傷口要癒合，必須先清除壞死的組織。

example: Before the invention of writing, history was passed down through generation via oral traditions.
example_cn: 在文字發明之前，歷史是靠口述傳統一代一代傳下來的。
pattern: S + preserve their history through oral traditions.
simple: Oral traditions are an important part of indigenous cultures.
simple_cn: 口述傳統是原住民文化的重要部分。

chinese: 高階酋長 / 高級首領
example: The decision was made after a long council meeting among the high-ranking chiefs of the tribe.
example_cn: 這個決定是在部落高層首領們一場漫長的會議之後做出的。
pattern: The high-ranking chiefs held a meeting.
simple: He is one of the high-ranking chiefs.
simple_cn: 他是其中一位高階首領。

chinese: 文化驕傲 / 文化自豪感
example: Wearing traditional clothing during festivals is a strong expression of cultural pride.
example_cn: 節慶時穿上傳統服飾，是展現文化認同的強烈表現。
pattern: N + fosters a sense of cultural pride.
simple: The museum promotes cultural pride.
simple_cn: 這間博物館推廣文化自豪感。

example: In many ancient societies, clan kinship was the most important social bond among people.
example_cn: 在許多古代社會中，氏族親屬關係是人們之間最重要的社會連結。
simple: They share a strong clan kinship.
simple_cn: 他們有很強的氏族親屬關係。

chinese: 餘音繞樑症候群 (指腦中不斷重複某段旋律)
example: Having a catchy commercial jingle play over and over in your head is a classic symptom of stuck-song syndrome.
example_cn: 腦海裡不斷重複播放一首洗腦的廣告歌，是典型的「耳蟲現象」。
simple: Stuck-song syndrome is very common.
simple_cn: 腦內單曲循環症候群很常見。

chinese: 認知發癢 (心理學術語，指大腦試圖補全未完成的旋律)
example: Psychologists explain earworms as a 'cognitive itch' that the brain tries to scratch by repeating the song.
example_cn: 心理學家解釋，耳蟲現象就像一種「認知上的癢」，大腦會透過重複播放歌曲來「抓癢」。
pattern: An earworm is described as a cognitive itch.
simple: Listening to the whole song might cure the cognitive itch.
simple_cn: 聽完整首歌或許能治好這種認知癢。

example: Pop songs with a simple melody and repetitive lyrics are more likely to get stuck in your head.
example_cn: 旋律簡單、歌詞重複的流行歌，最容易在腦海裡揮之不去。
simple: Repetitive lyrics make the song easy to remember.
simple_cn: 重複的歌詞讓這首歌容易記住。

example: The band's new album includes three tracks that instantly became summer radio hits.
example_cn: 這個樂團的新專輯裡有三首歌，一推出就成為夏天的電台熱門金曲。
pattern: The song became one of the biggest radio hits.
simple: They play classic radio hits all day.
simple_cn: 他們整天都在播放經典電台金曲。

example: Allergic reactions to certain cosmetics can cause redness and itchy skin rashes.
example_cn: 對某些化妝品過敏會導致皮膚發紅，並出現發癢的疹子。
pattern: S + develop skin rashes after + V-ing
simple: He got skin rashes from touching the plant.
simple_cn: 他碰到那種植物，結果皮膚起疹子。

example: Surgery should always be considered as a last resort when all other medical treatments have failed.
example_cn: 手術應該被視為最後手段，只有在其他所有醫療方式都無效時才考慮。
pattern: S + do N as a last resort.
simple: Borrowing money from him is my last resort.
simple_cn: 跟他借錢是我最後的選擇。

chinese: 有毒農藥 / 有毒殺蟲劑
example: The overuse of toxic pesticides has severely damaged the local ecosystem and killed many bees.
example_cn: 過度使用有毒農藥已經嚴重破壞當地生態系統，並導致大量蜜蜂死亡。
pattern: S + ban the use of toxic pesticides.
simple: Farmers are trying to avoid toxic pesticides.
simple_cn: 農民們正設法避免使用有毒農藥。

example: Water and oily substances do not mix well due to their different chemical properties.
example_cn: 水和油性物質因為化學性質不同，所以不容易混合。
pattern: Use soap to remove oily substances.
simple: The leak released oily substances into the river.
simple_cn: 洩漏事件讓油性物質流入河裡。

chinese: 關心隱私 / 在乎隱私
example: Modern internet users increasingly care about privacy and data protection.
example_cn: 現代的網路使用者越來越重視隱私和資料保護。
simple: We deeply care about privacy issues.
simple_cn: 我們非常重視隱私問題。

example: Meteorologists use advanced satellite images to accurately predict a typhoon's path.
example_cn: 氣象學家利用先進的衛星影像來準確預測颱風路徑。
pattern: S + use N to predict a typhoon
simple: It is difficult to predict a typhoon.
simple_cn: 颱風很難預測。

example: It takes perseverance and strict discipline to reach a goal you have set.
example_cn: 要達成自己設定的目標，需要毅力和嚴格的自律。
pattern: S + work hard to reach a goal
simple: She finally reached her goal of becoming a doctor.
simple_cn: 她終於達成當醫生的目標。

example: The committee will propose a plan to reduce the city's carbon emissions.
example_cn: 委員會將提出一項計畫，來減少城市的碳排放量。
pattern: S + propose a plan to + V
simple: The manager proposed a new marketing plan.
simple_cn: 經理提出了一個新的行銷計畫。

example: The mother asked her children to put away toys before dinner time.
example_cn: 媽媽要求孩子們在晚餐前把玩具收好。
simple: Please put away your toys now.
simple_cn: 現在請把你的玩具收好。

example: Even after graduating, the best friends managed to maintain contact via social media.
example_cn: 即使畢業了，這對好朋友還是透過社群媒體保持聯繫。
simple: We maintain contact through emails.
simple_cn: 我們透過電子郵件保持聯繫。

chinese: 採收麵條 (歷史著名惡作劇)
example: In 1957, the BBC broadcast a famous hoax showing farmers harvesting noodles from trees.
example_cn: 1957年，英國廣播公司播出了一場著名的惡作劇，畫面顯示農民從樹上採收麵條。
simple: The video of harvesting noodles fooled many people.
simple_cn: 那個掛麵的影片騙了很多人。

chinese: 對...惡作劇 / 欺騙(感官)
example: Optical illusions can play tricks with your mind, making you see things that aren't there.
example_cn: 視覺錯覺會欺騙你的大腦，讓你看到實際上不存在的東西。
pattern: N + plays tricks with one's mind
simple: The shadows played tricks with my eyes.
simple_cn: 那些影子讓我眼花撩亂。

example: A microscope uses lenses to magnify the size of extremely tiny objects.
example_cn: 顯微鏡利用鏡片來放大極微小物體的尺寸。
pattern: S + use N to magnify the size of + N
simple: The telescope magnifies the size of the stars.
simple_cn: 望遠鏡會放大星星的大小。

example: The investigative journalist published an article to reveal secrets about the political scandal.
example_cn: 這位調查記者發表了一篇文章，揭露政治醜聞的內幕。
pattern: S + reveal secrets to the public
simple: He promised not to reveal her secrets.
simple_cn: 他承諾不會洩漏她的秘密。

example: In coral reefs, some small fish act as cleaners by eating parasites off larger fish.
example_cn: 在珊瑚礁中，有些小魚會充當清潔工，吃掉大魚身上的寄生蟲。
pattern: N + acts as cleaners for + N
simple: These birds act as cleaners for the rhinos.
simple_cn: 這些鳥類擔任犀牛的清潔工。

example: Certain species of marine life, like clownfish, can naturally change gender to survive.
example_cn: 某些海洋生物，例如小丑魚，可以為了生存而自然改變性別。
simple: Frogs are known to change gender in specific environments.
simple_cn: 青蛙在特定環境下會變性，這是已知的事實。

example: Elders in the tribe use storytelling to pass on knowledge to the younger generation.
example_cn: 部落裡的長輩透過說故事的方式，把知識傳承給年輕一代。
pattern: S + pass on knowledge to + 人
simple: Teachers pass on knowledge to their students.
simple_cn: 老師把知識傳授給學生。

example: The ancient temple relies on these massive wooden pillars to support a heavy roof beam.
example_cn: 這座古廟靠這些巨大的木柱來支撐沉重的屋頂橫樑。
pattern: N + is used to support a beam
simple: The steel column supports a main beam.
simple_cn: 那根鋼柱支撐著主樑。

example: He didn't mean to embarrass you publicly by pointing out your mistake during the meeting.
example_cn: 他並不是故意在會議上指出你的錯誤，讓你當眾難堪。
pattern: S + didn't mean to embarrass someone.
simple: Her loud voice embarrassed her friends.
simple_cn: 她的大嗓門讓朋友們很尷尬。

example: It is cruel to ridicule someone just because they have a different foreign accent.
example_cn: 只因為別人有不同的外國口音就嘲笑他們，真的很殘忍。
simple: He was ridiculed for his strange clothes.
simple_cn: 他因為穿著奇怪的衣服被嘲笑。

chinese: 侵入思想 / 打斷思緒
example: Unwanted memories can sometimes intrude on our thoughts when we are trying to focus.
example_cn: 當我們想專心時，不想要的回憶有時會突然闖進思緒裡。
simple: The loud noise intruded on my thoughts.
simple_cn: 那個巨大的噪音打斷了我的思緒。

chinese: 引發耳蟲 (腦中重複旋律)
example: Catchy pop songs are designed to trigger earworms, making you sing them all day long.
example_cn: 洗腦的流行歌就是設計來讓你產生「耳蟲效應」，讓你一整天都在哼唱。
simple: Listening to that commercial triggered earworms.
simple_cn: 聽那首廣告歌讓我腦中一直重複播放。

example: The sunlight struggled to penetrate the thick canopy of the dense tropical rainforest.
example_cn: 陽光很難穿透茂密熱帶雨林濃密的樹冠層。
simple: The spy successfully penetrated the enemy base.
simple_cn: 間諜成功潛入了敵方基地。

example: Overloading the electrical circuits will risk fire in your old apartment.
example_cn: 在老舊公寓裡用電超載，會有引發火災的風險。
simple: Leaving the stove unattended risks fire.
simple_cn: 爐子沒人看著會有火災的風險。

type: 名詞 + 動詞(現在分詞)
example: I woke up at dawn to the peaceful sound of birds chirping outside my window.
example_cn: 我在黎明醒來，窗外傳來鳥兒啁啾的寧靜聲音。
simple: The sound of birds chirping is relaxing.
simple_cn: 鳥兒嘰嘰喳喳的聲音讓人放鬆。

type: 名詞 + 動詞(過去式/原形)
example: This unique agricultural practice quickly spread from the local village to the entire region.
example_cn: 這種獨特的農業做法很快就從當地村莊傳遍了整個區域。
pattern: The practice spread to + 地點
simple: The cultural practice spread widely.
simple_cn: 這個文化習俗廣泛流傳開來。

example: Although they look alike, the two items differ significantly in quality and price.
example_cn: 雖然它們看起來很像，但這兩樣東西在品質和價格上差很多。
simple: These food items differ in taste.
simple_cn: 這些食物吃起來味道不一樣。

example: Following a long investigation, shocking corporate secrets were finally revealed to the public.
example_cn: 經過長時間的調查，驚人的企業內幕終於公諸於世。
simple: All the family secrets were revealed.
simple_cn: 所有的家庭秘密都被揭穿了。

example: Beautiful ice patterns form on the window surface when the temperature drops below freezing.
example_cn: 當氣溫降到冰點以下時，窗戶表面會形成美麗的冰花。
simple: Complex patterns form in the sand.
simple_cn: 沙子裡形成了複雜的圖案。

example: Due to long exposure to direct sunlight, the vibrant colors of the painting began to fade.
example_cn: 由於長期暴露在陽光直射下，這幅畫鮮豔的顏色開始褪去。
simple: The bright colors faded after washing.
simple_cn: 鮮豔的顏色洗過之後就褪色了。

example: In many pop songs, a simple and catchy melody repeats itself in the background.
example_cn: 很多流行歌的背景裡，都會重複一段簡單又洗腦的旋律。
pattern: The melody repeats throughout the song.
simple: If the melody repeats, it becomes an earworm.
simple_cn: 如果旋律一直重複，就會變成洗腦歌。

example: As the crop duster flew over, a mist of chemical pesticide rained down on the fields.
example_cn: 當農用噴灑機飛過時，一陣化學農藥的霧狀物灑落在田裡。
pattern: N + rains down on + 地點
simple: Ash rained down from the volcano.
simple_cn: 火山噴出的灰燼像雨一樣落下。

example: The weather bureau issued a strong typhoon warning for the eastern coastal areas.
example_cn: 氣象局針對東部沿海地區發布了強烈颱風警報。
simple: The weather bureau forecast heavy rain.
simple_cn: 氣象局預報會下大雨。

example: She dressed up as a scary witch for the Halloween costume party.
example_cn: 她為了萬聖節變裝派對，把自己打扮成可怕的巫婆。
simple: We are organizing a costume party.
simple_cn: 我們正在籌辦一場變裝派對。

example: You should wear formal clothes to make a good impression at a job interview.
example_cn: 你應該穿正式服裝去面試，才能留下好印象。
pattern: S + go for a job interview
simple: He was very nervous during the job interview.
simple_cn: 他面試工作時非常緊張。

example: During the Industrial Revolution, many people moved to cities for factory work.
example_cn: 工業革命期間，很多人搬到城市裡去工廠工作。
simple: Factory work can be physically demanding.
simple_cn: 工廠的工作體力負擔很大。

example: Fruit picking is a popular and physically demanding seasonal job for backpackers.
example_cn: 採水果對背包客來說，是熱門又耗體力的季節性工作。
simple: We spent the afternoon fruit picking at the farm.
simple_cn: 我們下午在農場採水果。

example: Some eco-friendly textiles are surprisingly made from discarded pineapple leaves.
example_cn: 有些環保紡織品竟然是用廢棄的鳳梨葉做成的。
pattern: N + is made from pineapple leaves
simple: Pineapple leaves can be turned into leather.
simple_cn: 鳳梨葉可以做成皮革。

example: This country's economy relies heavily on exporting high-quality textile products.
example_cn: 這個國家的經濟高度依賴出口高品質的紡織產品。
simple: The factory produces various textile products.
simple_cn: 這間工廠生產各種紡織品。

example: The inventor created blue-tinted diet-glasses to make food look less appetizing.
example_cn: 發明家打造了一款藍色濾鏡的減肥眼鏡，讓食物看起來比較不誘人。
simple: Diet-glasses are designed to help you lose weight.
simple_cn: 減肥眼鏡是用來幫助你瘦身的。

example: The museum displayed a precious collection of beautifully crafted antique scent bottles.
example_cn: 博物館展出了一批珍貴的、做工精美的古董香水瓶收藏。
simple: She has a large collection of glass scent bottles.
simple_cn: 她收集了一大堆玻璃香水瓶。

example: I always write a shopping list before going to the supermarket to avoid buying unnecessary things.
example_cn: 我去超市前一定會先列購物清單，免得買一些不必要的東西。
simple: Don't forget to bring your shopping list.
simple_cn: 別忘了帶你的購物清單。

example: The security guard caught the thief trying to sneak out of the shopping mall.
example_cn: 警衛抓到一個小偷，正想偷偷溜出購物中心。
pattern: The security guard patrol the area.
simple: They hired a security guard for the event.
simple_cn: 他們為活動請了一名保全人員。

example: Native American tribes carved tall totem poles to tell stories and honor their ancestors.
example_cn: 美洲原住民部落會雕刻高大的圖騰柱，用來講述故事並紀念祖先。
simple: The totem poles represent the family history.
simple_cn: 圖騰柱代表著家族歷史。

example: Many luxury hotels are built on beachfronts to offer guests a beautiful view of the ocean.
example_cn: 很多高級飯店都蓋在海濱，讓客人能欣賞美麗的海景。
simple: Properties on beachfronts are very expensive.
simple_cn: 海濱地段的房產非常昂貴。

example: Archaeologists discovered an ancient burial box filled with gold coins and jewelry.
example_cn: 考古學家發現了一個古老的陪葬箱，裡面裝滿了金幣和珠寶。
simple: The burial box was made of solid stone.
simple_cn: 那個棺木是用實心石頭做的。

chinese: 耳蟲 (腦中揮之不去的旋律)
example: That catchy commercial jingle has become an earworm that I can't stop singing.
example_cn: 那首朗朗上口的廣告歌變成了一首洗腦神曲，讓我忍不住一直哼。
pattern: That song is a total earworm.
simple: I have an earworm stuck in my head today.
simple_cn: 我今天腦子裡一直有首歌揮之不去。

example: Fast food companies often use catchy commercial jingles to make people remember their brand.
example_cn: 速食業者經常用好記的廣告歌來讓大家記住他們的品牌。
simple: The commercial jingles are very memorable.
simple_cn: 那些廣告歌真的讓人印象深刻。

chinese: 殺蟲煙霧劑、水煙殺蟲劑
example: They had to use bug bombs to completely get rid of the cockroaches in the house.
example_cn: 他們得用水煙殺蟲劑才能徹底消滅家裡的蟑螂。
pattern: S + set off bug bombs to kill insects
simple: You must leave the house when using bug bombs.
simple_cn: 使用煙霧殺蟲劑時，你必須離開房子。

example: The hotel was immediately shut down after guests complained of getting bitten by bedbugs.
example_cn: 那間飯店因為有客人投訴被臭蟲咬，馬上就被勒令停業。
simple: Bedbugs are very difficult to eliminate.
simple_cn: 臭蟲非常難消滅。

example: We had to call a pest-control expert to deal with the severe termite problem in the wooden house.
example_cn: 我們得請除蟲專家來處理木屋裡嚴重的白蟻問題。
simple: The pest-control expert sprayed the entire building.
simple_cn: 除蟲專家對整棟建築噴了藥。

example: Teenagers go through a lot of physical and emotional changes during puberty.
example_cn: 青少年在青春期會經歷很多生理和情緒上的變化。
simple: Let's go through the report one more time.
simple_cn: 我們再把報告從頭到尾看一遍。

example: Living in a foreign country is completely different from what I had imagined.
example_cn: 住在國外跟我原本想像的完全不一樣。
simple: His personality is different from his brother's.
simple_cn: 他的個性跟他哥哥不一樣。

example: Scientists have been warning of the catastrophic consequences of global warming for decades.
example_cn: 科學家幾十年來一直在警告全球暖化會帶來的災難性後果。
pattern: S + warn of + 危險/後果
simple: The sign warns of falling rocks.
simple_cn: 那個標誌警告有落石。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: This specific fitness program is designed for people recovering from sports injuries.
example_cn: 這個特定的健身計畫是專門為運動傷害復健的人設計的。
pattern: N + is designed for + 對象/目的
simple: The course is designed for beginners.
simple_cn: 這門課程是為初學者設計的。

example: Many chronic diseases are closely related to poor eating habits and lack of exercise.
example_cn: 很多慢性病都跟不良的飲食習慣和缺乏運動有密切關係。
pattern: A is closely related to B
simple: His job is related to software engineering.
simple_cn: 他的工作跟軟體工程有關。

example: Her intense fear of dogs stems from a terrifying experience she had in childhood.
example_cn: 她對狗有強烈的恐懼，源自於小時候一次可怕的經歷。
simple: The problem stems from a lack of communication.
simple_cn: 這個問題源自於缺乏溝通。

type: 動詞(現在分詞) + 介系詞
example: Local farmers make a living by harvesting wild honey from the tall trees in the jungle.
example_cn: 當地農民靠採收叢林高大樹木上的野生蜂蜜維生。
pattern: S + harvest + N + from + 地點
simple: They are harvesting grapes from the orchard.
simple_cn: 他們正在果園裡採收葡萄。

example: Many elderly people are tricked into giving their bank account details to scammers.
example_cn: 很多老人家被騙子騙走銀行帳戶資料。
simple: He was tricked into signing the contract.
simple_cn: 他被騙去簽了那份合約。

example: Don't be fooled by his innocent appearance; he is actually a very cunning criminal.
example_cn: 別被他那無害的外表給騙了，他其實是個非常狡猾的罪犯。
simple: I was fooled by her lies.
simple_cn: 我被她的謊話騙了。

type: 過去分詞(作片語介系詞)
example: The award-winning movie is based on a true story that happened during World War II.
example_cn: 這部得獎電影是根據二戰期間的真實故事改編的。
simple: My conclusion is based on scientific facts.
simple_cn: 我的結論是根據科學事實得來的。

type: 動詞(現在分詞) + 介系詞
example: The frightened child was found hiding from the stray dog behind a large tree.
example_cn: 那個嚇壞的小孩被發現躲在一棵大樹後面，避開那隻流浪狗。
simple: There is no use hiding from the truth.
simple_cn: 逃避事實是沒用的。

example: Over the years, the quiet fishing village changed from a rural town into a bustling city.
example_cn: 多年來，這個寧靜的漁村從一個鄉下小鎮變成了一座繁華的城市。
pattern: S + changed from A to B
simple: The weather changed from sunny to rainy quickly.
simple_cn: 天氣一下子從晴天變成下雨。

example: The offensive post was quickly taken down by the website administrator.
example_cn: 那篇帶有攻擊性的貼文很快就被網站管理員刪掉了。
simple: The old building will be taken down soon.
simple_cn: 那棟舊大樓很快就要拆掉了。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: We were stuck in a massive traffic jam for over two hours on our way to the airport.
example_cn: 我們在去機場的路上塞車塞了超過兩個小時。
simple: The cat got stuck in the tree.
simple_cn: 那隻貓卡在樹上下不來。

type: 被動動詞/過去分詞 + 介系詞
example: Smart microchips are now firmly embedded into our credit cards for better security.
example_cn: 智慧晶片現在已經牢牢嵌入我們的信用卡裡，以提升安全性。
simple: A tracker is embedded into the device.
simple_cn: 這個裝置裡內建了一個追蹤器。

example: Please make sure you wash your hands thoroughly after coming in contact with the chemicals.
example_cn: 接觸化學物品後，請務必徹底洗手。
pattern: S + come in contact with + N
simple: I am still in contact with my high school friends.
simple_cn: 我跟高中同學還有在聯絡。

example: The culture in the Middle East is totally different from what I am used to.
example_cn: 中東的文化跟我習慣的完全不一樣。
pattern: A is totally different from B
simple: Their opinions are totally different.
simple_cn: 他們的意見完全不一樣。

chinese: 大致同時發生、大致相符
example: The local harvest festival roughly coincides with the Lunar New Year celebrations.
example_cn: 當地的豐收節慶大概跟農曆新年的慶祝活動時間差不多。
simple: His arrival roughly coincides with the start of the meeting.
simple_cn: 他到的時間差不多跟會議開始同時。

type: 副詞 + 過去分詞(作形容詞)
example: The subway map uses differently colored lines to easily indicate various train routes.
example_cn: 地鐵圖用不同顏色的路線來清楚標示各種列車路線。
simple: They wear differently colored uniforms.
simple_cn: 他們穿著不同顏色的制服。

example: Gasoline is a highly flammable liquid that must be stored and handled with extreme care.
example_cn: 汽油是高度易燃的液體，必須極度小心地儲存與處理。
simple: Keep highly flammable materials away from fire.
simple_cn: 把高易燃性的東西遠離火源。

example: You must obtain written permission from the city council for the construction of the new building.
example_cn: 你必須取得市議會的書面許可，才能蓋這棟新建築。
simple: Did you get permission for this event?
simple_cn: 你辦這個活動有拿到許可嗎？

example: There is a strict age restriction for watching this terrifying horror movie.
example_cn: 觀看這部恐怖的驚悚片有嚴格的年齡限制。
pattern: There is a restriction for/on + N
simple: The government imposed a new restriction on imports.
simple_cn: 政府對進口商品實施了一項新的限制。

example: The project was unfortunately canceled due to a complete lack of interest from the local investors.
example_cn: 這個計畫很遺憾地因為當地投資者完全缺乏興趣而被取消了。
pattern: N + failed due to a lack of interest.
simple: His lack of interest in sports is obvious.
simple_cn: 他對運動沒興趣，這很明顯。

example: After living in Italy for a year, she developed a sophisticated taste for fine coffee and art.
example_cn: 在義大利住了一年後，她培養出對精品咖啡和藝術的講究品味。
pattern: S + have a taste for + N
simple: He has an expensive taste for cars.
simple_cn: 他對車子的品味很昂貴。

example: In many cultures, the white dove is seen as a universal representation of peace and harmony.
example_cn: 在許多文化中，白鴿被視為和平與和諧的普遍象徵。
pattern: N + is a representation of + N
simple: This painting is a representation of his grief.
simple_cn: 這幅畫表現出他的悲傷。

example: The bronze monument was built in the park in memory of the brave soldiers who died in the war.
example_cn: 這座銅像建在公園裡，是為了紀念在戰爭中犧牲的英勇士兵。
pattern: S + V + N + in memory of + 人
simple: They planted a tree in memory of their teacher.
simple_cn: 他們種了一棵樹來紀念他們的老師。

example: Eating fresh seasonal fruit is a great way to get your daily vitamins.
example_cn: 吃當季的新鮮水果是攝取每日維生素的好方法。
pattern: S + prefer to eat seasonal fruit
simple: The market sells a lot of seasonal fruit.
simple_cn: 這個市場賣很多當季水果。

chinese: 典型要求 / 一般要求
example: Good communication and teamwork are typical requirements for this managerial position.
example_cn: 良好的溝通能力和團隊合作是這個管理職位的典型要求。
pattern: N + are typical requirements for + N
simple: What are the typical requirements for admission?
simple_cn: 入學的典型條件是什麼？

chinese: 空頭支票 / 虛假的承諾
example: Voters are tired of politicians who only make hollow promises during election campaigns.
example_cn: 選民已經受夠了那些只在選舉期間開空頭支票的政客。
pattern: S + make hollow promises to + 人
simple: He is known for making hollow promises.
simple_cn: 他以開空頭支票聞名。

type: 形容詞(比較級) + 名詞
example: With shorter deadlines, the team had to work overtime to finish the project on time.
example_cn: 因為截止日期縮短，團隊只好加班趕工，才能按時完成專案。
simple: The new manager imposed shorter deadlines.
simple_cn: 新經理把截止日期訂得更短。

type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The police issued a national alert to help locate the missing children.
example_cn: 警方發布全國警報，協助尋找失蹤的兒童。
simple: Pictures of missing children were shown on TV.
simple_cn: 電視上播放了失蹤兒童的照片。

chinese: 白雪覆蓋 (像毯子一樣的雪)
example: When we woke up, the entire town was covered in a thick blanket of snow.
example_cn: 我們醒來時，整個小鎮都被厚厚的一層白雪覆蓋。
pattern: N + is covered in a blanket of snow.
simple: A white blanket of snow lay over the fields.
simple_cn: 田野上覆蓋著一層白茫茫的雪。

chinese: 寬邊距 / 很大的差距
example: Please leave wide margins on your exam paper so the teacher can write comments.
example_cn: 請在試卷上留出寬闊的空白邊緣，方便老師寫評語。
pattern: S + leave wide margins for + N
simple: The incumbent mayor won by wide margins.
simple_cn: 現任市長以大幅差距勝選。

chinese: 巨大的火災風暴 / 猛烈的抨擊
example: The dry winds quickly turned the small forest fire into a massive firestorm.
example_cn: 乾燥的強風迅速讓小規模的森林火災演變成大規模的烈焰風暴。
pattern: N + sparked a massive firestorm of criticism.
simple: The city was destroyed by a massive firestorm.
simple_cn: 這座城市被一場巨大的火風暴摧毀。

example: A good coach knows how to discover and develop a young athlete's natural potential.
example_cn: 好的教練懂得如何發掘並培養年輕運動員天生的潛能。
simple: She has the natural potential to be a great leader.
simple_cn: 她天生有潛力成為一位出色的領袖。

example: Albert Einstein was widely regarded as a rare genius of his time.
example_cn: 愛因斯坦普遍被認為是那個時代罕見的天才。
pattern: N + is considered a rare genius.
simple: Mozart was a rare musical genius.
simple_cn: 莫札特是罕見的音樂天才。

example: To overcome this unprecedented crisis, we must think outside the box and find unconventional solutions.
example_cn: 要克服這場前所未有的危機，我們必須跳脫框架，尋找非傳統的解決方案。
pattern: S + seek unconventional solutions to + N
simple: They proposed several unconventional solutions.
simple_cn: 他們提出了幾個非傳統的解決方案。

example: Translating poetry is difficult because it is hard to capture the subtle meanings of words.
example_cn: 翻譯詩歌很困難，因為很難捕捉到詞語中的細微含義。
simple: The gesture carried subtle meanings.
simple_cn: 那個手勢帶有微妙的含義。

example: Being able to bend his thumb all the way backward is an unusual trait he was born with.
example_cn: 能把大拇指向後彎到底，是他與生俱來的奇特特徵。
pattern: N + is an unusual trait among + 族群
simple: Her patience is a highly unusual trait.
simple_cn: 她的耐心是非常罕見的特質。

type: 複合形容詞 + 名詞片語
example: The large-scale oil spill devastated marine life along the coastline for years.
example_cn: 大規模的漏油事件多年來嚴重破壞了沿海地區的海洋生態。
pattern: N + caused a large-scale oil spill.
simple: Volunteers cleaned up after the large-scale oil spill.
simple_cn: 志工們在大規模漏油事件後進行了清理。

example: Wind energy is a clean and renewable resource that will not run out.
example_cn: 風能是一種乾淨且可再生的資源，不會耗盡。
pattern: N + is considered a renewable resource.
simple: Solar power is a popular renewable resource.
simple_cn: 太陽能是一種受歡迎的可再生能源。

example: Unlike solar energy, fossil fuels do not offer an unlimited supply to the world.
example_cn: 與太陽能不同，化石燃料無法為世界提供無限的供應。
pattern: There is an unlimited supply of + N
simple: The internet provides an unlimited supply of information.
simple_cn: 網路提供了取之不盡的資訊。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: Fish and other aquatic animals cannot survive in these heavily polluted waters.
example_cn: 魚類及其他水生動物無法在這些嚴重污染的水域中生存。
pattern: S + clean up the polluted waters
simple: Swimming in polluted waters is dangerous.
simple_cn: 在被污染的水域游泳很危險。

chinese: 清醒夢 (做夢者知道自己在做夢)
example: In a lucid dream, the dreamer is aware they are dreaming and can sometimes control the narrative.
example_cn: 在清明夢中，做夢者知道自己正在做夢，有時還能控制夢境的情節。
simple: Techniques exist to help induce a lucid dream.
simple_cn: 有些技巧可以幫助引發清醒夢。

chinese: 醒時的想法 / 清醒時的思緒
type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: Our dreams are often heavily influenced by our daily experiences and waking thoughts.
example_cn: 我們的夢境常常深受日常經歷和清醒時的思緒影響。
simple: His upcoming exam occupied his waking thoughts.
simple_cn: 他滿腦子都在想即將到來的考試。

example: Some people with autism possess extraordinary abilities in memory or mathematics.
example_cn: 有些自閉症患者在記憶或數學方面擁有超凡的能力。
simple: The superhero has extraordinary abilities.
simple_cn: 那位超級英雄擁有非凡的能力。

example: The detective arrested the suspect after finding solid evidence at the crime scene.
example_cn: 偵探在犯罪現場找到確鑿證據後，逮捕了嫌犯。
pattern: S + provide solid evidence for + N
simple: There is no solid evidence to prove his guilt.
simple_cn: 沒有確鑿的證據證明他有罪。

type: 形容詞 + 專有名詞 + 名詞
example: She started her graduation speech with an inspirational Bible quotation about hope.
example_cn: 她以一段關於希望的聖經經文作為畢業演講的開場，令人深受啟發。
pattern: S + read an inspirational Bible quotation
simple: He shared an inspirational Bible quotation.
simple_cn: 他分享了一段啟發人心的聖經經文。

chinese: 首次開放參觀 / 開幕展示
example: The university hosted its inaugural open house to welcome prospective students and parents.
example_cn: 這間大學舉辦了首場校園開放日，歡迎有興趣的學生和家長來參觀。
pattern: S + attended the inaugural open house.
simple: The museum's inaugural open house was a huge success.
simple_cn: 博物館的首次開放日活動辦得非常成功。

example: The ambassador hosts annual receptions to strengthen diplomatic ties between the two countries.
example_cn: 大使每年舉辦招待會，以加強兩國之間的外交關係。
pattern: S + organize annual receptions for + N
simple: Company executives attend these annual receptions.
simple_cn: 公司高層都會參加這些年度招待會。

type: 形容詞 + 複合名詞片語
example: The police implemented effective crowd control measures to ensure safety during the parade.
example_cn: 警方在遊行期間實施了有效的群眾管制措施，確保活動安全。
pattern: S + take effective crowd control measures
simple: Effective crowd control measures prevent stampedes.
simple_cn: 有效的群眾管制措施能防止踩踏事件。

example: Malaria is a deadly tropical disease transmitted to humans by infected mosquitoes.
example_cn: 瘧疾是一種致命的熱帶疾病，透過受感染的蚊子傳染給人類。
pattern: S + suffer from a tropical disease
simple: Researchers are studying a new tropical disease.
simple_cn: 研究人員正在研究一種新的熱帶疾病。

example: Elderly people with a weak immune system are more vulnerable to seasonal flu.
example_cn: 免疫力較弱的老年人更容易感染季節性流感。
pattern: S + have a weak immune system
simple: Poor diet can result in a weak immune system.
simple_cn: 飲食不當會導致免疫系統變弱。

type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: During the scorching summer, many people stay indoors with the air conditioning on.
example_cn: 在酷熱的夏天，很多人會待在室內開冷氣。
simple: Ice cream is popular in the scorching summer.
simple_cn: 在酷熱的夏天，冰淇淋很受歡迎。

example: The severe economic crisis led to widespread unemployment and business closures.
example_cn: 嚴重的經濟危機導致大規模失業和商家倒閉。
pattern: The country faces a deep economic crisis.
simple: They struggled during the economic crisis.
simple_cn: 他們在經濟危機期間過得很辛苦。

example: Only a very small percentage of the Earth's water is fresh water suitable for drinking.
example_cn: 地球上的水只有非常小的一部分是適合飲用的淡水。
pattern: S + provide fresh water to + N
simple: Lakes and rivers contain fresh water.
simple_cn: 湖泊和河流裡含有淡水。

example: Cacti and camels are well adapted to survive in harsh, arid regions.
example_cn: 仙人掌和駱駝都很適應在乾旱嚴酷的環境中生存。
pattern: N + grows mainly in arid regions.
simple: Water conservation is vital in arid regions.
simple_cn: 在乾旱地區，節約用水非常重要。

example: We must learn to conserve our limited water resources before they run out completely.
example_cn: 我們必須學會在有限的水資源完全耗盡之前，好好節約用水。
simple: The island faces a problem of limited water resources.
simple_cn: 這個島嶼面臨水資源有限的問題。

example: After the earthquake, there is a critical need for medical supplies and clean water.
example_cn: 地震過後，醫療物資和乾淨飲用水變得非常迫切。
pattern: There is a critical need for + N
simple: We face a critical need for more volunteers.
simple_cn: 我們迫切需要更多志工。

example: Heat is required to break the strong chemical bonds between these atoms.
example_cn: 需要加熱才能打破這些原子之間強烈的化學鍵。
simple: Chemical bonds hold molecules together.
simple_cn: 化學鍵能將分子結合在一起。

example: Fast fashion is cheap to buy, but it comes with huge hidden environmental costs.
example_cn: 快時尚雖然買起來便宜，但背後卻隱藏著巨大的環境成本。
pattern: N + comes with high environmental costs.
simple: We must consider the environmental costs of mining.
simple_cn: 我們必須考慮開採礦產對環境造成的成本。

example: Plastic pollution in the ocean poses a deadly threat to turtles and other aquatic life.
example_cn: 海洋中的塑膠污染對海龜和其他水生生物構成致命威脅。
simple: Aquatic life depends on clean water.
simple_cn: 水生生物依賴乾淨的水。

example: Using solar panels is a commercially viable way to generate electricity for homes.
example_cn: 使用太陽能板是一種在商業上可行的家庭發電方式。
pattern: N + is a viable way to + V
simple: We need to find a viable way to cut costs.
simple_cn: 我們需要找到一個可行的方式來降低成本。

example: Riding a bicycle is an energy-efficient way to commute and stay healthy.
example_cn: 騎腳踏車是一種節能又健康的通勤方式。
pattern: N + is an energy-efficient way to + V
simple: LED bulbs are an energy-efficient way to light a room.
simple_cn: LED燈泡是一種節能的室內照明方式。

chinese: 具威脅性的搖籃曲 (帶有恐怖氛圍的童謠)
type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The movie's soundtrack featured a threatening lullaby that made the audience shiver.
example_cn: 這部電影的原聲帶中有一首令人毛骨悚然的搖籃曲，讓觀眾聽了不寒而慄。
simple: The ghost sang a threatening lullaby.
simple_cn: 那個幽靈唱了一首帶有威脅意味的搖籃曲。

chinese: 黑暗的潛台詞 / 陰暗的弦外之音
example: Despite being a children's story, the original fairy tale has very dark undertones.
example_cn: 雖然是兒童故事，但原始版童話其實帶有非常黑暗的寓意。
simple: The painting is beautiful but carries dark undertones.
simple_cn: 這幅畫很美，但帶有陰暗的意涵。

chinese: 實體的連結 / 肢體上的羈絆
example: Holding hands creates a strong physical bond that comforts the crying child.
example_cn: 牽手能建立強烈的情感連結，讓正在哭鬧的孩子感到安心。
simple: The mother and baby share a deep physical bond.
simple_cn: 母親與嬰兒之間有著深厚的生理連結。

example: Climate change is expected to cause more frequent and severe disasters around the world.
example_cn: 氣候變遷預計將導致全球各地發生更頻繁、更嚴重的災難。
simple: The country was struck by severe disasters.
simple_cn: 這個國家遭受了嚴重的災難。

example: Ice cream sales usually reach a peak during the hottest months of summer.
example_cn: 冰淇淋的銷量通常在夏季最熱的幾個月達到高峰。
simple: His career reached a peak in 2015.
simple_cn: 他事業在2015年達到高峰。

example: She worked incredibly hard to fulfill her childhood dreams of becoming an astronaut.
example_cn: 她為了實現小時候當太空人的夢想，付出了難以想像的努力。
pattern: S + work hard to fulfill one's dreams
simple: He finally fulfilled his dreams.
simple_cn: 他終於實現了自己的夢想。

example: The tennis player accidentally twisted his ankle during the final match.
example_cn: 那位網球選手在決賽中不小心扭傷了腳踝。
simple: She twisted her ankle while jogging.
simple_cn: 她慢跑時扭到腳踝。

example: The principal will deliver a speech to encourage the graduating students.
example_cn: 校長將發表演說，鼓勵即將畢業的學生。
pattern: S + deliver a speech on/about + 主題
simple: He delivered an inspiring speech.
simple_cn: 他發表了一場激勵人心的演講。

example: Researchers are conducting studies to explore a link between stress and heart disease.
example_cn: 研究人員正在進行研究，探討壓力與心臟病之間的關聯。
pattern: S + explore a link between A and B
simple: They explore a link between diet and health.
simple_cn: 他們探討飲食與健康之間的關聯。

example: The devastating earthquake claimed thousands of lives and left many homeless.
example_cn: 這場毀滅性的地震奪走了數千條生命，也讓許多人無家可歸。
simple: The flood claimed many lives.
simple_cn: 這場洪水奪走了許多條人命。

example: Teachers should encourage free thinking in order to nurture creativity in young children.
example_cn: 老師應該鼓勵自由思考，以培養幼兒的創造力。
simple: Reading helps nurture creativity.
simple_cn: 閱讀有助於培養創造力。

chinese: 激發洞察力 / 引發啟發
example: A good book can often spark insight into complex human emotions and behavior.
example_cn: 一本好書往往能啟發我們洞察複雜的人類情感與行為。
simple: The discussion sparked valuable insight.
simple_cn: 這場討論激發出寶貴的見解。

example: Brainstorming sessions are a great way to stimulate ideas and solve difficult problems.
example_cn: 腦力激盪會議是激發點子、解決難題的好方法。
simple: Working together stimulates new ideas.
simple_cn: 一起合作能激發新點子。

example: Volunteers used special sponges to soak up oil that leaked into the ocean.
example_cn: 志工們用特殊海綿吸走洩漏到海洋中的油污。
pattern: S + use N to soak up oil
simple: The paper towel soaked up the oil easily.
simple_cn: 這張紙巾很容易就把油吸起來。

example: The charity organization is working hard to collect donations for the earthquake victims.
example_cn: 這個慈善機構正努力為地震災民募集捐款。
simple: They collect donations every Christmas.
simple_cn: 他們每年聖誕節都會募捐。

example: Some materials are specifically designed to absorb oil while repelling water.
example_cn: 有些材質經過特殊設計，能吸收油污同時排斥水分。
simple: This cloth absorbs oil very well.
simple_cn: 這塊布吸油效果很好。

chinese: 應對現實 / 掌控現實狀況
example: As an adult, you must learn to manage reality instead of constantly escaping into fantasy.
example_cn: 身為成年人，你必須學會面對現實，而不是一直逃避到幻想裡。
simple: He struggles to manage reality.
simple_cn: 他很難面對現實。

chinese: 排除障礙 / 拋開阻礙
example: To achieve our ultimate goal, we need to set aside obstacles and work together.
example_cn: 為了達成最終目標，我們需要排除障礙，攜手合作。
pattern: S + set aside obstacles to + V
simple: They set aside obstacles to complete the project.
simple_cn: 他們排除障礙，完成了這個專案。

example: The powerful military forces attempted to overthrow a revolution led by the citizens.
example_cn: 強大的軍事力量試圖推翻由市民領導的革命。
pattern: S + attempt to overthrow a revolution
simple: The regime tried to overthrow the revolution.
simple_cn: 這個政權試圖鎮壓革命。

example: Nature's beauty has always been a powerful force to inspire creation among artists.
example_cn: 大自然的美景一直是啟發藝術家創作的強大力量。
pattern: N + inspires the creation of + N
simple: His story inspired the creation of a movie.
simple_cn: 他的故事啟發了一部電影的誕生。

chinese: 迎合口味 / 吸引喜好
example: The restaurant updated its menu to appeal to modern tastes and dietary needs.
example_cn: 這家餐廳更新了菜單，以迎合現代的飲食口味與需求。
simple: The product appeals to the tastes of teenagers.
simple_cn: 這項產品很對青少年的胃口。

example: The merchant ships had to request passage through the heavily guarded canal.
example_cn: 商船必須申請通行，才能通過戒備森嚴的運河。
simple: The refugees requested passage across the border.
simple_cn: 難民請求獲准越過邊境。

example: The government agency will issue official documents for all new immigrants next month.
example_cn: 政府機構將在下個月為所有新移民發放官方文件。
simple: The school issues documents to graduates.
simple_cn: 學校發給畢業生相關文件。

example: They plan to decorate the house with colorful lights and ornaments for Christmas.
example_cn: 他們計畫用彩色燈飾和裝飾品來佈置房子，迎接聖誕節。
pattern: S + decorate a house with + N
simple: She decorated her house beautifully.
simple_cn: 她把房子佈置得很漂亮。

example: The city council decided to implement strict measures to control traffic congestion.
example_cn: 市議會決定實施嚴格措施來控制交通壅塞。
simple: The government implemented new security measures.
simple_cn: 政府實施了新的安全措施。

example: The principal held an urgent meeting to address the problem of bullying in school.
example_cn: 校長緊急召開會議，處理校園霸凌問題。
pattern: S + address the problem of + N
simple: We must address the problem immediately.
simple_cn: 我們必須馬上處理這個問題。

example: Travelers to the jungle should take precautions so they don't contract a deadly disease.
example_cn: 前往叢林的旅客應做好防護措施，以免感染致命疾病。
pattern: S + contract a disease from + N
simple: He contracted a tropical disease.
simple_cn: 他感染了一種熱帶疾病。

chinese: 經歷症狀 / 出現症狀
example: If you experience symptoms like a high fever and cough, please see a doctor immediately.
example_cn: 如果你出現高燒、咳嗽等症狀，請立刻去看醫生。
pattern: If you experience symptoms of + N
simple: Patients may experience symptoms of fatigue.
simple_cn: 病人可能會出現疲倦的症狀。

example: The president had to declare a state of emergency as the massive hurricane approached the coast.
example_cn: 強烈颶風逼近海岸時，總統不得不宣布進入緊急狀態。
pattern: S + declare a state of emergency
simple: The governor declared a state of emergency.
simple_cn: 州長宣布進入緊急狀態。

example: Wearing face masks and washing hands frequently can help slow the spread of viruses.
example_cn: 戴口罩和勤洗手有助於減緩病毒傳播。
pattern: S + take actions to slow the spread of + N
simple: Quarantine helps slow the spread.
simple_cn: 隔離有助於減緩疫情擴散。

example: Many Middle Eastern countries build large plants to desalinate seawater for daily use.
example_cn: 許多中東國家建造大型海水淡化廠，以供應日常用水。
pattern: S + use technology to desalinate seawater
simple: Desalinating seawater is expensive.
simple_cn: 海水淡化很昂貴。

chinese: 打破結合 / 破壞化學鍵
example: In chemistry, a large amount of heat is often required to break molecular bonds.
example_cn: 在化學領域，通常需要大量熱能才能打斷分子鍵結。
pattern: S + break the bonds between A and B
simple: The enzyme helps break the bonds.
simple_cn: 這種酵素可以幫助分解鍵結。

example: Overfishing can severely upset the food chain and cause smaller fish populations to explode.
example_cn: 過度捕撈會嚴重破壞食物鏈，導致小型魚類數量暴增。
simple: Pollution upsets the natural food chain.
simple_cn: 污染會破壞自然食物鏈。

example: The new dam was constructed to provide water and generate electricity for the entire region.
example_cn: 這座新水壩是為了供應整個區域的用水和發電而建造的。
simple: The well provides water for the village.
simple_cn: 這口井供應村莊用水。

example: Singing a gentle lullaby is an effective way to soothe a crying infant.
example_cn: 輕聲哼唱搖籃曲是安撫哭鬧嬰兒的有效方法。
pattern: S + try to soothe an infant
simple: The mother rocked the baby to soothe the infant.
simple_cn: 媽媽搖著寶寶安撫他。

chinese: 說出擔憂 / 表達憂慮
example: It is healthier to vocalize your worries to a friend rather than keeping them bottled up.
example_cn: 把煩惱說給朋友聽，比悶在心裡更健康。
pattern: S + vocalize one's worries about + N
simple: Employees vocalized their worries during the meeting.
simple_cn: 員工在會議上表達了他們的擔憂。

example: When you stir the mixture, the salt dissolves quickly in the hot water.
example_cn: 攪拌混合物時，鹽會在熱水中迅速溶解。
simple: Sugar dissolves easily in tea.
simple_cn: 糖很容易在茶裡溶解。

type: 名詞 + 動詞(被動/過去分詞)
example: The new findings reported in the medical journal could change how we treat the disease.
example_cn: 醫學期刊報導的新發現，可能改變我們治療這種疾病的方式。
pattern: The findings reported by + 人/機構
simple: The findings reported yesterday surprised everyone.
simple_cn: 昨天報告的發現讓大家都很驚訝。

example: Students must complete all course requirements before they can graduate.
example_cn: 學生必須完成所有課程要求才能畢業。
simple: The syllabus lists the course requirements.
simple_cn: 課程大綱列出了課程要求。

example: University students are often busy writing term papers at the end of the semester.
example_cn: 大學生在學期末通常忙著寫期末報告。
simple: She is grading the students' term papers.
simple_cn: 她正在批改學生的期末報告。

example: Consuming a high-fat diet for a long time increases the risk of heart disease.
example_cn: 長期攝取高脂肪飲食會增加心臟病的風險。
pattern: S + goes on a high-fat diet
simple: A high-fat diet can lead to obesity.
simple_cn: 高脂肪飲食可能導致肥胖。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: Software programming is not really my area of expertise, so I can't help you with that.
example_cn: 軟體程式設計真的不是我的專業領域，所以我沒辦法幫你。
pattern: N + is one's area of expertise.
simple: Marketing is her main area of expertise.
simple_cn: 行銷是她的主要專業領域。

example: The massive oil spill caused irreversible damage to the coastal ecosystem.
example_cn: 大規模漏油事件對沿海生態系統造成了無法挽回的傷害。
pattern: The oil spill occurred in + 地點
simple: Volunteers cleaned birds affected by the oil spill.
simple_cn: 志工們清理了受漏油影響的鳥類。

example: Traditional Taiwanese mooncakes are often filled with sweet red bean paste.
example_cn: 傳統的台灣月餅內餡常包著甜甜的紅豆沙。
pattern: N + is filled with bean paste.
simple: She spread some bean paste on the bun.
simple_cn: 她在饅頭上抹了一些豆沙。

example: After the wedding, the couple spent the weekend writing thank-you notes to their guests.
example_cn: 婚禮結束後，這對新人花了整個週末寫感謝卡給賓客。
pattern: S + write/send thank-you notes to + 人
simple: He sent thank-you notes to all his clients.
simple_cn: 他寄了感謝卡給所有客戶。

example: People visit the temple to pull fortune notes and seek guidance for the new year.
example_cn: 民眾會到廟裡抽籤詩，為新的一年尋求指引。
simple: The fortune notes predicted a good harvest.
simple_cn: 命運籤詩預測會有好收成。

example: Security was tightened around the President’s House after the protest began.
example_cn: 抗議活動開始後，總統府周邊的維安就加強了。
pattern: S + gather outside the President's House
simple: The meeting took place at the President's House.
simple_cn: 會議在總統府舉行。

example: The West Nile virus is primarily transmitted to humans through the bites of infected mosquitoes.
example_cn: 西尼羅病毒主要是透過被感染的蚊子叮咬傳染給人類。
pattern: S + is infected with the West Nile virus
simple: Authorities are warning about the West Nile virus.
simple_cn: 當局正在對西尼羅病毒發出警告。

example: Health officials in Dallas County have reported a sudden increase in flu cases.
example_cn: 達拉斯郡的衛生官員通報，流感病例突然增加。
simple: He is a resident of Dallas County.
simple_cn: 他是達拉斯郡的居民。

example: Installing mosquito traps in your backyard can help reduce the insect population effectively.
example_cn: 在後院裝設捕蚊器，可以有效減少蚊蟲數量。
simple: The city distributed free mosquito traps.
simple_cn: 市政府免費發放了捕蚊器。

example: The government built a new desalination plant to provide fresh water for the desert city.
example_cn: 政府蓋了一座新的海水淡化廠，為這座沙漠城市提供淡水。
simple: The desalination plant processes seawater.
simple_cn: 海水淡化廠處理海水。

example: Many families in Asia make offerings to the house god to ensure peace and prosperity.
example_cn: 亞洲許多家庭會祭拜地基主，祈求平安與興旺。
pattern: S + pray to the house god
simple: They set up an altar for the house god.
simple_cn: 他們為地基主設了一個供桌。

example: Proper nutrition during the infant years is crucial for a child's brain development.
example_cn: 嬰兒時期的營養攝取，對孩子的大腦發育至關重要。
pattern: During the infant years, S + V
simple: Babies learn rapidly in their infant years.
simple_cn: 嬰兒在幼兒時期學習速度很快。

example: Get your tickets early, or you will miss out on the best concert of the year.
example_cn: 票要早點買，不然你就會錯過今年最棒的演唱會。
pattern: S + don't want to miss out on + N
simple: He missed out on a great opportunity.
simple_cn: 他錯過了一個大好機會。

example: The parents looked anxiously at the clock, waiting for their daughter to return home.
example_cn: 父母焦急地看著時鐘，等待女兒回家。
simple: She looked anxiously around the room.
simple_cn: 她焦急地環顧房間四周。

chinese: 對...苦思冥想 / 感到困惑
example: The detectives puzzled over the strange clues left at the crime scene.
example_cn: 偵探們對犯罪現場留下的奇怪線索百思不解。
simple: Scientists are still puzzling over this mystery.
simple_cn: 科學家仍在為這個謎團傷腦筋。

chinese: 冒險超越... / 踏出...的範圍
example: Few explorers dared to venture beyond the mapped territories into the unknown.
example_cn: 很少有探險家敢冒險越過已知地圖的範圍，進入未知領域。
pattern: S + venture beyond one's comfort zone
simple: They ventured beyond the city borders.
simple_cn: 他們冒險走出了城市邊界。

chinese: 替...收拾殘局 / 幫...清理
example: As a pet owner, you are expected to clean up after your dog in public parks.
example_cn: 身為飼主，你有責任在公園裡清理狗狗的排泄物。
pattern: S + have to clean up after + N
simple: I am tired of cleaning up after my brother.
simple_cn: 我受夠了幫我弟弟收拾爛攤子。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: She was so immersed in her novel that she didn't hear the phone ring.
example_cn: 她看小說看到太入迷，連電話響都沒聽到。
pattern: S + be completely immersed in + N
simple: He spent the summer immersed in learning French.
simple_cn: 他整個夏天都埋頭學法文。

example: Make sure you put the scholarship money to good use by buying necessary books.
example_cn: 記得把獎學金用在刀口上，去買必要的書籍。
pattern: S + put + N + to good use
simple: His skills were finally put to good use.
simple_cn: 他的技能終於派上用場了。

example: You should set aside some money every month for a rainy day.
example_cn: 你每個月應該存一點錢，以備不時之需。
pattern: S + set aside + 時間/金錢 + for + N
simple: She set aside her work to listen to me.
simple_cn: 她放下手邊的工作來聽我說話。

example: He found an old love letter tucked inside the pages of his favorite book.
example_cn: 他在最喜歡的那本書裡，發現了一封夾在頁中的舊情書。
simple: The cottage is tucked inside the valley.
simple_cn: 那間小屋藏在山谷裡。

example: Citizens residing in this district are eligible for a free health checkup.
example_cn: 住在這個區的居民，可以免費做健康檢查。
pattern: People residing in + 地點 + V
simple: He is currently residing in London.
simple_cn: 他目前住在倫敦。

example: We just bought a new apartment and plan to move in next weekend.
example_cn: 我們剛買了一間新公寓，打算下週末搬進去。
simple: When are the new neighbors going to move in?
simple_cn: 新鄰居什麼時候要搬進來？

type: 被動動詞/過去分詞 + 介系詞
example: The suspect was subjected to hours of intense questioning by the police.
example_cn: 那個嫌犯被警方嚴厲審問了好幾個小時。
simple: The metal is subjected to high pressure.
simple_cn: 這塊金屬承受了高壓。

example: Our company has decided to contract with a new supplier to reduce production costs.
example_cn: 我們公司決定跟新的供應商簽約，來降低生產成本。
simple: The city contracted with a private firm for waste management.
simple_cn: 這個城市把廢棄物處理外包給了一家私人公司。

example: Cacti are amazing plants because they can thrive in extremely dry environments.
example_cn: 仙人掌是很厲害的植物，因為它們能在極度乾燥的環境中存活。
simple: Some people thrive in a competitive environment.
simple_cn: 有些人在競爭激烈的環境中反而能如魚得水。

example: You can't just blame your failure on bad luck; you need to work harder.
example_cn: 你不能老是把失敗怪到運氣不好，你得更加努力才行。
simple: He blamed the accident on the slippery road.
simple_cn: 他把事故歸咎於路面濕滑。

example: The body's immune system produces antibodies to defend against invading viruses.
example_cn: 人體的免疫系統會產生抗體，來抵禦入侵的病毒。
pattern: S + defend against + 敵人/疾病
simple: The castle walls defended against enemy attacks.
simple_cn: 城堡的城牆抵禦了敵人的攻擊。

example: The new filter efficiently removes dangerous chemicals from the drinking water.
example_cn: 新的濾水器能有效去除飲用水中的有害化學物質。
simple: Please remove your shoes from the sofa.
simple_cn: 請把你的鞋子從沙發上拿下來。

type: 動詞(現在分詞) + 介系詞
example: Factories are constantly pumping toxic gases into the atmosphere, causing air pollution.
example_cn: 工廠不斷排放有毒氣體到大氣中，造成空氣污染。
pattern: S + is pumping N into + N
simple: The heart is pumping blood into the vessels.
simple_cn: 心臟正在把血液輸送到血管裡。

type: 副詞 + 形容詞(過去分詞)
example: The driver was badly hurt in the crash and had to be taken to the hospital immediately.
example_cn: 那名司機在車禍中受了重傷，必須立刻送醫。
pattern: S + was badly hurt in + N
simple: Fortunately, no one was badly hurt.
simple_cn: 幸好沒有人受重傷。

example: The witness provided a highly credible account of what happened that night.
example_cn: 目擊者對當晚發生的事情，提供了非常可信的描述。
simple: This source of information is highly credible.
simple_cn: 這個資訊來源非常可靠。

example: The temperature this summer has been unusually high, breaking all previous records.
example_cn: 今年夏天的氣溫異常地高，打破了所有以往的紀錄。
simple: He showed an unusually high level of intelligence.
simple_cn: 他展現出異於常人的高智商。

example: Electric cars are becoming increasingly attractive to consumers due to lower fuel costs.
example_cn: 由於燃料成本較低，電動車對消費者越來越有吸引力。
simple: The offer is increasingly attractive.
simple_cn: 這個報價越來越吸引人了。

example: Scientists have discovered a clear link between air pollution and respiratory diseases.
example_cn: 科學家發現空氣污染與呼吸道疾病之間有明確的關聯。
pattern: There is a link between A and B.
simple: The study shows a link between diet and health.
simple_cn: 這項研究顯示飲食與健康之間有關聯。

example: The new supermarket offers a wide array of international foods and fresh produce.
example_cn: 這間新超市提供各式各樣的國際食品和新鮮農產品。
pattern: S + offer an array of + Ns
simple: He faced a bewildering array of choices.
simple_cn: 他面對一大堆令人眼花撩亂的選擇。

example: The indigenous tribe lives in a remote part of the Amazon rainforest.
example_cn: 這個原住民部落居住在亞馬遜雨林一個偏遠的地區。
pattern: S + live in a remote part of + 地方
simple: The village is located in a remote part of the country.
simple_cn: 這個村莊位在該國一個偏遠的地區。

type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The singer deeply regretted giving an embarrassing autograph that contained a spelling mistake.
example_cn: 那位歌手對自己簽了一個拼寫錯誤的尷尬簽名，感到非常後悔。
simple: He tried to hide the embarrassing autograph.
simple_cn: 他試圖藏起那個令人尷尬的簽名。

type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The museum exhibition features amazing sculptures carved from solid marble.
example_cn: 博物館的展覽中，有許多用實心大理石雕刻而成的驚人雕塑。
simple: We admired the amazing sculptures in the park.
simple_cn: 我們很欣賞公園裡那些令人驚嘆的雕塑。
