example: The company focuses on developing innovative footwear that improves athletes' performance.
example_cn: 這家公司專注於開發能提升運動員表現的創新鞋款。
simple: This brand is famous for its innovative footwear.
simple_cn: 這個品牌以創新的鞋類產品聞名。

example: The scientist's groundbreaking theory is strongly supported by years of empirical data.
example_cn: 這位科學家開創性的理論，有多年實證數據的強力支持。
simple: Empirical data shows a clear trend.
simple_cn: 實證數據顯示出一個明確的趨勢。

example: Many indigenous plants in the forest possess powerful curative properties for treating wounds.
example_cn: 森林裡許多原生植物，具有治療傷口的強大療效。
simple: Garlic is known for its curative properties.
simple_cn: 大蒜以其療效著稱。

example: Researchers are studying the unique cognitive traits of dolphins to understand their high intelligence.
example_cn: 研究人員正在研究海豚獨特的認知特徵，以了解牠們的高智商。
simple: Memory and attention are important cognitive traits.
simple_cn: 記憶力和注意力是重要的認知特質。

example: Baseball is widely considered the national sport of Taiwan due to its immense popularity.
example_cn: 棒球在台灣非常受歡迎，普遍被視為國球。
pattern: N + is the national sport of + 國家
simple: Ice hockey is the national sport of Canada.
simple_cn: 冰上曲棍球是加拿大的國球。

type: 形容詞最高級 + 名詞
example: Vincent van Gogh is recognized as one of the greatest painters in the history of Western art.
example_cn: 文森·梵谷被公認為西方藝術史上最偉大的畫家之一。
pattern: S + is considered the greatest painter
simple: Picasso is often called the greatest painter of his time.
simple_cn: 畢卡索常被稱為他那個時代最偉大的畫家。

type: 形容詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: Building the magnificent cathedral was a remarkable artistic achievement of the Renaissance.
example_cn: 建造那座宏偉的大教堂，是文藝復興時期一項非凡的藝術成就。
pattern: N + is a remarkable artistic achievement
simple: The painting represents a remarkable artistic achievement.
simple_cn: 這幅畫代表了一項非凡的藝術成就。

example: Bubble milk tea is undoubtedly his favorite drink when he visits night markets.
example_cn: 珍珠奶茶絕對是他逛夜市時最愛的飲料。
simple: Coffee has always been her favorite drink.
simple_cn: 咖啡一直是她最喜歡的飲料。

example: After graduation, she decided to pursue a career in software engineering.
example_cn: 畢業後，她決定往軟體工程領域發展。
pattern: S + pursue a career in + N
simple: He wants to pursue a career in music.
simple_cn: 他想往音樂這條路發展。

example: The supermarket launched a campaign to urge shoppers to bring their own reusable bags.
example_cn: 超市發起活動，呼籲顧客自備環保購物袋。
simple: The ad urges shoppers to buy before the sale ends.
simple_cn: 這則廣告呼籲消費者趁促銷結束前趕快買。

example: The gymnast trained for ten years to finally win a gold medal at the Olympics.
example_cn: 那位體操選手苦練十年，終於在奧運會上奪得金牌。
pattern: S + win a gold medal in + 比賽項目
simple: She won a gold medal in swimming.
simple_cn: 她在游泳項目中奪得金牌。

example: Doctors advise people not to rub their noses with unwashed hands to prevent infections.
example_cn: 醫生建議大家不要用沒洗過的手揉鼻子，以免感染。
simple: He rubbed his nose because of the allergies.
simple_cn: 他因為過敏一直揉鼻子。

example: Staring at digital screens for prolonged periods can cause serious vision problems.
example_cn: 長時間盯著數位螢幕，可能會導致嚴重的視力問題。
simple: Lack of vitamin A can cause vision problems.
simple_cn: 缺乏維生素A可能會導致視力問題。

example: Constant interruptions in the office significantly reduce productivity among employees.
example_cn: 辦公室裡不斷被打斷，會大幅降低員工的工作效率。
simple: Lack of sleep will reduce your productivity.
simple_cn: 睡眠不足會降低你的工作效率。

example: Loud construction noises outside the building can easily distract workers from their tasks.
example_cn: 建築物外頭的施工噪音很大，很容易讓員工分心，無法專心工作。
simple: Smartphones often distract workers.
simple_cn: 智慧型手機常常讓上班族分心。

example: The popular K-pop star wore oversized glasses, which quickly set a trend among teenagers.
example_cn: 那位當紅的韓流明星戴著超大框眼鏡，很快就在青少年間掀起一股風潮。
pattern: S + set a trend in + N
simple: Her new hairstyle set a trend.
simple_cn: 她的新髮型帶起了一股潮流。

type: 動詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: The Taiwanese director's latest film won international recognition at the Cannes Film Festival.
example_cn: 那位台灣導演的最新作品，在坎城影展上獲得國際肯定。
pattern: S + win international recognition for + N
simple: The novel won international recognition.
simple_cn: 這本小說獲得國際肯定。

example: If the wound becomes infected, pus builds up under the skin and causes severe pain.
example_cn: 如果傷口受到感染，皮下會積膿，並引發劇烈疼痛。
pattern: Pus builds up in the infected area.
simple: As the bacteria multiply, pus builds up.
simple_cn: 隨著細菌繁殖，膿液會逐漸累積。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: A narrow beam of light shone through the crack in the old wooden door.
example_cn: 一道狹窄的光束，從老舊木門的裂縫中透了進來。
simple: The flashlight produced a strong beam of light.
simple_cn: 手電筒發出一道強烈的光束。

example: Rubbing your dirty hands against your eyelids can easily cause a painful eye stye.
example_cn: 用髒手去揉眼皮，很容易引起疼痛的針眼。
simple: An eye stye usually heals on its own.
simple_cn: 針眼通常會自己好。

example: Acne occurs when an oil gland in the skin becomes blocked and infected with bacteria.
example_cn: 青春痘是因為皮膚的油脂腺堵塞，並受到細菌感染而形成的。
simple: Overactive oil glands can cause oily skin.
simple_cn: 皮脂腺過度活躍會導致油性肌膚。

chinese: 醫療保健提供、醫療照護服務
example: The government promised to improve healthcare provision in remote rural areas.
example_cn: 政府承諾要改善偏遠鄉鎮的醫療服務。
simple: Healthcare provision is a basic human right.
simple_cn: 醫療保健是一項基本人權。

example: The expensive watch features genuine leather straps that are both durable and stylish.
example_cn: 這隻昂貴的手錶搭配真皮錶帶，既耐用又時尚。
pattern: S + wear a bag with leather straps
simple: The sandals are secured with leather straps.
simple_cn: 這雙涼鞋是用皮帶固定的。

example: Shoes with thick rubber soles provide better grip and prevent slipping on wet floors.
example_cn: 鞋底採用厚橡膠的鞋子抓地力比較好，能防止在濕滑的地板上滑倒。
pattern: Shoes with rubber soles are + Adj
simple: These boots have durable rubber soles.
simple_cn: 這雙靴子有耐用的橡膠鞋底。

example: Students must wear safety goggles when conducting chemical laboratory experiments.
example_cn: 學生在進行化學實驗時必須戴上護目鏡。
simple: Laboratory experiments require precision.
simple_cn: 做實驗需要精準度。

example: Ancient Egyptians placed food and jewelry in tombs as a funeral offering for the afterlife.
example_cn: 古埃及人會在墓穴中放置食物和珠寶，作為來世的陪葬品。
pattern: S + leave N as a funeral offering
simple: They found a rare funeral offering in the tomb.
simple_cn: 他們在墓裡發現了一個罕見的陪葬品。

chinese: 推理能力、邏輯思考能力
example: Playing chess is an excellent way to develop children's logical reasoning skills.
example_cn: 下棋是培養孩子邏輯推理能力的好方法。
simple: Math problems test your reasoning skills.
simple_cn: 數學題目考驗你的推理能力。

example: The author hired a local printing company to produce thousands of copies of his new book.
example_cn: 作者找了一家當地的印刷公司，印了好幾千本他的新書。
pattern: S + work at a printing company
simple: The printing company delivers high-quality posters.
simple_cn: 這家印刷公司做出高品質的海報。

example: She gasped when she looked at the price tag on the luxurious designer handbag.
example_cn: 她看到那個名牌精品包上的價格標籤時，倒抽了一口氣。
simple: Remember to remove the price tag before giving the gift.
simple_cn: 送禮物前記得把價格標籤撕掉。

example: In Britain, having afternoon tea with scones and sandwiches is a beloved tradition.
example_cn: 在英國，下午茶配司康和三明治是很受歡迎的傳統。
simple: We serve afternoon tea from 3 PM to 5 PM.
simple_cn: 我們下午三點到五點有供應下午茶。

example: The conference includes a short tea break at 10 a.m. for attendees to rest and network.
example_cn: 會議在早上十點安排了一段短暫的休息時間，讓與會者休息和交流。
simple: Let's discuss this further during the tea break.
simple_cn: 我們趁休息時間再好好討論這件事。

type: 現在分詞/動詞 + 副詞
example: If your computer is not functioning properly, you should restart the system first.
example_cn: 如果你的電腦運作不正常，應該先重新開機。
simple: Make sure the equipment is functioning properly.
simple_cn: 確認設備運作正常。

example: Many teenagers identify with the main character in the novel because they share similar struggles.
example_cn: 很多青少年對小說中的主角很有共鳴，因為他們有類似的煩惱。
simple: I easily identify with her feelings.
simple_cn: 我很容易理解她的感受。

type: 動詞(過去式) + 介系詞
example: Because they look exactly alike, I mistook him for his twin brother yesterday.
example_cn: 因為他們長得一模一樣，我昨天把他誤認成他的雙胞胎兄弟。
simple: She mistook salt for sugar when baking.
simple_cn: 她烤蛋糕的時候把鹽跟糖搞混了。

chinese: 因長大而不再... / 源自於...
example: He has grown out of his childhood habit of biting his nails.
example_cn: 他已經長大，改掉了小時候咬指甲的習慣。
pattern: S + has grown out of + 習慣/衣物
simple: The business has grown out of a small garage.
simple_cn: 這間生意是從一個小車庫做起來的。

example: We didn't have enough chairs for the guests, so we had to make do with some wooden boxes.
example_cn: 我們沒有足夠的椅子給客人坐，只好將就著用一些木箱。
pattern: S + have to make do with + N
simple: We will make do with what we have.
simple_cn: 我們將就著用手邊的東西來應付。

example: He is always bragging about how much money he makes, which annoys his friends.
example_cn: 他老是吹噓自己賺了多少錢，讓朋友們很反感。
pattern: S + like to brag about + N
simple: She bragged about winning the first prize.
simple_cn: 她吹噓自己得了第一名。

example: The discovery of the ancient manuscript helped shed light on the lost civilization.
example_cn: 這份古代手稿的發現，有助於揭開那個失落文明的面紗。
pattern: N + sheds light on + 謎團/問題
simple: The new evidence shed light on the mystery.
simple_cn: 新的證據讓這個謎團有了眉目。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 介系詞
example: The detective suspects that the recent robberies are closely connected with the local gang.
example_cn: 偵探懷疑近期的幾起搶案跟當地幫派有密切關聯。
pattern: A is closely connected with B.
simple: His illness is connected with stress.
simple_cn: 他的病跟壓力有關係。

example: The city of Paris is well-known for its romantic atmosphere and historical landmarks.
example_cn: 巴黎這座城市以浪漫的氛圍和歷史地標聞名。
simple: He is a well-known author.
simple_cn: 他是個知名作家。

example: He learned to play the electric guitar so he could join a local rock band.
example_cn: 他學彈電吉他，是為了加入當地的搖滾樂團。
simple: The rock band went on a world tour.
simple_cn: 這個搖滾樂團展開了世界巡迴。

example: The actor spent months practicing to perfect his thick Irish accent for the movie.
example_cn: 那位演員花了幾個月的時間練習，把濃厚的愛爾蘭口音練到完美，好配合電影需求。
pattern: S + speak with an Irish accent
simple: She has a charming Irish accent.
simple_cn: 她講話帶有迷人的愛爾蘭口音。

example: Because of the heavy typhoon, we had to cancel our picnic and switch to indoor activities.
example_cn: 因為強烈颱風的關係，我們只好取消野餐，改為室內活動。
simple: Board games are great indoor activities.
simple_cn: 桌遊是很棒的室內活動。

example: The charity organization collects winter coats and distributes them to needy families.
example_cn: 這個慈善機構收集冬季外套，並分送給有需要的家庭。
pattern: S + provide support for needy families
simple: They raise funds to help needy families.
simple_cn: 他們募款來幫助有需要的家庭。

example: The university invested millions of dollars to upgrade its old laboratory equipment.
example_cn: 這所大學投入了幾百萬美元來升級老舊的實驗室設備。
simple: Handle the laboratory equipment with care.
simple_cn: 實驗室器材要小心使用。

example: The Amazon rainforest is home to numerous species of rare birds and insects.
example_cn: 亞馬遜雨林是許多稀有鳥類和昆蟲的家園。
pattern: N + contains numerous species of + N
simple: Numerous species face extinction today.
simple_cn: 現在很多物種都面臨絕種危機。

example: Applying moisturizing lotion every day can help soothe and repair dry skin in winter.
example_cn: 每天擦保濕乳液可以幫助舒緩並修復冬天乾燥的皮膚。
simple: Drink more water if you have dry skin.
simple_cn: 如果你皮膚乾燥，要多喝水。

example: The allergic reaction to the seafood gave him red spots and extremely itchy skin.
example_cn: 他對海鮮過敏，結果身上長了紅疹，皮膚癢得不得了。
simple: Scratching will only make the itchy skin worse.
simple_cn: 抓癢只會讓皮膚更癢。

example: To ensure accurate survey results, the researchers must select a representative sample of the population.
example_cn: 為了確保調查結果準確，研究人員必須選出具代表性的樣本。
pattern: S + take a representative sample of + N
simple: This group is a representative sample of voters.
simple_cn: 這個群體是選民的代表性樣本。

example: The global green movement encourages citizens to recycle and reduce energy consumption.
example_cn: 全球環保運動鼓勵民眾回收垃圾並減少能源消耗。
pattern: N + is a part of the green movement.
simple: The green movement gained momentum in the 1970s.
simple_cn: 環保運動在1970年代開始蓬勃發展。

chinese: 淘氣的男孩、調皮的男孩
example: The mischievous boy played a prank on his older sister by hiding her shoes.
example_cn: 那個調皮的小男孩把姊姊的鞋子藏起來，惡作劇捉弄她。
pattern: The mischievous boy likes to + V
simple: She smiled at the mischievous boy.
simple_cn: 她對那個調皮的小男孩笑了笑。

example: We packed our tents and sleeping bags for a weekend camping trip in the mountains.
example_cn: 我們打包好帳篷和睡袋，準備去山上露營過週末。
pattern: S + go on a camping trip
simple: The camping trip was ruined by the rain.
simple_cn: 露營行程被雨給搞砸了。

example: DNA evidence plays a crucial role in solving cold cases in modern criminal investigations.
example_cn: DNA證據在現代刑案偵查中，對破解懸案扮演關鍵角色。
simple: The detective specializes in criminal investigations.
simple_cn: 這位偵探專門處理刑事案件。

example: Performing heart surgery requires a high degree of precision and concentration.
example_cn: 執行心臟手術需要極高的精準度和專注力。
pattern: N + requires a high degree of + N
simple: The job demands a high degree of skill.
simple_cn: 這份工作需要很高的技術水準。

example: The company moved its factory overseas in an attempt to significantly lower production costs.
example_cn: 這間公司把工廠遷到海外，試圖大幅降低生產成本。
simple: Rising raw materials increase production costs.
simple_cn: 原物料漲價會增加生產成本。

example: Taiwan has a strong comparative advantage in manufacturing semiconductor chips.
example_cn: 台灣在半導體晶片製造上擁有很強的比較優勢。
pattern: S + has a comparative advantage in + N
simple: Free trade relies on the theory of comparative advantage.
simple_cn: 自由貿易建立在比較優勢理論之上。

example: The historical treaty is of great political importance for maintaining peace in the region.
example_cn: 這項歷史條約對維持區域和平具有重大的政治意義。
pattern: N + is of great political importance.
simple: We cannot ignore its political importance.
simple_cn: 我們不能忽視它的政治重要性。

chinese: 必然正確的、一定是對的
example: Just because an article is popular on social media doesn't mean it is necessarily true.
example_cn: 一篇文章在社群媒體上很紅，不代表它就一定是真的。
pattern: It is not necessarily true that + S + V
simple: What he said is not necessarily true.
simple_cn: 他說的話不一定就是真的。

example: After centuries of soil erosion, the once fertile farm turned into a rocky wasteland.
example_cn: 經過幾世紀的土壤侵蝕，原本肥沃的農田變成了岩石遍地的荒地。
pattern: N + turned into a rocky wasteland.
simple: Nothing grows in this rocky wasteland.
simple_cn: 這片岩石荒地什麼都長不出來。

example: Volunteers planted hundreds of young trees on the hillside to prevent landslides.
example_cn: 志工們在山坡上種了幾百棵小樹，防止土石流發生。
simple: The young trees need to be watered regularly.
simple_cn: 小樹需要定期澆水。

example: The government established a massive man-made forest to improve the local ecosystem.
example_cn: 政府建造了一座大型人造森林，來改善當地的生態環境。
simple: A man-made forest helps reduce carbon.
simple_cn: 人造林有助於減少碳排放。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: In autumn, the gardener spends hours every morning sweeping away the fallen leaves.
example_cn: 秋天時，園丁每天早上都要花好幾個小時掃落葉。
pattern: The ground is covered with fallen leaves.
simple: Children like to jump into piles of fallen leaves.
simple_cn: 小孩子喜歡跳進落葉堆裡。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The teenagers snuck into the deserted property at night, looking for a ghost adventure.
example_cn: 這幾個青少年晚上偷偷溜進廢棄的房子，想來場鬼屋探險。
simple: The deserted property was eventually torn down.
simple_cn: 那棟廢棄的房產最後被拆掉了。

example: We took a long hike through the beautiful forest, enjoying the fresh air and singing birds.
example_cn: 我們在美麗的森林裡走了好長一段路，享受新鮮空氣和鳥兒的歌聲。
pattern: S + wander in a beautiful forest
simple: The beautiful forest is protected by the state.
simple_cn: 這片美麗的森林受到國家保護。

example: For centuries, indigenous people have used medicinal plants to cure various illnesses.
example_cn: 幾個世紀以來，原住民一直用藥草來治療各種疾病。
simple: Aloe is one of the most common medicinal plants.
simple_cn: 蘆薈是最常見的藥用植物之一。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: The famous author often says that hard work and perseverance are the secret of success.
example_cn: 那位知名作家常說，努力跟堅持才是成功的秘訣。
pattern: What is the secret of success?
simple: Discipline is the secret of success.
simple_cn: 紀律是成功的秘訣。

example: Sensitive perfectionists often struggle with severe anxiety when facing even mild criticism.
example_cn: 敏感的完美主義者就算只遇到一點點批評，也常常會陷入嚴重的焦慮。
simple: Sensitive perfectionists demand too much of themselves.
simple_cn: 敏感的完美主義者對自己要求太高。

example: Modern companies prefer to hire good team players rather than brilliant but selfish individuals.
example_cn: 現代企業比較喜歡雇用擅長團隊合作的人，而不是能力強但自私的員工。
pattern: S + is looking for good team players
simple: Good team players communicate well with others.
simple_cn: 好的團隊成員擅長與他人溝通。

example: She practiced pitching every day to earn a spot on the school's varsity softball team.
example_cn: 她每天練習投球，就是為了爭取進入學校的校隊壘球隊。
simple: Our softball team won the championship.
simple_cn: 我們的壘球隊贏得了冠軍。

example: Many major companies are investing heavily in artificial intelligence technology.
example_cn: 許多大公司都在砸重金投資人工智慧技術。
simple: He got a job offer from several major companies.
simple_cn: 他收到了好幾家大公司的工作錄取通知。

example: The prime minister announced a new economic policy to reduce the national debt.
example_cn: 總理宣布了一項新的經濟政策，目的是要減少國債。
pattern: The prime minister gave a speech.
simple: She was elected as the new prime minister.
simple_cn: 她當選為新任總理。

chinese: 脾氣暴躁的遭遇 / 充滿火藥味的衝突
example: The meeting quickly turned into a bad-tempered encounter with both sides shouting at each other.
example_cn: 那場會議很快就變成火爆場面，雙方互相大聲叫罵。
simple: They avoided another bad-tempered encounter.
simple_cn: 他們避免了又一次火爆的衝突。

example: The teacher didn't punish them because he knew the prank was just harmless fun.
example_cn: 老師沒有處罰他們，因為他知道那個惡作劇只是無傷大雅的玩笑。
pattern: It was just a bit of harmless fun.
simple: Don't be so serious; it's harmless fun.
simple_cn: 別那麼嚴肅啦，這只是無傷大雅的玩笑。

example: Honest communication and mutual respect are the foundations of happy relationships.
example_cn: 坦誠溝通跟互相尊重，是幸福關係的基礎。
simple: Trust is vital for happy relationships.
simple_cn: 信任是維繫幸福關係的關鍵。

example: After sitting in the corner of the cafe every day, the old man became a permanent fixture there.
example_cn: 那位老先生每天坐在咖啡廳的角落，久而久之就成了那裡的固定風景。
pattern: N + became a permanent fixture in/at + 地點
simple: The statue is a permanent fixture in the garden.
simple_cn: 這座雕像是花園裡的固定裝置。

example: The workers built a sturdy platform using thick wood to support the heavy machinery.
example_cn: 工人用厚實的木頭搭建了一個穩固的平台，用來支撐那些重型機械。
pattern: S + stand on a sturdy platform
simple: A sturdy platform prevents accidents.
simple_cn: 穩固的平台可以防止意外發生。

example: High school students from across the country showcased their creative gadgets at the annual Invention Fair.
example_cn: 來自全國各地的高中生，在年度發明展上展示了他們創意十足的裝置。
pattern: S + participate in the annual Invention Fair
simple: He won first prize at the annual Invention Fair.
simple_cn: 他在年度發明展上得了第一名。

type: 現在分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: The United Nations is trying its best to mediate the ongoing conflicts in the Middle East.
example_cn: 聯合國正盡全力調解中東地區持續不斷的衝突。
simple: The ongoing conflicts caused much suffering.
simple_cn: 持續的衝突造成了許多苦難。

example: The building was condemned because the earthquake had caused severe structural damage.
example_cn: 那棟建築物因為地震造成嚴重的結構損壞，被判定為危樓。
pattern: N + caused structural damage to + N
simple: Inspectors checked the bridge for structural damage.
simple_cn: 檢查員檢查了橋樑是否有結構損壞。

type: 過去分詞(作形容詞) + 名詞
example: War and extreme famine led to the forced migration of thousands of innocent civilians.
example_cn: 戰爭跟嚴重的饑荒，導致數千名無辜平民被迫逃離家園。
simple: The policy caused a wave of forced migration.
simple_cn: 這項政策引發了一波強制遷移潮。

type: 形容詞 + 形容詞 + 名詞
example: The nation was completely torn apart by a bloody civil war that lasted for decades.
example_cn: 那個國家因為一場長達數十年的血腥內戰，徹底四分五裂。
pattern: S + survived the bloody civil war.
simple: The history book details the bloody civil war.
simple_cn: 這本歷史書詳細記載了血腥的內戰。

example: A large portion of the taxes we pay is used to fund essential public services like healthcare and education.
example_cn: 我們繳的稅，有很大一部分是用來資助醫療跟教育這些重要的公共服務。
simple: They demanded better public services.
simple_cn: 他們要求更好的公共服務。

example: The hospital staff was pushed to the breaking point during the peak of the pandemic.
example_cn: 在疫情最嚴重的時候，醫院的工作人員被逼到了極限。
simple: His patience finally reached its breaking point.
simple_cn: 他的耐心終於到了極限。

example: Despite her earnest request for more time, the strict teacher refused to extend the deadline.
example_cn: 儘管她誠懇地請求再多給一點時間，那位嚴格的老師還是拒絕延長截止日期。
simple: The charity sent out an earnest request for donations.
simple_cn: 慈善機構發出誠摯的募款請求。

example: The lack of rainfall quickly escalated into a severe regional crisis affecting several countries.
example_cn: 降雨不足很快就演變成影響好幾個國家的嚴重區域危機。
simple: The war caused a major regional crisis.
simple_cn: 這場戰爭引發了一場重大的區域危機。

example: Rapid advancements in technology have deeply impacted our individual lives in many ways.
example_cn: 科技的快速進步在許多方面深深影響了我們每個人的生活。
simple: History is made up of individual lives.
simple_cn: 歷史是由一個個人的生命所組成的。

example: The industrial factory produces massive amounts of carbon dioxide every single day.
example_cn: 這間工業工廠每天都會排放大量的二氧化碳。
pattern: S + consume/produce massive amounts of + N
simple: He drank massive amounts of coffee.
simple_cn: 他喝了超大量的咖啡。

example: Many shallow rivers in the savanna dry up completely during the harsh dry season.
example_cn: 在嚴酷的乾季，熱帶草原上許多淺河會完全乾涸。
pattern: During the dry season, S + V
simple: Fires are common in the dry season.
simple_cn: 乾季的時候火災很常見。

example: Local farmers usually plant their rice crops at the very beginning of the wet season.
example_cn: 當地農民通常會在雨季一開始就種植水稻。
pattern: N + happens in the wet season.
simple: The roads are muddy during the wet season.
simple_cn: 雨季的時候道路會變得泥濘。

example: Excessive sweating during intense workouts can cause a dangerous loss of body water.
example_cn: 激烈運動時大量流汗，可能會導致身體水分流失到危險的程度。
pattern: S + need to replenish body water
simple: Dehydration is a lack of body water.
simple_cn: 脫水就是身體缺乏水分。

example: You should always bring a sturdy umbrella when traveling to Taiwan during the rainy season.
example_cn: 在雨季去台灣旅遊時，一定要隨身帶一把堅固的雨傘。
pattern: It rains a lot in the rainy season.
simple: The rainy season brings cooler temperatures.
simple_cn: 雨季會帶來比較涼爽的氣溫。

example: The department store launched a big campaign to promote the holiday sale.
example_cn: 這間百貨公司為了促銷假期特賣，推出了一波大型活動。
pattern: S + launch a campaign to promote sale
simple: Discounts help promote the clearance sale.
simple_cn: 折扣有助於促銷清倉拍賣。

example: He was hesitant to deliver the bad news to his family.
example_cn: 他猶豫著要不要把這個壞消息告訴家人。
pattern: S + deliver the (good/bad) news to + 人
simple: The messenger delivered the urgent news.
simple_cn: 送信的人傳達了這個緊急消息。

example: She was disappointed to fail the job interview despite her thorough preparation.
example_cn: 儘管做了充分的準備，她還是沒通過工作面試，感到很失望。
simple: He failed the interview because he was late.
simple_cn: 他因為遲到所以面試沒過。

example: The flight attendant asked all passengers to fasten their seatbelts before takeoff.
example_cn: 空服員請所有乘客在起飛前繫好安全帶。
simple: Safety regulations require everyone to fasten seatbelts.
simple_cn: 安全規定要求每個人都要繫好安全帶。

example: Wearing a helmet while cycling can significantly reduce the risk of head injuries.
example_cn: 騎腳踏車時戴安全帽，可以大幅降低頭部受傷的風險。
pattern: S + reduce the risk of + N
simple: Regular checkups help reduce risk.
simple_cn: 定期檢查有助於降低風險。

chinese: 撥出 (時間/金錢) / 擱置
example: I try to set aside some time every day for reading and self-reflection.
example_cn: 我試著每天撥出一點時間來閱讀和自省。
pattern: S + set aside + 時間/金錢 + for + N
simple: The government set aside funds for education.
simple_cn: 政府撥出了一筆教育經費。

example: The negotiators hope to reach an agreement by the end of the week.
example_cn: 談判代表希望在週末前達成協議。
simple: They failed to reach an agreement on the budget.
simple_cn: 他們沒能就預算達成協議。

type: 動詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: The two brothers differ in opinion regarding how to manage the family business.
example_cn: 這兩兄弟對於如何經營家族企業的看法不同。
pattern: A and B differ in opinion.
simple: Members differ in opinion on this topic.
simple_cn: 成員們對這個議題的看法不一樣。

example: Leaders must be able to make quick decisions during emergency situations.
example_cn: 領導者在緊急狀況下必須能夠快速做出決策。
pattern: S + have to make tough decisions.
simple: It is hard to make decisions under pressure.
simple_cn: 在壓力下做決定很困難。

example: She is trying to save money to buy a new laptop for university.
example_cn: 她正在努力存錢，想買一台新筆電上大學用。
simple: Coupons help you save money.
simple_cn: 優惠券可以幫你省錢。

chinese: 獲得批准 / 獲得認可
example: The new project must gain approval from the board of directors before it starts.
example_cn: 這個新專案在啟動之前，必須先獲得董事會的批准。
simple: His proposal gained official approval.
simple_cn: 他的提案獲得了官方批准。

chinese: 贏得芳心 / 征服心靈
example: The humble street musician conquered the hearts of the audience with his soulful songs.
example_cn: 這位樸實的街頭藝人用他充滿靈魂的歌曲征服了觀眾的心。
pattern: S + conquered the hearts of many.
simple: His kindness conquered her heart.
simple_cn: 他的體貼征服了她的心。

example: The severe drought and lack of water ruined the entire farm.
example_cn: 嚴重的乾旱和缺水毀掉了整座農場。
simple: Pests can quickly ruin a farm.
simple_cn: 害蟲很快就會毀掉一個農場。

example: The rich businessman received a ransom note after the criminals kidnapped his son.
example_cn: 那個有錢的商人因為兒子被綁架，收到了勒索信。
simple: They were caught for attempting to kidnap the boy.
simple_cn: 他們因為意圖綁架那個男孩被抓到了。

example: The insurance company agreed to compensate the loss caused by the fire.
example_cn: 保險公司同意賠償火災造成的損失。
pattern: S + compensate the loss of + N
simple: Money cannot compensate for the loss of a loved one.
simple_cn: 金錢無法彌補失去親人的痛苦。

chinese: 送回男孩 / 歸還男孩
example: The kidnappers promised to return the boy safely once the money was paid.
example_cn: 綁匪承諾，只要錢到手就會安全放回那個男孩。
pattern: S + return the boy to + 人
simple: The police returned the lost boy to his parents.
simple_cn: 警方把走失的男孩交還給他的父母。

example: In politics, parties often play games with each other to win public support.
example_cn: 在政治中，政黨之間常常互相較勁，來爭取民眾的支持。
pattern: Stop playing games and tell me the truth.
simple: Children love to play games together.
simple_cn: 小朋友很喜歡一起玩遊戲。

example: The robber ordered the clerk to hand over all the cash in the register.
example_cn: 搶匪命令店員把收銀機裡的所有現金交出來。
simple: The power was handed over to the new president.
simple_cn: 權力已經交接給新任總統。

chinese: 偵測說謊 / 察覺謊言
example: Modern polygraphs are designed to detect lying by monitoring physical changes in the body.
example_cn: 現代的測謊機是透過監測身體的生理變化來偵測說謊。
pattern: It is hard to detect lying from facial expressions.
simple: Scientists study how to detect lying.
simple_cn: 科學家研究如何偵測說謊。

example: The kidneys filter waste from the blood to produce urine.
example_cn: 腎臟負責過濾血液中的廢物，製造尿液。
simple: High salt intake affects how much urine is produced.
simple_cn: 攝取過多的鹽會影響尿液的產生量。

example: In many developing regions, people have to walk long distances to fetch water every day.
example_cn: 在許多開發中地區，人們每天得走很遠的路去取水。
pattern: S + go to the well to fetch water
simple: Could you fetch me some water?
simple_cn: 可以幫我倒杯水嗎？

example: He worked as a waiter for years before he could realize his dream of owning a restaurant.
example_cn: 他當了好幾年的服務生，才終於實現擁有自己餐廳的夢想。
simple: It's never too late to realize your dream.
simple_cn: 實現夢想永遠不嫌晚。

chinese: 轉換財產 / 改變性質
example: Chemical reactions can transform the property of a substance entirely.
example_cn: 化學反應可以徹底改變物質的性質。
pattern: N + can transform the property of + N
simple: Water transforms its property when it freezes.
simple_cn: 水在結冰時會改變它的性質。

example: The company decided to adopt eco-friendly methods to reduce its carbon footprint.
example_cn: 公司決定採用環保方法，來減少碳足跡。
pattern: S + adopt new methods to + V
simple: Schools are adopting modern teaching methods.
simple_cn: 學校正在採用現代的教學方法。

chinese: 揭露個人檔案 / 展示輪廓
example: The data breach revealed the profiles of millions of users online.
example_cn: 這次資料外洩，揭露了數百萬名使用者的線上個人資料。
simple: The light revealed the profile of the mountains.
simple_cn: 光線顯現出山巒的輪廓。

chinese: 歸咎失敗 / 責怪過失
example: He tends to blame his failings on bad luck rather than his lack of effort.
example_cn: 他傾向於把自己的失敗歸咎於運氣不好，而不是自己不夠努力。
pattern: S + blame one's failings on + N
simple: Don't just blame your failings on others.
simple_cn: 不要老是把失敗怪到別人頭上。

example: She was too shy to enter the singing contest, but her friends encouraged her.
example_cn: 她本來太害羞不敢參加歌唱比賽，但在朋友的鼓勵下還是去了。
simple: Many students entered the writing contest.
simple_cn: 很多學生參加了寫作比賽。

example: The carpenter used a circular saw to cut the thick wooden plank.
example_cn: 木匠用圓鋸切開那塊厚木板。
pattern: S + use a saw to cut the plank
simple: He is cutting a plank for the floor.
simple_cn: 他正在鋸一塊地板用的木板。

chinese: 充當支撐 / 作為支持
example: These steel beams serve as support for the entire roof structure.
example_cn: 這些鋼樑是用來支撐整個屋頂結構的。
pattern: N + serves as support for + N
simple: Pillars serve as support for the balcony.
simple_cn: 柱子是用來支撐陽台的。

example: The actor made several public appearances to promote his latest movie.
example_cn: 那位演員為了宣傳新片，公開亮相了好幾次。
simple: The celebrity made an appearance at the event.
simple_cn: 那位名人在活動中現身。

example: In some remote areas, children have to walk miles every day to attend school.
example_cn: 在一些偏遠地區，孩子們每天得走好幾英里的路去上學。
pattern: S + attend school in + 地方
simple: He attends a local vocational school.
simple_cn: 他就讀於當地的職業學校。

type: 名詞 / 動詞 + 名詞
example: The exchange students will be staying with local host families during the summer program.
example_cn: 這些交換學生在暑期課程期間，會住在當地的寄宿家庭裡。
pattern: S + stay with a host family
simple: Host families provide a cultural experience.
simple_cn: 寄宿家庭能提供文化體驗。

example: The central bank lowered interest rates to ease the growing financial crisis.
example_cn: 中央銀行調降利率，以緩解日益嚴重的金融危機。
pattern: S + take steps to ease the crisis
simple: Humanitarian aid helped ease the crisis.
simple_cn: 人道援助有助於緩解危機。

chinese: 摧毀生命 / 壓垮生活
example: The devastating war crushed the lives of thousands of innocent civilians.
example_cn: 這場毀滅性的戰爭奪走了數千名無辜平民的生命。
simple: Poverty can crush the lives of young people.
simple_cn: 貧窮會壓垮年輕人的生活。

example: It is difficult to get rid of old habits, but it is possible with persistence.
example_cn: 要改掉舊習慣很難，但只要堅持下去還是有可能做到。
pattern: S + need to get rid of + N
simple: We should get rid of these old clothes.
simple_cn: 我們應該把這些舊衣服處理掉。

chinese: 舔食資源 / 欣然接受資源
example: Small animals sometimes lap up the mineral resources from the surface of the rails.
example_cn: 小動物有時會舔食鐵軌表面的礦物質。
simple: The kittens lapped up the milk.
simple_cn: 小貓把牛奶舔得乾乾淨淨。

example: Camel can endure severe dehydration for long periods while traveling in the desert.
example_cn: 駱駝在沙漠中長途旅行時，能夠忍受長時間的嚴重脫水。
pattern: S + can endure dehydration for + 時間
simple: Athletes must avoid dehydration during a race.
simple_cn: 運動員在比賽中必須避免脫水。

type: 名詞 + 動詞(系動詞+形容詞)
example: In the tropical rainforest, the species of insects are extremely numerous.
example_cn: 在熱帶雨林裡，昆蟲的種類多到數不清。
pattern: N + are numerous in + 地方
simple: The stars are numerous on a clear night.
simple_cn: 晴朗的夜晚星星很多。

example: Everything was going fine until the secret plan suddenly got out of control.
example_cn: 原本一切都很順利，直到那個秘密計畫突然失控。
pattern: The situation/plan + got out of control.
simple: The fire quickly got out of control.
simple_cn: 火勢很快就失控了。

chinese: 潛在的理論 / 基礎理論
type: 名詞 + 現在分詞(修飾語)
example: The theory underlying this study is based on recent advancements in neuroscience.
example_cn: 這項研究背後的理論基礎，是根據神經科學的最新進展。
simple: We need to understand the principles underlying the law.
simple_cn: 我們需要了解法律背後的原則。

example: Global trade is driven primarily by the demand for high-tech electronics.
example_cn: 全球貿易主要是由對高科技電子產品的需求所驅動。
simple: Innovation is driven by curiosity.
simple_cn: 創新是由好奇心驅動的。

example: Surprisingly, several ancient trees survived the devastating forest fire.
example_cn: 令人驚訝的是，有幾棵老樹在毀滅性的森林大火中存活了下來。
simple: Only a few houses survived the earthquake.
simple_cn: 只有少數幾棟房子在地震中倖存下來。

example: Years after the planting project started, the new forest began to take shape.
example_cn: 植樹計畫啟動多年後，這片新森林終於開始成形。
simple: Her ideas for the book finally began to take shape.
simple_cn: 她對這本書的想法終於開始成形。

type: 名詞 + 動詞 + 反身代名詞
example: Environmentalists believe that nature renews itself if we reduce human interference.
example_cn: 環保人士認為，只要我們減少人為干擾，大自然就會自行恢復。
pattern: Nature renews itself + 時間/條件
simple: The cycle shows how nature renews itself.
simple_cn: 這個循環顯示大自然如何自我更新。

example: In this arid region, rain falls very rarely throughout the year.
example_cn: 在這個乾旱地區，一整年幾乎都不下雨。
simple: Night fell as the rain falls.
simple_cn: 夜幕降臨，就像下雨一樣。

example: Severe dehydration explains why the hiker felt dizzy and confused.
example_cn: 嚴重脫水是導致那位登山客頭暈目眩、意識混亂的原因。
simple: The report explains the cause of the fire.
simple_cn: 這份報告說明了火災的原因。

example: During the Christmas season, store windows are decorated with festive lights and trees.
example_cn: 聖誕節期間，商店櫥窗會用應景的燈飾和聖誕樹來裝飾。
pattern: S + gaze at the store windows
simple: People enjoyed window shopping at the store windows.
simple_cn: 人們喜歡在商店櫥窗前逛街。

example: The concert tickets were sold out within minutes of being released online.
example_cn: 演唱會的門票在網路開賣後幾分鐘內就銷售一空。
simple: I managed to get two concert tickets.
simple_cn: 我設法弄到了兩張演唱會的門票。

example: He was lucky to survive the car accident with only a few minor scratches.
example_cn: 他很幸運在車禍中活了下來，只有幾處輕微擦傷。
pattern: S + be involved in a car accident
simple: Drunk driving causes many car accidents.
simple_cn: 酒駕造成許多車禍。

example: The generous donor established a scholarship fund to help students from low-income families.
example_cn: 那位慷慨的捐贈者設立了一筆獎學金，用來幫助低收入家庭的學生。
pattern: S + set up a scholarship fund
simple: The scholarship fund supports gifted students.
simple_cn: 獎學金基金會資助有天分的學生。

example: Please make sure the cabinet door is closed tightly to prevent dust from getting inside.
example_cn: 請確保櫥櫃門關緊，以免灰塵跑進去。
simple: The cabinet door was broken.
simple_cn: 櫥櫃的門壞了。

example: The high school student won first prize in the national invention contest with her eco-friendly gadget.
example_cn: 那位高中生用她設計的環保小裝置，在全國發明比賽中贏得了第一名。
simple: The invention contest attracted many young creators.
simple_cn: 發明競賽吸引了許多年輕創作者。

example: The bathroom sink was clogged, so we had to call a plumber to fix it.
example_cn: 浴室洗手台塞住了，所以我們只好叫水電師傅來修理。
pattern: Water splashes in the bathroom sink.
simple: Clean the bathroom sink regularly.
simple_cn: 定期清理浴室洗手台。

example: The company suffered a significant business loss due to the sudden economic downturn.
example_cn: 公司因為突然的經濟衰退，蒙受了重大的業務損失。
simple: They tried to minimize their business loss.
simple_cn: 他們試著把生意上的損失降到最低。

example: The kidnappers demanded a massive ransom for the safe return of the hostage.
example_cn: 綁匪要求支付巨額贖金，才願意安全釋放人質。
simple: The family couldn't afford the ransom.
simple_cn: 那家人付不出贖金。

example: The suspect agreed to take a lie detector test to prove his innocence.
example_cn: 嫌犯同意接受測謊測試，以證明自己的清白。
pattern: S + take a lie detector test
simple: A lie detector measures physical reactions.
simple_cn: 測謊機是用來測量生理反應的。

example: High salt intake is a major factor that can lead to high blood pressure.
example_cn: 攝取過多的鹽分是導致高血壓的主要因素之一。
simple: He takes medicine for his blood pressure.
simple_cn: 他為了血壓在吃藥。

example: Land, labor, and capital are considered the three main production factors in economics.
example_cn: 在經濟學中，土地、勞動力和資本被視為三大生產要素。
simple: The company optimized its production factors.
simple_cn: 公司優化了它的生產要素。

example: The World Trade Organization aims to ensure that trade flows as smoothly and freely as possible.
example_cn: 世界貿易組織的目標是確保貿易能夠盡可能順暢且自由地進行。
pattern: S + join the World Trade Organization
simple: The country applied to the World Trade Organization.
simple_cn: 那個國家向世界貿易組織提出了申請。

example: The airline ticketing agent helped the passengers rebook their flights after the cancellation.
example_cn: 航空公司的票務人員協助旅客在航班取消後重新訂位。
pattern: S + work as an airline ticketing agent
simple: Ask the airline ticketing agent for help.
simple_cn: 找航空公司的票務人員幫忙。

example: In some cultures, people believe that blood type can influence a person's personality.
example_cn: 在某些文化中，人們相信血型會影響一個人的個性。
simple: Her blood type is AB positive.
simple_cn: 她的血型是AB型陽性。

example: The school's women's softball team won the championship trophy for the third year in a row.
example_cn: 學校的女子壘球隊連續第三年贏得了冠軍獎盃。
pattern: S + join the women's softball team
simple: She is the captain of the women's softball team.
simple_cn: 她是女子壘球隊的隊長。

example: The 2008 Beijing Olympics was a massive event that attracted athletes from all over the world.
example_cn: 2008年北京奧運是一場盛大的賽事，吸引了來自世界各地的運動員。
pattern: During the Beijing Olympics, S + V
simple: The city was transformed for the Beijing Olympics.
simple_cn: 為了北京奧運，那個城市進行了大改造。

example: The president delivered an emotional resignation speech on live television yesterday.
example_cn: 總統昨天在電視直播中發表了一場情緒激動的辭職演說。
simple: Her resignation speech shocked the nation.
simple_cn: 她的辭職演說震驚了全國。

chinese: 血型騷擾 (依據血型對人產生偏見或歧視)
example: Blood-type harassment, known as 'bura-hara' in Japan, can occur in workplaces or schools.
example_cn: 在日本，血型霸凌（日文稱為「bura-hara」）可能發生在職場或學校。
simple: Blood-type harassment is a social issue in some countries.
simple_cn: 血型霸凌在某些國家是社會問題。

example: The new industrial park is expected to create thousands of job opportunities for local residents.
example_cn: 新的工業園區預計將為當地居民創造數千個就業機會。
pattern: S + provide job opportunities for + N
simple: Moving to a city offers more job opportunities.
simple_cn: 搬到城市裡會有更多工作機會。

example: I usually keep the first-aid kit in the bathroom cabinet for easy access.
example_cn: 我通常把急救箱放在浴室櫃子裡，方便拿取。
pattern: S + store N in the bathroom cabinet
simple: The bathroom cabinet is full of medicine.
simple_cn: 浴室的櫃子裡放滿了藥。

example: The Middle East is a region known for its rich history and vast oil reserves.
example_cn: 中東地區以其豐富的歷史和龐大的石油儲量聞名。
pattern: Conflicts in the Middle East + V
simple: He traveled across the Middle East.
simple_cn: 他走遍了中東地區。

chinese: 暴力潮 (暴力的蔓延或激增)
example: The government is struggling to stem the rising tide of violence in the capital city.
example_cn: 政府正努力遏止首都日益升高的暴力浪潮。
simple: The police tried to stop the tide of violence.
simple_cn: 警方試圖阻止暴力浪潮。

example: Dallas County officials have announced new measures to improve public safety.
example_cn: 達拉斯縣官員宣布了新的措施，以改善公共安全。
simple: He is a resident of Dallas County.
simple_cn: 他是達拉斯郡的居民。

example: Seabirds have specialized salt-expelling glands that allow them to drink seawater.
example_cn: 海鳥擁有特殊的排鹽腺體，讓牠們能夠飲用海水。
simple: Sea turtles use salt-expelling glands to get rid of excess salt.
simple_cn: 海龜用排鹽腺來排出多餘的鹽分。

example: The doctor carefully evaluated the athlete's body condition after the injury.
example_cn: 醫生仔細評估了運動員受傷後的身體狀況。
pattern: S + be in good/poor body condition
simple: Regular exercise improves your body condition.
simple_cn: 規律運動能改善你的身體狀況。

example: The famous painting is currently displayed in a secure room at the Louvre.
example_cn: 這幅名畫目前陳列在羅浮宮的一個安全房間裡。
pattern: N + be displayed in + 地方
simple: Artifacts are displayed in the museum.
simple_cn: 文物在博物館裡展出。

example: I need to speak with the manager regarding the refund for the defective item.
example_cn: 我需要跟經理談一下關於瑕疵品的退款問題。
pattern: S + speak with + 人 + about + 事
simple: Can I speak with you for a moment?
simple_cn: 可以跟你講一下話嗎？

example: The sick boy was confined to his bed for a whole week due to a severe flu.
example_cn: 那個生病的男孩因為嚴重流感，整整一個禮拜都下不了床。
simple: The research is confined to this specific area.
simple_cn: 這項研究只限於這個特定區域。

example: All visitors are required to wear a mask and sanitize their hands before entering.
example_cn: 所有訪客在進入前都必須戴口罩並消毒雙手。
simple: Students are required to attend the lecture.
simple_cn: 學生必須參加這場講座。

example: Many volunteers were involved in the rescue operation after the earthquake.
example_cn: 地震過後，許多志工都投入了救援行動。
simple: He was involved in a serious scandal.
simple_cn: 他捲入了一樁嚴重的醜聞。

example: This small island is heavily dependent on tourism for its economy.
example_cn: 這個小島的經濟非常依賴觀光業。
simple: Children are dependent on their parents.
simple_cn: 小孩需要依賴父母。

example: The scientists are currently working on a new vaccine to prevent the virus.
example_cn: 科學家們目前正在研發一種新的疫苗來預防這種病毒。
simple: He is working on his latest novel.
simple_cn: 他正在寫他的最新小說。

example: The Amazon rainforest is home to thousands of unique animal species.
example_cn: 亞馬遜雨林是數千種獨特動物的家。
pattern: 地方 + is home to + N
simple: Taiwan is home to many beautiful mountains.
simple_cn: 台灣有很多美麗的山。

example: The water molecule is composed of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
example_cn: 水分子是由兩個氫原子和一個氧原子組成的。
simple: The team is composed of talented individuals.
simple_cn: 這個團隊由一群有才華的人組成。

example: Please make sure the label is firmly attached to the package before shipping.
example_cn: 出貨前請確保標籤牢牢貼在包裹上。
simple: She is very attached to her pet dog.
simple_cn: 她非常黏她的寵物狗。

example: The heavy metal gate began to swing out slowly as the wind picked up.
example_cn: 隨著風勢增強，那道沉重的金屬門開始慢慢向外擺動。
simple: The robot arm swung out to grab the item.
simple_cn: 機器手臂伸出去抓取物品。

example: The ears of some cats can fold back when they feel angry or threatened.
example_cn: 有些貓咪在生氣或受到威脅時，耳朵會往後折。
simple: He folded back the page to mark his place.
simple_cn: 他把那一頁折起來做記號。

example: The local restaurant was featured on a famous cooking show last week.
example_cn: 上週那家在地餐廳上了知名烹飪節目。
simple: She was featured on the cover of the magazine.
simple_cn: 她登上了那本雜誌的封面。

example: They decided to move away from the busy city and live in the quiet countryside.
example_cn: 他們決定搬離繁忙的城市，到寧靜的鄉下生活。
simple: The deer moved away when it heard a noise.
simple_cn: 那隻鹿聽到聲音就跑開了。

example: The angry farmer tried to drive the wild animals from his field.
example_cn: 憤怒的農夫試圖把野生動物從他的田地裡趕走。
pattern: S + drive O + from + 地點
simple: They were driven from their homes by the war.
simple_cn: 他們因為戰爭被迫離開家園。

example: You should focus on your studies instead of playing video games all day.
example_cn: 你應該專注在課業上，而不是整天打電動。
simple: The meeting focused on the new marketing strategy.
simple_cn: 會議重點放在新的行銷策略上。

example: The excited child scooped up the tiny puppy and hugged it tightly.
example_cn: 興奮的小孩一把抱起那隻小狗，緊緊地抱住牠。
simple: He scooped up a handful of sand.
simple_cn: 他捧起一把沙子。

chinese: 身體受限的、行動受限的
example: Due to the injury, the athlete was physically confined to a wheelchair for months.
example_cn: 因為受傷，那位運動員好幾個月都只能坐在輪椅上。
pattern: S + be physically confined to + N
simple: Elderly patients may be physically confined.
simple_cn: 年長患者可能行動受限。

chinese: 體力活躍的、經常運動的
example: Staying physically active is one of the best ways to maintain long-term health.
example_cn: 保持身體活動是維持長期健康最好的方法之一。
simple: He is still physically active at eighty.
simple_cn: 他八十歲了還是很活躍。

example: Electric cars are more environmentally friendly than traditional gasoline-powered vehicles.
example_cn: 電動車比傳統汽油車更環保。
simple: Choose environmentally friendly products.
simple_cn: 選擇環保的產品。

example: You know perfectly well why I am angry with you right now.
example_cn: 你很清楚我現在為什麼對你生氣。
simple: She performed perfectly well under pressure.
simple_cn: 她在壓力下表現得非常好。

example: A well-trained dog will listen to its owner's commands immediately.
example_cn: 訓練有素的狗會立刻聽從主人的指令。
simple: The company has many well-trained employees.
simple_cn: 這家公司有很多訓練有素的員工。

example: I was greatly encouraged by the positive feedback I received from my teacher.
example_cn: 老師給我的正面回饋讓我備受鼓舞。
pattern: S + be greatly encouraged to + V
simple: He felt greatly encouraged after the talk.
simple_cn: 他聽完那番話後，感到備受鼓舞。

chinese: 據傳製造了...、據報導做了...
example: The mysterious billionaire reportedly made a massive donation to the local hospital.
example_cn: 據報導，那位神祕的億萬富翁對當地醫院捐了一大筆錢。
simple: The company reportedly makes millions in profit.
simple_cn: 據報導，這家公司賺了數百萬的利潤。

example: The document is entirely composed of data from the latest research study.
example_cn: 這份文件完全由最新研究數據組成。
pattern: N + be entirely composed of + N
simple: The structure is entirely composed of wood.
simple_cn: 這個結構完全是用木頭建造的。

type: 名詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: Having a stable job and a happy home provides a strong sense of security.
example_cn: 擁有穩定的工作和美滿的家庭，能帶來強烈的安全感。
pattern: S + provide a sense of security
simple: Money doesn't always bring a sense of security.
simple_cn: 有錢不一定能帶來安全感。

example: The new company policy is entirely in line with current safety regulations.
example_cn: 公司的新政策完全符合現行的安全法規。
pattern: A + is in line with + B
simple: His actions are not in line with his words.
simple_cn: 他的行為跟說的話不一致。

example: The president declared a state of emergency after the massive earthquake hit the coast.
example_cn: 強烈地震侵襲沿海地區後，總統宣布進入緊急狀態。
pattern: S + declare a state of emergency
simple: The city remained in a state of emergency for weeks.
simple_cn: 這座城市連續好幾週都處於緊急狀態。

example: The two neighboring countries have been in a state of war for over three years.
example_cn: 這兩個鄰國已經處於戰爭狀態超過三年。
pattern: S + be in a state of war
simple: The official state of war ended yesterday.
simple_cn: 官方的戰爭狀態昨天結束了。

example: After the accident, the young driver's life hung in the balance for several days.
example_cn: 車禍發生後，那位年輕司機的性命好幾天都懸在一線。
simple: The future of the company is in the balance.
simple_cn: 這家公司的未來還不確定。

example: This country has a significant comparative advantage over its neighbors in tech production.
example_cn: 這個國家在科技生產上比鄰國擁有顯著的比較優勢。
pattern: S + have a comparative advantage over + N
simple: Skills give you a comparative advantage over others.
simple_cn: 技能能讓你在與他人競爭時佔有相對優勢。

example: The CEO has a very tight schedule today, with meetings from morning until night.
example_cn: 執行長今天的行程排得非常滿，從早到晚都在開會。
simple: I have a tight schedule this week.
simple_cn: 我這週的行程排得很滿。

example: An amateur designer created the logo for the local community center.
example_cn: 當地社區中心的標誌是由一位業餘設計師創作的。
simple: She is a talented amateur designer.
simple_cn: 她是個很有天分的業餘設計師。

type: 名詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: The school is looking for a qualified person to fill theteaching vacancy.
example_cn: 學校正在尋找合格的人選來填補教師缺額。
simple: There is a teaching vacancy in our department.
simple_cn: 我們系上有一個教職缺額。

chinese: 均衡攝取 / 均衡消費
example: Health experts recommend the balanced consumption of protein, fats, and carbohydrates.
example_cn: 健康專家建議均衡攝取蛋白質、脂肪和碳水化合物。
pattern: S + recommend balanced consumption of + N
simple: Balanced consumption is key to health.
simple_cn: 均衡的飲食是健康的關鍵。

example: The new policy has raised grave concerns among environmental activists.
example_cn: 這項新政策引起了環保人士的嚴重擔憂。
pattern: N + raise grave concerns about + N
simple: Doctors expressed grave concerns about the virus.
simple_cn: 醫生們對這種病毒表達了嚴重的擔憂。

example: The community held a vigil to remember those lost in the tragic incidents.
example_cn: 社區舉辦了一場守夜活動，悼念那些在悲劇事件中喪生的人。
simple: We must prevent such tragic incidents.
simple_cn: 我們必須防止這類悲劇事件發生。

example: The laboratory carefully controlled the reproductive conditions of the experimental mice.
example_cn: 實驗室嚴格控制了實驗老鼠的繁殖條件。
pattern: N + affects the reproductive conditions of + N
simple: Pollution can alter reproductive conditions.
simple_cn: 污染可能會改變生物的繁殖狀況。

example: Male birds often use bright feathers to attract females and increase mating opportunities.
example_cn: 雄鳥常利用鮮豔的羽毛來吸引雌鳥，增加交配機會。
simple: Stronger males have more mating opportunities.
simple_cn: 體格較強的雄性有更多交配機會。

example: The small inn provided a warm meal and a soft bed for the weary travelers.
example_cn: 這間小旅館為疲憊的旅客提供了熱騰騰的飯菜和柔軟的床鋪。
pattern: N + provides rest for weary travelers.
simple: The weary travelers finally arrived home.
simple_cn: 疲憊的旅客終於回到了家。

example: The restaurant's elegant atmosphere and excellent service enhance the dining experience.
example_cn: 餐廳優雅的氣氛和優質的服務，提升了用餐體驗。
simple: We had a wonderful dining experience.
simple_cn: 我們有過一次很棒的用餐體驗。

example: Eating small portions several times a day can help maintain a stable blood sugar level.
example_cn: 少量多餐有助於維持穩定的血糖值。
pattern: S + eat small portions to + V
simple: The kids were served small portions.
simple_cn: 給小孩吃的份量都比較少。

example: Habitual nappers often report feeling more alert and productive in the late afternoon.
example_cn: 習慣午睡的人通常會覺得下午時段精神更好、工作效率更高。
simple: Research was conducted on habitual nappers.
simple_cn: 有研究針對有午睡習慣的人進行調查。

example: She used her acquired knowledge of ancient history to solve the mystery.
example_cn: 她運用自己學到的古代歷史知識來解開這個謎團。
pattern: S + apply acquired knowledge to + N
simple: Books are a source of acquired knowledge.
simple_cn: 書籍是獲取知識的來源之一。

example: The athlete's fatigue level was monitored throughout the entire race.
example_cn: 這位運動員在整場比賽中一直被監控疲勞程度。
pattern: N + indicates a high fatigue level.
simple: Check your fatigue level before driving.
simple_cn: 開車前要先確認自己的疲勞程度。

chinese: 顯著的好處 / 戲劇性的利益
example: Regular exercise offers dramatic benefits for both physical and mental health.
example_cn: 規律運動對身心健康都有顯著的好處。
pattern: N + provides dramatic benefits to + N
simple: The new law brought dramatic benefits.
simple_cn: 這項新法帶來了顯著的好處。

example: The judge listened to the testimony with a serious expression] on his face.
example_cn: 法官一臉嚴肅地聽著證詞。
simple: She had a serious expression when she spoke.
simple_cn: 她說話的時候表情很嚴肅。

example: Maintaining good dental hygiene is essential to avoid cavities and gum disease.
example_cn: 保持良好的口腔衛生對預防蛀牙和牙周病非常重要。
simple: The dentist gave a talk on dental hygiene.
simple_cn: 牙醫做了一場關於口腔衛生的演講。

example: The polar explorer survived for months in the harsh conditions of Antarctica.
example_cn: 這位極地探險家在嚴酷的南極環境中存活了好幾個月。
pattern: S + work as a polar explorer
simple: The polar explorer led a dangerous mission.
simple_cn: 那位極地探險家帶領了一項危險的任務。

chinese: 熟練的工作人員 / 船員
example: The captain relies on a skilled crew to navigate the ship through the storm.
example_cn: 船長靠著一群熟練的船員在暴風雨中駕駛船隻。
simple: The skilled crew worked efficiently.
simple_cn: 技術純熟的團隊工作效率很高。

example: Polar bears often rely on floating ice to hunt for seals in the Arctic.
example_cn: 北極熊經常依賴浮冰在北極地區獵捕海豹。
pattern: N + is covered with floating ice.
simple: The ship crashed into floating ice.
simple_cn: 船撞上了浮冰。

example: The survivors were stranded on a remote uninhabited island for two weeks.
example_cn: 這些倖存者在一個偏遠的無人島上受困了兩個星期。
pattern: S + live on an uninhabited island
simple: They explored an uninhabited island.
simple_cn: 他們探索了一座無人島。

example: The giant sculpture served as a captivating focal point for the entire park.
example_cn: 這座巨大的雕塑成了整個公園最吸引人的焦點。
pattern: N + is a captivating focal point.
simple: The fountain is the captivating focal point.
simple_cn: 這座噴泉是吸引目光的焦點。

chinese: 行之已久的特色 / 確立的特點
example: The mandatory uniform is a well-established feature of this private school.
example_cn: 強制穿制服是這所私立學校長久以來的傳統特色。
pattern: N + is a well-established feature of + N
simple: Free WiFi is a well-established feature here.
simple_cn: 免費Wi-Fi在這裡已經是基本配備了。

type: 名詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: The soldiers prepared for a mass attack by the enemy forces at dawn.
example_cn: 士兵們準備在黎明時分抵擋敵軍的大規模攻擊。
simple: The computer virus was a mass attack.
simple_cn: 那隻電腦病毒發動了大規模攻擊。

example: The classic music of Beethoven has a timeless appeal that moves people of all ages.
example_cn: 貝多芬的古典音樂具有永恆的魅力，能感動各個年齡層的人。
simple: Her design has a timeless appeal.
simple_cn: 她的設計有一種永不過時的吸引力。

example: The local brewery is famous for its unique flavors of handcrafted beer.
example_cn: 這家在地啤酒廠以手工釀造啤酒的獨特風味聞名。
simple: I love the taste of handcrafted beer.
simple_cn: 我很喜歡手工啤酒的味道。

example: The chef can adjust the spiciness of the dish according to individual taste.
example_cn: 廚師可以根據個人口味調整菜餚的辣度。
simple: Fashion is a matter of individual taste.
simple_cn: 時尚這種東西很看個人喜好。

example: The restaurant attracts customers by offering innovative menu items every season.
example_cn: 這家餐廳每季推出創意菜單來吸引顧客。
simple: We tried several innovative menu items.
simple_cn: 我們試了幾道創新的菜色。

type: 名詞作形容詞 + 名詞
example: Taiwan is a popular tourist destination known for its beautiful scenery and night markets.
example_cn: 台灣是個熱門的旅遊景點，以美麗的風景和夜市聞名。
pattern: N + is a popular tourist destination.
simple: They chose France as their tourist destination.
simple_cn: 他們選擇法國作為旅遊目的地。

example: Quantum physics is a fascinating area of science that many students find interesting.
example_cn: 量子物理是一個迷人的科學領域，很多學生都覺得很有趣。
pattern: N + is a fascinating area of + N
simple: The historic district is a fascinating area.
simple_cn: 這個歷史街區是個很迷人的地方。

example: Social media allows people to share news and personal stories instantly with friends.
example_cn: 社群媒體讓大家可以即時跟朋友分享新聞和個人故事。
simple: I have some great news to share.
simple_cn: 我有個好消息要跟大家分享。

example: If I'm not at my desk, please leave a message after the beep.
example_cn: 如果我不在座位上，請在嗶聲後留言。
pattern: S + leave a message for + 人
simple: Can I leave a message for him?
simple_cn: 我可以幫他留個話嗎？

chinese: 恢復體力 / 恢復能量
example: After a long hike, we stopped to have a snack and regain our energy.
example_cn: 長途健行後，我們停下來吃點點心，恢復體力。
pattern: S + take a nap to regain energy
simple: Sleeping helps you regain energy.
simple_cn: 睡覺可以幫你恢復體力。

type: 動詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: Drinking warm ginger tea after a heavy meal can help aid in digestion.
example_cn: 吃大餐後喝杯溫熱的薑茶，有助於消化。
simple: Fiber is known to aid in digestion.
simple_cn: 纖維素對消化有幫助。

example: Studies suggest that learning a new language can help boost cognition and delay aging.
example_cn: 研究指出，學新語言有助於提升認知能力並延緩老化。
simple: Puzzles help boost cognition.
simple_cn: 玩拼圖可以提升思考能力。

chinese: 讓大腦充電 / 恢復腦力
example: Taking a 20-minute power nap is an effective way to recharge your brain.
example_cn: 睡個20分鐘的午覺，是讓大腦充電的有效方法。
pattern: S + need to recharge the brain
simple: Meditation can recharge your brain.
simple_cn: 冥想能讓大腦重新充電。

example: Students who participate in study groups can reap the benefits of peer learning.
example_cn: 參加讀書小組的學生，可以從同儕學習中獲得不少好處。
pattern: S + will reap the benefits of + N
simple: You will reap the benefits of your hard work.
simple_cn: 你努力工作的成果，將來一定會收穫。

chinese: 完善你的午睡 (使午睡達到完美)
example: To perfect your nap, try to keep it short and avoid napping too late in the day.
example_cn: 想睡個完美的午覺，記得時間要短，而且不要太晚睡。
simple: He tried to perfect his nap routine.
simple_cn: 他試著把自己的午睡習慣調整到最完美。

chinese: 藏起牙齒 (指不露出牙齒地微笑或隱藏情緒)
example: Monkeys sometimes hide their teeth to show that they are not being aggressive.
example_cn: 猴子有時候會藏起牙齒，來表示牠們沒有攻擊性。
simple: The shy boy hid his teeth when he smiled.
simple_cn: 那個害羞的男孩笑起來的時候會把牙齒藏起來。

example: Safety must always take precedence over convenience in any construction project.
example_cn: 在任何工程項目中，安全永遠比方便更重要。
simple: Quality should take precedence over speed.
simple_cn: 品質應該比速度更重要。

chinese: 登上頭條 / 成為重要新聞
example: The discovery of a new planet in a nearby solar system will surely make headlines.
example_cn: 在鄰近太陽系發現一顆新行星，肯定會登上新聞頭條。
simple: The scandal made headlines for weeks.
simple_cn: 那件醜聞連續好幾週都佔據新聞版面。

example: He aims to become the first person to cross Antarctica alone on foot.
example_cn: 他的目標是成為第一個獨自徒步橫跨南極洲的人。
pattern: S + cross Antarctica by + 交通工具
simple: The team crossed Antarctica in 100 days.
simple_cn: 那個團隊用一百天橫越了南極洲。

example: When the engine caught fire, the captain ordered everyone to abandon ship.
example_cn: 引擎起火時，船長下令所有人棄船。
simple: The crew had to abandon ship.
simple_cn: 船員們不得不棄船逃生。

example: We found a flat spot near the river and began to pitch our tents before sunset.
example_cn: 我們在河邊找到一塊平地，趕在日落前開始搭帳篷。
pattern: S + pitch tents at + 地方
simple: They pitched tents on the hillside.
simple_cn: 他們在山坡上搭起了帳篷。

example: The heavy snowstorm will likely hinder the return of the mountain rescue team.
example_cn: 強烈暴風雪很可能會阻礙山區救援隊的返回。
pattern: N + hinders the return of + 人
simple: Traffic hindered our return to the city.
simple_cn: 交通堵塞耽誤了我們回市區。

type: 動詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: Ancient city walls were built to defend against attackers and protect the citizens.
example_cn: 古城牆是為了抵禦攻擊者、保護居民而建造的。
pattern: S + defend against attackers with + 工具
simple: The castle defended against attackers.
simple_cn: 那座城堡成功抵擋了攻擊者的進攻。

example: The army waited until midnight to launch a surprise attack on the enemy base.
example_cn: 軍隊等到午夜才對敵方基地發動突襲。
pattern: S + launch an attack on + N
simple: They launched an attack against the hackers.
simple_cn: 他們對駭客發動了攻擊。

example: In many historical movies, heroes must master how to use a sword to survive in battle.
example_cn: 在許多歷史電影中，英雄必須學會用劍才能在戰鬥中存活。
pattern: S + learn to use a sword
simple: The knight used his sword to defend himself.
simple_cn: 騎士用他的劍來保護自己。

type: 動詞 + 介系詞 + 名詞
example: Modern GPS devices allow users to interact with maps by zooming and rotating them.
example_cn: 現代GPS裝置讓使用者可以透過縮放和旋轉來操作地圖。
pattern: S + interact with maps on + 平台
simple: The app lets you interact with maps easily.
simple_cn: 這個應用程式讓你可以輕鬆跟地圖互動。

example: The talent show is a great opportunity for students to showcase their skills in music and dance.
example_cn: 才藝表演是學生展現音樂與舞蹈技能的大好機會。
pattern: S + showcase the skill in + 領域
simple: He showcased his skills at the exhibition.
simple_cn: 他在展覽會上展示了自己的技術。

example: The tea-drinking culture in this region has a history that stretches back more than a thousand years.
example_cn: 這個地區的飲茶文化已經有超過一千年的歷史了。
pattern: history stretches back to + 時間
simple: Their history stretches back to the 18th century.
simple_cn: 他們的歷史可以追溯到18世紀。

example: During the 17th century, many teahouses sprang up along the bustling trade routes.
example_cn: 在十七世紀的時候，許多茶館沿著繁忙的貿易路線紛紛開張。
pattern: N + sprang up across the country
simple: New cafes sprang up everywhere.
simple_cn: 新的咖啡館到處冒出來。

chinese: 壓力導致彎曲 / 變形
example: The ship's thick wooden hull finally buckled under the intense pressure of the surrounding ice.
example_cn: 船隻厚重的木造船殼，終於承受不住周圍冰層的巨大壓力而變形。
simple: The steel beams buckled in the heat.
simple_cn: 鋼樑在高温下彎曲變形。

example: When the dam broke, massive amounts of water rushed into the low-lying valley.
example_cn: 水壩潰堤時，大量的水湧進了地勢低窪的山谷。
simple: Cold water rushed over the rocks.
simple_cn: 冷水嘩啦啦地衝過岩石。

example: The explorers waited for the spring thaw when the thick ice finally broke up.
example_cn: 探險家們等待春天融冰，那時厚厚的冰層終於會裂開。
pattern: N + broke up in the spring
simple: The pack ice broke up quickly.
simple_cn: 浮冰很快就碎裂開了。

example: We stood on the cliff and watched as the sun rose over the horizon.
example_cn: 我們站在懸崖邊，看著太陽從地平線升起。
simple: The sun rose at 6 a.m. today.
simple_cn: 今天早上六點日出。

chinese: 北方指向下方 (地圖術語)
type: 名詞 + 動詞 + 副詞
example: In some historical maps, the orientation is different, and north actually points down.
example_cn: 在一些歷史地圖上，方位是不一樣的，北方其實是朝下的。
simple: The needle points north.
simple_cn: 指針指向北方。

example: She has been practicing for several hours a day to prepare for the international piano competition.
example_cn: 她為了準備國際鋼琴比賽，每天已經練習好幾個小時了。
simple: He won first prize in the piano competition.
simple_cn: 他在鋼琴比賽中得了第一名。

example: The Silk Road was an ancient network of trade routes connecting the East and the West.
example_cn: 絲路是一條連接東西方、古老的貿易路線網絡。
simple: Traders traveled the Silk Road for centuries.
simple_cn: 商人沿著絲路行走了好幾個世紀。

example: Spices and silk were the most valuable goods transported along these ancient trade routes.
example_cn: 香料和絲綢是這些古老貿易路線上最有價值的貨物。
simple: Control over trade routes led to many wars.
simple_cn: 掌控貿易路線引發了許多戰爭。

example: Many teahouse owners also served as local storytellers and news sources.
example_cn: 許多茶館老闆同時也是當地的說書人和消息來源。
simple: The teahouse owners welcomed the travelers.
simple_cn: 茶館老闆熱情接待了旅人。

example: Scientific research has linked chronic sleep deprivation to accelerated brain shrinkage in elderly adults.
example_cn: 科學研究指出，長期睡眠不足會加速老年人腦部萎縮。
simple: Aging is often associated with brain shrinkage.
simple_cn: 老化通常跟大腦萎縮有關。

example: Using a sleep mask can help block out light and improve your quality of sleep.
example_cn: 使用眼罩可以幫助阻擋光線，改善你的睡眠品質。
simple: I never travel without a sleep mask.
simple_cn: 我出門一定要帶眼罩。

example: If you work night shifts, installing blackout curtains is essential for sleeping during the day.
example_cn: 如果你上大夜班，安裝遮光窗簾對於白天睡覺來說是必要的。
simple: The hotel room was equipped with blackout curtains.
simple_cn: 飯店房間裝了遮光窗簾。

example: A local search team was sent to the forest to find the missing hiker.
example_cn: 一支在地的搜救隊被派往森林，尋找失蹤的登山客。
simple: The search team worked through the night.
simple_cn: 搜救團隊徹夜工作。

example: The wooden ship was trapped in the thick pack ice for over six months.
example_cn: 那艘木船被困在厚厚的浮冰中長達六個多月。
pattern: N + be surrounded by pack ice
simple: Ships must navigate carefully through pack ice.
simple_cn: 船隻必須小心穿過浮冰區。

example: The captain ordered the crew to lower the lifeboats as the ship began to sink.
example_cn: 船長在船開始下沉時，命令船員放下救生艇。
simple: There were not enough lifeboats for everyone.
simple_cn: 救生艇不夠所有人用。

example: In the past, South Georgia was home to several remote whaling stations.
example_cn: 過去，南喬治亞島是幾個偏遠的捕鯨站的所在地。
simple: The abandoned whaling station is now a museum.
simple_cn: 廢棄的捕鯨站現在變成了博物館。

example: The nomadic tent is supported by a sturdy central pole made of local wood.
example_cn: 這頂遊牧帳篷是由一根當地木材製成的堅固中央支柱支撐著。
simple: He stood by the central pole.
simple_cn: 他站在中央柱子旁邊。

example: In case of an emergency, please use the fire escape located at the end of the hallway.
example_cn: 緊急情況時，請使用走廊盡頭的逃生梯。
simple: The fire escape was blocked by boxes.
simple_cn: 逃生梯被箱子堵住了。

chinese: 地圖定向 / 地圖朝向
example: The explorer checked the map orientation to make sure they were heading in the right direction.
example_cn: 探險家確認了地圖的方向，確保他們走的路線是對的。
simple: Correct map orientation is vital for hikers.
simple_cn: 登山者來說，地圖方向正確很重要。

example: Migratory birds follow a specific travel path every year to reach warmer climates.
example_cn: 候鳥每年都會沿著特定的遷徙路線，飛往氣候較溫暖的地方。
simple: The storm's travel path is unpredictable.
simple_cn: 暴風雨的路徑很難預測。

example: Switching to bamboo toothbrushes is a simple way to reduce plastic waste in your home.
example_cn: 改用竹製牙刷是減少家中塑膠垃圾的一個簡單方法。
simple: Bamboo toothbrushes are more eco-friendly.
simple_cn: 竹製牙刷比較環保。

example: Soy candles are generally safer and cleaner than paraffin wax candles.
example_cn: 大豆蠟燭通常比石蠟蠟燭更安全、更乾淨。
simple: I bought some scented soy candles.
simple_cn: 我買了一些有香味的黃豆蠟燭。

example: She bought several wooden picture frames to display her favorite travel photos.
example_cn: 她買了好幾個木頭相框，用來展示她最喜歡的旅遊照片。
simple: The picture frames were all different sizes.
simple_cn: 那些相框的大小都不一樣。

example: Passengers must show their tickets before they board the bus to the airport.
example_cn: 乘客必須在搭上前往機場的巴士前出示車票。
pattern: S + board the bus to + 地方
simple: We boarded the bus at 8 a.m.
simple_cn: 我們早上八點上車。

example: Every Christmas, our family gathers together to share a traditional meal.
example_cn: 每年聖誕節，我們全家都會聚在一起吃一頓傳統大餐。
pattern: S + gather together at + 地方
simple: Let's gather together after school.
simple_cn: 放學後大家一起聚一聚吧。

example: In the science class, students were asked to pair with a classmate for the group project.
example_cn: 在自然課上，學生被要求找一個同學配對，一起完成小組作業。
simple: White wine is often paired with fish.
simple_cn: 白酒通常搭配魚肉一起喝。

chinese: 為...臨時抱佛腳 / 為了...死記硬背
example: He stayed up all night to cram for the final exam, which was a bad idea.
example_cn: 他熬夜整晚準備期末考，結果證明這是個爛主意。
simple: Don't cram for the test at the last minute.
simple_cn: 不要臨時抱佛腳準備考試。

chinese: 訴諸於... / 採取... (通常是不好的手段)
example: The government should never resort to violence to solve political conflicts.
example_cn: 政府絕不應該訴諸暴力來解決政治衝突。
simple: They had to resort to selling their car.
simple_cn: 他們最後只好把車賣掉。

example: The explorers set sail from the harbor at dawn, heading toward the unknown sea.
example_cn: 探險家們在黎明時分從港口出發，航向未知的大海。
pattern: S + set sail for + 目的地
simple: The Titanic set sail in 1912.
simple_cn: 鐵達尼號在1912年啟航。

example: Fans camped out for three days just to get tickets for the singer's final concert.
example_cn: 粉絲們為了買到那位歌手最終場演唱會的門票，露營排隊了整整三天。
pattern: S + camp out in/at + 地方
simple: They camped out near the river.
simple_cn: 他們在河邊露營。

example: During the long winter, some animals can survive on very small amounts of food.
example_cn: 在漫長的冬天裡，有些動物可以靠極少量的食物存活下來。
simple: He survived on only water for three days.
simple_cn: 他靠喝水撐了三天。

example: If you don't start saving money now, you might wind up having financial problems.
example_cn: 如果你現在不開始存錢，到最後可能會陷入財務問題。
simple: We winded up getting lost in the city.
simple_cn: 我們最後在城裡迷路了。

example: As the tide came in, the tourists had to retreat up the beach to higher ground.
example_cn: 隨著漲潮，遊客們不得不往沙灘高處撤退。
pattern: S + retreat up to + 地方
simple: The soldiers retreated up the hill.
simple_cn: 士兵們撤退到山上。

example: New students often take a few days to orient themselves to the large university campus.
example_cn: 新生通常需要花幾天時間，才能熟悉這所大型大學的校園環境。
simple: The building is oriented to the south.
simple_cn: 這棟建築是朝南的。

type: 副詞 + 過去分詞(形容詞)
example: He is whole-heartedly devoted to his charity work, helping hundreds of children every year.
example_cn: 他全心全意投入慈善工作，每年幫助數百名兒童。
pattern: S + be whole-heartedly devoted to + N/V-ing
simple: She is whole-heartedly devoted to her family.
simple_cn: 她全心全意奉獻給家庭。

chinese: 特別有反應的 / 異常敏感的
example: Plants are particularly responsive to changes in light and temperature.
example_cn: 植物對光線和溫度的變化特別敏感。
pattern: S + be particularly responsive to + N
simple: The audience was particularly responsive to the jokes.
simple_cn: 觀眾對那些笑話反應特別熱烈。

example: The word 'breakfast' literally means to 'break' the 'fast' of the previous night.
example_cn: 「早餐」這個詞的字面意思，就是打破前一晚的「禁食」狀態。
simple: The term literally means 'new life'.
simple_cn: 這個詞字面上的意思是「新生活」。

chinese: 出人意料地顯著 / 驚人地戲劇化
example: The new marketing strategy led to a surprisingly dramatic increase in sales.
example_cn: 新的行銷策略帶來了出乎意料的銷售額大幅增長。
simple: The change was surprisingly dramatic.
simple_cn: 這個變化出乎意料地劇烈。

chinese: 極其過時的 / 非常不流行的
example: Wearing large, baggy suits became deeply unfashionable by the late 1990s.
example_cn: 穿那種寬寬大大的西裝，到了九零年代末就變得非常退流行了。
simple: His ideas are deeply unfashionable today.
simple_cn: 他的想法現在非常不合時宜。

type: 副詞 + 過去分詞(形容詞)
example: Music and art are often culturally influenced, reflecting the values of a society.
example_cn: 音樂和藝術常常受到文化影響，反映出社會的價值觀。
simple: Food habits are culturally influenced.
simple_cn: 飲食習慣會受到文化影響。

example: A good manager should be responsive to the needs and concerns of their employees.
example_cn: 一個好的主管應該要能即時回應員工的需求和關切。
simple: The skin is responsive to temperature.
simple_cn: 皮膚對溫度變化很敏感。

example: In times of war, national security often takes precedence over individual rights.
example_cn: 戰爭時期，國家安全往往比個人權利更重要。
simple: Duty takes precedence over pleasure.
simple_cn: 責任比享樂更重要。

example: We stopped at a small village to have lunch while we were en route to the mountains.
example_cn: 我們在前往山區的路上，停在一個小村莊吃午餐。
pattern: S + be en route to + 地方
simple: The plane is en route to London.
simple_cn: 飛機正在飛往倫敦的途中。

example: Keep a dictionary at hand while you are reading this difficult English book.
example_cn: 讀這本很難的英文書時，手邊要放一本字典。
simple: Help is at hand if you need it.
simple_cn: 如果你需要幫忙，隨時有人可以協助。

example: The company decided to adopt a new marketing strategy to reach younger customers.
example_cn: 公司決定採用新的行銷策略來吸引年輕消費者。
pattern: S + adopt a strategy to + V
simple: We need to adopt a different strategy.
simple_cn: 我們需要採取不同的策略。

chinese: 改變進程 / 改變航向
example: The discovery of steam power altered the course of human history forever.
example_cn: 蒸汽動力的發現永遠改變了人類歷史的進程。
pattern: N + alter the course of + N
simple: The storm altered the course of the ship.
simple_cn: 暴風雨改變了船隻的航向。

example: The two brothers bear a striking resemblance to each other.
example_cn: 這對兄弟長得超級像。
pattern: S + bear a resemblance to + N
simple: This painting bears a resemblance to his style.
simple_cn: 這幅畫跟他的風格有點像。

example: The old wooden house caught fire during the lightning storm last night.
example_cn: 昨晚那場雷雨，那棟老木屋著火了。
simple: Paper catches fire easily.
simple_cn: 紙張很容易著火。

chinese: 引起恐慌 / 引發警報
example: The sudden drop in stock prices caused widespread alarm among investors.
example_cn: 股價突然大跌，讓投資人普遍感到恐慌。
pattern: N + cause alarm among + 族群
simple: The news caused unnecessary alarm.
simple_cn: 這則新聞引起了不必要的恐慌。

chinese: 接受 / 妥協 / 與...達成協議
example: It took her several years to come to terms with the loss of her best friend.
example_cn: 她花了好幾年才走出失去摯友的傷痛。
pattern: S + need time to come to terms with + N
simple: He finally came to terms with reality.
simple_cn: 他終於接受了現實。

chinese: 腦袋一片空白 / 想不起來
example: I tried to remember his name during the meeting, but I drew a blank.
example_cn: 會議上我想記起他的名字，但腦子一片空白。
simple: Every time I see a camera, I draw a blank.
simple_cn: 每次看到相機，我就腦袋一片空白。

example: The new environmental protection law enjoys widespread support from the public.
example_cn: 這項新的環保法規獲得民眾廣泛支持。
simple: The policy enjoys widespread support in rural areas.
simple_cn: 這項政策在鄉村地區獲得廣泛支持。

example: Travelers are advised to exercise extreme caution when visiting remote mountain areas.
example_cn: 建議旅客前往偏遠山區時要格外小心。
simple: Exercise caution when opening suspicious emails.
simple_cn: 打開可疑郵件時要小心謹慎。

example: The mayor faced heavy criticism for his slow response to the flood.
example_cn: 市長因為對水災反應太慢而飽受批評。
simple: The movie faced criticism for its ending.
simple_cn: 這部電影因為結局而受到批評。

chinese: 符合要求 / 滿足規定
example: Applicants must fulfill all the requirements to be considered for the position.
example_cn: 申請人必須滿足所有條件，才有資格考慮這個職位。
pattern: S + must fulfill the requirement of + N
simple: Does he fulfill the requirements for the job?
simple_cn: 他符合這份工作的要求嗎？

chinese: 獲得動力 / 勢頭增強
example: The anti-plastic campaign has gained momentum globally over the past few years.
example_cn: 過去幾年，反塑膠運動在全球越來越有聲勢。
simple: The presidential campaign is gaining momentum.
simple_cn: 總統競選活動正在逐漸升溫。

example: To get the ball rolling, let's start with a short self-introduction.
example_cn: 為了讓事情順利開始，我們先來個簡單的自我介紹吧。
pattern: S + V + to get the ball rolling
simple: Who will get the ball rolling today?
simple_cn: 今天誰要來起個頭？

example: The shop owner agreed to give a 10% discount if I paid in cash.
example_cn: 店老闆同意如果我付現金，就給我打九折。
pattern: S + give a discount on + N
simple: They give a discount to students.
simple_cn: 他們給學生打折。

example: The board of directors finally gave the green light to the new expansion project.
example_cn: 董事會終於為新的擴張計畫開了綠燈。
pattern: S + give the green light to + N
simple: The boss gave the green light to our proposal.
simple_cn: 老闆對我們的提案開了綠燈。

chinese: 加倍努力 / 多盡一份力
example: She is a fantastic employee who is always willing to go the extra mile for her clients.
example_cn: 她是個很棒的員工，總是願意為客戶多付出一點。
pattern: S + be willing to go the extra mile
simple: To succeed, you must go the extra mile.
simple_cn: 要成功，你就得多付出一些努力。

example: He can hold a basic conversation in French after only three months of study.
example_cn: 他只學了三個月，就能用法語進行基本對話。
pattern: S + can hold a conversation in + 語言
simple: It was hard to hold a conversation in the noisy bar.
simple_cn: 在那間吵雜的酒吧裡，很難好好聊天。

example: Even after he apologized, she continued to hold a grudge against him for years.
example_cn: 即使他道了歉，她還是對他記恨了好幾年。
pattern: S + hold a grudge against + 人
simple: Life is too short to hold a grudge.
simple_cn: 人生苦短，別記恨在心。

example: This new technology holds great promise for the future of medicine.
example_cn: 這項新技術對醫學的未來極具潛力。
simple: The young student holds much promise.
simple_cn: 那位年輕學生前途無量。

example: Using automated systems can significantly increase the efficiency of the production line.
example_cn: 使用自動化系統可以大幅提升生產線的效率。
simple: The new software will increase efficiency.
simple_cn: 這套新軟體會提升效率。

example: The company issued a formal statement to address the rumors on the internet.
example_cn: 公司發布了一份正式聲明，來回應網路上的謠言。
pattern: S + issue a statement about + N
simple: The police issued a statement regarding the crime.
simple_cn: 警方針對這起犯罪發表了聲明。

example: She has kept a diary since she was ten to record her daily thoughts.
example_cn: 她從十歲開始寫日記，記錄每天的思緒。
simple: Keeping a diary helps improve writing skills.
simple_cn: 寫日記有助於提升寫作技巧。

example: The hospital must keep a precise record of all patient treatments.
example_cn: 醫院必須精確記錄所有病人的治療過程。
pattern: S + keep a record of + N
simple: Keep a record of your expenses.
simple_cn: 記錄你的開銷。

chinese: 與...並駕齊驅 / 跟上...步伐
example: Old laws often fail to keep pace with rapid technological developments.
example_cn: 舊法律往往跟不上快速發展的科技腳步。
simple: It's hard to keep pace with the changes.
simple_cn: 要跟上這些變化很不容易。

chinese: 啟動經濟 / 振興經濟
example: The government lowered interest rates to kick-start the struggling economy.
example_cn: 政府調降利率，試圖重振疲軟的經濟。
pattern: S + try to kick-start the economy
simple: New investments helped kick-start the economy.
simple_cn: 新的投資幫助刺激了經濟。

chinese: 熟悉內情 / 熟悉門道 / 掌握要領
example: Ask Sarah for help; she has worked here for years and knows the ropes.
example_cn: 找莎拉幫忙吧；她在這裡工作多年，很熟悉門路。
simple: It takes time to learn the ropes in a new job.
simple_cn: 在新工作上摸熟門路需要時間。

example: Many talented students lack the confidence to speak in front of a large audience.
example_cn: 很多有才華的學生缺乏在大眾面前發言的自信。
simple: He lacks confidence in his own abilities.
simple_cn: 他對自己的能力缺乏信心。

example: He was thrilled to land a dream job at a famous tech company in Silicon Valley.
example_cn: 他超開心能在矽谷一家知名科技公司獲得夢幻工作。
simple: How did she land that job?
simple_cn: 她是怎麼得到那份工作的？

chinese: 提出上訴 / 發起呼籲
example: The lawyer decided to launch an appeal after the court delivered the verdict.
example_cn: 法院宣判後，律師決定提出上訴。
pattern: S + launch an appeal against + N
simple: The charity launched an appeal for donations.
simple_cn: 那個慈善機構發起了捐款呼籲。

example: Police have launched an investigation into the cause of the mysterious fire.
example_cn: 警方已針對那場神祕火災的起因展開調查。
pattern: S + launch an investigation into + N
simple: Authorities launched an investigation into the fraud.
simple_cn: 當局對這起詐騙案展開了調查。

example: His early research laid the foundation for modern environmental science.
example_cn: 他早期的研究為現代環境科學奠定了基礎。
pattern: N + lay the foundation for + N
simple: This course will lay the foundation for your career.
simple_cn: 這門課程會為你的事業打下基礎。

chinese: 領導一場運動 / 活動
example: She led a campaign to improve food safety standards in the city.
example_cn: 她發起了一項運動，旨在提升城市的食品安全標準。
pattern: S + lead a campaign to + V
simple: He led a campaign against smoking.
simple_cn: 他帶頭發起了一場反菸運動。

chinese: 帶路 / 領先 / 率先引領
example: Technological innovators are leading the way in renewable energy development.
example_cn: 科技創新者在再生能源發展上扮演著領頭羊的角色。
pattern: S + is leading the way in + N/V-ing
simple: Japan leads the way in robotics.
simple_cn: 日本在機器人領域處於領先地位。

chinese: 不遺餘力 / 徹底搜尋 / 查個水落石出
example: The police promised to leave no stone unturned until the thief was caught.
example_cn: 警方承諾會不遺餘力，直到抓到那名小偷為止。
pattern: S + will leave no stone unturned to + V
simple: Researchers left no stone unturned to find the cure.
simple_cn: 研究人員為了找到治療方法，不遺餘力。

example: If you are busy with the housework, I can lend a hand with the cleaning.
example_cn: 如果你忙著做家事，我可以幫忙打掃。
pattern: S + lend a hand with + N
simple: Could you lend a hand for a moment?
simple_cn: 可以幫個忙嗎？

chinese: 提供支持 / 給予協助
example: The local community lent strong support to the victims of the fire.
example_cn: 當地社區大力支持火災的受災戶。
simple: Many celebrities lent support to the protest.
simple_cn: 許多名人聲援了這場抗議活動。

example: The government decided to lift the ban on travel to the region after the situation improved.
example_cn: 情勢好轉後，政府決定解除前往該地區的旅遊禁令。
pattern: S + lift the ban on + N/V-ing
simple: The ban on plastic bags was lifted.
simple_cn: 塑膠袋禁令解除了。

example: International organizations agreed to lift sanctions following the signing of the peace treaty.
example_cn: 國際組織在和平條約簽署後，同意解除制裁。
pattern: S + lift sanctions against + 國家
simple: Nations discussed when to lift sanctions.
simple_cn: 各國討論何時解除制裁。

chinese: 失去動力 / 勢頭減弱
example: The project began to lose momentum after the main sponsor withdrew its funding.
example_cn: 主要贊助商撤資後，這個計畫開始失去動力。
simple: The movement lost momentum in the winter.
simple_cn: 這場運動在冬天失去了動力。

chinese: 為...失眠 / 為...過度憂慮
example: Don't lose sleep over the test results; you did your best.
example_cn: 別為了考試成績睡不著，你已經盡力了。
simple: I wouldn't lose sleep over his comments.
simple_cn: 我不會因為他的話而睡不著覺。

example: It is important to maintain a healthy balance between work and personal life.
example_cn: 在工作和個人生活之間維持健康的平衡很重要。
pattern: S + maintain a balance between A and B
simple: The body tries to maintain a balance.
simple_cn: 身體會試著維持平衡。

chinese: 東山再起 / 重返舞台 / 復出
example: The retired singer is planning to make a comeback with a new world tour next year.
example_cn: 這位退休歌手正計劃明年以全新世界巡迴演唱會復出。
simple: Vinyl records are making a comeback.
simple_cn: 黑膠唱片正在捲土重來。

example: Customers have the right to make a complaint if the service is poor.
example_cn: 如果服務品質不佳，顧客有權提出申訴。
pattern: S + make a complaint about + N
simple: He made a formal complaint to the manager.
simple_cn: 他向經理正式提出申訴。

chinese: 坦白 / 告解 / 承認
example: The thief finally decided to make a full confession to the police.
example_cn: 小偷最後決定向警方全盤招供。
pattern: S + make a confession to + 人
simple: He made a confession of love.
simple_cn: 他坦承了自己的愛意。

example: Every small act of kindness can make a significant contribution to society.
example_cn: 每一個小小的善舉都能對社會做出重大貢獻。
pattern: S + make a contribution to + N
simple: She made a large contribution to the charity.
simple_cn: 她為慈善機構捐了一大筆錢。

example: The two nations made a joint declaration to end the ongoing border dispute.
example_cn: 這兩個國家發表聯合聲明，終結持續中的邊界爭端。
pattern: S + make a declaration that + clause
simple: He made a declaration of independence.
simple_cn: 他發表了獨立宣言。

example: Based on the evidence, the detective was able to make a brilliant deduction.
example_cn: 根據證據，偵探做出了精彩的推理。
pattern: S + make a deduction from + N
simple: The insurance company made a deduction from the payout.
simple_cn: 保險公司從理賠金中扣了一筆錢。

example: The workers decided to make a formal demand for higher wages.
example_cn: 工人們決定正式要求加薪。
pattern: S + make a demand for + N
simple: She made a demand that he leave.
simple_cn: 她要求他離開。

example: Scientists have made a major discovery that could change the way we use energy.
example_cn: 科學家有一項重大發現，可能改變我們使用能源的方式。
simple: He made a remarkable discovery in the lab.
simple_cn: 他在實驗室裡有了一項驚人的發現。

example: You can make a donation to the Red Cross to help those in need.
example_cn: 你可以捐款給紅十字會，幫助有需要的人。
pattern: S + make a donation of + 金額
simple: Many people made a donation to the orphanage.
simple_cn: 很多人捐款給孤兒院。

example: It is difficult for economists to make an accurate forecast of the stock market.
example_cn: 經濟學家很難準確預測股市走向。
pattern: S + make a forecast for + 時間
simple: The weatherman made a forecast for rain.
simple_cn: 氣象預報員預測會下雨。

chinese: 小題大作 / 大驚小怪
example: Don't make such a fuss about a small scratch on the car.
example_cn: 車子刮到一小條痕跡，別大驚小怪。
pattern: S + make a fuss over + N
simple: She always makes a fuss when things go wrong.
simple_cn: 事情出錯時，她總是會大驚小怪。

example: If you don't know the exact answer, just make a guess.
example_cn: 如果你不知道確切答案，就猜一下。
pattern: S + make a guess at + N
simple: I can't even make a guess.
simple_cn: 我連猜都猜不出來。

example: You should make a habit of reading for at least thirty minutes before bed.
example_cn: 你應該養成睡前至少閱讀三十分鐘的習慣。
pattern: S + make a habit of + V-ing
simple: He makes a habit of waking up early.
simple_cn: 他養成了早起的習慣。

example: He made a killing in the stock market by investing in tech companies early.
example_cn: 他靠早期投資科技股在股市大賺一筆。
pattern: S + made a killing in + 市場/領域
simple: The company made a killing with its new product.
simple_cn: 這家公司靠新產品大賺一筆。

example: The airline company made a huge loss last year due to the fuel crisis.
example_cn: 這家航空公司因為燃油危機去年虧損慘重。
pattern: S + made a loss of + 金額
simple: The business made a loss in its first year.
simple_cn: 這門生意第一年虧損。

example: Please make a note of the new address so you don't forget it.
example_cn: 請把新地址記下來，免得忘記。
pattern: S + make a note that + clause
simple: Make a note to call him tomorrow.
simple_cn: 記得備註一下明天打電話給他。

example: It is hard to make a prediction about who will win the presidential election.
example_cn: 要預測誰會贏得總統大選真的很難。
pattern: S + make a prediction for + 時間
simple: I don't like to make predictions.
simple_cn: 我不喜歡做預測。

example: The startup finally made a profit in its third year of operation.
example_cn: 這家新創公司在營運第三年終於開始獲利。
simple: It's hard for new businesses to make a profit.
simple_cn: 新創事業要獲利很困難。

example: You should never make a promise that you cannot keep.
example_cn: 你絕對不該隨便承諾自己做不到的事。
pattern: S + make a promise to + 人
simple: He made a promise to his mother.
simple_cn: 他對媽媽許下承諾。

example: Doctors are optimistic that the patient will make a full recovery soon.
example_cn: 醫生樂觀認為這位病人很快就會完全康復。
pattern: S + make a (full) recovery from + 疾病
simple: The economy is making a slow recovery.
simple_cn: 經濟正在緩慢復甦。

example: The witness was asked to make a formal statement at the police station.
example_cn: 證人被要求到警局做正式筆錄。
pattern: S + make a statement about + N
simple: The actor made a statement regarding his divorce.
simple_cn: 那位演員針對離婚事件發表聲明。

example: He decided to make a will to ensure his property goes to his children.
example_cn: 他決定立遺囑，確保財產留給子女。
