pattern: S + make a will at + 年紀/時間
simple: It is wise to make a will early.
simple_cn: 早點立遺囑是明智之舉。

example: He tried to make amends for his past mistakes by helping the community.
example_cn: 他透過幫助社區來彌補過去的錯誤。
simple: She wanted to make amends for her rudeness.
simple_cn: 她想要為自己的無禮道歉。

example: The celebrity made a brief appearance at the charity gala.
example_cn: 這位明星在慈善晚會上短暫現身。
pattern: S + make an appearance at + 場合
simple: He made a rare appearance on television.
simple_cn: 他難得在電視上露面。

example: You need to make an appointment before seeing the specialist.
example_cn: 看專科醫生之前要先預約掛號。
pattern: S + make an appointment with + 人
simple: I made an appointment with the dentist.
simple_cn: 我跟牙醫約好了時間。

example: We need to make an arrangement for the transportation of the goods.
example_cn: 我們需要安排貨物運輸的相關事宜。
simple: The school made arrangements for the trip.
simple_cn: 學校為這趟旅行做了安排。

example: I called the bank to make an enquiry about my credit card balance.
example_cn: 我打電話到銀行詢問信用卡餘額。
pattern: S + make an enquiry about + N
simple: She made an enquiry into the price.
simple_cn: 她詢問了價格。

example: The actress made a grand entrance at the red carpet event.
example_cn: 這位女星在紅毯活動上盛大登場。
simple: The king made a formal entrance.
simple_cn: 國王正式進場。

example: The prisoner managed to make an escape during the chaotic transfer.
example_cn: 這名囚犯趁轉移過程混亂時成功脫逃。
pattern: S + manage to make an escape
simple: The bird made an escape from the cage.
simple_cn: 那隻鳥從籠子裡逃走了。

example: The teacher decided to make an exception and allowed the student to submit the work late.
example_cn: 老師決定破例讓那名學生遲交作業。
pattern: S + make an exception for + 人/情況
simple: Rules are rules; we cannot make an exception.
simple_cn: 規定就是規定，我們不能破例。

example: Stop making excuses for being late to every single meeting.
example_cn: 別再為每次開會遲到找藉口了。
pattern: S + keep making excuses for + N/V-ing
simple: He made an excuse to leave the party early.
simple_cn: 他找了個藉口提早離開派對。

example: The new recycling program has made a positive impact on the environment.
example_cn: 新的回收計畫對環境帶來了正面影響。
pattern: S + make a significant impact on + N
simple: Her words made a big impact on me.
simple_cn: 她的話對我影響很大。

example: The company made a generous offer to buy out its competitor.
example_cn: 這家公司開出優渥條件，打算收購競爭對手。
pattern: S + make an offer to + V
simple: They made an offer on the house.
simple_cn: 他們對那棟房子出價了。

example: Don't make assumptions about people based on their appearance.
example_cn: 不要以貌取人。
simple: It's dangerous to make assumptions in this case.
simple_cn: 在這種情況下，隨便假設是很危險的。

example: We finally made contact with the rescue team after two days.
example_cn: 我們在兩天後終於跟救援隊聯繫上了。
simple: The pilot made contact with the tower.
simple_cn: 飛行員跟塔台取得了聯繫。

example: It can be difficult to make conversation with strangers at a party.
example_cn: 在派對上跟陌生人聊天有時候蠻難的。
pattern: S + try to make conversation with + 人
simple: She tried to make conversation during the elevator ride.
simple_cn: 她在搭電梯的時候試著找話聊。

chinese: 收支平衡 / 維持生計
example: With rising prices, many families struggle to make ends meet.
example_cn: 物價一直漲，很多家庭都快入不敷出了。
pattern: S + struggle to make ends meet
simple: The couple worked two jobs to make ends meet.
simple_cn: 這對夫妻打兩份工來維持生計。

example: It is important to make eye contact when giving a presentation.
example_cn: 做簡報時，眼神接觸是很重要的。
pattern: S + should make eye contact with the audience
simple: The baby made eye contact with her mother.
simple_cn: 寶寶跟媽媽對上了眼。

example: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to make friends from different cultures.
example_cn: 出國留學是個認識來自不同文化朋友的好機會。
simple: She made many friends at the summer camp.
simple_cn: 她在夏令營交到了很多朋友。

example: It is cruel to make fun of someone's physical appearance.
example_cn: 拿別人的外表開玩笑是很殘忍的。
pattern: S + shouldn't make fun of + N
simple: The kids made fun of his old shoes.
simple_cn: 孩子們嘲笑他那雙舊鞋。

example: He took a part-time job to make some extra money for the holidays.
example_cn: 他為了過節多賺點錢，去兼了一份差。
pattern: S + want to make more money
simple: Investing in stocks is one way to make money.
simple_cn: 投資股票是賺錢的一種方式。

example: After years of fighting, the two neighbors finally decided to make peace.
example_cn: 吵了好幾年後，那兩個鄰居終於決定和解。
simple: The two countries made peace after the long war.
simple_cn: 這兩個國家在長期戰爭後終於和解了。

example: We moved the old sofa to make room for the new bookshelf.
example_cn: 我們把舊沙發移開，騰出空間放新書櫃。
simple: Can you make room for me to sit down?
simple_cn: 可以挪個位子讓我坐嗎？

example: What he said doesn't make sense to me at all.
example_cn: 他說的話我完全聽不懂。
simple: Does this instructions make sense to you?
simple_cn: 這份說明你看得懂嗎？

example: Please make sure that all the windows are closed before you leave.
example_cn: 請確認你離開前所有窗戶都關好了。
simple: Make sure you check your email later.
simple_cn: 記得晚點檢查你的電子郵件。

example: The primary goal of university education is to help students acquire specialized knowledge.
example_cn: 大學教育的主要目標是幫助學生學習專業知識。
simple: We acquire knowledge through reading and experience.
simple_cn: 我們透過閱讀和經驗來獲取知識。

example: My mother taught me to make the bed every morning as soon as I get up.
example_cn: 我媽媽教我每天早上起床後就要把床鋪好。
simple: It only takes a minute to make the bed.
simple_cn: 鋪床只需要一分鐘。

chinese: 苦中作樂 / 盡力而為
example: Although the weather was bad, we tried to make the best of our holiday.
example_cn: 雖然天氣不好，我們還是盡量讓假期過得開心。
pattern: S + try to make the best of + 困境
simple: We must make the best of a bad situation.
simple_cn: 我們必須在逆境中盡力而為。

example: You should make the most of your time in London by visiting all the famous landmarks.
example_cn: 你應該好好把握在倫敦的時間，去參觀所有著名景點。
pattern: S + should make the most of + 機會/時間
simple: Let's make the most of this sunny afternoon.
simple_cn: 我們好好把握這個晴朗的下午吧。

chinese: 讓路 / 讓位 / 被取代
example: The old buildings were demolished to make way for a new shopping mall.
example_cn: 那些舊建築被拆掉，好蓋新的購物中心。
simple: Traditional shops are making way for online stores.
simple_cn: 傳統商店正逐漸被網路商店取代。

chinese: 陳述理由 / 為自己辯護
example: The manager gave him five minutes to make his case for the new project.
example_cn: 經理給他五分鐘時間，為新專案提出他的理由。
pattern: S + have a chance to make one's case
simple: You'll have to make your case to the committee.
simple_cn: 你得向委員會陳述你的理由。

example: It is difficult for young artists to make their mark in such a competitive market.
example_cn: 年輕藝術家要在這麼競爭的市場中闖出名堂並不容易。
pattern: S + finally made one's mark in + 領域
simple: He made his mark in the tech industry.
simple_cn: 他在科技業闖出了名號。

example: Wait for the right moment, and then make your move to seize the opportunity.
example_cn: 等時機成熟，再出手抓住機會。
pattern: S + wait for the right time to make one's move
simple: The company is ready to make its move.
simple_cn: 這家公司準備好要採取行動了。

example: The team worked around the clock to meet the strict deadline for the proposal.
example_cn: 團隊為了趕上提案的嚴格截止日期，沒日沒夜地趕工。
pattern: S + struggle to meet the deadline
simple: We must meet the deadline at any cost.
simple_cn: 我們無論如何都要趕上截止日期。

example: The new community center was built to meet the social needs of local residents.
example_cn: 新的社區中心是為了滿足當地居民的社交需求而蓋的。
pattern: N + is designed to meet the needs of + 人
simple: The app meets a real need for busy parents.
simple_cn: 這個應用程式對忙碌的家長來說真的很實用。

example: Sales staff are often under pressure to meet their monthly targets.
example_cn: 業務人員常常得承受達成每月業績目標的壓力。
pattern: S + fail/succeed to meet the target
simple: The company failed to meet its sales target.
simple_cn: 這家公司沒能達成銷售目標。

example: Applicants must meet all the basic requirements to be eligible for the scholarship.
example_cn: 申請人必須符合所有基本條件，才有資格申請這筆獎學金。
pattern: S + meet the requirements for + N
simple: Does the product meet safety requirements?
simple_cn: 這個產品符合安全要求嗎？

example: All food products sold in the supermarket must meet strict safety standards.
example_cn: 超市裡販售的所有食品都必須符合嚴格的安全標準。
pattern: N + must meet high standards of + N
simple: His work always meets high standards.
simple_cn: 他的工作表現一直都達到高標準。

example: He was supposed to be here an hour ago; I hope he hasn't met with an accident.
example_cn: 他一個小時前就該到了，希望他沒有出什麼意外。
pattern: S + met with an accident on the way
simple: The ship met with an accident at sea.
simple_cn: 那艘船在海上發生了意外。

example: The political party used social media to mobilize support for the upcoming election.
example_cn: 那個政黨利用社群媒體來動員支持，為即將到來的選舉做準備。
simple: They are trying to mobilize support from local businesses.
simple_cn: 他們正在設法爭取當地企業的支持。

chinese: 竭盡全力 / 排除萬難
example: The parents would move heaven and earth to save their child from the danger.
example_cn: 父母為了救孩子脫離危險，願意付出一切努力。
pattern: S + will move heaven and earth to + V
simple: I will move heaven and earth to get there on time.
simple_cn: 就算要上刀山下火海，我也會準時趕到那裡。

example: Moving house is always a stressful and exhausting process for the entire family.
example_cn: 搬家對全家人來說，永遠是個既累人又壓力大的過程。
pattern: S + be planning to move house
simple: We moved house last month.
simple_cn: 我們上個月搬家了。

chinese: 爭取支持 / 鼓起勇氣
example: The candidate is traveling across the country to muster support for his new policy.
example_cn: 那位候選人正在全國跑透透，為他的新政策爭取支持。
pattern: S + muster enough support to + V
simple: She couldn't muster enough support for the motion.
simple_cn: 她無法為這項提案爭取到足夠的支持。

example: We need to nail down the final details of the contract before signing it.
example_cn: 我們得在簽約前把合約的最後細節敲定下來。
simple: It's hard to nail him down to a specific time.
simple_cn: 很難讓他敲定一個具體時間。

chinese: 談判交易 / 協商協議
example: The two companies spent weeks negotiating a deal that benefited both sides.
example_cn: 兩家公司花了幾個星期協商，談成了一樁對雙方都有利的交易。
pattern: S + negotiate a deal with + 組織/人
simple: He is skilled at negotiating deals.
simple_cn: 他很擅長談判交易。

example: Diplomats from both countries gathered to negotiate a peace treaty.
example_cn: 兩國的外交官齊聚一堂，協商簽訂和平條約。
pattern: S + be in the process of negotiating a treaty
simple: The nations negotiated a landmark climate treaty.
simple_cn: 各國談判達成了一項具有里程碑意義的氣候條約。

example: Both armies agreed to observe a temporary ceasefire during the religious holiday.
example_cn: 雙方軍隊同意在宗教節日期間遵守臨時停火協議。
pattern: S + agree to observe a ceasefire
simple: The ceasefire was not strictly observed.
simple_cn: 停火協議沒有被嚴格遵守。

chinese: 遵守禮節 / 遵守協定
example: Visitors to the palace must observe strict protocol when meeting the royal family.
example_cn: 前往皇宮參觀的訪客在會見王室成員時，必須遵守嚴格的禮儀規範。
pattern: S + must observe the protocol of + N
simple: Diplomatic events require everyone to observe protocol.
simple_cn: 外交場合每個人都要遵守禮儀規範。

example: It took the inventor three years to obtain a patent for his new engine design.
example_cn: 那位發明家花了三年時間，才為他的新型引擎設計取得專利。
pattern: S + apply for / obtain a patent on + N
simple: The pharmaceutical company obtained a patent for the new drug.
simple_cn: 這家藥廠取得了這種新藥的專利權。

example: You must obtain written permission before you can use these images for commercial purposes.
example_cn: 你必須先取得書面授權，才能將這些圖片用於商業用途。
simple: He obtained permission to leave early.
simple_cn: 他獲得許可提早離開。

chinese: 提供賞金 / 提供獎勵
example: The police offered a reward for any information leading to the arrest of the suspect.
example_cn: 警方懸賞任何能提供線索、協助逮捕嫌犯的人。
pattern: S + offer a reward for + N
simple: The owner offered a reward for the lost dog.
simple_cn: 主人懸賞尋找走失的狗。

example: The hotel offers a free shuttle service to and from the airport.
example_cn: 這家飯店提供往返機場的免費接駁服務。
pattern: S + offer a wide range of services
simple: The company offers cloud storage services.
simple_cn: 這家公司提供雲端儲存服務。

example: Employees must be trained before they are allowed to operate heavy machines.
example_cn: 員工必須先接受訓練，才能操作重型機械。
pattern: S + learn how to operate a machine
simple: It is dangerous to operate this machine without a manual.
simple_cn: 沒有說明書就操作這台機器很危險。

example: Several members of the council strongly opposed the motion to raise property taxes.
example_cn: 議會裡好幾位成員強烈反對調漲房屋稅的提案。
pattern: S + oppose the motion that + clause
simple: The opposition party opposed the motion.
simple_cn: 在野黨反對這項動議。

example: Environmental groups oppose the plan to build a dam in the protected area.
example_cn: 環保團體反對在保護區內興建水壩的計畫。
simple: Many residents oppose the construction plan.
simple_cn: 很多居民反對這個建設計畫。

example: You can opt out of receiving marketing emails by clicking the link at the bottom.
example_cn: 你可以點選底部的連結，選擇不再接收行銷郵件。
simple: He decided to opt out of the competition.
simple_cn: 他決定退出比賽。

example: The International Space Station continues to orbit the earth every 90 minutes.
example_cn: 國際太空站持續每九十分鐘繞行地球一圈。
simple: The moon orbits the earth once a month.
simple_cn: 月球每個月繞地球一圈。

example: With persistence and teamwork, the engineers managed to overcome the technical difficulty.
example_cn: 靠著堅持與團隊合作，工程師們成功克服了技術難題。
pattern: S + work hard to overcome a difficulty
simple: She overcame many difficulties to graduate.
simple_cn: 她克服了許多困難才畢業。

example: He had to overcome a language obstacle when he first moved to Germany.
example_cn: 他剛搬到德國時，必須克服語言上的障礙。
simple: Love can overcome all obstacles.
simple_cn: 愛能克服一切障礙。

example: The legislature finally passed a bill to increase the minimum wage.
example_cn: 立法機關終於通過了調高基本工資的法案。
simple: The bill was passed by a majority vote.
simple_cn: 這項法案以多數票通過。

example: New York was one of the first states to pass a law banning plastic bags.
example_cn: 紐約是首批通過禁用塑膠袋法律的州之一。
pattern: S + pass a law against + N
simple: The country passed a law to protect wildlife.
simple_cn: 該國通過了一項保護野生動物的法律。

example: The United Nations passed a resolution to provide humanitarian aid to the region.
example_cn: 聯合國通過了一項決議，要對該地區提供人道援助。
pattern: S + pass a resolution to + V
simple: The committee passed a resolution unanimously.
simple_cn: 委員會一致通過這項決議。

example: The government passed an emergency act to deal with the public health crisis.
example_cn: 政府通過了一項緊急法案，來應對公共衛生危機。
pattern: S + passed an act regarding + N
simple: The parliament passed the Clean Air Act.
simple_cn: 國會通過了《清潔空氣法》。

example: It is not our place to pass judgment on his personal choices.
example_cn: 我們沒有立場去評斷他個人的選擇。
pattern: S + shouldn't pass judgment on + N
simple: The public was quick to pass judgment.
simple_cn: 大眾很快就下了判斷。

example: The judge will pass sentence on the defendant tomorrow morning.
example_cn: 法官將在明天早上對被告宣判刑期。
pattern: The judge + passed a sentence of + 刑期
simple: He was waiting for the judge to pass sentence.
simple_cn: 他在等法官宣判刑期。

example: Stop trying to pass the buck and admit that you made a mistake.
example_cn: 別再試著推卸責任了，承認是你犯的錯吧。
pattern: S + always tries to pass the buck to + 人
simple: The manager passed the buck to his assistant.
simple_cn: 經理把責任推給他的助理。

chinese: 通過測試 / 經受住考驗
example: Only those who are mentally strong will pass the final test.
example_cn: 只有心智堅強的人才能通過最終考驗。
simple: The new bridge passed the safety test.
simple_cn: 這座新橋通過了安全測試。

example: We played cards to pass the time while waiting for our flight at the airport.
example_cn: 我們在機場等飛機的時候打牌打發時間。
pattern: S + V + to pass the time
simple: I read a book to pass the time on the train.
simple_cn: 我在火車上看書打發時間。

example: He had to pay a heavy fine for speeding on the highway.
example_cn: 他因為在高速公路上超速，被罰了一筆很重的罰款。
pattern: S + was ordered to pay a fine of + 金額
simple: You must pay a fine if you return books late.
simple_cn: 逾期還書必須繳罰款。

example: I plan to pay a visit to my grandparents in the countryside this weekend.
example_cn: 我打算這個週末去鄉下探望我的祖父母。
pattern: S + pay a visit to + N
simple: The president paid a visit to the disaster area.
simple_cn: 總統視察了災區。

example: Please pay close attention to the safety instructions before the flight takes off.
example_cn: 飛機起飛前，請仔細留意安全說明。
pattern: S + should pay attention to + N
simple: He didn't pay attention to the warning signs.
simple_cn: 他沒有注意那些警告標誌。

example: I will pay you back the money I borrowed as soon as I get paid.
example_cn: 我一拿到薪水就會把借你的錢還給你。
pattern: S + will pay back the loan
simple: He vowed to pay them back for the insult.
simple_cn: 他發誓要報復他們的侮辱。

example: The airline was required to pay compensation to the passengers for the long delay.
example_cn: 航空公司因為航班長時間延誤，必須賠償乘客。
pattern: S + pay compensation to + 人 + for + N
simple: The company paid compensation to the injured workers.
simple_cn: 公司向受傷的勞工支付了賠償金。

example: The court ordered the company to pay damages to the victims of the chemical leak.
example_cn: 法院判決該公司必須賠償化學物質外洩事件的受害者。
pattern: S + be ordered to pay damages
simple: The lawyer sued for $1 million in damages.
simple_cn: 律師提起訴訟，要求一百萬美元的損害賠償。

chinese: 產生效益 / 派發股息
example: Investing time in learning a new skill will pay dividends in the long run.
example_cn: 花時間學習新技能，長期來看會帶來豐厚回報。
pattern: N + will pay dividends in the future.
simple: Her hard work finally paid dividends.
simple_cn: 她的努力終於有了回報。

chinese: 口頭應付 / 嘴上說說
example: Many politicians only pay lip service to environmental issues without taking real action.
example_cn: 許多政治人物對環保議題只會嘴上說說，卻沒有實際行動。
pattern: S + pay(s) lip service to + N
simple: They just pay lip service to the idea of equality.
simple_cn: 他們對平等的理念只是嘴上說說而已。

example: All those late nights in the library finally paid off when he received the scholarship.
example_cn: 他拿到獎學金的那一刻，之前在圖書館熬夜苦讀總算有了回報。
simple: He paid off his mortgage in ten years.
simple_cn: 他十年內就把房貸還清了。

chinese: 盡義務 / 熬出頭 / 支付應繳費用
example: She spent years in minor roles, paying her dues before becoming a lead actress.
example_cn: 她花了多年時間演小角色，熬過磨練期才終於當上女主角。
simple: You need to pay your dues before you get promoted.
simple_cn: 你得先繳完學費，才能獲得晉升。

example: Many people went to the funeral to pay their last respects to the great leader.
example_cn: 很多人去參加葬禮，向這位偉大的領袖致上最後的敬意。
pattern: S + pay their respects to + 人
simple: We visited the memorial to pay our respects.
simple_cn: 我們去紀念館表達敬意。

example: The success of the first mission paved the way for future space exploration.
example_cn: 第一次任務的成功，為後續的太空探索鋪平了道路。
pattern: N + pave the way for + N
simple: This agreement paves the way for a lasting peace.
simple_cn: 這項協議為持久和平鋪平了道路。

example: The priest will perform the marriage ceremony in the local church.
example_cn: 牧師將在當地教堂主持婚禮儀式。
simple: They performed a simple ceremony at home.
simple_cn: 他們在家裡辦了一場簡單的儀式。

example: Soldiers are expected to perform their duties with courage and loyalty.
example_cn: 軍人應該以勇氣和忠誠來履行他們的職責。
pattern: S + fail to perform one's duty
simple: He was rewarded for performing his duty well.
simple_cn: 他因為盡忠職守而獲得獎勵。

chinese: 發揮功能 / 具備作用
example: Each part of the engine performs a specific function to keep the car running.
example_cn: 引擎的每個零件都發揮特定功能，才能讓車子正常運轉。
pattern: N + performs the function of + V-ing/N
simple: This software performs several useful functions.
simple_cn: 這套軟體有好幾項實用的功能。

example: The skilled surgeon managed to perform a miracle and save the patient's life.
example_cn: 技術高超的外科醫生成功創造奇蹟，救回了病人的性命。
pattern: S + performed a miracle by + V-ing
simple: Science can sometimes perform miracles.
simple_cn: 科學有時候能創造奇蹟。

chinese: 扮演角色 / 發揮作用
example: Vitamin C performs a vital role in strengthening the human immune system.
example_cn: 維生素C在強化人體免疫系統方面扮演著關鍵角色。
pattern: S + performs a significant role in + N
simple: She performed the role of the queen perfectly.
simple_cn: 她把女王這個角色演得淋漓盡致。

chinese: 執行任務 / 完成工作
example: Robots are often used to perform repetitive tasks that are dangerous for humans.
example_cn: 機器人常用來執行對人類來說危險的重複性工作。
simple: The computer performs tasks automatically.
simple_cn: 電腦會自動執行任務。

chinese: 進行手術 / 進行運作
example: The medical team is currently performing a complex operation to remove the tumor.
example_cn: 醫療團隊目前正在進行一項複雜的手術，以切除腫瘤。
pattern: S + perform an operation on + 部位/對象
simple: The surgeon performed a heart operation.
simple_cn: 外科醫生進行了一場心臟手術。

example: He was so angry that he tried to pick a fight with almost everyone at the bar.
example_cn: 他氣到幾乎在酒吧裡跟每個人找碴打架。
pattern: S + try to pick a fight with + 人
simple: Don't pick a fight with him; he's dangerous.
simple_cn: 別找他吵架，他很危險。

example: Don't worry about the cost; the company will pick up the bill for our dinner.
example_cn: 不用擔心費用，公司會買單我們的晚餐。
pattern: S + will pick up the bill for + N
simple: The government had to pick up the bill for the project.
simple_cn: 政府不得不為這個計畫買單。

chinese: 收拾殘局 / 振作起來
example: After the business failed, he had to pick up the pieces and start all over again.
example_cn: 生意失敗後，他只能收拾殘局，從頭再來。
pattern: S + has to pick up the pieces after + N
simple: The city is picking up the pieces after the storm.
simple_cn: 暴風雨過後，城市正在收拾殘局。

example: Who is going to pick up the tab for the expensive renovation of the building?
example_cn: 這棟建築昂貴的翻修費用，誰要來買單？
pattern: S + will pick up the tab for + N
simple: The taxpayers often pick up the tab.
simple_cn: 納稅人常常得買單。

example: A beam of bright sunlight pierced through the thick fog on the mountain top.
example_cn: 一道明亮的陽光穿透山頂的濃霧射了下來。
simple: The arrow pierced through the target.
simple_cn: 箭射穿了靶心。

chinese: 確定 / 具體化 / 按住
example: It is hard to pin down the exact cause of the technical failure.
example_cn: 要確切找出這次技術故障的原因，並不容易。
pattern: S + cannot pin down the + N (cause/date)
simple: The police pinned the suspect down.
simple_cn: 警方把嫌犯壓制在地。

example: He placed a small bet on his favorite horse during the race yesterday.
example_cn: 他昨天在賽馬時，在他最喜歡的那匹馬身上押了一點小注。
pattern: S + place a bet on + N
simple: I never place bets on football games.
simple_cn: 我從來不賭足球比賽。

example: Several international companies have placed a bid for the construction project.
example_cn: 有幾家國際公司已經對這個建設工程投標了。
pattern: S + place a bid for + N
simple: He placed a high bid for the antique vase.
simple_cn: 他對那個古董花瓶出了很高的價錢。

example: Please place a call to the manager and inform him about the emergency.
example_cn: 請打電話給經理，通知他有緊急狀況。
pattern: S + place a call to + 人
simple: I'll place a long-distance call tonight.
simple_cn: 我今晚會打一通長途電話。

example: You can place an order online and have the products delivered to your door.
example_cn: 你可以線上訂購，然後商品就會直接送到你家門口。
pattern: S + place an order for + N
simple: I'd like to place an order for a pizza.
simple_cn: 我想點一份披薩。

example: To avoid unnecessary stress, it is always a good idea to plan ahead for the holidays.
example_cn: 為了避免不必要的壓力，假期前先做好規劃總是比較好。
simple: We should plan ahead to save money.
simple_cn: 我們應該提前規劃，才能省錢。

example: The terrorists were caught attempting to plant a bomb in the busy city center.
example_cn: 那些恐怖分子在繁忙的市中心試圖放置炸彈時被逮個正著。
pattern: S + plant a bomb at + 地方
simple: Security found the area where they planted a bomb.
simple_cn: 安檢人員找到了他們埋炸彈的地點。

example: Every student was encouraged to plant a tree to celebrate Earth Day.
example_cn: 每個學生都被鼓勵種一棵樹來慶祝地球日。
simple: Planting a tree is good for the environment.
simple_cn: 種樹對環境有好處。

chinese: 參與 / 起作用 / 扮演部分角色
example: Diet and exercise both play a part in maintaining good health.
example_cn: 飲食和運動對維持身體健康都有一定的影響。
pattern: N + plays a part in + N
simple: Luck also played a part in his success.
simple_cn: 他的成功也有一部分是靠運氣。

chinese: 扮演角色 / 發揮作用
example: Social media plays an important role in how modern information is spread.
example_cn: 社群媒體在現代資訊傳播中扮演了重要的角色。
pattern: S + play a vital role in + N
simple: Education plays a key role in career development.
simple_cn: 教育在職涯發展中扮演關鍵角色。

chinese: 開玩笑 / 耍弄 / 捉弄
example: The kids decided to play a trick on their teacher for April Fool's Day.
example_cn: 孩子們決定在愚人節那天捉弄他們的老師。
pattern: S + play a trick on + 人
simple: Memory can play tricks on you.
simple_cn: 記憶有時候會騙人。

chinese: 造成大混亂 / 嚴重破壞
example: The heavy snowstorm played havoc with the flight schedules yesterday.
example_cn: 昨天那場大暴雪嚴重打亂了航班時刻表。
simple: Stress can play havoc with your immune system.
simple_cn: 壓力會嚴重影響你的免疫系統。

chinese: 多方交往 (指不固定於單一戀愛對象)
example: Before getting married, he wanted to play the field and meet different people.
example_cn: 結婚之前，他想多玩玩、多認識不同的人。
pattern: S + is still playing the field.
simple: Young people often play the field for a while.
simple_cn: 年輕人常常會先到處玩玩、不急着定下來。

chinese: 裝傻 / 扮小丑 / 做蠢事
example: He likes to play the fool in class just to make his classmates laugh.
example_cn: 他喜歡在課堂上裝傻，只為了逗同學笑。
simple: He played the fool to hide his true intelligence.
simple_cn: 他裝傻來隱藏自己真正的聰明才智。

chinese: 遵守規則 / 按牌理出牌
example: If you want to succeed in this company, you have to play the game according to their rules.
example_cn: 如果你想在這家公司成功，就得按照他們的規矩來玩。
pattern: S + have to play the game.
simple: Politicians know how to play the game.
simple_cn: 政治人物很懂得玩這套遊戲。

example: Many inexperienced investors lost everything while trying to play the market.
example_cn: 許多缺乏經驗的投資者在試圖炒股時賠光了所有積蓄。
simple: He made a fortune playing the stock market.
simple_cn: 他靠玩股票賺了一大筆錢。

chinese: 鑽制度漏洞 / 利用體制獲利
example: The wealthy executive was accused of playing the system to avoid paying taxes.
example_cn: 那位富有的高階主管被指控鑽制度漏洞來避稅。
pattern: S + was caught playing the system.
simple: Some people find ways to play the system.
simple_cn: 有些人會想辦法鑽制度的漏洞。

example: Soldiers must pledge allegiance to their country before they start their service.
example_cn: 軍人在服役前必須宣誓效忠他們的國家。
simple: Students recite the pledge of allegiance.
simple_cn: 學生們背誦效忠誓詞。

example: Several wealthy donors pledged their support for the new cancer research hospital.
example_cn: 幾位富有的捐贈者承諾支持這間新的癌症研究醫院。
simple: The UN pledged support to the refugees.
simple_cn: 聯合國承諾會支援難民。

example: It took him a long time to pluck up the courage to ask her for a date.
example_cn: 他花了好長一段時間才鼓起勇氣約她出去。
pattern: S + finally plucked up enough courage to + V
simple: She plucked up her courage and spoke out.
simple_cn: 她鼓起勇氣，大聲說出來。

chinese: 投入 / 陷入 / 猛衝進去
example: After the sudden scandal, the famous actor's career plunged into a crisis.
example_cn: 那場突如其來的醜聞之後，這位知名演員的職業生涯陷入了危機。
simple: The temperatures plunged into the negative numbers.
simple_cn: 氣溫驟降到零度以下。

example: Instead of pointing a finger at others, you should look at your own mistakes.
example_cn: 與其指責別人，不如先看看自己犯了什麼錯。
pattern: Don't point a finger at + 人
simple: Everyone pointed a finger at the manager after the failure.
simple_cn: 失敗之後，大家矛頭都指向經理。

example: It is extremely dangerous to point a gun at anyone, even if it is not loaded.
example_cn: 拿槍指著任何人，就算沒上膛，也極度危險。
pattern: S + point a gun at + O
simple: He pointed a gun at the intruder.
simple_cn: 他用槍指著闖入者。

example: The steep mountain and unpredictable weather pose a serious challenge to the climbers.
example_cn: 陡峭的山勢加上變幻莫測的天氣，對登山者來說是很大的挑戰。
pattern: N + pose(s) a challenge to + N
simple: The new technology poses a challenge to traditional media.
simple_cn: 新技術對傳統媒體構成挑戰。

example: Faulty electrical wiring in old buildings can pose a major fire risk.
example_cn: 老舊建築的電線如果有問題，很容易引發嚴重的火災風險。
pattern: N + poses a risk to + N
simple: Smoking poses a risk to your health.
simple_cn: 抽菸對健康有風險。

example: Invasive species often pose a significant threat to local ecosystems.
example_cn: 外來物種常常會對當地生態系統造成重大威脅。
pattern: N + pose(s) a threat to + N
simple: Cyberattacks pose a threat to national security.
simple_cn: 網路攻擊對國家安全構成威脅。

example: The professor posed a difficult question about the ethics of artificial intelligence.
example_cn: 教授提出了一個關於人工智慧倫理的難題。
pattern: S + pose a question regarding + N
simple: His arrival posed a question for us.
simple_cn: 他的到來給我們帶來了一個問題。

example: I was excited about my new idea, but my boss poured cold water on it immediately.
example_cn: 我對自己的新點子很興奮，但老闆馬上潑了我一盆冷水。
pattern: S + pour cold water on + N
simple: Don't pour cold water on her dreams.
simple_cn: 別對她的夢想潑冷水。

example: The government continues to pour money into the education system to improve school facilities.
example_cn: 政府持續投入資金在教育系統上，以改善學校設施。
simple: Investors are pouring money into green technology.
simple_cn: 投資人正把大筆資金投入綠色科技。

example: Regular sleep and a healthy diet are essential for maintaining good academic performance.
example_cn: 規律的睡眠和健康的飲食，對維持良好的學業表現很重要。
simple: Extracurricular activities can affect academic performance.
simple_cn: 課外活動會影響學業成績。

example: The success of the project relies on the active participation of all team members.
example_cn: 這個專案的成功，有賴於所有團隊成員的積極參與。
simple: Active participation in class is encouraged.
simple_cn: 鼓勵課堂上積極參與。

chinese: 不良影響 / 負面反應
example: Scientists are studying the adverse effects of long-term exposure to loud noise.
example_cn: 科學家正在研究長期暴露在巨大噪音下的不良影響。
pattern: N + has adverse effects on + N
simple: The drug has some adverse effects.
simple_cn: 這種藥有一些副作用。

example: This brand is popular because it offers high-quality products at an affordable price.
example_cn: 這個品牌之所以受歡迎，是因為它提供高品質的產品，價格又親民。
simple: They sell furniture at an affordable price.
simple_cn: 他們以負擔得起的價格賣家具。

example: The United Nations is working to find a peaceful resolution to the armed conflict.
example_cn: 聯合國正在努力為這場武裝衝突找到和平的解決方案。
simple: The region has been torn by armed conflict.
simple_cn: 這個地區因武裝衝突而四分五裂。

example: Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing the way we work and live our daily lives.
example_cn: 人工智慧正迅速改變我們的工作和日常生活方式。
simple: AI stands for artificial intelligence.
simple_cn: AI 是人工智慧的縮寫。

example: The two neighbors were involved in a bitter dispute over the boundary of their gardens.
example_cn: 這兩個鄰居為了花園的界線問題，鬧得很不愉快。
pattern: N + leads to a bitter dispute
simple: They ended a bitter dispute over money.
simple_cn: 他們結束了一場關於錢的激烈爭執。

example: There is a broad consensus among experts that global temperatures are rising.
example_cn: 專家們普遍認為，全球氣溫正在上升。
pattern: reach a broad consensus on + N
simple: The broad consensus is that the law needs change.
simple_cn: 普遍的共識是法律需要修改。

example: The new antibiotic is effective against a broad spectrum of different bacteria.
example_cn: 這種新的抗生素能有效對抗多種不同的細菌。
simple: The movie covers a broad spectrum of emotions.
simple_cn: 這部電影涵蓋了廣泛的情感光譜。

example: In some developing countries, coffee is the main cash crop exported to the West.
example_cn: 在一些開發中國家，咖啡是主要出口到西方的經濟作物。
pattern: N + is a valuable cash crop
simple: Tobacco was a major cash crop.
simple_cn: 菸草曾是主要的經濟作物。

example: The failure of one small bank set off a chain reaction in the global financial market.
example_cn: 一家小銀行的倒閉，在全球金融市場引發了一連串連鎖反應。
pattern: set off / trigger a chain reaction
simple: One mistake triggered a chain reaction.
simple_cn: 一個錯誤引發了連鎖反應。

example: Solar and wind power are important forms of clean energy that reduce carbon emissions.
example_cn: 太陽能與風能是重要的潔淨能源，有助於減少碳排放。
simple: The world is moving toward clean energy.
simple_cn: 世界正朝向清潔能源邁進。

example: He slept soundly that night, knowing that he had acted with a clear conscience.
example_cn: 那天晚上他睡得很安穩，因為知道自己問心無愧。
simple: I can look you in the eye with a clear conscience.
simple_cn: 我可以問心無愧地直視你的眼睛。

example: Extreme weather events like floods and heatwaves are becoming more frequent due to climate change.
example_cn: 由於氣候變遷，像洪水跟熱浪這類極端天氣事件變得越來越頻繁。
simple: Nations must act together on climate change.
simple_cn: 各國必須共同應對氣候變遷。

example: The Cold War was a period of political tension between the United States and the Soviet Union.
example_cn: 冷戰是美國與蘇聯之間一段政治緊張的時期。
simple: The Cold War ended in the early 1990s.
simple_cn: 冷戰在1990年代初期結束。

example: The historical event remains deeply engraved in the collective memory of the nation.
example_cn: 這個歷史事件深深烙印在全國人民的集體記憶中。
simple: Folklore is part of our collective memory.
simple_cn: 民間傳說是我们集體記憶的一部分。

example: The prosecutor presented compelling evidence that the suspect was at the crime scene.
example_cn: 檢察官提出了有力證據，證明嫌犯當時在犯罪現場。
simple: There is compelling evidence of global warming.
simple_cn: 有確鑿證據顯示全球暖化正在發生。

example: Continuous innovation gives the tech company a strong competitive advantage over its rivals.
example_cn: 持續創新讓這家科技公司比競爭對手擁有更強的競爭優勢。
pattern: have a competitive advantage over + 人/物
simple: Lower costs provide a competitive advantage.
simple_cn: 較低的成本能帶來競爭優勢。

example: Immigration is a complex issue that involves historical, economic, and social factors.
example_cn: 移民是一個複雜的議題，涉及歷史、經濟與社會因素。
simple: It's a complex issue with no easy solution.
simple_cn: 這是個複雜的問題，沒有簡單的解決方法。

chinese: 自覺的決定 / 刻意的決定
example: She made a conscious decision to live a more sustainable lifestyle by reducing waste.
example_cn: 她刻意做出選擇，透過減少浪費來過更永續的生活方式。
pattern: make a conscious decision to + V
simple: I made a conscious decision to quit smoking.
simple_cn: 我下定決心要戒菸。

example: Honesty and integrity are the core values that the organization stands for.
example_cn: 誠實與正直是這個組織所堅守的核心價值。
pattern: N + is a core value of + N
simple: Customer focus is one of our core values.
simple_cn: 以客戶為中心是我們的核心價值之一。

example: The company's positive corporate culture encourages employees to share their creative ideas.
example_cn: 公司正面的企業文化鼓勵員工分享他們的創意點子。
simple: Google is known for its unique corporate culture.
simple_cn: Google以其獨特的企業文化聞名。

example: The victim of the car accident remains in critical condition at the intensive care unit.
example_cn: 那場車禍的受害者仍在加護病房，情況危急。
simple: He was rushed to the hospital in critical condition.
simple_cn: 他被緊急送醫，情況危急。

example: The festival celebrates the rich cultural diversity of the city's residents.
example_cn: 這個節慶慶祝了城市居民豐富的文化多元性。
simple: Cultural diversity makes our society better.
simple_cn: 文化多元性讓我們的社會變得更好。

example: The manager conducted a survey to measure customer satisfaction with the new service.
example_cn: 經理進行了一項調查，以衡量顧客對新服務的滿意度。
simple: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.
simple_cn: 客戶滿意度是我們的首要任務。

example: He was charged with assault using a deadly weapon during the fight.
example_cn: 他在鬥毆中被指控使用致命武器攻擊。
simple: A car can be a deadly weapon.
simple_cn: 汽車可能成為致命的武器。

example: Many citizens expressed deep concern about the high levels of air pollution.
example_cn: 許多民眾對嚴重的空氣污染問題表達了深切憂慮。
simple: The report caused deep concern.
simple_cn: 這份報告引發了高度關切。

example: Poverty is a deep-rooted problem that cannot be solved within a single year.
example_cn: 貧窮是一個根深蒂固的問題，無法在一年內解決。
simple: Corruption is a deep-rooted problem in the system.
simple_cn: 貪腐是這個系統中根深蒂固的問題。

type: 副詞 + 過去分詞 (形容詞)
example: Cities like Tokyo and New York are some of the most densely populated areas in the world.
example_cn: 像東京和紐約這類城市，是世界上人口最稠密的地區之一。
pattern: N + is a densely populated city
simple: Densely populated areas face more traffic issues.
simple_cn: 人口密集的地區面臨更多交通問題。

example: The drought had a devastating effect on the local farming community.
example_cn: 這場乾旱對當地農業社區造成了毀滅性的影響。
pattern: have a devastating effect on + N
simple: The war had a devastating effect on the economy.
simple_cn: 戰爭對經濟造成了毀滅性的影響。

example: Improving your dietary habits by eating more vegetables can lead to better long-term health.
example_cn: 透過多吃蔬菜來改善飲食習慣，有助於長期的健康。
simple: Poor dietary habits cause many diseases.
simple_cn: 不良的飲食習慣會導致許多疾病。

example: In the digital age, children learn how to use tablets and smartphones even before they can write.
example_cn: 在數位時代，孩子們甚至在學會寫字之前，就已經會使用平板和智慧型手機了。
simple: Privacy is a major concern in the digital age.
simple_cn: 在數位時代，隱私是一個重大問題。

example: The two neighboring countries decided to restore diplomatic relations after decades of conflict.
example_cn: 這兩個鄰國在歷經數十年的衝突後，決定恢復外交關係。
simple: They cut off diplomatic relations with the regime.
simple_cn: 他們斷絕了與該政權的外交關係。

example: Rising sea levels are a direct consequence of global warming and melting ice caps.
example_cn: 海平面上升是全球暖化與冰帽融化所帶來的直接後果。
pattern: N + is a direct consequence of + N
simple: Inflation is a direct consequence of the war.
simple_cn: 通貨膨脹是戰爭的直接後果。

chinese: 急切需求 / 迫切需要
example: After the severe earthquake, the victims are in dire need of medical supplies and clean water.
example_cn: 強震過後，災民急需醫療物資與乾淨飲用水。
pattern: be in dire need of + N
simple: The economy is in dire need of reform.
simple_cn: 經濟迫切需要改革。

example: Ignoring the early warning signs of the disease could lead to disastrous consequences.
example_cn: 忽略疾病的早期警訊，可能會導致嚴重的後果。
simple: His mistake had disastrous consequences.
simple_cn: 他的錯誤造成了災難性的後果。

example: The government has introduced new laws to provide better protection for victims of domestic violence.
example_cn: 政府已制定新法，為家暴受害者提供更完善的保護。
simple: Domestic violence is a serious social issue.
simple_cn: 家庭暴力是嚴重的社會問題。

chinese: 嚴厲手段 / 激烈措施
example: The police had to take drastic measures to control the angry crowd during the protest.
example_cn: 警方在抗議活動中不得不採取強硬手段，來控制憤怒的群眾。
simple: The company took drastic measures to cut costs.
simple_cn: 公司採取了激烈措施來削減成本。

example: Innovation is the driving force behind the rapid growth of the technology industry.
example_cn: 創新是科技產業快速成長的主要驅動力。
pattern: N + is the driving force behind + N
simple: Curiosity is the driving force for research.
simple_cn: 好奇心是研究的驅動力。

example: The early warning system successfully alerted residents before the tsunami hit the coast.
example_cn: 海嘯侵襲海岸前，預警系統成功提醒居民疏散。
simple: We received an early warning about the storm.
simple_cn: 我們收到了關於風暴的預警。

example: The high unemployment rate has become a major obstacle to the country's economic growth.
example_cn: 高失業率已成為該國經濟成長的主要障礙。
simple: Low taxes can stimulate economic growth.
simple_cn: 低稅收可以刺激經濟成長。

example: In the job interview, she was asked to provide details about her educational background.
example_cn: 求職面試時，她被要求提供學歷背景的詳細資訊。
pattern: S + have a strong educational background
simple: Your educational background is impressive.
simple_cn: 你的學經歷背景令人印象深刻。

example: Effective communication between parents and children is vital for a healthy family relationship.
example_cn: 父母與孩子之間的有效溝通，對維繫健康的家庭關係至關重要。
simple: Teams rely on effective communication.
simple_cn: 團隊依賴有效的溝通。

example: With an aging population, the demand for high-quality elderly care is increasing rapidly.
example_cn: 隨著人口老化，對高品質長照服務的需求正快速增加。
pattern: improve the quality of elderly care
simple: He works in the field of elderly care.
simple_cn: 他在長照領域工作。

example: Remember to turn off all electrical appliances before leaving the house to save energy.
example_cn: 出門前記得關掉所有電器，以節省能源。
simple: The kitchen is full of electrical appliances.
simple_cn: 廚房裡擺滿了電器用品。

example: Friends and family provided much-needed emotional support during her time of grief.
example_cn: 在她悲傷的時期，親友提供了非常需要的心理支持。
simple: Pets can provide emotional support.
simple_cn: 寵物能提供情感上的支持。

example: The company is committed to providing equal opportunities for all employees, regardless of gender.
example_cn: 該公司致力於為所有員工提供平等機會，無論性別為何。
simple: Education should offer equal opportunities.
simple_cn: 教育應該提供平等的機會。

chinese: 必要服務 / 基礎服務
example: Public transportation is an essential service that many people rely on to go to work.
example_cn: 大眾運輸是許多人上下班所依賴的重要服務。
simple: Healthcare is an essential service.
simple_cn: 醫療保健是一項基本服務。

example: Journalists are expected to maintain high ethical standards and report the truth.
example_cn: 記者應秉持高標準的職業道德，報導事實真相。
simple: The company was criticized for low ethical standards.
simple_cn: 這家公司因道德標準低落而受到批評。

example: Artificial intelligence has become an invisible part of our everyday life.
example_cn: 人工智慧已成為我們日常生活中不可或缺的一部分。
simple: Computers are essential in everyday life.
simple_cn: 電腦在日常生活中不可或缺。

example: The e-commerce industry experienced explosive growth during the global pandemic.
example_cn: 全球疫情期間，電子商務產業經歷了爆炸性的成長。
pattern: experience explosive growth in + 領域
simple: The city saw explosive growth in its population.
simple_cn: 這個城市的人口經歷了爆炸性成長。

example: The company's success was influenced by external factors such as market trends and government policies.
example_cn: 該公司的成功受到市場趨勢與政府政策等外部因素的影響。
pattern: S + be caused by external factors
simple: Economic problems often stem from external factors.
simple_cn: 經濟問題往往源自於外部因素。

example: Scientists warn that extreme weather events will become more common in the future.
example_cn: 科學家警告，極端天氣事件未來會變得越來越常見。
simple: Farmers struggle with extreme weather conditions.
simple_cn: 農民得跟極端天氣硬撐。

example: Everyone has the right to a fair trial regardless of the crimes they are accused of.
example_cn: 每個人都有權接受公平審判，無論他們被指控犯了什麼罪。
pattern: have the right to a fair trial
simple: The judge ensured a fair trial for the suspect.
simple_cn: 法官確保了被告能獲得公平審判。

example: The detective discovered a fatal flaw in the suspect's alibi.
example_cn: 偵探發現嫌疑犯的不在場證明有一個致命破綻。
simple: The plan had a fatal flaw from the beginning.
simple_cn: 這個計畫從一開始就有致命缺陷。

example: Social media provides fertile ground for the spread of rumors and fake news.
example_cn: 社群媒體為謠言和假新聞的傳播提供了有利的溫床。
pattern: N + is fertile ground for + N
simple: The valley is famous for its fertile ground.
simple_cn: 這個山谷以土壤肥沃聞名。

example: Students from low-income families can apply for financial aid to cover their tuition fees.
example_cn: 來自低收入家庭的學生可以申請經濟援助來支付學費。
simple: The country received financial aid from the IMF.
simple_cn: 這個國家從國際貨幣基金組織獲得了財務援助。

example: One of the benefits of freelance work is having a flexible schedule.
example_cn: 自由接案的好處之一就是工作時間彈性。
simple: I prefer jobs with a flexible schedule.
simple_cn: 我比較喜歡工時彈性的工作。

example: The war has severely threatened the food security of the entire region.
example_cn: 這場戰爭嚴重威脅了整個區域的糧食安全。
simple: Climate change poses a risk to global food security.
simple_cn: 氣候變遷對全球糧食安全構成風險。

example: The new president promised a major shift in the country's foreign policy.
example_cn: 新任總統承諾將大幅調整國家的外交政策。
simple: Trade is a key part of our foreign policy.
simple_cn: 貿易是我們外交政策的重要一環。

example: George Washington is revered as a founding father of the United States.
example_cn: 喬治·華盛頓被尊崇為美國的開國元勳之一。
pattern: N + is considered a founding father of + N
simple: He is a founding father of modern economics.
simple_cn: 他是現代經濟學的奠基人之一。

example: Tourism must be carefully managed to avoid damaging the fragile ecosystem of the island.
example_cn: 觀光業必須謹慎管理，以免破壞島上脆弱的生態系統。
pattern: protect the fragile ecosystem of + N
simple: Pollution threatens the fragile ecosystem.
simple_cn: 污染威脅著脆弱的生態系統。

chinese: 常客飛行員 / 常旅客
example: As a frequent flyer, he has accumulated enough miles for a free ticket to Europe.
example_cn: 身為常搭飛機的人，他已經累積了足夠的里程數來換一張免費的歐洲機票。
pattern: S + is a frequent flyer with + 航空公司
simple: He is a frequent flyer on this route.
simple_cn: 他常搭這條航線，是個常客。

example: Freedom of speech is regarded as a fundamental right in many democratic societies.
example_cn: 言論自由在許多民主社會中被視為一項基本權利。
pattern: S + is a fundamental right of + 人
simple: Education is a fundamental right.
simple_cn: 教育是一項基本權利。

example: We must preserve natural resources to ensure a better world for future generations.
example_cn: 我們必須保護自然資源，才能為後代子孫確保一個更美好的世界。
simple: We write history for future generations.
simple_cn: 我們為後代子孫書寫歷史。

example: The museum exhibition is now open to the general public.
example_cn: 博物館的展覽現在已經對一般大眾開放。
simple: The information is available to the general public.
simple_cn: 這項資訊一般大眾都可以取得。

example: Genetic engineering allows scientists to modify the DNA of crops to make them more pest-resistant.
example_cn: 基因工程讓科學家能夠修改作物的DNA，使它們更能抵抗病蟲害。
simple: Genetic engineering is a controversial topic.
simple_cn: 基因工程是個備受爭議的話題。

example: The sudden rise in oil prices has significantly affected the global economy.
example_cn: 油價突然飆漲，對全球經濟造成了顯著影響。
simple: The global economy is interconnected.
simple_cn: 全球經濟是相互連結的。

chinese: 黃金機會 / 絕佳機會
example: Living abroad for a year provided her with a golden opportunity to master a second language.
example_cn: 在國外生活一年，為她提供了精通第二語言的絕佳機會。
simple: This is a golden opportunity for your career.
simple_cn: 這是你職涯中的絕佳機會。

example: Good governance is essential for a country's long-term economic stability and growth.
example_cn: 良好的治理對於一個國家的長期經濟穩定與成長至關重要。
simple: The citizens demand good governance.
simple_cn: 市民要求良好的治理。

example: The parliament is currently debating the budget and proposed government spending on healthcare.
example_cn: 國會目前正在辯論預算以及政府在醫療保健方面的支出提案。
simple: Government spending on education has risen.
simple_cn: 政府在教育上的支出增加了。

example: The scientist won the Nobel Prize for her groundbreaking research on cancer treatments.
example_cn: 這位科學家因為在癌症治療方面的開創性研究而贏得了諾貝爾獎。
simple: This groundbreaking research changed the field.
simple_cn: 這項突破性研究改變了整個領域。

example: There is a growing concern about the impact of social media on children's mental health.
example_cn: 越來越多人擔心社群媒體對兒童心理健康的影響。
pattern: There is a growing concern about + N
simple: Global warming is a growing concern.
simple_cn: 全球暖化是越來越令人擔憂的問題。

chinese: 罪惡快感 (指雖然覺得羞愧但很享受的事)
example: Eating a whole tub of ice cream while watching cartoons is my guilty pleasure.
example_cn: 邊看卡通邊吃掉一整桶冰淇淋，是我偷偷享受的小確幸。
simple: Reality TV is many people's guilty pleasure.
simple_cn: 實境秀是很多人又愛又怕的罪惡娛樂。

example: After graduation, many students have to face the harsh reality of the competitive job market.
example_cn: 畢業後，許多學生得面對競爭激烈職場的殘酷現實。
pattern: face the harsh reality of + N
simple: He finally accepted the harsh reality.
simple_cn: 他終於接受了殘酷的現實。

example: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves balanced nutrition and regular physical activity.
example_cn: 維持健康的生活方式，需要均衡營養和規律運動。
simple: Eating well is part of a healthy lifestyle.
simple_cn: 吃得好是健康生活的一部分。

example: The city's economy was originally based on heavy industry like steel and shipbuilding.
example_cn: 這座城市的經濟原本以鋼鐵、造船等重工業為基礎。
simple: The region is known for heavy industry.
simple_cn: 這個地區以重工業聞名。

example: Some critics suspect that the politician has a hidden agenda behind his generous proposal.
example_cn: 有些評論家懷疑，那位政治人物慷慨的提案背後藏有隱藏議題。
simple: I don't trust him because he has a hidden agenda.
simple_cn: 我不信任他，因為他暗藏心機。

example: The young athlete struggled under the pressure of the public's high expectations.
example_cn: 那位年輕運動員在公眾高度期待的壓力下苦苦掙扎。
simple: The manager has high expectations for the team.
simple_cn: 經理對團隊有很高的期望。

example: The fans had high hopes that their team would win the championship this year.
example_cn: 粉絲們對他們的球隊今年能奪冠寄予厚望。
simple: We have high hopes for the new project.
simple_cn: 我們對這個新計畫寄予厚望。

example: Ensuring student safety is a high priority for the school administration.
example_cn: 確保學生安全是學校行政單位的首要任務。
simple: The government gave high priority to healthcare.
simple_cn: 政府把醫療保健列為高度優先事項。

example: The restaurant is famous for maintaining high standards of food quality and service.
example_cn: 這家餐廳以維持高標準的餐點品質和服務聞名。
simple: Her work always meets high standards.
simple_cn: 她的工作總是達到高標準。

chinese: 備受矚目的案件 / 高調案件
example: The lawyer became famous overnight after winning a high-profile case involving a celebrity.
example_cn: 那位律師在打贏一場涉及名人的矚目官司後，一夜成名。
simple: The police are investigating a high-profile case.
simple_cn: 警方正在調查一起備受矚目的案件。

example: It is simply human nature to want to protect those we love.
example_cn: 想要保護我們所愛的人，純粹是人之常情。
simple: Curiosity is a basic part of human nature.
simple_cn: 好奇心是人類天性的基本部分。

example: The international organization works to prevent the violation of human rights worldwide.
example_cn: 這個國際組織致力於防止全球各地的人權受到侵犯。
simple: Human rights are universal.
simple_cn: 人權是普世的。

example: This internship provides an ideal opportunity to gain practical experience in the field.
example_cn: 這份實習提供了在該領域獲得實戰經驗的理想機會。
pattern: N + is an ideal opportunity for + 人
simple: The conference was an ideal opportunity to network.
simple_cn: 這場會議是拓展人脈的理想機會。

chinese: 立即見效 / 立即生效
example: The new tax law will take immediate effect, starting from tomorrow morning.
example_cn: 這項新稅法將從明天早上起立即生效。
simple: The medicine had an immediate effect on the patient.
simple_cn: 這種藥對病人立刻產生了效果。

chinese: 迫切的危險 / 迫在眉睫的危險
example: The dark clouds and strong winds signaled that a storm was in imminent danger of arriving.
example_cn: 烏雲密布、強風吹襲，預示著暴風雨即將來襲。
pattern: be in imminent danger of + N/V-ing
simple: The building is in imminent danger of collapsing.
simple_cn: 這棟建築物隨時有倒塌的危險。

example: Vaccines work by triggering an immune response without causing the actual disease.
example_cn: 疫苗的作用是引發免疫反應，但不會導致實際疾病。
simple: The allergy caused a strong immune response.
simple_cn: 過敏引發了強烈的免疫反應。

chinese: 帝國權力 / 帝國勢力
example: During the 19th century, several European nations competed for imperial power in Asia.
example_cn: 19世紀期間，好幾個歐洲國家在亞洲爭奪帝國霸權。
simple: The country was once a major imperial power.
simple_cn: 這個國家曾經是主要的帝國強權。

example: The coastal city faces an imminent threat from the approaching hurricane.
example_cn: 這座沿海城市正面臨颶風逼近的迫切威脅。
pattern: pose an imminent threat to + N
simple: Rising sea levels pose an imminent threat to small islands.
simple_cn: 海平面上升對小島構成迫在眉睫的威脅。

chinese: 原住民族群 / 本地人口
example: The government is taking measures to protect the rights of the indigenous population.
example_cn: 政府正採取措施保護原住民族的權益。
simple: The indigenous population has lived here for centuries.
simple_cn: 原住民已經在這裡生活了好幾個世紀。

example: The country's industrial output has increased significantly over the last quarter.
example_cn: 這個國家的工業產值在上一季有顯著成長。
simple: Falling demand led to a drop in industrial output.
simple_cn: 需求下滑導致工業產量減少。

example: Improving healthcare services has led to a dramatic decrease in infant mortality.
example_cn: 改善醫療服務讓嬰兒死亡率大幅下降。
simple: The region suffers from high infant mortality.
simple_cn: 這個地區的嬰兒死亡率很高。

example: Doctors are working hard to prevent the spread of the infectious disease across the border.
example_cn: 醫生們正努力防止這種傳染病擴散到邊境以外。
simple: COVID-19 is a highly infectious disease.
simple_cn: COVID-19 是一種傳染力很強的疾病。

example: Customers complained about the inferior quality of the cheap electronics bought online.
example_cn: 顧客抱怨網路上買的廉價電子產品品質很差。
simple: These materials are of inferior quality compared to the old ones.
simple_cn: 這些材料的品質比舊的還要差。

chinese: 固有風險 / 內在風險
example: Every investment comes with some degree of inherent risk that investors must accept.
example_cn: 每一項投資都有一定程度的固有風險，投資人必須接受。
simple: Skydiving has an inherent risk of injury.
simple_cn: 跳傘本身就有受傷的風險。

chinese: 最初反應 / 第一反應
example: My initial reaction to the news was one of total shock and disbelief.
example_cn: 我對這則新聞的第一反應是完全震驚且難以置信。
simple: His initial reaction was to refuse the offer.
simple_cn: 他最初的反應是拒絕這個提議。

chinese: 天賦能力 / 與生俱來的能力
example: Some children have an innate ability to learn musical instruments very quickly.
example_cn: 有些小孩天生就有很快學會樂器的能力。
pattern: have an innate ability to + V
simple: She has an innate ability to lead.
simple_cn: 她天生就有領導能力。

example: An innocent bystander was injured during the high-speed police chase yesterday.
example_cn: 昨天警方高速追捕時，一名無辜的路人受傷了。
simple: The argument ended up hurting an innocent bystander.
simple_cn: 這場爭論最後傷到了一個無辜的路人。

example: He was accused of using inside information to make a large profit on the stock market.
example_cn: 他被指控利用內線消息在股市大賺一筆。
simple: The journalist obtained inside information about the scandal.
simple_cn: 那位記者取得了這起醜聞的內部消息。

example: Brand reputation is a valuable intangible asset that can take years for a company to build.
example_cn: 品牌聲譽是寶貴的無形資產，公司可能需要花費多年才能建立起來。
pattern: N + is a valuable intangible asset
simple: Intellectual property is considered an intangible asset.
simple_cn: 智慧財產權被視為一種無形資產。

example: Laws are in place to protect intellectual property from being stolen or copied without permission.
example_cn: 法律有明文規定，保護智慧財產權不被未經許可盜用或複製。
simple: The company takes intellectual property rights very seriously.
simple_cn: 公司非常重視智慧財產權。

example: The marathon runners struggled to finish the race in the intense heat of the midday sun.
example_cn: 馬拉松選手在正午烈日下奮力完成比賽。
pattern: S + struggle in the intense heat
simple: The intense heat caused the rails to buckle.
simple_cn: 高溫導致鐵軌變形彎曲。

chinese: 加護病房 / 重症監護
example: The patient was moved to the intensive care unit immediately after the complex surgery.
example_cn: 病人在複雜手術後立刻被轉進加護病房。
simple: He spent three weeks in intensive care.
simple_cn: 他在加護病房住了三個星期。

example: Bees and flowers have an interdependent relationship that is essential for the survival of both.
example_cn: 蜜蜂和花朵之間有相互依存的關係，對兩者的生存都至關重要。
pattern: A and B have an interdependent relationship
simple: The global economy is built on interdependent relationships.
simple_cn: 全球經濟建立在相互依賴的關係上。

example: Good interpersonal skills are essential for anyone aspiring to a successful leadership position.
example_cn: 良好的人際溝通技巧對任何想成功擔任領導職位的人來說都是必要的。
simple: Sales jobs require strong interpersonal skills.
simple_cn: 銷售工作需要有很強的人際互動能力。

chinese: 深入了解 / 詳盡知識
example: The guide has an intimate knowledge of the local history and culture of this ancient town.
example_cn: 導遊對這個古鎮的當地歷史與文化瞭如指掌。
pattern: have an intimate knowledge of + N
simple: He has an intimate knowledge of the legal system.
simple_cn: 他對法律體系有深入的了解。

example: Working as a volunteer at the hospital provided me with invaluable experience in patient care.
example_cn: 在醫院當志工的經驗，讓我在病人照護方面學到非常寶貴的東西。
simple: The internship gave me invaluable experience.
simple_cn: 這份實習讓我獲得了非常寶貴的經驗。

example: Invasive species can quickly disrupt the balance of the local environment and kill native wildlife.
example_cn: 外來入侵物種很快就會破壞當地環境的平衡，並導致原生野生動物死亡。
simple: Many invasive species are introduced by humans accidentally.
simple_cn: 許多外來物種都是人類不小心引入的。

chinese: 調查報導 / 調查新聞
example: The corruption scandal was uncovered thanks to high-quality investigative journalism by a local newspaper.
example_cn: 這起貪腐醜聞之所以被揭發，要歸功於一家地方報社高品質的調查報導。
pattern: N + is a result of investigative journalism
simple: Investigative journalism plays a key role in democracy.
simple_cn: 調查報導在民主社會中扮演關鍵角色。

chinese: 孤立事件 / 個別事件
example: The manager claimed that the mistake was an isolated incident and would not happen again.
example_cn: 經理聲稱那次錯誤只是單一事件，不會再發生。
pattern: N + is not just an isolated incident
simple: People fear that the crime was not an isolated incident.
simple_cn: 民眾擔心這起犯罪並非單一事件。

example: The project's success was the result of a joint effort between the two different departments.
example_cn: 這個專案的成功是兩個不同部門共同努力的結果。
pattern: a joint effort between A and B
simple: Cleaning the park required a joint effort from the students.
simple_cn: 打掃公園需要學生們一起努力。

example: A fair and independent judicial system is a pillar of any modern democratic society.
example_cn: 公正獨立的司法制度是任何現代民主社會的基石。
simple: The judicial system protects the rights of citizens.
simple_cn: 司法制度保障了國民的權利。

example: According to the law, employees cannot be fired without just cause and proper notice.
example_cn: 根據法律，雇主不能無故解僱員工，且必須給予適當的通知。
simple: He fought for a just cause.
simple_cn: 他為了一個正義的事業而奮鬥。

example: She has shown a keen interest in environmental protection since she was a primary school student.
example_cn: 她從國小就對環保展現出濃厚的興趣。
pattern: have a keen interest in + N/V-ing
simple: Investors have a keen interest in the new startup.
simple_cn: 投資人對這家新創公司很感興趣。

example: Dogs have an incredibly keen sense of smell that helps them track scents over long distances.
example_cn: 狗的嗅覺非常靈敏，能幫助牠們追蹤長距離的氣味。
simple: She has a keen sense of observation.
simple_cn: 她的觀察力很敏銳。

chinese: 連鎖反應 / 附帶影響
example: The sudden factory closure had a knock-on effect on the entire local economy.
example_cn: 工廠突然關閉，對整個地方經濟產生了連鎖效應。
pattern: have a knock-on effect on + N
simple: High fuel prices have a knock-on effect on food costs.
simple_cn: 油價高漲會連帶影響食物成本。

example: The government is introducing new policies to create more jobs in the labour market.
example_cn: 政府正在推出新政策，希望在勞動市場創造更多就業機會。
simple: Young graduates face a tough labour market.
simple_cn: 年輕畢業生面臨嚴峻的就業市場。

example: Diplomats are meeting to discuss how to achieve a lasting peace in the troubled region.
example_cn: 外交官們正在開會討論如何在這個動盪地區實現持久和平。
simple: Both sides hope for a lasting peace.
simple_cn: 雙方都希望能夠達成持久的和平。

example: Smoking remains the leading cause of preventable death in many developed nations.
example_cn: 在許多已開發國家，吸菸仍然是可預防死亡的主要原因。
pattern: N + is the leading cause of + N
simple: Heart disease is a leading cause of death worldwide.
simple_cn: 心臟病是全球主要的死因之一。

chinese: 學習曲線 (指學習某事的難易程度與進度)
example: The new software has a steep learning curve, so it might take some time to master.
example_cn: 這套新軟體的學習曲線很陡，可能需要花點時間才能上手。
pattern: S + face a steep learning curve
simple: There is always a learning curve with new technology.
simple_cn: 學習新科技總會有一段適應期。

chinese: 法律建議 / 法律諮詢
example: You should seek professional legal advice before signing such a complex contract.
example_cn: 在簽署這麼複雜的合約之前，你應該先尋求專業的法律諮詢。
simple: He offered free legal advice to the poor.
simple_cn: 他免費為窮人提供法律諮詢。

example: The company has decided to initiate legal proceedings against the former employee for theft.
example_cn: 公司決定對那名前員工提起訴訟，因為他涉及盜竊。
simple: The legal proceedings lasted for two years.
simple_cn: 訴訟程序持續了兩年。

chinese: 欠發達國家 / 發展緩慢的國家
example: Many less-developed countries rely heavily on international aid to improve their infrastructure.
example_cn: 許多低度開發國家高度依賴國際援助來改善基礎建設。
simple: Tourism can help the economy of a less-developed country.
simple_cn: 觀光業有助於促進低度開發國家的經濟。

example: New regulations aim to create a level playing field for small businesses competing with giants.
example_cn: 新法規旨在為與大企業競爭的小型企業創造公平的競爭環境。
simple: We want a level playing field for all candidates.
simple_cn: 我們希望所有候選人都有公平的競爭環境。

example: Business owners are required by law to have liability insurance to protect against accidents.
example_cn: 法律規定業主必須投保責任險，以防範意外事故。
simple: Drivers must carry at least basic liability insurance.
simple_cn: 駕駛人至少必須投保基本的責任險。

example: A liberal arts education focuses on critical thinking and broad knowledge rather than specific skills.
example_cn: 博雅教育著重於批判性思考和廣泛知識，而非特定技能。
pattern: S + study liberal arts at + 學校
simple: She graduated with a degree in liberal arts.
simple_cn: 她畢業時取得的是文科學位。

chinese: 平均壽命 / 預期壽命
example: Improved nutrition and better healthcare have significantly increased life expectancy worldwide.
example_cn: 營養改善與醫療進步，顯著提升了全球的預期壽命。
simple: Life expectancy in this country is 82 years.
simple_cn: 這個國家的平均壽命是82歲。

example: The city's economy shifted from heavy industry to light industry, such as textiles and electronics.
example_cn: 這座城市的經濟從重工業轉向輕工業，例如紡織與電子業。
simple: Light industry causes less pollution than heavy industry.
simple_cn: 輕工業造成的污染比重工業少。

example: I joined the book club to meet like-minded people who share my passion for literature.
example_cn: 我加入讀書會是為了認識志同道合、同樣熱愛文學的人。
simple: The event attracted hundreds of like-minded people.
simple_cn: 這場活動吸引了數百位志同道合的人。

example: A compromise seems to be the most likely outcome of the long-standing dispute.
example_cn: 妥協似乎是這場長期爭議最有可能的結果。
pattern: the most likely outcome of + N
simple: We are still waiting for the likely outcome.
simple_cn: 我們還在等待可能的結果。

chinese: 生活條件 / 居住環境
example: The urban renewal project aims to improve the living conditions of people in the slums.
example_cn: 這個都市更新計畫旨在改善貧民窟居民的生活條件。
simple: Living conditions have improved over the years.
simple_cn: 這些年來生活條件有改善。

chinese: 在世者的記憶中 / 近年來
example: This has been the hottest summer in living memory, breaking all previous records.
example_cn: 這是人們記憶中最熱的一個夏天，打破了所有以往的紀錄。
simple: There hasn't been a flood like this in living memory.
simple_cn: 在大家的記憶中，從來沒有發生過像這樣的大水。

chinese: 活生生的證據 / 活生生的例子
example: She is living proof that age is just a number and you can still pursue your dreams.
example_cn: 她本身就是活生生的證明，年齡只是個數字，你還是可以追求夢想。
pattern: N + is living proof that + 子句
simple: His success is living proof of his talent.
simple_cn: 他的成功就是他天賦的活生生證明。

example: Rapid economic growth has raised the living standards of millions of people in the country.
example_cn: 快速的經濟成長提升了國內數百萬人的生活水準。
simple: We are working to maintain high living standards.
simple_cn: 我們正在努力維持高水準的生活品質。

example: His entire argument is based on a common logical fallacy known as a straw man attack.
example_cn: 他的整個論點是基於一個常見的邏輯謬誤，也就是「稻草人攻擊」。
simple: The professor pointed out a logical fallacy in my paper.
simple_cn: 教授在我的論文中指出了一個邏輯謬誤。

example: The aging population has increased the demand for long-term care facilities and professionals.
example_cn: 人口老化增加了對長期照護機構與專業人員的需求。
simple: Government spending on long-term care is rising.
simple_cn: 政府在長期照護上的支出正在增加。

example: Successful businesses rely on careful long-term planning rather than just short-term profits.
example_cn: 成功的企業依賴的是審慎的長期規劃，而不只是短期的利潤。
simple: Long-term planning helps avoid future problems.
simple_cn: 長期規劃有助於避免未來的問題。

chinese: 長期存在的問題 / 老大難問題
example: The lack of affordable housing is a long-standing problem that requires urgent attention.
example_cn: 可負擔住宅的缺乏是一個長期存在的問題，需要迫切關注。
simple: The new policy aims to fix this long-standing problem.
simple_cn: 這項新政策旨在解決這個長期存在的問題。

example: Taxes on luxury goods like high-end watches and sports cars have been increased.
example_cn: 針對高級手錶和跑車這類奢侈品的稅收已經調漲了。
simple: Luxury goods are not essential for life.
simple_cn: 奢侈品對生活來說不是必需的。

example: The Earth's magnetic field protects us from harmful radiation from the sun.
example_cn: 地球的磁場保護我們免受太陽有害輻射的傷害。
simple: A compass works by detecting the magnetic field.
simple_cn: 指南針是靠偵測磁場來運作的。

example: The controversial story was largely ignored by the mainstream media at first.
example_cn: 這個具爭議性的故事起初被主流媒體大幅忽略。
simple: Social media competes with mainstream media.
simple_cn: 社群媒體正在與主流媒體競爭。

example: The massive oil spill was a devastating man-made disaster that killed millions of fish.
example_cn: 大規模的漏油事件是一場毀滅性的人為災難，導致數百萬條魚死亡。
simple: Global warming is increasingly seen as a man-made disaster.
simple_cn: 全球暖化越來越被視為人為造成的災難。

example: The manufacturing industry provides jobs for thousands of skilled workers in this region.
example_cn: 製造業為這個地區數千名技術勞工提供了工作機會。
simple: Taiwan has a strong manufacturing industry.
simple_cn: 台灣有很強的製造業。

example: The country is successfully transitioning from a planned economy to a market economy.
example_cn: 這個國家正順利地從計畫經濟轉型為市場經濟。
simple: Capitalism is based on a market economy.
simple_cn: 資本主義是建立在市場經濟的基礎上。

example: In a free market, prices are primarily determined by market forces of supply and demand.
example_cn: 在自由市場中，價格主要由供給與需求的市場力量決定。
simple: Companies must adapt to market forces.
simple_cn: 企業必須適應市場的力量。

example: The rare antique was sold at a price far below its current market price.
example_cn: 這件稀有古董以遠低於目前市場價格的價錢賣出。
simple: The market price of gold has risen.
simple_cn: 黃金的市場價格已經上漲。

chinese: 市場佔有率 / 市佔率
example: The tech giant is trying to increase its market share by launching cheaper smartphones.
example_cn: 這家科技巨頭正試圖透過推出更便宜的手機來增加市占率。
simple: The company holds a 40% market share.
simple_cn: 這家公司擁有百分之四十的市占率。

example: Mass media has a huge influence on how the public perceives social issues.
example_cn: 大眾媒體對公眾如何看待社會議題有著巨大的影響力。
simple: The mass media reported the news instantly.
simple_cn: 大眾媒體即時報導了這則新聞。

example: The invention of the assembly line revolutionized mass production in the automobile industry.
example_cn: 裝配線的發明徹底改變了汽車工業的大量生產方式。
pattern: S + lead to the mass production of + N
simple: New technology allows for the mass production of cheap goods.
simple_cn: 新技術讓大量生產便宜商品成為可能。

example: The municipal government unveiled a master plan for the city's urban development over the next decade.
example_cn: 市政府公布了一項未來十年城市發展的總體規劃。
pattern: S + design a master plan for + N
simple: The architect presented his master plan for the museum.
simple_cn: 建築師提出了他為博物館設計的總體規劃。

example: The bird's maternal instinct kicked in when she saw a cat approaching her nest.
example_cn: 那隻鳥看到有貓靠近鳥巢，母性本能就立刻啟動了。
simple: Maternal instinct is common in many animal species.
simple_cn: 母性本能存在於許多動物物種中。

example: The stadium has reached its maximum capacity, so no more tickets will be sold.
example_cn: 體育場已經達到最大容納人數，所以不再售票。
simple: The hospital is operating at maximum capacity.
simple_cn: 醫院目前已經滿載運作。

example: The judge handed down the maximum sentence to the criminal because of the severity of the crime.
example_cn: 法官考量到這起犯罪的嚴重性，對犯人判處了最高刑期。
pattern: receive the maximum sentence for + N
simple: The crime carries a maximum sentence of ten years.
simple_cn: 這項罪行最高可判處十年徒刑。

example: The purpose of the summit is to establish a meaningful dialogue between the two conflicting nations.
example_cn: 這次峰會的目的是要在兩個衝突國家之間建立有意義的對話。
pattern: engage in a meaningful dialogue with + 人
simple: Open communication leads to meaningful dialogue.
simple_cn: 開放的溝通能帶來有意義的對話。

example: The discovery of the new vaccine is hailed as a major medical breakthrough in the fight against the disease.
example_cn: 新疫苗的發現被譽為對抗該疾病的一項重大醫學突破。
pattern: N + is a major medical breakthrough
simple: Scientists hope for a medical breakthrough in cancer research.
simple_cn: 科學家希望癌症研究能出現醫學上的重大突破。

chinese: 心理疾病 / 精神疾病
example: Society should work harder to reduce the stigma surrounding mental illness.
example_cn: 社會應該更努力去減少對精神疾病的汙名化。
simple: Depression is a common type of mental illness.
simple_cn: 憂鬱症是一種常見的精神疾病。

example: Practicing mindfulness meditation can help improve your overall mental state and reduce stress.
example_cn: 練習正念冥想有助於改善整體心理狀態，並減輕壓力。
pattern: be in a healthy/fragile mental state
simple: His mental state has improved significantly.
simple_cn: 他的精神狀態已經明顯好轉。

example: Regular exercise helps increase your basal metabolic rate, allowing you to burn more calories even at rest.
example_cn: 規律運動能提高你的基礎代謝率，讓你在休息時也能燃燒更多卡路里。
pattern: N + can increase one's metabolic rate
simple: Age and muscle mass affect your metabolic rate.
simple_cn: 年齡和肌肉量會影響你的新陳代謝率。

example: The democratic government was suddenly overthrown in a violent military coup last night.
example_cn: 昨晚，這個民主政府在一場暴力軍事政變中突然被推翻。
pattern: N + was toppled in a military coup
simple: The country faced chaos after the military coup.
simple_cn: 這個國家在軍事政變後陷入混亂。

example: Diplomats are trying to resolve the crisis peacefully to avoid any need for military intervention.
example_cn: 外交官們正試圖和平解決這場危機，以避免任何軍事干預的必要。
simple: The UN debated the possibility of military intervention.
simple_cn: 聯合國針對軍事干預的可能性進行了辯論。

example: In some countries, all young men are required to perform a period of compulsory military service.
example_cn: 在某些國家，所有年輕男性都必須服一段時間的義務兵役。
simple: He is currently doing his military service.
simple_cn: 他目前正在服兵役。

example: A mixed economy combines elements of both private enterprise and government regulation.
example_cn: 混合經濟體結合了私營企業與政府監管的元素。
pattern: N + is based on a mixed economy
simple: Most modern nations have a mixed economy.
simple_cn: 大多數現代國家都實行混合經濟。

example: The mobile network was severely overloaded after the massive earthquake as everyone tried to call home.
example_cn: 大地震發生後，行動網路因為大家都急著打電話回家而嚴重超載。
pattern: N + depends on a stable mobile network
simple: The mobile network is down in this area.
simple_cn: 這個區域的行動網路斷線了。

example: The character in the movie faces a difficult moral dilemma between telling the truth and protecting his family.
example_cn: 電影中的角色面臨一個困難的道德兩難：要說實話，還是保護家人。
pattern: S + be caught in a moral dilemma
simple: The doctor faced a moral dilemma regarding the patient.
simple_cn: 醫生在面對這位病人時陷入了道德兩難。

example: Economists warn that government bailouts can create a moral hazard by encouraging companies to take excessive risks.
example_cn: 經濟學家警告，政府紓困可能引發道德風險，鼓勵公司過度冒險。
simple: Insurance can sometimes lead to moral hazard.
simple_cn: 保險有時可能導致道德風險。

example: Wealthy nations have a moral obligation to provide aid to countries suffering from extreme famine.
example_cn: 富裕國家有道義上的義務，向遭受嚴重饑荒的國家提供援助。
pattern: have a moral obligation to + V
simple: I felt a moral obligation to tell the truth.
simple_cn: 我覺得自己有道德義務說出實話。

chinese: 心理支持 / 精神支持
example: I went to the competition just to give my best friend some moral support.
example_cn: 我去比賽現場，只是為了給我最好的朋友一些精神上的支持。
simple: She needed some moral support before the exam.
simple_cn: 她在考試前需要一些精神上的支持。

example: The municipal government is planning to build more public parks to improve the quality of life for citizens.
example_cn: 市政府正計畫興建更多公共公園，以提升市民的生活品質。
simple: Decisions are made by the municipal government.
simple_cn: 決策是由市政府做出的。

chinese: 雙方協議 / 共同協議
example: The contract was terminated by mutual agreement after both sides realized it wasn't working.
example_cn: 雙方都意識到合約行不通之後，便經由協議終止了合約。
simple: They reached a mutual agreement to end the partnership.
simple_cn: 他們達成共識，同意終止合作關係。

example: The partnership between the two technology firms was built on a foundation of mutual benefit.
example_cn: 這兩家科技公司的合作關係，是建立在互利互惠的基礎上。
pattern: N + is for the mutual benefit of A and B
simple: Free trade aims for mutual benefit.
simple_cn: 自由貿易旨在實現互利。

example: The couple decided to divorce by mutual consent, hoping to remain friends for their children's sake.
example_cn: 這對夫妻決定協議離婚，希望為了孩子還能繼續當朋友。
simple: The policy was changed by mutual consent.
simple_cn: 這項政策是雙方同意後才更改的。

example: A healthy international relationship must be based on mutual respect and understanding.
example_cn: 健康的國際關係必須建立在互相尊重與理解的基礎上。
simple: Mutual respect is key to a good marriage.
simple_cn: 互相尊重是美滿婚姻的關鍵。

example: The crowd stood up and sang the national anthem with great pride before the soccer match began.
example_cn: 足球賽開始前，群眾起立滿懷驕傲地唱國歌。
simple: The national anthem was played at the ceremony.
simple_cn: 典禮上播放了國歌。

example: The government is trying to find ways to reduce the rising national debt without cutting essential services.
example_cn: 政府正設法在不刪減基本服務的前提下，降低不斷攀升的國債。
simple: The high national debt is a major concern for economists.
simple_cn: 高額的國債是經濟學家的一大憂慮。

example: Language and traditional food are often seen as important elements of a country's national identity.
example_cn: 語言和傳統食物常被視為一個國家民族認同的重要元素。
pattern: S + shape a sense of national identity
simple: The victory strengthened their national identity.
simple_cn: 這場勝利強化了他們的國家認同感。

example: The president emphasized that the decision was made in the national interest to ensure energy security.
example_cn: 總統強調這項決定是基於國家利益，以確保能源安全。
simple: Policies should put the national interest first.
simple_cn: 政策應該以國家利益為優先。

example: The leaked documents were classified because they contained information sensitive to national security.
example_cn: 這些外洩的文件屬於機密，因為內容涉及國家安全。
pattern: N + poses a threat to national security
simple: Cybersecurity is part of national security.
simple_cn: 網路安全是國家安全的一部分。

example: The national park attracts millions of tourists every year who come to admire its breathtaking natural beauty.
example_cn: 這個國家公園每年吸引數百萬遊客前來欣賞其令人驚嘆的自然美景。
pattern: preserve the natural beauty of + N
simple: The island is famous for its natural beauty.
simple_cn: 這座島嶼以自然美景聞名。

chinese: 自然原因 (常指自然死亡)
example: The medical examiner concluded that the elderly woman had died of natural causes.
example_cn: 法醫判定這位老婦人是自然死亡。
simple: He passed away from natural causes at the age of 95.
simple_cn: 他高齡95歲，自然安詳離世。

example: The earthquake was the worst natural disaster the region had seen in a century.
example_cn: 這場地震是該地區百年來最嚴重的天然災害。
pattern: S + be affected by a natural disaster
simple: Tsunamis and hurricanes are types of natural disasters.
simple_cn: 海嘯和颶風都屬於天然災害。

example: Natural gas is often used as a source of energy for heating and cooking in many homes.
example_cn: 天然氣常被許多家庭用來作為暖氣和烹飪的能源。
pattern: N + is powered by natural gas
simple: Natural gas is cleaner than coal.
simple_cn: 天然氣比煤炭更乾淨。

example: It is fascinating to observe these rare birds in their natural habitat.
example_cn: 在這些稀有鳥類的自然棲息地觀察牠們，真是令人著迷。
pattern: preserve the natural habitat of + N
simple: Pandas are losing their natural habitat.
simple_cn: 熊貓正在失去牠們的自然棲息地。

chinese: 自然正義 (法律術語，指程序公正)
example: The defendant's lawyer argued that the trial had violated the principles of natural justice.
example_cn: 被告律師主張，這場審判違反了自然正義的原則。
simple: Everyone deserves a fair hearing under natural justice.
simple_cn: 在自然正義下，每個人都應享有公平的審理機會。

example: Scientists are working on making computers understand and process natural language more effectively.
example_cn: 科學家正致力於讓電腦更有效地理解與處理自然語言。
simple: Siri can interact with users through natural language.
simple_cn: Siri可以透過自然語言跟使用者互動。

example: Evolution occurs over millions of years through the process of natural selection.
example_cn: 演化是透過天擇的過程，歷經數百萬年發生的。
pattern: through the process of natural selection
simple: Natural selection favors the strongest individuals.
simple_cn: 天擇會偏袒最強壯的個體。

example: The country strengthened its naval forces to protect its trade routes in the Pacific.
example_cn: 該國加強了海軍力量，以保護其在太平洋的貿易航線。
simple: The naval forces are on high alert.
simple_cn: 海軍部隊處於高度戒備狀態。

example: Some people view internet regulations as a necessary evil to protect online privacy.
example_cn: 有些人將網路監管視為保護線上隱私的必要之惡。
pattern: view N as a necessary evil
simple: Exams are often considered a necessary evil for students.
simple_cn: 考試常被學生視為必要之惡。

chinese: 消極態度 / 負面態度
example: A negative attitude can prevent you from seeing the opportunities in difficult situations.
example_cn: 負面態度會讓你在困境中看不到機會。
pattern: S + have a negative attitude toward + N
simple: His negative attitude affected the whole team.
simple_cn: 他的負面態度影響了整個團隊。

chinese: 負面宣傳 / 負面報導
example: The company suffered from negative publicity after the product safety scandal was exposed.
example_cn: 產品安全醜聞曝光後，該公司遭受了負面輿論的衝擊。
simple: The movie received negative publicity before its release.
simple_cn: 這部電影在上映前就受到負面宣傳。

example: The accident was caused by negligent driving and could have been easily avoided.
example_cn: 這起事故是因駕駛疏忽所致，原本很容易就能避免。
pattern: S + be charged with negligent driving
simple: Negligent driving is a serious legal offense.
simple_cn: 駕駛疏忽是嚴重的法律過失。

example: War in one region often causes a large influx of refugees into neighboring countries.
example_cn: 一個地區發生戰爭，常常會導致大量難民湧入鄰國。
simple: The island is shared by two neighboring countries.
simple_cn: 這個島嶼由兩個鄰國共同擁有。

example: Premature babies often require specialized neonatal care in the first few weeks of life.
example_cn: 早產兒在出生後的前幾週，通常需要專門的新生兒照護。
simple: Improvements in neonatal care have lowered infant mortality.
simple_cn: 新生兒照護的改善降低了嬰兒死亡率。

example: The extreme pressure from his job eventually led to a severe nervous breakdown.
example_cn: 工作上的極大壓力，最後讓他嚴重精神崩潰。
simple: She was close to a nervous breakdown.
simple_cn: 她差點就精神崩潰了。

example: The central nervous system consists of the brain and the spinal cord.
example_cn: 中樞神經系統由大腦和脊髓組成。
simple: Caffeine can stimulate the nervous system.
simple_cn: 咖啡因會刺激神經系統。

example: The company's net earnings reached a record high despite the economic crisis.
example_cn: 儘管面臨經濟危機，這家公司的淨收益仍創下歷史新高。
simple: Net earnings are calculated after taxes.
simple_cn: 淨收益是扣稅後計算出來的。

example: After deducting all expenses and taxes, his net income for the month was $3,000.
example_cn: 扣除所有開銷和稅金後，他這個月的淨收入是三千美元。
simple: Her net income increased after the promotion.
simple_cn: 她升職後淨收入增加了。

example: The business reported a 20% increase in net profit compared to the previous year.
example_cn: 這家企業的淨利潤比前一年增加了百分之二十。
pattern: generate a net profit of + 金額
simple: The net profit was lower than expected.
simple_cn: 淨利潤比預期還要低。

example: The entrepreneur's net worth grew significantly after his startup went public.
example_cn: 這位企業家的新創公司上市後，他的淨資產大幅增長。
pattern: have a net worth of + 金額
simple: A person's net worth includes assets and liabilities.
simple_cn: 一個人的淨資產包含資產與負債。

example: Wearing masks in crowded places has become the new normal for many people.
example_cn: 在人多的地方戴口罩，對很多人來說已經成為新常態。
simple: Working from home is the new normal in the tech industry.
simple_cn: 在家工作已經成為科技業的新常態。

example: The tech company is already developing the next generation of ultra-thin laptops.
example_cn: 這家科技公司已經在開發下一代的超薄筆記型電腦。
simple: The next generation of gamers expects VR support.
simple_cn: 下一代玩家期待支援虛擬實境。

example: The country maintains its weapons as a nuclear deterrent to prevent foreign aggression.
example_cn: 該國維持武器作為核威懾力量，以防止外國侵略。
simple: Many argue that a nuclear deterrent keeps the peace.
simple_cn: 很多人認為核威懾能維持和平。

example: Global activists are calling for nuclear disarmament to ensure a safer world.
example_cn: 全球的活動人士呼籲核裁軍，以確保世界更安全。
simple: Nuclear disarmament is a long-standing goal of the UN.
simple_cn: 核裁軍是聯合國長久以來的目標。

example: Some people support nuclear energy as a clean alternative to fossil fuels.
example_cn: 有些人支持核能，認為它是取代化石燃料的乾淨能源。
simple: The safety of nuclear energy is often debated.
simple_cn: 核能的安全性經常引發討論。

chinese: 核心家庭 (指父母與子女組成的家庭)
example: In modern societies, the nuclear family has replaced the traditional extended family structure.
example_cn: 在現代社會，核心家庭已經取代了傳統的大家庭結構。
pattern: N + belongs to a nuclear family
simple: The nuclear family is the basic unit of society.
simple_cn: 核心家庭是社會的基本單位。

example: The engineers are checking the nuclear reactor for any signs of radiation leakage.
example_cn: 工程師正在檢查核反應爐，看是否有任何輻射外洩的跡象。
simple: The nuclear reactor was shut down for maintenance.
simple_cn: 核反應爐因維修而關閉。

example: Finding a safe way to dispose of nuclear waste remains a major challenge for scientists.
example_cn: 找到安全處理核廢料的方法，仍然是科學家面臨的一大挑戰。
simple: Nuclear waste must be stored deep underground.
simple_cn: 核廢料必須深埋在地底下。

example: An objective analysis of the data showed that the new policy was working effectively.
example_cn: 對數據進行客觀分析後顯示，這項新政策確實有效。
simple: Journalists should strive for objective analysis.
simple_cn: 記者應該力求客觀分析。

example: The scholarship candidates will be evaluated based on objective criteria such as test scores.
example_cn: 獎學金的申請者將根據客觀標準，例如考試成績，來進行評估。
simple: Using objective criteria reduces bias in recruitment.
simple_cn: 使用客觀標準能減少招聘中的偏見。

example: It is hard to give an objective opinion when you are so personally involved in the matter.
example_cn: 當你個人涉入太深時，很難給出客觀的意見。
pattern: S + provide an objective opinion on + N
simple: The judge asked for an objective opinion from the expert.
simple_cn: 法官要求專家提供客觀意見。

example: Back pain is a common occupational hazard for people who spend all day sitting at a computer.
example_cn: 整天坐在電腦前工作的人，背痛是常見的職業傷害。
pattern: N + is an occupational hazard of + N (職業)
simple: Burnout is an occupational hazard for doctors.
simple_cn: 過勞是醫生這個職業的職業傷害。

example: The company must follow strict occupational health and safety regulations to protect its workers.
example_cn: 公司必須遵守嚴格的職業健康與安全法規，以保護員工。
pattern: focus on occupational health and safety
simple: The factory passed the occupational health inspection.
simple_cn: 這間工廠通過了職業衛生檢查。

example: The interviewer used open-ended questions to encourage the candidate to speak more about their experience.
example_cn: 面試官用開放式問題來鼓勵求職者多談談自己的經歷。
simple: Open-ended questions yield more information than yes-no questions.
simple_cn: 開放式問題比是非題能獲得更多資訊。

example: The patient is slowly recovering in the hospital after undergoing a successful open-heart surgery.
example_cn: 病人在醫院接受成功的心臟手術後，正在慢慢康復。
simple: Open-heart surgery is a very risky procedure.
simple_cn: 開心手術是一項風險很高的程序。

example: The airline decided to close several low-traffic routes to reduce its operating costs.
example_cn: 這家航空公司決定關閉幾條低運量航線，以降低營運成本。
simple: The company managed to cut its operating costs by 10%.
simple_cn: 這間公司成功將營運成本降低了10%。

example: You should update your computer's operating system regularly to ensure the best security.
example_cn: 你應該定期更新電腦的作業系統，以確保最佳安全性。
simple: The software is not compatible with this operating system.
simple_cn: 這個軟體與這個作業系統不相容。

example: The museum project aimed to preserve the oral history of the survivors of the war.
example_cn: 這個博物館計畫旨在保存戰爭倖存者的口述歷史。
simple: Oral history provides insights that textbooks often miss.
simple_cn: 口述歷史能提供教科書常常遺漏的見解。

example: Before the invention of writing, stories and laws were passed down through oral tradition.
example_cn: 在文字發明之前，故事和法律都是透過口頭傳統代代相傳。
simple: The legend has been kept alive by oral tradition.
simple_cn: 這個傳說靠口耳相傳一直流傳下來。

example: Organic farming avoids the use of synthetic pesticides and fertilizers to protect the soil.
example_cn: 有機農業避免使用合成農藥和肥料，以保護土壤。
simple: More consumers are willing to pay for organic farming products.
simple_cn: 越來越多的消費者願意為有機農產品付費。

chinese: 有機成長 (企業靠自身發展而非收購的成長)
example: The small bakery achieved organic growth by building a loyal local customer base.
example_cn: 這間小麵包店靠著建立忠實的在地顧客群，實現了自然成長。
simple: Organic growth is slower but often more stable.
simple_cn: 有機成長雖然較慢，但通常更穩定。

example: The police formed a special unit to combat organized crime groups involved in smuggling.
example_cn: 警方成立了一個特別小組，來打擊涉及走私的有組織犯罪集團。
simple: The movie is about the rise of organized crime in the city.
simple_cn: 這部電影講的是這個城市裡組織犯罪的崛起。

chinese: 有組織的勞工 (指工會勢力)
example: Organized labor played a vital role in securing better working hours and wages for workers.
example_cn: 工會在為勞工爭取更好的工時與薪資方面，扮演了關鍵角色。
simple: Organized labor often negotiates with the government.
simple_cn: 工會組織經常與政府進行協商。

example: Please pay the outstanding balance on your credit card by the end of the month to avoid interest charges.
example_cn: 請在月底前繳清信用卡的未繳餘額，以免產生利息費用。
simple: The customer has a large outstanding balance.
simple_cn: 這位客戶有一筆很大的未結清餘額。

example: The company is struggling to pay off its outstanding debts after the failed expansion.
example_cn: 這家公司在擴張失敗後，正努力償還積欠的債務。
