example: If the headache doesn't go away soon, you should probably see a doctor.
example_cn: 如果頭痛一直沒好，你最好去看個醫生。
simple: I told him to go away.
simple_cn: 我叫他走開。

example: I need to go back to the office because I forgot my house keys on the desk.
example_cn: 我得回辦公室一趟，因為我把家裡鑰匙忘在桌上了。
pattern: S + go back to + 地方
simple: Our friendship goes back to high school.
simple_cn: 我們的友誼可以追溯到高中時期。

example: The show must go on regardless of the technical difficulties we are facing.
example_cn: 不管遇到什麼技術問題，表演還是得繼續下去。
simple: Tell me what's going on.
simple_cn: 告訴我發生什麼事了。

chinese: 出去 / 熄滅 / 過時
example: The lights suddenly went out during the storm, leaving us in total darkness.
example_cn: 暴風雨期間燈突然熄了，我們陷入一片漆黑。
simple: The fire went out because there was no wood.
simple_cn: 火因為沒有木柴而熄滅了。

example: When I grow up, I want to be a professional photographer and travel the world.
example_cn: 我長大後想當專業攝影師，環遊世界。
pattern: S + grow up in + 地方
simple: Stop acting like a child and grow up!
simple_cn: 別再像個小孩一樣，成熟一點！

example: The teacher reminded the students to hand in their final reports by the end of the day.
example_cn: 老師提醒學生要在今天結束前繳交期末報告。
simple: He handed in his resignation letter.
simple_cn: 他遞交了辭職信。

example: The volunteers spent the afternoon handing out fliers about the upcoming charity event.
example_cn: 志工們花了一個下午發傳單，宣傳即將舉辦的慈善活動。
simple: The teacher handed out the test papers.
simple_cn: 老師發下了考卷。

example: Teens often love to hang out at the mall with their friends on Saturday afternoons.
example_cn: 青少年週六下午很喜歡跟朋友去購物中心閒晃。
simple: We just hung out and talked all night.
simple_cn: 我們只是閒晃聊天，聊了一整晚。

example: Don't hang up yet; I have one more important thing to tell you about the project.
example_cn: 先別掛電話，我還有件關於專案的重要事情要跟你說。
simple: He hung up the coat in the closet.
simple_cn: 他把外套掛在衣櫃裡。

chinese: 等一下 / 堅持 / 握緊
example: Can you hold on for a moment while I check my schedule for next week?
example_cn: 可以等我一下嗎？我要確認下週的行程。
simple: The climber held on to the rock tightly.
simple_cn: 登山者緊緊抓住岩石。

example: Even though she was tired, she decided to keep on walking until she reached the top.
example_cn: 雖然她很累，但她決定繼續走，直到抵達山頂。
simple: They kept on talking despite the teacher's presence.
simple_cn: 儘管老師在場，他們還是繼續講話。

chinese: 保持 / 跟上 / 熬夜
example: You're doing a great job; keep up the good work and you'll get a promotion soon.
example_cn: 你做得很好，繼續保持下去，很快就能升職了。
simple: It's hard to keep up with the latest fashion.
simple_cn: 要跟上最新的流行真的很難。

example: It's not polite to laugh at other people's mistakes, especially when they are trying their best.
example_cn: 嘲笑別人的錯誤很不禮貌，尤其是當他們已經盡力了的時候。
simple: They laughed at my joke.
simple_cn: 他們被我講的笑話逗笑了。

example: Please check your essay again to make sure you didn't leave out any important details.
example_cn: 請再檢查一次你的作文，確保沒有漏掉任何重要細節。
simple: He felt left out when no one invited him to the party.
simple_cn: 沒人邀請他去派對，他覺得被冷落了。

chinese: 辜負 / 失望 / 放下
example: I promised my parents I would study hard because I didn't want to let them down.
example_cn: 我跟爸媽保證過會認真讀書，因為我不想讓他們失望。
simple: The team really let the fans down yesterday.
simple_cn: 球隊昨天真的讓粉絲很失望。

example: She stayed at home all weekend to look after her younger brother who had a high fever.
example_cn: 她整個週末都待在家裡照顧發高燒的弟弟。
simple: Can you look after my cat while I'm away?
simple_cn: 我不在的時候，可以幫我照顧我的貓嗎？

example: The doctor spent a long time looking at the X-rays before giving his diagnosis.
example_cn: 醫生花了好一段時間看X光片，才做出診斷。
simple: Look at the stars tonight.
simple_cn: 今晚看看天上的星星吧。

example: I have been looking for my lost keys everywhere, but I still can't find them.
example_cn: 我到處找我弄丟的鑰匙，但還是找不到。
simple: What are you looking for?
simple_cn: 你在找什麼？

example: The children are really looking forward to the field trip to the science museum next week.
example_cn: 孩子們非常期待下週去科學博物館的校外教學。
simple: I look forward to hearing from you.
simple_cn: 我期待收到你的消息。

example: The police promised to look into the complaints about the noise coming from the club.
example_cn: 警方承諾會調查那家夜店噪音的投訴。
simple: The committee is looking into the matter.
simple_cn: 委員會正在調查這件事。

example: Look out! There is a car coming toward you very fast!
example_cn: 小心！有輛車正朝你快速開過來！
simple: You should look out for pickpockets in this area.
simple_cn: 你在這區要小心扒手。

chinese: 查閱 / 向上看 / 好轉
example: If you don't know the meaning of the word, you can look it up in the dictionary.
example_cn: 如果你不知道這個字的意思，可以查字典。
simple: The economic situation is finally looking up.
simple_cn: 經濟狀況終於開始好轉了。

chinese: 辨認出 / 了解 / 假裝
example: It was so foggy that I could hardly make out the shape of the building ahead.
example_cn: 霧太濃了，我幾乎看不清前方建築物的輪廓。
pattern: S + can hardly make out + N
simple: I can't make out what he's saying.
simple_cn: 我聽不清楚他在說什麼。

chinese: 編造 / 組成 / 和好 / 化妝
example: She had to make up an excuse for being late to the important meeting.
example_cn: 她必須為重要會議遲到編個藉口。
pattern: S + make up + N (故事/藉口)
simple: The two friends finally made up after the fight.
simple_cn: 那兩個朋友吵架後終於和好了。

example: My new neighbors moved in last weekend, and they seem very friendly.
example_cn: 我的新鄰居上週末搬來了，他們看起來很友善。
simple: We are moving out of this apartment next month.
simple_cn: 我們下個月要搬出這間公寓。

example: The famous author passed away peacefully at his home at the age of ninety.
example_cn: 那位知名作家在自家安詳辭世，享年九十歲。
simple: My grandfather passed away ten years ago.
simple_cn: 我祖父十年前過世了。

example: It was so hot in the crowded room that one of the students passed out.
example_cn: 擁擠的房間裡太熱了，結果有個學生昏倒了。
simple: The teacher passed out the handouts to the class.
simple_cn: 老師把講義發給全班同學。

example: I'll lend you the money, but you must promise to pay me back by next Friday.
example_cn: 我可以借你錢，但你得保證下週五之前還我。
simple: He swore he would pay them back for what they did.
simple_cn: 他發誓一定會報復他們對他所做的事。

chinese: 償清 / 有回報 / 成功
example: All his hard work finally paid off when he was accepted into a prestigious university.
example_cn: 他所有的努力終於有了回報，被一間頂尖大學錄取了。
simple: I finally paid off my student loan.
simple_cn: 我終於還清了學貸。

example: She spent a long time trying to pick out the perfect dress for the wedding.
example_cn: 她花了好長時間，想挑出一件最適合婚禮的洋裝。
simple: Can you pick out your brother in this photo?
simple_cn: 你能在這張照片裡認出你弟弟嗎？

chinese: 撿起 / 接送 / 習得 / 好轉
example: Children often pick up new languages much faster than adults do through immersion.
example_cn: 透過沉浸式學習，小孩通常比大人更快學會新語言。
simple: I'll pick you up at the station at six.
simple_cn: 我六點會去車站接你。

example: The tour guide pointed out several historical landmarks as we walked through the city.
example_cn: 導遊帶我們逛市區的時候，指了好幾個歷史地標給我們看。
simple: He pointed out a mistake in my essay.
simple_cn: 他點出我作文裡的一個錯誤。

example: We had to put off the outdoor wedding because of the unexpected thunderstorm.
example_cn: 因為突然下起大雷雨，我們只好把戶外婚禮延期。
simple: Don't put off your homework until tomorrow.
simple_cn: 作業不要拖到明天才做。

chinese: 穿上 / 舉辦 / 增加 (體重)
example: She put on her heavy coat and scarf before heading out into the snow.
example_cn: 她穿上厚外套跟圍巾，才出門走進雪地裡。
simple: The school is putting on a musical next month.
simple_cn: 學校下個月要辦一場音樂劇。

chinese: 熄滅 / 撲滅 / 出版
example: It took the firefighters several hours to completely put out the forest fire.
example_cn: 消防隊員花了幾個小時才完全撲滅那場森林大火。
simple: Please put out your cigarette.
simple_cn: 請把你的菸熄掉。

chinese: 建造 / 提議 / 留宿
example: The city council decided to put up a new statue in the center of the park.
example_cn: 市議會決定在公園正中央豎立一座新的雕像。
simple: Can you put me up for the night?
simple_cn: 今晚可以讓我借住一晚嗎？

example: I really don't know how she puts up with her noisy neighbors every night.
example_cn: 我真的不知道她怎麼能每晚忍受她那群吵鬧的鄰居。
simple: We have to put up with the heat.
simple_cn: 我們得忍耐這個炎熱的天氣。

example: I ran into an old high school friend at the grocery store yesterday morning.
example_cn: 我昨天早上去超市的時候，偶然遇到一位高中老同學。
simple: His car ran into a tree.
simple_cn: 他的車撞上了一棵樹。

example: We need to go to the supermarket because we have run out of milk and eggs.
example_cn: 我們得去一趟超市，因為牛奶跟雞蛋都吃完了。
simple: Time is running out.
simple_cn: 時間快不夠了。

chinese: 出發 / 引發 (警報 / 炸彈)
example: We should set off early tomorrow morning to avoid the peak hour traffic.
example_cn: 我們明天早上應該早點出發，避開尖峰時段的車潮。
simple: The smoke set off the fire alarm.
simple_cn: 煙霧觸發了火災警報器。

chinese: 建立 / 安裝 / 設置
example: The young entrepreneur decided to set up her own tech company after graduation.
example_cn: 那位年輕創業家決定畢業後自己開一家科技公司。
simple: Can you help me set up the new computer?
simple_cn: 可以幫我設定這台新電腦嗎？

chinese: 定居 / 安定下來 / 冷靜
example: After years of traveling around the world, he finally decided to settle down in Taiwan.
example_cn: 在世界各地旅行多年後，他終於決定在台灣定居下來。
simple: Quiet, class! Settle down please.
simple_cn: 安靜，同學們！請坐好。

example: We waited for him for an hour, but he never showed up for the meeting.
example_cn: 我們等了他一個小時，但他始終沒來開會。
simple: Only a few people showed up at the party.
simple_cn: 派對只有幾個人出現。

example: The teacher told the noisy students to shut up and listen to the instructions.
example_cn: 老師叫那些吵鬧的學生閉嘴，仔細聽指示。
simple: He shut up all the windows before leaving.
simple_cn: 他離開前把所有窗戶都關緊了。

example: Please sit down and let me explain the details of the project to you.
example_cn: 請坐下來，讓我跟你說明這個專案的細節。
simple: He sat down on the sofa.
simple_cn: 他在沙發上坐了下來。

example: The whole audience stood up to give the pianist a standing ovation.
example_cn: 全場觀眾站起來，為那位鋼琴家起立鼓掌。
simple: You must stand up for your rights.
simple_cn: 你必須為自己的權利挺身而出。

example: She takes after her mother; both of them have beautiful blue eyes and a passion for music.
example_cn: 她長得很像她媽媽；兩個人都有一雙漂亮的藍眼睛，而且熱愛音樂。
simple: He takes after his father in many ways.
simple_cn: 他在很多方面都像他爸爸。

example: Don't worry about the travel arrangements; my assistant will take care of everything.
example_cn: 不用擔心旅行的事；我的助理會處理好一切。
simple: She takes good care of her little sister.
simple_cn: 她把她妹妹照顧得很好。

chinese: 起飛 / 脫掉 / 成功 / 休息
example: The plane finally took off after a two-hour delay caused by the heavy fog.
example_cn: 因為濃霧延誤了兩個小時，飛機終於起飛了。
simple: Take off your shoes please.
simple_cn: 請把鞋子脫掉。

chinese: 承擔 (責任) / 聘僱 / 挑戰
example: She decided to take on extra responsibilities to prove her capability to the boss.
example_cn: 她決定接下更多責任，向老闆證明自己的能力。
pattern: S + take on + N (責任/工作)
simple: The company is taking on new staff.
simple_cn: 公司正在招募新員工。

example: The large corporation is planning to take over several small local businesses next year.
example_cn: 那間大公司計畫明年收購好幾家本地的小企業。
simple: He will take over the business when his father retires.
simple_cn: 等他爸爸退休後，他會接手這門生意。

chinese: 開始從事 (愛好/職業) / 佔據 (時間/空間)
example: He recently took up photography as a hobby and has already bought an expensive camera.
example_cn: 他最近開始把攝影當作興趣，而且已經買了一台很貴的相機。
pattern: S + take up + N (愛好/活動)
simple: This desk takes up too much room.
simple_cn: 這張桌子太佔空間了。

example: The angry father told his son not to talk back when he was being corrected.
example_cn: 那位生氣的爸爸告訴兒子，被糾正的時候不要頂嘴。
simple: She was punished for talking back.
simple_cn: 她因為頂嘴被處罰了。

example: We need some more time to think about your proposal before we make a final decision.
example_cn: 我們需要多一點時間考慮你的提案，才能做出最後決定。
simple: What are you thinking about?
simple_cn: 你在想什麼？

example: Please take your time to think it over and let me know your answer tomorrow morning.
example_cn: 請慢慢想清楚，明天早上再告訴我你的答案。
simple: I need to think over the job offer.
simple_cn: 我需要好好考慮這份工作機會。

example: Don't throw away those old newspapers; we can recycle them for a good cause.
example_cn: 不要把那些舊報紙丟掉，我們可以回收它們做公益。
simple: He threw away a great chance.
simple_cn: 他錯過了一個大好機會。

example: I would like to try on these jeans to see if they fit before I buy them.
example_cn: 我想先試穿這條牛仔褲，看看合不合身再買。
simple: You should try the jacket on first.
simple_cn: 你應該先試穿這件外套。

chinese: 拒絕 / 調低 (音量 / 熱度)
example: He was very disappointed when the company turned down his job application.
example_cn: 當公司拒絕他的求職申請時，他非常失望。
simple: Could you turn down the music a bit?
simple_cn: 可以把音樂關小聲一點嗎？

chinese: 關掉 (電器) / 使失去興趣
example: Please remember to turn off the lights when you leave the classroom.
example_cn: 離開教室時請記得關燈。
simple: Turn the TV off before you go to bed.
simple_cn: 睡覺前把電視關掉。

chinese: 打開 (電器) / 突然發火 / 吸引
example: It was getting dark inside the house, so she decided to turn on the lamp.
example_cn: 屋裡越來越暗，所以她決定把燈打開。
simple: Who turned on the radio?
simple_cn: 誰開了收音機？

chinese: 調大 (音量) / 出現 / 被發現
example: I couldn't hear the news clearly, so I asked him to turn up the volume.
example_cn: 我聽不清楚新聞內容，所以請他把音量調大。
simple: Don't worry, your keys will turn up eventually.
simple_cn: 別擔心，你的鑰匙總會出現的。

example: They had to wait for several hours at the airport because of the flight delay.
example_cn: 因為航班延誤，他們不得不在機場等了好幾個小時。
simple: I am waiting for the bus.
simple_cn: 我在等公車。

example: I usually wake up at seven o'clock, but I don't get out of bed until seven-thirty.
example_cn: 我通常七點醒來，但會賴床到七點半才起來。
simple: Please wake me up at 6 a.m.
simple_cn: 請在早上六點叫我起床。

example: It is my turn to wash up the dishes tonight after everyone finishes dinner.
example_cn: 今晚輪到我在大家吃完晚餐後洗碗。
simple: Go and wash up for dinner.
simple_cn: 去洗手準備吃飯。

example: Watch out! There's a car coming very fast around the corner.
example_cn: 小心！有輛車正從轉角快速開過來。
simple: You should watch out for pickpockets.
simple_cn: 你應該小心扒手。

chinese: 磨損 / 穿破 / 使精疲力竭
example: I've worn out my favorite pair of running shoes after using them for a year.
example_cn: 我最喜歡的那雙跑步鞋穿了一年之後已經磨損了。
simple: The kids really wore me out today.
simple_cn: 今天被這群小孩搞得我累死了。

chinese: 健身 / 解決 / 計算 / 進展順利
example: He goes to the gym to work out three times a week to maintain his fitness.
example_cn: 他每週去健身房運動三次，以維持體能。
pattern: S + work out (+ at the gym)
simple: I can't work out this math problem.
simple_cn: 這道數學題我解不出來。

chinese: 同意某人 / 與...一致 / (食物)適合
example: I completely agree with your point of view regarding the environmental issue.
example_cn: 關於環境議題，我完全同意你的觀點。
simple: Spicy food doesn't agree with me.
simple_cn: 我吃不慣辣的食物。

example: She decided to apply for the position of manager after seeing the job advertisement.
example_cn: 她看到徵才廣告後，決定應徵經理職位。
simple: I'm applying for a visa.
simple_cn: 我正在申請簽證。

chinese: 相信...的存在 / 信任 / 信仰
example: Do you believe in ghosts, or do you think there's always a logical explanation?
example_cn: 你相信有鬼嗎，還是你覺得總會有合理的解釋？
simple: You have to believe in yourself.
simple_cn: 你必須相信自己。

example: The ancient artifacts found in the desert belong to a civilization from 3,000 years ago.
example_cn: 在沙漠中發現的古代文物，屬於三千年前的某個文明。
simple: Who does this umbrella belong to?
simple_cn: 這把傘是誰的？

chinese: 爆炸 / 充氣 / 大發雷霆
example: The terrorists tried to blow up the bridge, but the plan was stopped by the police.
example_cn: 恐怖份子試圖炸掉那座橋，但計畫被警方阻止了。
simple: Help me blow up these balloons.
simple_cn: 幫我把這些氣球吹起來。

example: The thieves tried to break into the house through the basement window.
example_cn: 小偷想從地下室的窗戶闖進那間房子。
simple: She suddenly broke into tears.
simple_cn: 她突然大哭起來。

example: The sun finally broke through the clouds after three days of heavy rain.
example_cn: 下了三天大雨後，太陽終於從雲層中露出來了。
simple: Scientists hope to break through in their cancer research.
simple_cn: 科學家希望在癌症研究上有所突破。

chinese: 分手 / 破碎 / 結束
example: They decided to break up after a long period of constant arguments.
example_cn: 他們長期不斷爭吵之後，決定分手。
simple: The meeting broke up at ten o'clock.
simple_cn: 會議在十點結束。

example: This old photograph brings back many happy memories of my childhood.
example_cn: 這張老照片勾起我童年許多快樂的回憶。
simple: The new policy brought back public confidence.
simple_cn: 這項新政策重新帶回了民眾的信心。

example: The new law was brought in to reduce plastic waste in the ocean.
example_cn: 制定這條新法是為了減少海洋中的塑膠垃圾。
simple: His business brings in a lot of money.
simple_cn: 他的生意賺進很多錢。

chinese: 增進 / 累積 / 建立
example: You need to build up your confidence by practicing your speech in front of a mirror.
example_cn: 你需要對著鏡子練習演講，來建立自信心。
simple: Traffic usually builds up on Friday afternoons.
simple_cn: 週五下午通常會開始塞車。

example: I was surprised to bump into my elementary school teacher at the library.
example_cn: 我在圖書館意外遇到小學老師，嚇了一跳。
simple: I accidentally bumped into the table.
simple_cn: 我不小心撞到桌子。

example: The abandoned factory burned down in a mysterious fire last night.
example_cn: 那間廢棄工廠昨晚在一場神祕大火中燒毀了。
simple: They burned down the old barn.
simple_cn: 他們把那間舊穀倉燒掉了。

example: The situation calls for immediate action from the local government.
example_cn: 這種情況需要地方政府立即採取行動。
simple: Protesters are calling for a change in the law.
simple_cn: 抗議者呼籲修改法律。

chinese: 點名 / 拜訪 / 號召
example: The teacher called on the student to answer the difficult question.
example_cn: 老師點名那位學生回答這個困難的問題。
simple: I'll call on you next time I'm in town.
simple_cn: 我下次進城時會去拜訪你。

example: Who will care for the pets while you are away on your business trip?
example_cn: 你出差不在的時候，誰會照顧這些寵物？
simple: I don't really care for spicy food.
simple_cn: 我其實不太喜歡辣的食物。

example: The new fashion trend caught on quickly among teenagers in the city.
example_cn: 這個新的時尚潮流很快就在城裡的青少年之間流行起來。
simple: He is a bit slow to catch on to the joke.
simple_cn: 他對笑話的理解有點慢。

example: My parents called me just to check up on how I was doing at university.
example_cn: 我爸媽打電話來，只是想關心我在大學過得怎麼樣。
pattern: S + check up on + 人/物
simple: The manager checked up on our progress.
simple_cn: 經理檢查了我們的進度。

example: I need to clean out my closet and donate the clothes I no longer wear.
example_cn: 我需要清理衣櫃，把不穿的衣服捐出去。
simple: The robbers cleaned out the safe.
simple_cn: 搶匪把保險箱洗劫一空。

chinese: 整理 / (天氣)轉晴 / 解決
example: I hope the weather clears up before our picnic starts this afternoon.
example_cn: 我希望今天下午野餐開始前，天氣會放晴。
simple: Let's clear up this misunderstanding.
simple_cn: 我們來把這個誤會說清楚。

example: Many small bookstores have closed down due to the rise of online shopping.
example_cn: 因為網路購物興起，很多小書店都關門了。
simple: The factory was closed down for safety reasons.
simple_cn: 那間工廠因為安全問題被關閉了。

example: Can you explain how this misunderstanding came about in the first place?
example_cn: 你能不能解釋一下，這個誤會到底是怎麼發生的？
simple: The sudden change came about because of the news.
simple_cn: 這個突然的變化是因為那則新聞引起的。

chinese: 出現 / 進展 / 隨行
example: How is your science project coming along? Are you almost finished?
example_cn: 你的科學專題進展得怎麼樣？快完成了嗎？
simple: A new opportunity finally came along.
simple_cn: 一個新的機會終於出現了。

example: I think I am coming down with a cold because my throat is very sore.
example_cn: 我覺得我好像感冒了，因為喉嚨很痛。
pattern: S + come down with + N (病名)
simple: Many students came down with the flu.
simple_cn: 很多學生都得了流感。

example: The tradition of celebrating the harvest comes from ancient times.
example_cn: 慶祝豐收的傳統是從古代流傳下來的。
pattern: S + come from + 地方/時代
simple: Where do you come from?
simple_cn: 你從哪裡來？

example: He came into a small fortune after his wealthy uncle passed away.
example_cn: 他有錢的叔叔過世後，他就繼承了一小筆財富。
simple: New laws came into force today.
simple_cn: 新的法律今天開始生效。

chinese: 出版 / 出現 / 結果是
example: Her new novel is expected to come out early next spring.
example_cn: 她的新小說預計明年春天初會出版。
simple: The truth finally came out.
simple_cn: 真相終於水落石出。

example: Why don't you come over to my house tonight and watch a movie?
example_cn: 你今晚要不要來我家看電影？
simple: A sudden feeling of fear came over her.
simple_cn: 她突然感到一陣恐懼。

chinese: 發生 / 被提及 / 接近
example: A new problem came up just as we were about to finish the task.
example_cn: 就在我們快完成任務的時候，突然冒出一個新問題。
simple: The subject came up during the meeting.
simple_cn: 會議上提到了這個話題。

chinese: 想出 / 提出 (主意、計畫)
example: The marketing team needs to come up with a creative plan for the product launch.
example_cn: 行銷團隊需要為產品上市想出一個有創意的方案。
simple: He came up with a great solution.
simple_cn: 他想出了一個很棒的解決方案。

example: You can always count on your best friends when you are in trouble.
example_cn: 你有麻煩的時候，永遠可以指望你的好朋友。
simple: I am counting on your support.
simple_cn: 我指望你的支持。

example: Please cross out any mistakes in your essay and write the correct words above.
example_cn: 請把你文章裡的錯誤劃掉，然後在上面寫上正確的字。
simple: He crossed out his name from the list.
simple_cn: 他把自己的名字從名單上劃掉了。

example: We need to cut back on our electricity usage to save money.
example_cn: 我們需要減少用電量來省錢。
simple: The company is cutting back on spending.
simple_cn: 公司正在削減開支。

chinese: 插嘴 / 插隊 / 超車
example: I was talking to the manager when my colleague suddenly cut in.
example_cn: 我正在跟經理講話時，同事突然插話。
simple: A red car cut in front of us.
simple_cn: 一輛紅車突然插到我們前面。

chinese: 剪下 / 戒除 / 停止運作
example: My doctor told me to cut out sugary drinks to lose weight.
example_cn: 我的醫生叫我戒掉含糖飲料來減肥。
simple: The engine suddenly cut out.
simple_cn: 引擎突然熄火了。

example: That shop specializes in antiques and deals in rare coins from all over the world.
example_cn: 那家店專賣古董，也買賣來自世界各地的稀有錢幣。
simple: He deals in recycled paper.
simple_cn: 他做回收紙的生意。

example: We waited for the noise of the crowd to die down before we started the speech.
example_cn: 我們等到人群的噪音平息下來，才開始演講。
simple: The storm finally died down.
simple_cn: 暴風雨終於平息下來了。

example: Many traditional crafts are in danger of dying out as young people move away.
example_cn: 隨著年輕人搬離，許多傳統工藝正面臨失傳的危機。
simple: Dinosaurs died out millions of years ago.
simple_cn: 恐龍在幾百萬年前就滅絕了。

example: I strongly disagree with the proposal to build a new factory near the park.
example_cn: 我強烈反對在公園附近蓋新工廠的提案。
simple: Onions disagree with me.
simple_cn: 我吃洋蔥會不舒服。

example: The company decided to do away with formal dress codes on Fridays.
example_cn: 公司決定在週五取消正式服裝規定。
simple: We should do away with these old rules.
simple_cn: 我們應該廢除這些舊規定。

example: My teacher asked me to do the homework over because it was so messy.
example_cn: 老師叫我重寫作業，因為寫得太亂了。
simple: I have to do this report over.
simple_cn: 我必須把這份報告重做一遍。

example: I forgot my umbrella, so I had to do without one in the rain.
example_cn: 我忘了帶傘，所以只好在雨中淋雨。
simple: We can't do without a car here.
simple_cn: 在這裡我們不能沒有車。

example: The lawyers are working to draw up a contract that is fair to both sides.
example_cn: 律師們正在草擬一份對雙方都公平的合約。
simple: The car drew up in front of the house.
simple_cn: 車子在房子前面停了下來。

example: Everyone dressed up for the fancy gala held in the city center.
example_cn: 每個人都盛裝打扮，參加在市區舉辦的豪華晚會。
simple: He dressed up as a pirate for the party.
simple_cn: 他打扮成海盜去參加派對。

example: Please feel free to drop by my office whenever you have any questions.
example_cn: 有任何問題的話，隨時歡迎來我辦公室坐坐。
simple: He dropped in for a quick visit.
simple_cn: 他順道過來坐了一下。

chinese: 放下 (人或物) / 打瞌睡 / 減少
example: Could you please drop me off at the train station on your way to work?
example_cn: 可以麻煩你在上班的路上順便載我去火車站嗎？
simple: I dropped off during the boring movie.
simple_cn: 那部電影太無聊，我睡著了。

example: He decided to drop out of university to start his own business.
example_cn: 他決定從大學休學，自己創業。
simple: She dropped out of the race.
simple_cn: 她退出了比賽。

example: We usually eat out on Friday nights instead of cooking at home.
example_cn: 我們通常週五晚上會外食，不在家煮飯。
simple: Let's eat out tonight.
simple_cn: 我們今晚出去吃吧。

example: Make sure you eat up all your vegetables before you have dessert.
example_cn: 記得把蔬菜全部吃完才能吃甜點喔。
simple: Legal fees ate up all his savings.
simple_cn: 律師費把他所有的積蓄都吃光了。

example: The intense match ended in a draw after ninety minutes of play.
example_cn: 這場激烈的比賽在九十分鐘後以平手收場。
simple: Their long argument ended in silence.
simple_cn: 他們吵了很久，最後沉默收場。

example: You must face up to the fact that you cannot solve this problem alone.
example_cn: 你必須正視自己無法獨自解決這個問題的事實。
pattern: S + must face up to + N
simple: He needs to face up to his responsibilities.
simple_cn: 他必須正視自己的責任。

chinese: 碎裂 / 崩潰 / 失敗
example: The old chair fell apart when I tried to move it to the other room.
example_cn: 那張舊椅子在我試著搬到另一個房間時解體了。
simple: Their marriage fell apart after only a year.
simple_cn: 他們的婚姻才維持一年就破裂了。

example: If his plan fails, he has no savings to fall back on.
example_cn: 如果他的計畫失敗了，他也沒有積蓄可以依靠。
pattern: S + have + N + to fall back on
simple: She can always fall back on her teaching skills.
simple_cn: 她總是可以靠她的教學技能來應急。

example: If you miss too many classes, you will fall behind the rest of the group.
example_cn: 如果你翹太多課，就會跟不上其他人的進度。
simple: He fell behind with his mortgage payments.
simple_cn: 他房貸繳款落後了。

example: He fell for the scam and lost a lot of money to the dishonest salesman.
example_cn: 他中了那個騙局，因為那個不老實的業務員損失了一大筆錢。
simple: I fell for that old trick again.
simple_cn: 我又中了那個老把戲。

example: Could you please fill in for me at the meeting while I see the doctor?
example_cn: 可以請你代替我去開會嗎？我要去看醫生。
pattern: S + fill in + N / S + fill in for + 人
simple: Fill in your details on the form.
simple_cn: 在表格上填寫你的資料。

chinese: 修理 / 整理 / 安排
example: We spent the whole summer fixing up the old house we bought last year.
example_cn: 我們整個夏天都在整修去年買的那間老房子。
simple: They fixed me up with a blind date.
simple_cn: 他們幫我安排了一場相親。

example: You should focus on your studies instead of playing video games all day.
example_cn: 你應該專心在課業上，而不是整天打電動。
simple: The discussion focused on economic reform.
simple_cn: 討論聚焦在經濟改革上。

example: If you want to get ahead in your career, you need to work hard and learn new skills.
example_cn: 想要在職場上出人頭地，就得努力工作和學習新技能。
simple: She worked long hours to get ahead.
simple_cn: 她長時間工作來力爭上游。

example: I get along with all my colleagues, which makes the workplace very pleasant.
example_cn: 我和所有同事都相處得很好，讓工作環境非常愉快。
simple: Do you get along with your sister?
simple_cn: 你跟你姊姊處得來嗎？

chinese: 四處走動 / (消息)傳開 / 避開 (問題)
example: Word gets around fast in a small town like this.
example_cn: 在像這樣的小鎮上，消息傳得很快。
pattern: S + get around / N + gets around
simple: He gets around on a bicycle.
simple_cn: 他靠腳踏車到處跑。

chinese: 意指 / 暗示 / 夠得著
example: What exactly are you getting at? I don't quite understand your point.
example_cn: 你到底想說什麼？我不太懂你的重點。
simple: The keys are kept where kids can't get at them.
simple_cn: 鑰匙放在小孩拿不到的地方。

example: The thief thought he could get away with the crime, but he was caught.
example_cn: 那個小偷以為自己能逍遙法外，但最後還是被抓到了。
simple: She thinks she can get away with cheating.
simple_cn: 她以為她作弊可以不被抓到。

example: Although his salary is low, he manages to get by through careful spending.
example_cn: 雖然他的薪水不高，但靠著精打細算還是能勉強過日子。
pattern: S + manage to get by (on + 金額)
simple: I can get by with my basic French.
simple_cn: 我靠基礎的法語還能勉強應付。

example: After a short break, we got down to business and finished the report.
example_cn: 休息一下之後，我們就開始認真工作，把報告完成了。
pattern: It's time to get down to + N
simple: Let's get down to the real issues.
simple_cn: 我們來切入正題吧。

chinese: 進入 / 染上 (習慣) / 對...感興趣
example: He got into a prestigious university thanks to his high test scores.
example_cn: 他因為考試成績很好，所以進了一所名校。
simple: She's recently got into yoga.
simple_cn: 她最近迷上了瑜伽。

chinese: 下車 / 擺脫 (責任) / 從...獲得
example: He tried to get out of doing his chores by pretending to be sick.
example_cn: 他假裝生病，想藉此逃避做家事。
simple: I got a lot out of that lesson.
simple_cn: 那堂課讓我收穫很多。

example: I really need to get rid of these old magazines to clear some space.
example_cn: 我真的需要把這些舊雜誌清掉，騰出一些空間。
simple: It's hard to get rid of a bad habit.
simple_cn: 壞習慣真的很難改掉。

example: Our family gets together every Chinese New Year to have dinner.
example_cn: 我們家每年過年都會聚在一起吃年夜飯。
simple: Let's get together for a drink.
simple_cn: 我們約出來喝一杯吧。

chinese: 聯絡上 / 讓某人理解
example: I tried to explain the problem, but I couldn't get through to him.
example_cn: 我試著解釋這個問題，但他就是聽不進去。
simple: I can't get through to the switchboard.
simple_cn: 我打不通總機。

example: The chemical reaction gave off a strange smell that filled the entire lab.
example_cn: 化學反應釋出一股怪味，整個實驗室都是。
simple: The flowers give off a sweet fragrance.
simple_cn: 這些花散發出甜甜的香味。

example: The property was given over to the local council after the owner passed away.
example_cn: 屋主過世後，那塊地就移交給了當地政府。
pattern: S + be given over to + N
simple: Give over! You're being silly.
simple_cn: 夠了喔！你這樣很蠢。

chinese: 著手處理 / 四處走動
example: How should we go about solving this complicated environmental issue?
example_cn: 我們該怎麼著手解決這個複雜的環境問題？
simple: He went about his daily routine as usual.
simple_cn: 他像往常一樣過著日常生活。

example: The police went after the suspect through the crowded streets.
example_cn: 警察在擁擠的街道上追捕那名嫌犯。
simple: Are you going after the manager's job?
simple_cn: 你想爭取經理的職位嗎？

example: The decision goes against everything we believe in as a company.
example_cn: 這個決定違背了我們公司一直以來的信念。
simple: The evidence went against him.
simple_cn: 證據對他不利。

chinese: 同意 / 贊成 / 隨行
example: I don't really agree with the plan, but I'll go along with it for now.
example_cn: 我其實不太認同這個計畫，但暫時先配合一下。
simple: She went along with the suggestion.
simple_cn: 她接受了那個建議。

chinese: 分給每個人 / (消息)傳開 / 繞行
example: There aren't enough chairs to go around, so some people have to stand.
example_cn: 椅子不夠坐，所以有些人得站著。
pattern: S + (not) have enough N to go around
simple: There's a lot of flu going around.
simple_cn: 最近流感很流行。

chinese: 經過 (時間) / 依照 (規定)
example: As time goes by, you will realize that experience is more important than grades.
example_cn: 隨著時間過去，你會發現經驗比成績更重要。
simple: You shouldn't go by appearances.
simple_cn: 你不該以貌取人。

chinese: 下降 / 被記下 / (船)沉沒
example: The price of oil is expected to go down next month due to increased supply.
example_cn: 由於供應增加，預計下個月油價會下跌。
simple: The ship went down in the Atlantic.
simple_cn: 那艘船在大西洋沉沒了。

chinese: 力求 / 喜歡 / 選取
example: If you really want that scholarship, you should go for it with all your heart.
example_cn: 如果你真的想要那筆獎學金，就應該全力以赴去爭取。
simple: I usually go for the chocolate ice cream.
simple_cn: 我通常會選巧克力冰淇淋。

chinese: 進入 (職業) / 詳述 / 碰撞
example: He decided to go into medicine because he wanted to help sick people.
example_cn: 他決定從醫，因為他想幫助生病的人。
pattern: S + go into + N (職業/細節)
simple: We don't need to go into details now.
simple_cn: 我們現在不需要討論細節。

chinese: 爆炸 / 響起 (警鈴) / (食物)變質 / 離開
example: My alarm clock went off at six o'clock, but I stayed in bed for another hour.
example_cn: 我的鬧鐘六點就響了，但我又賴床了一個小時。
simple: The milk has gone off.
simple_cn: 牛奶已經酸掉了。

example: Let's go over the main points of the presentation one last time.
example_cn: 我們最後再複習一次簡報的重點。
simple: Go over your work before you hand it in.
simple_cn: 交作業前先檢查一遍。

chinese: 經歷 / 檢查 / 耗盡 / 通過
example: We had to go through several security checks before entering the stadium.
example_cn: 我們進體育館前得通過好幾道安檢。
simple: She went through a lot of hardships.
simple_cn: 她經歷了許多艱難困苦。

example: The retailer decided to mark up the prices of imported goods due to the rising shipping costs.
example_cn: 零售商決定調高進口商品的價格，因為運費一直在漲。
simple: They marked up the tickets by 20 percent.
simple_cn: 他們把票價調漲了兩成。

example: The new employee is working hard, but his performance still doesn't measure up to our high standards.
example_cn: 那個新進員工很努力，但他的表現還是達不到我們的高標準。
simple: He felt he didn't measure up to his father.
simple_cn: 他覺得自己比不上他父親。

example: I always mix up the twins because they look and dress exactly the same.
example_cn: 我老是搞混那對雙胞胎，因為他們長相跟穿著都一模一樣。
pattern: S + mix up + A and B
simple: Don't mix up these files.
simple_cn: 不要把這些檔案搞混了。

chinese: 繼續前進 / 換話題 / 接受新生活
example: After the long debate, the chairman suggested we move on to the next item on the agenda.
example_cn: 經過長時間的辯論，主席建議我們繼續進行議程上的下一項。
simple: She decided to move on after the breakup.
simple_cn: 分手後她決定繼續往前走。

example: The committee has narrowed down the list of candidates to the final three.
example_cn: 委員會已經把候選人名單縮小到最後三位。
pattern: S + narrow down + N + to + N
simple: We need to narrow down our options.
simple_cn: 我們需要縮小選擇範圍。

example: Many local residents object to the plan to build a shopping mall near the nature reserve.
example_cn: 許多當地居民反對在自然保護區附近蓋購物中心的計畫。
simple: I object to being treated like a child.
simple_cn: 我反對被當成小孩對待。

chinese: 被想到 / 浮現在腦海
example: It didn't occur to me that I had left my keys in the office until I reached home.
example_cn: 我直到回到家才想起來，我把鑰匙忘在辦公室了。
simple: An idea suddenly occurred to him.
simple_cn: 他突然想到一個點子。

example: The new railway line will open up the remote region to tourism and trade.
example_cn: 新的鐵路線將會開發那個偏遠地區的觀光與貿易。
simple: She finally opened up about her problems.
simple_cn: 她終於願意敞開心房談她的問題。

example: Most students opt for science subjects because they believe it's easier to find a job later.
example_cn: 大多數學生選擇理科，因為他們覺得以後比較好找工作。
simple: We opted for a small, quiet hotel.
simple_cn: 我們選了一間安靜的小旅館。

example: Nobody likes working with him because he tries to order everyone around like a boss.
example_cn: 沒有人喜歡跟他共事，因為他老愛像老闆一樣指揮大家。
simple: Stop ordering me around!
simple_cn: 別再對我發號施令了！

example: I owe my success to the continuous support and encouragement from my parents.
example_cn: 我的成功要歸功於父母持續的支持與鼓勵。
pattern: S + owe + N + to + 人/物
simple: He owes ten dollars to me.
simple_cn: 他欠我十塊錢。

example: The teacher asked who broke the window, but nobody was brave enough to own up.
example_cn: 老師問是誰打破窗戶的，但沒有人有勇氣承認。
simple: He owned up to the mistake.
simple_cn: 他坦承了那個錯誤。

example: At the end of the camping trip, we spent the whole morning packing up our tents.
example_cn: 露營活動結束時，我們花了整個早上收拾帳篷。
simple: It's five o'clock; let's pack up.
simple_cn: 五點了，我們收工吧。

example: The collector was very reluctant to part with his rare first-edition book.
example_cn: 那位收藏家非常捨不得割愛他那本稀有的初版書。
pattern: S + be reluctant to part with + N
simple: I cannot part with this old watch.
simple_cn: 我捨不得丟掉這隻舊手錶。

example: I passed by your house this morning, but I didn't see your car in the driveway.
example_cn: 我今天早上經過你家，但沒看到車道上停著你的車。
simple: Time passes by so quickly.
simple_cn: 時間過得好快。

chinese: 傳遞 / 轉交 / 去世
example: Could you please pass on this message to Mr. Wang as soon as he returns?
example_cn: 可以請你等王先生一回來就把這個訊息轉告給他嗎？
simple: He passed on last night.
simple_cn: 他昨晚過世了。

example: He was very disappointed when he was passed over for the promotion for the third time.
example_cn: 他第三次被跳過升遷機會時，感到非常失望。
simple: Let's pass over the details for now.
simple_cn: 細節我們先略過不談。

example: He had to pay for the broken window out of his own pocket.
example_cn: 他得自己掏腰包賠那扇破掉的窗戶。
simple: You will pay for your rudeness!
simple_cn: 你會為你的無禮付出代價！

example: After losing the bet, he finally paid up the fifty dollars he owed me.
example_cn: 打賭輸了之後，他終於乖乖付清欠我的五十美元。
simple: They threatened him until he paid up.
simple_cn: 他們一直威脅他，直到他把錢付清。

example: The older boys used to pick on him because he was smaller and quieter than them.
example_cn: 那些年紀較大的男生以前常欺負他，因為他比他們矮小又安靜。
simple: Why are you picking on me?
simple_cn: 你為什麼老是找我麻煩？

example: We are planning on visiting our grandparents in the countryside during the summer holiday.
example_cn: 我們打算暑假去鄉下探望祖父母。
simple: I hadn't planned on being late.
simple_cn: 我本來沒打算要遲到的。

example: I knew he was lying, but I decided to play along to see what he would say next.
example_cn: 我知道他在說謊，但我決定配合他，看他接下來會說什麼。
simple: He played along with the joke.
simple_cn: 他配合著那個玩笑演下去。

example: Stop playing around and finish your homework before your father gets home.
example_cn: 別再鬼混了，在你爸回家之前把功課寫完。
simple: The kids are playing around in the garden.
simple_cn: 小孩子們在花園裡跑來跑去玩耍。

example: The detective played back the recorded conversation to listen for any clues.
example_cn: 偵探重播了錄音對話，仔細聽有沒有任何線索。
simple: Can you play back the last part?
simple_cn: 你可以把最後一段重播一下嗎？

chinese: 淡化 / 貶低其重要性
example: The politician tried to play down the significance of the economic crisis.
example_cn: 那位政治人物試圖淡化經濟危機的嚴重性。
simple: She played down her role in the project.
simple_cn: 她淡化了自己在專案中的角色。

example: It is considered rude in some cultures to point at people with your finger.
example_cn: 在某些文化裡，用手指指人會被視為不禮貌。
simple: The child pointed at the colorful bird.
simple_cn: 那個小孩指著那隻色彩鮮豔的鳥。

example: The company decided to pour more resources into its research and development department.
example_cn: 公司決定投入更多資源到研發部門。
simple: Thousands of fans poured into the stadium.
simple_cn: 好幾千名粉絲湧進了體育場。

example: The students are working very hard to prepare for the upcoming national entrance exam.
example_cn: 學生們正非常努力準備即將到來的全國升學考試。
simple: We need to prepare for the worst.
simple_cn: 我們得做好最壞的打算。

example: The chairman will preside over the annual meeting and announce the new board members.
example_cn: 主席將主持年度會議，並宣布新任董事會成員。
simple: A judge presides over the trial.
simple_cn: 審判由法官主持。

example: The workers' union continues to press for higher wages and better working conditions.
example_cn: 工會持續爭取更高的薪資與更好的工作條件。
simple: Journalists pressed for an explanation.
simple_cn: 記者們追著要求解釋。

example: The new laws are designed to prevent companies from polluting the local rivers.
example_cn: 新法規旨在防止企業污染當地河川。
simple: Nothing can prevent him from going.
simple_cn: 沒什麼能阻止他離開。

example: The small restaurant prides itself on using only fresh, locally grown ingredients.
example_cn: 這家小餐館以只使用新鮮、在地食材為傲。
simple: She prides herself on her cooking.
simple_cn: 她對自己的廚藝感到很自豪。

example: Could you please print out a copy of the report for each meeting participant?
example_cn: 可以請你幫每位與會者印一份報告嗎？
simple: I'll print out the boarding pass.
simple_cn: 我會把登機證印出來。

example: The old library was pulled down to make way for a modern community center.
example_cn: 舊圖書館被拆除，以便興建一座現代化的社區中心。
simple: They are pulling down those old slums.
simple_cn: 他們正在拆除那些老舊的貧民窟。

chinese: 吸引 / 停靠 / 賺取
example: The popular music festival managed to pull in a crowd of over fifty thousand fans.
example_cn: 這場熱門音樂節成功吸引了超過五萬名粉絲到場。
simple: The train pulled in on time.
simple_cn: 火車準時進站了。

chinese: 成功完成 (難事) / 脫下
example: Nobody thought he could win the election, but he managed to pull off a surprise victory.
example_cn: 沒人認為他會贏得選舉，但他卻出人意料地取得了勝利。
simple: It was a tough task, but she pulled it off.
simple_cn: 那是個艱難的任務，但她還是成功了。

chinese: 撤出 / 拔出 / 駛出
example: The soldiers began to pull out of the region after the peace agreement was signed.
example_cn: 和平協議簽署後，士兵們開始撤出該地區。
simple: The car pulled out into traffic.
simple_cn: 那輛車開出來匯入車流。

example: The police officer signaled the speeding driver to pull over to the side of the road.
example_cn: 警察示意超速的駕駛靠路邊停車。
simple: We pulled over to check the map.
simple_cn: 我們靠邊停車查看地圖。

example: The doctors weren't sure if he would survive, but he eventually managed to pull through.
example_cn: 醫生原本不確定他能否存活，但他最後還是撐過來了。
simple: It's a tough crisis, but we'll pull through.
simple_cn: 這是場嚴峻的危機，但我們會撐過去的。

chinese: 齊心協力 / 控制情緒
example: If we all pull together, we can finish the project before the deadline.
example_cn: 如果我們大家齊心協力，就能在截止日前完成這個專案。
simple: We need to pull together as a team.
simple_cn: 我們需要團結一致，像個團隊一樣合作。

example: Environmental groups are pushing for stricter regulations on carbon emissions.
example_cn: 環保團體正在推動更嚴格的碳排放法規。
simple: The manager is pushing for a decision.
simple_cn: 經理正在催大家做決定。

chinese: 表達清楚 / 解釋明白
example: He is a very effective speaker and knows how to put his ideas across clearly.
example_cn: 他是一位非常會說話的人，知道如何清楚表達自己的想法。
simple: I failed to put the message across.
simple_cn: 我沒能把這個訊息傳達清楚。

example: He tries to put aside a portion of his salary every month for his future house.
example_cn: 他每個月都會試著把一部分薪水存起來，為了將來買房子。
simple: Let's put aside our differences and work together.
simple_cn: 我們先把歧見放一邊，一起合作吧。

example: Please put the dictionary back on the shelf once you have finished using it.
example_cn: 用完字典後，請把它放回書架上。
simple: The meeting has been put back until Monday.
simple_cn: 會議已經延到下星期一。

chinese: 放下 / 寫下 / 鎮壓 / 安樂死
example: The soldiers were sent to the capital to put down the violent rebellion.
example_cn: 士兵們被派往首都鎮壓那場激烈的叛亂。
simple: He put down his thoughts in a notebook.
simple_cn: 他把自己的想法寫在筆記本裡。

example: The committee has put forward several new proposals to improve the city's traffic.
example_cn: 委員會已經提出幾項新方案，來改善城市的交通狀況。
simple: A new theory was put forward by the scientist.
simple_cn: 那位科學家提出了一個新理論。

chinese: 投入 (時間/努力) / 安裝 / 申請
example: He has put in a lot of hard work over the last year and deserves a promotion.
example_cn: 他過去一年非常努力，值得獲得升遷。
simple: We had a new kitchen put in.
simple_cn: 我們請人裝了一套新廚房。

example: Could you please put me through to the marketing department? I have a question about the ad.
example_cn: 可以幫我轉接行銷部門嗎？我有個關於廣告的問題想問。
pattern: S + put + 人 + through to + 人
simple: She put her children through university.
simple_cn: 她供孩子讀完大學。

chinese: 組裝 / 召集 / 整理
example: It took the team two days to put together the final presentation for the client.
example_cn: 團隊花了兩天時間，才把給客戶的最終簡報整理好。
simple: I can't put this puzzle together.
simple_cn: 我拼不好這個拼圖。

chinese: 將 (金錢) 用於支付部分費用
example: He decided to save his Christmas bonus and put it toward a new laptop.
example_cn: 他決定把聖誕獎金存下來，用來買一台新筆電。
simple: I'll put the money toward my car loan.
simple_cn: 我會把這筆錢拿去繳車貸。

example: Scientists are still puzzling over the cause of the mysterious phenomenon in the ocean.
example_cn: 科學家們仍在苦思，海洋中那個神秘現象的成因。
simple: I puzzled over the map for hours.
simple_cn: 我對著那張地圖研究了幾個小時。

chinese: 有資格參加 / 符合條件
example: You need to have at least three years of work experience to qualify for this scholarship.
example_cn: 你至少需要三年工作經驗，才有資格申請這份獎學金。
simple: She didn't qualify for the final race.
simple_cn: 她沒有晉級到決賽。

example: It's a waste of time to quarrel with people who are not willing to listen to logic.
example_cn: 跟不願意聽道理的人吵架，只是在浪費時間。
simple: Don't quarrel with your siblings.
simple_cn: 不要跟你的兄弟姊妹吵架。

example: Hundreds of fans queued up for hours to buy tickets for the famous singer's concert.
example_cn: 數百名粉絲排了好幾個小時的隊，只為了買那位知名歌手的演唱會門票。
simple: People queued up to get into the store.
simple_cn: 大家排隊等著進那家店。

example: The teacher asked the excited children to quiet down so she could start the story.
example_cn: 老師要興奮的孩子們安靜下來，這樣她才能開始講故事。
simple: Wait for the crowd to quiet down.
simple_cn: 等群眾安靜下來。

example: The rescue team is racing against time to find the survivors after the earthquake.
example_cn: 救援隊正在跟時間賽跑，尋找地震後的生還者。
simple: He will race against the champion.
simple_cn: 他將要跟冠軍比賽。

example: The police officer radioed in the suspect's license plate number to headquarters.
example_cn: 警察用無線電把嫌疑人的車牌號碼回報給總部。
simple: The pilot radioed in a Mayday signal.
simple_cn: 飛行員用無線電發出了求救信號。

chinese: 憤怒指責 / 強烈抨擊
example: The activists railed against the government's decision to cut funding for education.
example_cn: 活動人士強烈抨擊政府削減教育經費的決定。
simple: He railed against the unfair treatment.
simple_cn: 他大聲抗議受到的不公平待遇。

example: Ash and smoke rained down on the city after the massive volcanic eruption.
example_cn: 大規模火山爆發後，灰燼和煙塵像雨一樣落在城市裡。
simple: Gifts rained down from the sky.
simple_cn: 禮物像雨一樣從天而降。

chinese: 團結在...周圍 / 齊心支持
example: The local community rallied around the family after they lost their home in a fire.
example_cn: 當地社區在那一家人因火災失去家園後，紛紛伸出援手支持他們。
simple: The team rallied around their injured captain.
simple_cn: 整個球隊團結起來支持他們受傷的隊長。

example: The prices of the rooms in this hotel range from fifty to two hundred dollars per night.
example_cn: 這間飯店的房間價格每晚從五十到兩百美元不等。
pattern: N + range from A to B
simple: Temperatures range from 10 to 30 degrees.
simple_cn: 溫度大概在十到三十度之間。

example: This scientist ranks among the most influential researchers in the field of biology.
example_cn: 這位科學家在生物學領域中，排名屬於最具影響力的研究人員之一。
simple: He ranks among the greatest writers.
simple_cn: 他算是數一數二的偉大作家。

example: Most critics rate this movie as one of the best films of the decade.
example_cn: 大多數影評人都把這部電影評為十年來最好的作品之一。
simple: The hotel is rated as five-star.
simple_cn: 這間飯店被評為五星級。

example: During the long drought, the government had to ration out the water supply to the citizens.
example_cn: 在長期乾旱期間，政府不得不對市民限量配給用水。
simple: The food was rationed out among the soldiers.
simple_cn: 食物平均分配給士兵們。

example: Feel free to reach out to me if you have any questions about the project.
example_cn: 如果你對這個專案有任何問題，歡迎隨時聯絡我。
simple: The charity reaches out to homeless people.
simple_cn: 這個慈善機構會幫助街友。

example: I read about the new archaeological discovery in the science magazine yesterday.
example_cn: 我昨天在科學雜誌上讀到關於那項新考古發現的報導。
simple: I read about the accident in the news.
simple_cn: 我是在新聞上看到這起事故的。

example: The teacher read off the names of the winners to the entire class.
example_cn: 老師對全班唸出了得獎者的名單。
simple: He read off the numbers one by one.
simple_cn: 他一個一個把號碼念出來。

chinese: 細讀 / 從頭到尾看一遍
example: You should read over your essay at least once to check for spelling errors.
example_cn: 你應該至少把你的文章讀過一遍，檢查有沒有拼寫錯誤。
simple: I need to read over the contract before signing.
simple_cn: 簽約前我需要把合約仔細看過一遍。

chinese: 研讀資料 / 收集資訊
example: I need to read up on the history of Japan before I travel there next month.
example_cn: 我下個月去日本之前，需要好好研讀一下日本的歷史。
simple: She spent the night reading up on the topic.
simple_cn: 她花了一整個晚上研究這個主題。

example: It's hard to reason with someone who is currently in a very angry state.
example_cn: 跟一個正在氣頭上的人講道理是很難的。
pattern: S + try to reason with + 人
simple: They tried to reason with the protesters.
simple_cn: 他們試著跟抗議者講道理。

example: The teenagers began to rebel against the strict rules of their boarding school.
example_cn: 這些青少年開始反抗他們寄宿學校的嚴格規定。
simple: He rebelled against his parents' expectations.
simple_cn: 他反抗父母對他的期望。

chinese: 處理 / 考慮 / 面對
example: If we ignore this problem now, we will have to reckon with it later.
example_cn: 如果我們現在忽略這個問題，以後就得面對它。
pattern: S + have to reckon with + N
simple: The company is a force to be reckoned with.
simple_cn: 這家公司是個不容小覷的勢力。

example: After months of not speaking, she finally decided to reconcile with her sister.
example_cn: 在好幾個月不說話之後，她終於決定跟姐姐和好。
simple: It's hard to reconcile his words with his actions.
simple_cn: 他的言行很難對得上。

example: It took the economy several years to fully recover from the impact of the pandemic.
example_cn: 經濟花了幾年的時間才從疫情的衝擊中完全復甦。
simple: He is still recovering from the surgery.
simple_cn: 他還在從手術中恢復。

example: You should refer to the instruction manual if you are not sure how to use the machine.
example_cn: 如果你不確定怎麼使用這台機器，應該參考使用說明書。
simple: The teacher referred to the graph on the board.
simple_cn: 老師參考了黑板上的圖表。

example: At the end of the year, it is helpful to reflect on what you have achieved and what you can improve.
example_cn: 在年底的時候，回顧自己達成了什麼、還有哪些可以改進，是很有幫助的。
simple: He reflected on his past mistakes.
simple_cn: 他反思自己過去的錯誤。

example: Please refrain from smoking in the hospital building for the comfort of other patients.
example_cn: 為了其他病人的舒適，請不要在醫院大樓內吸菸。
simple: They refrained from making comments.
simple_cn: 他們忍住沒有發表意見。

example: Many teenagers find it difficult to relate to their parents because of the generation gap.
example_cn: 很多青少年因為代溝，覺得很難跟父母溝通。
simple: The study relates to student behavior.
simple_cn: 這項研究跟學生的行為有關。

chinese: 對...放鬆心情 / 不必擔心
example: You should try to relax about the upcoming exam; you've already studied very hard.
example_cn: 你應該試著對即將到來的考試放輕鬆一點，你已經很努力讀書了。
simple: She's much more relaxed about her work now.
simple_cn: 她現在對工作放鬆很多了。

example: The athlete was released from his contract after a series of poor performances.
example_cn: 那位運動員在連續幾次表現不佳之後，被解除了合約。
simple: He was released from hospital this morning.
simple_cn: 他今天早上出院了。

example: Several guests remarked on the beautiful decorations at the wedding reception.
example_cn: 好幾位賓客都說婚宴上的裝飾很漂亮。
simple: Critics remarked on the actor's performance.
simple_cn: 影評人對那位演員的表現發表了看法。

example: Please remember to lock the door and turn off the lights before you leave.
example_cn: 離開前請記得鎖門跟關燈。
simple: I must remember to buy some milk.
simple_cn: 我得記得買些牛奶。

example: This old song always reminds me of the happy summers I spent at the beach.
example_cn: 這首老歌總讓我想起在海邊度過的那些快樂夏天。
simple: You remind me of your father.
simple_cn: 你讓我想起你爸。

example: You should remove the old batteries from the flashlight to prevent leakage.
example_cn: 你應該把手電筒裡的舊電池拿出來，以免漏液。
simple: He was removed from his post.
simple_cn: 他被免職了。

example: They decided to rent out their spare room to a university student for extra income.
example_cn: 他們決定把空房間租給一個大學生，賺點額外收入。
simple: Are you going to rent out the house?
simple_cn: 你打算把房子租出去嗎？

example: After the long meeting, the board members repaired to a local restaurant for dinner.
example_cn: 冗長的會議結束後，董事們轉移到附近一家餐廳吃晚餐。
simple: The guests repaired to the garden.
simple_cn: 客人們轉移到花園去了。

example: The English teacher asked the students to repeat each sentence after her.
example_cn: 英文老師要學生跟著她重複唸每個句子。
simple: Repeat after me: 'Hello'.
simple_cn: 跟我唸一遍：「哈囉」。

example: We need to replace the old wooden windows with modern aluminum ones.
example_cn: 我們需要把舊的木頭窗戶換成現代的鋁窗。
simple: The factory replaced workers with robots.
simple_cn: 工廠用機器人取代了工人。

example: I haven't had time to reply to your email yet, but I will do it tonight.
example_cn: 我還沒時間回你的電子郵件，不過今晚會處理。
simple: Did she reply to your letter?
simple_cn: 她回你的信了嗎？

example: New employees should report to the human resources office on their first day.
example_cn: 新進員工第一天要到人事室報到。
simple: You will report directly to the manager.
simple_cn: 你直接向經理報告。

example: The union represented its concerns to the management regarding safety issues.
example_cn: 工會向管理階層表達了他們對安全問題的關切。
simple: He represented the facts to the committee.
simple_cn: 他向委員會陳述了事實。

example: You can request an application form from the information desk in the lobby.
example_cn: 你可以到大廳的服務台索取申請表。
pattern: S + request + N + from + 人/單位
simple: They requested assistance from the police.
simple_cn: 他們向警方請求協助。

example: High concentration is required of students when they are performing experiments.
example_cn: 學生在做實驗時需要高度專注。
simple: This job requires a lot of patience of you.
simple_cn: 這份工作需要你很有耐心。

example: The firefighters managed to rescue the cat from the burning building.
example_cn: 消防隊員成功從失火的大樓裡救出那隻貓。
pattern: S + rescue + 人/物 + from + 來源
simple: The crew was rescued from the sinking ship.
simple_cn: 船員們從沉船中被救了出來。

type: 動詞 / 名詞 + 介系詞
example: The university is conducting detailed research into the causes of climate change.
example_cn: 這所大學正在針對氣候變遷的原因進行詳細研究。
simple: She is researching into cancer treatments.
simple_cn: 她正在研究癌症治療方法。

example: He finally resigned himself to the fact that he wouldn't get the promotion this time.
example_cn: 他終於接受了這次不會升遷的事實。
simple: She resigned herself to a quiet life.
simple_cn: 她認命過著平靜的生活。

example: The blurry image slowly resolved into the shape of a person as we got closer.
example_cn: 我們走近後，那模糊的影像慢慢變成一個人的形狀。
simple: The argument resolved into a friendly discussion.
simple_cn: 爭論最後變成了一場友好的討論。

chinese: 訴諸於 / 採取 (最後手段)
example: He had to resort to borrowing money from his parents to pay off his debts.
example_cn: 他最後只好向爸媽借錢來還債。
simple: They resorted to violence to get what they wanted.
simple_cn: 他們訴諸暴力來得到想要的東西。

example: The patient is responding well to the new medical treatment.
example_cn: 病人對新的治療方式反應良好。
simple: How did he respond to your suggestion?
simple_cn: 他對你的建議有什麼反應？

chinese: 依賴 / 基於 / 停留在
example: The future of the company rests on the success of this innovative new product.
example_cn: 這家公司的未來取決於這項創新新產品的成功。
simple: All our hopes rest on you.
simple_cn: 我們所有的希望都寄託在你身上。

example: My father is planning to retire from his job as a high school teacher next year.
example_cn: 我爸打算明年從高中老師的職位退休。
simple: She retired from professional tennis.
simple_cn: 她從職業網壇退休了。

example: The stray cat eventually returned to the garden where it was first found.
example_cn: 那隻流浪貓最後還是回到了當初被發現的那個花園。
simple: Life returned to normal after the war.
simple_cn: 戰後生活恢復正常。

example: He finally revealed his true intentions to the rest of the team.
example_cn: 他終於對團隊其他人說出了自己的真實意圖。
simple: The secret was revealed to the public.
simple_cn: 這個秘密被公開了。

example: The driver carefully reversed his car into the narrow parking space.
example_cn: 司機小心地把車倒進那個狹窄的停車位。
pattern: S + reverse + N + into + 地方
simple: He reversed into the garage.
simple_cn: 他倒車進車庫。

example: After the short holiday, everything in the office reverted to its normal routine.
example_cn: 短暫假期結束後，辦公室的一切又恢復了平常的運作模式。
simple: The land reverted to the original owner.
simple_cn: 那塊地又回到原主人手上。

chinese: 圍繞著...旋轉 / 以...為中心
example: In the past, many people believed that the sun revolved around the Earth.
example_cn: 以前很多人相信太陽是繞著地球轉的。
simple: His life revolves around his children.
simple_cn: 他的人生繞著孩子轉。

type: 動詞 / 名詞 + 介系詞
example: The company rewarded the employees for their hard work with a generous bonus.
example_cn: 公司發了一筆豐厚的獎金來獎勵員工的辛勞。
simple: There is a reward for information about the missing dog.
simple_cn: 提供失蹤狗狗線索有獎金。

example: We finally managed to get rid of the old furniture that was taking up too much space.
example_cn: 我們總算把那批佔太多空間的舊家具處理掉了。
simple: How can I get rid of these ants?
simple_cn: 我要怎麼把這些螞蟻弄掉？

example: The success of the entire project rides on the outcome of tomorrow's meeting.
example_cn: 整個專案的成功與否，全看明天會議的結果。
simple: Much rides on your decision.
simple_cn: 你的決定影響很大。

example: I'm busy right now; can I ring you back in ten minutes?
example_cn: 我現在在忙，可以十分鐘後再回電給你嗎？
simple: He said he would ring back later.
simple_cn: 他說他晚點會回電。

example: She suddenly rang off before I could finish my sentence.
example_cn: 我話還沒說完，她就突然掛斷了電話。
simple: I have to ring off now, someone is at the door.
simple_cn: 我得掛電話了，有人在敲門。

example: The cashier rang up the items and told me the total cost.
example_cn: 收銀員把商品刷條碼結帳，然後告訴我總共多少錢。
simple: Ring me up when you get there.
simple_cn: 你到了打給我。

example: Please rinse off the soap from your hands thoroughly before drying them.
example_cn: 請徹底沖掉手上的肥皂，再把手擦乾。
simple: He rinsed the mud off his boots.
simple_cn: 他把靴子上的泥沖掉。

chinese: 洗乾淨 (容器內部) / 漂洗
example: After drinking the juice, make sure to rinse out the glass.
example_cn: 喝完果汁後，記得把杯子沖洗乾淨。
simple: Rinse out your mouth with water.
simple_cn: 用水漱漱口。

chinese: 敲竹槓 / 偷竊 / 撕掉
example: That tourist shop is known to rip off unsuspecting foreigners by overcharging them.
example_cn: 那間觀光客商店以對不熟當地行情的外國人亂收費聞名。
simple: I was ripped off by the taxi driver.
simple_cn: 我被計程車司機坑了。

example: He was so angry that he ripped up the letter without even reading it.
example_cn: 他氣到連信都沒看就直接把它撕碎了。
simple: They ripped up the old contract.
simple_cn: 他們把舊合約撕毀了。

chinese: 克服 / 超越 / 不受...影響
example: A true leader should be able to rise above personal conflicts for the good of the team.
example_cn: 真正的領導者應該能為了團隊利益，超越個人之間的衝突。
simple: She rose above her humble beginnings.
simple_cn: 她克服了出身低微的困境。

example: The people decided to rise up against the oppressive dictator.
example_cn: 人民決定起身反抗那個壓迫人民的獨裁者。
simple: The whole town rose up in protest.
simple_cn: 整個小鎮都起來抗議。

type: 動詞 / 名詞 + 介系詞
example: He was willing to risk his life for the safety of his family.
example_cn: 他願意為了家人的安全冒生命危險。
simple: I wouldn't risk my reputation for that.
simple_cn: 我不會為了那個冒險賠上名聲。

example: The sudden illness robbed her of the chance to compete in the Olympics.
example_cn: 那場突如其來的疾病奪走了她參加奧運的機會。
simple: The thief robbed him of his wallet.
simple_cn: 小偷偷走了他的皮夾。

example: By the time the weekend rolls around, I am usually exhausted from work.
example_cn: 每到週末來臨的時候，我通常都已經工作到筋疲力盡了。
simple: Monday rolled around again too quickly.
simple_cn: 星期一又咻一下就來了。

example: The government decided to roll back some of the recent tax increases.
example_cn: 政府決定撤回部分近期的增稅措施。
simple: They want to roll back environmental regulations.
simple_cn: 他們想要撤回環保法規。

chinese: 滾滾而來 / 大量湧入
example: Donations began to roll in after the news reported the disaster.
example_cn: 新聞報導災難之後，捐款開始湧入。
simple: The money is really rolling in now.
simple_cn: 現在錢真的滾滾而來。

example: The software company is planning to roll out the new version next month.
example_cn: 這家軟體公司計劃在下個月推出新版本。
simple: The government rolled out the vaccination program.
simple_cn: 政府推出了疫苗接種計畫。

chinese: 翻身 / 延期 (貸款/點數)
example: I was so tired that I just rolled over and went back to sleep when the alarm rang.
example_cn: 我累到鬧鐘響的時候，只是翻個身又繼續睡回去。
simple: The unused minutes roll over to the next month.
simple_cn: 沒用完的通話分鐘數會累積到下個月。

example: Even though I'm not a big sports fan, I always root for our national team.
example_cn: 雖然我不是個超級運動迷，但我總是為我們的國家隊加油。
simple: Who are you rooting for in the final?
simple_cn: 你在總決賽中支持誰？

example: The management is determined to root out corruption within the company.
example_cn: 管理層決心要根除公司內部的貪腐問題。
simple: We must root out the cause of the problem.
simple_cn: 我們必須找出問題的根源。

example: I managed to rope in a few friends to help me move house during the weekend.
example_cn: 我成功拉攏了幾個朋友在週末幫我搬家。
simple: He roped me into helping with the project.
simple_cn: 他把我拉去幫忙那個專案。

example: The abandoned wooden boat was left to rot away on the deserted beach.
example_cn: 那艘廢棄的木船就這麼在荒涼的海灘上慢慢腐朽。
simple: The leaves were left to rot away.
simple_cn: 那些葉子就放著爛掉了。

example: I'll rough out a basic plan now and we can discuss the details later.
example_cn: 我先擬出一個基本計畫，細節我們之後再討論。
simple: The architect roughed out the design on a napkin.
simple_cn: 建築師在餐巾紙上畫出了設計草圖。

example: The gang tried to rough up the store owner to get him to pay protection money.
example_cn: 那幫混混試圖對店家動粗，逼他繳保護費。
simple: He got roughed up in a street fight.
simple_cn: 他在街頭鬥毆中被打得很慘。

chinese: 圓滿結束 / 四捨五入
example: We decided to round off the evening with a delicious dessert at a local cafe.
example_cn: 我們決定在當地咖啡館吃個美味的甜點來為今晚畫下句點。
pattern: S + round off + N + with + N
simple: Please round off the number to the nearest decimal.
simple_cn: 請把這個數字四捨五入到小數點後一位。

chinese: 圍捕 / 召集 / 四捨五入 (進位)
example: The police managed to round up all the suspects within forty-eight hours.
example_cn: 警方在四十八小時內就把所有嫌犯都逮捕歸案了。
simple: The cowboys rounded up the cattle.
simple_cn: 牛仔們把牛群趕攏在一起。

chinese: 塗抹 / 觸及痛處 (反覆強調錯誤)
example: I know I made a mistake, so please don't rub it in!
example_cn: 我知道我犯了錯，所以請不要再一直提這件事了！
simple: He kept rubbing in the fact that he won.
simple_cn: 他一直強調他贏了這件事。

example: You can rub out any pencil marks with a good eraser.
example_cn: 用一塊好橡皮擦就能擦掉任何鉛筆痕跡。
simple: The name had been rubbed out.
simple_cn: 那個名字已經被擦掉了。

example: The police have ruled out foul play in the investigation of the sudden death.
example_cn: 警方在調查這起猝死案件時，已經排除了他殺的可能性。
simple: Don't rule out the possibility of a mistake.
simple_cn: 別排除犯錯的可能性。

chinese: 偶然遇見 / 跑著穿過
example: I ran across an old friend from university while I was traveling in London.
example_cn: 我在倫敦旅行的時候，偶然遇到了一位大學老友。
simple: The boy ran across the street.
simple_cn: 那個男孩跑過馬路。

example: The small dog was running after the squirrel in the backyard.
example_cn: 那隻小狗在後院追著松鼠跑。
simple: He had to run after the bus.
simple_cn: 他得去追公車。

example: She is planning to run against the current mayor in the upcoming election.
example_cn: 她計劃在即將到來的選舉中與現任市長競爭。
simple: Luck was running against him.
simple_cn: 運氣一直站在他的對立面。

example: Run along now, kids; your parents are waiting for you in the car.
example_cn: 孩子們，快走吧；你們爸媽在車上等你們了。
simple: I must be running along now.
simple_cn: 我現在得走了。

example: The kitten was so frightened by the loud noise that it ran away and hid under the bed.
example_cn: 那隻小貓被巨大的聲響嚇到，跑走躲到床底下去了。
simple: Don't run away from your problems.
simple_cn: 不要逃避你的問題。

chinese: 撞倒 / 耗盡 (電力) / 貶低 / 搜索
example: The battery in my laptop is running down; I need to find a charger.
example_cn: 我筆電的電池快沒電了，我得找個充電器。
simple: He's always running his boss down.
simple_cn: 他老是說老闆的壞話。

example: Many citizens are encouraging him to run for president in the next election.
example_cn: 很多市民都在鼓勵他參選下一屆總統。
simple: Run for your lives!
simple_cn: 快逃命啊！

chinese: 順路進入 / 逮捕 / 磨合 (引擎)
example: I need to run in to the grocery store for a few minutes to buy some milk.
example_cn: 我得順路去雜貨店一下，買點牛奶。
pattern: S + run in to + 地方
simple: You should run in the new engine carefully.
simple_cn: 新引擎要小心磨合。

chinese: 跑掉 / 複印 / 流走
example: Could you please run off twenty copies of this handout for the class?
example_cn: 可以麻煩你幫我把這份講義印二十份給班上嗎？
simple: The thief ran off when he saw the police.
simple_cn: 小偷一看到警察就跑了。

chinese: 以...為動力 / 繼續下去
example: This new type of car runs on electricity instead of gasoline.
example_cn: 這種新型汽車是用電力驅動，而不是汽油。
simple: The meeting ran on for three hours.
simple_cn: 會議拖了三個小時。

chinese: 撞到並碾過 / 超出 (時間) / 溢出
example: I'm sorry I'm late; the previous meeting ran over by fifteen minutes.
example_cn: 抱歉我遲到了，前一場會議拖了十五分鐘才結束。
pattern: S + run over + N / S + run over
simple: The bus ran over a bicycle.
simple_cn: 公車輾過一輛腳踏車。

chinese: 快速過一遍 / 貫穿 / 耗盡
example: Let's run through the main points of the presentation one more time before the meeting.
example_cn: 我們在開會前再把簡報的重點快速跑一遍吧。
simple: A sense of fear ran through the crowd.
simple_cn: 一股恐懼感在人群中蔓延。

chinese: 積欠 (債務) / 迅速跑向
example: He ran up a huge credit card debt while he was traveling around the world.
example_cn: 他在環遊世界時，累積了一大筆信用卡債務。
pattern: S + run up + N (債務/帳單)
simple: The child ran up to her mother.
simple_cn: 小孩跑到媽媽身邊。

example: You shouldn't rush into a major decision without thinking about it carefully first.
example_cn: 你不該沒仔細思考就倉促做出重大決定。
simple: They rushed into marriage after only a month.
simple_cn: 他們才認識一個月就匆匆結婚了。

chinese: 草率完成 / 快速通過
example: Don't rush through your homework; it's important to do it correctly and neatly.
example_cn: 寫作業不要趕，做得正確又整齊才重要。
simple: The bill was rushed through parliament.
simple_cn: 法案在國會被火速通過。

example: We need to install security software to safeguard against hackers and viruses.
example_cn: 我們需要安裝安全軟體來防範駭客和病毒。
simple: The policy safeguards against future losses.
simple_cn: 這項政策能防範未來的損失。

chinese: 輕快地通過 / 順利完成
example: She had studied so hard that she managed to sail through the difficult entrance exam.
example_cn: 她非常用功，結果順利通過了那場困難的入學考試。
simple: He sailed through the interview.
simple_cn: 他面試輕鬆過關。

chinese: 為...儲蓄 / 除...之外 (介系詞)
example: He has been saving for a new car for two years and finally has enough money.
example_cn: 他為了買新車存了兩年的錢，終於存夠了。
simple: The room was empty save for an old chair.
simple_cn: 房間裡空空的，只剩一張舊椅子。

example: You can save on electricity costs by turning off the lights when you leave the room.
example_cn: 離開房間時隨手關燈，就能省下電費。
simple: Shopping online can help you save on fuel.
simple_cn: 網購可以幫你省油錢。

example: The young couple is saving up to buy their first apartment in the city.
example_cn: 那對年輕情侶正在存錢，想在市區買他們的第一間公寓。
pattern: S + save up (for + N / to + V)
simple: I'm saving up for a holiday.
simple_cn: 我正在存錢準備去度假。

example: The company had to scale down its operations due to the unexpected economic downturn.
example_cn: 因為突如其來的經濟不景氣，公司不得不縮減營運規模。
simple: They scaled down the project to save costs.
simple_cn: 他們縮小專案規模以節省成本。

example: The loud noise from the construction site scared away the birds in the garden.
example_cn: 工地的巨大噪音把花園裡的鳥都嚇跑了。
simple: Rising prices might scare off potential buyers.
simple_cn: 物價上漲可能會嚇跑潛在買家。

chinese: 勉強維持生活 / 勉強糊口
example: Even though his salary is very low, he manages to scrape by through careful spending.
example_cn: 雖然他的薪水很低，但他靠著精打細算勉強過日子。
pattern: S + manage to scrape by (on + N)
simple: We can just about scrape by on my earnings.
simple_cn: 靠我的薪水勉強能糊口。

example: He didn't study much for the exam, but he managed to scrape through with a passing grade.
example_cn: 他考試沒怎麼唸書，但還是低空飛過及格了。
simple: She just managed to scrape through the interview.
simple_cn: 她面試勉強過關。

example: I really screwed up the presentation by forgetting the most important data.
example_cn: 我簡報真的搞砸了，因為忘了最重要的數據。
simple: Don't screw it up this time.
simple_cn: 這次別搞砸了。

example: The police sealed off the entire street to investigate the scene of the accident.
example_cn: 警方封鎖了整條街，以便調查事故現場。
simple: The building was sealed off after the gas leak.
simple_cn: 瓦斯外洩後，那棟大樓就被封鎖了。

example: Rescue teams are searching for survivors after the massive earthquake in the region.
example_cn: 救援隊正在該地區大地震後搜尋生還者。
simple: He is searching for a new job.
simple_cn: 他正在找新工作。

chinese: 處理 / 安排 / 考慮
example: I'll see about getting us some tickets for the concert next week.
example_cn: 我會想辦法幫我們弄到下週演唱會的門票。
simple: You should see about fixing that leak.
simple_cn: 你該處理一下那個漏水的地方。

example: My parents came to the airport to see me off before I left for college in the US.
example_cn: 我父母到機場送我，因為我要去美國讀大學。
simple: They saw him off at the station.
simple_cn: 他們在車站送他離開。

chinese: 識破 / 看穿 / 貫徹始終
example: I could easily see through his lies because he looked very nervous.
example_cn: 我一眼就能看穿他的謊言，因為他看起來非常緊張。
simple: We must see the project through to the end.
simple_cn: 我們一定要把這個案子做完。

chinese: 處理 / 照料 / 確保
example: Don't worry about the travel arrangements; my secretary will see to everything.
example_cn: 不用擔心旅行安排，我的秘書會處理好一切。
simple: Could you see to the leaking faucet?
simple_cn: 你能處理一下那個漏水的水龍頭嗎？

chinese: 找出 / 尋找 (特別指費力尋找)
example: Investors are always seeking out new opportunities in the rapidly changing market.
example_cn: 投資者總是在快速變化的市場中尋找新的機會。
simple: She sought out her old friend in the crowd.
simple_cn: 她在人群中找到了她的老朋友。

chinese: 利用 / 抓住 (主意、機會)
example: The media seized on the scandal to increase their viewership during the slow news week.
example_cn: 媒體抓住這起醜聞，在新聞淡季提高收視率。
simple: He seized on the chance to prove his worth.
simple_cn: 他抓住機會證明自己的價值。

example: The government decided to sell off some state-owned companies to reduce the national debt.
example_cn: 政府決定出售一些國營企業，以減少國債。
simple: They sold off the old equipment.
simple_cn: 他們把舊設備便宜賣掉了。

example: All the tickets for the famous singer's concert were sold out within ten minutes.
example_cn: 那位知名歌手演唱會的所有門票在十分鐘內就賣光了。
simple: He was accused of selling out his friends.
simple_cn: 他被指控出賣朋友。

example: The noisy children were sent away so the adults could discuss the important matter.
example_cn: 吵鬧的孩子們被帶走了，這樣大人才能討論重要的事情。
simple: I sent away for a new catalog.
simple_cn: 我寫信去索取新的目錄。

example: I had to send the steak back because it was overcooked and dry.
example_cn: 我不得不把牛排退回去，因為它烤得太老又乾。
simple: If you don't like the color, you can send it back.
simple_cn: 如果你不喜歡那個顏色，可以退回去。

example: The teacher decided to send for the student's parents after his repeated bad behavior.
example_cn: 在學生一再表現不佳後，老師決定請他的家長來學校。
simple: They sent for a doctor immediately.
simple_cn: 他們立刻派人去請醫生。

chinese: 呈報 / 寄送 (作品、申請)
example: You must send in your application form before the deadline if you want the job.
example_cn: 如果你想要這份工作，必須在截止日期前提交申請表。
simple: The army was sent in to keep order.
simple_cn: 軍隊被派去維持秩序。

example: I'll send off these letters to the post office as soon as I finish writing them.
example_cn: 我一寫完這些信，就會把它們寄到郵局去。
simple: The player was sent off for a bad foul.
simple_cn: 那名球員因為嚴重犯規被罰下場。

example: It is important to separate your personal life from your professional work.
example_cn: 將個人生活與職業工作分開是很重要的。
simple: The island is separated from the mainland by a channel.
simple_cn: 這座島嶼與大陸之間隔著一條海峽。

example: This old building used to serve as a warehouse, but now it's a modern art gallery.
example_cn: 這棟老建築以前是倉庫，但現在是現代藝術畫廊。
simple: He served as the company's CEO for ten years.
simple_cn: 他擔任這家公司的執行長長達十年。

example: The chef is ready to serve up the main course to the hungry guests.
example_cn: 主廚準備好要為飢餓的客人上主菜了。
simple: The media served up a lot of rumors.
simple_cn: 媒體炒作了許多謠言。

example: After the storm, the residents set about cleaning up the fallen branches from the streets.
example_cn: 暴風雨過後，居民們開始清理街上掉落的樹枝。
simple: We set about our task with enthusiasm.
simple_cn: 我們滿懷熱情地開始了任務。

example: The long-standing argument over the inheritance set the two brothers against each other.
example_cn: 長期以來的遺產繼承爭論，讓這對兄弟反目成仇。
simple: She set her savings against the cost of the car.
simple_cn: 她把存款拿來抵車子的費用。

example: Her unique singing voice really sets her apart from all the other performers.
example_cn: 她獨特的歌聲真的讓她在所有表演者中脫穎而出。
simple: We set apart some money for our holiday.
simple_cn: 我們撥了一些錢留著度假用。

chinese: 撥出 (時間金錢) / 擱置 (爭論)
example: You should set aside at least thirty minutes every day to practice your English.
example_cn: 你應該每天至少撥出三十分鐘來練習英文。
simple: Let's set aside our differences and cooperate.
simple_cn: 我們先放下歧見，合作吧。

chinese: 延誤 / 阻礙 / 花費
example: The heavy rains have set back the construction project by several weeks.
example_cn: 連日大雨讓這個建築工程延誤了好幾個禮拜。
simple: The new car set him back thirty thousand dollars.
simple_cn: 那輛新車花了他三萬美元。

chinese: 記下 / 放下 / 規定
example: The company rules are clearly set down in the employee handbook.
example_cn: 公司規定在員工手冊裡都寫得很清楚。
simple: He set down his bag and rested.
simple_cn: 他放下包包休息了一下。

example: The scientist set forth his new theory in a detailed article in the journal.
example_cn: 這位科學家在期刊的一篇詳細文章中闡述了他的新理論。
simple: They set out early in the morning.
simple_cn: 他們一大早就出發了。

chinese: (不快之事) 開始並可能持續
example: We should head back home before the winter darkness sets in.
example_cn: 我們應該在冬天天黑前趕回家。
simple: Despair began to set in after the failure.
simple_cn: 失敗之後，絕望開始湧上心頭。

example: The farmer was afraid that wolves might set on his sheep during the night.
example_cn: 農夫擔心狼群會在夜裡襲擊他的羊。
simple: He was set on by a gang of youths.
simple_cn: 他被一群年輕人圍攻。

example: If we all set to, we can finish painting the room before the sun goes down.
example_cn: 如果我們大家齊心協力，就能在太陽下山前把房間漆完。
simple: They set to with enthusiasm.
simple_cn: 他們滿腔熱血地開始行動。

example: He wanted a high salary, but he eventually had to settle for a lower offer.
example_cn: 他本來想要高薪，但最後還是妥協接受了較低的待遇。
simple: Never settle for second best.
simple_cn: 永遠不要將就次等的選擇。

chinese: 安頓下來 / 適應新環境
example: It took the exchange student a few weeks to settle in and make new friends.
example_cn: 這位交換學生花了幾個禮拜才適應環境並交到新朋友。
simple: How are you settling in to your new job?
simple_cn: 你適應新工作了嗎？

example: After looking at several houses, they finally settled on a small apartment near the park.
example_cn: 看了好幾間房子後，他們最後決定選公園附近的一間小公寓。
simple: We eventually settled on a date for the wedding.
simple_cn: 我們最後敲定了婚禮的日期。

example: If you pay for the taxi now, we can settle up when we get to the hotel.
example_cn: 如果你現在先付計程車錢，我們到飯店再來結算。
simple: Let's settle up before we leave.
simple_cn: 我們離開前先把帳結清吧。

chinese: 縫補 / 成功完成 / 確保成功
example: She managed to sew up the hole in her favorite sweater so it looked like new.
example_cn: 她成功把她最愛毛衣上的破洞補好，看起來跟新的一樣。
simple: They've pretty much sewn up the deal.
simple_cn: 他們差不多已經搞定這筆交易了。

example: It took me a long time to shake off the flu and return to work.
example_cn: 我花了好長一段時間才擺脫流感回去上班。
simple: He couldn't shake off the feeling that something was wrong.
simple_cn: 他始終擺脫不了那種不對勁的感覺。

example: The new manager plans to shake up the entire department to improve efficiency.
example_cn: 新經理打算整頓整個部門來提升效率。
simple: The news of the accident really shook him up.
simple_cn: 那起事故的消息讓他嚇了一大跳。

chinese: 表現進步 / 改善行為 / 發展
example: The coach told the player that he needs to shape up or he will be dropped from the team.
example_cn: 教練告訴那位球員，他必須改進表現，否則就會被踢出球隊。
simple: Things are shaping up nicely.
simple_cn: 事情進展得很順利。

example: The employees were happy to share in the company's profits at the end of the year.
example_cn: 員工們很開心能在年底分享公司的利潤。
simple: We all shared in her happiness.
simple_cn: 我們都分享了她的喜悅。

example: You should learn to share your toys with other children at the park.
example_cn: 你應該學會在公園裡跟其他小朋友分享你的玩具。
simple: I shared a room with my brother.
simple_cn: 我和我弟弟共用一個房間。

example: Even though he was nervous, his natural talent for acting really shone through.
example_cn: 雖然他很緊張，但他天生的演戲天分還是展露無遺。
simple: Her kindness shines through everything she does.
simple_cn: 她的善良在她做的每件事中都表露無遺。

example: The soldiers were ordered not to shoot at the protesters during the demonstration.
example_cn: 士兵被命令不准在示威活動中對抗議者開槍。
simple: Someone shot at the moving car.
simple_cn: 有人朝那輛正在行駛的車開槍。

example: The manager quickly shot down my proposal because it was too expensive.
example_cn: 經理很快就否決了我的提案，因為費用太高。
simple: The enemy plane was shot down.
simple_cn: 敵機被擊落了。

example: A lizard's tongue can shoot out very fast to catch a fly.
example_cn: 蜥蜴的舌頭可以快速伸出來抓蒼蠅。
simple: Flames shot out from the burning building.
simple_cn: 火焰從燃燒的建築物中噴出來。

chinese: 急速上升 / 猛長 (身高)
example: The price of vegetables has shot up recently due to the heavy rain.
example_cn: 最近因為大雨，蔬菜價格飆漲。
simple: The boy has shot up since I last saw him.
simple_cn: 那男孩比我上次見到他時長高了好多。

example: You should shop around before buying a new computer to find the best deal.
example_cn: 買新電腦前你應該貨比三家，才能找到最划算的選擇。
simple: I'm shopping around for a new car insurance.
simple_cn: 我正在到處比價，找新的車險。

example: The government took measures to shore up the economy during the crisis.
example_cn: 政府在危機期間採取措施來支撐經濟。
simple: They needed to shore up the old walls.
simple_cn: 他們需要加固那些舊牆。

example: My colleague offered to show me around the office on my first day of work.
example_cn: 我同事在我第一天上班時主動帶我參觀辦公室。
pattern: S + show + 人 + around (+ 地方)
simple: We'll show you around the city.
simple_cn: 我們會帶你逛逛這座城市。

example: The secretary will show the next candidate in for the interview.
example_cn: 秘書會帶下一位面試者進來。
simple: Please show the guests in.
simple_cn: 請帶客人進來。

example: He likes to show off his new sports car to all of his friends.
example_cn: 他喜歡向所有朋友炫耀他的新跑車。
simple: Stop showing off!
simple_cn: 別再炫耀了！

chinese: 送客 / 帶領某人出去
example: After the meeting ended, I showed the visitors out to the elevator.
example_cn: 會議結束後，我送訪客到電梯口。
simple: The host showed us out after dinner.
simple_cn: 晚餐後，主人送我們出去。

example: His true feelings began to show through his cold appearance.
example_cn: 他真實的情感開始從冷漠的外表下流露出來。
simple: The stain is showing through the paint.
simple_cn: 那個污漬從油漆底下透出來了。

example: He spent most of his life shut away in a remote mountain cabin.
example_cn: 他大部分時間都把自己關在偏遠的山間小屋裡。
simple: She shut herself away to finish the novel.
simple_cn: 她把自己關起來，好完成那本小說。

chinese: 關閉 / 停業 / 關機
example: The factory was forced to shut down after failing several safety inspections.
example_cn: 這家工廠因為多次未通過安全檢查而被強制關閉。
simple: Remember to shut down your computer.
simple_cn: 記得關掉你的電腦。

example: The valley was shut in by high, snow-capped mountains on all sides.
example_cn: 山谷四面被高聳的雪山環繞。
simple: He felt shut in by the narrow room.
simple_cn: 他覺得被那個狹窄的房間困住了。

chinese: 切斷 / 關掉 (水、電、瓦斯)
example: Please make sure to shut off the gas before you leave the house.
example_cn: 離開家前請記得關掉瓦斯。
simple: The water supply was shut off this morning.
simple_cn: 今天早上自來水被切斷了。

chinese: 排除 / 擋住 / 把...拒之門外
example: These heavy curtains are designed to shut out the sunlight completely.
example_cn: 這些厚重的窗簾是設計來完全阻擋陽光的。
simple: She tried to shut out the painful memories.
simple_cn: 她試著不去想那些痛苦的回憶。

example: He is a very brave person who never shies away from a difficult challenge.
example_cn: 他是個非常勇敢的人，從不逃避困難的挑戰。
simple: Some people shy away from commitment.
simple_cn: 有些人會逃避承諾。

example: Most of the family sided against him when he made the controversial decision.
example_cn: 當他做出那個爭議性的決定時，大部分家人都反對他。
simple: They sided against the proposal.
simple_cn: 他們反對那項提案。

example: In the argument, my father usually sides with my mother to avoid conflict.
example_cn: 在爭執中，我爸爸通常會站在媽媽那邊以避免衝突。
simple: Which side are you siding with?
simple_cn: 你支持哪一邊？

example: He foolishly signed away his rights to the invention without realizing its value.
example_cn: 他愚蠢地簽掉了自己對這項發明的權利，卻沒意識到它的價值。
simple: She signed away her inheritance.
simple_cn: 她簽字放棄了她的繼承權。

example: I had to sign for the package when it arrived at my office this morning.
example_cn: 今天早上包裹送到辦公室的時候，我必須簽收。
simple: The neighbor signed for my delivery.
simple_cn: 鄰居幫我代收了包裹。

example: All visitors are required to sign in at the front desk before entering the building.
example_cn: 所有訪客進入大樓前，都要先到櫃檯簽到。
simple: Don't forget to sign out before you leave.
simple_cn: 離開前別忘了登出。

chinese: 結束工作 / 簽署認可 / (廣播)結束
example: The radio host always signs off with the same catchphrase every night.
example_cn: 那位廣播主持人每晚都用同一句口頭禪做結尾。
simple: The manager finally signed off on the budget.
simple_cn: 經理終於核准了預算。

chinese: 簽署雇用合約 / 註冊登入
example: The famous actor finally agreed to sign on for the sequel to the superhero movie.
example_cn: 那位知名演員終於同意簽約演出那部超級英雄電影的續集。
simple: He signed on as a volunteer.
simple_cn: 他報名當志工。

example: He decided to sign over his property to his children before he retired.
example_cn: 他決定在退休前把財產過戶給他的孩子們。
pattern: S + sign over + N + to + 人
simple: She signed over the rights to her book.
simple_cn: 她將書的版權轉讓出去。

example: Many students signed up for the advanced coding workshop held by the university.
example_cn: 很多學生報名參加了大學舉辦的進階程式設計工作坊。
simple: I signed up for a yoga class.
simple_cn: 我報名了瑜伽課。

example: The teacher singled out her essay as an excellent example for the whole class.
example_cn: 老師特別點出她的作文，當作全班同學的優秀範例。
simple: He was singled out for criticism.
simple_cn: 他被單獨挑出來批評。

example: It took a few minutes for the shocking news to sink in.
example_cn: 那則震驚的消息過了幾分鐘才讓人慢慢理解。
simple: The gravity of the situation began to sink in.
simple_cn: 大家開始意識到情況的嚴重性。

chinese: 袖手旁觀 / 放鬆坐著
example: You can't just sit back and watch while everyone else is working hard.
example_cn: 你不能大家都在努力工作的時候，自己卻在旁邊納涼。
simple: Sit back and enjoy the show.
simple_cn: 坐下來好好欣賞表演吧。

example: The professor allowed the visitor to sit in on his lecture for one afternoon.
example_cn: 教授允許那位訪客旁聽他一個下午的課。
simple: I sat in on the management meeting.
simple_cn: 我列席了管理會議。

chinese: 袖手旁觀 / 不參加 (直到結束)
example: Because of his ankle injury, he had to sit out the rest of the soccer match.
example_cn: 因為腳踝受傷，他只好缺席足球賽剩下的部分。
simple: I'll sit this dance out.
simple_cn: 這支舞我就不跳了。

chinese: 坐著直到...結束 (常用於無聊的事)
example: It was difficult to sit through the three-hour presentation without falling asleep.
example_cn: 那場三個小時的簡報真的很難撐著不睡著。
simple: We sat through two hours of boring speeches.
simple_cn: 我們硬撐著聽了兩小時無聊的演講。

chinese: 評估 / 打量 (人或情況)
example: The boxer tried to size up his opponent's strength during the first round.
example_cn: 那位拳擊手在第一回合試圖評估對手的實力。
simple: He sized up the situation quickly.
simple_cn: 他很快評估了情勢。

example: Before the actual meeting, the manager sketched out the main points of the proposal.
example_cn: 在正式會議之前，經理先大致勾勒出提案的重點。
simple: She sketched out a plan for the house.
simple_cn: 她簡單畫出了房子的草圖。

example: I only had time to skim through the report before the interview started.
example_cn: 面試開始前，我只有時間快速瀏覽那份報告。
simple: He skimmed through the newspaper.
simple_cn: 他快速翻閱了報紙。

example: On Saturday mornings, I like to sleep in until ten o'clock.
example_cn: 星期六早上我喜歡睡到十點才起床。
simple: It's a holiday, so let's sleep in.
simple_cn: 今天是假日，我們睡到自然醒吧。

chinese: 透過睡眠消除 (頭痛、酒意)
example: If you have a headache, you should try to sleep it off instead of taking medicine.
example_cn: 如果你頭痛，應該試試睡一覺讓它好轉，而不是吃藥。
simple: He's upstairs sleeping off a hangover.
simple_cn: 他在樓上睡覺解宿醉。

example: That's a major decision; why don't you sleep on it and give me your answer tomorrow?
example_cn: 那是個重大決定，不如你先睡一覺想一想，明天再給我答覆。
simple: I need to sleep on the job offer.
simple_cn: 我需要考慮一下這份工作機會。

example: My daughter asked if her best friend could sleep over this Friday night.
example_cn: 我女兒問她最好的朋友這週五能不能來家裡過夜。
simple: The kids are sleeping over at their grandma's.
simple_cn: 孩子們今晚在奶奶家過夜。

example: The company slipped up by failing to check the quality of the raw materials.
example_cn: 這家公司因為沒有檢查原物料的品質而出了差錯。
simple: Someone slipped up and sent the wrong email.
simple_cn: 有人出了差錯，寄錯了郵件。

example: You need to slow down when you are driving through a residential area.
example_cn: 你開車經過住宅區的時候要放慢速度。
simple: Slow down! You're going too fast.
simple_cn: 慢一點！你太快了啦。

chinese: 平息 (爭論) / 掩飾 (問題)
example: The manager tried to smooth over the disagreement between the two employees.
example_cn: 經理試圖緩和那兩位員工之間的爭執。
simple: They smoothed over the problem with a joke.
simple_cn: 他們用一個笑話把問題帶過去了。

chinese: 從...中振作起來 (憂鬱、發呆)
example: You need to snap out of your depression and start thinking about the future.
example_cn: 你得趕快從憂鬱中振作起來，開始思考未來。
simple: Snap out of it!
simple_cn: 快醒醒！別再這樣了。

example: The best concert tickets were snapped up by fans within minutes of going on sale.
example_cn: 最熱門的演唱會門票一開賣，幾分鐘內就被粉絲搶光了。
simple: Bargains were snapped up quickly.
simple_cn: 便宜貨一下子就被搶光了。

chinese: 嗅出 / 發現 (秘密、隱藏物)
example: Specially trained dogs can sniff out illegal drugs hidden in luggage at the airport.
example_cn: 受過特殊訓練的狗可以在機場聞出藏在行李裡的違禁藥品。
simple: The detective sniffed out a scandal.
simple_cn: 那個偵探嗅出了一樁醜聞。

example: I need some time to sort out the problems with my computer before I can work.
example_cn: 我需要一些時間先搞定電腦的問題，才能開始工作。
simple: Let's sort out these documents.
simple_cn: 我們來把這些文件整理好。

chinese: 探聽 (某人的) 口風 / 試探想法
example: I'll sound out my boss about the new project before I make a formal proposal.
example_cn: 我會先試探一下老闆對新專案的看法，再正式提案。
simple: She sounded him out about the job offer.
simple_cn: 她試探他對這份工作機會的看法。

chinese: 發呆 / 心不在焉 / 隔開
example: I'm sorry, I missed what you said because I was spacing out for a moment.
example_cn: 抱歉，我剛剛恍神了一下，沒聽到你說什麼。
simple: The desks were spaced out evenly.
simple_cn: 那些桌子被均勻地分開擺放。

chinese: 引發 / 導致 (突然發生)
