example: The new tax policy sparked off protests across the entire country.
example_cn: 新的稅務政策在全國引發了抗議浪潮。
simple: The incident sparked off a major row.
simple_cn: 那件事引發了一場大爭吵。

chinese: 代表...發言 / 表達願望
example: The lawyer will speak for his client during the court hearing tomorrow.
example_cn: 律師會在明天的法庭聽證會上為他的當事人辯護。
simple: Can you speak for the team?
simple_cn: 你能代表團隊發言嗎？

chinese: 公開發表意見 / 敢於發言
example: It is important to speak out against injustice whenever you see it.
example_cn: 看到不公義的事情時，勇於發聲是很重要的。
simple: She spoke out in favor of the new law.
simple_cn: 她公開表態支持這項新法律。

chinese: 大聲點說 / 大膽表達
example: Could you please speak up? I can't hear you clearly from the back of the room.
example_cn: 可以請你講大聲一點嗎？我在房間後面聽不太清楚。
simple: Speak up if you have any questions.
simple_cn: 有問題就大聲說出來。

example: The car speeded up as it entered the highway.
example_cn: 車子一上高速公路就加速了。
simple: We need to speed up the process.
simple_cn: 我們得加快流程的速度。

example: The instructions are very clear, so I don't need to spell out every single step for you.
example_cn: 說明寫得很清楚，所以我不用一步一步跟你解釋。
simple: Let me spell out the terms of the contract.
simple_cn: 讓我詳細說明合約的條款。

example: Many families spend a large portion of their income on housing and transportation.
example_cn: 很多家庭把收入的一大部分花在住房和交通上。
simple: She spent fifty dollars on a new book.
simple_cn: 她花五十塊美金買了一本新書。

chinese: 分手 / 分開 / 分配
example: The team members decided to split up to search the entire area more quickly.
example_cn: 團隊成員決定分頭行動，以便更快搜完整個區域。
simple: They split up the profit among themselves.
simple_cn: 他們把利潤自己分掉了。

example: The hikers spread out across the field to look for the lost trail.
example_cn: 登山客分散在田野各處，尋找遺失的小徑。
simple: The city spreads out over a large area.
simple_cn: 這座城市佔地很廣。

example: New coffee shops are springing up all over the city lately.
example_cn: 最近城裡到處都在開新的咖啡店。
simple: Dandelions sprang up in the garden.
simple_cn: 花園裡突然長出了蒲公英。

example: The neighbor was caught trying to spy on us through the fence.
example_cn: 鄰居被發現試圖透過圍籬偷看我們。
simple: He was accused of spying on the government.
simple_cn: 他被指控監視政府。

chinese: 堆積 / 相比 / 衡量
example: I have so much work stacking up on my desk that I'll have to stay late tonight.
example_cn: 我桌上堆積的工作太多了，今晚得加班才行。
simple: How does the new car stack up against the old one?
simple_cn: 這台新車跟舊車比起來怎麼樣？

chinese: 撲滅 / 根除 (犯罪、疾病)
example: The government is trying to stamp out corruption in the civil service.
example_cn: 政府正在設法杜絕公務體系中的貪腐問題。
simple: They worked hard to stamp out the fire.
simple_cn: 他們努力把火撲滅。

chinese: 支持 (某人) / 待命 / 遵守 (承諾)
example: Her friends promised to stand by her no matter what happened during the crisis.
example_cn: 她的朋友承諾，無論危機期間發生什麼事，都會支持她。
simple: Emergency services are standing by.
simple_cn: 緊急救援單位正在待命。

chinese: 代表 / 象徵 / 容忍
example: In mathematics, the letter 'x' often stands for an unknown quantity.
example_cn: 在數學中，字母「x」通常代表未知數。
simple: I won't stand for such rudeness.
simple_cn: 我無法容忍這種無禮的行為。

example: Could you please stand in for me at the meeting while I see the doctor?
example_cn: 可以請你代替我去開會嗎？我要去看醫生。
simple: A substitute teacher stood in for our regular teacher.
simple_cn: 代課老師代替我們原本的老師上課。

example: Her bright red dress made her stand out in the crowded room.
example_cn: 她那件亮紅色的洋裝，讓她在擁擠的房間裡特別顯眼。
simple: He stands out from the rest of the team.
simple_cn: 他在團隊中特別突出。

chinese: 勇敢面對 (強大對手) / 耐用
example: The small boy had the courage to stand up to the school bully.
example_cn: 那個小男孩有勇氣挺身對抗校園惡霸。
pattern: S + stand up to + 人/物
simple: The car stands up to long trips well.
simple_cn: 這輛車很耐長途行駛。

example: It is rude to stare at people in public, even if they look different.
example_cn: 在公共場合盯著別人看是很不禮貌的，即使他們長得跟你不一樣。
simple: She stared at the wall in silence.
simple_cn: 她沉默地盯著牆壁。

example: The computer crashed, so I had to start over from the beginning of the report.
example_cn: 電腦當機了，所以我只好從報告的開頭重新來過。
simple: Let's start over and try again.
simple_cn: 我們重新來過，再試一次。

example: Children were warned to stay away from the deep water in the lake.
example_cn: 孩子們被警告要遠離湖中的深水區。
simple: Stay away from me!
simple_cn: 離我遠一點！

example: The students stayed up all night to prepare for the final exam.
example_cn: 學生們熬夜準備期末考。
simple: We stayed up to watch the game.
simple_cn: 我們熬夜看比賽。

example: The man was arrested after trying to steal from a jewelry store downtown.
example_cn: 那名男子試圖從市區的一家珠寶店偷東西，結果被逮捕了。
pattern: S + steal + N + from + 人/地方
simple: He stole money from my wallet.
simple_cn: 他從我錢包裡偷了錢。

example: The elderly manager decided to step aside and let a younger person take over.
example_cn: 那位年長的經理決定退下來，讓年輕人接手。
simple: Please step aside to let the doctor pass.
simple_cn: 請靠邊站，讓醫生過去。

example: The politician was forced to step down following the scandal.
example_cn: 那名政治人物在醜聞爆發後被迫下台。
simple: He stepped down as chairman.
simple_cn: 他辭去了主席的職位。

chinese: 介入 / 干預 / 幫忙
example: The police had to step in to prevent the argument from becoming violent.
example_cn: 警方不得不介入，防止爭吵演變成暴力衝突。
simple: When the leader left, her deputy stepped in.
simple_cn: 當領導人離開時，她的副手接手了。

chinese: 加強 / 提高 / 挺身而出
example: The government needs to step up security measures at all international airports.
example_cn: 政府需要加強所有國際機場的安全措施。
simple: He stepped up to accept the challenge.
simple_cn: 他挺身而出接受挑戰。

chinese: 堅持 (計畫、決定) / 黏在...
example: If you want to lose weight, you must stick to your diet and exercise plan.
example_cn: 如果你想減肥，就必須堅持你的飲食和運動計畫。
simple: Stick to the facts.
simple_cn: 堅持事實。

chinese: 團結一致 / 黏在一起
example: Family members should always stick together during difficult times.
example_cn: 家人在困難時期應該團結在一起。
simple: If we stick together, we can win.
simple_cn: 如果我們團結在一起，就能贏。

chinese: 繼續做 / 待在某人身邊
example: He decided to stick with his old car for another year to save money.
example_cn: 他決定再開他那輛舊車一年，好省點錢。
simple: Stick with me, and you'll be safe.
simple_cn: 跟著我，你就會安全。

example: His controversial comments stirred up a lot of anger among the local residents.
example_cn: 他那些具爭議性的言論，在當地居民中引發了許多憤怒。
simple: The wind stirred up the dust.
simple_cn: 風揚起了灰塵。

chinese: 順道拜訪 / 中途停留
example: I'll stop by the grocery store on my way home to buy some milk.
example_cn: 我回家的路上會順便去雜貨店買些牛奶。
simple: We stopped over in London for two days.
simple_cn: 我們在倫敦中途停留了兩天。

chinese: 弄清楚 / 改過自新 / 弄直
example: It took the accountant a long time to straighten out the company's complicated finances.
example_cn: 會計師花了好長一段時間才把公司複雜的財務狀況理清楚。
simple: He needs to straighten his life out.
simple_cn: 他需要把自己的生活整頓好。

chinese: 感到壓力重重 / 使極度緊張
example: The upcoming final exams are really stressing out many students in the class.
example_cn: 即將到來的期末考讓班上很多學生壓力超大。
simple: Working long hours stresses me out.
simple_cn: 長時間工作讓我壓力很大。

chinese: 開始 (談話、交誼) / (樂隊)演奏
example: He is a very friendly person who can strike up a conversation with anyone.
example_cn: 他是個很友善的人，跟誰都能聊得起來。
simple: The band struck up a lively tune.
simple_cn: 樂團開始演奏一首輕快的曲子。

chinese: 欺騙某人 / 拖延 (給假希望)
example: She realized he was just stringing her along and had no intention of marrying her.
example_cn: 她發現他只是在敷衍她，根本沒有要娶她的意思。
simple: Don't string him along if you're not interested.
simple_cn: 如果你沒興趣，就別再吊著他。

chinese: 脫掉 (全部) 衣服 / 剝除
example: After the long hike, he stripped off his muddy clothes and took a hot shower.
example_cn: 長途健行後，他脫掉滿是泥巴的衣服，沖了個熱水澡。
simple: The workers stripped the old paint off the walls.
simple_cn: 工人把牆上的舊油漆刮掉了。

chinese: 與...奮鬥 / 在...方面有困難
example: Many international students struggle with the local dialect when they first arrive.
example_cn: 很多國際學生剛來的時候，都對當地方言感到很吃力。
simple: She is struggling with her math homework.
simple_cn: 她正在跟數學作業奮戰。

example: While researching at the library, I stumbled across a rare book about local history.
example_cn: 在圖書館查資料時，我意外發現一本關於當地歷史的稀有書籍。
simple: We stumbled upon a hidden beach.
simple_cn: 我們無意間發現了一個隱藏的海灘。

chinese: 使遭受 / 取決於 / 易受...的
type: 片語動詞 / 形容詞片語
example: The new airport expansion plan is still subject to government approval.
example_cn: 新的機場擴建計畫還有待政府核准。
simple: Flights are subject to delay due to weather.
simple_cn: 航班可能因天氣因素而延誤。

chinese: 服從 / 屈服於 / 提交給
example: The rebels eventually had to submit to the power of the government forces.
example_cn: 反抗軍最終不得不向政府軍的勢力屈服。
simple: You must submit your report to the manager.
simple_cn: 你必須把報告交給經理。

example: I decided to subscribe to the online magazine to stay updated on technology news.
example_cn: 我決定訂閱這本線上雜誌，以便隨時掌握科技新聞。
simple: Do you subscribe to his theory?
simple_cn: 你贊同他的理論嗎？

example: You can substitute honey for sugar if you want a healthier alternative.
example_cn: 如果你想找更健康的替代方案，可以用蜂蜜代替糖。
simple: He substituted for the injured player.
simple_cn: 他代替了受傷的球員上場。

example: Please subtract the cost of shipping from the total amount.
example_cn: 請從總金額中扣除運費。
simple: The messy yard subtracts from the value of the house.
simple_cn: 亂七八糟的院子讓房子的價值打了折扣。

example: She finally succeeded in passing the difficult exam after three attempts.
example_cn: 她考了三次，終於成功通過了那個很難的考試。
simple: He succeeded in business.
simple_cn: 他在事業上成功了。

example: Nobody likes him because he is always trying to suck up to the boss.
example_cn: 沒有人喜歡他，因為他老是愛拍老闆馬屁。
simple: Stop sucking up!
simple_cn: 別再拍馬屁了！

example: Many elderly people suffer from insomnia during the summer heat.
example_cn: 很多老人家在夏天炎熱的時候會失眠。
simple: The company is suffering from a lack of funds.
simple_cn: 這間公司正因為資金不足而受苦。

example: To sum up, the project was a huge success despite the early challenges.
example_cn: 總而言之，這個計畫儘管初期遇到挑戰，最後還是大獲成功。
simple: He summed up the meeting in two sentences.
simple_cn: 他用兩句話總結了會議內容。

chinese: 鼓起 (勇氣) / 喚起 (記憶)
example: She had to summon up all her courage to walk onto the stage.
example_cn: 她必須鼓起所有勇氣才能走上舞台。
simple: The smell summoned up memories of my childhood.
simple_cn: 那股味道喚起了我童年的回憶。

example: My mother swears by this traditional remedy for a sore throat.
example_cn: 我媽媽非常推崇這個治療喉嚨痛的傳統偏方。
simple: He swears by his old car.
simple_cn: 他對他那台老車讚不絕口。

example: The new president will be sworn in during a ceremony tomorrow.
example_cn: 新總統將在明天的典禮上宣誓就職。
simple: The jury was sworn in by the judge.
simple_cn: 陪審團在法官面前宣誓就職。

example: After that terrible hangover, he decided to swear off alcohol for good.
example_cn: 經歷那次可怕的宿醉之後，他決定徹底戒酒。
simple: I've sworn off sweets.
simple_cn: 我已經戒掉甜食了。

chinese: 關掉 / 打開 (電器、開關)
example: Please switch off the computer and the lights before leaving the office.
example_cn: 離開辦公室前請把電腦和燈關掉。
simple: He switched on the TV.
simple_cn: 他打開了電視。

example: I was quite taken aback by his sudden decision to quit his job.
example_cn: 他突然決定辭職，我當時真的嚇了一跳。
pattern: S + be taken aback by + N
simple: She was taken aback by his rudeness.
simple_cn: 她被他的無禮嚇了一跳。

example: I don't know why she suddenly took against him; they used to be friends.
example_cn: 我不知道她為什麼突然討厭他，他們以前明明是朋友。
simple: The dog took against the new mailman.
simple_cn: 那隻狗不喜歡新來的郵差。

example: The mechanic had to take the engine apart to find the problem.
example_cn: 技師得把引擎拆開才能找出問題。
simple: He took the watch apart to fix it.
simple_cn: 他把手錶拆開來修理。

example: The manager took me aside to discuss the private matter.
example_cn: 經理把我拉到旁邊討論那件私事。
simple: She took her daughter aside to talk.
simple_cn: 她把女兒拉到旁邊說話。

chinese: 拿走 / 帶走 / 外帶
example: Waiters usually take away the dirty dishes as soon as you finish eating.
example_cn: 服務生通常你一吃完就會把髒盤子收走。
simple: I'll have two burgers to take away, please.
simple_cn: 我要兩個漢堡外帶，謝謝。

example: I take back what I said earlier; I was wrong about the plan.
example_cn: 我收回剛才說的話，我對那個計畫的看法是錯的。
simple: You should take that dress back to the shop.
simple_cn: 妳應該把那件洋裝拿回店裡退。

example: Please take down my phone number in case you need to contact me later.
example_cn: 請記下我的電話號碼，萬一之後需要聯絡我。
simple: They took down the Christmas decorations.
simple_cn: 他們把聖誕裝飾拆下來了。

example: I’m sorry, I took you for your brother; you look so similar!
example_cn: 抱歉，我把你誤認成你哥了，你們長得也太像了！
simple: Don't take my kindness for weakness.
simple_cn: 別把我的好心當成軟弱。

example: What can we take from this experience to improve our future performance?
example_cn: 我們能從這次經驗學到什麼，來改進未來的表現？
pattern: S + take + N + from + 來源
simple: His rude behavior takes from his professional image.
simple_cn: 他的粗魯行為有損他的專業形象。

chinese: 吸收 / 理解 / 欺騙 / 領養
example: It was a very complex lecture, and I couldn't take in all the information.
example_cn: 那場演講內容很複雜，我沒辦法全部吸收。
simple: She was taken in by his smooth talk.
simple_cn: 她被他的花言巧語騙了。

chinese: 拿出 / 帶某人出去 (約會) / 扣除
example: He took her out to a fancy restaurant for her birthday dinner.
example_cn: 他帶她去一間高級餐廳吃生日晚餐。
simple: Take out the trash before you leave.
simple_cn: 離開前把垃圾拿出去丟。

example: All students are encouraged to take part in extracurricular activities.
example_cn: 鼓勵所有學生參加課外活動。
simple: He took part in the marathon last year.
simple_cn: 他去年參加了馬拉松比賽。

chinese: 開始喜歡 / 養成...的習慣
example: The new puppy took to its owners almost immediately.
example_cn: 那隻新來的小狗幾乎馬上就跟主人熟起來了。
simple: He has taken to drinking tea in the morning.
simple_cn: 他養成了早上喝茶的習慣。

example: I’d like to take you up on your offer to help me move house.
example_cn: 我想接受你之前提議要幫我搬家。
pattern: S + take + 人 + up + on + N
simple: Can I take you up on that drink later?
simple_cn: 我可以晚點跟你喝那杯酒嗎？

example: We need to talk about the budget for the upcoming project.
example_cn: 我們需要討論一下接下來這個專案的預算。
simple: What are you talking about?
simple_cn: 你在說什麼啊？

chinese: 說服 / 避開重點談論
example: He eventually managed to talk his parents around to letting him go on the trip.
example_cn: 他最後成功說服爸媽讓他去旅行。
simple: They spent an hour talking around the main issue.
simple_cn: 他們花了一個小時繞著主要問題打轉。

chinese: 對 (某人) 嘮叨 / 單向說話 (不聽回應)
example: I felt like she was just talking at me rather than having a real conversation.
example_cn: 我覺得她只是在對我單方面說教，而不是真的在對話。
simple: Stop talking at me and listen for a change!
simple_cn: 別再對我碎碎唸了，換你聽我說！

chinese: 以居高臨下的語氣說話
example: Don't talk down to me just because I'm younger than you.
example_cn: 別因為我年紀比你小就用教訓的口氣跟我說話。
simple: He always talks down to his employees.
simple_cn: 他總是對員工用高高在上的語氣說話。

chinese: 說服去 / 說服不要去
example: My friends talked me into joining the hiking club last weekend.
example_cn: 上週末我朋友說服我加入了登山社。
simple: She talked him out of quitting his job.
simple_cn: 她說服他打消了辭職的念頭。

example: We need to talk over the plan with the manager before we make a decision.
example_cn: 我們得先跟經理討論這個計畫，再做決定。
simple: Let's talk it over tonight.
simple_cn: 我們今晚好好聊聊這件事。

chinese: 詳盡解釋 / 討論出結果
example: The teacher talked us through the complicated math problem step by step.
example_cn: 老師一步一步帶著我們解開那個複雜的數學題。
simple: We spent hours talking through our problems.
simple_cn: 我們花了好幾個小時把問題談開。

example: I need to talk to you about the incident that happened yesterday.
example_cn: 我需要跟你談談昨天發生的事情。
simple: Can I talk to you for a second?
simple_cn: 可以跟你講一下話嗎？

example: You don't want to tangle with that gang; they are very dangerous.
example_cn: 你最好不要跟那幫人攪和，他們非常危險。
simple: He got tangled with the law.
simple_cn: 他惹上了法律麻煩。

chinese: 利用 / 開發 (資源、情感)
example: The company is trying to tap into the growing market for organic food.
example_cn: 這家公司正試圖打入成長中的有機食品市場。
simple: The movie taps into the fears of teenagers.
simple_cn: 這部電影抓住了青少年的恐懼。

example: We decided to team up with another local business for the charity event.
example_cn: 我們決定跟另一家本地商家合作，一起辦那個慈善活動。
simple: The two companies teamed up to create a new app.
simple_cn: 兩家公司聯手開發了一款新App。

chinese: 拆散 / 撕碎 / 使心碎
example: The war tore many families apart and caused immense suffering.
example_cn: 戰爭拆散了很多家庭，也造成了巨大的苦難。
simple: The bad news really tore her apart.
simple_cn: 那個壞消息真的讓她心碎。

example: The little boy began to tear at the wrapping paper on his birthday gift.
example_cn: 那個小男孩開始撕他生日禮物上的包裝紙。
simple: The sight of the starving children tore at her heart.
simple_cn: 看到那些挨餓的孩子，她心如刀割。

example: The old library was torn down to make room for a modern shopping mall.
example_cn: 舊圖書館被拆掉了，要蓋一棟現代化的購物中心。
simple: He spent his life tearing down his rivals.
simple_cn: 他這輩子都在打壓對手。

chinese: 猛烈攻擊 / 狼吞虎嚥
example: The angry customer began to tear into the manager about the poor service.
example_cn: 那個生氣的客人開始對經理破口大罵，抱怨服務太差。
simple: The hungry dog tore into the meat.
simple_cn: 那隻餓狗狼吞虎嚥地啃著肉。

example: He tore off a piece of paper to write down his phone number.
example_cn: 他撕下一張紙，寫下他的電話號碼。
simple: He tore off his wet clothes.
simple_cn: 他一把脫掉濕衣服。

chinese: 撕碎 / 毀掉 (協議) / 傷心落淚
example: She tore up the old letters and threw them into the trash.
example_cn: 她把那些舊信撕碎，丟進垃圾桶。
simple: He started to tear up during the sad movie.
simple_cn: 看那部悲傷電影時，他開始眼眶泛淚。

example: The twins look so much alike that I can't tell them apart.
example_cn: 這對雙胞胎長得太像了，我根本分不出誰是誰。
pattern: S + cannot tell + A and B + apart
simple: Can you tell the two brands apart?
simple_cn: 你分得出這兩個品牌嗎？

example: It's difficult to tell the real diamond from a high-quality fake.
example_cn: 要分辨真鑽石跟高品質的假貨很困難。
pattern: S + can/cannot tell + A + from + B
simple: How can you tell a butterfly from a moth?
simple_cn: 要怎麼區分蝴蝶和蛾？

example: The ancient poems tell of a legendary king who saved his people from war.
example_cn: 這些古詩講述了一位傳奇國王，他從戰爭中拯救了他的子民。
simple: The report tells of the extreme conditions in the arctic.
simple_cn: 這份報告描述了北極的極端環境。

example: The teacher told the student off for being late for the third time this week.
example_cn: 老師因為那個學生這週第三次遲到而訓斥了他。
simple: My mom told me off for not cleaning my room.
simple_cn: 我媽因為我沒打掃房間而罵了我一頓。

example: Don't tell on me! I'll never do it again, I promise.
example_cn: 別出賣我！我保證再也不犯了。
simple: She told on her brother for stealing cookies.
simple_cn: 她告狀說弟弟偷了餅乾。

chinese: (肌肉) 繃緊 / 緊張起來
example: He always tenses up whenever he has to speak in front of a large audience.
example_cn: 每次他必須在大批觀眾面前講話時，總是會緊張起來。
simple: Her shoulders tensed up during the interview.
simple_cn: 面試時她的肩膀繃得很緊。

example: The doctors are testing the patient for a rare type of virus.
example_cn: 醫生正在為病人檢測一種罕見的病毒。
simple: The soil was tested for pollution.
simple_cn: 土壤經過了污染檢測。

chinese: 試驗 / 測試 (主意、產品)
example: We need to test out the new software on different devices before the official release.
example_cn: 我們需要在正式發布前，先在各種裝置上測試新軟體。
simple: They are testing out a new theory.
simple_cn: 他們正在測試一套新理論。

example: I would like to thank you for your generous help during my time of need.
example_cn: 我想感謝你在我需要的時候慷慨相助。
simple: We thanked the hosts for the lovely dinner.
simple_cn: 我們感謝主人準備了這麼棒的晚餐。

chinese: 未雨綢繆 / 預作打算
example: To be successful in business, you need to think ahead and predict future trends.
example_cn: 要在商場上成功，你得有遠見，預測未來的趨勢。
simple: We didn't think ahead and forgot to book a hotel.
simple_cn: 我們沒先想好，結果忘了訂飯店。

example: When I think back on my school days, I realize how much I have changed.
example_cn: 回想學生時代，我才發現自己改變了多少。
simple: Think back to the first time we met.
simple_cn: 回想一下我們第一次見面的時候。

chinese: 想起 / 考慮 / 認為
example: I can't think of a better way to celebrate your graduation than a party.
example_cn: 我想不到比辦派對更好的方式來慶祝你畢業了。
simple: What do you think of his latest movie?
simple_cn: 你覺得他最新的電影怎麼樣？

chinese: 認真考慮 / 想出 (完整計畫)
example: The whole strategy was carefully thought out by the marketing team.
example_cn: 整個策略是行銷團隊仔細規劃出來的。
simple: It was a well-thought-out plan.
simple_cn: 這是個規劃得很周詳的計畫。

example: You should think the consequences through before you make such a major decision.
example_cn: 在做這麼重大的決定之前，你應該先想清楚後果。
simple: I need time to think it through.
simple_cn: 我需要時間好好想清楚。

example: He’s always thinking up clever excuses for why he hasn't finished his work.
example_cn: 他總是想出一些聰明的藉口，解釋為什麼工作沒做完。
simple: Who thought up this brilliant idea?
simple_cn: 這個絕妙點子是誰想出來的？

chinese: 討論出結果 / 徹底解決
example: The two sides met to thrash out a new trade agreement.
example_cn: 雙方會面協商，要敲定一項新的貿易協議。
simple: They thrashed out their differences over a cup of coffee.
simple_cn: 他們邊喝咖啡邊把彼此的分歧談開了。

example: The mirror threw the light back onto the wall.
example_cn: 鏡子把光反射回牆上。
simple: The crisis threw the country back into poverty.
simple_cn: 這場危機讓這個國家又陷入了貧窮。

example: If you buy the car today, the dealer will throw in a free car wash for a year.
example_cn: 如果你今天買這輛車，車商會附贈一年的免費洗車服務。
simple: He threw in a few extra details.
simple_cn: 他隨口多補了幾個細節。

chinese: 擺脫 / 趕走 / 使困惑
example: It took her a week to throw off the cold and return to her normal routine.
example_cn: 她花了一個禮拜才擺脫感冒，恢復正常作息。
simple: His sudden question threw me off.
simple_cn: 他突然問的問題讓我愣了一下。

example: She threw on her coat and ran out to meet her friends.
example_cn: 她匆匆穿上外套，跑出去見朋友。
simple: I'll just throw on a sweater and I'll be ready.
simple_cn: 我隨便套件毛衣就好了。

chinese: 扔掉 / 驅逐 / 駁回 (法律)
example: I really need to throw out these old newspapers to clear some space.
example_cn: 我真的需要把這些舊報紙丟掉，騰出一些空間。
simple: The judge threw the case out due to lack of evidence.
simple_cn: 法官因為證據不足駁回了這個案子。

chinese: 臨時湊成 / 草草組成
example: She managed to throw together a quick meal for the unexpected guests.
example_cn: 她臨時湊合著弄了一頓簡單的飯菜，招待不請自來的客人。
simple: The report was thrown together at the last minute.
simple_cn: 這份報告是最後一刻趕出來的。

chinese: 嘔吐 / 拋起 / 產生 (問題)
example: The baby threw up all over the new carpet.
example_cn: 寶寶吐得新地毯上到處都是。
simple: The investigation threw up some interesting facts.
simple_cn: 這項調查發現了一些有趣的事實。

chinese: 縛住 / 限制 / 牽制
example: Having a full-time job and a young family really ties him down.
example_cn: 全職工作加上有年幼的家庭，真的把他綁得死死的。
simple: The soldiers tied down the enemy forces.
simple_cn: 士兵們牽制住了敵軍。

example: His version of the story doesn't tie in with what the other witnesses said.
example_cn: 他對事件的說法跟其他目擊者的證詞對不上。
simple: This promotion ties in with the movie release.
simple_cn: 這次促銷活動跟電影上映有連動。

chinese: 繫緊 / 佔用 (時間金錢) / 圓滿結束
example: I'm sorry, I'm tied up in a meeting and can't talk right now.
example_cn: 抱歉，我現在忙著開會，沒辦法講話。
simple: He tied up his shoes and ran out.
simple_cn: 他綁好鞋帶就跑了出去。

example: The government decided to tighten up security at all international airports.
example_cn: 政府決定加強所有國際機場的安檢。
simple: The rules need to be tightened up.
simple_cn: 這些規定需要再嚴格一點。

example: The coach called a time out to discuss the strategy with his players.
example_cn: 教練喊了暫停，跟球員討論戰術。
simple: The system timed out before I could save my work.
simple_cn: 我還沒來得及存檔，系統就逾時了。

example: She quickly tired of her new toy and wanted something else to play with.
example_cn: 她很快就玩膩了新玩具，想找別的東西來玩。
simple: He never tires of talking about his success.
simple_cn: 他講到自己的成功永遠不會膩。

example: The long hike through the mountains completely tired us out.
example_cn: 那趟長途的山區健行把我們累壞了。
simple: Walking all day tired me out.
simple_cn: 走了一整天，把我累壞了。

example: The plane is expected to touch down at Taipei Songshan Airport at 4 p.m.
example_cn: 飛機預計下午四點降落在台北松山機場。
simple: We touched down ten minutes early.
simple_cn: 我們比預定時間提早十分鐘降落。

example: In his speech, the principal touched on several important issues regarding school safety.
example_cn: 校長在演講中提到了幾個關於校園安全的重要議題。
simple: The report only touched on the economic side of the problem.
simple_cn: 這份報告只稍微提到了問題的經濟層面。

chinese: 潤色 / 修補 (畫作、妝容)
example: She needed to touch up her makeup before she went onto the stage.
example_cn: 她上台前需要補一下妝。
simple: The artist touched up the painting with a bit of gold.
simple_cn: 藝術家用一點金色修飾了那幅畫。

example: Historians can trace the roots of this tradition back to the 16th century.
example_cn: 歷史學家可以將這項傳統的根源追溯到十六世紀。
pattern: S + trace + N + back to + 來源
simple: Her family can be traced back to the royal house.
simple_cn: 她的家族可以追溯到王室。

example: The detective spent months trying to track down the missing witness.
example_cn: 那名偵探花了幾個月時間試圖追查失蹤證人的下落。
simple: I finally tracked down a copy of the old book.
simple_cn: 我終於找到了一本那本舊書。

example: I decided to trade in my old car for a newer, more fuel-efficient model.
example_cn: 我決定把我的舊車換成更新、更省油的車款。
pattern: S + trade in + A + for + B
simple: You can trade in your old phone at this shop.
simple_cn: 你可以在這家店用舊手機折抵換購。

example: In business, you often have to trade off quality for a lower price.
example_cn: 在商場上，你常常得在品質和低價之間做取捨。
pattern: S + trade off + A + against + B
simple: There is always a trade-off between speed and accuracy.
simple_cn: 速度和準確度之間總是要取捨。

example: The athletes have been training hard for the national competition for months.
example_cn: 這些運動員已經為了全國比賽努力訓練好幾個月了。
simple: He is training for a marathon.
simple_cn: 他正在為馬拉松做訓練。

example: She decided to transfer to the Tokyo office to gain international experience.
example_cn: 她決定調到東京辦公室，以獲得國際經驗。
pattern: S + transfer to + 地方/部門
simple: The patient was transferred to another hospital.
simple_cn: 那位病人被轉送到另一家醫院。

example: The old factory was transformed into a modern art gallery last year.
example_cn: 那間舊工廠去年被改造成了一座現代美術館。
simple: Caterpillars transform into butterflies.
simple_cn: 毛毛蟲會蛻變成蝴蝶。

example: His best-selling novel has been translated into more than thirty languages.
example_cn: 他的暢銷小說已經被翻譯成超過三十種語言。
simple: Hard work doesn't always translate into success.
simple_cn: 努力不一定能轉化為成功。

example: They spent the entire summer traveling around Europe by train.
example_cn: 他們整個夏天都坐火車在歐洲各地旅行。
simple: We are planning to travel to Japan next month.
simple_cn: 我們計畫下個月去日本旅行。

example: I’m sorry, I didn’t mean to tread on your toes in the crowded bus.
example_cn: 抱歉，我不是故意在擁擠的公車上踩到你的腳。
simple: Be careful not to tread on the flowers.
simple_cn: 小心不要踩到花。

example: You should treat others as you would like to be treated yourself.
example_cn: 你希望別人怎麼對待你，你就該怎麼對待別人。
simple: They treated the incident as a joke.
simple_cn: 他們把那件事當成玩笑看待。

example: He was tricked into signing the contract without reading it carefully.
example_cn: 他被騙得沒仔細看合約就簽了字。
simple: The cat tricked me into giving it a second breakfast.
simple_cn: 那隻貓騙我給了牠第二頓早餐。

chinese: 被...絆倒 / 犯錯 / 絆倒某人
example: I tripped over a loose wire and fell down the stairs.
example_cn: 我被一條鬆脫的電線絆倒，摔下了樓梯。
simple: The clever question tripped him up during the interview.
simple_cn: 那個刁鑽的問題在面試時把他問倒了。

example: You need to trust in your own abilities if you want to succeed in life.
example_cn: 如果你想在人生中成功，就必須相信自己的能力。
simple: We trust in the power of education.
simple_cn: 我們相信教育的力量。

example: The manager is busy right now; could you try back in an hour?
example_cn: 經理現在很忙，你能不能一個小時後再打來？
simple: I'll try back tomorrow.
simple_cn: 我明天再試著聯絡看看。

example: After years of training, he decided to try for a place on the national team.
example_cn: 經過多年的訓練，他決定爭取進入國家隊的機會。
simple: She is trying for a world record.
simple_cn: 她正在挑戰世界紀錄。

example: We are trying out a new teaching method to see if it improves student engagement.
example_cn: 我們正在試用一種新的教學方法，看看能不能提升學生的參與度。
simple: He tried out for the basketball team.
simple_cn: 他參加了籃球隊的選拔。

example: The small restaurant is tucked away in a quiet alley behind the main street.
example_cn: 那間小餐館藏在大馬路後面一條安靜的巷子裡。
pattern: N + be tucked away in + 地方
simple: She has some money tucked away for emergencies.
simple_cn: 她存了一些錢以備不時之需。

chinese: 塞進 / 把 (小孩) 安頓入睡 / 開心地大吃
example: Please tuck your shirt in before you go onto the stage.
example_cn: 上台前請把你的襯衫紮進褲子裡。
simple: Dinner is served; tuck in everyone!
simple_cn: 晚餐準備好了，大家開動吧！

chinese: 收聽 / 轉台 / 不理會 / 心不在焉
example: Millions of people tuned in to watch the live broadcast of the final match.
example_cn: 數百萬人收看那場決賽的現場直播。
simple: He just tuned out during the boring speech.
simple_cn: 那場演講太無聊，他直接放空。

example: The whole town turned against him after the scandal was revealed.
example_cn: 那件醜聞曝光後，整個小鎮的人都反對他。
simple: His own family turned against him.
simple_cn: 他自己的家人反過來對付他。

example: The new manager managed to turn around the failing company within a year.
example_cn: 新任經理在一年內成功讓那家快倒閉的公司起死回生。
simple: Turn around and let me see your back.
simple_cn: 轉過來，讓我看看你的背。

example: Thousands of fans were turned away because the stadium was already full.
example_cn: 因為體育場已經客滿，好幾千名粉絲被擋在門外。
pattern: S + be turned away from + 地方
simple: She turned away so I couldn't see her tears.
simple_cn: 她轉過頭去，不讓我看見她的眼淚。

example: The weather was so bad that the hikers decided to turn back before reaching the summit.
example_cn: 天氣實在太糟了，那些登山客決定在攻頂前折返。
simple: The guards turned back the crowd.
simple_cn: 警衛擋住了人群。

chinese: 繳交 / 上床睡覺 / 投案
example: Please turn in your homework at the end of the class.
example_cn: 請在下課時交作業。
simple: I think it's time to turn in for the night.
simple_cn: 我覺得該上床睡覺了。

example: In the fairy tale, the frog turned into a handsome prince after the princess kissed him.
example_cn: 在童話故事裡，青蛙被公主親吻後變成了一位英俊的王子。
simple: The rain turned into snow.
simple_cn: 雨變成了雪。

chinese: 結果是 / 產出 / 熄滅 (燈)
example: It turned out that the rumor was completely false.
example_cn: 結果發現那個謠言完全是假的。
pattern: It + turn(ed) out that + S + V
simple: The party turned out to be a great success.
simple_cn: 這場派對結果非常成功。

example: He turned over the letter to the police as evidence.
example_cn: 他把那封信交給警方當作證據。
simple: Turn over to page 50.
simple_cn: 翻到第50頁。

chinese: 轉向 / 求助於 / 翻到
example: She always turns to her mother for advice when she is in trouble.
example_cn: 她遇到麻煩時總是向她媽媽尋求建議。
pattern: S + turn to + 人 + for + N
simple: The caterpillar turns into a butterfly.
simple_cn: 毛毛蟲會變成蝴蝶。

example: Please type in your password carefully to access your account.
example_cn: 請小心輸入你的密碼以登入帳戶。
simple: I typed in the address into the search bar.
simple_cn: 我在搜尋欄輸入了地址。

example: We’ve used up all the milk, so I’ll have to go to the grocery store.
example_cn: 我們已經把牛奶用完了，所以我得去一趟雜貨店。
simple: Playing games uses up a lot of battery.
simple_cn: 玩遊戲很耗電。

example: The invention of the internet ushered in a new era of information technology.
example_cn: 網際網路的發明開啟了資訊科技的新時代。
simple: Spring ushers in warmer weather.
simple_cn: 春天帶來了溫暖的天氣。

chinese: 為...擔保 / 擔保某人的人格
example: I can vouch for his honesty; I have known him for over ten years.
example_cn: 我可以擔保他的誠實，我認識他超過十年了。
simple: Who can vouch for her story?
simple_cn: 誰能為她的說法作證？

example: The waiter was busy waiting on a large table of customers.
example_cn: 那位服務生忙著服務一大桌客人。
simple: She is tired of waiting on her lazy brother.
simple_cn: 她受夠了伺候她那懶惰的弟弟。

chinese: 等候直到 (某事) 結束
example: We decided to stay in the cafe and wait out the storm.
example_cn: 我們決定待在咖啡館裡，等暴風雨過去。
simple: The soldiers waited out the winter in the mountains.
simple_cn: 士兵們在山區熬過了冬天。

chinese: 等候 (某人) 回家而不睡覺
example: Don't wait up for me; I'll be working late tonight at the office.
example_cn: 不用等我門，我今晚要在辦公室加班到很晚。
simple: My parents always wait up for me.
simple_cn: 我爸媽總是等我回家才睡。

chinese: 走開 / 擺脫 / (在事故中)毫髮無傷
example: He was lucky to walk away from the serious car accident without a single scratch.
example_cn: 他真的很幸運，出了那麼嚴重的車禍竟然毫髮無傷。
simple: You can't just walk away from your responsibilities.
simple_cn: 你不能就這樣逃避自己的責任。

example: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to walk in on your private meeting.
example_cn: 抱歉，我不是故意打擾你們私下開會的。
simple: He walked in on his sister while she was studying.
simple_cn: 他走進房間時，正好撞見妹妹在唸書。

chinese: 走進 / 無意中陷入 (困境)
example: We unknowingly walked into a trap set by our competitors.
example_cn: 我們不知不覺走進了競爭對手設下的圈套。
simple: She walked into a job at the bank.
simple_cn: 她很順利地在銀行找到工作。

chinese: 走掉 / 透過散步消除 (情緒/體重)
example: He was so angry that he just walked off without saying a word.
example_cn: 他氣到一句話都沒說就直接走掉了。
simple: I need to walk off this big lunch.
simple_cn: 我需要散散步消化這頓大餐。

chinese: 走出 / 罷工 / 遺棄 (某人)
example: The workers decided to walk out to protest against the poor working conditions.
example_cn: 工人們決定罷工，抗議惡劣的工作環境。
simple: He walked out on his family ten years ago.
simple_cn: 他十年前就拋下家人離開了。

example: The little boy wandered off while his mother was talking on the phone.
example_cn: 那個小男孩在他媽媽講電話的時候自己走失了。
simple: Don't wander off the point during the presentation.
simple_cn: 簡報的時候不要偏離重點。

chinese: 熱身 / (機器)預熱 / 變暖和
example: It's important to warm up before exercising to prevent muscle injuries.
example_cn: 運動前先熱身很重要，可以避免肌肉受傷。
simple: The party really warmed up after he arrived.
simple_cn: 他來了之後，派對氣氛才真的熱起來。

example: Doctors warn against eating too much processed food to maintain long-term health.
example_cn: 醫生警告不要吃太多加工食品，才能維持長期健康。
simple: The teacher warned us against cheating.
simple_cn: 老師警告我們不要作弊。

example: The weather forecast warned of heavy rain and possible flooding in low-lying areas.
example_cn: 氣象預報警告會有豪雨，低窪地區可能淹水。
simple: Scientists warned of the dangers of climate change.
simple_cn: 科學家警告氣候變遷的危險。

example: The bridge was washed away by the powerful currents during the flood.
example_cn: 那座橋在洪水期間被強勁的水流沖走了。
simple: The rain washed away the footprints.
simple_cn: 雨水沖掉了腳印。

chinese: 沖洗 (表面) / (吃藥時)順道喝水
example: He used a glass of orange juice to wash down the bitter medicine.
example_cn: 他用一杯柳橙汁把那顆很苦的藥吞下去。
pattern: S + wash + N + down + with + 飲料
simple: The rain washed down the dusty streets.
simple_cn: 雨水沖刷了灰塵滿佈的街道。

example: You should wash off the mud from your boots before entering the house.
example_cn: 你進屋前應該先把靴子上的泥巴沖乾淨。
simple: This ink won't wash off easily.
simple_cn: 這種墨水不容易洗掉。

chinese: 洗淨內部 / (雨天)使活動取消
example: The outdoor concert was washed out by a sudden thunderstorm.
example_cn: 那場戶外音樂會因為突然的雷雨而取消了。
simple: He washed out the dirty bucket.
simple_cn: 他把髒水桶沖洗乾淨。

chinese: 消瘦 / 虛弱 / 荒廢
example: The patient slowly wasted away because of the long illness.
example_cn: 那個病人因為長期生病，身體慢慢虛弱下去。
simple: Don't waste your life away in front of the TV.
simple_cn: 不要把人生浪費在電視前面。

chinese: 等待 / 尋找 / 留意
example: Drivers must watch for cyclists when turning at the corner.
example_cn: 駕駛人在轉彎時要注意騎腳踏車的人。
simple: The sailors watched for land.
simple_cn: 水手們眺望著陸地。

example: The mother bird stayed near the nest to watch over her eggs.
example_cn: 鳥媽媽待在巢附近守護她的蛋。
simple: Angels watch over you.
simple_cn: 天使守護著你。

chinese: 稀釋 / 削減 (強度/內容)
example: The politician decided to water down his proposal to get more support.
example_cn: 那位政治人物決定把提案的內容淡化，以爭取更多支持。
simple: The juice was watered down with too much ice.
simple_cn: 果汁加了太多冰，味道變得很淡。

example: The manager waved aside my concerns, saying there was nothing to worry about.
example_cn: 經理揮揮手表示不用擔心，說沒什麼好擔心的。
simple: She waved aside his apologies.
simple_cn: 她揮揮手，不把他的道歉當一回事。

example: We managed to wave down a passing taxi near the station.
example_cn: 我們在車站附近攔到了一輛經過的計程車。
simple: The hitchhiker waved down the truck.
simple_cn: 那個搭便車的人招手攔下了卡車。

example: The steps of the ancient temple have been worn away by millions of visitors.
example_cn: 這座古廟的階梯被數百萬遊客踩到磨損了。
simple: The cliffs are being worn away by the sea.
simple_cn: 這些懸崖正在被海水侵蝕。

chinese: 磨掉 / 使疲憊 / 使妥協
example: They eventually wore down the defense through constant pressure.
example_cn: 他們靠持續施壓，終於瓦解了對方的防禦。
simple: The long argument wore him down.
simple_cn: 長久的爭論讓他筋疲力盡。

example: The painkiller started to wear off after about four hours.
example_cn: 止痛藥大概過了四個小時就開始退效了。
simple: The novelty of the new toy soon wore off.
simple_cn: 新玩具的新鮮感很快就沒了。

chinese: 壓低 / 使沉重 / 使憂心忡忡
example: She was weighed down by heavy bags as she walked home from the store.
example_cn: 她從商店走回家時，被沉重的袋子壓得喘不過氣。
pattern: S + be weighed down by + N
simple: Responsibility weighed him down.
simple_cn: 責任感讓他壓力很大。

example: The guilt of keeping the secret began to weigh on his mind.
example_cn: 隱瞞秘密的罪惡感開始壓在他心頭。
simple: Current problems are weighing on her.
simple_cn: 目前的問題讓她很煩惱。

example: You should carefully weigh up the pros and cons before making a decision.
example_cn: 做決定之前，你應該仔細權衡利弊。
simple: He's weighing up his chances of winning.
simple_cn: 他正在盤算自己贏的機會有多大。

chinese: 歡迎來到 / 隨意使用
example: You are welcome to borrow my notes whenever you miss a class.
example_cn: 你缺課的時候，隨時都可以來跟我借筆記。
simple: Welcome to our home!
simple_cn: 歡迎來我們家！

chinese: 迅速取出 / 匆忙做出 / 激起 (情感)
example: She managed to whip up a delicious meal in just thirty minutes.
example_cn: 她只花了三十分鐘就變出一頓美味的飯菜。
simple: He whipped out his credit card to pay.
simple_cn: 他迅速掏出信用卡來付錢。

chinese: 放鬆 / 逐漸結束 (營運)
example: I like to listen to soft music to help me wind down after a long day at work.
example_cn: 我喜歡聽輕柔的音樂，讓自己在忙碌一天後放鬆下來。
simple: The company is winding down its overseas operations.
simple_cn: 這家公司正在逐步縮減海外業務。

chinese: 結束 / 最終落得 / 惹惱 (某人)
example: They wound up the meeting around six o'clock as everyone was tired.
example_cn: 會議大概在六點左右結束，因為大家都累了。
pattern: S + wind up + V-ing/介系詞片語
simple: If you keep stealing, you'll wind up in jail.
simple_cn: 如果你繼續偷東西，最後一定會進監獄。

example: The little boy wiped away his tears and started to smile again.
example_cn: 小男孩擦乾眼淚，又開始笑了起來。
simple: Wipe that smile off your face!
simple_cn: 把你那笑容給我收起來！

chinese: 徹底摧毀 / 消滅 / 使精疲力竭
example: The earthquake wiped out several small villages near the epicenter.
example_cn: 地震摧毀了震央附近的幾個小村莊。
simple: The flu wiped me out for a week.
simple_cn: 流感讓我整整一個禮拜都虛脫了。

example: He didn't have much, but he couldn't wish for a better family.
example_cn: 他擁有的不多，但再也找不到比這更好的家庭了。
simple: She closed her eyes and wished for a miracle.
simple_cn: 她閉上眼睛，祈求奇蹟發生。

example: The engineers had to find a way to work around the software bug.
example_cn: 工程師們得想辦法繞過這個軟體漏洞。
simple: We can work around your schedule.
simple_cn: 我們可以配合你的時間來安排。

chinese: 透過體力消耗 (熱量/壓力/債務)
example: He went to the gym to work off some of the energy he had accumulated all day.
example_cn: 他去健身房消耗掉一整天累積的精力。
simple: I need to work off this huge pizza.
simple_cn: 我需要運動消耗掉這個大披薩。

example: The scientists are currently working on a new treatment for cancer.
example_cn: 科學家們目前正在研發一種新的癌症療法。
simple: He is working on his parents to let him go.
simple_cn: 他正在說服爸媽讓他去。

chinese: 克服 / 處理 (複雜問題)
example: The couple is going to therapy to work through their relationship problems.
example_cn: 這對伴侶正在接受諮商，試著解決他們的感情問題。
simple: We need to work through this pile of paperwork.
simple_cn: 我們得把這堆文書工作處理完。

example: The two countries are working toward a peaceful resolution to the conflict.
example_cn: 這兩個國家正致力於和平解決這場衝突。
simple: I am working toward my degree.
simple_cn: 我正在努力取得學位。

chinese: 激發 (食慾/勇氣) / 逐漸發展
example: The long walk in the fresh air really worked up my appetite.
example_cn: 在戶外新鮮空氣中走了那麼久，真的讓我胃口大開。
simple: She finally worked up the courage to say no.
simple_cn: 她終於鼓起勇氣說不。

example: Don't worry about the small mistakes; focus on the overall quality of your work.
example_cn: 別太在意那些小錯誤，專注在你作品的整體品質上就好。
simple: There is no need to worry about me.
simple_cn: 不用擔心我。

chinese: 包裝 / 圓滿結束 / 穿得暖和
example: Let's wrap up the meeting now so that everyone can go home early.
example_cn: 我們現在就結束會議吧，這樣大家就能早點回家。
simple: Make sure you wrap up warm; it's freezing outside.
simple_cn: 記得穿暖一點，外面冷死了。

example: You should write down the instructions so that you don't forget them later.
example_cn: 你應該把步驟寫下來，免得之後忘記。
simple: Write down your name and address here.
simple_cn: 在這裡寫下你的姓名和地址。

chinese: 報廢 / 勾銷 (債務) / 認為...無用
example: The car was completely crushed in the accident and had to be written off.
example_cn: 那輛車在車禍中被撞得全毀，只能報廢處理。
simple: Don't write him off just yet; he might surprise you.
simple_cn: 先別把他看扁了，他搞不好會讓你驚豔。

example: The government eventually yielded to public pressure and changed the law.
example_cn: 政府最終屈服於公眾壓力，修改了法律。
simple: The old building yielded to the wrecking ball.
simple_cn: 那棟舊大樓被拆除了。

chinese: 鎖定目標 / 集中注意力於...
example: The researchers are trying to zero in on the exact cause of the disease.
example_cn: 研究人員正試圖鎖定這種疾病的確切病因。
simple: The detective zeroed in on the main suspect.
simple_cn: 偵探鎖定了主要嫌疑人。

example: I'm sorry, I completely zoned out for a moment and didn't hear your question.
example_cn: 抱歉，我剛剛完全恍神了一下，沒聽到你的問題。
simple: The boring lecture made me zone out.
simple_cn: 那堂課無聊到讓我放空。

chinese: 放大 / 縮小 (鏡頭或畫面)
example: Can you zoom in on the map to show the exact location of the restaurant?
example_cn: 你能把地圖放大，顯示餐廳的確實位置嗎？
simple: The photographer zoomed out to capture the whole scene.
simple_cn: 攝影師拉遠鏡頭，拍下整個場景。

chinese: 拉上拉鍊 / 閉嘴 (粗魯)
example: Please zip up your jacket before you go outside into the cold air.
example_cn: 出去外面吹冷風前，請先把你的外套拉鍊拉好。
simple: Zip it up! (閉嘴！)
simple_cn: 閉嘴啦！

example: The dentist had to yank out the rotten tooth because it was causing too much pain.
example_cn: 牙醫不得不把那顆蛀牙拔掉，因為它實在太痛了。
simple: He yanked the cord out of the wall.
simple_cn: 他一把把電線從牆上扯下來。

example: Living in the noisy city, she often yearns for the peace and quiet of the countryside.
example_cn: 住在喧囂的城市裡，她常常渴望鄉下的寧靜與安詳。
simple: The prisoners yearned for freedom.
simple_cn: 囚犯們渴望自由。

chinese: 與...摔角 / 苦苦思索 (難題)
example: I’ve been wrestling with this math problem all morning, but I still can't find the answer.
example_cn: 我整個早上都在跟這道數學題糾纏，還是找不到答案。
simple: He is wrestling with a difficult decision.
simple_cn: 他正在為一個困難的決定糾結。

example: Make sure you wring out the wet cloth thoroughly before wiping the table.
example_cn: 擦桌子之前，記得先把濕布擰乾。
simple: She wrung out her swimsuit.
simple_cn: 她把泳衣擰乾。

example: The politician managed to win over many young voters with his inspiring speech.
example_cn: 那位政治人物用一場鼓舞人心的演說，成功贏得了許多年輕選民的支持。
simple: He's trying to win back his ex-girlfriend.
simple_cn: 他正在努力挽回前女友。

chinese: 縮手 / 畏縮 / 退縮 (非正式)
example: He was going to go bungee jumping, but he wimped out at the last minute.
example_cn: 他本來要去玩高空彈跳，但最後一刻卻臨陣退縮了。
simple: Don't wimp out now!
simple_cn: 現在別給我退縮！

chinese: 剔除 / 淘汰 (不合格者)
example: The preliminary interview is designed to weed out unsuitable candidates.
example_cn: 初步面試的目的是要篩掉不合適的應徵者。
simple: We need to weed out the bad ideas.
simple_cn: 我們得淘汰掉那些爛點子。

chinese: 避開 / 防護 (疾病/危險)
example: Some people believe that eating garlic can help ward off a cold.
example_cn: 有些人相信吃大蒜有助於預防感冒。
simple: She carried an umbrella to ward off the sun.
simple_cn: 她帶了把傘來遮陽。

chinese: 涉水而行 / 費力閱讀 (大量資料)
example: I had to wade through a mountain of paperwork before I could start the actual project.
example_cn: 在開始實際專案之前，我得先處理完堆積如山的文書作業。
simple: They waded through the deep floodwater.
simple_cn: 他們涉水穿過深水區。

chinese: 解釋 / 說明原因 / 佔...比例
example: Renewable energy now accounts for about twenty percent of the nation's electricity.
example_cn: 再生能源目前約占全國用電量的百分之二十。
simple: He couldn't account for the missing money.
simple_cn: 他無法解釋那筆錢為什麼不見了。

example: After months of traveling, he was aching for a home-cooked meal.
example_cn: 旅行了好幾個月後，他非常渴望能吃到一頓家常菜。
simple: Her heart ached for the starving children.
simple_cn: 她看到那些挨餓的孩子，心裡很難過。

chinese: 根據...行動 / 對...起作用
example: The police acted on a tip from an anonymous caller to catch the criminal.
example_cn: 警方根據匿名舉報的線索採取行動，順利逮捕了罪犯。
simple: Alcohol acts on the brain.
simple_cn: 酒精會影響大腦。

example: My old computer is acting up again; I think it's time to buy a new one.
example_cn: 我這台舊電腦又開始鬧脾氣了，我覺得是時候買一台新的。
simple: The kids usually act up when they are tired.
simple_cn: 小孩累的時候通常會開始鬧脾氣。

chinese: 加總 / 合理 / 說得通
example: The numbers he gave just don't add up; there must be a mistake in the calculations.
example_cn: 他給的那些數字根本兜不起來，計算上一定有問題。
simple: His story doesn't add up.
simple_cn: 他的說法根本對不上。

chinese: 堅持 / 遵守 / 黏附於
example: Members of the club must adhere to the rules or they will be asked to leave.
example_cn: 俱樂部的會員必須遵守規定，否則就會被要求離開。
simple: The glue adheres to most surfaces.
simple_cn: 這種膠水可以黏住大部分的表面。

example: It took the exchange students a few weeks to adjust to the local food and weather.
example_cn: 這些交換學生花了幾個星期才適應當地的食物和天氣。
simple: I need to adjust to my new schedule.
simple_cn: 我需要適應新的作息時間。

example: You should always aim for excellence in everything you do.
example_cn: 你做任何事都應該力求做到最好。
simple: We are aiming for a 20 percent increase in sales.
simple_cn: 我們的目標是讓業績成長兩成。

example: When making a travel plan, you should always allow for possible delays at the airport.
example_cn: 規劃旅行時，一定要把機場可能發生的延誤時間算進去。
simple: The design allows for future expansion.
simple_cn: 這個設計有預留未來擴充的空間。

example: In her speech, she alluded to the problems without mentioning them directly.
example_cn: 她在演講中暗示了那些問題，但沒有直接說出來。
simple: He alluded to the accident several times.
simple_cn: 他好幾次暗示那場意外。

example: The total cost of the project will amount to nearly one million dollars.
example_cn: 這個專案的總成本將達到將近一百萬美元。
simple: His silence amounts to an admission of guilt.
simple_cn: 他的沉默等於是承認有罪。

example: The child was punished for answering back to his parents in a rude manner.
example_cn: 那個小孩因為沒大沒小地頂撞父母而受到處罰。
simple: She was disciplined for answering back the teacher.
simple_cn: 她因為頂撞老師而被處罰。

chinese: 吸引 / 呼籲 / 訴諸於
example: This new type of smartphone is designed to appeal to the younger generation.
example_cn: 這款新型智慧型手機是為了吸引年輕族群而設計的。
simple: The charity appealed to the public for donations.
simple_cn: 這個慈善機構向大眾募款。

example: After hours of negotiation, the two sides finally arrived at a compromise.
example_cn: 經過好幾個小時的協商，雙方終於達成了一個妥協方案。
pattern: S + arrive at + 地方/結論
simple: We arrived at the station on time.
simple_cn: 我們準時抵達車站。

chinese: 問候 (某人) / 到處打聽
example: My grandmother always asks after you whenever I visit her.
example_cn: 我奶奶每次我去看她，都會問起你的近況。
simple: I asked around, but nobody had seen my cat.
simple_cn: 我到處問過了，但沒人看到我的貓。

example: Many young athletes aspire to represent their country in the Olympic Games.
example_cn: 許多年輕運動員都渴望代表自己的國家參加奧運。
simple: She aspires to a career in medicine.
simple_cn: 她立志要從事醫療行業。

chinese: 處理 / 照料 / 注意聽
example: I have some urgent business to attend to before I can join you for dinner.
example_cn: 我有一些急事要先處理，才能跟你一起去吃晚餐。
simple: A nurse attended to his wounds.
simple_cn: 有位護士幫他處理傷口。

chinese: 後退 / 認輸 / 退出 (協議)
example: The company decided to back out of the agreement at the last minute.
example_cn: 這間公司在最後一刻決定退出這份協議。
simple: The protest made the government back down.
simple_cn: 這場抗議讓政府讓步了。

chinese: 保釋 / 紓困 (經濟) / 跳傘逃生
example: The government had to bail out the large bank to prevent a financial collapse.
example_cn: 政府不得不紓困那間大銀行，以防止金融崩盤。
simple: His father bailed him out of jail.
simple_cn: 他爸爸把他從監獄保釋出來。

example: You shouldn't bank on the weather being good for our outdoor wedding.
example_cn: 你不該指望我們戶外婚禮那天會是好天氣。
simple: I'm banking on your help to finish this.
simple_cn: 我指望你幫忙才能完成這件事。

chinese: 耐心對待 / 容忍 (暫時的麻煩)
example: Please bear with me for a moment while I try to find the correct file.
example_cn: 請你稍等我一下，我試著找出正確的檔案。
simple: If you'll just bear with me, I'll explain everything.
simple_cn: 只要你耐心聽我說，我會把一切都解釋清楚。

example: The sun was beating down on the runners throughout the entire race.
example_cn: 整個比賽過程中，太陽一直火辣辣地曬在跑者身上。
pattern: The sun + be beating down (on + 人)
simple: I managed to beat the seller down to $50.
simple_cn: 我成功把賣家的價格殺到50美元。

example: He was badly beaten up by a gang of youths while walking home late at night.
example_cn: 他深夜走路回家時，被一群年輕人狠狠揍了一頓。
simple: Don't beat yourself up over one mistake.
simple_cn: 別因為一個錯誤就苛責自己。

chinese: 發生...情況 / 結局如何
example: I haven't seen her for ten years; I wonder what has become of her.
example_cn: 我已經十年沒見到她了，不知道她現在過得怎麼樣。
simple: What will become of the old building?
simple_cn: 那棟舊建築物會變成怎樣？

chinese: 加強 / 充實 (力量、規模)
example: The city decided to beef up security at the airport following the recent threats.
example_cn: 最近發生威脅事件後，市政府決定加強機場的維安。
simple: The company needs to beef up its marketing team.
simple_cn: 公司需要加強行銷團隊。

example: To begin with, I would like to thank everyone for coming to this meeting today.
example_cn: 首先，我要感謝大家今天來參加這場會議。
simple: The word 'apple' begins with an 'A'.
simple_cn: 「蘋果」這個字是以A開頭。

example: She stood on the stage and belted out a popular song with incredible energy.
example_cn: 她站在台上，用驚人的活力高唱了一首流行歌。
simple: The band was belting out jazz tunes.
simple_cn: 那個樂團正在大聲演奏爵士樂。

example: He had to bend over to pick up the keys he had dropped on the floor.
example_cn: 他得彎腰撿起掉在地上的鑰匙。
simple: She bent over the counter to see the display.
simple_cn: 她彎腰靠向櫃檯看展示品。

example: You shouldn't bet on the team winning the championship after so many injuries.
example_cn: 球隊傷兵這麼多，你不該賭他們會贏得冠軍。
simple: I wouldn't bet on his honesty.
simple_cn: 我不會賭他誠實。

example: Many people tend to binge on junk food when they feel stressed or tired.
example_cn: 很多人壓力大或疲憊時，會忍不住狂吃垃圾食物。
simple: They spent the whole day binging on Netflix.
simple_cn: 他們一整天都在Netflix上追劇。

chinese: 昏厥 / 封鎖消息 / 停電
example: The patient blacked out for a few seconds due to the sudden drop in blood pressure.
example_cn: 病人因為血壓突然下降，昏過去了幾秒鐘。
simple: The whole city blacked out during the storm.
simple_cn: 暴風雨期間整個城市都停電了。

example: The space shuttle is scheduled to blast off tomorrow morning at exactly 10 a.m.
example_cn: 太空梭預計明天早上十點整發射升空。
simple: We are ready to blast off.
simple_cn: 我們準備好要發射了。

example: The main road was blocked off by the police after the chemical spill.
example_cn: 化學物質外洩後，警方封鎖了主要道路。
simple: Demonstrators blocked off the city center.
simple_cn: 抗議者封鎖了市中心。

chinese: 吹走 / 使大吃一驚 / 輕易擊敗
example: The performance was so powerful that it completely blew the audience away.
example_cn: 那場表演太震撼了，完全讓觀眾驚豔不已。
simple: The wind blew the dry leaves away.
simple_cn: 風把枯葉吹走了。

example: She closed her eyes and blew out the candles on her birthday cake.
example_cn: 她閉上眼睛，吹熄了生日蛋糕上的蠟燭。
simple: The front tire blew out on the highway.
simple_cn: 前輪在高速公路上爆胎了。

example: I hope the scandal will blow over quickly so the company can return to normal.
example_cn: 我希望這樁醜聞能趕快平息，讓公司恢復正常運作。
simple: The crisis eventually blew over.
simple_cn: 危機最後終於平息了。

example: The residents began to board up their windows before the hurricane reached the coast.
example_cn: 颶風抵達海岸前，居民們開始用木板封住窗戶。
simple: Many shops were boarded up during the riots.
simple_cn: 暴動期間很多店家都用木板封起來。

chinese: 歸結為 / 基本要素是...
example: The entire argument boils down to a simple misunderstanding between the two friends.
example_cn: 整場爭論歸根究柢，只是兩個朋友之間的誤會。
simple: The problem boils down to lack of communication.
simple_cn: 問題歸根究底就是缺乏溝通。

chinese: 增強 / 支持 / 改善
example: The government took measures to bolster up the economy during the recession.
example_cn: 經濟衰退期間，政府採取措施來提振經濟。
simple: She tried to bolster up his confidence.
simple_cn: 她試圖提振他的信心。

chinese: 鄰接 / 接近於 (某特質)
example: His extreme behavior borders on madness, which concerns his family deeply.
example_cn: 他極端的行為近乎瘋狂，讓家人非常擔心。
simple: Our garden borders on the forest.
simple_cn: 我們的花園緊鄰森林。

example: It is not healthy to bottle up your emotions; you should talk to someone you trust.
example_cn: 把情緒悶在心裡不健康，你應該找個信任的人聊聊。
simple: She bottled up her anger for years.
simple_cn: 她多年來一直壓抑著怒氣。

example: The economy is showing signs of bouncing back after a long period of decline.
example_cn: 經濟在長期衰退後，開始出現復甦的跡象。
simple: Children often bounce back from illness quickly.
simple_cn: 小孩生病後通常很快就能恢復。

chinese: 退出 / 退休 (不再參與)
example: After thirty years in politics, the senator decided it was time to bow out.
example_cn: 從政三十年後，這位參議員決定是時候退出了。
simple: She bowed out of the race for personal reasons.
simple_cn: 她因為個人因素退出比賽。

chinese: 擴展業務 / 涉足 (新領域)
example: The small coffee shop is planning to branch out into serving lunch next month.
example_cn: 那間小咖啡店打算下個月開始擴展，中午也賣午餐。
simple: I'm thinking of branching out on my own.
simple_cn: 我在考慮自己出來單幹。

chinese: 脫離 / 逃脫 / 斷掉
example: A group of members decided to break away and form their own organization.
example_cn: 一群成員決定脫離，自己另外成立一個組織。
simple: The horse broke away from the rider.
simple_cn: 那匹馬掙脫了騎手。

example: The new business finally managed to break even after its first year of operation.
example_cn: 那家新公司經營第一年後，終於打平了收支。
simple: We hope to break even by next month.
simple_cn: 我們希望下個月能打平。

example: He decided to break with tradition and get married on the beach instead of a church.
example_cn: 他決定打破傳統，不在教堂而是在海邊結婚。
simple: He has broken with his former friends.
simple_cn: 他跟以前的朋友斷絕了往來。

chinese: 使甦醒 / 說服 (轉變心意)
example: We used smelling salts to bring him around after he fainted in the heat.
example_cn: 他在大太陽底下昏倒後，我們用嗅鹽讓他醒過來。
simple: It took time, but I finally brought him around to my way of thinking.
simple_cn: 花了一些時間，但我終於說服他接受我的想法。

chinese: 擊落 / 降低價格 / 推翻 (政府)
example: The scandal eventually brought down the powerful government after months of protests.
example_cn: 經過幾個月的抗議，那樁醜聞最終搞垮了那個有權勢的政府。
simple: We must work hard to bring down the cost of living.
simple_cn: 我們必須努力降低生活成本。

example: It was a difficult task, but he managed to bring it off successfully.
example_cn: 那是個困難的任務，但他還是成功完成了。
simple: They brought off a surprise victory.
simple_cn: 他們意外贏得了一場勝利。

chinese: 引起 (疾病/不快) / 使發展
example: The sudden change in weather might bring on a cold if you don't dress warmly.
example_cn: 天氣突然變化，如果你穿得不夠暖，可能會引發感冒。
simple: Stress can bring on a panic attack.
simple_cn: 壓力可能會引發恐慌發作。

chinese: 不予理會 / 漠視 (問題/批評)
example: The manager brushed aside our suggestions, saying they were too expensive.
example_cn: 經理對我們的建議置之不理，說那些提議太貴了。
simple: She brushed aside his apologies.
simple_cn: 她對他的道歉置之不理。

example: I need to brush up on my Spanish before I go to Madrid next month.
example_cn: 下個月去馬德里之前，我需要複習一下我的西班牙文。
pattern: S + need to brush up on + N
simple: I should brush up on my computer skills.
simple_cn: 我應該加強一下我的電腦技能。

example: The exams are next week, so it is time to buckle down and study hard.
example_cn: 下週就要考試了，所以是時候認真起來好好念書了。
simple: They buckled down to finish the project.
simple_cn: 他們全力以赴完成了那個專案。

example: For your safety, please buckle up as soon as you get into the car.
example_cn: 為了你的安全，一上車就請繫好安全帶。
simple: Everyone was buckled up and ready to go.
simple_cn: 每個人都繫好安全帶，準備出發。

example: We need to build on our early success to reach a wider audience.
example_cn: 我們需要趁著初期成功繼續努力，才能接觸到更多觀眾。
simple: This theory builds on his previous research.
simple_cn: 這個理論是建立在他先前研究的基礎上。

example: You should bundle up before you go outside into the freezing cold.
example_cn: 你應該穿暖和一點再出門，外面冷得要命。
simple: The nurse bundled the baby up in a blanket.
simple_cn: 護士用毯子把嬰兒裹得緊緊的。

example: The whole class burst into laughter after the teacher told a funny joke.
example_cn: 老師講了一個好笑的笑話後，全班哄堂大笑。
simple: The building suddenly burst into flames.
simple_cn: 那棟建築突然陷入火海。

example: I was talking to my sister when he rudely butted in without even saying excuse me.
example_cn: 我正在跟我妹妹講話，他連句「不好意思」都沒說就插嘴進來。
simple: Don't butt in while I'm on the phone!
simple_cn: 我在講電話時不要插嘴！

example: He’s trying to butter up the manager because he wants a promotion next month.
example_cn: 他一直在拍經理馬屁，因為他下個月想升職。
simple: Are you trying to butter me up?
simple_cn: 你是不是想拍我馬屁？

chinese: 相信 / 接受 (理論、主意)
example: I don't really buy into the theory that aliens built the pyramids.
example_cn: 我不太相信外星人建造金字塔的那套說法。
simple: She hasn't bought into the new philosophy yet.
simple_cn: 她還沒有接受這個新理念。

chinese: 召來 / 順道拜訪 / (打電話)請假
example: He had to call in sick this morning because he had a high fever.
example_cn: 他今天早上因為發高燒，只好打電話請病假。
simple: They called in the experts to help.
simple_cn: 他們請來了專家幫忙。

example: The two factors cancel each other out, so the result remains unchanged.
example_cn: 這兩個因素互相抵消，所以結果維持不變。
pattern: A and B cancel each other out
simple: The noise and the music cancel out.
simple_cn: 噪音和音樂互相抵消了。

chinese: 成功完成 (難事) / 奪走 (生命)
example: It was a difficult role to play, but the actress managed to carry it off brilliantly.
example_cn: 這個角色不好演，但那位女演員還是成功駕馭了，表現得非常出色。
simple: The disease carried off millions of victims.
simple_cn: 這場疾病奪走了數百萬人的性命。

example: The tension between the two countries carried over into the next decade.
example_cn: 兩國之間的緊張局勢一直延續到下一個十年。
simple: Unused holidays can be carried over to next year.
simple_cn: 沒用完的假期可以順延到明年。

chinese: 開創 (事業) / 艱苦獲得
example: She managed to carve out a successful career as a photographer in the city.
example_cn: 她在這座城市裡成功闖出了一條攝影師的路。
simple: They carved out a kingdom in the wilderness.
simple_cn: 他們在荒野中開創了一個王國。

example: Local businesses are trying to cash in on the thousands of tourists visiting for the festival.
example_cn: 當地店家都想趁著節慶期間，從成千上萬的觀光客身上大賺一筆。
simple: The company cashed in on the latest trend.
simple_cn: 這間公司趁著最新潮流大賺一筆。

chinese: 搜尋 / 尋求 (藉口、解決方案)
example: The management is casting about for new ways to reduce the company's production costs.
example_cn: 管理階層正在四處尋找降低公司生產成本的新方法。
simple: He cast about for an excuse for being late.
simple_cn: 他四處找藉口解釋自己為什麼遲到。

example: He cast aside his fears and finally decided to skydive for the first time.
example_cn: 他拋開恐懼，終於決定第一次挑戰高空跳傘。
simple: You should cast aside your prejudices.
simple_cn: 你應該拋開你的偏見。

chinese: 發覺 (某人) 犯錯 / 使落入窘境
example: The interviewer tried to catch her out with a series of tricky questions.
example_cn: 面試官試圖用一連串刁鑽的問題來抓她的語病。
simple: I was caught out by the sudden rain.
simple_cn: 我被突如其來的大雨困住了。

example: The roof of the old building caved in after the heavy snowfall.
example_cn: 那棟老舊建築的屋頂在大雪過後塌陷了。
simple: The government eventually caved in to the protesters' demands.
simple_cn: 政府最終還是順應了抗議者的要求。

example: The discussion centered on the importance of renewable energy for the future.
example_cn: 討論的重點圍繞在再生能源對未來的重要性上。
simple: His entire life centers on his research.
simple_cn: 他整個人生都圍繞著他的研究。

example: While walking in the forest, we chanced upon a hidden waterfall.
example_cn: 我們在森林裡散步時，意外發現了一座隱藏的瀑布。
simple: I chanced upon an old friend at the airport.
simple_cn: 我在機場偶然遇到了一位老朋友。

example: The suspect was officially charged with theft and will appear in court tomorrow.
example_cn: 這名嫌犯被正式指控偷竊，明天將出庭應訊。
simple: She was charged with managing the new department.
simple_cn: 她被指派負責管理新部門。

example: He was expelled from school after he was caught cheating on the final exam.
example_cn: 他因為期末考作弊被抓，被學校開除了。
simple: She would never cheat on her husband.
simple_cn: 她絕對不會背叛她的丈夫。

example: We need to check into the hotel before we head out for dinner.
example_cn: 我們得先到飯店辦理入住，然後再出門吃晚餐。
simple: The police are checking into his alibi.
simple_cn: 警方正在調查他的不在場證明。

example: I bought her some flowers to cheer her up after she failed the test.
example_cn: 她考試沒考好，我買了一些花給她，想讓她開心一點。
simple: Cheer up! Things will get better.
simple_cn: 打起精神來！事情會好轉的。

example: I need some time to chew over the job offer before I give you my final answer.
example_cn: 我需要一些時間好好考慮這份工作機會，才能給你最終答覆。
simple: Let me chew it over for a few days.
simple_cn: 讓我想個幾天再決定。

example: He was going to ask her on a date, but he chickened out at the last minute.
example_cn: 他本來想約她出去，但最後一刻卻臨陣退縮了。
simple: Don't chicken out now!
simple_cn: 現在可別臨陣退縮啊！

example: Everyone at the meeting chimes in with their own suggestions for the party.
example_cn: 會議上每個人都踴躍提出自己對派對的建議。
simple: He chickened in to support my idea.
simple_cn: 他鼓起勇氣支持我的想法。

example: She tried to choke back her tears while delivering the sad news.
example_cn: 她在宣布這個壞消息時，努力忍住不讓眼淚掉下來。
simple: He choked back his anger and remained silent.
simple_cn: 他忍住怒氣，保持沉默。

example: He got all choked up when he started talking about his late grandfather.
example_cn: 他一談到已故的祖父，就忍不住哽咽了起來。
simple: The pipes were choked up with grease.
simple_cn: 水管被油垢堵住了。

chinese: 突然沉默 / 拒絕說話
example: The suspect clammed up as soon as the lawyer entered the room.
example_cn: 律師一走進房間，那名嫌犯就立刻閉嘴不說話了。
simple: Whenever I ask about his past, he clams up.
simple_cn: 每次我問起他的過去，他就閉口不談。

example: The police are planning to clamp down on illegal street racing this weekend.
example_cn: 警方計畫這個週末要大力取締非法街頭賽車。
simple: The government is clamping down on tax evasion.
simple_cn: 政府正在嚴查逃漏稅。

example: Please help me clear away the dishes after we finish dinner.
example_cn: 吃完晚餐後，請幫我收拾碗盤。
simple: Clear off! I'm busy.
simple_cn: 閃一邊去！我正忙。

example: We need to clear out the attic before we move to the new house.
example_cn: 我們搬去新家之前，得先把閣樓清空。
simple: I told the intruders to clear out.
simple_cn: 我叫那些闖入者滾出去。

chinese: 爬下 / 認輸 / 讓步
example: The government was forced to climb down and change its controversial policy.
example_cn: 政府被迫讓步，改變了那項爭議政策。
simple: He climbed down from his ladder.
simple_cn: 他從梯子上爬了下來。

example: The police were closing in on the suspect when he suddenly surrendered.
example_cn: 警方正要逼近嫌犯時，他突然投降了。
pattern: S + close in on + 人/物
simple: Winter is closing in.
simple_cn: 冬天快來了。

example: The sky suddenly clouded over, so we decided to cancel the picnic.
example_cn: 天空突然轉陰，所以我們決定取消野餐。
simple: His face clouded over when he heard the bad news.
simple_cn: 他聽到壞消息時，臉色一沉。

example: You can't just coast along in life; you need to have a clear goal.
example_cn: 你不能一輩子得過且過，要有明確的目標。
simple: The car was coasting along the quiet road.
simple_cn: 那輛車沿著安靜的道路滑行。

example: They managed to cobble together a plan at the last minute.
example_cn: 他們在最後一刻勉強湊出一個計畫。
simple: The report was cobbled together from various sources.
simple_cn: 這份報告是東拼西湊出來的。

chinese: 仔細搜尋 / 梳理 (資料)
example: Detectives are combing through the evidence to find any useful clues.
example_cn: 偵探們正在仔細搜查證據，想找出有用的線索。
simple: I spent hours combing through old newspapers.
simple_cn: 我花了幾個小時翻閱舊報紙。

chinese: 碎裂 / 散架 / (關係)破裂
example: The old book started to come apart after many years of use.
example_cn: 那本舊書用了好幾年，開始散頁了。
simple: Their marriage is coming apart.
simple_cn: 他們的婚姻正在破裂。

chinese: 甦醒 / 改變心意 / 順道拜訪
example: He fainted during the race, but he came around after a few minutes.
example_cn: 他在比賽中昏倒，但幾分鐘後就醒了過來。
simple: He'll come around to our point of view eventually.
simple_cn: 他最終會接受我們的觀點。

chinese: 離間 / 阻礙 (兩者關係)
example: Don't let a silly argument come between you and your best friend.
example_cn: 別讓一場無謂的爭吵破壞你跟你最好朋友的感情。
pattern: S + come between + A and B
simple: Money should never come between us.
simple_cn: 錢不該影響我們的關係。

example: Good opportunities are hard to come by, so you must grab them when they appear.
example_cn: 好機會難得，出現時一定要把握住。
pattern: N + be hard to come by
simple: How did you come by this information?
simple_cn: 你是怎麼得到這個資訊的？

example: The government has come in for a lot of criticism over its new environmental policy.
example_cn: 政府因為新的環保政策，挨了不少批評。
simple: He came in for a lot of abuse.
simple_cn: 他挨了一頓臭罵。

example: The surprise party came off perfectly and everyone had a great time.
example_cn: 驚喜派對辦得很成功，每個人都玩得很開心。
simple: The button came off my coat.
simple_cn: 我外套的釦子掉了。

example: She suddenly came out with a very surprising suggestion during the meeting.
example_cn: 會議中她突然冒出一個非常令人驚訝的建議。
simple: The company has come out with a new product.
simple_cn: 這家公司推出了一款新產品。

chinese: 總計 / 甦醒 / 談到
example: The total bill for the dinner came to one hundred dollars.
example_cn: 晚餐總共花了一百美元。
simple: When it comes to music, he knows everything.
simple_cn: 說到音樂，他無所不知。

chinese: 屬於...類別 / 遭到 (攻擊/壓力)
example: The project came under a lot of pressure to be finished by the end of the year.
example_cn: 這個專案承受了要在年底前完成的巨大壓力。
simple: This item comes under the heading of 'miscellaneous'.
simple_cn: 這個項目歸類在「其他」項下。

example: You shouldn't compare yourself to others; focus on your own progress instead.
example_cn: 你不該跟別人比較，專注在自己的進步就好。
simple: Life is often compared to a journey.
simple_cn: 人生常被比喻為一趟旅程。

example: The young athlete is excited to compete in the Olympic Games for the first time.
example_cn: 這位年輕運動員很興奮能首次參加奧運比賽。
simple: They are competing against the best team in the league.
simple_cn: 他們正在跟聯盟最強的隊伍競爭。

example: The patient complained of a severe headache and was taken to the hospital.
example_cn: 病人抱怨頭痛得很厲害，被送去了醫院。
simple: He complained of feeling dizzy.
simple_cn: 他抱怨說覺得頭暈。

example: It is difficult to concentrate on your work when there is so much noise outside.
example_cn: 外面那麼吵，真的很難專心工作。
simple: She concentrated on finishing the task.
simple_cn: 她專心在完成那項任務。

example: A balanced diet should consist of a variety of different food groups.
example_cn: 均衡飲食應該包含各種不同的食物類別。
simple: The team consists of ten members.
simple_cn: 這個團隊由十個成員組成。

example: Smoking significantly contributes to the development of many serious diseases.
example_cn: 抽菸是導致許多重大疾病的重要因素。
simple: We all contributed to the charity.
simple_cn: 我們都有捐款給那個慈善機構。

example: The old warehouse was converted into a modern apartment complex last year.
example_cn: 那間舊倉庫去年被改建成現代化的公寓大樓。
simple: The plant converts sunlight into energy.
simple_cn: 植物把陽光轉換成能量。

chinese: 編造 (藉口/故事) / 烹調
example: He cooked up a complicated excuse for being late to the meeting.
example_cn: 他為了開會遲到，編了一個很複雜的藉口。
simple: What are you cooking up in the kitchen?
simple_cn: 你在廚房裡煮什麼好料？

example: Wait for the soup to cool down before you try a spoonful.
example_cn: 等湯涼一點再喝一口。
simple: After the argument, he went for a walk to cool off.
simple_cn: 吵架之後，他去散步讓自己冷靜下來。

example: Citizens are encouraged to cooperate with the police during the investigation.
example_cn: 調查期間，鼓勵民眾配合警方辦案。
simple: The two countries cooperated with each other on the project.
simple_cn: 這兩個國家在那個計畫上互相合作。

example: It can be difficult to cope with the pressure of high school exams.
example_cn: 應付高中考試的壓力有時候真的很難。
pattern: S + know how to cope with + N
simple: She is coping well with her new job.
simple_cn: 她適應新工作適應得很好。

example: The students were copying down the notes from the whiteboard into their notebooks.
example_cn: 學生們正在把白板上的筆記抄到自己的筆記本裡。
simple: Please copy down the assignment.
simple_cn: 請把作業抄下來。

example: The police cordoned off the area around the crime scene to preserve evidence.
example_cn: 警方封鎖了案發現場周邊區域，以保存證據。
simple: The street was cordoned off for the marathon.
simple_cn: 那條街因為馬拉松比賽被封鎖了。

example: The figures in the report correspond to the data we collected earlier.
example_cn: 報告裡的數字跟我們之前收集的資料是一致的。
simple: I have been corresponding with him for years.
simple_cn: 我跟他通信好幾年了。

chinese: 咳出 / (不情願地) 付錢
example: He finally coughed up the money he owed me after I asked him several times.
example_cn: 我跟他要了好幾次，他終於把欠我的錢吐出來了。
simple: The cat coughed up a hairball.
simple_cn: 那隻貓吐出了一個毛球。

example: You can always count on your family to support you when things get difficult.
example_cn: 遇到困難的時候，你永遠可以指望家人支持你。
simple: I am counting on you to finish the project.
simple_cn: 我指望你來完成這個專案。

chinese: 計入 / 算作 (學分/總數)
example: The final presentation counts toward fifty percent of your overall grade.
example_cn: 期末報告佔總成績的百分之五十。
simple: Attendance counts toward your final mark.
simple_cn: 出席率會算進你的學期總成績。

example: The company tried to cover up the environmental damage caused by the spill.
example_cn: 公司試圖掩蓋外洩事件造成的環境損害。
simple: Make sure you cover up when you go out in the sun.
simple_cn: 在太陽底下出門時，記得要做好防曬。

chinese: 強力取締 / 嚴厲打擊
example: The city is cracking down on drunk driving to reduce traffic accidents.
example_cn: 這個城市正在嚴厲取締酒駕，以減少交通事故。
simple: The government is cracking down on tax fraud.
simple_cn: 政府正在嚴厲打擊逃漏稅。

chinese: 突然大笑 / 精神崩潰
example: Everyone cracked up when he told that funny story about his dog.
example_cn: 他講了那個關於他狗狗的好笑故事，每個人都笑翻了。
simple: She nearly cracked up under the pressure.
simple_cn: 她差點在壓力下崩潰。

example: Many people crave for success and recognition from their peers.
example_cn: 很多人都渴望成功，也希望得到同儕的認可。
simple: Pregnant women sometimes crave for strange foods.
simple_cn: 孕婦有時候會突然想吃一些奇怪的食物。

chinese: 歸功於 / 相信 (某人) 有...
example: She is credited with saving the company from bankruptcy last year.
example_cn: 去年公司能免於破產，功勞要歸於她。
simple: The scientist is credited with the discovery.
simple_cn: 這項發現歸功於那位科學家。

chinese: 突然出現 / 意外發生
example: A few unexpected problems cropped up just before the deadline.
example_cn: 就在截止日前突然冒出幾個意想不到的問題。
simple: His name crops up in the report several times.
simple_cn: 他的名字在報告中出現了好幾次。

example: I crossed the items off my shopping list as I put them in the cart.
example_cn: 我把購物清單上的東西放進推車時，就一項一項劃掉。
simple: Cross his name out from the list.
simple_cn: 把他的名字從名單上劃掉。

example: The empty lot in the city center is crying out for a new community park.
example_cn: 市中心那塊空地真的很需要蓋一座新的社區公園。
simple: He cried out in pain.
simple_cn: 他痛得大叫出來。

example: On cold winter evenings, I love to curl up on the sofa with a good book.
example_cn: 寒冷冬夜裡，我最愛窩在沙發上看本好書。
pattern: S + curl up on + 地方
simple: The cat curled up and fell asleep.
simple_cn: 那隻貓蜷縮起來睡著了。

chinese: 橫跨 / 抄近路 / 跨越(界限)
example: We can save ten minutes if we cut across the field instead of following the road.
example_cn: 如果我們穿過那片田地而不走馬路，可以省下十分鐘。
simple: The issue cuts across party lines.
simple_cn: 這個議題跨越了黨派界線。

example: The company is trying to cut back on spending to survive the economic crisis.
example_cn: 公司正努力縮減開支，以度過經濟危機。
pattern: S + (need to) cut back on + N
simple: I need to cut back on sugar.
simple_cn: 我需要減少糖分的攝取。

example: We had to cut our vacation short because of a family emergency.
example_cn: 因為家裡有急事，我們只好提前結束假期。
simple: He cut me short before I could explain.
simple_cn: 我還沒解釋完，他就打斷了我。

chinese: 穿過 / 快速解決 (繁瑣程序)
example: We need someone who can cut through all the red tape and get things done.
example_cn: 我們需要一個能打通所有繁文縟節、把事情搞定的人。
simple: The boat cut through the waves.
simple_cn: 船破浪前進。

chinese: 切碎 / 使傷心 / 惡搞
example: The chef was busy cutting up the vegetables for the soup.
example_cn: 主廚正忙著切蔬菜準備煮湯。
simple: He was very cut up about the breakup.
simple_cn: 他因為分手非常難過。

example: He dabbles in painting as a hobby, but he is not a professional artist.
example_cn: 他畫畫只是當興趣玩玩，不是專業畫家。
simple: She dabbles in politics occasionally.
simple_cn: 她偶爾會涉足政治。

chinese: 隨著...起舞 / 聽命於 (他人的音樂)
example: The crowd began to dance to the lively beat of the music.
example_cn: 群眾開始隨著音樂輕快的節奏跳舞。
simple: He won't dance to your tune.
simple_cn: 他不會聽你的指揮。

example: I need to dash off now, or I'll miss my train.
example_cn: 我現在得趕快閃人了，不然會錯過火車。
simple: She dashed off a quick note.
simple_cn: 她匆匆寫了一張便條。

example: The castle dates back to the 12th century and is a popular tourist site.
example_cn: 這座城堡可追溯到12世紀，是個熱門觀光景點。
pattern: N + date(s) back to + 時間
simple: Our friendship dates back to our childhood.
simple_cn: 我們的友誼可以追溯到童年時期。

example: These traditional customs date from the time of the first settlers.
example_cn: 這些傳統習俗源自第一批移民的時代。
simple: The manuscript dates from the 14th century.
simple_cn: 這份手稿源自14世紀。

example: It finally dawned on me that I had been scammed.
example_cn: 我終於恍然大悟，原來自己被騙了。
pattern: It + dawn(ed) on + 人 + that + 子句
simple: The truth slowly dawned on her.
simple_cn: 她慢慢明白了真相。

example: The judge dealt out a harsh sentence to the repeat offender.
example_cn: 法官對那個累犯判了重刑。
simple: He dealt out the cards.
simple_cn: 他發了牌。

example: We eventually decided against buying the house because of the high maintenance costs.
example_cn: 因為維護費用太高，我們最後決定不買那間房子。
simple: The board decided against the proposal.
simple_cn: 董事會否決了這項提案。

example: After looking at several different models, we finally decided on the silver one.
example_cn: 看了好幾種不同型號後，我們最後選了銀色的那個。
simple: Have you decided on a name for the baby yet?
simple_cn: 你們決定好寶寶的名字了嗎？

example: There has been a significant decline in the number of smokers over the last decade.
example_cn: 過去十年間，吸菸人數大幅下降。
simple: The company reported a decline in profits.
simple_cn: 公司報告利潤下滑。

example: The scientist has dedicated his entire life to finding a cure for this rare disease.
example_cn: 這位科學家奉獻了畢生精力，只為找到這種罕見疾病的治療方法。
simple: She dedicated the song to her mother.
simple_cn: 她把這首歌獻給她的母親。

example: The city built high walls to defend against enemy attacks during the war.
example_cn: 戰爭期間，這座城市築起高牆來抵禦敵人的攻擊。
simple: How can we defend against a cyber attack?
simple_cn: 我們要怎麼防範網路攻擊？

example: In physics, power is defined as the rate at which work is performed.
example_cn: 在物理學中，功率被定義為做功的速率。
simple: Happiness is often defined as a state of mind.
simple_cn: 幸福通常被定義為一種心態。

example: The peaceful protest suddenly degenerated into a violent riot after the police arrived.
example_cn: 和平的抗議活動在警方抵達後，突然演變成激烈的暴動。
simple: The argument degenerated into a fight.
simple_cn: 這場爭論最後演變成打架。

example: The jury spent several days deliberating on the verdict of the high-profile case.
example_cn: 陪審團花了幾天時間，就這起備受矚目的案件進行判決討論。
simple: The committee is deliberating on the new rules.
simple_cn: 委員會正在審議新規定。

example: The little boy delights in playing tricks on his older sister.
example_cn: 那個小男孩很喜歡捉弄他姊姊。
simple: She delights in the beauty of nature.
simple_cn: 她陶醉於大自然的美景。

example: The journalist decided to delve into the company's past to uncover the truth.
example_cn: 記者決定深入調查這家公司的過去，以揭發真相。
simple: The book delves into the history of the region.
simple_cn: 這本書深入探討了這個地區的歷史。

chinese: 離開 / 偏離 (常規、主題)
example: The speaker's comments slightly departed from the original topic of the seminar.
example_cn: 講者的發言稍微偏離了研討會原本的主題。
simple: The train departs from Platform 4.
simple_cn: 火車從第四月台發車。

example: The media often depicts the politician as a hero of the working class.
example_cn: 媒體經常把那位政治人物描繪成勞工階級的英雄。
simple: In the novel, he is depicted as a cold person.
simple_cn: 在小說裡，他被描寫成一個冷漠的人。

example: Many modern medicines are derived from plants found in the rainforest.
example_cn: 許多現代藥物都是從雨林中的植物提煉出來的。
simple: The word 'ocean' derives from Greek.
simple_cn: 「海洋」這個詞源自希臘文。

example: Thousands of tourists descend on the small town every summer for the festival.
example_cn: 每年夏天，成千上萬的遊客湧入這個小鎮參加節慶活動。
simple: I never thought he would descend to stealing.
simple_cn: 我從沒想過他會墮落到去偷東西。

chinese: 對...感到絕望 / 喪失信心
example: Critics began to despair of the project ever being completed on time.
example_cn: 評論家開始對這個專案能否按時完成感到絕望。
simple: Don't despair of your success.
simple_cn: 別對你的成功感到絕望。

example: You can detach the keyboard from the tablet to use it more easily.
example_cn: 你可以把鍵盤從平板電腦上拆下來，使用起來會更方便。
simple: He tried to detach himself from the argument.
simple_cn: 他試圖讓自己脫離這場爭論。

example: The high cost of university tuition may deter many students from applying.
example_cn: 大學學費高昂，可能會讓許多學生打消申請的念頭。
simple: Security cameras deter people from stealing.
simple_cn: 監視器能嚇阻人們偷東西。

example: The messy garden unfortunately detracts from the overall beauty of the house.
example_cn: 可惜的是，凌亂的花園反而減損了這棟房子的整體美感。
simple: One small mistake doesn't detract from his achievement.
simple_cn: 一個小錯誤並不會減損他的成就。

chinese: 由...發展而成 / 發展成為
example: What started as a small local business eventually developed into a global corporation.
example_cn: 原本只是個小型的地方企業，最後發展成了全球性的公司。
simple: The seed developed into a beautiful flower.
simple_cn: 那顆種子長成了一朵美麗的花。

example: She has devoted a lot of her free time to volunteering at the local library.
example_cn: 她投入了大量空閒時間，在當地的圖書館擔任志工。
simple: The museum is devoted to modern art.
simple_cn: 這間博物館專門展示現代藝術。

chinese: 逐漸消失 / 相繼死去
example: The sound of the train slowly died away as it moved further into the distance.
example_cn: 火車的聲音隨著它駛向遠方，漸漸消失了。
simple: The species is slowly dying off.
simple_cn: 這個物種正在慢慢滅絕。

chinese: 與...不同 / 在...方面不同
example: French culture differs from Japanese culture in many interesting ways.
example_cn: 法國文化與日本文化在許多有趣的方面有所不同。
pattern: A differ(s) from B in + N
simple: Experts differ on the cause of the disease.
simple_cn: 專家們對這種疾病的成因看法不一。

chinese: 開始大吃 / 鑽研 / 找出 / 挖掘
example: The researcher had to dig into old files to find the missing documents.
example_cn: 研究人員必須翻查舊檔案，才能找到遺失的文件。
simple: The dog dug up a bone in the garden.
simple_cn: 那隻狗在花園裡挖出一根骨頭。

chinese: 在家吃飯 / 在外用餐
example: We usually dine out on Friday nights to celebrate the end of the week.
example_cn: 我們通常在週五晚上外出用餐，慶祝一週的結束。
simple: Let's dine out tonight.
simple_cn: 我們今晚出去吃飯吧。

chinese: 隨便翻閱 / 動用 (存款)
example: He had to dip into his savings to pay for the unexpected car repairs.
example_cn: 他不得不動用存款來支付意料之外的汽車修理費。
simple: I dip into the book from time to time.
simple_cn: 我偶爾會翻翻這本書。

example: Many rare species are disappearing from the rainforest due to habitat loss.
example_cn: 由於棲息地流失，許多稀有物種正從雨林中消失。
simple: The sun disappeared from view.
simple_cn: 太陽從視線中消失了。

example: Her parents strongly disapprove of her decision to quit university.
example_cn: 她的父母非常不贊成她決定輟學。
simple: I disapprove of smoking in public.
simple_cn: 我不贊成在公共場所抽菸。

example: The bad weather discouraged many people from attending the outdoor concert.
example_cn: 惡劣的天氣讓很多人打消了參加戶外演唱會的念頭。
simple: Don't let one failure discourage you from trying again.
simple_cn: 別因為一次失敗就打消你再次嘗試的念頭。

example: It is illegal to discriminate against people based on their race or gender.
example_cn: 根據種族或性別歧視他人是違法的。
simple: Can you discriminate between the two colors?
simple_cn: 你能分辨這兩種顏色嗎？

example: It took the bird a long time to disentangle its wing from the fishing net.
example_cn: 那隻鳥花了很長時間才把翅膀從漁網中掙脫出來。
simple: He tried to disentangle the facts from the rumors.
simple_cn: 他試著把事實從謠言中釐清出來。

example: The teacher dished out the test papers as soon as the bell rang.
example_cn: 鈴聲一響，老師就把考卷發了下去。
simple: Who is dishing up the dinner tonight?
simple_cn: 今晚誰負責上菜？

example: The employee was dismissed from his job for repeated negligence.
example_cn: 這名員工因為一再疏忽而被開除。
simple: The class was dismissed from school early.
simple_cn: 那班級提早放學了。

chinese: 免除 / 省掉 (不必要的)
example: We can dispense with the formal introductions and get straight to business.
example_cn: 我們可以省去正式的介紹，直接談正事。
simple: Let's dispense with the paperwork for now.
simple_cn: 我們先省掉那些文書作業吧。

example: You must learn how to dispose of chemical waste safely to protect the environment.
example_cn: 你必須學會如何安全處理化學廢棄物，以保護環境。
simple: He disposed of his old clothes.
simple_cn: 他把舊衣服處理掉了。

example: The whole audience dissolved into laughter at the comedian's final joke.
example_cn: 全場觀眾被喜劇演員最後一個笑話逗得哄堂大笑。
simple: Sugar dissolves into water.
simple_cn: 糖會溶解在水裡。

example: It is sometimes difficult to distinguish between reality and fantasy in his movies.
example_cn: 在他的電影裡，有時候很難區分現實與幻想。
pattern: S + distinguish between A and B
simple: I can't distinguish a butterfly from a moth.
simple_cn: 我分不清楚蝴蝶和蛾。

example: Don't let the noise outside distract you from your studies during the exam period.
example_cn: 考試期間，別讓外面的噪音干擾你讀書。
simple: The TV distracted her from her work.
simple_cn: 電視讓她沒辦法專心工作。

example: The teacher decided to divide the students into four smaller groups for the project.
example_cn: 老師決定把學生分成四個小組來進行這個專題。
simple: The history of the country is divided into three periods.
simple_cn: 這個國家的歷史分成三個時期。

example: The team members met to divvy up the work for the upcoming presentation.
example_cn: 團隊成員開會分配即將到來的簡報工作。
simple: They divvied up the prize money.
simple_cn: 他們把獎金平分了。

chinese: 扣上 / 翻修 / 包裝
example: The old cottage was beautifully done up and sold at a very high price.
example_cn: 那間老舊的小屋被整修得很漂亮，並以高價售出。
simple: Do your coat up; it's cold outside.
simple_cn: 把你的外套扣好，外面很冷。

example: I am exhausted; I could really do with a long holiday right now.
example_cn: 我累壞了；現在真的很需要放個長假。
simple: The incident had nothing to do with me.
simple_cn: 那件事跟我一點關係都沒有。

example: She spent three hours dolling herself up for the party tonight.
example_cn: 她花了三個小時打扮自己，準備參加今晚的派對。
simple: Everyone was dolled up for the gala.
simple_cn: 每個人都盛裝打扮去參加晚會。

example: I was so tired during the lecture that I kept dozing off.
example_cn: 上課時我太累了，一直打瞌睡。
simple: The cat dozed off in the sun.
simple_cn: 那隻貓在太陽下打瞌睡。

example: Please don't drag me into your argument with your brother.
example_cn: 請不要把我扯進你和你兄弟的爭執中。
simple: The cat dragged a mouse in.
simple_cn: 那隻貓拖了一隻老鼠進來。

example: The meeting dragged on for three hours, and everyone became very bored.
example_cn: 會議拖了三個小時，每個人都覺得很無聊。
simple: The court case dragged on for years.

example: There's no need to drag out the discussion any longer; we have made our decision.
example_cn: 沒必要再拖下去討論了，我們已經決定了。
simple: They dragged out the ceremony with long speeches.

chinese: 流失 / 漸漸消失 / 排乾
example: He felt all the energy drain away from his body after the long marathon.
example_cn: 跑完馬拉松後，他覺得全身的力氣都被抽乾了。
simple: Drain off any excess water before serving.

chinese: 退縮 / 後退 / 取回
example: She drew back in fear when she saw the large spider on the wall.
example_cn: 她看到牆上那隻大蜘蛛，嚇得往後退。
simple: The government drew back from its earlier decision.

example: The writer drew on her childhood experiences to write the award-winning novel.
example_cn: 那位作家根據自己的童年經歷，寫出了這本得獎小說。
simple: He drew on his savings to pay for the car.

chinese: 拉長 (時間) / 使開口說話
example: The teacher tried to draw out the shy student during the class discussion.
example_cn: 老師在課堂討論時，試著引導那位害羞的學生開口。
simple: The days are drawing out now that it is spring.

example: Since she was a child, she has always dreamed of becoming a professional dancer.
example_cn: 她從小就夢想成為一名專業舞者。
simple: I dreamed about you last night.

example: The inventor dreamed up a new way to clean the ocean using robots.
example_cn: 那位發明家想出一個用機器人清理海洋的新方法。
simple: I don't know who dreamed up this plan.

example: The reporter managed to dredge up some old scandals from the politician's past.
example_cn: 記者設法挖出了那位政治人物過去的一些舊醜聞。
simple: They are dredging up mud from the river.

example: We were drenched in sweat after playing basketball for two hours in the sun.
example_cn: 我們在大太陽下打了兩小時籃球，全身都濕透了。
simple: The field was drenched in moonlight.

example: On Fridays, many companies allow their employees to dress down.
example_cn: 很多公司禮拜五會讓員工穿得比較休閒。
