simple: Combine the flour with the eggs to make the dough.

example: Despite starting with fewer resources, the smaller team came ahead in the final ranking.
example_cn: 儘管起步時資源較少，但那個規模較小的團隊最終排名反而領先。
pattern: Despite + V-ing, S + came ahead in + N
simple: Come ahead and take a seat at the front.

example: The reform team came against strong resistance from those who benefited from the old system.
example_cn: 改革團隊遇到了來自舊制度既得利益者的強烈阻力。
pattern: S + came against + N + from + 人 + who + V
simple: Every entrepreneur comes against setbacks at some point.

example: The judge was asked to comment upon the strengths of each performance before announcing the winner.
example_cn: 在宣布得獎者之前，評審被要求針對每場表演的優點發表評論。
pattern: S + was asked to comment upon + N + before + V-ing
simple: The spokesperson declined to comment upon the allegations.

example: It is essential to communicate clearly with your team members to avoid misunderstandings.
example_cn: 跟團隊成員清楚溝通很重要，這樣才不會產生誤會。
pattern: It is + adj + to communicate + adv + with + N + to + V
simple: We need to communicate with clients regularly to build trust.

example: Our school will compete against three other schools in the regional science competition next month.
example_cn: 我們學校下個月要跟另外三所學校在區域科學競賽中較量。
pattern: S + will compete against + N + in + N + 時間
simple: It is tough to compete against companies with much larger budgets.

example: All businesses operating in this country are required by law to comply with local environmental regulations.
example_cn: 在這個國家營運的所有企業，依法都必須遵守當地的環保法規。
pattern: S + are required by law to comply with + N
simple: Failure to comply with safety rules may result in serious penalties.

example: Make sure your device is connected to a secure Wi-Fi network before downloading any sensitive files.
example_cn: 在下載任何敏感檔案之前，請確認你的裝置已連上安全的Wi-Fi網路。
pattern: Make sure + N + be connected to + N + before + V-ing
simple: This road connects to the main highway after the tunnel.

chinese: 考慮（某人或某物）擔任或用於
example: Her outstanding performance this year means she will be seriously considered for a promotion.
example_cn: 她今年表現非常出色，這代表她升遷的機會很大。
pattern: N + means + S + will be considered for + N
simple: Have you been considered for the leadership position?

example: The driver lost control on the icy road and crashed into the barrier on the side of the highway.
example_cn: 駕駛在結冰的道路上失控，撞上了高速公路邊的護欄。
pattern: S + lost control and crashed into + N + on + N
simple: He crashed into a table while running through the room.

example: The artist created a stunning sculpture from pieces of scrap metal she found at a local junkyard.
example_cn: 這位藝術家用她在當地廢鐵場找到的金屬廢料，創作出了一件令人驚豔的雕塑。
pattern: S + created + N + from + N + S + found + 地點
simple: This dish is created from simple ingredients you already have at home.

chinese: 切除、割掉；剪掉多餘部分
example: The surgeon carefully cut away the damaged tissue to prevent the infection from spreading further.
example_cn: 外科醫生仔細切除受損的組織，以防止感染進一步擴散。
pattern: S + cut away + N + to prevent + N + from + V-ing
simple: Cut away the dead branches to help the tree grow stronger.

chinese: 繞過問題處理；分發（牌）給在座眾人
example: Instead of addressing the issue directly, he kept dealing around it and confusing everyone in the meeting.
example_cn: 他沒有直接處理問題，反而一直在繞圈子，讓會議裡的人一頭霧水。
pattern: Instead of + V-ing, S + kept dealing around + N
simple: He dealt the cards around the table so everyone got five.

example: Politicians have been debating over the best way to reform the healthcare system for many years.
example_cn: 多年來，政治人物一直在辯論改革醫療體系的最佳方式。
pattern: S + have been debating over + N + for + 時間
simple: They debated over whether to accept the offer for hours.

chinese: 宣布支持、正式表態贊成
example: Several senior officials declared for the reform bill after the public pressure became impossible to ignore.
example_cn: 在公眾壓力大到無法忽視之後，好幾位高層官員表態支持改革法案。
pattern: S + declared for + N + after + S + V
simple: He declared for the opposition party ahead of the election.

example: The number of traffic accidents in the city decreased by twenty percent after the new speed limits were introduced.
example_cn: 實施新的速限之後，該市的交通事故數量減少了百分之二十。
pattern: N + decreased by + 數量 + after + S + V
simple: Costs decreased by a third following the restructuring.

example: Any further delay in making a decision could result in the company losing the contract entirely.
example_cn: 如果再繼續拖延做決定，公司可能會完全失去這份合約。
pattern: Any further delay in + V-ing + could result in + N
simple: Don't delay in responding to the complaint.

chinese: 啟程、出發（某日或某旅程）
example: The expedition team is scheduled to depart on the fifteenth of March for their Antarctic research mission.
example_cn: 探險隊預計在三月十五日出發，前往南極進行研究任務。
pattern: S + is scheduled to depart on + 日期 + for + N
simple: We depart on Sunday morning and arrive Tuesday evening.

example: Students who participate actively in class discussions derive far greater benefit from their education.
example_cn: 積極參與課堂討論的學生，從教育中獲得的益處會大得多。
pattern: S + who + V + derive far greater benefit from + N
simple: We all derive benefit from living in a peaceful society.

example: It is difficult to determine from the available data whether the treatment is truly effective.
example_cn: 從現有資料很難判斷這種治療是否真的有效。
pattern: It is + adj + to determine from + N + whether + S + V
simple: We can determine from the results that the experiment was a success.

example: The pilot was instructed never to deviate from the approved flight path under any circumstances.
example_cn: 飛行員被指示在任何情況下都不得偏離核准的飛行路線。
pattern: S + was instructed never to deviate from + N + under any circumstances
simple: The report deviates significantly from the original brief.

example: The journalist spent weeks digging around for evidence of corruption within the local government.
example_cn: 這位記者花了數週時間四處挖掘當地政府貪腐的證據。
pattern: S + spent + 時間 + digging around for + N
simple: I dug around in the drawer but couldn't find the receipt.

example: The counsellor directed the student towards resources that could help improve his study skills.
example_cn: 輔導老師引導那位學生去尋找能幫助他提升學習技巧的資源。
pattern: S + directed + 人 + towards + N + that + V
simple: Efforts should be directed towards finding a long-term solution.

chinese: 在…方面意見不一、對…有異議
example: The two experts disagree on the best approach to tackling climate change and reducing carbon emissions.
example_cn: 兩位專家對於應對氣候變遷及減少碳排放的最佳方法意見分歧。
pattern: S + disagree(s) on + N + of + V-ing
simple: We disagree on how to divide the responsibilities.

chinese: 在（三者或以上）之間分配
example: The prize money was divided equally among the five winning teams at the end of the tournament.
example_cn: 比賽結束時，獎金由五支獲勝隊伍平分。
pattern: N + was divided equally among + N + at the end of + N
simple: Chores were divided among family members fairly.

chinese: 共用、疊用；彎身（大笑或疼痛）
example: Due to the shortage of rooms, two of the delegates had to double up and share accommodation.
example_cn: 因為房間不夠，有兩位代表必須擠一間合住。
pattern: Due to + N, S + had to double up and + V
simple: He doubled up with laughter when he heard the joke.

example: The black limousine drew beside the kerb and a well-dressed woman stepped out calmly.
example_cn: 黑色加長禮車停在路邊，一位穿著講究的女子從容地下了車。
pattern: N + drew beside + N + and + S + V
simple: He drew his chair beside hers and whispered something.

chinese: 不知不覺進入（某狀態）；漂入
example: Without a clear plan, many young adults drift into careers that don't truly fulfil them.
example_cn: 沒有明確的計畫，很多年輕人會隨便踏入一份無法真正滿足自己的職業。
pattern: Without + N, S + drift(s) into + N + that + V
simple: She drifted into a deep sleep on the long train journey.

example: While sorting through old boxes, he dropped upon a collection of rare stamps from the 1940s.
example_cn: 在整理舊箱子時，他意外發現了一批1940年代的稀有郵票。
pattern: While + V-ing, S + dropped upon + N + from + 時間
simple: I dropped upon an old friend at the supermarket yesterday.

example: She earns a comfortable income from her freelance writing work for several online publications.
example_cn: 她靠替幾家線上媒體接案寫作，收入過得還不錯。
pattern: S + earns + N + from + V-ing + for + N
simple: How much do you earn from your part-time job?

example: The country is slowly edging towards an agreement on trade that could benefit millions of people.
example_cn: 這個國家正慢慢朝一項能造福數百萬人的貿易協議邁進。
pattern: S + is edging towards + N + that + V
simple: He edged towards the exit without anyone noticing.

example: The professor asked the student to elaborate upon her research findings in greater detail during the presentation.
example_cn: 教授要求那位學生在報告時，更詳細地闡述她的研究發現。
pattern: S + asked + 人 + to elaborate upon + N + in greater detail
simple: Could you elaborate upon what you mean by that statement?

chinese: 開始、踏上（新計畫或旅程）
example: After years of careful preparation, the young explorer finally embarked on his solo journey around the world.
example_cn: 經過多年的仔細準備，這位年輕探險家終於踏上獨自環遊世界的旅程。
pattern: After + 時間 + of + N, S + finally embarked on + N
simple: The company embarked on an ambitious expansion plan last year.

chinese: 進入、走進（某空間或狀態）
example: After hours in the dark forest, the hikers emerged into a bright open meadow full of wildflowers.
example_cn: 在黑暗的森林裡走了好幾個小時後，健行者們終於走進一片開闊明亮、開滿野花的草地。
pattern: After + 時間 + in + N, S + emerged into + N
simple: The caterpillar emerges into a butterfly after weeks in its cocoon.

example: The training programme emphasizes strongly on building practical skills rather than memorising theory.
example_cn: 這個培訓課程非常強調培養實作技能，而不是死背理論。
pattern: N + emphasizes on + V-ing + rather than + V-ing
simple: The coach emphasized on teamwork throughout the training session.

chinese: 鼓勵（某人）朝向、引導走向
example: Good mentors encourage their students towards independent thinking rather than simply following instructions.
example_cn: 好的導師會鼓勵學生獨立思考，而不是單純照著指示做。
pattern: S + encourage(s) + 人 + towards + N + rather than + V-ing
simple: Parents should encourage children towards their natural strengths.

chinese: 逃入；沉浸於（某事物）以逃避現實
example: Reading novels allows her to escape into imaginary worlds and forget about her daily worries.
example_cn: 讀小說能讓她逃進想像的世界，暫時忘掉日常的煩惱。
pattern: V-ing + allows + 人 + to escape into + N + and + V
simple: He escaped into music whenever life became too stressful.

chinese: 從…演變而來、由…發展而成
example: The modern smartphone has evolved from the basic mobile phone of the early 1990s into a powerful computer.
example_cn: 現代智慧型手機已經從1990年代初期的基本行動電話，演變成一臺功能強大的電腦。
pattern: N + has evolved from + N + into + N
simple: Our partnership evolved from a chance meeting into a successful business.

example: She has always excelled at languages and was fluent in four of them before graduating from university.
example_cn: 她一直很擅長語言，大學畢業前就已經精通四種語言。
pattern: S + has always excelled at + N + and + V
simple: He excels at problem-solving under pressure.

example: The two schools regularly exchange students with each other to promote cultural understanding and friendship.
example_cn: 這兩所學校定期交換學生，以促進文化理解與友誼。
pattern: S + regularly exchange(s) + N + with + N + to + V
simple: They exchanged phone numbers with each other at the end of the conference.

example: The researcher was invited to expand upon her findings at the international conference next month.
example_cn: 那位研究人員受邀在下個月的國際研討會上進一步闡述她的發現。
pattern: S + was invited to expand upon + N + at + N
simple: Could you expand upon what you said earlier about the budget?

example: As the years passed, the painful memories slowly faded into the background of her daily life.
example_cn: 隨著時間流逝，那些痛苦的回憶慢慢淡出她日常生活的焦點。
pattern: N + slowly faded into + N + as + S + V
simple: The old hero faded into obscurity after retiring from public life.

example: If you fall behind on your assignments, it becomes very difficult to catch up before the exam.
example_cn: 如果作業進度落後，要在考試前趕上就會變得很困難。
pattern: If + S + fall behind on + N, it becomes + adj + to + V
simple: He fell behind on his rent payments after losing his job.

chinese: 對…有某種感受、感情傾向
example: It took her a long time to understand what she truly felt towards him after all they had been through.
example_cn: 在經歷了這一切之後，她花了好長一段時間才明白自己對他的真實感受。
pattern: It took + 人 + 時間 + to understand what S + felt towards + 人
simple: I'm not sure how I feel towards the idea of moving abroad.

example: She figures among the most influential scientists of her generation, having published over a hundred papers.
example_cn: 她算是同世代中最具影響力的科學家之一，已經發表超過一百篇論文。
pattern: S + figures among + N, having + p.p.
simple: This novel figures among the greatest works of the twentieth century.

chinese: 在…之中發現、於…之間找到
example: You can find among his early sketches several ideas that later became his most celebrated paintings.
example_cn: 在他早期的素描作品中，可以找到好幾個後來成為他最知名畫作的點子。
pattern: S + can find among + N + N + that + V
simple: You will find among the guests several well-known authors.

example: The flexible working arrangement allows employees to fit their schedules around family responsibilities.
example_cn: 彈性工作安排讓員工可以根據家庭責任來調整自己的時間表。
pattern: N + allows + 人 + to fit + N + around + N
simple: Can you fit the meeting around my afternoon appointments?

example: After the opening ceremony, the guests followed the host onto the stage for a group photograph.
example_cn: 開幕儀式結束後，賓客跟著主持人上台拍團體照。
pattern: After + N, S + followed + 人 + onto + N + for + N
simple: Follow onto the next page for further instructions.

chinese: 強迫進入；迫使（某人）做某事
example: No one should be forced into making a major life decision when they are under extreme pressure.
example_cn: 沒有人應該在承受極大壓力的情況下，被逼著做出重大的人生決定。
pattern: S + should not be forced into + V-ing + when + S + V
simple: The company was forced into bankruptcy by mounting debts.

example: Despite the initial setbacks, the development team forged ahead with their plan and met the deadline.
example_cn: 儘管一開始遇到挫折，開發團隊還是堅持按計畫推進，並如期完成。
pattern: Despite + N, S + forged ahead with + N + and + V
simple: She decided to forge ahead with her plans despite the criticism.

example: The peace negotiations foundered on the issue of territorial boundaries, leaving both sides frustrated.
example_cn: 和平談判因為領土邊界問題而破局，讓雙方都感到挫折。
pattern: N + foundered on + N, leaving + 人 + adj
simple: The project foundered on a lack of funding at the final stage.

example: There is much to be gained from listening carefully to people whose experiences differ from your own.
example_cn: 仔細聆聽那些經歷與自己不同的人說話，可以學到很多東西。
pattern: There is much to be gained from + V-ing + N
simple: What do you hope to gain from this experience?

chinese: 找到時間做、終於著手（做某事）
example: I've been meaning to call her for weeks but I just haven't gotten around to it yet.
example_cn: 我幾個星期前就想打電話給她，但一直拖到現在還沒打。
pattern: S + have been meaning to + V + but S + haven't gotten around to it yet
simple: I'll get around to fixing the leak when I have a free afternoon.

chinese: 重回（正軌）；重新上（交通工具）
example: After a difficult few months, she worked hard to get back on track with her studies.
example_cn: 經過幾個月的低潮期，她努力讓自己的學業重回正軌。
pattern: After + N, S + worked hard to get back on + N
simple: It took time to get back on his feet after the surgery.

example: Neither side was willing to give ground during the negotiations, causing the talks to stall.
example_cn: 談判過程中雙方都不願讓步，導致對話陷入僵局。
pattern: Neither + N + was willing to give ground, causing + N + to + V
simple: The government finally gave ground on the tax reform proposal.

chinese: 升級成為；逐漸進入（更高層次）
example: What started as a small hobby gradually graduated into a full-time business with fifteen employees.
example_cn: 原本只是個小興趣，後來逐漸發展成擁有十五名員工的全職事業。
pattern: What started as + N + gradually graduated into + N
simple: She graduated into a senior management role after five years.

chinese: 急忙抓取；拼命抓住（機會或希望）
example: Desperate for a solution, the committee began grasping at any idea that might solve the funding crisis.
example_cn: 委員會急著找解決方案，開始隨便抓任何可能解決資金危機的點子。
pattern: Desperate for + N, S + began grasping at + N + that + V
simple: Don't just grasp at the first offer you receive.

chinese: 超越成長；超出（原有的限制或框架）
example: The startup has grown beyond its original vision and now operates in more than thirty countries.
example_cn: 這家新創公司已經超越最初的願景，現在在超過三十個國家營運。
pattern: N + has grown beyond + N + and now + V
simple: She has grown beyond the limitations she once placed on herself.

example: With guidance and support, young people can grow towards becoming responsible and confident adults.
example_cn: 在引導與支持下，年輕人能夠逐漸成長為負責任且有自信的成年人。
pattern: With + N, S + can grow towards + V-ing
simple: The two countries are slowly growing towards a mutual understanding.

chinese: 引導完成、帶領通過（過程或困難）
example: The experienced counsellor guided the family through the difficult process of grief and recovery.
example_cn: 經驗豐富的諮商師引導這個家庭走過悲傷與復原的艱難過程。
simple: Let me guide you through the steps of the application process.

example: She smiled warmly and handed the bouquet towards the guest of honour at the front of the room.
example_cn: 她露出溫暖的笑容，把花束遞給房間前方的主賓。
pattern: S + V + and handed + N + towards + 人 + at + 地點
simple: He handed the document towards her across the table.

chinese: 朝…前進；走向（某方向或結果）
example: After lunch, the group headed towards the old lighthouse at the far end of the coastal path.
example_cn: 午餐過後，一行人朝著海岸步道盡頭的古老燈塔前進。
pattern: After + N, S + headed towards + N + at + N
simple: The economy seems to be heading towards a recovery.

chinese: 懷抱希望朝向、期望達到
example: Despite the many setbacks, the community continues to hope towards a future of peace and stability.
example_cn: 儘管遭遇許多挫折，這個社區仍然懷抱著對和平與穩定未來的希望。
pattern: Despite + N, S + continues to hope towards + N
simple: We hope towards a day when everyone has access to clean water.

example: The school includes community service among the requirements for graduation each year.
example_cn: 學校每年都把社區服務列為畢業要求之一。
simple: She is included among the top ten finalists for the award.

example: Global temperatures are steadily increasing towards levels that scientists consider extremely dangerous.
example_cn: 全球氣溫正穩定上升，逐漸逼近科學家認為極度危險的程度。
pattern: N + are steadily increasing towards + N + that + S + V
simple: Support for the proposal is increasing towards a majority.

example: Several parents called the school to inquire about the new policy on mobile phone use in class.
example_cn: 好幾位家長打電話到學校，詢問關於課堂上使用手機的新規定。
pattern: S + called + 地點 + to inquire about + N
simple: I'd like to inquire about the availability of rooms next weekend.

example: The client insists upon receiving a detailed written report before approving any further payments.
example_cn: 客戶堅持在批准任何後續款項之前，必須先收到一份詳細的書面報告。
pattern: S + insists upon + V-ing + before + V-ing
simple: She insists upon punctuality at every team meeting.

example: Most of the disputes in the office involve around miscommunication between departments.
example_cn: 辦公室裡大部分的爭執，都是因為部門之間溝通不良所引起的。
pattern: Most of + N + involve around + N + between + N
simple: The course involves around three hours of study per week.

example: Keep along the river path for about two kilometres and you will reach the old stone bridge.
example_cn: 沿著河邊步道走大約兩公里，你就會看到那座古老的石橋。
pattern: Keep along + N + for + 距離 + and + S + will + V
simple: Keep along the fence until you reach the main gate.

example: It is essential to keep spending within the approved budget to avoid running into financial difficulties.
example_cn: 務必把開銷控制在核定的預算內，才不會陷入財務困難。
pattern: It is + adj + to keep + N + within + N + to avoid + V-ing
simple: Please keep your comments within the time limit of two minutes.

example: After hours of brainstorming, the creative team finally landed upon a concept that excited everyone.
example_cn: 經過好幾個小時的腦力激盪，創意團隊終於想出一個讓大家都超興奮的點子。
pattern: After + 時間 + of + N, S + finally landed upon + N + that + V
simple: The butterfly landed upon the flower and stayed perfectly still.

chinese: 猛烈攻擊、突然爆發（言語或行為）
example: When he is under extreme stress, he tends to lash out at those closest to him without meaning to.
example_cn: 當他承受極大壓力時，往往會不自覺地對身邊最親近的人發脾氣。
pattern: When + S + V, S + tends to lash out at + 人 + without + V-ing
simple: She lashed out at the unfair criticism in front of the whole team.

chinese: 從…出發啟動；以…為基礎展開
example: The charity's annual campaign is launched from its headquarters and quickly spreads across the country.
example_cn: 這個慈善機構的年度募款活動從總部發起，很快就席捲全國。
pattern: N + is launched from + N + and + V
simple: The rocket was launched from the desert test facility at dawn.

example: During difficult times, it is natural to lean upon the people who know and care about you most.
example_cn: 在艱難的時候，依靠那些最了解你、最關心你的人是很自然的事。
pattern: It is + adj + to lean upon + 人 + who + V
simple: He leaned upon his years of experience to guide the new team.

chinese: 在…之間留下（空間或時間）
example: When scheduling appointments, always leave enough time between each one to avoid running late.
example_cn: 安排約診時，記得在每個時段之間留足夠的空檔，才不會遲到。
pattern: Always leave + N + between + N + to avoid + V-ing
simple: Leave some space between the furniture and the wall.

example: The responsibility for ensuring student safety lies upon every member of the teaching staff.
example_cn: 確保學生安全的責任，落在每一位教職員身上。
pattern: The responsibility for + V-ing + lies upon + 人
simple: A heavy burden lies upon those who lead others through crisis.

example: The crowd lifted the champion upon their shoulders and cheered loudly as he held up the trophy.
example_cn: 群眾把冠軍扛在肩上，當他高舉獎盃時，大家大聲歡呼。
pattern: S + lifted + 人 + upon + N + and + V + as + S + V
simple: She lifted the child upon the counter so he could see better.

chinese: 超越表面去看；著眼於更遠的事物
example: A great leader knows how to look beyond short-term difficulties and focus on long-term goals.
example_cn: 一個優秀的領導者懂得跳脫眼前的困境，專注於長遠的目標。
pattern: S + knows how to look beyond + N + and + V
simple: Try to look beyond appearances and judge people by their character.

example: Many students look upon their time at university as the most transformative period of their lives.
example_cn: 許多學生都把大學時光視為人生中最具轉變性的階段。
pattern: S + look(s) upon + N + as + N
simple: She looks upon every failure as a lesson worth learning.

example: Taking care of your mental health matters just as much to your overall wellbeing as physical fitness.
example_cn: 照顧心理健康對整體福祉的重要性，跟保持體適能一樣重要。
pattern: V-ing + matters just as much to + N + as + N
simple: Your opinion matters to us — please share your feedback.

chinese: 與…相比較衡量；以…為標準評估
example: Student progress should not always be measured against standardised tests but also against personal growth.
example_cn: 學生的進步不該總是用標準化測驗來衡量，也應該看個人的成長。
pattern: N + should not be measured against + N + but also + N
simple: Each employee's performance is measured against clear targets.

chinese: 思念…的某方面；懷念…的點點滴滴
example: What she misses most about living abroad is the sense of independence and daily adventure.
example_cn: 她最懷念住在國外的那段日子，就是那種獨立自主的感覺和每天的冒險。
pattern: What S + miss(es) most about + V-ing + is + N
simple: What do you miss most about your hometown?

example: She moves effortlessly between her roles as a mother, a teacher, and a community leader.
example_cn: 她游刃有餘地在母親、老師和社區領袖這幾種角色之間轉換。
pattern: S + moves between + N, N, and + N
simple: He moves between London and Tokyo several times a year for work.

chinese: 朝向…開放；面向、開口朝向
example: The large glass doors open towards the garden, flooding the living room with natural light.
example_cn: 大片玻璃門朝花園的方向敞開，讓自然光灑滿整個客廳。
pattern: N + open(s) towards + N, flooding + N + with + N
simple: Try to stay open towards new ideas even when they challenge your beliefs.

chinese: 在…範圍內運作、在…框架下執行
example: All staff members are expected to operate within the ethical guidelines set by the organisation.
example_cn: 所有員工都應該按照公司訂定的道德規範來做事。
pattern: S + are expected to operate within + N + set by + N
simple: The charity must operate within a strict legal framework.

example: Many of the spices used in local cuisine originate from tropical regions in Southeast Asia.
example_cn: 當地料理用的很多香料，都是從東南亞熱帶地區來的。
simple: This tradition originates from a harvest festival celebrated centuries ago.

example: It is never easy to part from close friends when life takes you in completely different directions.
example_cn: 當人生走向完全不同的方向時，要跟好朋友分開從來都不是件容易的事。
pattern: It is never + adj + to part from + N + when + S + V
simple: She wept as she parted from her family at the airport.

chinese: 在…之間傳遞；在…之間發生
example: A knowing glance passed between the two old friends as they listened to the familiar story.
example_cn: 兩位老朋友聽著那個熟悉的故事，彼此交換了一個心照不宣的眼神。
pattern: N + passed between + N + as + S + V
simple: Very few words passed between them during the long drive home.

example: The forensic team spent the entire morning picking through the wreckage for clues about the cause.
example_cn: 鑑識小組花了一整個上午在殘骸中翻找，尋找事故原因的線索。
pattern: S + spent + 時間 + picking through + N + for + N
simple: She picked through the pile of clothes looking for something to wear.

chinese: 將…列於其中；歸類於…之列
example: Critics have placed this novel among the finest works of contemporary fiction published this decade.
example_cn: 評論家將這本小說列為這十年來出版的當代小說中，最優秀的作品之一。
pattern: S + have placed + N + among + N + of + N
simple: Her achievement places her among the greatest athletes of all time.

example: The entire holiday itinerary was planned around the children's schedules and energy levels.
example_cn: 整趟旅遊行程都是根據小孩的作息和體力來規劃的。
pattern: N + was planned around + N + and + N
simple: We plan our week around the children's school timetable.

chinese: 指向更遠處；暗示更深的含義
example: The author's choice of words points beyond the surface story to deeper themes of loss and redemption.
example_cn: 作者選用的詞彙，暗示了表面故事之外更深層的失落與救贖主題。
pattern: N + points beyond + N + to + N
simple: Her question points beyond the immediate problem to something more fundamental.

example: Coastal communities must prepare against rising sea levels by building stronger flood defences.
example_cn: 沿海社區必須透過建造更堅固的防洪設施，來為海平面上升做好準備。
pattern: S + must prepare against + N + by + V-ing
simple: We need to prepare against the possibility of a power outage.

chinese: 向…施壓；強行給予；縈繞於心
example: The weight of the decision pressed heavily upon him as he sat alone in the quiet office.
example_cn: 他獨自坐在安靜的辦公室裡，這個決定的沉重壓力壓得他喘不過氣來。
pattern: N + pressed heavily upon + 人 + as + S + V
simple: She pressed upon him the importance of making the right choice.

example: All great achievements proceed from a combination of clear vision, hard work, and unwavering patience.
example_cn: 所有偉大的成就，都來自於清晰的願景、努力的工作，以及堅定的耐心。
pattern: N + proceed(s) from + N, N, and + N
simple: The solution proceeds from a clear understanding of the problem.

chinese: 防止、防護（某威脅或危害）
example: Wearing sunscreen every day helps protect your skin against the long-term damage caused by UV rays.
example_cn: 每天擦防曬乳，有助於保護你的皮膚，避免紫外線造成的長期傷害。
pattern: V-ing + helps protect + N + against + N + caused by + N
simple: The vaccine protects against several strains of the virus.

chinese: 把…推到一旁；忽視、壓抑（感受）
example: She pushed aside her personal feelings and focused entirely on completing the task professionally.
example_cn: 她把個人情緒擱到一邊，全心投入以專業的態度完成這項任務。
pattern: S + pushed aside + N + and + V + adv
simple: Don't push aside your doubts — they might be worth listening to.

example: The team leader encouraged everyone to push forward with the project despite the technical difficulties.
example_cn: 團隊領導鼓勵大家，儘管遇到技術上的困難，還是要繼續推動這個專案。
pattern: S + encouraged + 人 + to push forward with + N + despite + N
simple: We must push forward if we want to meet the deadline.

chinese: 強行通過；克服困難堅持到底
example: She pushed through the pain and exhaustion to finish the marathon and cross the finish line.
example_cn: 她忍著疼痛與疲憊，撐完全程，跑過馬拉松的終點線。
pattern: S + pushed through + N + and + N + to + V
simple: The legislation was pushed through parliament before the end of term.

example: The impact of her work reaches far beyond the scientific community and touches the lives of millions.
example_cn: 她的工作影響力遠遠超出科學界，觸及了數百萬人的生活。
pattern: N + reaches far beyond + N + and + V
simple: We should set goals that reach beyond our comfort zone.

example: Every day she reaches towards her goal of becoming a published author by writing at least five hundred words.
example_cn: 她每天至少寫五百個字，一步步朝著成為出版作家的目標邁進。
pattern: S + reach(es) towards + N + by + V-ing
simple: The child reached towards the jar of cookies on the top shelf.

chinese: 逐步推理解決；理性分析完畢
example: Before making any decision, take the time to reason through all the possible outcomes carefully.
example_cn: 在做任何決定之前，先花時間仔細推敲所有可能的結果。
pattern: Take the time to reason through + N + before + V-ing
simple: She reasoned through the problem step by step until she found the answer.

example: The school received a generous donation from a former student who had gone on to become very successful.
example_cn: 學校收到一位後來事業非常成功的校友，捐贈了一筆慷慨的款項。
pattern: S + received + N + from + 人 + who + V
simple: I received some very useful advice from my mentor last week.

example: After months of rehabilitation, the athlete fully recovered to his previous level of performance.
example_cn: 經過幾個月的復健，這位運動員完全恢復到過去的表現水準。
pattern: After + 時間 + of + N, S + fully recovered to + N
simple: The market recovered to its pre-crisis levels within two years.

example: Complex scientific theories should not always be reduced into oversimplified explanations for the public.
example_cn: 複雜的科學理論不應該總是為了大眾而簡化成過於簡單的說法。
pattern: N + should not be reduced into + N
simple: The long report was reduced into a one-page summary for the board.

chinese: 回顧、反思過去；反射回來
example: When she reflects back on her early struggles, she feels grateful for every lesson they taught her.
example_cn: 當她回顧自己早期的奮鬥歷程時，她對那些經歷帶給她的每一堂課都心懷感激。
pattern: When + S + reflect(s) back on + N, S + feel(s) + adj + for + N
simple: The mirror reflected the light back across the room.

example: Despite many distractions, the core of the discussion must remain about finding a practical solution.
example_cn: 儘管有許多干擾，討論的核心還是必須圍繞在找出實際的解決方案上。
pattern: Despite + N, N + must remain about + V-ing + N
simple: This policy debate must remain about what is best for the public.

example: What I remember most about that summer is the long walks we took along the quiet country roads.
example_cn: 那年夏天我最難忘的，就是我們沿著安靜的鄉間小路一起散步的時光。
pattern: What S + remember(s) most about + N + is + N
simple: Do you remember anything about where you left your keys?

chinese: 揭露關於…的事、透露有關…的資訊
example: What this data reveals about consumer behaviour has changed the way many companies approach marketing.
example_cn: 這份數據所揭露的消費者行為，已經改變了許多公司做行銷的方式。
pattern: What + N + reveals about + N + has + V + N
simple: What does this study reveal about the link between sleep and memory?

chinese: 在…之間穿梭運行；奔走於…之間
example: A free shuttle bus runs between the hotel and the airport every thirty minutes throughout the day.
example_cn: 飯店和機場之間每三十分鐘就有一班免費接駁車，全天運行。
pattern: N + runs between + N + and + N + every + 時間
simple: She ran between the two offices all morning delivering documents.

example: They have been saving towards a deposit on their first home for the past three years.
example_cn: 過去三年來，他們一直在存錢，為了要付第一間房子的頭期款。
pattern: S + have been saving towards + N + for the past + 時間
simple: I'm saving towards a trip to Japan next spring.

chinese: 尋求、追求（珍貴或難得之物）
example: True happiness is something that many people seek after their entire lives without ever truly finding it.
example_cn: 真正的幸福是許多人終其一生都在追尋，卻從未真正找到的東西。
pattern: N + is something that S + seek after + 時間 + without + V-ing
simple: This rare mineral is highly sought after by collectors worldwide.

example: Guests are invited to select from a wide range of dishes prepared fresh by our award-winning chef.
example_cn: 我們邀請賓客從我們獲獎主廚現做的多樣菜色中自由選擇。
pattern: S + are invited to select from + N + prepared by + N
simple: You can select from three different package options.

example: Public opinion has gradually shifted towards greater support for renewable energy policies.
example_cn: 民意已經逐漸轉向更支持再生能源政策。
pattern: N + has gradually shifted towards + N
simple: The team's strategy has shifted towards a more defensive approach.

example: A responsible leader must never shrink from making difficult decisions, even when they are unpopular.
example_cn: 一位負責任的領導者絕不能因為決策不受歡迎就退縮，不敢做出困難的決定。
pattern: S + must never shrink from + V-ing + N, even when + S + V
simple: Don't shrink from speaking the truth when it matters most.

chinese: 就…發言表態；對…議題表達立場
example: The panel was asked to speak towards the growing concerns about data privacy in modern technology.
example_cn: 專家小組被要求針對現代科技中日益嚴重的資料隱私問題發表看法。
pattern: S + was asked to speak towards + N + about + N
simple: She spoke towards the need for greater investment in public health.

chinese: 站在…上；堅持（原則或立場）
example: She stands firmly upon her principles and refuses to compromise no matter how great the pressure becomes.
example_cn: 她堅定地堅守自己的原則，無論壓力多大都不肯妥協。
pattern: S + stands upon + N + and + V + no matter how + adj + S + V
simple: The negotiator stood upon the original terms and refused to budge.

example: Every great journey starts from a single step taken with courage and a clear sense of direction.
example_cn: 每一趟偉大的旅程，都是從帶著勇氣和明確方向的第一步開始的。
pattern: N + starts from + N + taken with + N
simple: Let's start from the beginning and go through the plan again.

example: A few students were asked to stay behind after class to discuss their upcoming project presentations.
example_cn: 有幾位學生被要求課後留下來，討論他們即將進行的專題報告。
pattern: S + were asked to stay behind + 時間 + to + V
simple: I decided to stay behind while the others went on ahead.

chinese: 保持在…範圍內；留在…之內
example: All speakers are reminded to stay within their allotted time of ten minutes during the conference.
example_cn: 提醒所有講者，在會議期間請控制在分配到的十分鐘時間內。
pattern: S + are reminded to stay within + N + of + 數量 + during + N
simple: Please stay within the marked area at all times.

example: Good mentors steer their students towards opportunities that match their strengths and passions.
example_cn: 好的導師會引導學生走向符合他們優勢與熱情的機會。
pattern: S + steer(s) + 人 + towards + N + that + V
simple: The therapist gently steered the conversation towards the real issue.

chinese: 跨越、超出（某界限或框架）
example: To grow as a person, you must be willing to step beyond your comfort zone and embrace uncertainty.
example_cn: 要讓自己成長，你必須願意踏出舒適圈，擁抱不確定性。
pattern: To + V, S + must be willing to step beyond + N + and + V
simple: She stepped beyond her usual role to help the struggling team.

example: Many households have switched to LED lighting to reduce their electricity bills and energy consumption.
example_cn: 許多家庭已經改用LED照明，以減少電費和能源消耗。
pattern: S + have switched to + N + to + V
simple: Let's switch to a different topic before we run out of time.

example: Remember to take along a light jacket when you go hiking, as the mountain weather can change quickly.
example_cn: 去爬山時記得帶件薄外套，因為山區天氣變化很快。
pattern: Remember to take along + N + when + S + V, as + S + can + V
simple: She took her younger brother along to the concert.

example: Everyone in the village talks of the old lighthouse keeper and the mysterious stories surrounding him.
example_cn: 村子裡大家都在談論那位老燈塔管理員，以及圍繞著他的那些神祕故事。
pattern: S + talks/talk of + 人 + and + N + surrounding + 人
simple: People have long talked of building a bridge across the bay.

example: She sat quietly by the window and thought upon everything that had happened during the long difficult year.
example_cn: 她靜靜坐在窗邊，回想著那段漫長又艱苦的一年裡發生的所有事。
pattern: S + sat + adv + and thought upon + N + that + V
simple: Take a moment to think upon what truly matters to you in life.

example: The caravan slowly travelled towards the distant mountains as the golden sun began to set.
example_cn: 隨著金色夕陽開始西沉，車隊緩緩朝遠方的山脈前進。
pattern: N + slowly travelled towards + N + as + S + V
simple: We travelled towards the coast, stopping at small towns along the way.

example: The outcome of the entire negotiation turns upon whether both sides can agree on the key financial terms.
example_cn: 整場談判的結果，取決於雙方能否在關鍵的財務條款上達成共識。
pattern: N + turns upon + whether + S + can + V
simple: The frightened animal turned upon its pursuer without warning.

example: She volunteered for the community clean-up programme every weekend throughout the entire summer.
example_cn: 她自願參加社區清掃活動，整個夏天每個週末都去。
pattern: S + volunteered for + N + every + 時間 + throughout + N
simple: Would anyone like to volunteer for the role of team leader?

example: In the grand old hotel, dedicated staff wait upon guests from the moment they arrive until they depart.
example_cn: 在那間氣派的老飯店裡，盡責的員工從客人抵達到離開，全程悉心服務。
pattern: S + wait upon + 人 + from the moment + S + V + until + S + V
simple: We are waiting upon the final approval before we can proceed.

chinese: 逐步說明、帶領了解；走過
example: The trainer walked the new employees through each step of the safety procedure before they started work.
example_cn: 訓練員在員工開始工作前，帶著他們一步步走過安全程序的每個步驟。
pattern: S + walked + 人 + through + N + before + S + V
simple: Could you walk me through how the system works?

example: The speaker kept wandering from the main topic, making it difficult for the audience to follow.
example_cn: 講者一直偏離主題，讓聽眾很難跟上他的內容。
pattern: S + kept wandering from + N, making it + adj + for + 人 + to + V
simple: Don't wander from the path or you might get lost in the forest.

example: The therapist worked upon the patient's anxiety gradually through a series of structured weekly sessions.
example_cn: 治療師透過一系列每週一次的結構化療程，逐步處理患者的焦慮問題。
pattern: S + worked upon + N + gradually through + N
simple: She is working upon improving her public speaking skills.

example: You can account upon the support of your colleagues when times get tough in this organisation.
example_cn: 在這間機構裡，當你遇到困難時，可以信賴同事們的支持。
pattern: S + can account upon + N + when + S + V
simple: There are several factors we must account upon when planning the budget.

chinese: 繞過問題行事；在…周圍活動
example: The team found clever ways to act around the bureaucratic restrictions and still deliver results on time.
example_cn: 團隊找到聰明的方法繞過官僚體制的限制，依然按時交出成果。
pattern: S + found ways to act around + N + and still + V
simple: Stop acting around the issue and address it directly.

chinese: 在…之前加入、在前面添加
example: Always add a brief introduction before the main content so readers know what to expect from the piece.
example_cn: 在主內容之前，一定要先加一段簡短的介紹，讓讀者知道這篇文章在講什麼。
pattern: Always add + N + before + N + so + S + V
simple: Add a disclaimer before the terms and conditions section.

example: The company is adjusting its pricing strategy towards a more competitive and consumer-friendly model.
example_cn: 公司正在調整定價策略，朝更具競爭力且更貼近消費者的方向邁進。
pattern: S + is adjusting + N + towards + N
simple: We need to adjust our approach towards a more collaborative style.

example: The rescue team advanced on the flooded village as soon as the storm began to ease off.
example_cn: 暴風雨一減弱，救援隊就朝淹水的村莊前進。
pattern: S + advanced on + N + as soon as + S + V
simple: The troops advanced on the enemy position at dawn.

example: The doctor strongly advised against eating processed foods and recommended a balanced natural diet instead.
example_cn: 醫生強烈建議不要吃加工食品，並推薦均衡的天然飲食。
pattern: S + strongly advised against + V-ing + and + V
simple: I would advise against making any hasty decisions right now.

example: The non-profit organisation has spent decades advocating for the rights of marginalised communities.
example_cn: 這個非營利組織花了數十年時間，為邊緣化社群爭取權益。
pattern: S + has spent + 時間 + advocating for + N
simple: She advocates for better mental health resources in schools.

example: The committee managed to agree around a set of core values that would guide the organisation forward.
example_cn: 委員會設法就一套核心價值達成共識，作為組織未來發展的指引。
pattern: S + managed to agree around + N + that + V
simple: Both teams agreed around a shared timeline for the project.

example: Regular physical exercise has been shown to aid in the prevention of many chronic health conditions.
example_cn: 規律運動已被證實有助於預防許多慢性疾病。
pattern: N + has been shown to aid in + N + of + N
simple: Good nutrition aids in the recovery process after surgery.

example: The new education policy aims towards creating equal opportunities for students from all backgrounds.
example_cn: 這項新教育政策旨在為各種背景的學生創造平等的機會。
pattern: N + aims towards + V-ing + N + for + 人
simple: Our campaign aims towards raising awareness of ocean pollution.

example: The security system alerts staff to any unusual activity detected inside or around the building.
example_cn: 安全系統會對建築物內外偵測到的任何異常活動，向員工發出警報。
pattern: N + alerts + 人 + to + N + detected + 地點
simple: Please alert us to any changes in your availability.

chinese: 聯合對抗、站在…的對立面
example: Several member states aligned against the proposed policy, forming a powerful bloc within the organisation.
example_cn: 好幾個會員國聯手反對這項提議政策，在組織內部形成了一個強大的聯盟。
pattern: S + aligned against + N, forming + N + within + N
simple: The opposition parties aligned against the ruling government's budget.

example: A significant portion of the annual budget has been allocated to improving the city's public transport network.
example_cn: 年度預算中有很大一部分已經撥款，用來改善城市的公共交通網絡。
pattern: N + has been allocated to + V-ing + N
simple: Each team member has been allocated to a specific task.

chinese: 固定於、以…為依據；使扎根於
example: Strong family relationships anchor children to a sense of identity and belonging throughout their lives.
example_cn: 穩固的家庭關係能讓孩子一輩子都保有認同感與歸屬感。
pattern: N + anchors + 人 + to + N + throughout + N
simple: The team's success was anchored to clear communication and mutual trust.

example: Every public official must be prepared to answer upon their decisions when called to account.
example_cn: 每一位公職人員都必須準備好，在被要求說明時為自己的決策負責。
pattern: S + must be prepared to answer upon + N + when + V
simple: You will be asked to answer upon these choices at the review meeting.

example: The defendant's legal team plans to appeal against the verdict and seek a retrial in a higher court.
example_cn: 被告的律師團隊計畫對判決提出上訴，並尋求在更高層級的法院重新審理。
pattern: S + plans to appeal against + N + and + V
simple: She decided to appeal against the unfair dismissal from her job.

example: As the deadline approaches towards the end of the month, the team must work with increasing urgency.
example_cn: 隨著月底截止日期越來越近，團隊必須以更急迫的節奏來工作。
pattern: As + N + approaches towards + N, S + must + V
simple: She approached towards the podium slowly and with great confidence.

example: Not all parents approve of the amount of time their children spend on video games and social media.
example_cn: 並非所有家長都贊同孩子花那麼多時間在電玩和社群媒體上。
pattern: Not all + N + approve of + N + S + V
simple: Do you approve of the changes they made to the original design?

example: Several leading economists have argued strongly against the proposed tax increase, citing its impact on growth.
example_cn: 好幾位知名經濟學家強烈反對這項加稅提案，認為它會影響經濟成長。
pattern: S + have argued against + N, citing + N
simple: Many residents argued against the plan to build a new motorway.

example: The two siblings argued over who should inherit the family home for months after their parents passed away.
example_cn: 父母過世後，這對兄弟為了誰該繼承老家，爭論了好幾個月。
pattern: S + argued over + N + for + 時間 + after + S + V
simple: They argued over every minor detail of the contract for hours.

chinese: 在…情況下出現、因…而產生
example: New challenges can arise upon the introduction of any major change within a large organisation.
example_cn: 大型組織在推行任何重大變革時，都可能出現新的挑戰。
pattern: N + can arise upon + N + within + N
simple: Opportunities arise upon those who are prepared and stay alert.

example: The event coordinator arranged for a professional photographer to capture every moment of the ceremony.
example_cn: 活動策劃人安排了一位專業攝影師，來捕捉典禮的每一個瞬間。
pattern: S + arranged for + N + to + V + N
simple: Can you arrange for a car to pick us up at seven?

example: The manager needed to assert authority over the disruptive situation before it escalated any further.
example_cn: 經理需要在混亂情況進一步惡化之前，展現出對局面的掌控力。
pattern: S + needed to assert + N + over + N + before + S + V
simple: He asserted control over the project after the previous manager resigned.

example: The volunteer team assisted with the distribution of emergency supplies to families affected by the flood.
example_cn: 志工團隊協助將緊急物資發放給受水災影響的家庭。
pattern: S + assisted with + N + of + N + affected by + N
simple: Could you assist with setting up the equipment before the event?

chinese: 附上、依附於；對…產生依附感
example: Please attach to your application a copy of your most recent academic transcript and two references.
example_cn: 請在申請文件中附上你最新的成績單影本以及兩封推薦信。
pattern: Please attach to + N + N + and + N
simple: Children often become deeply attached to comfort objects like stuffed animals.

example: He stood with his back against the wall and waited calmly as the crowd surged towards him.
example_cn: 他背靠著牆站著，冷靜地等待人群朝他湧來。
pattern: S + stood with + N + back against + N + as + S + V
simple: She backed against the door to stop anyone from entering.

example: He decided to bail from the project at the last minute, leaving the rest of the team in a difficult position.
example_cn: 他在最後一刻決定退出這個專案，讓團隊其他人陷入困境。
pattern: S + decided to bail from + N + at the last minute, leaving + 人 + in + N
simple: She bailed from the deal when she saw how risky it had become.

example: Finding a healthy balance between work and personal life is essential for long-term wellbeing.
example_cn: 在工作與個人生活之間找到健康的平衡，對長期的身心健康非常重要。
pattern: V-ing + N + between + N + and + N + is + adj + for + N
simple: She tries to balance between her studies and her part-time job.

example: The two sides bargained over the terms of the contract for several weeks before reaching a final agreement.
example_cn: 雙方就合約條款協商了好幾個星期，最後才達成最終協議。
pattern: S + bargained over + N + for + 時間 + before + V-ing
simple: Buyers and sellers often bargain over price at the local market.

example: She became acquainted with the local customs and traditions during her first year living abroad.
example_cn: 她在國外生活的第一年，就逐漸熟悉了當地的風俗習慣。
pattern: S + became acquainted with + N + during + N
simple: Are you acquainted with anyone on the new management team?

example: Many parents are deeply concerned about the amount of time their children spend on screens each day.
example_cn: 許多家長非常擔心孩子每天花太多時間盯著螢幕。
pattern: S + are deeply concerned about + N + S + V
simple: We are concerned about the rising levels of pollution in the river.

example: He has been devoted to teaching for over thirty years and is beloved by generations of students.
example_cn: 他投身教學超過三十年，深受歷屆學生的愛戴。
pattern: S + has been devoted to + V-ing + for + 時間
simple: She is devoted to helping underprivileged children access quality education.

example: The coach was deeply disappointed in the team's performance and called an urgent meeting afterwards.
example_cn: 教練對球隊的表現非常失望，賽後緊急召開了會議。
pattern: S + was deeply disappointed in + N + and + V
simple: I'm not angry — I'm just disappointed in the choice you made.

example: Hazardous medical waste must be disposed of safely according to strict environmental regulations.
example_cn: 有害醫療廢棄物必須依照嚴格的環保法規安全處理。
pattern: N + must be disposed of + adv + according to + N
simple: Old electronics should be disposed of at a certified recycling centre.

example: The research team has been engaged in a long-term study on the effects of urban noise on mental health.
example_cn: 研究團隊長期以來一直在進行都市噪音對心理健康影響的研究。
pattern: S + has been engaged in + N + on + N
simple: Both countries are engaged in ongoing diplomatic talks.

example: The students were genuinely enthusiastic about the new project and stayed late to continue working on it.
example_cn: 學生們對新計畫充滿熱忱，還留下來繼續趕工到很晚。
pattern: S + were enthusiastic about + N + and + V
simple: She has always been enthusiastic about learning new languages.

example: It is natural to sometimes feel envious of others, but channelling that feeling into motivation is wiser.
example_cn: 有時候難免會羨慕別人，但把這種感覺轉化為動力是更明智的做法。
pattern: It is + adj + to feel envious of + 人, but + V-ing is + adj
simple: He admits he was envious of his colleague's rapid promotion.

example: Children with special needs should never be excluded from participating in regular classroom activities.
example_cn: 有特殊需求的兒童不應該被排除在一般課堂活動之外。
pattern: N + should never be excluded from + V-ing + N
simple: Several members were excluded from the vote due to a conflict of interest.

example: All applicants should be familiar with the company's products and services before attending the interview.
example_cn: 所有求職者在參加面試前，都應該先熟悉公司的產品與服務。
pattern: S + should be familiar with + N + before + V-ing
simple: Are you familiar with the terms and conditions of this agreement?

example: She is deeply grateful for the support she received from her friends during the most difficult period of her life.
example_cn: 她非常感激在人生最艱難的時期，朋友們給予她的支持。
pattern: S + is deeply grateful for + N + S + received + 時間
simple: We are grateful for every opportunity we have been given.

example: The defendant was found guilty of fraud and sentenced to five years in prison by the court.
example_cn: 被告被判詐欺罪名成立，法院判處五年有期徒刑。
pattern: S + was found guilty of + N + and + p.p.
simple: We are all guilty of taking the people we love for granted sometimes.

example: The panel of judges was deeply impressed by the young musician's technical skill and emotional maturity.
example_cn: 評審團對這位年輕音樂家的技巧與情感成熟度印象深刻。
pattern: S + was deeply impressed by + N + and + N
simple: I was impressed by how calmly she handled the difficult situation.

example: After reviewing all the evidence, the committee was inclined to rule in favour of the complainant.
example_cn: 在審查所有證據後，委員會傾向於做出對申訴人有利的裁決。
pattern: After + V-ing, S + was inclined to + V
simple: I'm inclined to agree with your assessment of the situation.

example: He seemed completely indifferent to the criticism and continued working in exactly the same way.
example_cn: 他對那些批評似乎完全無動於衷，繼續用同樣的方式工作。
pattern: S + seemed indifferent to + N + and + V
simple: She appeared indifferent to the praise and just kept working quietly.

example: Her early writing style was heavily influenced by the great novelists she had read throughout her childhood.
example_cn: 她早期的寫作風格深受童年時期閱讀的那些偉大小說家的影響。
pattern: N + was heavily influenced by + N + S + had + p.p.
simple: Young people are often influenced by the media they consume daily.

example: The architect said she was inspired by the natural landscape of the region when designing the building.
example_cn: 建築師說她在設計這棟建築時，靈感來自當地的自然景觀。
pattern: S + was inspired by + N + when + V-ing
simple: Many great scientists were inspired by a single question that puzzled them.

example: Despite everyone's warnings, she was intent on completing the solo climb before the weather turned bad.
example_cn: 儘管大家都警告她，她仍執意在天气變壞之前完成獨攀。
pattern: Despite + N, S + was intent on + V-ing + before + S + V
simple: He is intent on finishing the report before he leaves the office today.

example: Several senior officials were found to be involved in the corruption scandal that shook the government.
example_cn: 好幾位高層官員被發現涉入這起震撼政府的貪腐醜聞。
pattern: S + were found to be involved in + N + that + V
simple: She has been involved in charity work for most of her adult life.

example: He admitted that he had been jealous of his brother's success for years but never expressed it openly.
example_cn: 他承認多年來一直嫉妒哥哥的成功，但從未公開表達過。
pattern: S + admitted that S + had been jealous of + N + for + 時間
simple: Try not to be jealous of what others have — focus on your own path.

example: The small coastal town is best known for its fresh seafood and stunning views of the harbour.
example_cn: 這個沿海小鎮以新鮮的海產和絕美的港口景觀聞名。
pattern: N + is best known for + N + and + N
simple: She is known for her kindness and willingness to help others.

example: Entry to the restricted area is limited to authorised personnel who hold a valid security clearance.
example_cn: 管制區僅限持有有效安全許可的授權人員進入。
pattern: N + is limited to + N + who + V
simple: This special offer is limited to the first fifty customers who sign up.

example: For most of the afternoon, she was so occupied with preparing the presentation that she forgot to eat.
example_cn: 整個下午她忙著準備簡報，忙到連飯都忘記吃。
pattern: S + was so occupied with + V-ing + that + S + V
simple: He was fully occupied with managing three projects at the same time.

example: A large majority of residents are opposed to the development of a new industrial zone near the school.
example_cn: 絕大多數居民都反對在學校附近開發新的工業區。
pattern: A majority of + N + are opposed to + N + near + N
simple: She is strongly opposed to any form of discrimination in the workplace.

example: Her parents are incredibly proud of her achievements and the person she has grown up to become.
example_cn: 她的爸媽對她的成就和她長大後的樣子感到非常驕傲。
pattern: S + are incredibly proud of + N + and + N
simple: You should be proud of how far you have come in such a short time.

chinese: 與…有關聯；與…有親戚關係
example: Several of the health issues identified in the study were directly related to poor diet and lack of exercise.
example_cn: 研究中發現的幾個健康問題，都跟不良飲食和缺乏運動有直接關係。
pattern: N + were directly related to + N + and + N
simple: Is this new symptom related to the medication you started last week?

chinese: 被解除（職務或負擔）；對…感到如釋重負
example: The director was relieved of his duties following an internal investigation into his conduct at work.
example_cn: 經過內部調查他在工作上的行為後，那位主管被解除了職務。
pattern: S + was relieved of + N + following + N + into + N
simple: She was relieved of the burden of having to manage everything alone.

chinese: 對…有抵抗力；抗拒、不接受
example: Some bacteria have become resistant to commonly used antibiotics, posing a serious threat to public health.
example_cn: 有些細菌已經對常用的抗生素產生抗藥性，對公共衛生構成嚴重威脅。
pattern: N + have become resistant to + N, posing + N + to + N
simple: He has always been resistant to change and prefers familiar routines.

example: Each team leader is responsible for ensuring that all members meet their deadlines and quality standards.
example_cn: 每個團隊組長都要負責確保所有成員按時完成工作，並達到品質標準。
pattern: S + is responsible for + V-ing + N + and + N
simple: Who is responsible for ordering new supplies when stocks run low?

example: The client was not fully satisfied with the initial design and requested several significant revisions.
example_cn: 客戶對最初的設計不太滿意，要求做幾項大幅修改。
pattern: S + was not fully satisfied with + N + and + V
simple: Are you satisfied with the progress you have made so far this year?

example: The entire community was deeply shocked by the sudden closure of the hospital that had served them for decades.
example_cn: 整個社區對於那間服務他們幾十年的醫院突然關閉，感到非常震驚。
pattern: S + was deeply shocked by + N + that + V
simple: I was shocked by how much things had changed since my last visit.

example: The new policy is very similar to the one introduced last year, with only minor adjustments to the wording.
example_cn: 這項新政策跟去年推出的那項非常類似，只在文字上做了些微調整。
pattern: N + is similar to + N, with only + N + to + N
simple: Her symptoms are very similar to those of a common cold.

example: She is highly skilled at negotiating contracts and has successfully closed deals worth millions of dollars.
example_cn: 她非常擅長談判合約，成功談成了好幾筆價值數百萬美元的交易。
pattern: S + is highly skilled at + V-ing + and + V
simple: He is particularly skilled at finding creative solutions under pressure.

example: With her calm nature and excellent communication skills, she is perfectly suited for a career in counselling.
example_cn: 她個性冷靜，溝通能力又強，非常適合從事諮商工作。
pattern: With + N + and + N, S + is perfectly suited for + N
simple: This quiet neighbourhood is well suited for families with young children.

example: We were all surprised at how quickly the new employee adapted to the company's working environment.
example_cn: 我們都很驚訝，那位新員工竟然這麼快就適應了公司的工作環境。
pattern: S + were surprised at how + adv + S + V
simple: Don't be surprised at the result — you worked incredibly hard for it.

example: The investigator became increasingly suspicious of the witness's story as more inconsistencies emerged.
example_cn: 隨著越來越多的矛盾點浮現，調查員對證人的說詞越來越懷疑。
pattern: S + became increasingly suspicious of + N + as + N + V
simple: Be suspicious of any offer that sounds too good to be true.

example: His entire financial future is tied to the success of the business he has built over the last decade.
example_cn: 他整個財務未來都跟他過去十年打拼出來的事業成敗綁在一起。
pattern: N + is tied to + N + S + has + p.p.
simple: Her identity had become too closely tied to her job title.

example: Every person is worthy of respect and dignity regardless of their background or circumstances.
example_cn: 每個人不論背景或處境如何，都值得被尊重和有尊嚴地對待。
pattern: S + is worthy of + N + regardless of + N
simple: This project is worthy of the award it received.

example: The undercover officer was trained to blend into the local community without attracting any attention.
example_cn: 那位臥底警員受過訓練，能夠融入當地社區而不引起任何注意。
pattern: S + was trained to blend into + N + without + V-ing
simple: The new colour blends perfectly into the rest of the room's decor.

example: Many homeowners choose to borrow against the equity in their property to fund major renovations.
example_cn: 很多屋主會選擇用房屋淨值貸款，來籌措大筆翻修費用。
pattern: S + choose(s) to borrow against + N + to + V
simple: It is risky to borrow against your home if you cannot keep up repayments.

chinese: 在…之間來回跳動；在…之間搖擺不定
example: Throughout the week she bounced between excitement and anxiety about starting her new job on Monday.
example_cn: 整個星期她都在興奮和焦慮之間擺盪，因為週一就要開始新工作了。
pattern: S + bounced between + N + and + N + about + V-ing
simple: The ball bounced between the two players before going out of bounds.

chinese: 分叉離開；從…脫離另起爐灶
example: After years with the agency, she decided to branch away and establish her own independent consultancy.
example_cn: 在那間公司待了多年後，她決定獨立出來，成立自己的顧問公司。
pattern: After + 時間 + with + N, S + decided to branch away and + V
simple: The path branches away from the main road just past the old oak tree.

example: The project kept bumping against regulatory barriers that slowed down every phase of development.
example_cn: 這個專案一直碰到法規障礙，導致每個開發階段都進展緩慢。
pattern: S + kept bumping against + N + that + V
simple: She bumped against the edge of the table in the dark.

example: The excited dog chased towards the open field the moment it was let off the lead.
example_cn: 興奮的狗一被放開牽繩，就立刻朝空曠的田野追去。
pattern: S + chased towards + N + the moment + S + V
simple: The children chased towards the ice cream van as it came down the street.

example: Could you please clarify for everyone what the exact requirements are for submitting the application?
example_cn: 可以請你跟大家說清楚，提交申請的具體要求是什麼嗎？
pattern: Could you clarify for + 人 + what + N + V?
simple: Let me clarify for you exactly what is expected by the end of the week.

chinese: 與…衝突、起爭執；（顏色等）不協調
example: His bold management style often clashes with the more cautious approach preferred by senior leadership.
example_cn: 他大膽的管理風格，經常跟高層偏好較謹慎的做法產生衝突。
pattern: N + often clashes with + N + preferred by + N
simple: Her new curtains clash badly with the colour of the walls.

chinese: 緊抓不放；執著於（過去或信念）
example: Even after years had passed, she found herself clinging onto the hope that things would eventually improve.
example_cn: 即使過了這麼多年，她發現自己還是抱著事情終究會好轉的希望。
pattern: S + found herself clinging onto + N + that + S + would + V
simple: Stop clinging onto the past and focus on building your future.

example: Participants can collect their race packs from the registration desk on the morning of the event.
example_cn: 參賽者可以在活動當天早上到報到處領取賽事物資。
pattern: S + can collect + N + from + N + on + 時間
simple: She collects her children from school every afternoon at three o'clock.

example: Governments around the world are taking stronger measures to combat against the rising tide of cybercrime.
example_cn: 世界各國政府正採取更強硬的措施，來打擊日益猖獗的網路犯罪。
pattern: S + are taking measures to combat against + N
simple: Communities must work together to combat against the spread of misinformation.

example: Health workers who come into contact with infectious patients must follow strict protective protocols.
example_cn: 接觸傳染病患者的醫護人員，必須嚴格遵守防護規範。
pattern: S + who come into contact with + N + must + V + N
simple: Wash your hands after coming into contact with any unknown substances.

example: Once you commit to a goal, it is important to stay consistent and resist the temptation to give up.
example_cn: 一旦你下定決心要達成某個目標，保持穩定、抵抗放棄的誘惑就很重要。
pattern: Once + S + commit(s) to + N, it is + adj + to + V
simple: The government has committed to reducing carbon emissions by fifty percent.

example: The new product's performance was compared against industry benchmarks to determine if it met the required standards.
example_cn: 新產品的效能會跟業界基準做比較，來確認是否達到要求的標準。
pattern: N + was compared against + N + to + V
simple: Always compare current results against the targets set at the start of the year.

example: The new guidelines appear to conflict with the existing company policy on remote working arrangements.
example_cn: 新的指導方針似乎與公司現有的遠距工作政策有所衝突。
pattern: N + appear(s) to conflict with + N + on + N
simple: His personal values conflict directly with the demands of his job.

example: Before making any major changes to the curriculum, the principal consulted with teachers and parents alike.
example_cn: 在對課程做出重大調整之前，校長先諮詢了老師和家長的意見。
pattern: Before + V-ing, S + consulted with + 人 + and + 人 + alike
simple: You should consult with a financial advisor before making any large investments.

example: Every small action you take to reduce waste contributes towards a healthier and more sustainable planet.
example_cn: 你為了減少浪費所做的每一件小事，都有助於打造更健康、更永續的地球。
pattern: N + contributes towards + N + and + adj + N
simple: Regular exercise contributes towards both physical and mental wellbeing.

chinese: 在沒有…的情況下應對、沒有…也能撐過去
example: After the internet went down, the team struggled to cope without access to the shared online documents.
example_cn: 網路斷線後，團隊因為無法存取共用的線上文件而難以應對。
pattern: After + S + V, S + struggled to cope without + N
simple: I honestly don't know how I would cope without your support.

chinese: 依照…評估、以…為基準評量
example: Each candidate's performance during the interview will be evaluated against a clearly defined set of criteria.
example_cn: 每位候選人在面試中的表現，都會根據一套明確的標準來評估。
pattern: N + will be evaluated against + N + of + N
simple: All applications are evaluated against the same objective standards.

example: The more she reads, the more she discovers about the fascinating history of her own family's origins.
example_cn: 她讀得越多，就越發現自己家族起源的迷人歷史。
pattern: The more + S + V, the more + S + discovers about + N
simple: What have you discovered about the cause of the problem so far?

example: The management team met on Friday to discuss about the budget cuts and their impact on staffing levels.
example_cn: 管理團隊在週五開會，討論預算削減及其對人力配置的影響。
pattern: S + met to discuss about + N + and + N
simple: We need to sit down and discuss about the next steps for the project.

chinese: 區分、辨別（兩者之間的差異）
example: Young children often find it difficult to distinguish between what is real and what is imaginary.
example_cn: 年幼的孩子常常很難分辨什麼是真實、什麼是想像。
pattern: S + find(s) it + adj + to distinguish between + N + and + N
simple: It is crucial to distinguish between correlation and causation in research.

chinese: 多元化進入、拓展至（新領域）
example: The company diversified into renewable energy after years of relying solely on fossil fuel revenues.
example_cn: 這間公司在多年來只依賴化石燃料收入後，開始多角化經營投入再生能源。
pattern: S + diversified into + N + after + 時間 + of + V-ing
simple: Smart investors diversify into different asset classes to reduce risk.

example: What he enjoys most about working from home is the freedom to structure his own daily schedule.
example_cn: 他覺得在家工作最棒的地方，就是可以自由安排自己每天的行程。
pattern: What S + enjoys most about + V-ing + is + N
simple: What do you enjoy most about living in this city?

chinese: 在…之間建立（關係或聯繫）
example: The research attempts to establish a clear link between childhood stress and adult mental health outcomes.
example_cn: 這項研究試圖建立童年壓力與成年心理健康結果之間的明確關聯。
pattern: S + attempts to establish + N + between + N + and + N
simple: We need to establish better communication between the two departments.

example: A regular exchange between schools in different countries helps students develop a global perspective.
example_cn: 不同國家的學校定期交流，有助於學生培養全球視野。
pattern: N + between + N + helps + 人 + V + N
simple: There was a lively exchange between the two speakers on stage.

chinese: 探索…之間的（關係或差異）
example: The documentary explores the contrast between life in the city and life in remote rural communities.
example_cn: 這部紀錄片探討了城市生活與偏遠鄉村社區生活之間的對比。
pattern: S + explores + N + between + N + and + N
simple: This paper explores the relationship between diet and cognitive function.

example: A sense of nervous excitement passed among the contestants as they waited backstage for the competition to begin.
example_cn: 參賽者在後台等待比賽開始時，彼此之間瀰漫著一股緊張又興奮的氣氛。
pattern: N + passed among + N + as + S + V
simple: The petition was passed among the residents for everyone to sign.

chinese: 在…身上練習、對…進行練習
example: Medical students are required to practice on simulation models before treating real patients in a clinic.
example_cn: 醫學系學生在診所實際治療病人之前，必須先在模擬模型上練習。
pattern: S + are required to practice on + N + before + V-ing
simple: She practiced her speech on her family before the big presentation.

chinese: 在…之間奔跑；在…之間流傳
example: A rumour began to run among the staff that the office would be relocating to another city next year.
example_cn: 員工之間開始流傳一則謠言，說辦公室明年要搬到另一個城市。
pattern: N + began to run among + N + that + S + would + V
simple: The children ran freely among the trees in the park all afternoon.

example: The accountant absconded with nearly two million dollars of company funds before anyone noticed.
example_cn: 那名會計在沒人注意的情況下，捲走公司將近兩百萬美元的資金潛逃了。
pattern: S + absconded with + N + before + S + V
simple: The thief absconded with the jewellery before police could arrive.

example: She agonized over the decision for weeks before finally choosing to accept the job offer overseas.
example_cn: 她為這個決定苦惱了好幾個星期，最後才決定接受海外的工作機會。
pattern: S + agonized over + N + for + 時間 + before + V-ing
simple: Stop agonizing over small details and just make a decision.

example: He spent years doing community service in an effort to atone for the mistakes he had made in his youth.
example_cn: 他花了好幾年做社區服務，試圖為年輕時犯下的錯誤贖罪。
pattern: S + spent + 時間 + V-ing + in an effort to atone for + N
simple: Nothing he did seemed enough to atone for the hurt he had caused.

chinese: 意識到、開始覺察（某事實或問題）
example: Society is slowly awakening to the serious consequences of ignoring mental health in the workplace.
example_cn: 社會正逐漸意識到，忽視職場心理健康會帶來嚴重的後果。
pattern: S + is slowly awakening to + N + of + V-ing + N
simple: He only awakened to the danger when it was almost too late.

chinese: （建築或土地）背面緊鄰、後方朝向
example: The garden backs onto a quiet nature reserve, making it an incredibly peaceful place to relax.
example_cn: 這座花園後面連接著一個安靜的自然保護區，是個極其寧靜的放鬆去處。
pattern: N + backs onto + N, making it + N + to + V
simple: Our house backs onto the park, so the children can play outside easily.

example: The union leaders spent months bargaining with the management over pay rises and improved working conditions.
example_cn: 工會領袖花了幾個月的時間，與管理階層協商加薪和改善工作條件的事宜。
pattern: S + spent + 時間 + bargaining with + 人 + over + N
simple: You can try bargaining with the seller at the market for a lower price.

example: He walked into the dark room and bashed into the corner of the bed before finding the light switch.
example_cn: 他走進漆黑的房間，在找到電燈開關之前，一頭撞上了床角。
pattern: S + V + and bashed into + N + before + V-ing
simple: The shopping trolley bashed into the display stand and knocked everything over.

chinese: 沉浸在（陽光、榮耀）中；盡情享受
example: After winning the championship, the team basked in the glory and celebrated late into the night.
example_cn: 贏得冠軍後，全隊沉浸在榮耀之中，慶祝到深夜。
pattern: After + V-ing, S + basked in + N + and + V
simple: She sat on the beach, basking in the warm afternoon sunshine.

example: Thick clouds blotted out the sun for most of the afternoon, making the outdoor event feel gloomy.
example_cn: 厚重的雲層遮蔽了太陽大半天，讓戶外活動顯得陰沉沉的。
pattern: N + blotted out + N + for + 時間, making + N + V
simple: He tried to blot out the painful memory but it kept coming back.

chinese: 脫口說出、不假思索地說出
example: In her excitement, she blurted out the surprise party plans before anyone had the chance to stop her.
example_cn: 她一時興奮，在別人來得及阻止之前，就把驚喜派對的計畫脫口而出。
pattern: In + N, S + blurted out + N + before + S + had the chance to + V
simple: He blurted out the answer without even raising his hand.

example: The main road branches off into three separate lanes just before the entrance to the tunnel.
example_cn: 主幹道在隧道入口前分岔成三條獨立的車道。
pattern: N + branches off into + N + just before + N
simple: The conversation branched off into a completely different topic.

chinese: 輕鬆完成、毫不費力地通過
example: She breezed through the entrance exam without revising much because the content came naturally to her.
example_cn: 她幾乎沒怎麼複習就輕鬆通過了入學考試，因為內容對她來說很自然。
pattern: S + breezed through + N + without + V-ing + because + S + V
simple: He breezed through the interview and was offered the job on the spot.

example: The event planners forgot to budget for the cost of hiring a professional sound system for the venue.
example_cn: 活動策劃人忘了把租用專業音響系統的費用編入預算。
pattern: S + forgot to budget for + N + of + V-ing
simple: Always budget for unexpected costs when planning a large event.

chinese: 增加體重和肌肉；使增大
example: The young athlete worked with a nutritionist to bulk up safely before the competitive season began.
example_cn: 這位年輕運動員在賽季開始前與營養師合作，安全地增重練壯。
pattern: S + worked with + 人 + to bulk up + adv + before + N + V
simple: He spent the off-season trying to bulk up for next year's competition.

chinese: 忙碌穿梭、嗡嗡地飛來飛去；（消息）流傳
example: Staff were buzzing around the office all morning preparing for the important client visit in the afternoon.
example_cn: 整個早上員工都在辦公室忙進忙出，為下午的重要客戶來訪做準備。
pattern: S + were buzzing around + 地點 + preparing for + N
simple: Rumours were buzzing around the office about a possible merger.

example: After holding the shares for over ten years, he decided to cash out and use the profits to retire early.
example_cn: 持有這支股票超過十年後，他決定獲利了結，用這筆錢提早退休。
pattern: After + V-ing + for + 時間, S + decided to cash out and + V
simple: Many early investors chose to cash out when the company went public.

chinese: 查核、了解狀況；進行健康檢查
example: The nurse called to check up on the patient and make sure she was following her prescribed recovery plan.
example_cn: 護理師打電話來追蹤病人的狀況，確認她有按照規定的復原計畫進行。
pattern: S + called to check up on + 人 + and + V
simple: My manager checks up on the team's progress at the end of every week.

example: The authorities clamped down on illegal street vendors after complaints from local business owners increased.
example_cn: 在當地店家投訴增加後，有關當局開始嚴厲取締非法路邊攤販。
pattern: S + clamped down on + N + after + S + V
simple: The school clamped down on mobile phone use during class hours.

chinese: 弄得雜亂、堆滿（使空間混亂）
example: Old boxes and broken equipment had cluttered up the storage room to the point where nothing could be found.
example_cn: 舊紙箱和壞掉的設備把儲藏室塞得亂七八糟，東西根本找不到。
pattern: N + had cluttered up + N + to the point where + S + V
simple: Don't clutter up your desk with things you don't need every day.

example: After weeks of denying it, he finally came clean about his involvement in the financial irregularities.
example_cn: 在否認了好幾週之後，他終於坦承自己涉及那些財務違規事件。
pattern: After + 時間 + of + V-ing, S + finally came clean about + N
simple: It's better to come clean now than to let the truth come out later.

chinese: 喚起（記憶或畫面）；憑空變出
example: The smell of fresh bread always conjures up warm memories of spending weekends at her grandmother's house.
example_cn: 新鮮麵包的香味總會勾起溫暖的回憶，讓她想起在奶奶家度過的週末時光。
pattern: N + always conjures up + N + of + V-ing
simple: The old photograph conjured up memories of a much simpler time.

example: Curious onlookers crowded around the street performer as he began his spectacular fire-breathing act.
example_cn: 好奇的圍觀群眾擠在街頭藝人周圍，看他開始精彩的噴火表演。
pattern: S + crowded around + N + as + S + V
simple: The students crowded around the notice board to see the exam results.

example: He cruised through the written examination with ease, finishing a full thirty minutes before the time was up.
example_cn: 他輕輕鬆鬆就考完了筆試，還比規定時間早了整整三十分鐘交卷。
pattern: S + cruised through + N + with ease, finishing + 時間 + before + S + V
simple: The experienced driver cruised through the heavy traffic without stress.

example: The ancient wall finally crumbled under the pressure of years of erosion and neglect.
example_cn: 那面古老的牆壁在長年侵蝕與無人維護之下，終於崩塌了。
pattern: S + finally crumbled under + N + of + N
simple: She crumbled under the pressure of managing everything on her own.

example: The hikers crunched down behind the bushes to avoid being spotted by the grazing deer ahead.
example_cn: 登山客彎低身子躲在灌木叢後面，以免被前方正在吃草的鹿群發現。
pattern: S + crunched down behind + N + to avoid + V-ing + by + N
simple: He crunched down the cardboard boxes to make more room in the bin.

chinese: 降低程度、減少（強度或行為）
example: The coach asked the player to dial back his aggression on the field before he received another penalty.
example_cn: 教練要求那名球員在場上收斂一下他的侵略性，免得又吃一次犯規。
pattern: S + asked + 人 + to dial back + N + before + S + V
simple: The government decided to dial back its spending during the recession.

chinese: 挖出；費力找出（久未使用的東西）
example: It took her ages to dig out the old contract from the bottom of the filing cabinet in the storeroom.
example_cn: 她花了好久的時間，才從儲藏室檔案櫃的最底層把那份舊合約翻出來。
pattern: It took + 人 + 時間 + to dig out + N + from + N
simple: Can you dig out the old photos from when we were at university?

chinese: 分發、大量給予；（非正式）批評或懲罰
example: The supervisor was quick to dish out criticism but rarely offered praise when the team performed well.
example_cn: 主管很會批評人，但團隊表現好的時候卻很少給予讚美。
pattern: S + was quick to dish out + N + but + V + when + S + V
simple: Volunteers dished out hot meals to the flood victims at the shelter.

example: Realising she had left her bag at the café, she doubled back quickly before the shop closed for lunch.
example_cn: 發現自己把包包忘在咖啡廳後，她趕在店家午休打烊前迅速折返回去。
pattern: Realising + S + had + p.p., S + doubled back + adv + before + S + V
simple: The fox doubled back on its tracks to confuse the hunting dogs.

chinese: 加倍努力；堅持（有爭議的立場）
example: Instead of backing down from the criticism, the politician chose to double down on his original statement.
example_cn: 那位政治人物面對批評時不但沒有退讓，反而更加堅持自己原本的說法。
pattern: Instead of + V-ing, S + chose to double down on + N
simple: When things got tough, the team doubled down on their efforts.

example: Since no one could agree on who should go first, they decided to draw lots to make it fair.
example_cn: 因為沒有人能同意誰該先上場，他們決定抽籤來公平決定。
pattern: Since + S + V, S + decided to draw lots to + V
simple: They drew lots to decide which team would present their findings first.

example: As the years passed after graduation, he found that many of his closest friendships slowly drifted away.
example_cn: 畢業後隨著時間流逝，他發現許多最要好的朋友漸漸疏遠了。
pattern: As + S + V, S + found that + N + slowly drifted away
simple: The small boat drifted away from the shore in the strong current.

chinese: 悄悄溜走、臨時迴避（責任）
example: He ducked out of the boring meeting early by pretending he had an urgent call to take.
example_cn: 他假裝有緊急電話要接，提早溜出那場無聊的會議。
pattern: S + ducked out of + N + by + V-ing
simple: She always finds a way to duck out of doing the washing up.

chinese: 過多糾結於、反覆思考（消極的事）
example: There is no point dwelling upon past failures when you have the opportunity to learn and move forward.
example_cn: 既然你有機會從中學習並繼續前進，就沒必要一直糾結在過去的失敗上。
pattern: There is no point dwelling upon + N + when + S + V
simple: Try not to dwell upon mistakes — focus on what you can do better.

chinese: 緩緩插入、擠進去；（話語）插進去
example: She waited patiently for a gap in the conversation before edging in a comment about the proposal.
example_cn: 她耐心等待談話的空檔，才順勢插話提出對那個提案的意見。
pattern: S + waited for + N + before edging in + N
simple: He managed to edge his car in between two larger vehicles.

example: His friends egged him on to attempt the dare, even though he knew it was a foolish idea.
example_cn: 他的朋友一直慫恿他去接受挑戰，即使他知道那是個愚蠢的點子。
pattern: S + egged + 人 + on to + V, even though + S + V
simple: The crowd egged on the street performer to try a more dangerous trick.

chinese: 著手展開、踏上（旅程或計畫）
example: The university has embarked upon an ambitious programme to double its research output within five years.
example_cn: 這所大學已經啟動一項雄心勃勃的計畫，要在五年內將研究成果翻倍。
pattern: S + has embarked upon + N + to + V + within + 時間
simple: She embarked upon a new chapter of her life with courage and optimism.

example: The conference ended off on a high note with a powerful keynote speech from the guest of honour.
example_cn: 這場會議在貴賓發表了一場精彩的專題演講後，圓滿收尾。
pattern: N + ended off on a high note with + N + from + N
simple: Let's end off the evening with a toast to everyone's hard work.

chinese: 強制施加於、強迫（某人）接受
example: New rules were enforced upon all staff members following the series of workplace safety incidents.
example_cn: 在發生一連串職場安全事件後，所有員工都被強制執行新的規定。
pattern: N + were enforced upon + 人 + following + N
simple: Strict rules were enforced upon visitors to protect the ancient site.

example: After a rocky start, the team's performance began to even out and results became more consistent.
example_cn: 在經歷了不順的開局後，團隊的表現開始趨於穩定，成果也變得更加一致。
pattern: After + N, N + began to even out and + V
simple: Use a scraper to even out the frosting across the top of the cake.

example: The basketball player faked out the defender with a quick shoulder movement before driving to the basket.
example_cn: 那位籃球員用一個快速的肩膀假動作騙過防守者，然後切入籃下。
pattern: S + faked out + 人 + with + N + before + V-ing
simple: The magician completely faked out the audience with his sleight of hand.

example: Once the main pipe is in position, use sand to fill around it firmly before laying the concrete on top.
example_cn: 一旦主水管就定位，先用沙子將周圍確實填實，再在上面鋪設混凝土。
pattern: Once + N + V, use + N + to fill around + N + before + V-ing
simple: Fill around the edges with sealant to prevent any water from getting in.

chinese: 立即反擊、迅速回應（批評或攻擊）
example: When the journalist questioned his integrity, the minister fired back with a sharp and detailed rebuttal.
example_cn: 當記者質疑他的誠信時，這位部長立刻以尖銳且詳細的反駁回擊。
pattern: When + S + V, S + fired back with + N
simple: She fired back at the criticism with a calm but firm response.

example: Tourists from all over the world flock together in the old town square during the summer festival season.
example_cn: 在夏季節慶期間，來自世界各地的遊客都聚集在舊城區的廣場上。
pattern: N + from + 地點 + flock together + 地點 + during + N
simple: Birds of a feather flock together — we attract people similar to ourselves.

example: Seeing the traffic lights turn green, the driver floored it to make it through the junction in time.
example_cn: 看到交通號誌轉為綠燈，駕駛猛踩油門，及時衝過路口。
pattern: V-ing, S + floored it to + V + in time
simple: We're running late — just floor it and we might still make the flight.

example: When the market leader reduced its prices, every other company in the industry quickly followed suit.
example_cn: 當市場龍頭降價時，業界其他公司也迅速跟進。
pattern: When + S + V, S + quickly followed suit
simple: One student started applauding and the rest of the audience followed suit.

chinese: 聯合對付、結夥欺負（某人）
example: The smaller suppliers ganged up against the dominant retailer to negotiate fairer trading terms together.
example_cn: 較小的供應商聯合起來對抗主導的零售商，共同協商更公平的交易條件。
pattern: S + ganged up against + N + to + V + together
simple: It isn't fair when a group of people gang up on one individual.

example: The new training programme is geared towards helping experienced employees develop leadership skills.
example_cn: 這項新的培訓計畫旨在幫助有經驗的員工培養領導能力。
pattern: N + is geared towards + V-ing + N
simple: This course is geared towards beginners with no prior experience.

example: The lead negotiator refused to give ground to the opposing team on the issue of intellectual property rights.
example_cn: 首席談判代表拒絕在智慧財產權議題上向對方讓步。
pattern: S + refused to give ground to + 人 + on + N
simple: Neither side was willing to give ground to the other during talks.

example: The experienced presenter glided through the complex material as if it were the simplest thing in the world.
example_cn: 那位經驗豐富的講者輕鬆流暢地講解複雜的內容，彷彿那是世界上最簡單的事。
pattern: S + glided through + N + as if + S + V
simple: The skater glided through the routine without a single mistake.

example: He glossed through the contract without reading it carefully and missed several important clauses.
example_cn: 他草率地瀏覽合約，沒有仔細閱讀，結果錯過了幾個重要條款。
pattern: S + glossed through + N + without + V-ing + and + V
